Matthew1:1 Abrahama thlah, Davida thlah, Isua Krista thlahtute inthlah dan chanchin chu:" 
Matthew1:2 Abrahama'n Isaaka a hring a; Isaaka'n Jakoba a hring a; Jakoba'n Juba leh a unaute a hring a; 
Matthew1:3 Juda'n Tamari lakah Pharesa leh Zera a hring a; Pharesa'n Eroma a hring a; Eroma'n Arama a hring a; 
Matthew1:4 Arama'n Aminadaba a hring a; Aminadaba'n Nasona a hring a; Nasona'n Salmona a hring; 
Matthew1:5 Salmona'n Rahabi lakah Boaza a hring; Boaza'n Ruthi lakah Obida a hring a; Obida'n Jesaia a hring a; 
Matthew1:6 Jesaia'n Lal Davida a hring a. Tin, Davida'n Uria nupui lakah Solomona a hring a;" 
Matthew1:7 Solomona'n Rehoboama a hring a; Rehoboama'n Abia a hring a; Abia'n Asa a hring a; 
Matthew1:8 Asa'n Jehosaphata a hring a; Jehosaphata'n Jehorama a hring a; Jehorama'n Uzia a hring a; 
Matthew1:9 Uzia'n Jothama a hring a; Jothama'n Ahaza a hring a; Ahaza'n Hezekia a hring a; 
Matthew1:10 Hezekia'n Manasea a hring a; Manasea'n Amona a hring a; Amona'n Josia a hring a; 
Matthew1:11 Babulon lama sala an hruai lai vel khan Josia'n Jekonia leh a unaute a hring a. 
Matthew1:12 Tin, Babulon lama sala an hruai hnuin Jekonia'n Salathiela a hring; Salathiela'n Zerubabela a hring a;" 
Matthew1:13 Zerubabela'n Abiuda a hring a; Abiuda'n Eliakima a hring a; Eliakima'n Azora hring a; 
Matthew1:14 Azora'n Zadoka a hring a; Zadoka'n Akima a hring; Akima'n Eliuda a hring a; 
Matthew1:15 Eliuda'n Eleazara a hring a; Eleazara'n Matthana a hring a; Matthana'n Jakoba a hring a; 
Matthew1:16 Jakoba'n Josefa, Mari pasal chu a hring a; chu mi Mari lakah chuan Isua, Krista an tih hi, a lo piang ta a." 
Matthew1:17 Chutichuan, chhuan zawng zawng chu, Abrahama atangin Davida thlengin, chhuan sawm leh chhuan li a ni a; Davida atangin Babulon lama sala an hruai thlengin, chhuan sawm leh chhuan li a ni a; Babulon lama sala an hruai atangin Krista thlengin, chhuan sawm leh chhuan li a ni a." 
Matthew1:18 Tin, Isua Krista lo pian dan chu hetiang a ni: A nu Mari chu Josefa nen an inhual laiin, an inpawl hmain,Thlarau Thianghlimin a raitir tih an lo hre ta a." 
Matthew1:19 Tichuan, a pasal tur Josefa chu mi fel tak a ni a, tlangthantir a duh lo a, a rukin bansan a tum a." 
Matthew1:20 Nimahsela, chu'ng thu chu a ngaihtuah laiin, ngai teh, a mangah Lalpa vantirhkoh a hnenah a lo inlar a, Josef, nang Davida fapa, i nupui hual Mari chu neih hlau suh; a naupai chu Thlarau Thianghlim laka mi a ni a sin." 
Matthew1:21 Fapa a hring ang a, a hmingah ISUA i sa ang: Ani chuan A mite an thil tihsual lakah a chhandam dawn si a, a ti a." 
Matthew1:22 Tin, Lalpa zawlnei kaah nula thianghlim chu a rai ang a, fapa a hring ang a, A hmingah Emmanuela an sa ang, tia a sawi kha." 
Matthew1:23 A lo thlen theihna turin chung zawng zawng chu a lo awm a ni. (Emmanuela chu kan hnena Pathian awm tihna a ni). 
Matthew1:24 Tichuan, Josefa chu a muhil a tho a, Lalpa vantirhkohin a hnena thu a pek ang chuan a ti a, a nupui hual chu a nei ta a.Nimahsela, fapa a hrin hma loh zawng a pawl lo; tin, a hmingah ISUA a sa ta a." 
Matthew1:25 Nimahsela, fapa a hrin hma loh zawng a pawl lo; tin, a hmingah ISUA a sa ta a." 
Matthew2:1 Tin, lal Heroda a lal laia Judai rama Bethlehem khuaa Isua a lo pianin khaw chhak lam ata mi fingte Jerusalem khuaah an lo kal a." 
Matthew2:2 Khawiah nge Judate lal lo piang chu? Khaw chhak lamah a arsi kan hmu a, amah chibai buk turin kan lo kal a ni, an ti a." 
Matthew2:3 Tin, lal Heroda chuan chu chu a hriat veleh a mangang ta a, Jerusalem-a mi zawng zawng pawh an mangang ve a." 
Matthew2:4 Tichuan, puithiam lalte leh lehkha ziaktute zawng zawng a ko khawm a. Krista pianna tur chu a zawt a." 
Matthew2:5 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah Judai rama Bethlehem khuaah heti hian zawlneiin a ziak kha an ti a." 
Matthew2:6 Nang, Bethlehem, Judai rama mi, Judai khawpuite zingah i te ber tawp lo! I chhung atangin awptu a lo chhuak dawn si a, ka mi Israelhote vengtu tur chu, tih hi." 
Matthew2:7 Chu mi hnuah chuan Heroda'n a rukin mi fingte chu a ko a, dilchhut takin arsi lan lai chu a zawt chhuak a." 
Matthew2:8 Tin, anni chu Bethlehem khuaah a kaltir a. Kal ta u la, naute thu chu dilchhut takin zawt chhuak rawh u; tin, kei pawhin amah chu chibai ka rawn buk ve theihna'n in hmuh veleh mi rawn hrilh ang che u, a ti a." 
Matthew2:9 Tin, lal thu chu an hria a, an kal ta a; tin, ngai teh, khaw chhak lama arsi an hmuh kha, naute awmna chung zawn a thlena a din hma loh zawng, an hmaah a kal zel a." 
Matthew2:10 Tin, arsi chu an hmuhin an hlim nasa em em a." 
Matthew2:11 Tin, in chhungah an va lut a, a nu Mari hnena naute chu an hmu a, an bawkkhup a, chibai an buk a; tin, an ro bawmte an hawng a, a hnenah chuan lawman - rangkachak te, beraw te, murra te - an pe a." 
Matthew2:12 Tin, Heroda hnenah kir leh lo turin an manga hrilha an awma vangin, anmahni khaw lamah kawng dangah an haw ta a." 
Matthew2:13 Tin, an hawn hnuin ngai teh, Lalpa vantirhkoh Josefa hnenah a mangah a inlar a. Tho la, naute leh a nu hruai la, Aigupta ramah tlan bo rawh, ka hrilh leh hma loh che zawng chutah chuan awm reng ang che; Heroda'n naute tiboral turin a zawng dawn a ni, a ti a." 
Matthew2:14 Tichuan, a tho a, a zan a zanin naute leh a nu chu a hruai a, Aigupta ramah a kal ta a." 
Matthew2:15 Heroda thih hma loh zawng chutah chuan a awm reng a; Lalpa'n zawlnei kaah, ka fapa chu Aigupta ram atang ka ko chhuak a, tia a sawi kha a lo thlen theihna'n." 
Matthew2:16 Chutih lai chuan Heroda'n, mi fingte tihder a nih a inhriat veleh a thinur em em a, mi a tir a, a hun lai tak thu dilchhut taka mi fingte a zawh chhuah ang khan Bethlehem khua leh a vel zawng zawnga mipa naupang kum hnih chin hnuai lam chu an zain a that ta vek a." 
Matthew2:17 Chutih lai chuan zawlnei Jeremia sawi kha a lo thleng ta. 
Matthew2:18 Rama khuaah thawm an hria, tap te, mitthi ngaia chiau vawng vawng te; Rakili chuan a fate a tah a, an awm tawh loha vangin a thlamuan theih loh." 
Matthew2:19 Tichuan, Heroda thih hnuin Lalpa vantirhkoh chu Aigupta rama awm Josefa mangah a inlar a." 
Matthew2:20 Tho la, naute leh a nu hruai la, Israel ramah haw rawh: naute thah tumte kha an thi tawh e, a ti a." 
Matthew2:21 Tichuan, a tho a, naute leh a nu chu a hruai a, Israel ramah a lut ta a." 
Matthew2:22 Nimahsela, Arkeulasa a pa Heroda ai awhin Judai ramah a lal tih a hriatin chuta kal a hlau ta a; tin, a manga hrilha a awm angin Galili lamah a kal ta daih a.Khaw pakhat Nazaret an tihah chuan a va awm ta a: Ani chu 'Nazaret mi' an ti ang, tia, zawlneite sawi kha a lo thlen theihna'n." 
Matthew2:23 Khaw pakhat Nazaret an tihah chuan a va awm ta a: Ani chu 'Nazaret mi' an ti ang, tia, zawlneite sawi kha a lo thlen theihna'n." 
Matthew3:1 Tin, chu'ng lai chuan Baptistu Johana chu Judai thlalerah thu hrilin a lo kal a." 
Matthew3:2 Sim rawh u! Vanram chu a hnai tawh e, tiin." 
Matthew3:3 (Amah chu a ni, zawlnei Isaia'n, thlalera mi au rawl chuan, 'Lalpa lamlian sial u la, A kawngte tingil rawh u,' a ti, tia a sawia kha)." 
Matthew3:4 Tin, chu mi Johana chuan sanghawngsei hmul puan a sin a, a kawng chu savun kawnghrenin a hreng a; a chaw chu khaukhuap leh khawizu a ni." 
Matthew3:5 Chu mi lai chuan Jerusalem khuaa mi te, Judai rama mi zawng zawngte, Jordan lui dung vela mi zawng zawngte an chhuak a, a hnen lamah an kal a." 
Matthew3:6 An sualte thupha chawiin Jordan luiah chuan, ama hnenah baptisma an chang ta hlawm a." 
Matthew3:7 Nimahsela, Pharisaite leh Saddukaite tam tak a baptisma chang tura lo kal a hmuh veleh an hnenah, Rul thlahte u! Thinur lo thleng tur hi tlansan turin tuin nge zilh che u?" 
Matthew3:8 Sim hming pu tlakin rah rawh u. 
Matthew3:9 Abrahama kan thlahtu a ni a lawm, tiin, inngaihtuah suh u; Pathianin he'ng lungte hi Abrahama thlahahte a dintir thei e, ka tih che u hi." 
Matthew3:10 Tun apangin thing bul tinah hreipui an dah ta; chutichuan thing tin rah thaa rah lo apiang an kit a, meiah an paih thin." 
Matthew3:11 Kei zawngin in simna turin tuiin ka baptis thin che u a; nimahsela ka hnunga lo kal tur chu keimah aiin a ropui zawk a, a pheikhawk keng tlak pawh ka ni lo e. Ani chuan Thlarau Thianghlim leh meiin a baptis ang che u." 
Matthew3:12 A kutin a sisep a keng a, a hruih a zap fai hliau ang a, zemah chuan a buh a khung ang. A si erawh chu mei mit thei loin a halral ang, a ti a." 
Matthew3:13 Chu mi lai chuan a hnena baptisma chang turin, Galili ram atangin Jordan luiah Johana hnenah Isua a lo kal a." 
Matthew3:14 Johana erawh chuan, i mi baptis ka tul zawk si a, ka hnenah i lo kal zawk a ni maw? tiin, khap a tum a." 
Matthew3:15 Nimahsela Isua'n a hnenah, Tunah rem ti hram rawh, hetianga felna zawng zawng hlen chhuah hi kan tan a mawi a ni, tiin a chhang a. Tichuan, rem a ti ta a." 
Matthew3:16 Tin, Isua'n baptisma a chan veleh tui atang a chhuak ta nghal a: tin, ngai teh, a tan van a lo inhawng a, Pathian Thlarau chu thuro anga lo chhukin, a chunga lo fu a hmu a.Tin, ngai teh, van atangin awin, Hei hi ka Fapa duh tak, ka lawm em ema chu a ni, a ti a." 
Matthew3:17 Tin, ngai teh, van atangin awin, Hei hi ka Fapa duh tak, ka lawm em ema chu a ni, a ti a." 
Matthew4:1 Chu mi zawhah chuan Isua chu Diabola thlema awm turin thlalerah Thlarau hruai luhin a awm ta a. 
Matthew4:2 Tin, ni sawmli leh zan sawmli chaw a nghei hnuin a ril a lo tam ta a." 
Matthew4:3 Tin, thlemtu chu a lo kal a, a hnenah, Pathian Fapa i nih chuan he'ng lung hi chhanga chang turin thu pe rawh, a ti a." 
Matthew4:4 Nimahsela, Ani chuan, 'Mihring hi chhang chauhin an nung lo ang a, Pathian kaa thu tin chhuakin an nung zawk ang,' tih ziak a ni, tiin a chhang a." 
Matthew4:5 Chu mi zawhah chuan Diabola'n khaw thianghlimah chuan a hruai lut a, Pathian biak in chhip zumah chuan a dah a." 
Matthew4:6 Tin, a hnenah, Pathian Fapa i nih chuan tla thla rawh, 'I chung thuah zawng A vantirhkohte chu thu a pe ang a, an kutin an dawm ang chia, chutilochuan, i kein lung i chhuih hlauh dah ang e, tih ziak a ni si a, a ti a." 
Matthew4:7 Isua'n a hnenah, 'Lalpa i Pathian fiah suh,' tih ziak a ni ve bawk e, a ti a." 
Matthew4:8 Tin, Diabola chuan tlang sang takah a hruai leh a, khawvel ram zawng zawng leh a, Khawvel ram zawng zawng leh a ropuina chu a entir a." 
Matthew4:9 Tin, a hnenah, bawkkhupin chibai mi buk la, he'ng zawng zawng hi ka pe vek ang che, a ti a." 
Matthew4:10 Chu veleh Isua'n a hnenah, Setan, kal bo daih rawh! 'Lalpa i Pathian chibai buk la, Ama rawng chauh bawl rawh,' tih ziak a ni, a ti a." 
Matthew4:11 Chu mi hnuah chuan Diabola chuan a kalsan ta a. Tin, ngai teh, vantirhkohte'n a rawng an rawn bawlsak ta a." 
Matthew4:12 Tin, Johana an man tih Isua'n a hriat veleh Galili ramah a kal ta daih a." 
Matthew4:13 Tin, Nazaret khua a kalsan a, Kapernaum khuaah a awm ta reng a. (Chu chu Zebulon leh Nephthaleim biala, dil kama awm a ni)." 
Matthew4:14 Zawlnei Isaia thu sawi kha a lo thlen theihna'n. 
Matthew4:15 Dil lama, Jordan rala, Zebulon ram leh Nephthaleim ram, Jentailte Galili," 
Matthew4:16 Thim hnuaia thute chuan eng nasa tak an hmu a, thihna hmun leh a hlima thute chungah chuan Eng a lo chhuak ta a." 
Matthew4:17 Chuta chinah chuan Isua'n, Sim rawh u! van ram a hnai tawh e, tiin a hril tan ta a." 
Matthew4:18 Tin, Galili dil kama a len pahin, unau pahnih, Simona (Petera an tih chu) a unau Andria nen, dilah chuan len dengin a hmu a; sangha mantu an ni a." 
Matthew4:19 Ani chuan an hnenah, Mi zui rawh u, tichuan mihring mantuah ka siam ang che u, a ti a." 
Matthew4:20 Tin, lente chu kalsanin an zui ta nghal a." 
Matthew4:21 Tin, chuta tangin a kal zel a, unau dang pahnih, Zebedaia fapa Jakoba leh a unau Johana chu, an pa Zebedaia hnenah lawngah an lente siamthain a hmu a; tin, anni chu a ko ta a." 
Matthew4:22 Tichuan, lawng leh an pa chu an kalsan a, an zui ta nghal a." 
Matthew4:23 Tin, Isua'n an inkhawmna inahte zirtirin Ram Chanchin Tha chu hrilin mite zinga natna tinreng leh chak lohna tinreng tidamin Galili ram zawng zawng a fang vel a." 
Matthew4:24 Tin, Suria ram zawng zawngah a chanchin a thang ta a. Tichuan, mi dam lo zawng zawng, dam lohna leh natna tinreng tuarte, ramhuai mante, thla em ate, zengte, a hnenah an rawn hruai a; a lo tidam hlawm a.Galili ram atang te, Dekapoli khua atang te, Jerusalem khua atang te, Judai ram atang te, Jordan ral atangte chuan mipui tam takin amah an zui bawk a." 
Matthew4:25 Galili ram atang te, Dekapoli khua atang te, Jerusalem khua atang te, Judai ram atang te, Jordan ral atangte chuan mipui tam takin amah an zui bawk a." 
Matthew5:1 Tichuan, mipuite chu a hmuhin tlangah a kal chho a, tin, a thu a, a zirtirte a hnenah an lo kal a." 
Matthew5:2 Tin, thu a sawi a, anmahni a zirtir a." 
Matthew5:3 Rilrua retheite chu an eng a thawl e; van ram an ta a ni si a. 
Matthew5:4 Lungngaite chu an eng a thawl e, thlamuanin an la awm dawn si a." 
Matthew5:5 Thuhnuairawlhte chu an eng a thawl e; lei hi an la rochung dawn si a. 
Matthew5:6 Felnaa riltama tuihalte chu an eng a thawl e; an la tlai dawn si a. 
Matthew5:7 Mi khawngaih thei takte chu an eng a thawl e; khawngaih an la hlawh dawn si a. 
Matthew5:8 Thinlunga thianghlimte chu an eng a thawl e; Pathian an la hmu dawn si a. 
Matthew5:9 Remna siamtute chu an eng a thawl e; Pathian faa vuahin an la awm dawn si a. 
Matthew5:10 Felna avanga tihduhdah tuar hnute chu an eng a thawl e; van ram an ta a ni si a. 
Matthew5:11 Miin keimah avanga an hau che u a, an tihduhdah che u a, dawta sual tinrenga an hek hunah che u, in eng a la thawl ang." 
Matthew5:12 Lawm u langin, nasa takin hlim rawh u; vanah in lawmman a awm hnem si a; chutiang bawkin in hmaa zawlnei awmte pawh an tihduhdah thin kha." 
Matthew5:13 Lei chi in ni e; nimahsela chi hi a dak tawh chuan engin nge an tihal leh ang? Chuta chinah chuan paih chhuaha mihringte rah mai mai chauhah lo chuan engatan mah a tlaktlai lo. 
Matthew5:14 Khawvel eng in ni e. Tlang chhipa khaw awm chu thuhruk theih a ni lo. 
Matthew5:15 Miin Khawnvar halin hrai hnuaiah an dah ngai lo, a dahnaah an dah zawk thin; tichuan in chhunga mi zawng zawng a en thin." 
Matthew5:16 Chutiang bawkin in eng chu mi mit hmuhin eng rawh se, chutichuan in thil tih thatte an hmu ang a, in Pa vana mi an chawimawi thei ang." 
Matthew5:17 Dan thu emaw, zawlneite thu emaw tiboral tura lo kal ka nih ring suh u; tiboral tura lo kal ni lo a, tifamkim tura lo kal ka ni zawk." 
Matthew5:18 Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, lei leh van hi a boral hma loh chuan Dan thu a mi chhun han te tak te emaw, thai han te tak te emaw, pakhat mah a boral tawp lo ang, a zaa a thlen kim hma loh zawng." 
Matthew5:19 Chutichuan, tupawh he'ng thupek te ber zingah hian pakhat pawh bawhchhiaa, chutiang ti ve tura mite zirtir apiang chu, van ramah chuan mi te ber an ti ang; amaherawhchu, tupawh zawma, zirtir ve apiang chu, van ramah chuan mi lian an ti ang." 
Matthew5:20 In felnain lehkhaziaktute leh Pharisaite felna hi a khum loh chuan, van ramah in lut tawp lo ang tih ka hrilh che u a nih hi." 
Matthew5:21 Hman laia mite hnenah chuan, 'Tual thah tur a ni lo,' an tih leh, 'Tupawh tual that apiang chu a chung thu rel a ni ang' tih a nih in hria a." 
Matthew5:22 Kei erawh chuan ka hrilh a che u, tupawh a unau chunga thinur apiang chu, a chungthu rel a ni ang a; tupawh a unau 'mi chhawih pa' ti apiang chu, rorelna sanga a chungthu rel a ni ang; tin, tupawh 'mi a pa' ti apiang chu, hremhmun meia kal tlak a ni ang tih ka hrilh a che u." 
Matthew5:23 Chutichuan, maicham bula i thilpek i hlan lai ngeia, i unauin i chungah lungnih lohna a nei tih i hriat chhuah leh chuan," 
Matthew5:24 chuta maicham hmaah chuan i thil pek chu hnutchhiah la, kal langin i unau rem zet la, chu mi hnuah chuan i thilpek chu rawn hlan rawh." 
Matthew5:25 I khingpui chu kalkawnga in kal dun laiin rem thuai rawh. Chutilochuan i khingpui chuan roreltu a mantir ang chia, roreltu chuan tiangkengtu hnenah chuan a pe ang chia, tan inah an khung hlauh dah ang che." 
Matthew5:26 Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che, Pawisa te pawh i tlak kim hma loh chuan, chuta ta chu i chhuak lo hul hual ang." 
Matthew5:27 'I uire tur a ni lo,' an ti tih in hre tawh." 
Matthew5:28 Kei erawh chuan, tupawh ngaih chaka hmeichhe melh apiang chu, a thinlungah a uire tawh reng a ni tih ka hrilh a che u." 
Matthew5:29 Tin, i mit ding lamin a tihtluk che chuan, kher chhuak la, paih daih rawh; i taksa a puma Gehenna-a paih ai chuan, i taksa peng pakhat boral chu i tan a tha zawk a ni." 
Matthew5:30 Tin, i kut ding lamin a tihtluk che chuan, tan la, paih daih rawh; i taksa a puma Gehenna-a kal ai chuan, i taksa peng pakhat boral chu i tan a tha zawk a ni." 
Matthew5:31 'Tupawh nupui ma apiang chuan inmakna lehkha a hnenah pe rawh se,' an ti bawk a." 
Matthew5:32 Kei erawh chuan, tupawh tlangval ngaih vang ni lo a, nupui ma apiang chuan, amah chu a uiretir a ni; tih, tupawh mak hnu nei apiang chu a uire a ni tih ka hrilh a che u." 
Matthew5:33 Hman laia mite hnenah, 'Dawtah chhia chham suh la, Lalpa hnenah i chhechhamte chu hlen zawk rawh,' an ti tih in hre tawh bawk a." 
Matthew5:34 Kei erawh chuan ka hrilh a che u, chhia reng reng chham suh u; van chhalin chham suh u, chu chu Pathian lalthutphah a ni si a." 
Matthew5:35 Lei chhalin chham hek suh u, chu chu a ke nghahchhan a ni si a; Jerusalem chhalin chham hek suh u, chu chu Lal ropui tak khawpui a ni si a." 
Matthew5:36 I lu chhalin i chham tur a ni hek lo, pakhat pawh i tivarin, i tidum thei si lo a." 
Matthew5:37 In thu sawi chu 'A ni, a ni,' 'Ni lo, ni lo' ni ngawt rawh se; chung aia chuang liam chu sual laka chhuak a ni." 
Matthew5:38 'Mit aia mit, ha aia ha' an ti tih in hre tawh." 
Matthew5:39 Kei erawh chuan ka hrilh a che u, mi sual dodal suh u; i biang ding lama bengtu hnenah chuan a lehlam pawh dawh rawh." 
Matthew5:40 Tin, tupawhin i lakah thupawi siamin, i kawr lak a tum chuan, i puan pawh laktir nghal rawh." 
Matthew5:41 Tin, mel khat kala phut luitu apiang che hnenah chuan mel hnih kal rawh." 
Matthew5:42 A diltu che hnenah pe la, i laka puk duhtu chu hawisan suh." 
Matthew5:43 'I vengte hmangaih la, i hmelma haw rawh,' an ti tih in hre tawh." 
Matthew5:44 Kei erawh chuan ka hrilh a che u, in hmelmate chu hmangaih u la, a tiduhdahtu che u chu tawngtaisak rawh u." 
Matthew5:45 In Pa vana mi fate in nih theihna'n; ani chuan mi sualte leh mi thate chungah chuan a ni a chhuahtir thin a, mi felte leh mi fel lote chungah pawh ruah a surtir thin a ni." 
Matthew5:46 In hmangaitute chauh in hmangaih hian lawmman eng nge in hmuh ang? chhiahkhawntute pawhin chutiangin an ti ve lo'm ni? 
Matthew5:47 Tin, in unaute chauh chibai in buk hian eng nge in tih hnem chuan bik? Jentailte pawhin chutiangin an ti ve lo'm ni?Chutichuan, in Pa vana mi a tha famkim angin in tha famkim tur a ni." 
Matthew5:48 Chutichuan, in Pa vana mi a tha famkim angin in tha famkim tur a ni." 
Matthew6:1 In thil tha tihte mi hmuha tan, mihring mithmuha ti lo turin fimkhur rawh u. Chutilochuan in Pa vana mi hnenah chuan lawmman in nei lo ang." 
Matthew6:2 Chutichuan, mi hnena thil i pekin, mi vervekte'n mi fak an hlawh theihna tura inkhawmna inahte, kawtthlerahte an tih thin ang hian, i hmaah tawtawrawt hamtir suh. Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, an lawmman chu an hmu zo tawh." 
Matthew6:3 Nang erawh chuan mi hnena thil i pekin, i kut ding lamin a tih chu i kut vei lamin hre suh se." 
Matthew6:4 I thil pek chu a rukin a awm theihna'n; chutichuan, i Pa a ruka hmu thintu chuan a rul ang che." 
Matthew6:5 Tin, in tawngtaiin, mi vervekte angin in ti tur a ni lo; miin an hmuh theihna turin, inkhawmna inahte, kawtthler peng takahte, ding chunga tawngtai an ngaina si thin a. Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, an lawmman chu an hmu zo tawh." 
Matthew6:6 Nang erawh chuan i tawngtaiin, i pindan chhungrilah lut la, i kawng khar la, i Pa a ruka awm hnenah chuan tawngtai rawh; tichuan, i Pa a ruka hmu thintu chuan a rul ang che." 
Matthew6:7 Tin, in tawngtaiin, Jentailte angin sawi nawn mai mai suh u; an tawng tam vangin hriain an ring a ni." 
Matthew6:8 Chutichuan, anmahni angin awm suh u; amah in dil hmain in Pa chuan engte nge in mamawh tih a hre reng si a." 
Matthew6:9 Chutichuan, nangni chuan hetiang hian tawngtai rawh u - 'Kan Pa vana mi, i hming zahawm rawh se." 
Matthew6:10 I ram lo thleng rawh se. I duhzawng vana an tih angin leia mi'n ti rawh se. 
Matthew6:11 Vawiinah hian kan ei khawpin chaw min pe ang che. 
Matthew6:12 Kan batte hi min ngaidam ang che. Keini pawhin kan thil bate kan ngaihdam tak ang khan. 
Matthew6:13 Sual tura thlemnaah min hruai lut suh la, mi sual lakah chuan min chhandam zawk ang che,' tiin." 
Matthew6:14 Mi an bawhchhiatte in ngaihdam chuan, in Pa vana miin a ngaidam ve ang che u." 
Matthew6:15 Nimahsela, mite in ngaihdam si loh chuan, in Pain in bawhchhiatte a ngaidam bik lo ang." 
Matthew6:16 Chaw in nghei hun pawhin, mi vervekte angin ngui hmel pu suh u; anni zawngin mi mithmuha chaw ngheia an lan theihna turin, an hmel an tipawr si thin a. Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, an lawmman chu an hmu zo tawh." 
Matthew6:17 Nang erawh chuan chaw i nghei hunin sahriak inthih la, i hmai phih rawh." 
Matthew6:18 Chutichuan i Pa a ruka awm mithmuhah chauh lo chuan, mihring mithmuhah chaw ngheiin i lang lo ang; tichuan, i Pa a ruka hmu thintu chuan a rul ang che." 
Matthew6:19 Leia sulrul leh tuiekin a ei chhiatnaah, rukrute'n an reh pawha an ruknaah hian, in tan rote khawl khawm suh u." 
Matthew6:20 Vanah, sulrul leh tuiekin a ei chhiat lohnaah, rukrute'n an reh pawha an ruk hek lohnaah chuan, in tan rote khawl khawm zawk rawh u." 
Matthew6:21 I ro awmna apiangah i rilru pawh a awm ang. 
Matthew6:22 Taksa khawnvar chu mit hi a ni; chutichuan i mit a fim chuan i taksa a pumin a eng chhuak ang. 
Matthew6:23 I mit a chhiat erawh chuan i taksa a pumin a thim zo vek ang. Chutichuan, i chhunga eng chu thim ni se la, thim chu a va nasa dawn em!" 
Matthew6:24 Tuma'n hotu pahnih rawng an bawl kawp thei lo; pakhat huain pakhat an duh ang; a nih loh leh, pakhat tannin pakhat an hmusit ang. Pathian leh sum rawng in bawl kawp thei lo e." 
Matthew6:25 Chuvangin, ka hrilh a che u, 'Engnge ka ei ang a, eng nge ka in ang aw?' tiin in nunna thu leh, 'Engnge ka silhin ka fen ang aw?' tiin in taksa thu lungkham suh u. Ei tur aiin nunna a thupui zawk lo em ni? Silhfen aiin taksa pawh a thupui zawk lo em ni?" 
Matthew6:26 Chungleng savate hi en rawh u; buh an tuh lo a, an at hek lo, buh inah an seng lut hek lo; nimahsela in Pa vana mi chuan a chawm si a. Nangni chu anni ai chuan nasa takin in hlu zawk lo em ni?" 
Matthew6:27 Tin, nangni zingah lungkhama vangin tuin nge mahni dung lam tawng khata tisang chuang thei?" 
Matthew6:28 Tin, silhfen thu engah nge in lungkham ni? Ram tuktinpar thanzia hi ngun takin ngaihtuah rawh u; hna an thawk lo, la pawh an kai hek lo." 
Matthew6:29 Nimahsela ka hrilh a che u, Solomona meuh pawh a ropuina zawng zawnga a inthuam khan, he'ng tuktinpar pakhat tluk pawh hian cheiin a awm lo." 
Matthew6:30 Chutichuan, ram hnim, vawiin anga nung, a tuka thuka tuah leh mai tur mah Pathianin chuti kaua a chei chuan, aw nangni rin tlemte u, silhfen a pe zawk em em dawn lo che u em ni?" 
Matthew6:31 Chutichuan, 'Engnge kan ei ang?' emaw, 'Engnge kan in ang?' emaw, 'Eng sinin nge kan awm ang?' emaw tih, lungkham suh u." 
Matthew6:32 Jentailte'n chu'ng zawng zawng chu an zawng thin a ni. Chu'ng zawng zawng chu in mamawh tih in Pa vana mi'n a hre reng a ni. 
Matthew6:33 A ram leh a felna chu zawng hmasa zawk rawh u, tichuan chu'ng zawng zawng chu a pek belhchhah dawn che u nia.Chutichuan, a tuka tan lungkham suh u, a tuk chuan ama tan a lungkham chawp dawn si a. Ni khat atan ni khat hrehawm chu a tawk a ni." 
Matthew6:34 Chutichuan, a tuka tan lungkham suh u, a tuk chuan ama tan a lungkham chawp dawn si a. Ni khat atan ni khat hrehawm chu a tawk a ni." 
Matthew7:1 Sawisel suh u, sawisela in awm lohna'n." 
Matthew7:2 In sawisel ang bawkin an sawisel ang che u; in tehna ngai bawkin an tehsak leh ang che u. 
Matthew7:3 Tin, engati nge mahni mita khanchhuk awm chu ngaihtuah si loin, i unau mita hmawlh te tak te awm chu i hmuh ni?" 
Matthew7:4 Engtin nge i unau hnenah, 'I mit ata hmawlh te tak te kha mi lak chhuahtir rawh,' i tih theih ang? ngai teh, nangma mit ngeiah khanchhuk a awm reng si a." 
Matthew7:5 Mi vervek! I mit ata khanchhuk kha la chhuak hmasa rawh; chutichuan i unau mit ata hmawlh te tak te lak chhuah tur chu fiah takin i hmu ang. 
Matthew7:6 Ui hnenahte thil thianghlim chu pe suh u; vawk hmaahte in tuikeplungte paih hek suh u, an chil chhe hlauh ang a, tin, hawiin an tai thler dah ang che u." 
Matthew7:7 Dil rawh u, tichuan an pe ang che u; zawng rawh u, tichuan in hmu ang; kik rawh u, tichuan an hawnsak ang che u." 
Matthew7:8 Tupawh a dil apiang chuan an hmu thin a; tupawh a zawng chuan an hmu thin a; tupawh a kik chu an hawnsak dawn a ni. 
Matthew7:9 A nih leh, nangniho hi tupawh in fapain chhangper dil che u se la, tu nge lung pe ang che u?" 
Matthew7:10 A nih leh, sangha dil che u se la, tu nge rul pe ang che u?" 
Matthew7:11 Chutichuan, nangni mi sual mahin in fate thil tha pek nachang in hriat chuan, in Pa vana mi chuan a diltute chu thil tha a pe zawk em em dawn lo em ni?" 
Matthew7:12 Chutichuan, thil engkim miin in chunga an tiha in duh tur ang apiang chu, mi chungah pawh ti ve rawh u; chu chu Dan thu leh Zawlneite thu a ni reng si a." 
Matthew7:13 Kawngka zimah chuan lut rawh u; boralnaa kalna kawngka chu a zau a, a kawng pawh a zau bawk a, chu mi lama lut chu tam pawh an tam hle a ni." 
Matthew7:14 Nunnaa kalna kawngka chu a zim a, a kawng pawh a chep bawk a, a hmutute pawh tlemte an ni." 
Matthew7:15 Zawlnei derte lakah fimkhur rawh u; chung chu beram vun sinin in hnenah an lo kal thin a, an chhung lamah erawh chuan chinghne koham takte an ni si a." 
Matthew7:16 Anmahni chu an rahah in hre mai ang. Hruihlingnei kungah grep rah an lo ngai em ni? Lenhlingah pawh theipui an lo ngai em ni? 
Matthew7:17 Chutiang bawkin thing tha apiang a rah tha thin a; thing chhia erawh chu a rah chhe thin. 
Matthew7:18 Thing tha a rah chhe thei lo a, thing chhia lah a rah tha thei hek lo." 
Matthew7:19 Thing tin rah tha lo apiang chu an kit a, meiah an paih thin." 
Matthew7:20 Chuvangin, anmahni chu an rahah in hre mai ang." 
Matthew7:21 'Lalpa, Lalpa' mi ti nazawng chu van ramah an lut lo ang a; ka Pa vana mi duhzawng titu erawh chu an lut ang." 
Matthew7:22 Chu mi niah chuan mi tam takin, 'Lalpa, Lalpa, i hmingin thute kan sawiin, i hmingin ramhuaite kan hnawt chhuakin, i hmingin thil mak tam takte kan ti thin lo em ni,' an la ti ang." 
Matthew7:23 Chu mi hunah chuan, 'Nangni thil sual tite u, ka hre ngai lo va che u, ka hnen ata kal bo rawh u,' tiin anni chu ka la hrilh ang." 
Matthew7:24 Chutichuan, mi tin he'ng ka thu hi hriaa zawm apiang chu, mi fing lungpui chunga in satu nen tehkhin tur a ni." 
Matthew7:25 Ruahte a lo sur a, tuite a lo lian a, thlite a lo tleh a, chu mi in chu a rawn nam sawk sawk a; nimahsela a chim lo a; lungpui chunga rem tlat a nih avangin." 
Matthew7:26 Tin, mi tin, he'ng ka thu hi hriaa zawm lo apiang chu, mi a tiauvut chung maia in satu nen tehkhin tur a ni." 
Matthew7:27 Ruahte a lo sur a, tuite a lo lian a, thlite a lo tleh a, chu mi in chu a rawn nam sawk sawk a; a chim ta a; a sawp chu nasa tak a ni, a ti aTin, heti hi a ni a, Isua'n chung thu chu a sawi zawh veleh, mipuiten a thu zirtir chu mak an ti hle a; lehkhaziaktute ang lo a, thuneihna nei awm taka anmahni a zirtira vangin." 
Matthew7:28 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Isua'n chung thu chu a sawi zawh veleh, mipuiten a thu zirtir chu mak an ti hle a; lehkhaziaktute ang lo a, thuneihna nei awm taka anmahni a zirtira vangin." 
Matthew8:1 Tin, tlang ata chu a lo chhuk hnuin mipui tam takin amah an zui ta a." 
Matthew8:2 Tin, ngai teh, a hnenah phar a lo kal a, Lalpa, i duh chuan mi tithianghlim thei e, tiin, chibai a buk a." 
Matthew8:3 Tin, Isua'n a han ban a, a dek a, Ka duh e, lo thianghlim tawh ang che, a ti a. Tin, chawplehchilhin a phar chu a lo thianghlim ta nghal a." 
Matthew8:4 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, Tumah hrilh lo turin fimkhur ang che; amaherawhchu puithiam hnenah va inentir la, Mosia'n thilpek tur a ruat kha hlan rawh, an hriat fiahna turin, a ti a." 
Matthew8:5 Tin, Kapernaum khuaa a luhin a hnenah sipai za hotu a lo kal a." 
Matthew8:6 Lalpa, ka naupang zengin inah a mu reng a, nasa taka tihnatin a awm a ni, tiin, a ngen chiam a." 
Matthew8:7 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, Ka lo kal ang a, ka tidam ang, a ti a." 
Matthew8:8 Tin, sipai za hotu chuan, Lalpa, ka in chhung i luhna tlak a ni lo e; thu chauh sawi la, ka naupang a dam mai ang." 
Matthew8:9 Kei pawh mi thua awm ka ni a, ka hnuaiah sipaite an awm a; chu mi chu, 'Kal rawh' ka tih leh, a kal thin; mi dang hnenah pawh, 'Lo haw rawh' ka tih leh a lo haw thin; ka bawih hnenah pawh, 'Hei hi ti rawh' ka tih leh, a ti thin, tiin a chhang a." 
Matthew8:10 Tin, Isua'n chung thu chu a hriatin mak a ti hle a, a zuitute hnenah chuan, Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, Israelte zingah pawh heti ema rinna nasa hi ka hmu lo." 
Matthew8:11 Ka hrilh a che u, Chhak leh Thlang atangin mi tam tak an lo kal ang a, van ramah chuan Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba te hnenah an thu ang a." 
Matthew8:12 Ram fate erawh chu pawn thimah chuan hnawh chhuahin an awm ang a; chutah chuan tah leh ha thial chu a awm ang, a ti a." 
Matthew8:13 Tin, Isua'n sipai za hotu hnenah chuan, Kal tawh rawh i rin angin i chungah lo thleng rawh se, a ti a. Tichuan, naupang chu, chu mi dar ngeiah chuan a lo dam ta a." 
Matthew8:14 Tin, Isua chu Petera ina a luhin, a nupuia nu chu khawsika mu a hmu a." 
Matthew8:15 Tichuan, a kut chu a dehsak a, a khawsik chu a reh ta a; tin, a tho a, a rawng a bawlsak ta a." 
Matthew8:16 Tin, khua a lo tlai lam chuan a hnenah ramhuai mante tam tak an rawn hruai a; tin, thuin ramhuaite chu a hnawt chhuak a, dam lo zawng zawngte chu a tidam bawk a." 
Matthew8:17 Zawlnei Isaia'n, Amah ngeiin kan chak lohnate a la a, kan nate a phur a, tia a sawi chu a lo thlen theihna turin." 
Matthew8:18 Tin, Isua'n mipui tam tak a vela a hmuhin, ral lehlama kal turin thu a pe a." 
Matthew8:19 Tin, lehkhaziaktu pakhat a lo kal a, a hnenah, Zirtirtu, i kalna apiangah ka zui ang che, a ti a." 
Matthew8:20 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, Sihalte'n kua an nei a, chungleng savate pawhin bu an nei a, Mihring Fapa erawh hi chuan a lu nghahna a nei lo, a ti a." 
Matthew8:21 Tin, a zirtirte zinga mi dangin a hnenah, Lalpa ka pa mi vuitir zet rawh, a ti a." 
Matthew8:22 Nimahsela, ani chuan a hnenah, Mi zui rawh; mitthiin anmahni mitthi chu vui rawh se, a ti a." 
Matthew8:23 Tin, lawngah a chuang a, zirtirte chuan an zui a." 
Matthew8:24 Tin, ngai teh, dil chu nasa takin a lo fawn ta a, chutichuan tui fawnin lawng chu a vur hlup hlup mai a, ani erawh chu a muhil a." 
Matthew8:25 Tin, a hnenah an lo kal a, an kaitho a, Lalpa, min chhanhim rawh, kan boral dawn hi le, an ti a." 
Matthew8:26 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, Rin tlemte u, engahnge in hlauh? a ti a. Chu mi hnuah chuan a tho a, thlite leh dil chu a hau a; tin, a lo reh ta thuap mai a." 
Matthew8:27 Tin, mite chuan mak an ti hle a, he mi hi mi eng nge a nih, thli leh dil lam pawhin a thu an awi hi? an ti a." 
Matthew8:28 Tin, ral leh lam Gadarin mite ram chu a thlenin, ramhuai man pahnih, thlan atanga lo chhuakin, an rawn tawk a; an kawlh em a, chutichuan chu mi kawngah chuan tumah an kal thei lo a." 
Matthew8:29 Tin, ngai teh, anni chuan, Pathian Fapa, keini leh nang eng nge kan inzawlna? Hun tiam thlen hmain min nghaisa turin hetah i lo kal em ni? tiin, an au a." 
Matthew8:30 Tin, an awmna atanga hla feah vawk rual tam tak an tla a." 
Matthew8:31 Tin, ramhuaite chuan, Min hnawh chhuah chuan vawk rual kawchhungahte sawn min kaltir ang che, tiin, a hnenah, an ngen a." 
Matthew8:32 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, Kal ta che u, a ti a. Tichuan, an lo chhuak a, vawk kawchhungahte chuan an va lut a: tin, ngai teh, vawk rual zawng zawng chu khamah an tlan chhuk chiam a, dilah an tlan lut a, tuiah chuan an boral ta a." 
Matthew8:33 Tin, a vulhtute chu an tlan a, khuaah chuan an kal a, engkim an hril ta a, ramhuai mante chunga thil lo thlengte pawh chu.Tin, ngai teh, a khuain Isua hmuak turin an lo chhuak a; tin, amah an hmuh veleh an ram ata chhuak turin an ngen chiam a." 
Matthew8:34 Tin, ngai teh, a khuain Isua hmuak turin an lo chhuak a; tin, amah an hmuh veleh an ram ata chhuak turin an ngen chiam a." 
Matthew9:1 Tin, Isua lawngah a chuang a, dil chu a kan a, a awmna khua chu a thleng a." 
Matthew9:2 Tin, ngai teh, zeng pakhat khuma mu chungin a hnenah an rawn zawn a. Tin, Isua'n an rinzia a hmuhin, zeng hnenah chuan, Ka fa, thlamuang takin awm rawh; I sualte ngaihdam a ni tawh, a ti a." 
Matthew9:3 Tin, ngai teh, lehkhaziaktu thenkhatte chuan an rilruin, he mi hian Pathian a sawi chhia a nih hi, an ti a." 
Matthew9:4 Tin, Isua'n an ngaihtuahte chu a lo hria a, Engah nge in thinlunga sual in ngaihtuah ni?" 
Matthew9:5 I sualte ngaihdam a ni tawh,' tih leh, 'Tho la, kein kal tawh rawh,' tih hi, a eng nge sawi awl zawk ni?" 
Matthew9:6 Engpawhnisela, khawvelah Mihring Fapa hian sual ngaihdam theihna a nei tih in hriatna'n, a ti a. (Zeng hnenah chuan) Tho rawh. I khum la la, i inah kal rawh, a ti a." 
Matthew9:7 Tin, a tho a, a inah a haw ta a." 
Matthew9:8 Tin, mipuite chuan chu chu an hmuhin, an hlau a, mihringte hnena chutiang thuneihna petu Pathian chu an fak a." 
Matthew9:9 Tin, Isua chuta tangin a kal zel a, chhiah chawina hmuna thu, mi pakhat, a hming Mathaia a hmu a: tin, a hnenah, Mi rawn zui rawh, a ti a. Tichuan, a tho a, a zui ta a." 
Matthew9:10 Tin, heti hi a ni a, inah chuan chaw a kil laiin, ngai tehee, chhiahkhawntute leh mi sualte tam tak an lo kal a, Isua leh a zirtirte chu an kilpui hlawm a." 
Matthew9:11 Tin, Pharisaite chuan chu chu an hmuhin, a zirtirte hnenah chuan, engati nge in zirtirtuin chhiahkhawntute leh mi sualte hnena a ei le? an ti a." 
Matthew9:12 Nimahsela, Isua'n chu chu a hriat veleh, Mi chakte chuan daktawr an ngai lo a, mi bawrhsawmte zawkin an ngai a ni." 
Matthew9:13 Chutichuan, 'Inthawina duh loin khawngaihna ka duh e,' tih hi, a awmzia va zir rawh u; mi fel takte lam tura lo kal ka ni lo a, mi sualte zawk lam tura lo kal ka ni a sin, a ti a." 
Matthew9:14 Chu mi lai chuan Johana zirtirte chu a hnenah an lo kal a, engatinge keini leh Pharisaite hian chaw kan nghei zut thin a, i zirtirte lemin an nghei si loh? an ti a." 
Matthew9:15 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, Mo hruaitute hnenah a pasal tur chu a awm chhung zawng, mo hruaitute chuan an sun thei em ni? Nimahsela, a pasal tur chu an hnen ata hruai bo nite a la thleng ang a, chu mi hunah erawh chuan chaw an la nghei ang." 
Matthew9:16 Tin, tuma'n puan hlui puan la thlakmar loh themin an bel ngai lo; a bel phuina tur chuan puan chu a kai thler zawk ang, a lo thler nasa lehzual dawn si a." 
Matthew9:17 Tuma'n uain thar savun uain peng hluiahte an thun ngai hek lo; chutilochuan savun pengte chu a puak keh a, uain chu a bua a, savun pengte pawh chu a lo chhe thin; uain thar chu savun uain peng tharahte an thun zawk thin a ni, tichuan tha takin a awm ve ve thin, a ti a." 
Matthew9:18 Chung thu chu an hnena a sawi lai takin, ngai teh, hotu pakhat a lo kal a, chibai a buk a, Ka fanu tunah tak hian a thi a; nimahsela, lo kal la, a chungah I kut nghat la, a lo nung leh ang, a ti a." 
Matthew9:19 Tichuan, Isua a tho a, a zui ta a, zirtirte pawhin an zui ve a." 
Matthew9:20 Tin, ngai teh, hmeichhe pakhat, kum sawm leh kum hnih thi puta dam lo a hnungah a lo kal a, a puan hmawr a dek a." 
Matthew9:21 A puan hmawr chauh pawh dek i la, tidamin ka awm mai ang, tih a rilruk a ni." 
Matthew9:22 Tin, Isua a hawi a, amah chu a hmu a, Ka fanu, thlamuang takin awm rawh; i rinna hi i dampui a ni e, a ti a. Tichuan, hmeichhia chu, chu mi dar achinah chuan a lo dam ta a." 
Matthew9:23 Tin, Isua chu hotu inah chuan a lut a, phenglawng tumte leh mipui bengchheng mur murte a va hmu a." 
Matthew9:24 Chhuak rawh u; naupang chu a thi lo e, a muhil a ni zawk a sin, a ti a. Tin, anni chuan amah chu an nuihsan ta mai a." 
Matthew9:25 Nimahsela, mipui chu an hnawh chhuah hnu chuan a lut a, a kutah a chelh a, naupang chu a lo tho ta a." 
Matthew9:26 Tin, chu mi chanchin chu chung ram zawng zawngah chuan a lo thang chhuak ta a." 
Matthew9:27 Tin, Isua chuta tangin a kal zel a, mitdel pahnihin, Davida fapa, min khawngaih rawh, tia auin an zui a." 
Matthew9:28 Tin, ina a luh chuan, mitdelte chu a hnenah an lo kal a; tin, Isua'n an hnenah, Hei hi ti theiin mi ring em? a ti a. Anni chuan a hnenah, Ring e, Lalpa, an ti a." 
Matthew9:29 Tin, ani chuan an mit a dek a, In rin angin in chungah thleng rawh se, a ti a." 
Matthew9:30 Tichuan, an mit chu a lo var ta a. Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, Tuma hriat loh turin fimkhur rawh u, a ti tlat a." 
Matthew9:31 Nimahsela, anni chu an chhuak a, chu mi ram zawng zawngah chuan a chanchin an tithang ta a." 
Matthew9:32 Tin, an chhuah lai takin, ngai teh, tawng thei lo ramhuai man pakhat a hnenah an rawn hruai a." 
Matthew9:33 Tin, ramhuai chu a hnawh chhuah veleh tawng thei lo chu a lo tawng ta a. Tin, mipuite chuan mak an ti hle a, Israelte zingah hetiang hi kan hmu ngai lo, an ti a." 
Matthew9:34 Pharisaite erawh chuan, ramhuai lal vangin a ni, ramhuaite a hnawh chhuah thin ni, an ti a." 
Matthew9:35 Tin, Isua'n an inkhawmna inahte zirtirin, Ram Chanchin Tha chu hrilin, dam lohna tinreng leh natna tinrengte tidamin, khaw lian leh khaw tete zawng zawng a fang zel a." 
Matthew9:36 Chutichuan, mipuite chu a hmuhin, vengtu nei lo beramte anga hrehawm leh darha an awma vangin, a khawngaih ta em em a.Tichuan, a zirtirte hnenah chuan, Buh seng tur a tam hle si a, nimahsela a thawktute an tlem; chutichuan, a buh seng tura thawktu turte tir turin buh Neitupa hnenah chuan ngen rawh u, a ti a." 
Matthew9:37 Tichuan, a zirtirte hnenah chuan, Buh seng tur a tam hle si a, nimahsela a thawktute an tlem; chutichuan, a buh seng tura thawktu turte tir turin buh Neitupa hnenah chuan ngen rawh u, a ti a." 
Matthew10:1 Tin, a zirtir sawm leh pahnihte chu a ko a, anmahni hnawh chhuah theihna turin, ramhuai bawlhhlawhte chunga thuneihna a pe a; dam lohna tinreng leh natna tinreng tihdam theihna turin thuneihna a pe bawk a." 
Matthew10:2 Tin, tirhkoh sawm leh pahnihte hming chu he'ng hi a ni: A hmasa berah chuan Simona (Petera an tih) leh a unau Andria te; Zebedaia fapa Jakoba leh a unau Johana te;" 
Matthew10:3 Phillipa leh Bartholomaia te; Thoma leh chhiahkhawntu Matthaia te; Alphaia fapa Jakoba leh Thaddaia te. 
Matthew10:4 Kanana mi Simona leh a mantirtu Juda Iskariota te hi. 
Matthew10:5 Chung sawm leh pahnih chu Isua'n a tir chhuak a, an hnenah heti hian thu a pe a: Jentailte kawngah kal suh u la, Samari mite khua reng rengah pawh lut suh ang che u." 
Matthew10:6 Amaherawhchu, Israel hnam beram bote hnenah chuan kal zawk ang che u." 
Matthew10:7 Tin, in kalin, 'Van ram chu a lo hnai,' tiin, hril zel ang che u." 
Matthew10:8 Dam lote tidam u la, mitthite kaitho u la, pharte tithianghlim u la, ramhuaite hnawt chhuak ang che u; athlawnin in hmu a, athlawnin pe ang che u." 
Matthew10:9 In kawnghrenah te chuan rangkachak tangka emaw, tangka emaw, dar tangka emaw keng suh u la," 
Matthew10:10 zinna atan ipte emaw, kawr pahnih emaw, pheikhawk emaw, tiang emaw keng hek suh u; hnathawktu chu a ei tur hmu tlak a ni si a." 
Matthew10:11 Tin, khaw lianah emaw, khaw teah emaw in luhna apiangah, a thleng tlak mi tur che u zawng chhuak u la, in chhuah leh hma loh chuan chutah chuan thleng reng ang che u." 
Matthew10:12 Tin, inah chuan in luh dawnin chibai buk ang che u." 
Matthew10:13 Tin, ina mite chu chibai buk tlak an nih chuan, in thlamuanna thu chu an chungah lo thleng rawh se; an tlak loh erawh chuan, in thlamuanna thu chu in chungah lo kir leh rawh se." 
Matthew10:14 Tin, tupawh lawm lo che u a, in thu pawh ngaithla lo apiang, chu mi in atan emaw, chu mi khua ata emaw in chhuah hun chuan, in kephaha vaivut chu thing thla ang che u." 
Matthew10:15 Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u. Ngaihtuah niah chuan, chu mi khuate ai chuan Sodom leh Gomorra ram tuar tur chu a zia a awm zawk ang." 
Matthew10:16 Ngai teh u, chinghne zinga beram awm angin ka tirh che u hi; chutichuan rul anga fing, thuro anga pawikhawih loin awm ang che u." 
Matthew10:17 Nimahsela, mihring lakah chuan fimkhur rawh u; roreltuhote an mantir dawn si che u a, inkhawmna inahte an vua ang che u a." 
Matthew10:18 A ni, keimah vangin hotute leh lalte hmaah, anmahni leh Jentailte hriattirna turin, an la hruai ang che u." 
Matthew10:19 Nimahsela, an mantir hunah che u chuan, 'Engtinnge, eng thu nge ka sawi ang?' tiin, lungkham suh ang che u; in sawi tur chu a hun takah chuan a hriattir dawn si che u a." 
Matthew10:20 A sawitu chu nangni in ni dawn si lo a, in Pa Thlarauin nangmahniah a sawi zawk dawn a ni." 
Matthew10:21 Tin, tihhlum turin unaupa leh unaupa an inmantir ang a, pa pawhin a fa a mantir bawk ang; fate pawhin an nu leh an pate an do ang a, an tihhlumtir bawk ang." 
Matthew10:22 Keima hminga vangin mi zawng zawng huat in ni ang; nimahsela a tawp thlenga tuar peih apiang chu, chu mi ngei chu chhandamin a awm ang." 
Matthew10:23 Chutichuan, he khuaah hian an tihduhdah hunah che u, khaw dangah tlansan ang che u; tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u. Mihring Fapa a lo kal hmain Israel khuate chu in fang chhuak lo ang." 
Matthew10:24 Zirtir a zirtirtu chungah a awm lo; bawih pawh a pu chungah a awm hek lo. 
Matthew10:25 Zirtir chu a zirtirtu anga lo awm leh, bawih chu a pu anga lo awm chu, a tawk e. In neitupa mah 'Beelzebula,' an tih chuan, a chhungte chu an va ti dawn nasa em!" 
Matthew10:26 Chutichuan, anmahni chu hlau suh ang che u; lang lo tura thuhruk engmah a awm si lo, hriat loh tura zep pawh engmah a awm hek lo." 
Matthew10:27 Thima ka hrilh che u hi engah sawi ang che u; beng bula in hriat hi in chunga chuangin tlangaupui ang che u. 
Matthew10:28 Tin, taksa tihluma thlarau tihlum thei lotute chu hlau suh u la; Gehena-a thlarau leh taksa tiboral theitu erawh chu hlau zawk ang che u." 
Matthew10:29 Chawngzawng pahnih dar tangka pakhatah an hralh thin lo em ni? Nimahsela, an zinga pakhat mah in Pa loin leiah a tla lo ang." 
Matthew10:30 In samzaite lam pawh hi chhiar vek a ni a sin. 
Matthew10:31 Chuvangin, hlau suh u; chawngzawng tam tak aiin in hlu zawk a ni." 
Matthew10:32 Chutichuan, mite hmaa mi tan apiang, ka Pa vana mi hmaah ka tan ve ang." 
Matthew10:33 Nimahsela, tupawh mite hmaa mi phat apiang, ka Pa vana mi hmaah ka phat ve ang." 
Matthew10:34 Khawvelah hian rem lentir tura lo kal emaw mi ti suh u; rem lentir tura lo kal ka ni lo a, khandaih lentir tura lo kal ka ni zawk." 
Matthew10:35 Mi, a pa dotir turin, fanu a nu dotir turin, mo a pi dotir turin lo kal ka ni a sin." 
Matthew10:36 Mi a hmelmate chu ama chhungte zinga mi ngei an ni ang. 
Matthew10:37 Tupawh a nu emaw, a pa emaw keimah aia hmangaih zawk chu, ka mi ni tlak a ni lo; tupawh a fanu emaw, a fapa emaw keimah aia hmangaih zawk pawh, ka mi ni tlak a ni lo." 
Matthew10:38 Tupawh a kraws pua mi zui lo chu, ka mi ni tlak a ni lo." 
Matthew10:39 Tupawh a nunna hmu chuan a chan ang a; keimah avanga a nunna chan chuan a hmu ang. 
Matthew10:40 Tupawh a lawm che u chu, mi lawm a ni a, tupawh mi lawm chu mi tirtu lawm a ni." 
Matthew10:41 Tupawh zawlnei chu zawlnei a nih avanga lawm chuan, zawlnei lawmman a hmu ang a; tupawh mi fel chu mi fel a nih avanga lawm chuan, mi fel lawmman a hmu ang.Tin, tupawh he'ng mi te tak zinga pakhat hnenah hian, Zirtir a nih avanga tui vawt no khat chauh pawh pe apiang chuan, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, an lawmman chu an chan tawp lo ang, a ti a." 
Matthew10:42 Tin, tupawh he'ng mi te tak zinga pakhat hnenah hian, Zirtir a nih avanga tui vawt no khat chauh pawh pe apiang chuan, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, an lawmman chu an chan tawp lo ang, a ti a." 
Matthew11:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Isua'n a zirtir sawm leh pahnihte chu, thu a pek zawh veleh, chuta tang chuan an khuaahte zirtir leh thuhril turin a kal ta a." 
Matthew11:2 Tin, Johana'n Krista thiltihte chu tan inah chuan a lo hriatin, a hnenah," 
Matthew11:3 'Lo kal tura chu i ni nge, mi dang kan la ngai ang?' tiin, a zirtirte a palaitir a." 
Matthew11:4 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, Kal leh ta u lang, thil in hmuh leh in hriat hi Johana hnenah va hrilh rawh u." 
Matthew11:5 Mitdelte an mit a lo var ta, kebaite kein an lo kal ta, pharte an lo thianghlim ta, bengngawngte pawh an beng a lo var ta, mitthite pawh kaihtawhin an awm ta, pachhiate pawhin Chanchin Tha hril an dawng ta." 
Matthew11:6 Tin, tupawh ka chunga lungnih lohna hmu lo chu an eng a thawl e, tiin a lo chhang a." 
Matthew11:7 Chung mite chu an hawn veleh, Isua'n mipui hnenah chuan Johana thu a sawi ta a, Eng en turin nge thlalera in kal chhuah kha? Luang thli chhem nghin maw?" 
Matthew11:8 A nih loh leh, eng en tur berin nge in kal chhuah kha? Puan nem sin maw? Ngai rawh u, puan nem sinte chu lal inahte a sin an awm." 
Matthew11:9 A nih loh leh eng vang berin nge in kal chhuah kha? Zawlnei en turin maw? A nih ngei kha, ka ti a che u, zawlnei ai pawha ropui zawk." 
Matthew11:10 'En teh u, ka tirhkoh i hmaa'n ka tir a ni. Ani chuan i hmaah i kawng a siam ang,' ti a, a chanchin an ziaka kha, he mi hi a ni." 
Matthew11:11 Tih tak meuhin ka ti a che u, Hmeichhe hrin zingah Baptistu Johana aia ropui zawk an la chhuak ngai lo; nimahsela van rama mi te deuh pawh ani ai chuan an ropui zawk si a." 
Matthew11:12 Baptistu Johana awm achin tun thlengin, van ram chuan beih vakna a tawk thin a, a bei vakte chuan an pawng lak thin." 
Matthew11:13 Zawlneite zawng zawng leh Dan thu chuan, Johana a lo awm thleng khan an hril lawk thin a ni." 
Matthew11:14 In awi duh zawngin, chu chu Elija, lo kal tura chu a ni." 
Matthew11:15 Tupawh hriatna tura beng nei chuan hre rawh se. 
Matthew11:16 Nimahsela, tun lai chhuante hi eng nen nge ka tehkhin ang? Naupang dawr hmunahte thua, an thiante au a," 
Matthew11:17 'Phenglawng kan tumsak che u a in lam si lo a. Kan tap vak a, awm in inchum si lo,' tiate ang hi an ni." 
Matthew11:18 Johana chu a lo kal a, a eiin a in lo a, 'Ramhuai a zawl a nih hi,' an ti a." 
Matthew11:19 Mihring Fapa a lo kal a, a eiin a in a, 'En teh u, chaw heh mi, uain heh mi, chhiahkhawntute leh mi sualte thian saw!,' an ti si a. Finna chu a thiltih atangin a dikzia a lang a ni." 
Matthew11:20 Tin,an sim loh avangin,a thilmak tih tamna ber khuate chu a hau ta a;" 
Matthew11:21 Korazin, i chung a pik e! Bethsaida, i chung a pik e! Nangmahnia thil mak tak tihte kha Tura leh Sidon khuaa tih ni se la, saiip puan sina vut zinga thuin an sim tawh ang." 
Matthew11:22 Nimahsela, ka ti a che u, ngaihtuah niaah chuan nangni tuar ai chuan, Tura leh Sidon khaw tuar tur chu a zia a awm zawk ang." 
Matthew11:23 Tin, nang Kapernaum, van thlengin chawimawi i ni dawn em ni? Mitthi khaw thlengin i zuk kal dawn a sin; nangmaha thil mak tak tihte kha Sodom khuaa tih ni se la, tun thlengin a la awm reng ang." 
Matthew11:24 Nimahsela, ka ti a che u, ngaihtuah niah chuan, i tuar ai chuan Sodom ram tuar tur chu a zia a awm zawk ang, a ti a." 
Matthew11:25 Chu mi lai chuan Isua'n a bia a, Aw ka pa, lei leh van Lalpa, nangin mi fing leh mi bengvarte hnenah he'ng thu hi i zep a, nausente hnena i puan avang hian ka fak a che." 
Matthew11:26 A ni, ka Pa, chutiang tih chu i ngaihin a tha a ni." 
Matthew11:27 Ka pain thil engkim mi kawltir tawh; Pa lo chuan tumahin Fapa hi an hre lo; Fapa leh an hnena Fapain a puan duhnate chauh lo chuan tuma'n Pa chu an hre hek lo. 
Matthew11:28 Nangni thawk rim leh phurrit phur zawng zawngte u, ka hnenah lo kal u la, keima'n ka chawlhtir ang che u." 
Matthew11:29 Ka nghawngkawl bat u la, ka hnenah zir rawh u; thuhnuairawlh leh rilrua inngaitlawm tak ka nih hi: tichuan, in thlarau tan chawlhna in hmu ang.Ka nghawngkawl chu a nuam a, ka phur pawh a zang a ni, a ti a." 
Matthew11:30 Ka nghawngkawl chu a nuam a, ka phur pawh a zang a ni, a ti a." 
Matthew12:1 Chu mi lai chuan Isua chu Chawlhniah buh hmunah te a kal tlang a; a zirtirte chu an ril a tam a, buh vuite an thliak a, an ei ta a." 
Matthew12:2 Tin, Pharisaite'n chu chu an hmuhin, a hnenah, En teh, i zirtirten Chawlhniah tih thiang lo chu an tih hi, an ti a." 
Matthew12:3 Ani erawh chuan an hnenah, Davida a riltam laia a thiante nena an thil tih kha in chhiar lo em ni?" 
Matthew12:4 Khatia Pathian ina a luh a, amah leh a thiante ei thian loh, puithiamte chauh ei thian changdah an ei thu kha?" 
Matthew12:5 A nih leh, Chawlhniin Pathian biak ina puithiam awmte chuan, Chawlhni an bawrh pawhin an thiam zel tih Dan thuah chuan in chhiar lo em ni?" 
Matthew12:6 Engpawh ni se la, Pathian biak in aia ropui zawk hetah a awm tih ka hrilh a che u." 
Matthew12:7 Nimahsela, 'Inthawina duh loin khawngaihna ka duh e,' tih hi, a awmzia lo hre tawh ni u la chu, mi thiamte chu thiam loh in chantir lo tur." 
Matthew12:8 Mihring fapa hi Chawlhni Lal a ni si a, a ti a." 
Matthew12:9 Tin, chuta tang chuan a kal a, an inkhawmna inah a va lut a." 
Matthew12:10 Tin, ngai teh, mi pakhat kut zeng a lo awm a. Tin, an hek theihna'n. Chawlhniin tihdam a thiang em? tiin Isua an zawt a." 
Matthew12:11 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, Nangni zingah tupawhin beram pakhat nei u la, chu chu Chawlhniin khuarkhurumah tla ang se la, tu nge chelhin kai chhuak lo ang che u?" 
Matthew12:12 Beram pakhat ai chuan mihring pakhat chu a va hlu zawk em! Chuvangin, Chawlhniah tihthat a thiang e, a ti a." 
Matthew12:13 Chu veleh, chu mi hnenah chuan, I kut phar rawh, a ti a. Tichuan, a phar a, a lehlam angin a dam ta viah a." 
Matthew12:14 Chutichuan, Pharisaite chu an chhuak a, amah an tihboral theih dan tur ngaihtuahin an inrawn a." 
Matthew12:15 Nimahsela, Isua'n chu chu a hriatin chuta tang chuan a kal bo ta a. Tin, mi tam takin amah an zui a, an zain a lo tidam vek a," 
Matthew12:16 a chanchin puan loh tur an hnenah a ti tlat a: 
Matthew12:17 Zawlnei Isaia'n," 
Matthew12:18 En teh u, ka chhiahhlawh, ka thlan, ka duh tak, ka rilruin a lawm em ema hi; A chungah ka thlarau ka dah ang a, tichuan, Jentailte hnenah rorelna thu a hril ang." 
Matthew12:19 A hnial lo ang a, a au hek lo ang a, kawtthlerahte pawh tuma'n a aw an hre hek lo ang." 
Matthew12:20 Hneh tura rorelna a tirh chhuah hma loh zawng luang sawp a titliak fithla lo ang a, la khu pawh a timit lo ang." 
Matthew12:21 Ama hming chu Jentaite chuan an beisei chhan ang, tia a sawi kha a lo thlen theihna turin." 
Matthew12:22 Chu mi lai chuan, mitdel tawng thei lo ramhuai man pakhat a hnenah an rawn hruai a; tin, ani chuan a lo tidam a, chutichuan tawng thei lo chu a lo tawng theiin, a lo hmu thei ta a." 
Matthew12:23 Tin, mipuiho zawng zawng chuan mak an ti hle a, he mi hi Davida fapa chu a ni lo'm ni? an ti a." 
Matthew12:24 Nimahsela, Pharisaite'n chu chu an hriat veleh, he mi hian ramhuai lal Beelzebula vang lo chuan ramhuaite a hnawt chhuak lo ang, an ti a." 
Matthew12:25 Tin, Isua'n an ngaihtuahte chu a lo hria a, an hnenah, Khawii ram pawh mahni indo apiang an boral thin; khawii khua pawh, chhung khat pawh, mahni indo apiang an ding khawchhuak lo ang." 
Matthew12:26 Tin, Setana'n Setana vek a hnawh chhuah chuan mahni indo a ni ang a sin; a ram chu engtin nge a din chhuah ang le?" 
Matthew12:27 Tin, kei Beelzebula vanga ramhuaite hnawt chhuak thin ka lo nih chuan, in fate'n tu vangin nge an lo hnawh chhuah thin le? Chuvangin, anni chu nangmahni ngaihtuahtu turte an ni ang." 
Matthew12:28 Amaherawhchu, kei Pathian Thlarau vanga ramhuaite hnawt chhuak thin ka nih chuan, Pathian ram in hnenah a lo thleng tawh a ni ang." 
Matthew12:29 Chuti a nih si loh chuan, miin mi chak chu a phuar hmasak zet loh chuan, engtin nge mi chak ina lutin a sum a laksak theih ang? Chu mi hnuah erawh chuan a in chu a ramsak mai ang." 
Matthew12:30 Tupawh ka lama tang lo chu, mi do a ni; tupawh mi lak khawmpui lo chuan, a tidarh a ni." 
Matthew12:31 Chuvangin, ka ti a che u, mi an sualna tinrengah leh an Pathian sawichhiatna tinrengah chuan, ngaihdam an ni ang: Thlarau meuh sawichhiatna erawh chu ngaihdamsak a ni lo ang." 
Matthew12:32 Tin, tupawh mihring Fapa sawisel apiangte chu, an sawiselna chu ngaihdamsak a ni ang; tupawh Thlarau Thianghlim meuh sawisel apiang erawh chu, an sawiselna chu tun dam chhungah pawh, hun lo la thleng turah pawh ngaihdamsak a ni lo ang." 
Matthew12:33 Thing chu a tha, a rah pawh a tha, in tih loh vek leh, thing chu a chhia, a rah pawh a chhia, ti law law rawh u; thing chu a rahah a hriat si a." 
Matthew12:34 Rul thlahte u, nangni'n, sual reng chungin, engtin nge thu tha in sawi theih ang? Thinlunga khat liam chu kain a sawi thin a sin." 
Matthew12:35 Mi tha chuan a ro bawm tha ata thil thate a theh chhuak thin a, mi sual chuan a ro bawk chhia ata thil chhiate a theh chhuak thin." 
Matthew12:36 Tin, ka hrilh a che u, mite'n thu lawi lo an sawi apiang, chu thu chu Rorel niah chuan an sawi fiah a la tul ang." 
Matthew12:37 I thu chuan thiam a chantir ang chia, i thu vek chuan thiam loh a chantir bawk dawn che a sin, a ti a." 
Matthew12:38 Chu mi lai chuan lehkhaziaktute leh Pharisaite zinga mi tuten emaw an bia a, a hnenah, Zirtirtu, i hnen ata chhinchhiahna hmuh kan duh e, an ti a." 
Matthew12:39 Ani erawh chuan an hnenah, Chhuan sual tak leh uire hmang takte chuan chhinchhiahna an zawng a, nimahsela, zawlnei Jona chhinchhiahna chauh lo chu, an hnenah chhinchhiahna reng reng pek a ni lo ang" 
Matthew12:40 Jona chu ni thum leh zan thum nghapui kawchhunga a awm ang khan, Mihring Fapa hi ni thum leh zan thum lei kawchhungah a awm bawk dawn a ni." 
Matthew12:41 Ninevi khuaa mite chu ngaihtuah hunah chuan, tun lai chhuante hnenah hian an ding ve ang a, thiam loh an chantir ang, Jona thu hrilh avangin an sim si a; ngai teh u, Jona aia ropui zawk hetah hian a awm a sin." 
Matthew12:42 Chhim lam lalnu kha ngaihtuah hunah chuan, tun lai chhuante hnenah hian a tho ve ang a, thiam loh a chantir ang; Solomona fin ngaithla tur mahin kawlkil ata a lo kal si a; ngai teh u, Solomona aia ropui zawk hetah hian a awm a sin." 
Matthew12:43 Tin, ramhuai bawlhhlawh chu mi kawchhung ata a chhuahin, chawlhna zawngin tui awm lohna hmunahte a vak a vak a, a hmu thin si lo a." 
Matthew12:44 Tin, 'ka chhuahna inah khan ka kir leh mai ang,' a ti a; tin, a va thlen chuanin, ruak a, phiah fai a, cheimawiin a hmu a." 
Matthew12:45 Chu veleh a va kal a, amah aia sual zawk ramhuai dang pasarih a rawn hruai a, chutah chuan an lut a, an awm reng thin a; chu mihringa awmze hnuhnung chu, a hmasa aiin a lo tha lo zawk thin a ni. Chutiang bawkin tun lai chhuan sual takte chungah hian a la awm ang, tiin a chhang a." 
Matthew12:46 Mipuite hnena thu a la sawi lai chuan, ngai teh, a nu leh a unaute chu amah biak tumin pawnah an ding a." 
Matthew12:47 Tin, mi pakhatin a hnenah, Ngai teh, i nu leh i unaute biak tum chein pawnah sawn an ding reng e, a ti a." 
Matthew12:48 Ani erawh chuan a hrilhtu hnenah chuan, Ka nu chu tu nge ni? Ka unaute pawh chu tute nge ni? tiin a chhang a." 
Matthew12:49 Tin, a zirtirte lamah a kut a phar a, En teh u, ka nu leh ka unaute hi!Tupawh ka Pa vana mi duhzawng ti apiang chu ka unaute, ka farnu te, ka nu te an ni a sin, a ti a." 
Matthew12:50 Tupawh ka Pa vana mi duhzawng ti apiang chu ka unaute, ka farnu te, ka nu te an ni a sin, a ti a." 
Matthew13:1 Chu mi ni chuan Isua chu in ata a kal chhuak a, dil kamah chuan a thu a." 
Matthew13:2 Tin, a hnenah mipui tam takte an rawn inkhawm a, chutichuan lawngah a chuang a, a thu a; mipui zawng zawng tiauphoah an ding a." 
Matthew13:3 Tin, tehkhin thuin thu tam tak an hnenah a sawi a: Ngai teh u, buh chi thehtu buh chi thehin a feh a." 
Matthew13:4 Tin, a theh laiin a then kawng dungah a tla a, savaten an rawn tlan zo ta a." 
Matthew13:5 Tin, a then pialtlep lei pan hmunah a la a; lei a chhah loh avangin a to ta nghal a." 
Matthew13:6 Nimahsela, ni a lo tlangsan deuhin em vuaiin a lo awm a, zung a neih loh avangin a rawp ta mai a." 
Matthew13:7 Tin, a then hnimhlingnei zingah a tla a, hnim chu a lo to sang a, a dip ral ta a." 
Matthew13:8 Tin, a then lei thaah a tla a, thenkhat a leh za te, thenkhat a leh sawmruk te, thenkhat a leh sawmthum tein a lo rah ta a." 
Matthew13:9 Tupawh beng nei chuan hre rawh se, a ti a." 
Matthew13:10 Tin, zirtirte chu an lo kal a, a hnenah, engatinge an hnenah tehkhin thuin i sawi? an ti a." 
Matthew13:11 Tin, ani chuan a chhang a, an hnenah, Van ram thuruk chu nangni hriat zawng phal a ni a, anni hriat erawh chu phal a ni lo." 
Matthew13:12 Tupawh a nei apiang an pe belhchhah ang a, an nei teuh ang; nimahsela, tupawh a nei lo apiang chu, an neih chhun pawh an laksak ang." 
Matthew13:13 Chutih avang chuan tehkhin thuin an hnenah ka sawi a ni; hmu mah se la an hmuh thin loh a, bengin hre mah se la an hriat thin loh a, a ngaihna pawh an hriat thin loh avangin." 
Matthew13:14 Tin, Isaia thu sawi lawk kha an chungah a lo thleng a nih hi: Beng zawngin in hre na ang a, a ngaihna erawh chu in hre tawp lo ang; Hmuh zawng in hmu na ang a, hriat erawh chu in hre tawp lo ang." 
Matthew13:15 He chite thinlung hi a lo chawlawl ta a, an bengte a lo ngawng deuh a, an maimitchhing bawk a, 'Chutilochuan, kan mitin kan hmu ang a, kan bengin kan hria ang a, kan thinlungin kan hre bawk ang a, kan hawi kir leh ang a, Ani'n min tidam hlauh dah ang e,' an ti a, a tih kha." 
Matthew13:16 Nangni mit erawh chu a vannei a ni, a hmuh thina vangin; in beng pawh a vannei a ni, a hriat thina vangin." 
Matthew13:17 Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, zawlnei tam takte leh mi fel tam takte pawhin in thil hmuhte hi hmuh an chak a, nimahsela an hmu si lo; in thil hriatte pawh hi hriat an chak a, nimahsela an hre si lo." 
Matthew13:18 Chutichuan, buh chi thehtu tehkhin thu chu hre rawh u." 
Matthew13:19 Tupawhin ram thu chu benga a lo hriat a, a ngaihna a hriat si lo chuanin, mi sual chu a lo kal a, a thinlunga theh sa chu a chhuhsak thin. Chu mi chu kawng dunga theh chu a ni." 
Matthew13:20 Tin, pialtlep hmuna theh chu, thu chu hriaa lawm taka pawm nghal thin hi a ni." 
Matthew13:21 Nimahsela, amahah chuan zung a awm lo a, rei lote chauh a awm a; tin, thu avang chuan hrehawmna emaw, tihduhdahna emaw a lo awm veleh a tlu nghal mai thin." 
Matthew13:22 Tin, hnimhlingnei zinga theh chu, thu hretu a ni a, nimahsela, khawvel lungkhamna leh hausakna bumna chuan thu chu a dip a, rah loin a lo awm thin." 
Matthew13:23 Tin, lei tha chunga theh chu, thu chu benga hriaa a ngaihna hre bawk hi a ni; chu mi chu a rah ngei a, thenkhat a leh za te, thenkhat a leh sawmruk te, thenkhat a leh sawmthum tein a pung thin, a ti a." 
Matthew13:24 Tehkhin thu dang an hnenah a sawi leh a: Van ram chu, mi a loa chi tha thehtu nen chuan tehkhin a ni." 
Matthew13:25 Nimahsela, mi an muthilh hlanin a hmelma a lo kal a, buh zingah chuan buh lem a theh a, a kal bo leh ta a." 
Matthew13:26 Tin, buh chu a lo to a, a lo vuih chuan, buh lem chu a lo lang ve ta a." 
Matthew13:27 Tin, in neitu bawihte chu an lo kal a, a hnenah chuan, 'Ka pu, i loah chi tha i theh lo em ni? Buh lem saw khawi ata lo awm nge ni le?' an ti a." 
Matthew13:28 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, Chu chu hmelmain a lo ti ta a nih chu a ti a. Tin, bawihte chuan a hnenah, a nih leh chung chu va la khawm mai i la rem i ti em? an ti a." 
Matthew13:29 Ani erawh chuan, 'Ti lo e; buh lem chu in lak khawm zawngin buh chu in pawt tel hlauh dah ang e." 
Matthew13:30 Buh seng thlengin to za rawh se; tin, buh seng hunah chuan buh attute hnenah, Buh lem chu la khawm hmasa zet u la, hal turin tei rawh u; buh erawh chu ka buh inah seng lut rawh u, ka la ti ang e,' a ti a, a ti a." 
Matthew13:31 Tehkhin thu dang an hnenah a sawi leh a: Van ram chu antam chi fang khat miin a lak a, a loa a theh ang chu a ni a." 
Matthew13:32 Chu chu chi zawng zawng aiin a te ber a; nimahsela a lo to san hunah chuan thlaite ai chuan a lian zawk a, thing a lo ni thin a, chutichuan chungleng savate chu an lo kal a, a zarahte chuan an riak thin a, a ti a." 
Matthew13:33 Tehkhin thu dang an hnenah a sawi leh a: Van ram chu, dawidim hmeichhiain a laka, chhangphut tehkhawng thum zingah a zaa a thawk vek thlenga a phuma ang chu a ni, a ti a." 
Matthew13:34 Chu'ng zawng zawng chu Isua'n tehkhin thuin mipuite hnenah a sawi a, tehkhin thu loin an hnenah engmah a sawi lo." 
Matthew13:35 Zawlneiin, Tehkhin thuin ka ka ka ang ang a, leilung pian tirh ata thil inthup chu ka sawi chhuak ang, tia a sawi kha a lo thlen theihna turin." 
Matthew13:36 Chu mi lai chuan mipuite chu a kalsan a, inah chuan a lut ta a, tin, a zirtirte chu a hnenah an lo kal a, Lova buh lem tehkhin thu kha min hrilhfiah rawh, an ti a." 
Matthew13:37 Tin, ani chuan a chhang a, Chi tha thehtu chu Mihring Fapa hi a ni a." 
Matthew13:38 Lo chu khawvel hi a ni a, chi thate chu ram fate an ni a, buh lemte chu mi sual fate an ni." 
Matthew13:39 Hmelma, a thehtu chu, Diabola a ni a; buh seng chu khawvel tawpna tur a ni; buh attute chu vantirhkohte an ni." 
Matthew13:40 Chutichuan, buh lemte chu an la khawm a, meiin an hal ang hian khawvel tawpnaah chuan a la awm ang." 
Matthew13:41 Mihring Fapa hian a vantirhkohte chu a tir chhuak ang a, a ram ata tihsualtirtute leh thil tisualtute zawng zawng chu an thiar chhuak ang a," 
Matthew13:42 rawhtuina meiah chuan an paih ang; chutah chuan tah leh ha thial chu a awm ang. 
Matthew13:43 Chu mi hunah chuan mi felte chu an Pa ramah chuan ni angin an eng tawh ang. Beng nei chuan hre rawh se. 
Matthew13:44 Van ram chu loa ro phum ruk ang a ni; chu chu miin a hmu a; a thukru a, a lawm avangin a neih zawng zawng chu a va hralh a, chu lo chu a lei ta a." 
Matthew13:45 Tin, van ram chu sumdawng mi tuikeplung tha tak zawngtu ang chu a ni leh a;" 
Matthew13:46 tin, ani chuan tuikeplung hlu tak pakhat a hmu a, a neih zawng zawng chu a va hralh a, a lei ta a." 
Matthew13:47 Tin, van ram chu lenkhang, tuifinriata den a, chi tinreng fun khawmna ang chu a ni leh pek a." 
Matthew13:48 Chu chu a khah veleh a kamah an hnuk chhuak a; tin, an thu a, a tha zawng chu bawmah an la khawm a, a chhia erawh chu an paih a." 
Matthew13:49 Khawvel tawp hunah chuan chutiang bawkin a awm ang; vantirhkohte chu an lo chhuak ang a, mi fel zing ata mi sualte chu an hlir ang a," 
Matthew13:50 rawh tuina meiah chuan an paih ang; chutah chuan tah leh ha thial chu a awm ang, a ti a." 
Matthew13:51 Isua vekin an hnenah, Chu'ng zawng zawng chu in hria em? a ti a. Anni chuan a hnenah, Hria e, an ti a." 
Matthew13:52 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, Chuti a nih chuan, lehkhaziaktu van ram kawng zirtira awm apiang chu, in neitu, a ro bawm ata thil tharte leh thil hluite phawrh chhuak thintu ang chu a ni, a ti a." 
Matthew13:53 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Isua'n chu'ng tehkhin thute chu a sawi zawh veleh chuta tang chuan a kal ta a." 
Matthew13:54 Tin, a awmna khaw lam chu a thleng a, an inkhawmna inah chuan anmahni a zirtir ta a, chutichuan mak an ti hle a, He mi hian he finna leh he'ng thilmak tihtheihnate hi khawi ata nge a hmuh?" 
Matthew13:55 He mi hi thingrem siamtu fapa kha a ni lo em ni? A nu chu Mari an tih hi a ni lo em ni? A unaute pawh Jakoba, Josefa, Simona, Juda an tihte hi an ni lo em ni?" 
Matthew13:56 A farnute pawh kan hnena awm an ni vek lo em ni? He mi hian khawi ata tehlul nge he'ng zawng zawng hi a hmuh ni? an ti a. 
Matthew13:57 Tichuan, a chungah an lungni ta lo a. Nimahsela, Isua'n an hnenah, Zawlnei chu ama khaw lamah leh ama inah chauh lo chuan, chawimawi lohin a awm ngai lo, a ti a.Tin, an rin loha vangin chutah chuan thilmak tam a ti lo." 
Matthew13:58 Tin, an rin loha vangin chutah chuan thilmak tam a ti lo." 
Matthew14:1 Chu mi lai tak chuan lal Heroda chuan Isua chanchin chu a lo hria a," 
Matthew14:2 a chhiahhlawhte hnenah, Chu chu Baptistu Johana kha a nih chu; mitthi zing ata a tho leh ta zuk nia; chuvangin chung thiltihtheihnate chuan amahah a thawk a nih chu, a ti a." 
Matthew14:3 Heroda chuan a unau Philipa nupui Herodi vangin Johana chu a man a, a phuar a, tan inah a lo khung tawh a ni;" 
Matthew14:4 Johana chuan a hnenah, Ani i neih hi a thiang lo e, a tihsak avangin." 
Matthew14:5 Tin, Johana chu tihhlum a tumin mipui a hlau a, zawlneia an ruat avangin." 
Matthew14:6 Nimahsela, Heroda pian champhaphak ni chu a lo thlenin Herodi fanu chu a laiah a lam a, Heroda chu a tilawm ta a." 
Matthew14:7 Chu mi avang chuan a dil apiang pe turin chechhamin a tiam ta a. 
Matthew14:8 Tin, ani chuan a nu fuihin, hetah hian thlengin Baptistu Johana lu mi pe rawh, a ti a." 
Matthew14:9 Tin, lal chu a lungngai ta a; nimahsela a thutiamte leh a chaw kilpuite avang chuan pek tur thu a pe a," 
Matthew14:10 tichuan mi a tir a, tan ina Johana lu chu a tantir a." 
Matthew14:11 Tin, a lu chu thlengin an rawn la a, hmeichhe naupang hnenah chuan an pe a; ani chuan a nu hnenah a kalpui ta a." 
Matthew14:12 Tin, zirtirte chuan a ruang chu an va hlawm a, an phum a; tin, Isua an va hrilh a." 
Matthew14:13 Tin, Isua'n chu chu a hriatin, chuta ta chu lawngin thlaler hmunah a kal hrang ta a. Nimahsela, mipuite chuan an hriat veleh khua atangte chuan kea kalin an zui ta a." 
Matthew14:14 Tichuan ani chu vaukama a chhuah chuan mipui tam tak a hmu a, a khawngaih em em a, an dam lote a tidam a." 
Matthew14:15 Tin, tlai lam a lo nihin zirtirte chu a hnenah an lo kal a, Hei hi thlaler hmun a ni a, khua pawh a lo tlai ta si a; khuaahte kalin an tan ei tur an lei theihna turin mipuite hi kaltir ta che, an ti a." 
Matthew14:16 Isua erawh chuan an hnenah, An kal bo a ngai lo e; nangmahni'n ei tur pe rawh u, a ti a" 
Matthew14:17 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, Hetah chhangper panga leh sangha pahnih chauh kan nei a ni, an ti a." 
Matthew14:18 Tin, ani chuan, Hetah ka hnenah han la rawh u, a ti a." 
Matthew14:19 Tin, hlobet chunga thu turin mipuite chu thu a pe a, chhangper panga leh sangha pahnih chu a la a, van lam enin mal a sawm a, a phel a, chhangperte chu zirtirte hnenah a pe a, tin, zirtirte chuan mipuite hnenah an pe a." 
Matthew14:20 Tin, an vaiin an ei a, an puar ta hlawm a; an ei bang nawi pawh chu bawmrang sawm leh pahnih an rut khat a." 
Matthew14:21 A eitute chu, hmeichhia leh naupang tiam loin, patling hlir pawh sangnga lai an ni a." 
Matthew14:22 Tin, mipuite chu a tintir vel chhungin, a kal hmaa ral lehlama lo kal hmasa turin, zirtirte chu lawngah a chuan luihtir ta nghal a." 
Matthew14:23 Tin, mipuite chu a tintir hnuin, tawngtai turin tlangah chuan a han kal hrang a; tin, tlai lam a lo nihin chutah chuan amah chauhin a awm ta a." 
Matthew14:24 Lawng erawh chu dil lai takah a awm tawh a; thliin a ni lozawngin a nem avangin tuifawnin a vawrh a vawrh ta a. 
Matthew14:25 Tin, khawfing chah dawn laiin, dil chungah kea kalin an hnen lam a rawn pan a." 
Matthew14:26 Tin, khawfing chah dawn laiin, dil chungah kea kalin an hnen lam a rawn pan a. Tin, zirtirte chuan amah chu dil chunga kea a kal an han hmuh chuan, Hmuithla a nih saw! tiin an thlaphang a, hlauin an au ta vak mai a." 
Matthew14:27 Nimahsela, Isua'n anmahni a be ta nghal a, Thlamuang takin awm rawh u; keimah ka ni alawm; hlau suh u, a ti a." 
Matthew14:28 Tin, Petera'n a chhang a, Lalpa, nang i nih chuan tui chunga i hnena lo kal thu mi pe rawh, a ti a." 
Matthew14:29 Tin, ani chuan, Lo kal ta che, a ti a. Petera chu lawng ata a chhuk a, Isua hnen lam panin tui chungah chuan kein a kal a." 
Matthew14:30 Nimahsela, thli tleh chu a hmuhin a hlau a; tin, a pil dawn a, Lalpa, mi chhandam rawh, tiin a au ta a." 
Matthew14:31 Tin, Isua'n a ban ta nghal a, amah chu a chelh a, a hnenah, Nang rin tlem, engah nge i rinhlelh le? a ti a." 
Matthew14:32 Tin, lawnga an chuan chuan thli chu a bang ta mai a." 
Matthew14:33 Tin, lawnga awmte chuan, Pathian Fapa i lo nih tak zet hi, tiin, amah chibai an buk a." 
Matthew14:34 Tin, ral leh lam an kai chuan Gennesaret ram khawmual an thleng ta a." 
Matthew14:35 Tin, chu mi hmuna mite chuan amah an hriat veleh, chu mi kiang vel ram zawng zawngah chuan mi an tir a, damlo zawng zawng chu a hnenah an rawn hruai a.Tin, a puan hmawr tal deh theih an dil chiam a; tin, a dek apiang chu an lo dam ta zel a." 
Matthew14:36 Tin, a puan hmawr tal deh theih an dil chiam a; tin, a dek apiang chu an lo dam ta zel a." 
Matthew15:1 Chu mi lai chuan, Jerusalem khua atangin Pharisaite leh lehkhaziaktute Isua hnenah an lo kal a," 
Matthew15:2 Engati nge i zirtirte'n upate thuro chhiah chu an bawhchhiat thin? Chhang an eiin an kut an sil ngai si lo a, an ti a." 
Matthew15:3 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, Nangni pawhin engati nge in thurochhiah vanga Pathian thupek in bawhchhiat ni?" 
Matthew15:4 Pathianin, 'I nu leh i pa chawimawi rawh,' 'Tupawh a nu emaw a pa emaw sawichhia apiang chu thi mawlh rawh se,' a ti si a." 
Matthew15:5 Nangni erawh chuan, 'Tupawh a nu emaw, a pa emaw hnena i mi chhawrna tur hi Pathian hnena pek a ni tawh, ti apiang chuan," 
Matthew15:6 a nu leh a pa a chawimawi tur a ni lo e,' in ti thin a. Tichuan, in thurochhiah avangin Pathian thu chu in bawh bo ta a nih hi." 
Matthew15:7 Vervekte u, Isaia hian in chungchang thu a lo hril lawk dik zet mai." 
Matthew15:8 'He miteho hian an kain mi chawimawi a, an thinlung erawh chuan mi hlat si a.'" 
Matthew15:9 'Engpawh ni se la, an zirtirnaah mihring thupek an zirtir avangin An mi biak thin hi athlawn mai a ni,' tiin, a ti a, a chhang a." 
Matthew15:10 Tin, mipui chu a ko a, an hnenah, Ngaithla u la, lo ngai thiam rawh u;" 
Matthew15:11 Kaa lut chu mihring tibawlhhlawhtu a ni lo a; kaa chhuak chu, chu ngei chu mihring tibawlhhlawhtu a ni zawk e, a ti a." 
Matthew15:12 Chu mi lai chuan a zirtirte an lo kal a, a hnenah, Pharisaite'n kha thu kha an hriata an lung nih loh kha i hria em? an ti a." 
Matthew15:13 Ani erawh chuan, Kung zawng zawng ka Pa vana mi phun loh chu pawh chhuahin a awm ang." 
Matthew15:14 Anni chu pawisa suh u; hruaitu mitdel an ni. Tichuan, mitdelin mitdel vek a hruai chuan khuarkhurumah an tla dun ang, a ti a, a chhang a." 
Matthew15:15 Tin, Petera'n a hnenah, Tehkhin thu kha min hrilhfiah ta che, tiin a chhang a." 
Matthew15:16 Tin, ani chuan, Tun thlengin nangni pawh hriatna nei loin in la awm cheu maw?" 
Matthew15:17 Kaa lut apiang chu pumah a tla thla a, dailennaa paih chhuahin a awm tih in hre lo'm ni?" 
Matthew15:18 Kaa chhuakte erawh chu thinlungah a lo chhuak a ni; chung ngei chuan mihring a tibawlhhlawh thin a ni. 
Matthew15:19 Thinlungah hian ngaihtuahna sualte tualthahnate, uirenate, inngaihnate, rukruknate, heknate, sawichhiatnate a lo chhuak si thin a." 
Matthew15:20 Chu'ng chu mihring tibawlhhlawhtu a ni; kut sil loa chaw ei erawh chuan mi a tibawlhhlawh lo e, a ti a." 
Matthew15:21 Tin, Isua chuta ta chu a chhuak a, Tura leh Sidon bialah a kal ta a." 
Matthew15:22 Tin, ngai teh, chung ram ata chu Kanaan hmeichhe pakhat a lo chhuak a, Lalpa, Davida Fapa, mi khawngaih rawh; ka fanu ramhuaiin a man tlat a ni, tiin, a au a." 
Matthew15:23 Ani eawh chuan kam khat mahin a chhang lo. Tin, a zirtirte chuan, Kan hnungah a au a au si a, kaltir mai ta che, tiin an rawn ngen a." 
Matthew15:24 Ani erawh chuan, Israel hnam beram bo hnenah lo chuan tirh ka ni lo e, a ti a, a chhang a." 
Matthew15:25 Nimahsela, hmeichhia chu a lo kal a, Lalpa, mi pui rawh a, tiin, chibai a buk a." 
Matthew15:26 Tin, ani chuan, Fate chhang laksak a, uite hnena paih chu mawi lo e, a ti a, a chhang a." 
Matthew15:27 Ani chuan, Lalpa, nih zawng a ni a; nimahsela, uite pawhin an pu dawhkan ata chhang nawi tla chu an ei thin alawm, a ti a." 
Matthew15:28 Chu veleh Isua chuan a hnenah, Hmeichhia, i rin a nasa em mai; i duh ang takin i chungah awm rawh se, a ti a, a chhang a. Tichuan, a fanu chu, chu mi achinah chuan a lo dam ta mai a." 
Matthew15:29 Tin, Isua chuta ta chu a kal a, Galili dil kiang a lo thleng a; tin, tlangah chuan a chho a, chutah chuan a thu ta a." 
Matthew15:30 Tin, mipui tam tak, kebaite, mitdelte, tawng thei lote, piangsualte rawn hruaiin a hnenah an lo kal a, a ke bulah an dah a; tin, a lo tidam ta hlawm a." 
Matthew15:31 Chutichuan, mipui chuan tawng thei lote chu lo tawnga, piangsualte chu lo thaa, kebaite chu kea kala, mitdelte chu hmu theia an hmuhin mak an ti hle a; tichuan Israelte Pathian chu an fak ta a." 
Matthew15:32 Tin, Isua'n a zirtirte chu a ko a, Mipuiho hi tunah ni thum ka hnenah an awm tawh a, ei tur engmah an neih loh avangin ka khawngaih em em a ni; chaw ngheiin ka kaltir duh lo e, chutilochuan kawng lakah an chau dah ang e, a ti a." 
Matthew15:33 Tin, zirtirte chuan a hnenah, Mipui heti zozai puarna khawp chhangper chuti zozai thlalerah khawi ata nge kan hmuh ang? an ti a." 
Matthew15:34 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, Chhangper engzat nge in neih? a ti a. Tin, anni chuan Per sarih, nghate tlemte nen, an ti a." 
Matthew15:35 Tin, ani chuan leia thu turin mipui chu thu a pe a." 
Matthew15:36 Tin, chhangper pasarih leh sanghate chu a la a, lawm thu a sawi a, a phel a, zirtirte hnenah a pe a, tin, zirtirte chuan mipuite hnenah an pe a." 
Matthew15:37 Tin, an vaiin an ei a, an puar ta hlawm a; an ei bang nawi pawh chu bawm sarih an rut khat a." 
Matthew15:38 A eitute chu, hmeichhia leh naupang tiam loin, patling hlir pawh sangli an ni a.Tin, mipuite chu a tintir hnuin lawngah a chuang a, Magadan ram a lo thleng a." 
Matthew15:39 Tin, mipuite chu a tintir hnuin lawngah a chuang a, Magadan ram a lo thleng a." 
Matthew16:1 Tin, Pharisaite leh Saddukaite an lo kal a, amah fiahna'n van ata chhinchhiahna anmahni entir turin an dil a." 
Matthew16:2 Nimahsela ani chuan, an hnenah, Tlai lam a lo nihin 'Khua a tha dawn a ni ang, kawl a sen em mai,' in ti thin a." 
Matthew16:3 Tin, zingah chuan 'Vawiin chu khua a chhe dawn a ni ang, kawl a sen a, khua a dur em mai,' in ti thin a. Van awmzia in hre fiahthiam si a, nimahsela hun chhinchhiahnate hi in hre fiah thei lo." 
Matthew16:4 Chhuan sual tak leh uire hmang takte chuan chhinchhiahna an zawng a, nimahsela, Jona chhinchhiahna chauh lo chu an hnenah chhinchhiahna reng reng pek a ni lo ang, a ti a, a chhang a. Tin, anmahni a kalsan a, a kal ta daih a." 
Matthew16:5 Tin, zirtirte chu ral leh lam an thlen chuan chhang an lo ken theihnghilh a." 
Matthew16:6 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, Pharisaite leh Saddukaite dawidim lakah chuan inveng u la, fimkhur rawh u, a ti a." 
Matthew16:7 Tin, anni chuan, Chhang kan keng hauh lo, tiin an inngaihtuah a." 
Matthew16:8 Tin, Isua'n chu chu a hria a, Rin tlemte u, engati nge chhang in neih loh avanga in inngaihtuah ni?" 
Matthew16:9 Tunah pawh in rilruin in la hre lo fo maw? Mi sangnga chhangper pangaa hrai leh in bawmrang ruh khah zat kha, in hre reng lo'm ni?" 
Matthew16:10 Mi sangli chhangper pasariha hraia in bawm ruh khah zat pawh kha? 
Matthew16:11 Chhang thu in hnenah ka sawi lo tih engtizia nge in hriat loh? Pharisaite leh Saddukaite dawidim lakah erawh chuan fimkhur rawh u, a ti a." 
Matthew16:12 Chu veleh chhang dawidim lakah fimkhur turin a tir lo a, Pharisaite leh Saddukaite zirtirna laka fimkhur turin anmahni a tir zawk tih an lo hre ta a." 
Matthew16:13 Tin, Isua chu Philipa Kaisari bial chu a lo thlen chuan a zirtirte hnenah Mite'n Mihring Fapa hi tu nge a ni an tih? tiin a zawt a." 
Matthew16:14 Tin, anni chuan, Thenkhatin, 'Baptistu Johana a ni,' an ti a; thenkhatin, 'Elija a ni,' an ti; thenkhatin, 'Jeremia emaw zawlnei tua emaw a ni,' an ti, an ti a." 
Matthew16:15 Ani chuan an hnenah, A nih leh, nangni'n tu nge a ni mi tih? a ti a." 
Matthew16:16 Tin, Simon Petera'n, Krista, Pathian nung Fapa chu i ni, a ti a, a chhang a." 
Matthew16:17 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, Simon Bar-Jona, i eng a thawl e; tisa leh thisen in a hriattir che a ni si lo a, ka pa vana miin a hriattir zawk che a ni." 
Matthew16:18 Tin, nang Petera i ni tih ka hrilh bawk a che; he lungpui chungah hian ka kohhranho ka rem chho ang a, Mitthi Khaw kulh kawngkharte chuan chu chu an ngam lo ang." 
Matthew16:19 Van ram chabite ka pe ang chia, lei chungah engpawh i phuar apiang vanah phuar a ni ang a; lei chungah engpawh i phelh apiang vanah phelh a ni ang, a ti a, a chhang a." 
Matthew16:20 Chumi zawhah Krista a ni tih tumah hrilh lo turin zirtirte chu a ti tlat a. 
Matthew16:21 Chu mi a chinah chuan Isua'n Jerusalem khuaa a kal turzia te, upate, puithiam lalte, lehkhaziaktute laka thil tam tak a tuar turzia te, tihhluma a awm turzia te, ni thum nia kaihthawha a awm turziate chu a zirtirhote a hriattir tan ta a." 
Matthew16:22 Tin, Petera chuan ani chu a hruai hrang a, Lalpa, Pathianin khawngaih che rawh se; chung chu i chungah a thleng tawp lo ang, tiin a zilh ta a." 
Matthew16:23 Ani erawh chu a hawi a, Petera hnenah chuan, Setan, ka hnungah kal rawh; ka tan tlukna i ni e; Pathian thilte ngaituah loin mihring thilte i ngaihtuah zawk a nih hi, a ti a." 
Matthew16:24 Tin, Isua'n a zirtirte hnenah, Tupawhin mi zui a duh chuan mahni hreawm pawisa loin, a kraws puin mi zui rawh se." 
Matthew16:25 Tupawh a nun humhim duh apiangin a chan ang a; tupawh keimah avanga a nun chan apiangin a humhim ang. 
Matthew16:26 Miin khawvel hi a pumin nei se la, a nun chan si se la, a tan eng nge sawt ang? A nih loh leh, miin a nun aiah eng nge a pek ang?" 
Matthew16:27 Mihring Fapa hi a vantirhkohte nen, a Pa ropuinaa inthuamin a lo kal dawn si a; chu mi hunah chuan mi tin an thiltih ang zelin a rul theuh ang.Tih tak meuhin ka ti a che u., heta dingho a thente hi, Mihring Fapa a rama lo kal an hmuh hma chu thihna tem tawp lo tur an awm, a ti a." 
Matthew16:28 Tih tak meuhin ka ti a che u., heta dingho a thente hi, Mihring Fapa a rama lo kal an hmuh hma chu thihna tem tawp lo tur an awm, a ti a." 
Matthew17:1 Tin, ni ruk achinah chuan Isua'n Petera te, Jakoba te, a unau Johana te a hruai a, a hrangin tlang sang takah a kal chhohpui a." 
Matthew17:2 An hmaah chuan a hmel awmzia chu a lo danglam ta a; a hmai ni angin a lo eng a, a silhfente chu eng angin a lo var ta a." 
Matthew17:3 Tin, ngai teh, Mosia leh Elija chu amah nen inbiain an hnenah an inlar a." 
Matthew17:4 Tin, Petera'n Isua a bia a, Lalpa, kan tan heta awm hi a tha; i duh chuan hetah hian bawkte pathum ka khawh ang; i tan pakhat, Mosia tan pakhat, Elija tan pakhat, a ti a." 
Matthew17:5 A la sawi lai mekin, ngai teh, chhum var takin anmahni a rawn hliah ta a; tin, ngai teh, chhum atang chuan awin, Hei hi ka Fapa duh tak, ka lawm em ema chu a ni; ama thu ngai rawh u, a ti a." 
Matthew17:6 Tin, zirtirte chuan chu chu an hriatin an tlu bawkkhup a, an hlau ta em em a." 
Matthew17:7 Tin, Isua'n anni chu a rawn dek a, Tho u la, hlau suh u, a ti a." 
Matthew17:8 Tin, an dak chhuak a, Isua chauh lo chu tumah an hmu ta lo a." 
Matthew17:9 Tin, tlang ata chu an chhuk laiin, Isua'n an hnenah, Mihring Fapa hi mitthi zing ata a thawh leh hma loh zawng in thil hmuh kha tumah hrilh suh u, tiin thu a pe ta a." 
Matthew17:10 Tin, a zirtirte chuan a hnenah, Lehkhaziaktute'n, 'Elija a lo kal hmasa tur a ni,' engtiziaa ti nge an nih le? tiin an zawt a." 
Matthew17:11 Tin, ani chuan, Elija chu a lo kal dawn reng a ni, engkim a siam tha bawk ang." 
Matthew17:12 Nimahsela ka hrilh a che u, Elija chu a lo kal tawh reng a ni, amah chu an hre lo a, a chungah an duh duhin an ti ta zawk a. Chutiang bawkin Mihring Fapa pawh hian an lakah a tuar ve dawn a ni, a ti a, a chhang a." 
Matthew17:13 Chu veleh, zirtirte chuan Baptistu Johana thu an hnenah a sawi a ni tih an lo hre ta a." 
Matthew17:14 Tin, mipui hnen an lo thlenin, mi pakhat a hnenah a lo kal a, a hmaah thingthiin," 
Matthew17:15 Lalpa, ka fapa saw khawngaih ang che, thla em at a ni a, a tuar nasa em mai; vawi tam tak meiah a tlu thin a, vawi tam tak tuiah a tlu bawk thin a ni." 
Matthew17:16 Tin, i zirtirte hnenah ka rawn hruai a, an tidam thei si lo a, a ti a." 
Matthew17:17 Tin, Isua'n Chhuan rinna nei loa tihmawhte u, eng chen nge in hnenah ka awm ang a, eng chen nge ka ngaihtheih ang che u? Amah chu ka hnenah hian rawn hruai rawh u, a ti a, a chhang a." 
Matthew17:18 Tin, Isua'n ramhuai chu a hau a, a chhung ata a chhuak ta a; chu mi dar achinah chuan naupang chu a lo dam ta a." 
Matthew17:19 Chu mi hnuah chuan zirtirte chu a hrangin Isua hnenah an lo kal a, Engati nge keini'n kan hnawh chhuah theih loh? an ti a." 
Matthew17:20 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, In rin tlem vangin. Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, antam mu fangkhat ang rin in neih chuan, he tlang hnenah hian, 'Heta tangin sawtah sawn va insawn rawh,' in ti ang a, a insawn mai ang; in tan tih theih loh reng engmawh a awm lo ang, a ti a." 
Matthew17:21 Nimahsela, hetiang hi tawngtai leh chaw nghei chauh lo chuan a chhuak thin lo."
