Matthew17:22 Tin, Galili rama an rawn inkhawm laiin, Isua'n an hnenah, Mihring Fapa hi mihringte kuta mantirin a awm dawn a ni," 
Matthew17:23 Tin, an tihlum ang a; tin, ni thum niah chuan kaihthawhin a awm ang, a ti a. Tichuan an lungngai ta em em a." 
Matthew17:24 Tin, Kapernaum khua chu an lo thlenin Pathian biak in tangka khawntute chu Petera hnenah an lo kal a, In zirtirtuin biak in tangka chu a pe ve thin lawm ni? an ti a." 
Matthew17:25 Ani chuan, Pe ve thin e, a ti a. Tin, ina a va luh chuan Isua'n a hnenah, Simon, engtin nge i ngaih? Leia lalten chhiah emaw, sum neih man emaw, tu lakah nge an lak thin? an fate lakah nge, mi hrang lakah? tiin a lo sawi khalh a." 
Matthew17:26 Tin, Petera'n, Mi hrang lakah, a tih veleh, Isua'n a hnenah, Chuti a nih si chuan fate chu an awl a ni ang chu.Nimahsela nang dilah va kal la, nghakuai chiah la, sangha lo chhuak hmasa chu man rawh; tin, a ka i keu veleh cheng hnih i hmu mai ang; chu chu la la, kei leh nang atan an hnenah pe rawh, chutilochuan anni chu kan tilungni lo dah ang e, a ti a." 
Matthew17:27 Nimahsela nang dilah va kal la, nghakuai chiah la, sangha lo chhuak hmasa chu man rawh; tin, a ka i keu veleh cheng hnih i hmu mai ang; chu chu la la, kei leh nang atan an hnenah pe rawh, chutilochuan anni chu kan tilungni lo dah ang e, a ti a." 
Matthew18:1 Chu mi lai tak chuan zirtirte chu Isua hnenah an lo kal a, Van ramah tu nge ropui ber ang le? an ti a." 
Matthew18:2 Tin, ani chuan naupang te a ko a, an zingah a dintir a." 
Matthew18:3 Tih tak meuhin ka ti a che u, in lamlet a, naupang te ang in lo nih loh chuan, van ramah in lut tawp lo ang." 
Matthew18:4 Chutichuan, tupawh he naupang te anga inngaitlawm apiang, chu mi chu van ramah chuan a ropui ber ang." 
Matthew18:5 Tin, tupawh ka hming avanga hetiang naupang te pakhat lawm apiang chu keimah mi lawm an ni ang." 
Matthew18:6 Amaherawhchu, tupawh he'ng mi ringtu mi tete zinga pakhat pawh titlu apiang chu, an nghawngah buh rawt sawmna lung lianpui awrhtirin tuifinriat thuk laiah thlak daih se la an tan a sawt zawk ang." 
Matthew18:7 Tluknate avangin khawvel chung a pik e! Tluknate chu lo awm tur reng zawng a ni a; nimahsela tlukna awmtirtu chung chu a pik e! 
Matthew18:8 Tin, i kutin emaw, i kein emaw a tihtluk che chuan, tan la, paih daih rawh; kut pahnih emaw, ke pahnih emaw neia kumkhaw meia paih ai chuan, piangsualin emaw, kebaiin emaw nunnaa luh i tan a tha zawk e." 
Matthew18:9 Tin, i mitin a tihtluk che chuan kher chhuak la, paih daih rawh; mit khing hnih neia Gehenna meia paih ai chuan, mi khing khat neia nunnaa luh i tan a tha zawk e." 
Matthew18:10 Heng mi tete zinga pakhat pawh hi hmusit lo turin fimkhur rawh u; an vantirhkohte'n vanah ka Pa vana mi hmel chu an hmu fo thin tih, ka hrilh che u hi." 
Matthew18:11 Boralte chhamdam turin mihring fapa hi a lo kal a ni reng a ni. 
Matthew18:12 Engtin nge in ngaih? Mi tupawhin beram za nei se la, an zinga pakhat vak bo se la, sawmkua leh pakuate chu hnutchhiah a, tlanga han kalin, a bo chu a zawng lo ang em ni?" 
Matthew18:13 Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, a hmuh leh hlauh chuan, sawmkua leh pakua vak bo lote chungah ai chuan, a chungah a lawm zawk ang." 
Matthew18:14 Chutiang bawkin he'ng mi tete zinga pakhat boral pawh hi in Pa vana mi duhzawng a ni lo e. 
Matthew18:15 Tin, i unauin i chungah thil tisual se la, kal la, amah leh nangmah chauha hriatah a sualnaah chuan zilh ang che; a ngaihthlak che chuan i unau chu i hneh a ni tawh ang." 
Matthew18:16 A ngaihthlak loh che erawh chuan, mi dang pakhat emaw pahnih emaw i hnenah hruai ang che, chutichuan thu tinreng chu hretu pahnih emaw, pathum emaw kaa tihngheha a awm theihna'n." 
Matthew18:17 Tin, anni pawh chu a ngaihthlak duh loh chuan kohhranho hnenah thlen ang che; tin, kohhranho pawh a ngaihthlak duh loh chuan, ani chu i tan Jentail leh chhiahkhawntu ang ni rawh se." 
Matthew18:18 Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, lei chungah engpawh in phuar apiang, vanah phuar a ni ang a; lei chungh engpawh in phelh apiang, vanah phelh a ni ang." 
Matthew18:19 Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh leh a che u, lei chungah hian in zinga mi pahnih an thil dil kawnga an thurual chuan, ka Pa vana mi tihsakin an awm ang." 
Matthew18:20 Mi pahnih emaw pathum emaw ka hminga an inkhawmna apiangah chuan an zingah ka awm si thin a, a ti a." 
Matthew18:21 Chu mi lai chuan Petera a lo kal a, a hnenah, Lalpa, ka unauin vawi engzat nge ka chungah thil tisual se la ka ngaihdam tur? Vawi sarih thlengin em ni ang? a ti a." 
Matthew18:22 Isua'n a hnenah, 'Vawi sarih thlengin,' ka ti lo va che. 'Vawi sarih hmun sawmsarih thlengin,' ka ti zawk che a ni." 
Matthew18:23 Chu mi avang chuan, van ram chu, lal ber tu emaw a bawihte hnena sum chanchin tihfel tum nen chuan, tehkhin a ni." 
Matthew18:24 Tin, a han tihfel tan chuan mi pakhat talent singkhat ba, a hnenah an rawn hruai a." 
Matthew18:25 Tin, pek tur a neih loha vangin, a pu chuan, amah nen, a nupui nen, a fate nen, a neih zawng zawng nen hralha rulh tur thu a pe a." 
Matthew18:26 Chutichuan bawih chuan, 'Ka pu, ka chungah zahngai rih la, a zain ka pe vek ang che,' tiin bawkkhupin chibai a buk a." 
Matthew18:27 Tichuan chu bawiha pu chuan a khawngaih ta em em a, a thlah a, a bat chu a ngaidam ta a." 
Matthew18:28 Nimahsela, chu bawih chu a kal chhuak a, a bawihpuite zinga pakhat a duli za ba a va hmu a; tin, a man a, 'I bat kha mi pe rawh,' tiin, a hrawkah a rek a." 
Matthew18:29 Chutichuan a bawihpui chu a bawkkhup a, 'Ka chungah zahngai rih la, ka la pe ang che,' tiin a ngen chiam a." 
Matthew18:30 Nimahsela, a duh lo a; a bat chu a tlak hma loh zawng tan inah a va khung ta a." 
Matthew18:31 Chutichuan, a bawihpuite chuan a thiltih chu an hmuhin, an lungngai em em a, a thiltih zawng zawng chu an pu an va hrilh ta a." 
Matthew18:32 Chu veleh a pu chuan a ni chu a ko a, a hnenah, 'Bawih sual, mi dil chiam avang khan i bat zawng zawng kha ka ngaidam che a ni a." 
Matthew18:33 'Ka khawngaih che ang khan nang pawhin i bawihpui chu i khawngaih ve tur a ni lo'm ni?' a ti a. 
Matthew18:34 Tin, a pu chu a thinur ta a, a bat zawng zawng a tlak hma loh zawng nghaisatute hnenah a pe ta a.Mi tinin thinlung taka in unaute inngaihdam loh chuan ka Pa vana mi pawhin chutiang bawkin in chungah a ti ve ang, a ti a." 
Matthew18:35 Mi tinin thinlung taka in unaute inngaihdam loh chuan ka Pa vana mi pawhin chutiang bawkin in chungah a ti ve ang, a ti a." 
Matthew19:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Isua'n chung thu chu a sawi zawh veleh, Galili ram ata a chhuak a, Jordan lui rala Judai ramah chuan a va kal a." 
Matthew19:2 Tin, mipui tam takin an zui a; chutah chuan anmahni chu a tidam ta a." 
Matthew19:3 Tin, Pharisaite a hnenah an lo kal a, amah fiahna'n, Eng vang pawhin miin a nupui mak a thiang em? an ti a." 
Matthew19:4 Tin, ani chuan, A tir ata an siamtu khan hmeichhia leh mipaa a siam leh," 
Matthew19:5 'He mi avang hian mipain a nu leh a pa a kalsan ang a, a nupui a vuan ang; tichuan an pahnih chuan tisa pum khat an lo ni tawh ang,' a ti tih in chhiar lo em ni?" 
Matthew19:6 Chutichuan pahnih an ni tawh lo a, tisa pumkhat an ni tawh zawk a ni. Chuvangin Pathianin a zawm tawh chu mihringin then suh se, a ti a, a chhang a." 
Matthew19:7 Anni chuan a hnenah, A nih leh, engati nge Mosia'n inmakna lehkha peka mak tur thu a pek si? an ti a." 
Matthew19:8 Ani chuan an hnenah, Mosia'n in thinlung khauha vangin a sin in nupuite mak a phal ni; nimahsela a tir ata chutiang a ni si lo." 
Matthew19:9 Kei chuan ka ti a che u, 'Tupawh tlangval ngaih vang ni lo a, nupui maa mi dang nei apiang chu, a uire a ni; mak hnu nei apiang pawh a uire a ni, a ti a." 
Matthew19:10 Zirtirte chuan a hnenah, Nupui kawngah mipa thu chutiang a nih si chuan inneih hi a tha lo e, an ti a." 
Matthew19:11 Ani erawh chuan an hnenah, Chu thu chu mi nazawngin an pawm thei lo e, a pekate chauh lo chuan." 
Matthew19:12 Mi tilreh, an nu pum chhung ata chutianga piang rengte an awm a; mi tilreh, mihring kuta rehte an awm bawk a; mi tilreh, van ram avanga tilreha insiam chawpte an awm bawk a. Tupawh a pawm thei apiangin pawm rawh se, a ti a." 
Matthew19:13 Chu mi lai chuan a chunga a kut a nghaha a tawngtaisak turin, a hnenah naupang tete an rawn hruai a; tin, zirtirte chuan an lo hau a." 
Matthew19:14 Isua erawh chuan, Naupang tete ka hnenah han kaltir u la, hnar suh u; van ram chu hetiang mite ta a ni si a, a ti a." 
Matthew19:15 Tin, an chungah a kut a nghat a, chuta ta chu a kal ta a." 
Matthew19:16 Tin, mi pakhat a hnenah a lo kal a, Zirtirtu, chatuana nunna ka neih theihna'n thil tha eng nge ka tih ang? a ti a." 
Matthew19:17 Tin, ani chun a hnenah, Thil tha thu engah nge mi zawh? Tha chu pakhat chauh a awm; engpawh ni se la, nunnaa luh i duh chuan thupekte chu zawm rawh, a ti a." 
Matthew19:18 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, A eng ber hi maw? a ti a. Tin, Isua'n, Tual i that tur a ni lo; i uire tur a ni lo; i ru tur a ni lo; Dawtin i hek tur a ni lo." 
Matthew19:19 I nu leh i pa chawimawi rawh,' tihte leh, 'Nangmah i inhmangaih angin i vengte i hmangaih tur a ni,' tih hi, a ti a." 
Matthew19:20 Tlangval chuan a hnenah, Chu'ng thu zawng zawng chu ka zawm thin; eng nge ka la bak? a ti a." 
Matthew19:21 Isua'n a hnenah, Tha famkima awm i duh chuan, kal la, i neih chu hralh la, pachhiate hnenah pe rawh, chutichuan vanah ro i nei ang; tin, lo kal la, mi zui ang che, a ti a." 
Matthew19:22 Tlangval erawh chuan chu thu chu a hriatin lungngai takin a kal bo ta a, sum tam tak nei mi a niha vangin." 
Matthew19:23 Tin, Isua'n a zirtirte hnenah chuan, Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, mi hausa tan van rama luh chu harsa tak a ni." 
Matthew19:24 Tin, ka hrilh leh a che u, mi hausa Pathian rama luh aiin sanghawngsei hriau benga luh tlang a awl zawk, a ti a." 
Matthew19:25 Tin, zirtirte'n chu chu an hriat chuan mak an ti nasa em em a, tu nge chhandam ni thei ang le? an ti a." 
Matthew19:26 Tin, Isua'n anni chu a en a, an hnenah, Chu chu mihring tan tih rual a ni lo a; Pathian nen erawh chuan engkim tih theih a ni, a ti a." 
Matthew19:27 Tin, Petera'n a hnenah, Ngai teh, keini'n engkim kalsanin kan zui ta chia; eng nge kan hmuh ang le? a ti a, a zawt a." 
Matthew19:28 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, Siamtharnaah chuan, Mihring Fapa a ropuina thutphata a thut hunah, nangni mi zuituteho hi, Israel hnam sawm leh hnam hnihte chu ngaihtuahin, lalthutphah sawm leh pahnihah in la thu ve ang." 
Matthew19:29 Tin, mi tin inte emaw, unaute emaw, farnute emaw, pa emaw, nu emaw, fate emaw, ramte emaw ka hming avanga kalsan apiang chuan a leh za an hmu ang a, chatuana nunna an la chang bawk ang.Nimahsela, mi tam tak, hmasa bera awmte chu, hnuhnung berah an la awm ang a; hnuhnung berte pawh hmasa berah an la awm ang." 
Matthew19:30 Nimahsela, mi tam tak, hmasa bera awmte chu, hnuhnung berah an la awm ang a; hnuhnung berte pawh hmasa berah an la awm ang." 
Matthew20:1 Van ram chu, in neitupa a grep huana hnathawktute ruai tura zinga chhuaka ang chu a ni si a." 
Matthew20:2 Tin, ani chuan hnathawktute nen chuan ni khata duli hlawha an inrem veleh a grep huanah chuan a tir ta hlawm a." 
Matthew20:3 Tin, feh reh san lai velin a va chhuak a, mi dang dawr hmuna ding mai maite a hmu a." 
Matthew20:4 Tin, an hnenah, 'Nangni pawh grep huanah va kal ve tawh u, a mawi tawk apiang ka pe ang che u,' a ti a. Tichuan an kal ta a." 
Matthew20:5 Tin, chawfak hun lai velah leh behliangmun hun lai velah chuan a va chhuak leh a, chutiang bawkin a ti leh a." 
Matthew20:6 Tin, pahmei zanriah chhum hun lai velah chuan a va chhuak a, mi dang dingte a hmu a; tin, an hnenah, 'Engati nge nilengin heta in din mai mai ni?' a ti a." 
Matthew20:7 Anni chuan a hnenah, 'Tuma'n min rawih loha vangin,' an ti a. Ani chuan an hnenah, 'Nangni pawh grep huanah va kal ve tawh u,' a ti a." 
Matthew20:8 Tin, khua a lo tlai lam chuan, grep huan neitupa chuan, a sum enkawltu hnenah, 'Hnathawktute kha ko la, a hnuhnung bera tanin a hmasa ber thlengin an hlawh pe rawh,' a ti a." 
Matthew20:9 Tin, pahmei zanriah chhum hun lai vela a rawihte chu a lo kal chuan duli an hmu theuh a." 
Matthew20:10 Tin, a hmasa berte chu an lo kal chuan, hmuh tam deuh an inring a; nimahsela anni pawh chuan duli bawk an hmu theuh a." 
Matthew20:11 Tin, an han dawn chuan, 'Heng hnuhnung berte hian darkar khat chauh an thawk a, keini chhun hrehawm leh thawsa tuartute tlukin i siam si,' tiin." 
Matthew20:12 In neitupa chungah chuan an phunnawi ta a. 
Matthew20:13 Ani erawh chuan, an zinga mi pakhat hnenah, 'Thiana, i chungah engmah ka tisual hlei nem; duli hlawhah kan inrem lo em ni?" 
Matthew20:14 I ta kha la la, kal mai rawh; nangmah ka pek che ang bawk kha he hnuhnung ber hnenah hian ka pe duh a ni." 
Matthew20:15 Ka ta na na na chu ka duh duha ka tih a thiang lo em ni? A nih loh leh kei ka that avangin nangin i itsik em ni? tiin a chhang a. 
Matthew20:16 Chutiangin, hnuhnung berte chu a hmasa berte an la ni ang, hmasa berte pawh chu a hnuhnung berte an la ni ang, a ti a." 
Matthew20:17 Tin, Isua Jerusalem khuaa a han chhoh laiin zirtir sawm leh pahnihte chu a hruai hrang a, kalkawngah chuan an hnenah," 
Matthew20:18 Ngai teh u, Jerusalem khuaa kan chhoh dawn hi; Mihring Fapa hi puithiam lalte leh lehkhaziaktute kuta mantirin a awm dawn a ni; tin, anni chuan thi turin a chungah thu an titlu ang a." 
Matthew20:19 Nuihza siamna'na hman tur leh vuak tur leh kraws-a khenbeh turin Jentailte hnenah an pe ang; tin, ni thum nia kaihthawhin a awm ang, a ti a." 
Matthew20:20 Chu mi lai chuan Zebedaia fapate nu chu a fapate hruaiin, a hnenah a lo kal a, chibai a buk a, thil eng emaw a dil a." 
Matthew20:21 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, Engnge i duh?, a ti a. Tin, ani'n a hnenah, he'ng ka fapate pahnih hi i ramah, i ding lamah pakhat, i vei lamah pakhat an thut theihna turin thu pe ang che, a ti a." 
Matthew20:22 Isua erawh chuan, In dil chu in hre lo a ni. Ka no in tur chu in in thei em ni? a ti a, a chhang a. Anni'n a hnenah, Thei e, an ti a." 
Matthew20:23 Ani chuan an hnenah, Ka no chu in in ngei ang; nimahsela ka ding lam leh vei lama thut tur thu chu keia pek tur a ni lo a, ka Pa buatsaihsakate tan a ni zawk ang, a ti a." 
Matthew20:24 Tin, sawmte chuan chu chu an lo hriatin unau pahnihte chungah chuan an thinur ta a." 
Matthew20:25 Isua erawh chuan anniho chu a ko a, Jentailte chunga roreltute chu an chungh an lal em em thin a, an mi liante chuan an chungah thu an nei em em bawk thin tih in hria." 
Matthew20:26 Nimahsela, nangni zingah zawng chutiang a ni lo ang; tupawh in zinga mi lian nih duh apiang chu in rawngbawltuah a awm zawk tur a ni." 
Matthew20:27 Tupawh in zinga hmasa ber nih duh apiang chu in chhiahhlawhah a awm bawk tur a ni. 
Matthew20:28 Mihring Fapa hi rawngbawlsaka awm turin a lo kal lo a, rawngbawl tur leh mi tam tak tlanna'na a nun pe tur zawka a lo kal ang khan, a ti a." 
Matthew20:29 Tin, Jeriko khua ata an chhuah laiin, mipui tam takin amah chu an zui a." 
Matthew20:30 Tin, ngai teh, mitdel pahnih kawng sira thu chuan Isua a kal tih an hriat veleh, Lalpa, Davida fapa, min khawngaih rawh, tiin an au a." 
Matthew20:31 Tin, mipui chuan ngawi turin an hau a; nimhsela, anni chuan, Lalpa, Davida fapa, minkhawngaih rawh, tiin an au lehzual a." 
Matthew20:32 Tin, Isua a ding a, anmahni a ko a, In chungah engtia ka tih nge in duh? a ti a." 
Matthew20:33 Anni chuan a hnenah, Mit var kan duh, an ti a.Tichuan, Isua'n a khawngaih em em a, an mit a dek a; tichuan an hmu thei ta nghal a, amah chu an zui ta a." 
Matthew20:34 Tichuan, Isua'n a khawngaih em em a, an mit a dek a; tichuan an hmu thei ta nghal a, amah chu an zui ta a." 
Matthew21:1 Tin, Jerusalem khua an thlen dawnin, Bethphage khua, Oliv Tlang chu an thlen chuan Isua'n zirtirte pahnih a tir a." 
Matthew21:2 An hnenah, In hma zawn khuaah sawn va kal ta u la, sabengtung thlun, a kianga a no nen, in hmu mai ang; phelh u la, ka hnenah han kai rawh u." 
Matthew21:3 Tin, tupawhin in hnenah engpawh an sawi chuan, 'Lalpain a duh a ni,' in ti ang a, tin ani chuan a rawn tir nghal mai ang,' a ti a." 
Matthew21:4 En teh, i Lal chu, thuhnuairawlh takin, sabengtung chungah - sabengtung no chung ngeia chuangin i hnenah a lo kal dawn e,' tiin, Zion fanu chu hrilh rawh." 
Matthew21:5 Tia, zawlnei kaa a sawi kha a lo thlen theihna turin chung chu a lo awm ta a ni." 
Matthew21:6 Tichuan zirtirte chu an va kal a. Isua'n an hnena thu a pek ang ngeiin an ti a. 
Matthew21:7 Sabengtung leh a no chu an rawn kai a, a chungah chuan an puante an phah a, ani chuan a chuan chhan ta a." 
Matthew21:8 Tin, mipui zinga a tam zawkin kalkawngah chuan an puante an phah a; mi dangin thinga mi chhawl an sat a, kalkawngah an phah bawk a." 
Matthew21:9 Tin, mipui a hma lama kalte leh a zuite chuan, Davida fapa hnenah Hosanna! Lalpa hminga lo kal chu fakin awm rawh se, chungnung berah khian Hosanna! tiin an au a." 
Matthew21:10 Tin, Jerusalem khuaa a lo luh chuan, a khuain, He mi hi tu nge ni? tiin an phu ta mur mur a." 
Matthew21:11 Tin, mipuiho chuan, He mi hi Zawlnei Isua, Galili rama Nazaret khuaa mi chu a ni, an ti a." 
Matthew21:12 Tin, Isua Pathian biak inah chuan a va lut a, biak ina englo zuartute leh leitute zawng zawng chu a hnawt chhuak a, tangka thlengtuho dawhkante leh thuro zuarho thutphahte pawh chu a nam thluksak a." 
Matthew21:13 An hnenah, 'Ka in chu tawngtaina in an ti ang,' tih ziak a ni; nangni erawh chuan suamhmangte pukah in siam zawk thin a ni, a ti a." 
Matthew21:14 Tin, Pathian biak inah chuan mitdelte leh kebaite a hnenah an lo kal a; anmahni a tidam a." 
Matthew21:15 Nimahsela, puithiam lalte leh lehkhaziaktute'n a thil mak tihte leh biak ina Davida fapa Hosanna! tia naupang aute chu an hmuhin an lungni lo em em a." 
Matthew21:16 A hnenah, he'ngho thu sawi hi i hria em? an ti a. Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, Hria e; 'Nausente leh hnute hne laite kaa chhuak chuanin fakna i tithafamkim ta,' tih hi in chhiar ngai lo em ni? a ti a." 
Matthew21:17 Tin, anni chu a kalsan a, khawpui ata chu a chhuak a, Bethani-ah a kal a; chutah chuan a riak ta a." 
Matthew21:18 Tin, zingah khawpui lama a kir leh laiin a ril a lo tam ta a." 
Matthew21:19 Tin, kawng sirah chuan theipui kung a hmu a, a va pan a, a hnah chauh lo chu engmah a hmu lo a. Tin, a hnenah, Kumkhuain lo rah tawh suh ang che, a ti a. Tin, theipui chu a vuai ta nghal mai a." 
Matthew21:20 Tin, zirtirte chuan chu chu an hmuhin, Engtizia nge theipui hi a vuai tak nghal mai? tiin mak an ti hle a." 
Matthew21:21 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, rinna in neih a, in rinhlelh loh chuan, theipui chunga tih ang chang hi in ti lo ang a, he tlang hnenah pawh hian, 'Lo insawn la, tuifinriatah lo inpaih rawh,' in tih ang chuan a lo awm ang." 
Matthew21:22 Tin, engkim ring chunga tawngtaia in dil apiang chu in hmu ang, a ti a, a chhang a." 
Matthew21:23 Tin, Pathian biak ina a luh hnu a, a zirtir lai chuan puithiam lalte leh vantlang upate chu a hnenah an lo kal a, a hnenah, Tu thuin nge he'ng thil hi i tih? Tuin nge thu pe che? an ti a." 
Matthew21:24 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, Kei pawhin thu kam khat ka zawt ve ang che u, chu chu mi hrilh chuan, tu thuin nge he'ng thil hi ka tih ka hrilh ve ang che u." 
Matthew21:25 Johana baptisma kha, khawia mi thu nge ni? Vana mi thu nge, mihring thu? a ti a, a chhang a. Tin, an inngaihtuah a, 'Vana mi thu,' kan tih chuan, 'Engah nge a thu in awi loh leh?' min ti si ang a." 
Matthew21:26 Tin, 'Mihring thu,' kan tih chuan, mipui chu kan hlau si; mi zawng zawngin Johana chu zawlneiah an ruat si a, an ti a." 
Matthew21:27 Tichuan, Isua an chhang a, Kan hre lo, an ti a. Ani pawh chuan an hnenah, Kei pawhin tu thuin nge he'ng thil hi ka tih ka hrilh bik lo ang che u." 
Matthew21:28 Nimahsela, nangni'n engtin nge in ngaih? Mi tu emawin fapa pahnih a nei a. Pakhat hnenah chuan a va kal a, 'Ka fa, vawiinah grep huanah va thawk rawh,' a ti a." 
Matthew21:29 Ani chuan, 'Ka duh lo,' a ti a, a chhang a; nimahsela, nakinah a rilru chu a lo lamlet a, a kal ta a." 
Matthew21:30 Tin, pakhat hnenah pawh chuan a va kal a, chutiang bawkin a va ti a. Tin, ani chuan, 'Lalpa, ka kal ang e,' a ti a, a chhang a; nimahsela a kal ta si lo a." 
Matthew21:31 Chu mite pahnih chuan a tu zawk chuan nge an pa duhzawng ti le? a ti a. Anni chuan, A hmasa zawk chuan, an ti a. Isua'n an hnenah, Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, chhiahkhawntute leh nawhchizuarte chuan Pathian ramah an luh khalh dawn che u a nih hi." 
Matthew21:32 Johana chu felna kawngah chuan inhnenah a lo kal a, amah chu in ring si lo a; chhiahkhawntute leh nawhchizuarte erawh chuan amah chu an ring a; nangni'n chu chu in hmuh hnu pawhin amah chu in rin theihna turin in lamlet chuang si lo a." 
Matthew21:33 Tehkhin thu dang ngaithla rawh u: Mi tu emaw, in neitu a awm a, chu mi chuan grep huan a siam a, palin a hung vel a, grep sawrna khur a lai a, in sang a sa a; tin, lo enkawltute hnenah thlawhhlawh turin a pe a, ram dangah a kal ta a." 
Matthew21:34 Tin, a rah lawh a hun dawn chuan a rah la turin lo enkawltute hnenah a bawihte a tir a." 
Matthew21:35 Tin, lo enkawltute chuan a bawihte chu an lo man a, pakhat an vua a, pakhat an tihlum a, pakhat lungin an deng a." 
Matthew21:36 Tin, bawih dang, a hmasa pawl aia tam zawk a tir leh a; anniho chungah pawh an hmaa mite an tih ang bawkin an lo ti leh a." 
Matthew21:37 Chu mi hnuah erawh chuan, 'Ka fapa hi chu an zah ang,' tiin a fapa chu an hnenah a tir a." 
Matthew21:38 Nimahsela lo enkawltute chuan a fapa chu an lo hmuh veleh, 'He mi hi roluahtu tur chu a ni; i that ang u khai! a roluah tur hi i neihsak ang u,' an inti a." 
Matthew21:39 Tichuan, ani chu an man a, grep huan ata chu an theh chhuak a, an tihlum ta a." 
Matthew21:40 Chutichuan grep huan neitupa a lo kal hunin chu'ng lo enkawltute chungah chuan engtin nge a rawn tih ang le? a ti a. 
Matthew21:41 Anni chuan a hnenah, Chu'ng mi sualte chu hrehawm takin a tiboral ang a, grep huan chu lo enkawltu dang, a lawh hun apianga a rahte chu a hnena pe zeltu turte hnenah, thlawhhlawh turin a pe ang, an ti a." 
Matthew21:42 Isua'n an hnenah, Pathian lehkha a, 'In satute lung duh loh kha, chu ngei chu a kila lung tangkai ber a lo ni ta. Chu chu Lalpa tih a ni a, kan mithmuhah a mak a ni,' tih hi in chhiar ngai lo em ni?" 
Matthew21:43 Chu mi avang chuan, 'Pathian ram chu in hnen ata laksak a ni ang a, a rah chhuah tur hnam hnenah pek a ni ang,' tih ka hrilh a che u." 
Matthew21:44 Tin, chu mi lung chunga tlu chu a keh sawm ang; a delh phei chu a rawt dip ang, a ti a." 
Matthew21:45 Tin, puithiam lalte leh Pharisaite chuan a tehkhin thute chu an hriatin anmahni chung thu a sawi tih an hre ta a.Tin, amah chu man an tum a; nimahsela mipuite chu an hlau si a, zawlneia an ruata vangin." 
Matthew21:46 Tin, amah chu man an tum a; nimahsela mipuite chu an hlau si a, zawlneia an ruata vangin." 
Matthew22:1 Tin, Isua'n anmahni a bia a, an hnenah tehkhin thuin a sawi leh a." 
Matthew22:2 Van ram chu lal tuemaw a fapa tana lawi chaw siam nen chuan tehkhin a ni. 
Matthew22:3 Tin, lawi chaw eia a sawmte chu ko turin a bawihte a tir a, nimahsela an lo kal duh lo a." 
Matthew22:4 Tin, ani chuan, 'Ka sawmte hnenah, Ngai teh u, ka ruai chu ka peih ta; ka sebawngpate leh ka ran chawm thaute ka talh a, engkim peih a ni ta e; lawi chaw ei turin lo kal tawh rawh u, ti rawh u,' tiin bawih dangte a tir leh a." 
Matthew22:5 Nimahsela, an lo ngaihsak lo a, an kal ta mai a, pakhat chu a loah a kal a, pakhat chu a sumdawnnaah." 
Matthew22:6 Mi dangte chuan a bawihte chu an man a, zahthlak takin an siam a, an tihlum ta mai a." 
Matthew22:7 Chutichuan, lal chu a thinur ta a; a sipaihote a tir a, chu'ng tualthattute chu a tiboral a, an khua pawh a halsak ta a." 
Matthew22:8 Tin, a bawihte hnenah chuan, 'Lawi chaw peih a ni ta, ka sawmte erawh kha chu ei tlak an ni lo." 
Matthew22:9 Chutichuan, kawng peng thuamahte kal u la, mi in hmuh apiang lawi chaw ei turin sawm rawh u,' a ti a." 
Matthew22:10 Tichuan, chung bawihte chu an chhuak a, kawngahte chuan an va kal a, an hmuh apiang mi sual leh mi thate pawh an hruai khawm ta vek a; tichuan lawi chaw pindan chu mi sawmtein an lo khat ta a." 
Matthew22:11 Nimahsela, lal chu mi sawmte en tura a lo luh chuanin, inneihna puan sin lo mi pakhat chutah chuan a hmu a." 
Matthew22:12 Tichuan, a hnenah, 'Thiana, eng tizia nge ni inneihna puan loin hetah i lo luh le?' a ti a. Tin, ani chu a ngawi reng a." 
Matthew22:13 Tin, lal chuan a bawihte hnenah, 'A kut leh a ke phuar u la, pawn lam thimah paih chhuak rawh u; chutah chuan tah leh ha thial a awm ang,' a ti a." 
Matthew22:14 Sawmte chu tam tak an ni a, thlante erawh chu tlemte an ni, a ti a." 
Matthew22:15 Chu mi lai chuan Pharisaite chuan a thu sawia an man theihnazia tur an va inrawn a. 
Matthew22:16 Tin, an zirtirte, Heroda pawla mite nen, a hnenah an tir a, chu mite chuan, Zirtirtu, mi dik tak i ni a, tih tak zetin Pathian kawng thu i zirtir thin a, pawisak chuan tumah i nei lo tih kan hria e; tumah thlei bik i nei si lo a." 
Matthew22:17 Chutichuan, engtin nge i ngaih? Min hrilh teh khai! Kaisara hnena chhiah chawi hi a thiang nge thiang lo? an ti a." 
Matthew22:18 Nimahsela, Isua'n an sualzia chu a lo hria a, Vervekte u, engah nge mi fiah?" 
Matthew22:19 Chhiah tangka chu mi entir rawh u, a ti a. Tin, a hnenah duli an rawn la a." 
Matthew22:20 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, Hei hi tu lem leh tu hming nge ni? a ti a." 
Matthew22:21 Anni chuan a hnenah, Kaisara, an ti a. Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, A nih ahnu, Kaisara thilte chu Kaisara hnenah pe u la, Pathian thilte chu Pathian hnenah pe ta che u, a ti a." 
Matthew22:22 Chu'ng thu chu an hriatin mak an ti hle a, amah chu an kalsan a, an kal ta daih a." 
Matthew22:23 Chu mi ni vek chuan Saddukaiho, thawhlehna a awm lo tite chu a hnenah an lo kal a." 
Matthew22:24 Zirtirtu, Mosia'n, 'Mi, fa nei loin thi se la, a unaupain a nupui chu neiin a unaupa tan chi a thlahsak tur a ni,' a ti a." 
Matthew22:25 Aw le, kan zingah sal sarih an awm a; a upa berin nupui a nei a, a thi a, tin, chi a thlah loh avangin a nupui chu a unaupa rochun turin a hnutchhiah a." 
Matthew22:26 Chutiang bawkin pahnihna chuan a ti a, pathumna chuan a ti bawk a, pasarihna thlengin an ti theuh a." 
Matthew22:27 Tin, an zaa an thih hnuah chuan hmeichhia pawh chu a thi ta a." 
Matthew22:28 Chutichuan, thawh leh hunah chuan an pasarihte zingah tu nupui ber nge ni ang? an zain an nei theuh si a, tiin an zawt a." 
Matthew22:29 Isua'n an hnenah, Pathian Lehkha Thu leh Pathian thiltihtheihna inhriat loh avangin in ngai sual thin a ni." 
Matthew22:30 Thawhlehnaah chuan nupui pasal an innei dawn tawh lo a, vana vantirhkohte ang an ni dawn zawk a sin." 
Matthew22:31 Tin, mitthi thawhlehna thu chu - Pathianin, 'Kei Abrahama Pathian, Isaaka Pathian, Jakoba Pathian ka ni,' tia in hnena a sawi kha in chhiar lo vem ni?" 
Matthew22:32 Pathian chu mitthi Pathian a ni lo a, mi nung Pathian a ni zawk, a ti a, a chhang a." 
Matthew22:33 Tin, mipuite chuan chu chu an hriatin a thu zirtir chu mak an ti hle a." 
Matthew22:34 Pharisaite erawh chuan Isua'n Saddukaite chu a hnial dang tih an hriatin an inkhawm ta a. 
Matthew22:35 Tin, an zinga mi pakhat, dan hretuin," 
Matthew22:36 Zirtirtu, Dan thuah chuan eng thupek hi nge ropui ber? tiin amah fiahna'n thu a zawt a." 
Matthew22:37 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, Lalpa, i Pathian chu i thinlung zawng zawngin, i thlarau zawng zawngin i rilru zawng zawngin i hmangaih tur a ni,' tih hi." 
Matthew22:38 Chu chu thu pek ropui leh pawimawh ber a ni. 
Matthew22:39 Tin, a dawttu, a anpui chu hei hi a ni, 'Nangmah i inhmangaih angin i vengte pawh i hmangaih tur a ni,' tih hi." 
Matthew22:40 Chu'ng thupek pahnihah chuan dan thu leh zawlneite thu zawng zawng a inkhaikhawm vek a ni, a ti a." 
Matthew22:41 Tin, Pharisaite chu an inkhawm lai chuan, Isua'n anmahni chu thu a zawt a." 
Matthew22:42 Krista chu engtin nge in ngaih? Tu fapa nge ni? a ti a. Anni chuan a hnenah, Davida fapa, an ti a." 
Matthew22:43 Ani chuan an hnenah, Davida'n," 
Matthew22:44 'Lalpa chuan, ka Lalpa hnenah, i hmelmate i kephah hnuaia ka dah hma loh zawng Ka ding lamah thu rawh, a ti,' tiin, eng tiziain nge Thlarauin ani chu 'Lalpa' a tih le?" 
Matthew22:45 Davida'n ani chu 'Lalpa' a tih si chuan, engtin nge a fapa a nih theih? a ti a.Tin, tuma'n kam khat mahin an chhang thei lo a, chu mi ni achin chu tuma'n thu dang reng reng an zawt ngam tawh hek lo." 
Matthew22:46 Tin, tuma'n kam khat mahin an chhang thei lo a, chu mi ni achin chu tuma'n thu dang reng reng an zawt ngam tawh hek lo." 
Matthew23:1 Tin, Isua'n mipuite leh a zirtirte hnenah thu a sawi a." 
Matthew23:2 Lehkhaziaktute leh Pharisaite chu Mosia thutphahah chuan an thu thin a. 
Matthew23:3 Chuvangin an hrilh apiang che u chu ti u la, zawm zel ang che u; an thiltih ang erawh chu ti ve suh ang che u, sawi zawng an sawi thin a, an ti si thin lo a ni." 
Matthew23:4 Phur rit hrehawm takte an siam a, mite an bel thin a, anmahni erawh chuan an kut zungtang pawhin an tisawn duh lo." 
Matthew23:5 An thiltih zawng zawng chu mihring hmuha tan a ni, an tih zawk thin ni, an thil bun leh khimte chu an tihlai a, an puan hmawr fem an tibuk thin a." 
Matthew23:6 Ruaithehnaah hmun tha ber te, inkhawmna inah thutphah tha ber te," 
Matthew23:7 dawr hmuna chibai buk te, miten 'Rabbi' an tih te an ngaina si thin a." 
Matthew23:8 Nangni erawh chu 'Rabbi' tihin awm suh u; in zirtirtu chu pakhat chauh a ni a, nangni zawng zawng chu unau in ni si a." 
Matthew23:9 Tin, lei chungah hian tumah 'Ka pa' ti suh u; in Pa chu pakhat chauh a ni, vana mi khi." 
Matthew23:10 'Hruaitute' tihin awm hek suh u, in hruaitu chu pakhat chauh a ni, Krista chu." 
Matthew23:11 In zinga ropui ber chu in rawngbawltuah a awm zawk tur a ni. 
Matthew23:12 Tupawh inngaihlu apiang an tlawm ang a, tupawh inngaitlawm apiang chawimawiin an awm ang." 
Matthew23:13 Nimahsela nangni lehkhaziaktu leh Pharisai vervekte u, in chung a pik e! Van ram kawng chu mite in kharsak si thin." 
Matthew23:14 Nangni lah in lut si lo a, mi lut turte pawh luh in phal thin hek lo." 
Matthew23:15 Nangni lehkhaziaktu leh Pharisai vervekte u, in chung a pik e! Saphun pakhat pawh siam turin tuifinriat leh khawmual in kal hual si a, tin, chutianga a lo awm veleh ani chu nangmahni leh hnihin Gehena fapaah in siam thin." 
Matthew23:16 Nangni, hruaitu mitdel, 'Tupawh Pathian biak in chhala chhechham apiang, chu chu engmah a ni lo; tupawh Pathian biak ina rangkachak chhala chhechham apiang erawh chuan hlen tur a ni,' tite u, in chung a pik e!" 
Matthew23:17 Nangni mi a, mitdelte u! A eng nge ropui zawk, rangkachak nge, Pathian biak in, rangkachak tithianghlimtu chu?" 
Matthew23:18 Tin, 'Tupawh maicham chhala chhechham apiang, engmah a ni lo; a chunga thilpek awm chhala chhechham apiang erawh chuan hlen tur a ni' in ti." 
Matthew23:19 Nangni mitdelte u! A eng nge ropui zawk, thilpek nge, maicham, thilpek tithianghlimtu chu?" 
Matthew23:20 Chutichuan, tupawh maicham chhala chhechham apiang chuan maicham leh a chunga awm zawng zawng chhalin chhia a chham thin." 
Matthew23:21 Tupawh Pathian biak in chhala chhechham apiang chuan, Pathian biak in leh a chhunga cheng chu chhalin chhia a chham thin." 
Matthew23:22 Tupawh van chhala chhechham apiang chuan, Pathian thutphah leh a chunga thu chhalin chhia a chham thin." 
Matthew23:23 Nangni lehkhaziaktu leh Pharisai vervekte u, in chung a pik e! Pudina te, mohuri te, zira te chu sawmah pakhat in pe thin a, dan thu pawimawh zawk - felna te, khawngaihna te, rinawmna te chu - in ngaihthah si thin; nimahsela, chung chu a sin in tih tur ni, a dangte chu tih thulh chuang loin." 
Matthew23:24 Nangni hruaitu mitdel, thosi thlifaia sanghawngsei lem si thinte u!" 
Matthew23:25 Lehkhaziaktu leh Pharisai vervekte u, in chung a pik e! No leh thleng pawn lam in silfai a, a chhung erawh chu hleprukna leh insum lohnain a khat si a." 
Matthew23:26 Nang Pharisai mitdel, no leh thleng chhung lam chu silfai hmasa rawh, a pawn lam pawh a lo fai theihna turin." 
Matthew23:27 Lehkhaziaktu leh Pharisai vervekte u, in chung a pik e! Thlan hnawih var, pawn lam mawi taka lang, a chhung lam erawh chu mitthi ruhte leh bawlhhlawh tinrenga khat angte chu in ni a sin." 
Matthew23:28 Nangni pawh chutiang takin pawnlamah chuan mihring mithmuhin fel takin in lang thin a, in chhung lamah erawh chuan vervekna leh sualnain in khat si a." 
Matthew23:29 Nangni lehkhaziaktu leh Pharisai vervekte u, in chung a pik e! Zawlneiho thlan inte in sa a, mi fel thlante pawh in cheimawi a." 
Matthew23:30 Kan pute dam lai khan lo awm ve mah i la, zawlneite thisen an chhuahnaah chuan kan tel ve lo ang,' in ti thin." 
Matthew23:31 Chutichuan, zawlneiho thattute fa in ni tih in inhriattir a ni." 
Matthew23:32 In pute tehkhawng chu tikhat nghal mai rawh u. 
Matthew23:33 Rulte u, rul thlahte u, Gehenna rorelna chu engtin nge in pumpelh theih ang?" 
Matthew23:34 Ngai teh u, chu mi avang chuan in hnenah zawlneite, mi fingte, lehkhaziaktute ka rawn tir dawn; thenkhat in tihlum ang a, kraws-ah in khengbet ang, thenkhat in inkhawmna inahte savunhruiin in vua ang a, khaw tinah in tiduhdah zui zel ang." 
Matthew23:35 Chutichuan, Abela mi fel tak thisen atangin, Pathian biak in leh maicham inkara Barakia fapa Zakaria in thaha thisen thleng khan, lei chunga mi fel thisen an chhuah zawng zawng chu nangmahni chungah a lo la thleng thei ang." 
Matthew23:36 Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, chung zawng zawng chu tun lai chhuante chung hian a lo la thleng ang." 
Matthew23:37 Aw Jerusalem, Jerusalem! Zawlneiho thattu, i hnena an rawn tirhte lunga lo denghlumtu, arpuiin a note a thla hnuaia a awp khawm angin i fate vawi engzat nge awp khawm ka tum kha! Nimahsela in duh si lo." 
Matthew23:38 En teh u, in in chu a ruaka hnutchhiah che u in a awm ta.Ka hrilh a che u, 'Lalpa hminga lo kal chu fakin awm rawh se,' in tih hma loh chuan, tun achinah mi hmu leh dawn tawh lo a nih hi, a ti a." 
Matthew23:39 Ka hrilh a che u, 'Lalpa hminga lo kal chu fakin awm rawh se,' in tih hma loh chuan, tun achinah mi hmu leh dawn tawh lo a nih hi, a ti a." 
Matthew24:1 Tin, Isua Pathian biak in ata a chhuak a, a kal dawn a. Tin, a zirtirte chu Pathian biak inte entir turin a hnenah an lo kal a." 
Matthew24:2 Ani erawh chuan an hnenah, He'ng zawng zawng hi in hmu maw? Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, tihchim loha lung intiang reng reng hetah a awm lo ang, a ti a, a chhang a." 
Matthew24:3 Tin, Oliv Tlangah chuan a thut laiin zirtirte chu anmahni chauhin a hnenah an kal a, Chu'ng chu engtikah nge a lo awm ang? I lo kal lehna leh khawvel tawpna chhinchhiahna chu eng nge ni ang? Min hrilh rawh, an ti a." 
Matthew24:4 Tin, Isua'n a chhang a, an hnenah, Tuma'n an tihder lohna'n che u fimkhur rawh u." 
Matthew24:5 Mi tam takin, 'Krista chu ka ni,' tiin keima hming chhalin an lo kal ang a, mi tam tak an tihder dawn si a." 
Matthew24:6 Tin, indo thu leh indo thuthang in la hria ang; in mangan lohna'n fimkhur rawh u; chung chu a lo thleng tur reng a ni; nimahsela tawpna chu a la ni rih lo ang." 
Matthew24:7 Hnam hrang leh hnam hrang an indo ang a, ram hrang leh ram hrang an indo ang a; hmun hrang hrangah tamte a tla ang a, lirte a nghing ang." 
Matthew24:8 Chung zawng zawng chu nau vei tantirhna a ni. 
Matthew24:9 Chu mi hunah chuan hrehawm tuar turin an mantir ang che u a, an tihlum ang che u; ka hminga vangin hnam zawng zawng huat in ni ang." 
Matthew24:10 Chu mi hunah chuan mi tam tak an tlu ang a, an inmantir tawn ang a, an inhaw tawn ang." 
Matthew24:11 Zawlnei der tam tak pawh an lo chhuak ang a, mi tam tak an tihder ang." 
Matthew24:12 Tin, sual a la pun dawna vangin mi tam zawk hmangaihna chu a la dai ang." 
Matthew24:13 Nimahsela, a tawp thlenga tuar peih apiang chu, chu mi ngei chu chhandamin a awm ang." 
Matthew24:14 Tin, he ram Chanchin Tha hi hnam zawng zawng hriattirna turin khawvel zawng zawngah hrilhin a awm ang; chu mi zawhah chuan tawpna chu a lo thleng ang." 
Matthew24:15 Chutichuan, Titiautu Tenawm, zawlnei Daniela sawia kha, hmun thianghlima dinga in hmuh hunah chuan, (a chhiar apiangin a awmzia hre rawh se)." 
Matthew24:16 Judai rama awmte chu tlangahte tlan bo rawh se. 
Matthew24:17 In chunga awm chu a ina englo chuh turin chhuk suh se. 
Matthew24:18 Tin, loa awm chu a puan chuh turin kir leh suh se." 
Matthew24:19 Chu'ng ni chuan raite leh nau no pawmte chung chu a pik ang. 
Matthew24:20 Tin, in tlan bo hun tur chu thlasikah emaw, Chawlhniah emaw a lo thlen lohna'n tawngtai rawh u." 
Matthew24:21 Chu mi hunah chuan hrehawm nasa tak a awm dawn si a; chutianga nasa reng reng chu leilung pian tirh ata tun thlengin a la awm ngai lo a, awm pawh engtikah mah a lo awm leh tawh hek lo ang." 
Matthew24:22 Tin, chu'ng nite chu tihtawi ni suh se la, mihring reng reng damin an chhuak lo ang; nimahsela, thlantea vang chuan chung nite chu tihtawi a ni ang." 
Matthew24:23 Chutih hunah chuan tupawhin in hnenah, 'En teh, Krista chu heta hi a awm,' emaw, 'Heta hi,' emaw, an tih chuan awi suh ang che u." 
Matthew24:24 Krista derte leh zawlnei derte an lo chhuak dawn si a, chung chuan thei ang sela thlante meuh pawh an tihder theihna'n chhinchhiahna leh thilmak ropui takte an ti ang." 
Matthew24:25 Ngai teh u, ka hrilh lawk tawh che u hi." 
Matthew24:26 Chutichuan, in hnenah, 'Ngai teh u, thlalerah a awm,' an tih che u chuan, kal chhuak suh u; 'Pindan chhungrilahte a awm,' an tih che u chuan, awi duh suh u." 
Matthew24:27 Kawl, chhak lamah a lo phe chhuak a, thlang lam thleng pawhin a lang thin a, Mihring Fapa lo kal lehna chu chutiang chu a ni dawn si a." 
Matthew24:28 Khawiah pawh saruang awmna apiangah mulukawlhte pawh an awm khawm ang. 
Matthew24:29 Nimahsela, chu'ng ni hrehawm hnu lawkah chuan ni tihthimin a awm ang a, thla a eng tawh lo ang a, van atangin arsite a lo tla ang a, van thiltihtheihnate chu tihnghin a ni ang." 
Matthew24:30 Chutih hunah chuan Mihring Fapa chhinchhiahna chu vanah a lang ang. Chu mi hunah chuan leia chi tinin an awmte an inchum ang a, Mihring Fapa hi thiltihtheihna leh ropuina nasa tak nen van chum chunga lo kal ang hmu ang." 
Matthew24:31 Tin, a vantirhkohte chu, tawtawrawt ri nasa tak nen a tir chhuak ang. Anni chuan a thlante chu kawl kil li ata - van tawp atanga a tawp lehlam thlengin - a lawr khawm ang." 
Matthew24:32 Tichuan, theipui kungah hian a tehkhin thu zir rawh u: A tang a lo no a, a hnah a lo chawr chuan nipui a thaw dawn tih in hre thin." 
Matthew24:33 Chutiang bawkin nangni pawhin chung zawng zawng chu in hmuh hun chuan amah chu a lo hnai tawh a, kawngka bul ngeiah a awm tih hria ang che u." 
Matthew24:34 Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, chung zawng zawng chu a thlen kim hma loh zawng tun lai chhuante hi an ral lo ang." 
Matthew24:35 Lei leh van a ral ang a, ka thu erawh chu a ral lo ang." 
Matthew24:36 Nimahsela, chu mi ni leh a hun thu chu Pa chauh lo chuan tuma'n, vana vantirhkohte pawhin, Fapa pawhin an hre lo." 
Matthew24:37 Tin, Nova dam lai ang bawk kha Mihring Fapa lo kal lehna chu a ni ang." 
Matthew24:38 Chu'ng ni tuilet hmate chuan Nova lawnga a luh ni thlengin an eiin an bar a, nupui pasal an innei thin." 
Matthew24:39 Tui a lo let a, an zaa a lak bo vek hma loh chuan engmah an hre lo a; Mihring Fapa lo kal lehna chu chutiang bawk a ni ang." 
Matthew24:40 Chu mi hunah chuan loah mi pahnih an awm ang a; pakhat chu kal bopuiin a awm ang a, pakhat chu hnutchhiahin a awm ang." 
Matthew24:41 Hmeichhe pahnih buh rawt sawmnaah chuan buh rawt sawmin an awm ang a, pakhat chu kal bopuiin a awm ang a, pakhat chu hnutchhiahin a awm ang." 
Matthew24:42 Chutichuan ngaihven rawh u, eng niah nge in Lalpa a lo kal dawn in hre si lo." 
Matthew24:43 Nimahsela, hei hi hre rawh u, rukru a lo kal hun tur in neituin hria se la, a veng ang a, a in a reh pawhtir lo ang." 
Matthew24:44 Chuvangin, nangni pawh inring rengin awm rawh u, in rin loh hunah Mihring Fapa a lo kal dawn si a." 
Matthew24:45 Bawih rinawm, fing tak, a puin a hun apianga an chaw chan tur semsak turin a chhungte chunga hotua a siama chu, tu ber nge ni ang le?" 
Matthew24:46 A pu a lo kal huna bawih chutiang tia a rawn hmuh a chu a eng a thawl ang. 
Matthew24:47 Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, a neih zawng zawng chungah hotuah a siam ang." 
Matthew24:48 Amaherawhchu bawih sual chuan, a rilruin, 'Ka pu a lo kal lawk dawn lo e,' a ti a." 
Matthew24:49 A bawihpuite lo vel ta se la, mi ruite hnenah eiin bar se la." 
Matthew24:50 Chu bawiha pu chu a rin loh niah, a hriat loh laiin a lo kal ang a.Bung hnihah a rawn chhuah ang a, mi vervekte chan ang a chantir ang; chutah chuan tah leh ha thial chu a awm ang." 
Matthew24:51 Bung hnihah a rawn chhuah ang a, mi vervekte chan ang a chantir ang; chutah chuan tah leh ha thial chu a awm ang." 
Matthew25:1 Chu mi hunah chuan van ram chu nula thianghlim sawm an khawnvar kenga mo neitu hmuak tura chhuakte nen chuan tehkhin a ni tawh ang. 
Matthew25:2 An zinga mi panga an a a, panga an fing." 
Matthew25:3 A ate chuan an khawvarte an kenin, a tui an keng tel si lo a." 
Matthew25:4 A fingte erawh chuan an khawnvarte an keng a, an umte chuan a tui an keng tel bawk a." 
Matthew25:5 Tin, mo neitu chu a lo kal har avangin an zain an muthlu a, an lo muhil ta a." 
Matthew25:6 Tin, zan lai takah chuan, 'Ngai teh u, mo neitu chu a lo kal e! A hmuak turin lo chhuak r'u khai!' tiin au thawm a lo awm ta a." 
Matthew25:7 Chu veleh chuan nula thianghlimho chu an tho vek a, an khawnvarte chu an buatsaih a." 
Matthew25:8 Tin, a ate chuan, a fingte hnenah, 'In khawnvar tui kha min pe ve rawh u; kan khawnvarte a thi dawn e,' an ti a." 
Matthew25:9 Nimahsela, a fingte chuan, 'Keini leh nangni tan a daih lo ang e; a zuartute hnenah kal u la lei ve zawk rawh u,' tiin an chhang a." 
Matthew25:10 Tin, lei tura an kal bo hlan chuan mo neitu chu a lo thleng ta a; tichuan, a peihte chu amah nen lawi chaw eiin an lut a; tin, kawng chu an khar ta a." 
Matthew25:11 Chu mi hnuah chuan nula thianghlim dangte pawh chu an lo thleng a, 'Ka pu, ka pu, min hawnsak rawh!' an ti a." 
Matthew25:12 Ani erawh chuan, 'Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, ka hre lo che u a ni,' a ti a, a chhang a." 
Matthew25:13 Chutichuan, ngaihven rawh u, a ni leh a hun chu in hre si lo a." 
Matthew25:14 Mi, ram danga kal dawn a, ama bawihte koa, a sumte an hnena kawltir ang chu a ni si a." 
Matthew25:15 Bawih pakhat hnenah talent nga a pe a, bawih dang hnenah talent hnih a pe a, bawih dang hnenah talent khat a pe a; an tih theih tawk tur ang zel theuhin a pe a; tichuan a kal ta a." 
Matthew25:16 Tin, talent nga dawngtu chu chung chuan a va sumdawng ta nghal a, talent nga dang a dek chhuak ta a." 
Matthew25:17 Chutiang bawkin talent hnih dawngtua pawh chuan talent hnih dang a dek chhuak ta a. 
Matthew25:18 Talent khat dawngtu erawh chu a va kal a, lei a lai a, a pu tangka chu a thukru ta zawk a." 
Matthew25:19 Tin, rei tak hnuah chung bawihho pu chu a lo haw a, an hnenah a sum chanchin a tifel a." 
Matthew25:20 Tichuan, talent nga dawngtu a lo kal a, talent nga dang a rawn keng a, 'Ka pu, nangin talent nga mi kawltir kha; en teh, talent nga dang ka dek chhuak e,' a ti a." 
Matthew25:21 A pu chuan a hnenah, 'Bawih tha leh rinawm, i titha e; tlemte chungah i rinawm a, tam tak chungah ka awmtir ang che; i pu lawmnaah lut rawh,' a ti a." 
Matthew25:22 Tin, talent hnih dawngtu pawh chu a lo kal a, 'Ka pu, nangin talent hnih mi kawltir kha; en teh, talent hnih dang ka dek chhuak e,' a ti a." 
Matthew25:23 A pu chuan a hnenah, 'Bawih tha leh rinawm, i titha e; tlemte chungah i rinawm a, tam tak chungah ka awmtir ang che; i pu lawmnaah lut rawh,' a ti a." 
Matthew25:24 Tin, talent khat dawngtu pawh chu a lo kal a, 'Ka pu, mi ti kher kher i ni tih ka hria a che; i tuh lohnaah pawh i at thin a, i tihdarh lohnaah pawh i seng thin a ni." 
Matthew25:25 Tichuan, ka hlau a, ka va kal a, i talent kha leiah ka thukru a; en teh, i ta ngai kha i hmuh leh hi,' a ti a." 
Matthew25:26 A pu chuan a hnenah, 'Bawih sual leh zawmthawpa, ka tuh lohnaah pawh ka at a, ka tihdarh lohnaah pawh ka seng thin tih i hria maw?" 
Matthew25:27 Chuti a nih a hnu, ka tangka chu sumdawngtute hnenah lo dah tawh tur i ni, chutichuan, ka lo haw hian ka ta hi a pung nen ka hmu leh tur a ni." 
Matthew25:28 Tichuan, a talent khat kha laksak u la, talent sawm neitu hnenah pe rawh u." 
Matthew25:29 Tupawh a nei apiang an pe belhchhah ang a, a lo ngah ang; tupawh a nei lo apiang erawh chu a neih chhun pawh an laksak ang." 
Matthew25:30 Tin, bawih thahnem lo kha pawn lamah thimah chuan paih chhuak rawh u; chutah chuan tah leh ha thial chu a awm ang,' a ti a, a chhang a." 
Matthew25:31 Amaherawhchu, Mihring Fapa hi chu, a vantirhkohte zawng zawng nen, a ropuinaa inthuama a lo kal hunah chuan, a ropuina thutphahah a thu ang a." 
Matthew25:32 A hmaah chuan hnam tin an inkhawm ang a: beram vengtuin kel zing ata a beramte a hlir angin anniho chu a hlir ang a. 
Matthew25:33 Beramte chu a ding lamah a dah ang a, kelte erawh chu a vei lamah a dah ang." 
Matthew25:34 Chu mi hunah chuan Lalber chuan a ding lama mite hnenah chuan, 'Ka pa voh bikte u, lo kal u la khawvel siam tantirh ata in tana ram buatsaih chu chang rawh u." 
Matthew25:35 Ka ril a tamin nangni'n ei tur mi pe a; ka tui a halin in tur mi pe a; mikhual ka nihin mi thleng a. 
Matthew25:36 Saruak ka nihin puan mi sintir a; ka dam lohin mi kan a; tan ina ka awmin ka hnenah in lo kal si a,"" a la ti ang." 
Matthew25:37 Chu mi hunah chuan mi felte chuan, 'Lalpa, engtikah nge riltamin kan hmuh chia ei tur kan pek che? tuihalin kan hmuh chia in tur kan pek che?" 
Matthew25:38 Engtikah nge mikhuala kan hmuh chia kan thlen che? Saruaka kan hmuh chia puan kan sintir che? 
Matthew25:39 Engtikah nge dam loin emaw tan inah emaw kan hmuh chia i hnena kan lo kal?' tiin an la chhang ang. 
Matthew25:40 Tin, Lalber chuan an hnenah, 'Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, he'ng ka unau te berte zinga mi pakhat chunga in tih chu ka chunga ti in ni,' tiin a la chhang ang." 
Matthew25:41 Chu mi zawhah chuan, a vei lama mite hnenah pawh chuan, 'Anchhe dawngte u, kumkhaw mei, diabola leh a tirhkohte tan an buatsaihah chuan mi kal bosan rawh u." 
Matthew25:42 Ka ril a tamin nangni'n ei tur mi pe lo a; ka tui a halin in tur mi pe lo a. 
Matthew25:43 Mikhual ka nihin mi thleng lo a; saruak ka nihin puan mi sintir lo a; dam lo leh tan ina ka awmin mi kan si lo,' a la ti ang." 
Matthew25:44 Chu mi hunah chuan anni pawhin, 'Lalpa, engtikah nge riltamin emaw, tuihalin emaw, mikhualin emaw, saruakin emaw, dam loin emaw, tan inah emaw kan hmuh chia, rawng kan bawlsak loh che? Tiin an la chhang ang." 
Matthew25:45 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, 'Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u. Heng mi te berte zinga mi pakhat chunga in ti lo chu ka chunga ti lo in ni,' tiin a la chhang a.Tin, chung chu kumkhaw hremnaah an kal ang a; mi felte erawh chu kumkhaw nunnaah an kal ang, a ti a." 
Matthew25:46 Tin, chung chu kumkhaw hremnaah an kal ang a; mi felte erawh chu kumkhaw nunnaah an kal ang, a ti a." 
Matthew26:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Isua'n chung thu zawng zawng chu a sawi zawin a zirtirte hnenah," 
Matthew26:2 Ni hnih achinah Kalhlen Kut a lo awm dawn tih in hria a, Mihring Fapa hi khenbeh turin an mantir dawn a ni, a ti a." 
Matthew26:3 Chu mi lai chuan Puithiam Lalber Kaiapha an tiha in hual chhung kawtlaiah chuan puithiam lalte leh vantlang upate chu an inkhawm a. 
Matthew26:4 Isua chu ngamthlema man a, an tihhlum theihna turin an inrawn a." 
Matthew26:5 Nimahsela, Kut chhung chuan ni suh se, chutilochuan vantlang zingah buaina a lo awm dah ang e, an ti a." 
Matthew26:6 Tin, Isua Bethani khuaah, phar Simona inah chuan a awm laiin," 
Matthew26:7 hmeichhe pakhat alabasta bawma hriak rimtui to tak kengin, a hnenah a lo kal a, a chaw kil laiin a luah a leih a." 
Matthew26:8 Nimahsela, zirtirte chuan chu chu an hmuhin an thinur a, Enga tan nge hetia a tihboral mai mai ni?" 
Matthew26:9 He hriak hi man tam taka hralh a, mi retheite hnenah pek theih a ni si a, an ti a." 
Matthew26:10 Isua erawh chuan chu chu a hriatin an hnenah, Hmeichhia hi engah nge in tihbuai ni? ka chungah hian thil tha tak a ti a ni." 
Matthew26:11 Mi retheite chu kumkhuaa inhnena awm an ni alawm, kei erawh chu kumkhuaa in hnena awm tur ka ni lo." 
Matthew26:12 He hriak rimtui ka taksaa a leih hi, phum tura mi buatsaih turin a ti a nih hi." 
Matthew26:13 Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, khawvel zawng zawngah khawiah pawh he Chanchin Tha hi an hrilna apiangah he hmeichhe thiltih pawh hi amah hriat rengna turin an sawi ve zel ang, a ti a." 
Matthew26:14 Chu mi hnuah chuan sawm leh pahnihte zinga mi pakhat, Juda Iskariota an tiha chu, puithiam lalte hnenah a kal a." 
Matthew26:15 Amah chu ka mantir ang che u a, eng nge min pek ang? a ti a. Tin, tangka sawmthum an buksak ta a." 
Matthew26:16 Chu mi chinah chuan mantirna remchang a zawng ta a. 
Matthew26:17 Tin, chhang dawidim telh loh ni, ni hmasa berah chuan zirtirte chu Isua hnenah an lo kal a, Kalhlen Kut chaw eina turin khawiah nge buatsaihsak che i la i duh? an ti a." 
Matthew26:18 Tin, ani chuan, Khawpuiah tuemaw hnenah kal u la, a hnenah, 'Zirtirtu chuan, Ka hun a hnai ta a; ka zirtirte nen Kalhlen Kut i inah kan kut ang e, a ti e,' va ti ang che u, a ti a." 
Matthew26:19 Tin, Isua'n an hnena a tih angin zirtirte chuan an ti a; Kalhlen Kut chaw chu an buatsaih ta a." 
Matthew26:20 Tin, khua a lo tlai lam chuan zirtir sawm leh pahnihte nen chaw an kil a." 
Matthew26:21 Tin, an ei laiin ani chuan, Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, in zinga mi pakhat hian mi mantir ang, a ti a." 
Matthew26:22 Tin, an lungngai ta em em a, a hnenah, Lalpa, keimah em ni? an ti ta theuh a." 
Matthew26:23 Tin, ani chuan, Thleng mi zenpuitu ngei chuan mi mantir ang." 
Matthew26:24 Mihring Fapa hi a chanchin an ziak ang tak khan a kal dawn a ni; nimahsela Mihring Fapa mantirtu tur mihring chung chu a pik e! Chu mihring chu piang suh sela a tan a tha zawk ang, tiin a chhang a." 
Matthew26:25 Tin, a mantirtu tur Juda chuan a chhang a, Rabbi, keimah em ni? a ti a. Ani chuan a hnenah, Ni e, a ti a." 
Matthew26:26 Tin, an ei laiin Isua'n chhang a la a, mal a sawmsak a, a phel a; tin, zirtirte hnenah chuan a pe a, La u la, ei rawh u; hei hi ka taksa a ni, a ti a." 
Matthew26:27 Tin, no a la a, lawm thu a sawi a, an hnenah a pe a, In zain in rawh u." 
Matthew26:28 Hei hi ka thisen, sualte ngaihdamna'na mi tam tak tana chhuak tur, thuthlunna chu a ni." 
Matthew26:29 Nimahsela ka hrilh a che u, ka Pa ramah nangmahni nena a thar ka in ni a thlen hma loh zawng tun achinah grep hrui raha mi hi ka in leh tawh lo ang, a ti a." 
Matthew26:30 Tin, hla an sak zawhin an chhuak a. Olive Tlangah chuan an kal ta a." 
Matthew26:31 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, Zaninah hian in zain ka chung thuah lungni loin in awm vek ang; 'Beram vengtu chu ka vua ang a, beram rual chu an darh ang,' tih ziak a ni si a." 
Matthew26:32 Nimahsela, ka thawhleh hnuin Galili ramah in hmaah ka kal ang, a ti a." 
Matthew26:33 Petera erawh chuan a hnenah, An zain i chung thuah lungni loin awm mah se la kei zawng lungni loin ka awm tawp lo ang, tiin a chhang a." 
Matthew26:34 Isua'n a hnenah, Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che, zaninah hian ar a khuan hmain, nangin vawi thum mi phat ang, a ti a." 
Matthew26:35 Petera'n a hnenah, I thihnaah chuan thi ve dawn mah i la ka phat tawp lo ang che, a ti a. Chutiang bawkin zirtirte zawng zawng chuan an ti ta theuh a." 
Matthew26:36 Chu mi zawhah chuan Isua chu anniho nen hmun pakhat Gethsemane an tih chu an thleng a; tin, ani chuan a zirtirte hnenah, Sawta ka va tawngtai chhung zawng hetah hian lo thu rawh u, a ti a." 
Matthew26:37 Tin, Petera leh Zebedaia fapate pahnih chu a hruai a, a lungngaiin a lo mangang ta em em a." 
Matthew26:38 Tin, an hnenah, Ka rilru a lungngai em em a, thihna khawp hial a ni; hetah hian awm u la, mi venpui rawh u, a ti a." 
Matthew26:39 Tin, tlemin hma lamah a va kal hlek a, a bawkkhup a, Aw ka Pa, a theih chuan he no hian mi pel lul rawh se; nimahsela keima thu ni loin, nangma thu thu ni zawk rawh se, tiin a tawngtai a." 
Matthew26:40 Tin, zirtirte hnenah chuan a lo kal a, anni chu muhilin a rawn hmu a, tichuan Petera hnenah, E khai! Nangin darkar khat pawh mi venpui thei lo a ni maw?" 
Matthew26:41 Thlemnaa in luh lohna'n inring rengin tawngtai rawh u; thlarau zawngin a peih a, tisa erawh chu a chak lo a ni, a ti a." 
Matthew26:42 Tin, vawi hnihnaah a va kal a, a tawngtai leh a, Aw ka Pa, ka in loha hei hian mi pelh theih lul loh chuan nangma thu thu ni rawh se, a ti a." 
Matthew26:43 Tin, a lo kal leh a, anniho chu muhilin a rawn hmu leh a, an mut a chhuak hle si a." 
Matthew26:44 Tin, a kalsan leh a, a vawi thumnaah a thu sawi ngai sawiin a tawngtai leh a." 
Matthew26:45 Chu mi zawhah chuan zirtirte hnenah a lo kal leh a, an hnenah, Tunah zawng muhil u la, chawl tawh rawh u! Ngai teh u, a hun chu a lo thleng ta a, Mihring Fapa hi mi sualte kutah an mantir dawn hi." 
Matthew26:46 Tho u la, i kal ang u; en teh u, mi mantirtu tur chu a lo hnaih tak hi, a ti a." 
Matthew26:47 Tin, a la sawi lai mekin Juda, sawm leh pahnihte zinga mi pakhat chu a lo thleng ta a, ama rual chuan puithiam lalte leh lehkhaziaktute leh upate hnen ata mipui tam tak khandaih leh talhtum kengin an lo thleng bawk a." 
Matthew26:48 Tin, a mantirtu tur chuan chhinchhiahna tur a lo hrilh lawk diam a, Ka fawh apiang chu amah a ni ang, man ang che u, tiin." 
Matthew26:49 Tichuan Isua chu a va pan ta nghal a, Chibai, Rabbi! tiin a fawp ta ngawih ngawih a." 
Matthew26:50 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, Thiana, i rawn kal chhan chu ti rawh, a ti a. Chu veleh Isua chu an chelh a, an man ta a." 
Matthew26:51 Tin, ngai teh, Isua hote zinga pakhat chuan a kutin a ban a, a khandaih a phawi a, Puithiam lalber bawih chu a sat a, a beng a sah thlaksak a." 
Matthew26:52 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, I khandaih kha a dahnaah dah leh rawh, khandaih ruaitute zawng zawng chu khandaih vekah an thi dawn si a." 
Matthew26:53 Tunah pawh vantirhkoh sangruk hmun sawm leh hmun hnih aia tam zawk mi rawn tirhsak turin ka Pa hnenah ngen thei loin mi ring em ni le? 
Matthew26:54 Nimahsela ngen ang i la, engtin nge Pathian Lehkha Thu - hetianga a lo awm tur thu hi - a thlen theih ang le? a ti a." 
Matthew26:55 Chu mi lai tak chuan Isua'n mipuite hnenah chuan, Khandaihte, talhtumte kengin suamhmang man tur ang rengin mi man turin in lo chhuak a ni maw? Pathian biak inah ni tin zirtirin ka thu thin a, mi man si lo a." 
Matthew26:56 Nimahsela zawlnei lehkha thute chu a lo thlen theihna turin he'ng zawng zawng hi a lo awm ta a nih hi, a ti a. Chu mi lai chuan zirtirte zawng zawng chuan amah chu an thlahthlam a, an tlan bo ta vek a." 
Matthew26:57 Tin, Isua mantute chuan Puithiam Lalber Kaiapha in a, lehkhaziaktute leh upate awm khawmnaah chuan ani chu an hruai ta a." 
Matthew26:58 Nimahsela Petera'n hla tak atangin amah chu a zui a, Puithiam Lalber in hual chhung kawtlai thlengin; tin, a va lut a, a tawpna hmu turin chhiahhlawhte zingah a thu ve a." 
Matthew26:59 Tin, amah an tihhlum theihna turin puithiam lalte leh roreltuho zawng zawng chuan Isua hekna an zawng a." 
Matthew26:60 Hretu der tam tak lo kal mah se la, an hmu si lo. Nakinah erawh chuan mi pahnih an lo kal a." 
Matthew26:61 He mi hian, 'Pathian biak in hi thiat a, ni thum chhunga sa leh thei ka ni,' a ti e, an ti a." 
Matthew26:62 Tichuan Puithiam Lalber chu a ding chhuak a, a hnenah, Engmahin i chhang lo maw? He'ng hian an hekna che hi engtizia nge ni? a ti a." 
Matthew26:63 Isua erawh chu a ngawi reng a. Tin, Puithiam Lalber chuan a hnenah, Pathian nung chhalin thu ka pe a che, Krista Pathian Fapa chu i ni emaw? min hrilh rawh, a ti a." 
Matthew26:64 Isua'n a hnenah, Ni e. Nimahsela ka hrilh a che, tun hnuah Mihring Fapa hi thiltihtheihna ding lama thu a, van chhum chunga lo kal in la hmu dawn a ni, a ti a." 
Matthew26:65 Tin, Puithiam Lalber chuan a silhfente a pawt thler a, Pathian a sawichhe ta; hretu dang engah nge kan ngaih tawh ang? Ngai teh u, Pathian a sawichhiatzia chu tunah in hre tawh e." 
Matthew26:66 Engtin nge in ngaih? a ti a. Anni chuan, Thi tlak a ni, tiin an chhang a." 
Matthew26:67 Tin, a hmaiah chil an chhak a, an hnek a." 
Matthew26:68 Thenkhat chuan, Nang Krista, tuin nge beng che? Min hrilh rawh, tiin an beng a." 
Matthew26:69 Tin, Petera chu pawnah, in hual chhung kawtlaiah chuan a thu a; tin, nula pakhat hnenah a lo kal a, Nang pawh Isua Galili rama mi hnena awm kha i nih hi, a ti a." 
Matthew26:70 Ani erawh chuan, I thu sawi chu ka hre hauh lo mai, tiin an zaa hmaah a pha a." 
Matthew26:71 Tin, sumhmuna a va chhuah veleh nula dangin ani chu a hmu a, chuta awmte hnenah chuan, He mi pawh hi Isua Nazaret mi hnena awm kha a nih hi, a ti a." 
Matthew26:72 Tin, Chu mihring chu ka hre lo, tiin chhechhamin a pha leh a." 
Matthew26:73 Tin, rei lo te achinah a kianga dingte chuan, Petera hnenah, Nang pawh an zinga mi i ni ngei mai, i tawngah a hriat alawm, an ti a." 
Matthew26:74 Tin, ani chuan, Chu mihring chu ka hre lo, tiin anchhia inlawhin chhia a chham ta a. Tin, ar a khuang ta nghal a.Tin, Petera chuan Isua'n, Ar a khuan hmain nangin vawi thum mi phat ang, a tih thu kha a lo hre leh ta a. Tin, a chhuak a, a tap ta zawih zawih a." 
Matthew26:75 Tin, Petera chuan Isua'n, Ar a khuan hmain nangin vawi thum mi phat ang, a tih thu kha a lo hre leh ta a. Tin, a chhuak a, a tap ta zawih zawih a." 
Matthew27:1 Tin, zing a lo nih chuan puithiam lalte leh vantlang upate zawng zawng chu Isua tihlum turin a chung thuah an inrawn a." 
Matthew27:2 Tin, an phuar a, an hruai a, Ram Awptu Pilata hnenah an pe ta a." 
Matthew27:3 Tin, Juda a mantirtu khan Isua thiam loh an chantir tih a hriat veleh a inchhir a, tangka sawmthum kha puithiam lalte leh upate hnenah chuan a rawn la leh a." 
Matthew27:4 Mi thiam thisen ka mantir kha thil ka lo tisual a ni, a ti a. Anni erawh chuan, Chu chu kan tan eng nge pawi ang? Nangin i tih tihin ti rawh, an tihsan a." 
Matthew27:5 Tin, ani chuan tangka chu hmun thianghlimah chuan a paih lut a, a kal bo a; a va inawkhlum ta a." 
Matthew27:6 Tin, puithiam lalte chuan tangkate chu an la a, Hei hi thawhlawm bawma dah a thiang lo e, thisen man a ni si a, an ti a." 
Matthew27:7 Tichuan an inrawn a, mikhualte phumna turin Belvawtu hmun chu an lei ta a." 
Matthew27:8 Chuvangin a ni, chu mi hmun chu tun thlenga 'Thisen Hmun' an tih tak ni." 
Matthew27:9 Chu mi lai chuan Zawlnei Jeremia'n, Tin, tangka sawmthum an chhiara man, Israel thlah, tute'n emaw an chhiara man chu an la a." 
Matthew27:10 Lalpa'n min tiam angin Belvawtu hmun mana tan an pe a, tia a sawi kha a lo thleng ta a ni." 
Matthew27:11 Tin, Isua chu ram Awptu hmaah chuan a ding a. Tin Ram Awptu chuan Judate lal i ni em? tiin a zawt a. Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, Ni e, a ti a." 
Matthew27:12 Tin, puithiam lalte leh upaten an hek laiin engmahin a chhang lo a." 
Matthew27:13 Tichuan Pilata'n a hnenah, An hekna zozai che hi i hre lo em ni? a ti a." 
Matthew27:14 Tin, kam khat mahin a chhang lo a; chutichuan Ram Awptu chuan mak a ti hle a." 
Matthew27:15 Tin, Ram Awptuin kut niah chuan mi tang pakhat, an duh apiang, mipuite chu a chhuahsak thin a." 
Matthew27:16 Tin, chu mi lai chuan mi tang hmingthang tak, Barabba an tih chu an nei a." 
Matthew27:17 Chutichuan an rawn inkhawm chuanin Pilata'n an hnenah, Tunge chhuahsak che u i la in duh? Barabba nge, Isua, Krista an tiha chu? a ti a." 
Matthew27:18 Itsiknaa vangin ani chu an mantir tih a hre si a. 
Matthew27:19 Tin, rorelna thutphahah chuan a thutlaiin a nupuiin, Kha mi fel tak chungah khan engmah ti suh; vawiinah hian amah avangin mumangah thil tam tak ka tuar a ni, tiin a chah a." 
Matthew27:20 Tin, puithiam lalte leh upaten Barabba dila Isua tiboral turin mipuite chu an thlem a." 
Matthew27:21 Ram Awptu erawh chuan anniho chu a bia a, Anni pahnih chu a tu zawk nge chhuahsak che u i la in duh a ti leh a. Tin, anni chuan, Barabba, an ti a." 
Matthew27:22 Pilata'n an hnenah, Isua, Krista an tih hi, engtin nge ka tih tak ang le? a ti a. An zain, Ani chu Kraws-ah khenbehtir rawh, an ti a." 
Matthew27:23 Tin, ani chuan, Engah maw? Eng nge a tihsual ni? a ti a. Nimahsela anniho chu, Kraws-ah khenbehtir rawh, tiin an au chiam a." 
Matthew27:24 Tichuan Pilata'n engmah a ti thei lo a, a lo buai deuh deuh zawk dawn tih a hriatin, tui a la a, mipuiho hmaah chuan a kut a sil a, He mi fel thisenah hian ka thiang e; nangni'n in tih tihin ti rawh u, a ti a." 
Matthew27:25 Tin, vantlang zawng zawng chuan, A thisen chu keimahni chungah leh kan fate chungah awm rawh se, tiin an chhang a." 
Matthew27:26 Chu mi zawhah chuan Barabba chu a chhuahsak a; Isua erawh chu a vua a, kraws-a khenbeh turin a pe ta a." 
Matthew27:27 Chu mi zawhah chuan Ram Awptu sipaite chuan Isua chu lal inah an hruai lut a, an pawla mi zawng zawng a hnenah an ko khawm a." 
Matthew27:28 Tichuan a puante an hlihsak a, puansen an sintir a." 
Matthew27:29 Tin, hling lukhum an phiar a, an khumtir a, a kut ding lamin luang an kentir a; a hmaah an thingthi a, Chibai, Judate lal! tiin nuihza siamna'n an hmang a." 
Matthew27:30 Tin, amah chu chil an chhak a, luang chu an laksak a, a luah chuan an vua a." 
Matthew27:31 Tin, nuihza siamna'n an hman zawhin puan chu an hlihsak a, ama puante chu an sintir leh a, kraws-a khenbeh turin an hruai ta a." 
Matthew27:32 Tin, an kal chhuah laiin, Kurini khuaa mi, a hming Simona an hmu a; chu mi chu a kraws pu turin an man a." 
Matthew27:33 Tin, Golgotha an tih hmun an thleng a. (Chu chu 'Lu ruh hmun' tihna a ni)." 
Matthew27:34 Uain thur, englo kha nena pawlh, a in turin an pe a; nimahsela a tem veleh a in duh ta lo a." 
Matthew27:35 Tin, kraws-a an khenbeh zawhin thum vawrin a silhfente chu an insem a." 
Matthew27:36 Tin, chutah chuan an thu a, an veng a." 
Matthew27:37 A hekna, He Mi hi Isua Judate Lal a ni tia ziak, a lu chungah an bel a." 
Matthew27:38 Tin, ama rual chuan suamhmang pahnih an khengbet ve a, a ding lamah pakhat, a vei lamah pakhat." 
Matthew27:39 Tin, mi vei apiangte chuan an lu thingin," 
Matthew27:40 Nang Pathian biak in thiata ni thuma sa lehtu, intidam rawh; Pathian Fapa i nih chuan kraws ata kha lo chhuk ta che, tiin an tiel a." 
Matthew27:41 Chutiang bawkin puithiam lalte chuan lehkhaziaktute nen tielin," 
Matthew27:42 Mi dang mah a tidam thin a, mahni a intidam thei si lo. Israel lal a ni alawm tunah hian kraws ata chu lo chhuk ang hmiang, tichuan amah chu kan ring ang." 
Matthew27:43 Pathian a ring alawm, amah hi a duh chuan tunah hian chhandam rawh se; 'Pathian Fapa ka ni,' a ti si a, an ti a." 
Matthew27:44 Suamhmang an khenbeh vete pawh chuan chutiang bawkin an tiel a. 
Matthew27:45 Tin, chawfak hun achin behliang mun hun thlengin khawvel a lo thim ta vek a." 
Matthew27:46 Tin, behliang mun hun lai vel chuan Isua chu aw ring takin, Eloi, Eloi, lama sabakthani? tiin a au chhuak a. (Chu chu, Ka Pathian, ka Pathian, engah nge mi kalsan? tihna a ni)." 
Matthew27:47 Tin, a kianga ding thenkhatte chuan chu chu an hriatin, He mi hian Elija a ko a ni, an ti a." 
Matthew27:48 Tin, an zinga mi pakhat a tlan ta nghal a, spanj a la a, uain thurin a chiah khat a, tiangah a tar a, a han intir a." 
Matthew27:49 Tin, mi dangte chuan, Awm rawh se; amah la thla turin Elija a lo kal emaw i en ang u, an ti a." 
Matthew27:50 Tin, Isua chu aw ring takin a au leh a, a thlarau a thlah ta a." 
Matthew27:51 Tin, ngai teh, Pathian biak in puanzar chu a chung lam atangin a hnuai lam thlengin a lo thler chhuak ta a; tin, lirte a lo nghing a, lungpuite a lo khi chat a." 
Matthew27:52 Thlante a lo inhawng a; mi thianghlim muhil tawhte taksa tam tak pawh kaihthawhin an awm ta a. 
Matthew27:53 Chu'ngte chu a thawhleh hnuah chuan thlan ata lo chhuakin khaw thianghlimah chuan an lut a, mi tam tak hnenah an inlar ta a." 
Matthew27:54 Tin, sipai za hotu leh a hnena Isua venga awm vete chuan lirnghing leh thil awmziate chu an hmuhin an hlau ta em em a, He mi hi Pathian Fapa a ni ngei mai, an ti a." 
Matthew27:55 Tin, chutah chuan hmeichhe tam tak, a rawngbawlsak chung zela Galili ram atanga Isua rawn zuitute chu an awm a, hla takah an thlir a." 
Matthew27:56 Chu'ng zingah chuan Mari Magdalini te, Mari, Jakoba leh Josea nu te, Zebedaia fapate nu te an tel a." 
Matthew27:57 Tin, tlai lam a lo nih chuan mi hausa, a hming Josefa, Arimathai khuaa mi a lo kal a, amah ngei pawh chu Isua zirtir a ni bawk a." 
Matthew27:58 Chu mi chu Pilata hnenah a va kal a, Isua ruang chu a dil a. Tin, Pilata'n pe turin thu a pe a." 
Matthew27:59 Tichuan Josefa chuan ruang chu a la a, puan zai sin fai takin a tuam a." 
Matthew27:60 Ama thlan thar, lung a kerkuakah chuan a zalh a; thlan kawngkaah chuan lung lian tak a lum a, a kal ta a." 
Matthew27:61 Tin, chutah chuan Mari Magdalini leh Mari dang chu an awm a, thlan hma zawnah chuan an thu a." 
Matthew27:62 Tin, a tukah chuan (chu chu Inrinni zawh tuk a ni) puithiam lalte leh Pharisaite chu Pilata hnenah an awm khawm huai a." 
Matthew27:63 Ka pu, chu tihdertu chuan a dam lai khan, 'Ni thum chinah ka tho leh ang,' a ti tih kan hre reng a." 
Matthew27:64 Chutichuan thlan chu ni thum ni thlenga veng tha turin thu pe rawh; chutilochuan a zirtirte chuan amah chu an va ru hlauh ang a, vantlang hnenah, 'Mitthi zing ata a tho leh ta a ni,' an ti dah ang e; tichuan tihderna hnuhnung zawk chu a hmasa ai khan a tha lo lehzual ang, an ti a." 
Matthew27:65 Pilata'n an hnenah, Vengtu sipaite in nei alawm; kal u la, in theih ang apiangin ven thattir ta che u, a ti a.Chutichuan vengtu sipaite nen an va kal a, thlan chu an ven thattir a, lung chu an chhinchhiah a." 
Matthew27:66 Chutichuan vengtu sipaite nen an va kal a, thlan chu an ven thattir a, lung chu an chhinchhiah a." 
Matthew28:1 Tin, chawlhni tlai takah, ni sarih ni hmasa ber tura khua a var dawnin Mari Magdalini leh Mari dang chu thlan en turin an kal a." 
Matthew28:2 Tin, ngai teh, lir nasa takin a lo nghing a; Lalpa vantirhkoh van ata a lo chhuk a, lung chu a rawn lum sawn a, a chungah a thu ta a." 
Matthew28:3 A hmel awmzia chu kawlphe ang a ni a, a silhfen chu vur angin a var a." 
Matthew28:4 Amah an hlauh avangin vengtute chu an khur a, mitthi ang maiin an lo awm ta a." 
Matthew28:5 Tin, vantirhkoh chuan hmeichhiate chu a bia a, an hnenah, Nangni chuan hlau suh u. Isua, an khenbeha kha, in zawng tih ka hria e." 
Matthew28:6 Hetah a awm tawh lo e; a sawi ang ngeiin a thawhleh tawh kha. A mutna hmun hi rawn en teh mah u. 
Matthew28:7 Tin, kal thuai u la, a zirtirte hnenah, 'Mitthi zing ata a tho leh ta a ni; ngai teh u, Galili ramah in hmaah a kal e; chutah chuan amah chu in hmu ang,' tiin hrilh rawh u. Ngai teh u, ka hrilh tawh che u hi, a ti a." 
Matthew28:8 Tin, hlau leh lawm em em chungin thlan atang chuan an kal thuai thuai a, a zirtirte hrilh turin an tlan ta a." 
Matthew28:9 Tin, ngai teh, Isua'n anni chu a tawk a, Chibai u, a ti a. Tichuan anni chuan a kephahte chu an va vuan a, chibai an buk a." 
Matthew28:10 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, Hlau suh u, kal ta u la, Galili rama kal turin ka unaute va hrilh rawh u; chutah chuan mi hmu ang, a ti a." 
Matthew28:11 Tin, an va kal lai chuan, vengtu sipai thenkhat chu khawpuiah an va lut a, thil awmzia zawng zawng chu puithiam lalte hnenah an va hrilh a." 
Matthew28:12 Tin, upate nen an inkhawm a, an inrawn zawhin sipaite hnenah chuan tangka tam tak an pe a." 
Matthew28:13 Zanah, kan muthilh hlanin, a zirtirte chu an lo kal a, amah an ru ta a ni, ti ang che u." 
Matthew28:14 Tin, Ram Awptu in chu chu a lo hriat chuan amah chu kan thlem ang a, lungkham loin kan siam ang che u, an ti a." 
Matthew28:15 Chutichuan tangka chu an la a, an hrilh ang zel chuan an ti ta a; tichuan tun thlengin chu mi thu chu Judate zingah an la sawi huai huai a ni." 
Matthew28:16 Nimahsela, zirtir sawm leh pakhatte chu Galili ramah, Isua'n tlang a ruatsakah chuan an kal a." 
Matthew28:17 Tin, amah an hmuh chuan chibai an buk a; thenkhat erawh chuan an ringhlel a." 
Matthew28:18 Tichuan, Isua chu an hnenah a lo kal a, anniho chu a bia a, Lei leh vana thuneihna zawng zawng ka hnenah pek a ni tawh." 
Matthew28:19 Chutichuan kal u la, hnam tina mi zirtirahte siam u la, Pa leh Fapa leh Thlarau Thianghlim hmingah chuan baptis u la.Thu ka pek zawng zawng che u pawm turin zirtir rawh u. Tin, ngai teh u, kei kumkhuain, khawvel tawp thleng pawhin, inhnenah ka awm zel ang, a ti a." 
Matthew28:20 Thu ka pek zawng zawng che u pawm turin zirtir rawh u. Tin, ngai teh u, kei kumkhuain, khawvel tawp thleng pawhin, inhnenah ka awm zel ang, a ti a." 
Mark1:1 Pathian Fapa Isua Krista Chanchin Tha thlen tantirhna chu ti hian zawlnei Isaia lehkhabuah ziah a ni. 
Mark1:2 Ngai teh, ka tirhkoh i hmaah ka tir a, Ani chuan i kawng a siam ang." 
Mark1:3 Thlalera mi au rawl chuan, 'Lalpa lamlian sial u la, A kawngte tingil rawh u.'" 
Mark1:4 Johana, thlalera baptistu kha, thiltihsual ngaihdamna'n simna baptisma thu hrilin a lo chhuak a." 
Mark1:5 Tin, Judai rama mi zawng zawng leh Jerusalem khuaa mi zawng zawngte an chhuak a, a hnen lamah an kal a, an sualte thupha chawiin Jordan luiah chuan a hnenah baptisma an chang ta hlawm a." 
Mark1:6 Tin, Johana chu sanghawngsei hmul puanin a inthuam a, a kawng savun kawnghrenin a hreng a, a chaw chu khaukhuap leh ram khawizu a ni." 
Mark1:7 Tin, ""Ka hnungah keimah aia ropui zawk a lo kal mek a ni; kuna a pheikhawk hrui phelh tlak pawh ka ni lo e." 
Mark1:8 Kei zawngin tuiin ka baptis thin che u a; ani erawh chuan Thlarau Thianghlimin a baptis ang che u,"" tiin a hril a." 
Mark1:9 Tin, chung niahte chuan heti hi a lo ni a, Isua chu Galili rama nazaret khua atangin a lo kal a, Jordan luiah chuan johana hnenah baptisma a chang ta a." 
Mark1:10 Chu veleh tui ata a chhuahin, van inhawnga Thlarau thuro anga a chunga lo chhuk a hmu a." 
Mark1:11 Tin, ""Nang ka Fapa duh tak i ni a, i chungah ka lawm em am a ni,"" tiin van atangin aw a lo chhuak a." 
Mark1:12 Tin, Thlarau chuan ani chu thlalerah a tir chhuak ta nghal a." 
Mark1:13 Tichuan Setana thlem chungin thlalerah chuan ni sawmli a awm a, ram sa zingahte a awm a; vantirhkohte chuan a rawng an bawlsak a." 
Mark1:14 Tin, Johana an man hnuin, Isua, Pathian Chanchin Tha hrilin, Galili ramah a lo kal a," 
Mark1:15 Hun chu a lo thleng ta a, Pathian ram pawh a lo hnai ta; sim u la Chanchin Tha hi ring rawh u,"" a ti zel a." 
Mark1:16 Tin, Galili dil kam chu a hrut laiin Simona leh Simona unau Andria chu dilah chuan len dengin a hmu a; sangha mantu an ni reng a." 
Mark1:17 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""Mi zui rawh u, tichuan mihring mantuah ka siam ang che u,"" a ti a." 
Mark1:18 Tin, lente chu kalsanin an zui ta nghal a." 
Mark1:19 Tin, thui lo te a kalin Zebedaia fapa Jakoba leh a unau Johana chu a hmu a, chu mite chu len siamthain lawngah bawk an awm a." 
Mark1:20 Tin, ani chuan anni chu a ko ta nghal a; tichuan an pa Zebedaia chu inhlawhfa an rawihte hnenah chuan lawngah an kalsan a, an zui ta a." 
Mark1:21 Tin, Kapernaum khuaah an va lut a; tin Chawlhniah chuan inkhawmna inah a lut a, a zirtir ta nghal a." 
Mark1:22 A thu zirtir chu mak an ti hle a; lehkhaziaktute ang lo a, thuneihna nei awm taka anmahni a zirtir avangin." 
Mark1:23 Tin, an inkhawmna inah chuan ramhuai bawlhhlawh pai mi pakhat a lo awm a;" 
Mark1:24 ani chuan, ""Nazaret Isu, keini leh nang eng nge kan inzawlna awm? Min tiboral turin i lo kal em ni? Nang ka hria a che, Pathian mi thianghlim i ni e,"" tiin a au chhuak ta nghal a." 
Mark1:25 Tin, Isua'n a hau a, ""Ngawi la, a chhung ata lo chhuak rawh,"" a ti a." 
Mark1:26 Tin, ramhuai bawlhhlawh chu, amah sawisaa ring taka auin a chhung ata a lo chhuak ta a." 
Mark1:27 Tin, an zain mak an ti em em a, chutichuan, ""Hei hi eng nge ni le? zirtirna thar a nih hi le! Ramhuai bawlhhlawhte pawh thu nei takin thu a pe a, a thu an awi zel hi le,"" tiin an inhnial a." 
Mark1:28 Tin, Galili ram vel zawng zawngah ram tinah a chanchin a thang ta nghal a." 
Mark1:29 Tin, inkhawmna in ata chu an chhuahin, Jakoba leh Johana nen Simona leh Andria inah chuan an lut ta nghal a." 
Mark1:30 Tin, Simona nupuia nu chu khawsikin a na a, a lo mu a; tichuan a chanchin chu Isua an hrilh ta nghal a;" 
Mark1:31 tin, ani chuan a kut a va chelh a, a kaitho ta a; tichuan a khawsik chu a reh a, an rawng a bawlsak ta a." 
Mark1:32 Tin, tlai lamah ni a tlak hnu chuan, damlo zawng zawng leh ramhuai mante a hnenah an rawn hruai a." 
Mark1:33 A khuain kawngkhar bulah chuan an lo awm khawm ta mup a. 
Mark1:34 Tin, mi tam tak nat tinrenga nate chu a ti dam a, ramhuai tam tak a hnawt chhuak bawk a; ramhuaite chuan amah chu an hriat avangin an tawng a phal lo." 
Mark1:35 Tin, zingah khawvar hma daihin a tho a, a chhuak a, thlaler hmunah a va kal a, chutah chuan a tawngtai a." 
Mark1:36 Tin, Simona leh a thiante chuan a hnungah an zui ta a;" 
Mark1:37 tin, ani chu an va hmuh chuan a hnenah, ""Mi zawng zawngin an zawng che a sin le,"" an ti a." 
Mark1:38 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Hmun dangah khaw hnaiahte chuan i kal ang u, chungahte pawh chuan thu ka hrilh theihna turin; chu chu ka rawn chhuah chhan a ni si a,"" a ti a." 
Mark1:39 Tichuan thu hrila ramhuaite hnawt chhuak zelin Galili ram zawng zawnga an inkhawmna inahte a lut zel a. 
Mark1:40 Tin, a hnenah phar a lo kal a, ""I duh chuan mi tithianghlim thei e,"" tiin a hmaah thingthiin a ngen chiam a." 
Mark1:41 Tin, ani chuan a lo khawngaih em em a, a han ban a, a dek a, ""Ka duh e, lo thianghlim tawh ang che,"" a ti a." 
Mark1:42 Tichuan chawplehchilhin a phar chu a lo reh ta nghal a, a lo thianghlim ta a." 
Mark1:43 Tin, Isua chuan, ""Tuma hnena engmah sawi lo turin fimkhur ang che;" 
Mark1:44 amaherawhchu puithiam hnenah va inentir la, i inthenna'n Mosia'n thil a ruatte kha hlan rawh, anhriat fiahna turin,"" a ti tlat a, a kaltir ta nghal a.Nimahsela ani chu a chhuak a, chu mi chanchin chu nasa taka tlangaupuiin a puang darh ta a: chutichuan Isua chu alangin khuaah a lut thei ta lo a, thlaler hmunahte a awm ta zawk a; tin, hmun tin ata a hnenah an lo kal thin a." 
Mark1:45 Nimahsela ani chu a chhuak a, chu mi chanchin chu nasa taka tlangaupuiin a puang darh ta a: chutichuan Isua chu alangin khuaah a lut thei ta lo a, thlaler hmunahte a awm ta zawk a; tin, hmun tin ata a hnenah an lo kal thin a." 
Mark2:1 Tin, ni eng emaw zat lai hnuah Kapernaum khuaa a lo luh lehin, inah chuan a awm tih thu a lo thang ta a." 
Mark2:2 Tichuan kawngka bulah pawh awmna reng awm lo khawp hialin mi tam tak an lo awm khawm ta a; tin, an hnenah thu a hril ta a." 
Mark2:3 Tin zeng pakhat, mi paliina zawn, a hnenah an rawn hruai a." 
Mark2:4 Tin, mipui avanga a kiang hnaia an lo kal theih loh avangin a awmna in chung chu an thiat ta a; tin, an reh pawh zawhin a awngphah chu a chunga mi zeng mu chawp chuan an zuk thlak a." 
Mark2:5 Tichuan Isua'n an rinzia chu a lo hmuhin zeng hnenah chuan, ""Ka fa, i sualte ngaihdam a ni tawh e,"" a ti a." 
Mark2:6 Tin, lehkhaziaktu thenkhatte chu chutah chuan an thu a," 
Mark2:7 He mi hian engati nge hetiang thu a sawi ni? Pathian a sawichhia a nih hi; mi pakhat, Pathian chauh lo chuan, tuin nge sualte ngaidam thei ni?"" tiin an thinlungin an ngaihtuah a." 
Mark2:8 Tin, Isua'n an rilruin chutiangin an ngaihtuah tih a rilruin a lo hre ta nghal a, an hnenah, ""Chung thu chu engati nge in thinlunga in ngaihtuah ni?" 
Mark2:9 Zeng hnenah hian, 'I sualte ngaihdam a ni tawh,' tih leh, 'I awngphah lal la, kein kal tawh rawh,' tih hi a eng nge sawi awl zak?" 
Mark2:10 Engpawh ni se la, khawvelah Mihring Fapain sual ngaihdam theihna a nei tih in hriatna'n,' ""(zeng hnenah chuan)" 
Mark2:11 Tho la, i awngphah la la, i inah kal rawh, ka ti a che,"" a ti a." 
Mark2:12 Tichuan ani chu a tho a, a awngphah chu a la ta nghal a, an zaa mithmuhin a kal chhuak ta a; chutichuan an zain mak an ti hle a, ""Hetiang reng reng hi kan la hmu ngai lo,"" tiin Pathian an fak ta a." 
Mark2:13 Tin, a chhuak leh a, dil kamah chuan a kal ta a; tin, mipui zawng zawng chu a hnenah an va kal a, a lo zirtir ta a." 
Mark2:14 Tin, a kal pahin, Levia, Alphaia fapa chu chhiah chawina hmuna thu a hmu a, a hnenah, ""Mi rawn zui rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, a tho a, a zui ta a." 
Mark2:15 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Isua chuan Levia inah chuan chaw a kil a, chhiahkhawntute leh misual tam takin Isua leh a zirtirte chu an kilpui hlawm a; an tam hle si a, amah chu an zui ve bawk thin a." 
Mark2:16 Tin, Pharisaite zinga lehkhaziaktute chuan Isua'n mi sual leh chhiahkhawntute a kilpui an hmuhin, a zirtirte hnenah chuan, ""Engtizia nge chhiahkhawntute leh mi sualte hnenah a eia a in le?"" an ti a." 
Mark2:17 Tin, Isua'n chu chu a lo hria a, an hnenah chuan, ""Mi chakte chuan daktawr an ngai lo a, mi bawrhsawmte zawkin an ngai a ni; mi fel takte lam tura lo kal ka ni lo a, mi sualte zawk lam tura lo kal ka ni,"" a ti a." 
Mark2:18 Tin, Johana zirtirte leh Pharisaite chuan chaw an nghei a; tin, mi an lo kal a, Isua hnenah chuan, ""Engati nge Johana zirtirte leh Pharisai zirtirte chuan chaw an nghei thin a, i zirtirte lemin an nghei ve thin loh?"" an ti a." 
Mark2:19 Isua'n an hnenah, ""Mo hruaitute hnenah a pasal tur chu a awm chhung zawng mo hruaitute chuan chaw an nghei thei em ni? A pasal tur chu an hnena a awm chhung zawng an nghei thei lo ang." 
Mark2:20 Nimahsela a pasal tur chu an hnen ata hruai bo nite a la thleng ang a, chu mi niah erawh chuan an la nghei ang." 
Mark2:21 Tuma'n puan hlui, puan la thlakmar loh themin an bel ngai lo; bel ang se la, a bel phuina tur chuan a kai tet zawk ang a, a thar chuan a hlui chu a kai tet ang a, a lo thler nasa lehzual ang." 
Mark2:22 Tin, tuma'n uain thar, savun uain peng hluahte an thun ngai lo; thun ang se la, uain chuan savun pengte chu a tawn puak ang a, uain leh savun pengte chu a boral ve ve ang; uain thar chu savun uain peng tharahte an thun zawk thin a ni,"" a ti a." 
Mark2:23 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Isua chu Chawlhniah chuan buh hmunahte a kal tlang a; tin, a zirtirte chuan an kal pahin buh vuite chu an thliak ta a." 
Mark2:24 Tin, Pharisaite chuan a hnenah, ""en the, engati nge Chawlhnia tihthiang lo chu an tih ni?"" an ti a." 
Mark2:25 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Davida leh a thiante an tlakchhama an riltam laia a thiltih kha in chhiar lo em ni?" 
Mark2:26 Khatia Abiathara Puithiam Lalber a nih lai a, Pathian ina a luh a, puithiamte chauh lo chuan ei thian loh chhangdah chu a ei a, a thiante hnena a pek ve thu kha?"" a ti a." 
Mark2:27 Tin, amah vekin an hnenah chuan, ""Chawlhni hi mihring tana siam a ni a, mihring hi Chawlhni tana siam a ni lo;Chutichuan, Mihring Fapa hi Chawlhni chungah lam pawh hian Lal a ni,"" a ti a." 
Mark2:28 Chutichuan, Mihring Fapa hi Chawlhni chungah lam pawh hian Lal a ni,"" a ti a." 
Mark3:1 Tin, inkhawmna inah chuan a lut leh a: chutah chuan mi pakhat kut zeng a lo awm a." 
Mark3:2 Tin, amah an hek theihna'n Chawlhniin a tihdam dawn leh dawn loh an mitmei a." 
Mark3:3 Tin, ani'n kut zeng hnenah chuan, ""Lo ding chhuak rawh,"" a ti a." 
Mark3:4 Tin, an hnenah chuan, ""Chawlhniah hian tihthat nge thiang, tichhiat? chhandam nge thiang, tihhlum?"" tiin a zawt a. Nimahsela an ngawi ta reng a." 
Mark3:5 Tin, an thinlung sakzia chu pawi tihsak em emin, thinur chunga anmahni a en vel hnuin, chu mi hnenah chuan, ""I kut phar rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, a han phar chhuak a, a kut chu a dam ta a." 
Mark3:6 Tin, Pharisaite chu an chhuak a, amah an tihhlum theihnazia tur ngaihtuahin Heroda pawla mite nen chuan an inrawn ta nghal a." 
Mark3:7 Tin, Isua chu a zirtirte nen dil lamah chuan an kal bo a; tin, Galili ram atangin mipui tam takin an zui ta a." 
Mark3:8 Tin, a thiltih ropuizia chu an hriatin Judai ram atang te, Jerusalem khua atang te, Idumai ram atang te, Jordan ral atang te, Tura leh Sidon khaw vel atangtein mipui tam tak a hnenah an lo kal ve a." 
Mark3:9 Tin, mipui avang chuan a tan lawngleng lo ruatsak turin a zirtirte a hrilh a, ""Chutilochuan mi nek huai huai dah ang e,"" a ti a." 
Mark3:10 Mi tam tak a tidam tawh si a; chutichuan na nei apiangin amah an deh theihna turin an bawh huai huai a. 
Mark3:11 Ramhuai bawlhhlawhte pawhin amah chu an hmuh apiangin a hmaah bawkkhupin, ""Nang Pathian Fapa chu i ni,"" tiin an au thin a." 
Mark3:12 Tin, ani chuan a chanchin chu puan loh tur an hnenah a ti tlat zel a." 
Mark3:13 Tin, tlangah chuan a han kal a, amahin a duhzawng apiangte chu a ko a; tin, anni chu a hnenah an han kal a." 
Mark3:14 Tin, a hnena an awm theihna'n leh thu hril tur leh" 
Mark3:15 ramhuaite hnawh chhuahna thu nei tura a tirh chhuah theihna'n, sawm leh pahnih a ruat a." 
Mark3:16 Chungte chu Simona, Petera a vuah te,"
