Mark16:9 Tin, ni sarih ni hmasa ber zinga a thawhleh chuan Mari Magdalini, a kawchhung ata ramhuai pasarih a hnawh chhuaha hnenah khan a inlar hmasa ber a." 
Mark16:10 Tin, ani chu Isua awmpui thinte hnenah a va kal a, mitthi ngaia an tap lai chu a hrilh ta a." 
Mark16:11 Nimahsela anni chuan a nung leh a, hmuh pawh a hmu tih an hre na a, an awi si lo." 
Mark16:12 Tin, chu mi hnuah chuan an zinga mi pahnih ram lam pana an kal laiin hmel danglam puin an hnenah a inlar leh a." 
Mark16:13 Tin, anni chuan zirtir dangte an va hrilh a, anni thu pawh chu an awi chuang lo." 
Mark16:14 Tin, chu mi hnu lehah chuan chaw an kil laiin sawm leh pakhatte hnen ngeiah a inlar a, a thawhleh hnua a hmutute thu chu an awi loh avangin an rin loh leh an thinlung sak kawngah chuan a zilhhau ta a." 
Mark16:15 Tin, an hnenah, ""Khawvel zawng zawngah kal u la, thil siam zawng zawng hnenah chuan Chanchin Tha hi hril rawh u." 
Mark16:16 A ringa baptisma chang chu chhandamin an awm ang a; a ring lo erawh chu thiam loh changin an awm ang. 
Mark16:17 Tin, he'ng chhinchhiahnate hian ringtute chu a zui zel ang: Ka hmingin ramhuaite an hnawt chhuak ang a, tawng thartein an tawng ang a;" 
Mark16:18 rulte kutin an la ang a; thihna tur engpawh in mah se la engmah an ti lo ang a; damlote chungah an kut an nghat ang a, an dam zel ang,"" a ti a." 
Mark16:19 Chutichuan, Lal Isua chu, an hnena thu a sawi zawh chuan vana hruai chhohin a awm a. Pathian ding lamah a han thu ta a.Tichuan anni chu an kal chhuak a, ram tinah thu an hril ta a, Lalpa'n anmahni a thawhpui a, a zuitu chhinchhiahnate chuanin thu chu a tinghet zel a. Amen." 
Mark16:20 Tichuan anni chu an kal chhuak a, ram tinah thu an hril ta a, Lalpa'n anmahni a thawhpui a, a zuitu chhinchhiahnate chuanin thu chu a tinghet zel a. Amen." 
Luke1:1 Kha thil kan zinga lo thleng, atir ata a hmutute" 
Luke1:2 leh thu rawngbawltuten keimahni min hrilh ang khan, mi tam takin ziak an tum ta a;" 
Luke1:3 chuvangin Theophil tha ber, a bul ata engkim fel takin ka chhui a, indawt zelin i tan ziak i la a tha ang, ka ti a ni;" 
Luke1:4 hmana thu an zirtir che kha dik tak a ni tih i hriat theihna'n. 
Luke1:5 Judai ram lal Heroda a dam laiin, Abija pawla mi a hming Zakaria puithiam pakhat a awm a; chu mi chuan Arona thlah zinga mi nupuiah a nei a, a hming chu Elizabeti a ni." 
Luke1:6 An pahnihin Pathian mithmuhin fel takin an awm a, sawiselboin Lalpa thupek leh a dan zawng zawng zawmin an awm thin." 
Luke1:7 Nimahsela Elizabeti a chin avangin fa an nei lo, an pahnihin upa tak an ni si a." 
Luke1:8 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a pawlte tih dan ang zela Pathian hmaa puithiama a chet laiin," 
Luke1:9 puithiam dan angin Lalpa biak ina luh leh englo rimtui hal a chang a. 
Luke1:10 Tin, englo rimtui hal hun laiin mipui chu an zain pawnah an tawngtai a." 
Luke1:11 Tin, Lalpa vantirhkoh pakhat englo rimtui halna maicham ding lama dingin a hnenah a inlar a." 
Luke1:12 Tin, Zakarian a hmuh veleh a mangang a, hlauh pawh a hlau a." 
Luke1:13 Nimahsela vantirhkoh chuan a hnenah, ""Zakari, hlau suh, i dil kha a hria a sin, i nupui Elizabetin fapa a hrinsak ang che, a hmingah Johana i sa tur a ni." 
Luke1:14 Tin, nang i hlimin i lawm ang a; amah a pianin mi tam tak an lawm bawk ang." 
Luke1:15 Lalpa ngaihin mi lian a ni ang a, uain leh zu reng reng a in loing; a nu pum chhung atang rengin Thlarau Thianghlimin a lo khat ang." 
Luke1:16 Israela thlahte tam tak Lalpa an Pathian hnen lamah a hawitir leh ang. 
Luke1:17 Tin, pate thinlung chu fate lama hawitir tur te, mi tihmawhte chu mi fel tak finna lama hawitir tur te, Lalpa tana mi lo inpeih tur tea buatsaih turin Elija rilru leh a thiltihtheihna puin Lalpa hmaan a kal ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke1:18 Tin, Zakarian vantirhkoh hnenah chuan, ""Chu chu engtin nge ka hriat ang? kei putar ka ni a, ka nupui pawh pitar a ni si a,"" a ti a." 
Luke1:19 Tin, vantirhkoh chuan a chhang a, a hnenah, ""Gabriela, Pathian hmaa ding thin ka ni a; a be tur che leh, chung thu tha chu hrilh tur chein rawn tirh ka ni." 
Luke1:20 Ngai rawh, ka thu sawite a hun taka lo thleng tur chu i awi loh avangin chung thil chu a lo thlen hma loh zawng i ngawi reng ang a, tawng pawh i tawng thei lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke1:21 Tin, vantlangho chuan Zakaria chu an lo nghak a, Pathian biak in chhunga a awm rei avang chuan mak an ti hle a." 
Luke1:22 Tin, a lo chhuah chuan an hnenah thu a sawi thei ta lo a; tichuan biak inah thlarau inlar a hmu a ni tih an hre ta a; tin, an hnenah a zaizir fo a, tawng thei loin a awm ta reng a." 
Luke1:23 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a rawngbawlna hun ni bi chu a kim veleh chuan a inah a haw ta a." 
Luke1:24 Tin, chu mi hnuah chuan a nupui Elizabeti chu a lo rai ta a," 
Luke1:25 Mi hnena ka hming chhia chhilhna'n Lalpa'n mi hmuhin heti hian mi tihsak ta,"" tiin thla nga a biru a." 
Luke1:26 Tin, a thla ruknaah chuan Pathianin vantirhkoh Gabriela chu Galili rama khaw pakhat Nazaret an tihah chuan, nula thianghlim pakhat hnenah a tir a," 
Luke1:27 chu nula chu Davida thlaha mi a hming Josefa nupui hual a ni a; nula hming chu Mari a ni. 
Luke1:28 Tin, vantirhkoh chu a hnenah a lut a, ""Chibai, Vohbik! Lalpa i hnenah a awm,"" a ti a." 
Luke1:29 Tin, chu mi thusawi avang chuan a mangang ta em em a, ""Engtiziaa chibai mi buk nge ni ang?"" tiin a inngaihtuah a." 
Luke1:30 Tin, vantirhkoh chuan a hnenah, ""Mari, hlau suh; Pathian ngaihsakzawng i ni e." 
Luke1:31 Ngai rawh, i rai ang a, fapa i hring ang a, a hmingah chuan Isua i sa tur a ni." 
Luke1:32 Ani chu mi lian a la ni ang a, Chungnungbera Fapa an ti ang; Lal Pathianin a hnenah a thlahtu Davida thutphah chu a pe ang a;" 
Luke1:33 Jakoba thlahte chungah chatuanin a lal ang a, a ramin kin ni a nei lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke1:34 Tin, Marin vantirhkoh hnenah chuan, ""Chung chu engtin nge ni ang? mipa ka nei si lo,"" a ti a." 
Luke1:35 Tin, vantirhkoh chuan a chhang a, a hnenah, ""Thlarau Thianghlim i chungah a lo thleng ang a, Chungnungbera thiltihtheihnain a hliahkhuh ang che; chuvangin mi thianghlim lo piang tur pawh chu Pathian Fapa an ti ang." 
Luke1:36 Tin, ngai teh, i lichinnu Elizabeti pawhin a tar hnuin mipa a pai ta; a ching an tih thin kha, tun thla hi a thla rukna a ni tawh." 
Luke1:37 Pathian thu chhuak reng reng thil tithei loin a awm lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke1:38 Tin, Marin, ""Ngai teh, Lalpa bawihnu ka ni, i thu ang zelin ka chungah thleng rawh se,"" a ti a. Tin, vantirhkoh chuan a kalsan ta a." 
Luke1:39 Chung lai chuan Mari chu a tho a, thingtlangah, Judai rama khaw pakhatah chuan a kal ta thuai a;" 
Luke1:40 tin, Zakaria inah a lut a, Elizabeti chibai a buk a." 
Luke1:41 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Elizabetin Mari chibai buk chu a hriat veleh, a pum chhunga naute chu a che a; tin, Elizabeti chu Thlarau Thianghlimin a lo khat ta a;" 
Luke1:42 tin, aw ring takin a au a, ""Nang chu hmeichhia azawnga engthawl i ni, i rila rah pawh a engthawl a ni." 
Luke1:43 Ka Lalpa nu, ka hnena i lo kal hi engtizia nge ni le?" 
Luke1:44 Ngai teh, i chibai buk thawm ka benga a luh veleh, a lawm avangin naute ka pum chhungah a che a ni." 
Luke1:45 A ringnu pawh a eng a thawl a ni, a hnena Lalpain thu a sawi kha a thleng dawn si a,"" a ti a." 
Luke1:46 Tin, Marin, ""Ka nun hian Lalpa a chawimawi e," 
Luke1:47 Ka thlarau pawh mi chhandamtu Pathian chungah a lawm ta em em a. 
Luke1:48 A bawihnu hnam tlawmzia a hmu a, a khawngaih a; Ngai rawh, tun achinah thangthar zawng zawngin nihlawh mi ti dawn a ni." 
Luke1:49 Mi chak khan ka chungah thil ropui tak mi tihsak a, A hming pawh a thianghlim a ni." 
Luke1:50 A tihtute chu thangthar thlengin a khawngaih zel thin. 
Luke1:51 A banin a tha chakzia a entir a, mi chapote chu an inngaihtuahnain a tidarh ta a." 
Luke1:52 An thutphaha lal thute chu a hnuk thla a. Hnam tlawmte chu a chawimawi ta a. 
Luke1:53 Riltamte chu thil tha takin a tipuar a, hausate chu kutruakin a kal botir ta a." 
Luke1:54 Kan thlahtute hnena a sawi ang khan," 
Luke1:55 Abrahama leh a thlahte chu chatuana a khawngaih turzia hriat rengna'n, a chhiahhlawh Israelte chu a chhawmdawl ta a,"" a ti a." 
Luke1:56 Tin, Mari chu thla thum lai a hnenah a awm a, a in lamah a haw leh ta a." 
Luke1:57 Tin, Elizabeti nau hrin chu a lo hun ta a; tichuan fapa a rawn hring a." 
Luke1:58 Tin, a vengte leh a laichinte chuan Lalpa'n a khawngaih em em tih an lo hria a, an lawmpui a." 
Luke1:59 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a ni riat niah chuan nausen serh tan turin an lo kal a; a hmingah a pa hming vek zakaria bawk sak an tum a." 
Luke1:60 Tin, a nu'n, ""Ni lo e, ani zawng Johana sak zawk tur a ni,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke1:61 Tin, anni'n a hnenah, ""I laichinte zingah he hming pu hi tumah an awm hlei nem,"" an ti a." 
Luke1:62 Tin, a pa hnenah chuan zaizirin, ""a hmingah eng nge sa i la i duh?"" an ti a." 
Luke1:63 Tin, lehkha ziakna phek a dil a, ""A hming Johana a ni e,"" tiin a ziak a. Tin, an zain mak an ti hle a." 
Luke1:64 Tin, chawplehchilhin a ka leh a lei chu a lo inphelh a, Pathian fakin a lo tawng chhuak ta nghal a." 
Luke1:65 Tin, an vela awmte zawng zawng chuan an hlau ta a. Tin, chung thu chu Judai ram thingtlang zawng zawngah a thang vel ta a." 
Luke1:66 Tin, a hria apiangin an rilruah lungkhamah an nei a, ""Chu nausen chu engtin tak la awm ang maw?"" an ti a; Lalpa kutin amah a tanpui si a." 
Luke1:67 Tin, a pa Zakaria chu Thlarau Thianghlimin a lo khat a, a sawi lawk a," 
Luke1:68 Lalpa, Israela Pathian chu fakin awm rawh se, a mite chu a rawn tlawh a, tlanna a siamsak a," 
Luke1:69 A chhiahhlawh Davida chhungte zingah chuan chhandamna ropui tak min siamsak a; 
Luke1:70 (Leilung pian tirh ata a zawlnei thianghlimte kaa a sawi ang khan) 
Luke1:71 Kan dote lakah leh min hawtute zawng zawng laka chhandamna chu; 
Luke1:72 Kan thlahtute khawngaihna'n leh a thuthlung thianghlim hriat rengna'n; 
Luke1:73 Kan thlahtu Abrahama hnenah chhia a chham kha," 
Luke1:74 Kan dote lakah kan him a,Kan dam chhung zawng a mithmuha thianghlim leh fel taka awm a," 
Luke1:75 Hlau loa a rawng min bawltir tur thu kha. 
Luke1:76 A ni, Taite, nang hi Chungnungbera zawlnei an ti ang che; a kawngte siam turin Lalpa hmaah i kal dawn si a;" 
Luke1:77 Kan Pathian thinlunga khawngaihna avangin 
Luke1:78 An sualte ngaihdamna'n a mite hnenah chhandamna thu hriattir turin. Chu mi avang chuan chung lam atangin ni chhuakin min rawn tlawh ang," 
Luke1:79 Thim zingah leh thihna hlima thute en tur leh thlamuanna kawnga kan ke pentir turin,"" a ti a.Tin, nausen chu a lo thang lian deuh deuh a, a rilru lam a lo nghet ta telh telh a, Israelte hnena a rawn inlar hma loh zawng thlalerah a awm reng a." 
Luke1:80 Tin, nausen chu a lo thang lian deuh deuh a, a rilru lam a lo nghet ta telh telh a, Israelte hnena a rawn inlar hma loh zawng thlalerah a awm reng a." 
Luke2:1 Tin, chung lai chuan heti hi a ni a, Kaisara Augustan khawvel zawng zawng hming ziak tur thu a pe a." 
Luke2:2 (chu chu Suria rama Kurinia, Ram Awptu a nih laia hming ziak hmasa ber chu a ni)." 
Luke2:3 Tichuan mi zawng zawng chu an hming ziak turin anmahni khua theuhvah an kal a. 
Luke2:4 Tin, Josefa pawh, Davida chhungte leh a thlah a nih avangin, Galili rama Nazaret khua atangin," 
Luke2:5 Mari a nupui hual rai teuh chung nen chuan hming ziak turin, Judai rama Davida khua Bethlehem an tihah chuan an kal ta a." 
Luke2:6 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chuta an awm laiin a hrin a lo hun ta a." 
Luke2:7 Tin, a fa tirah mipa a hring a; puanin an tuam a, khualbuka an len ve tak loh avangin ran chaw pekna thlengah a muttir a." 
Luke2:8 Tin, chu mi ram vekah chuan beram vengtute an awm a, zanah an beramho an veng a, phulah an riah chilh a." 
Luke2:9 Tin, Lalpa vantirhkoh pakhat an kiangah a lo ding a, Lalpa ropuinain an vel chu a rawn chhun eng a; tichuan an hlau ta em em a." 
Luke2:10 Tin, vantirhkoh chuan an hnenah, ""Hlau suh u lang, ngai rawh u, mi tin ta tur chanchin tha lawmawm em em ka rawn thlen che u a ni." 
Luke2:11 Vawiinah hian in tan Davida khuaah Chhandamtu a piang ta, Lal Krista chu." 
Luke2:12 Tin, hei hi in tan chhinchhiahna tur a ni; nausen puana tuam, ran chaw pekna thlenga mu in hmu ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke2:13 Tin, thawklehkhatah vantirhkoh hnenah chuan vana miho mipui an lo awm ta chiam a, Pathian an fak a." 
Luke2:14 Chungnung brah Pathian ropui takin awm rawh se, Lei chunga a awm em em mihringte hnenah rem thu leng rawh se,"" an ti a." 
Luke2:15 Tin, heti hi a ni a, vantirhkohte chuan vana an kalsan veleh, beram vengtute chuan, ""Tunah Bethlehem khaw thlengin kal i la, Lalpa'n thu min hrilh lo thleng chu i en ang u,"" an inti a." 
Luke2:16 Tichuan an kal thuai thuai a, Mari nen, Josefa nen, ran chaw pekna thlenga nausen mu nen chuan an hmu a." 
Luke2:17 Tin, an va hmuh chuan nausen chanchin thu vantirhkohin a hrilh kha an sawi vel a." 
Luke2:18 Tin, a hria apiang chuan beram vengtute thusawi chu mak an ti hle a." 
Luke2:19 Mari erawh chuan thusawi zawng zawng chu a rilruin a ngaihtuah a, a vawng reng a." 
Luke2:20 Tin, beram vengtute chuan vantirhkoh hrilh ang ngeia engkim an hmuha an hriat avangin, Pathian chawimawi leh fak chung zelin an kir leh ta a." 
Luke2:21 Tin, a serh tanna tur ni riat a lo tlin chuan a hmingah chuan, chhula a awm hma renga vantirhkohin a sak tawh sa, Isua an sa a." 
Luke2:22 Tin, Mosia dan anga an inthen ni a lo thlen chuan, ani chu" 
Luke2:23 (Lalpa Dan thua, ""Mipa fa chhul keu apiang chu Lalpa tana ruat an ti ang,"" tia ziak ang khan)" 
Luke2:24 Lalpa hnena hlan tur leh, Lalpa Dan thua ziak angin thuro tuak khat emaw, parva no pahnih emaw talh turin Jerusalem khuaah an han hruai a." 
Luke2:25 Tin, ngai teh, Jerusalem khuaah chuan mi pakhat a hming Sumeona a awm; chu mi chu mi fel tak leh Pathian ngaihsak tak a ni a, Israelte thlamuantu tur chu a nghak reng a, a chungah Thlarau Thianghlim a awm a." 
Luke2:26 Tin, Lalpa Krista chu a hmuh hma loh chuan a thi lo ang tih Thlarau Thianghlimin a lo hriattir tawh reng a." 
Luke2:27 Tin, Thlarau hriattirin Pathian biak inah chuan a va lut a; nausen Isua chu a nu leh a pain Dan pangngai anga a chunga tihsak tura an rawn hruai luh lai chuan," 
Luke2:28 ani chuan a lo kuangkuah a, Pathian a fak a." 
Luke2:29 Lalpa, tunah, i thu ang zelin i bawih hi thlamuang takin i kaltir dawn a;" 
Luke2:30 I chhandamna mi tin hmuha i siam kha 
Luke2:31 Ka mitin a hmu ta e; 
Luke2:32 Jentailte hnena i eng puang chhuak tur leh i mi Israelte ropuina tur chu,"" a ti a." 
Luke2:33 Tin, nausen thu a sawi chu a nu leh a pa chuan mak an ti hle a." 
Luke2:34 Tin, Sumeonan anni chu mal a sawm a, a nu Mari hnenah, ""Ngai rawh, he naupang hi Israel zinga mi tam tak tiral tur leh din chhuahtir tura ruat a ni, miin an sawisel tur chhinchhiahna nen -" 
Luke2:35 a ni, nanga thinlung pawh ngunhnamin a la chhun tlang ang - mi tam takin an thinlunga an ngaihtuahte chu a lanna'n,"" a ti a." 
Luke2:36 Tin, mi pakhat, a hming Anni, zawlnei, Phanuela fanu, Asera hnama mi a awm a, (ani chu tar tak a ni a, a tawn tirh pasal hnenah kum sarih a awm a," 
Luke2:37 tin, kum sawmriat leh kum li zet a hmeithai a,) ani chuan Pathian biak in kalsan loin achhun azanin chaw ngheitea tawngtaiin Pathian a be thin." 
Luke2:38 Tin, chu mi lai tak chuan ani chu a lo kal a, Pathian hnenah lawmthu a sawi a, Jerusalem khaw tlan beisei apiangte hnenah chuan Isua chanchin a sawi bawk a." 
Luke2:39 Tin, Lalpa dan ang zela thil zawng zawng an tih zawhin, Galili rama anmahni khua Nazaret-ah chuan an haw leh ta a." 
Luke2:40 Tin, nausen chu a lo sei lian deuh deuh a, a lo chak telh telh a, finin a khat ta a, Pathian khawngaihna a chungah a awm bawk a." 
Luke2:41 Tin, kum tinin, Kalhlen Kut hunin a nu leh a pa chu Jerusalem khuaah chuan an kal thin a." 
Luke2:42 Tin, ani chu kum sawm leh kum hnih a nihin kut dan pangngaiin an han kal a;" 
Luke2:43 tin, an tiak a, an haw laiin naupang Isua chuan Jerusalem khuaah a awm san a; a nu leh a pa chuan an hre si lo a." 
Luke2:44 Chutichuan an pawl zingah a awm emaw an ti a, ni khat an kal hman a, an laichinte leh an hmelhriatte zingah an zawng a." 
Luke2:45 Tin, an hmuh loh avangin zawng chung zelin Jerusalem khuaah an kir leh ta a." 
Luke2:46 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ni thum chinah chuan Pathian biak inah, zirtirtute zinga thua an thu lo ngaithlaa lo zawtin an hmu ta a." 
Luke2:47 Tin, a thu hria apiang chuan a hriatzia leh a chhanzia chu mak an ti hle a." 
Luke2:48 Tin, a nu leh a pa chuan amah chu an hmuhin mak an ti hle a; tichuan a nuin a hnenah, ""Ka fa, engati nge hetia min tih? Ngai teh, i pa leh keiin thlaphang takin kan zawng che a ni,"" a ti a." 
Luke2:49 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Engah nge mi zawn ni? ka Pa ina ka awm tur in hre lo em ni?"" a ti a." 
Luke2:50 Tin, an hnena a thusawi chu a ngaihna an hre lo a." 
Luke2:51 Tin, an hnenah a kal thla a, Nazaret khua chu a zu thleng a, an thu zawmin a awm a. Tin, a nu chuan chung thil zawng zawng chu a rilruah a vawng reng a.Tin, Isua chu a fing deuh deuh a, a lo lian telh telh a, Pathian leh mihring duhsakin a awm deuh deuh a." 
Luke2:52 Tin, Isua chu a fing deuh deuh a, a lo lian telh telh a, Pathian leh mihring duhsakin a awm deuh deuh a." 
Luke3:1 Tin, Tiberia Kaisara a lal achin kum sawm leh kum nga kumah (Pontia Pilata chu Judai Ram awptu a ni a, Heroda chu Galili ram lal a ni a, a unau Philipa chu Iturea leh Trakonitis ram lal a ni a, Lusania chu Abilene ram lal a ni a," 
Luke3:2 Ana leh Kaiapha chu Puithiam Lalberte an ni a.) thlalerah Zakaria fapa Johana hnenah chuan Pathian thu a lo thleng a. 
Luke3:3 Tin, ani chu Jordan lui kam vel ram tinah a kal a, thil tihsual ngaihdamna'n simna baptisma thu a hril zel a;" 
Luke3:4 zawlnei Isaia thu buah, ""Thlalera mi au rawl chuan, 'Lalpa lamlian sial u la, a kawngte tingil rawh u," 
Luke3:5 Kawr tin chhun khah a ni vek ang a, tlang tin, mual tin, tihhniam a ni bawk ang; kawng kawite a lo ngil ang a, kawng bumbohte a lo rual bawk ang;" 
Luke3:6 Tin, mi zawng zawngin Pathian chhandamna chu an hmu ang,' a ti,"" tih ziak ang kha." 
Luke3:7 Tin, ani chuan baptisma chang tura a hnena mipui lo chhuakte hnenah chuan, ""Rul thlahte u, thinur lo thleng tur hi tlansan turin tuin nge zilh che u?" 
Luke3:8 Chutichuan sim hming pu tlakin rah rawh u, 'Abrahama kan thlahtu a ni alawm' in rilruin ti mai suh ang che u; Pathianin he'ng lungte hi Abrahama thlahahte a dintir thei e, ka tih che u hi." 
Luke3:9 Tun apangin thing bul tinah hreipui an dah ta, chutichuan thing tin rah thaa rah lo apiang an kit a, meiah an paih thin,"" a ti a." 
Luke3:10 Tin, mipuite chuan a hnenah, ""Engnge kan tih tur le?"" an ti a, an zawt a." 
Luke3:11 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Tupawh kawr pahnih nei chuan a nei lo hnenah pe rawh se; tupawh ei nei chuan chutiang bawkin ti rawh se,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke3:12 Tin, chhiahkhawntute pawh baptisma chang turin an lo kal a, a hnenah, ""Zirtirtu, eng nge kan tih tur?"" an ti a." 
Luke3:13 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""An relsak ang che u aliam chu va phut suh u,"" a ti a." 
Luke3:14 Tin, sipaite pawhin a hnenah, ""Keini pawhin eng nge kan tih tur?"" an ti a, an zawt a. Tin, ani chuan an hnenah,""Tumah tiduhdahin va hek suh u; in hlawh tawk apiangah lungawi rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Luke3:15 Tin, mitten an beisei a, mi zawng zawngin Johana chung thu an thinlung ah, ""Krista a lo ni mial dah law maw?"" tia an ngaihtuah laiin," 
Luke3:16 Johana chuan a chhang a, an zaa hnenah, ""Kei zawngin tuiin ka baptis thin che u a; nimahsela keimah aia mi ropui a lo kal dawn e,a pheikhawk hrui phelh tlak pawh ka ni lo e,ani chuan Thlarau Thianghlim leh meiin a baptis ang che u," 
Luke3:17 a kutin a sisep a keng a, a hrui zah fai hliauna tur leh a zema a buh khungna turin; a si erawh chu mei mit thei loin a halral ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke3:18 Tin, fuihna thu dang tam takin mite hnenah Chanchin Tha a hril thin a." 
Luke3:19 Nimahsela, lal Heroda chu a nau nupui Herodi chung thu-ah leh a thil tihsual zawng zawng chungah chuan Johanan a zilhhau avangin" 
Luke3:20 a thil tihsual zawng zawng belhchhahin ani chu tan inah a khung ta a. 
Luke3:21 Tin, heti hi a ni a, mi zawng zawngin baptisma an chan zawhin, Isua pawhin baptisma a chang a, a tawngtai a, van a lo inhawng a," 
Luke3:22 Thlarau Thianghlim chu taksa puin thuro angin a lo chhuk a, a chungah a fu ta a; tin, van atangin aw a lo chhuak a, ""Nang ka fapa duh tak i ni; i chungah ka lawm em em e,"" a ti a." 
Luke3:23 Tin, Isua'n a zirtir tantirh lai khan amah chu kum sawmthum lai a ni tawh, mi ngaih chuan Josefa fapa a ni a. Chumi chu Helia fa a ni a," 
Luke3:24 chu mi chu Matthata fa a ni a, chu mi chu Levia fa a ni a, chu mi chu Melkia fa a ni a, chu mi chu Janna fa a ni a, chu mi chu Josefa fa a ni a," 
Luke3:25 chu mi chu Mattathia fa a ni a, chu mi chu Amoia fa a ni a, chu mi chu Nahuma fa a ni a, chu mi chu Eslia fa a ni a, chu mi chu Nggaia fa a ni a," 
Luke3:26 chu mi chu Maatha fa a ni a, chu mi chu Mattathia fa a ni a, chu mi chu Semeia fa a ni a, chu mi chu Joseka fa a ni a,chu mi chu Joda fa a ni a." 
Luke3:27 chu mi chu Joana fa a ni a, chu mi chu Hrisa fa a ni a, chu mi chu Zerubabela fa a ni a, chu mi chu Salathiela fa a ni a, chu mi chu Neria fa a ni a," 
Luke3:28 chu mi chu Melkia fa a ni a, chu mi chu Addia fa a ni a, chu mi chu Kosama fa a ni a, chu mi chu elmadama fa a ni a, chu mi chu Era fa a ni a," 
Luke3:29 chu mi chu Isua fa a ni a, chu mi chu Eliezara fa a ni a, chu mi chu Jorima fa a ni a, chu mi chu Matthata fa a ni a, chu mi chu Levia fa a ni a," 
Luke3:30 chu mi chu Sumeona fa a ni a, chu mi chu Juda fa a ni a, chu mi chu josefa fa a ni a, chu mi chu Jonama fa a ni a, chu mi chu Eliakima fa a ni a," 
Luke3:31 chu mi chu Melea fa a ni a, chu mi chu Menna fa a ni a, chu mi chu Mattatha fa a ni a, chu mi chu Nathana fa a ni, chu mi chu Davida fa a ni a," 
Luke3:32 chu mi chu Jesaia fa a ni a, chu mi chu Obeda fa a ni a, chu mi chu Boaza fa a ni a, chu mi chu Salmona fa a ni a, chu mi chu Nasona fa a ni a," 
Luke3:33 chu mi chu Aminadaba fa a ni a, chu mi chu Arama fa a ni a, chu mi chu Esroma fa a ni a, chu mi chu Pharesa fa a ni a, chu mi chu Juda fa a ni a," 
Luke3:34 chu mi chu Jakoba fa a ni a, chu mi chu Isaaka fa a ni a, chu mi chu Abrahama fa a ni a, chu mi chu Tera fa a ni a, chu mi chu nahora fa a ni a," 
Luke3:35 chu mi chu Seruga fa a ni a, chu mi chu Reuva fa a ni a, chu mi chu Pelega fa a ni a, chu mi chu Ebera fa a ni a, chu mi chu Sela fa a ni a," 
Luke3:36 chu mi chu Kainana fa a ni a, chu mi chu Arpaksada fa a ni a, chu mi chu Sema fa a ni a, chu mi chu Nova fa a ni a, chu mi chu Lameka fa a ni a," 
Luke3:37 chu mi chu Mathusela fa a ni a, chu mi chu Enoka fa a ni a, chu mi chu Jareda fa a ni a, chu mi chu Mahalalela fa a ni a, chu mi chu Kainana fa a ni a,chu mi chu Enosa fa a ni a, chu mi chu Setha fa a ni a, chu mi chu Adama fa a ni a, chu mi chu Pathian fa a ni a." 
Luke3:38 chu mi chu Enosa fa a ni a, chu mi chu Setha fa a ni a, chu mi chu Adama fa a ni a, chu mi chu Pathian fa a ni a." 
Luke4:1 Tin, Isua chu Thlarau Thianghlimin a khat a, Jordan lui atangin a kir leh a," 
Luke4:2 diabola thlem chungin thlalerah ni sawmli Thlarau hruaiin a awm a. 
Luke4:3 Tin, chung ni chuan engmah a ei lo; tin, a tawpah chuan a ril a lo tam ta a. Tin, diabola chuan a hnenah, ""Pathian Fapa i nih chuan he lung hi chhanga chang turin thu pe rawh,"" a ti a." 
Luke4:4 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, "" 'Mihring hi chhang chauhin an nung lo vng,' tih ziak a ni,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke4:5 Tin, a hruai chho a, mit khap kar loah khawvel ram zawng zawng a entir a." 
Luke4:6 Tin, diabola chuan a hnenah, ""Heng zawng zawng chunga thuneihna leh a ropuina hi ka pe ang che; ka hnena pek a ni tawh si a, ka duh apiang hnenah ka pe bawk thin a ni." 
Luke4:7 Chutichuan chibai mi buk la, a zain i ta a ni vek ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke4:8 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, "" 'Lalpa i Pathian chibai buk la, ama rawng chauh bawl rawh,' tih ziak a ni,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke4:9 Tin, diabola chuan Jerusalem khuaah a hruai a, Pathian biak in chip zumah chuan a dah a, tin, a hnenah, ""Pathian Fapa I nih chuan heta tang hian tla thla rawh;" 
Luke4:10 'Nangmah humhim tur chein i chung thu-ah zawng a vantirhkohte chu thu a pe ang,' tih leh," 
Luke4:11 'An kutin an dawm ang chia, chutilochuan i kein lung i chhuih hlauh dah ang e,' tih ziak a ni si a,"" a ti a." 
Luke4:12 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, "" 'Lalpa i Pathian fiah suh,' tih a ni e,"" tiin a chhang a." 
Luke4:13 Tin, diabolan a thlemna tur tinrenga a thlem zawh chuan a remchan hun atan a kalsan ta a." 
Luke4:14 Tin, Isua chu Thlarau thiltihtheihna puin Galili ramah a haw leh ta a; tin, a chanchin chu, chu mi vel ram tinah chuan a thang ta a." 
Luke4:15 Tin, an inkhawmna inahte a zirtir zel a, mi zawng zawng fakin a awm a." 
Luke4:16 Tin, a sei lenna khua Nazaret chu a lo thleng a; tin, Chawlhnia a tih dan pangngaiin inkhawmna inah a lut a, chhiar turin a ding a." 
Luke4:17 Tin, zawlnei Isaia lehkhabu chu a hnenah an pe a. Tin, lehkhabu zial chu a phelh a, he thu ziakna lai hi a chhar a," 
Luke4:18 Riangvaite hnenah Chanchin Tha hril tura mi ruat avangin Lalpa Thlarau chu ka chungah a awm; ani chuan salte hnena chhuahna thu leh, mitdelte hnena mitvar neih lehna thu sawi tur te, tihduhdah tuarte chhuahtirna tur te," 
Luke4:19 Lalpa lungawi kum thu sawi tur tein, mi tir a ni,"" tih hi." 
Luke4:20 Tin, lehkhabu chu a zial a, rawngbawltu a pe leh a, a thu ta a. Tin, inkhawmna ina mi zawng zawng mit chu a chungah a fu a." 
Luke4:21 Tin, an hnenah, ""He Pathian Lehkha Thu hi vawiinah hian in hriatah a lo thleng ta,"" tiin a sawi tan a." 
Luke4:22 Tin, an zain amah an fak a, a kam chhuak kawngaih thute chu mak an ti hle a. Tin, ""He mi hi Josefa fapa a ni lo em ni?"" an ti a." 
Luke4:23 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Nangni'n he tehkhin thu hi, 'Daktawr, nangmah intidam rawh,''Kapernaum khuaa i thiltih kan lo hriat apiang kha, hetah nangma khaw lamah pawh hian ti rawh,' tiin min la hrilh dawn ngei nak hi,"" a ti a." 
Luke4:24 Tin, amah vekin, ""Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, zawlnei tumah mahni khaw lama miin an lawm ngai lo." 
Luke4:25 Chutichuan dik takin ka ti a che u, Elija dam laia kum thum leh thla ruk van a pin a, khawvela tam nasa tak a lo tlak khan, Israel ramah hmeithai tam tak an awm a;" 
Luke4:26 nimahsela an zingah tuma hnenah Elija tirh a ni lo a, Sidon ram lama Sarepta khuaa hmeichhe pakhat hmeithai hnenah chauh tirh a ni zawk kha." 
Luke4:27 Tin, zawlnei Elisa dam lai pawh khan Israel ramah phar tam tak an awm a; nimahsela an zingah tumah tihthianghlimin an awm lo a, Naamana, Suria rama mi chauh tihthianghlimin a awm tak zawk kha,"" a ti a." 
Luke4:28 Tin, inkhawmna ina mi zawng zawng chuan chung thu chu an hriat veleh, an lo thinur em em a," 
Luke4:29 an tho hlawm a, khua ata chu an nam chhuak a, paih thlak turin an khaw awmna kham kovah chuan an hruai ta a." 
Luke4:30 Nimahsela ani chu an karah a kal tlang a, a kal ta zel mai a." 
Luke4:31 Tin, Galili rama khaw pakhat, Kapernaum-ah chuan a zuk kal ta a. Tin, Chawlhniin mite a zirtir a;" 
Luke4:32 tin, thu nei taka a sawi avangin a thu zirtir chu mak an ti hle a." 
Luke4:33 Tin, inkhawmna inah chuan ramhuai bawlhhlawh thlarau pai mi pakhat a lo awm a; ani chu aw ring takin" 
Luke4:34 A! Nazaret Isu, keini leh nang eng nge kan inzawlna awm? min tiboral turin i lo kal em ni? Nang ka hria a che, Pathian Mi Thianghlim i ni e,"" tiin a au chhuak a." 
Luke4:35 Tin, Isua'n a hau a, ""Ngawi la, a chhung ata lo chhuak rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, ramhuai chuan a laiah a titlu zet a, tina loin a chhung ata chu a lo chhuak ta a." 
Luke4:36 Tin, an zain mak an ti hle a, ""Hei hi eng thu nge ni le? Thu nei tak leh thiltithei takin ramhuai bawlhhlawhte thu a pe a, an chhuah hi,"" tiin an inbia a." 
Luke4:37 Tin, chu mi vel ram khaw tinah a chanchin a thang ta a." 
Luke4:38 Tin, a tho a, inkhawmna in ata chu a chhuak a, Simona inah a lut ta a. Tin, Simona nupuia nu chu nasa takin a khua a lo sik a, tichuan a tan an lo ngensak a." 
Luke4:39 Tin, a kiangah a ding a, khawsik chu a hau a, a reh ta a; tin, a tho ta nghal a, an rawng a bawlsak ta a." 
Luke4:40 Tin, ni tlak dawn laiin natna hrang hranga na, dam lo nei apiangin a hnenah an rawn hruai a; tin, an zaa chungah chuan a kut a nghat theuh a, a tidam ta zel a." 
Luke4:41 Tin, ramhuaite pawh, ""Pathian Fapa i ni,"" tia auin mi tam tak kawchhung ata an lo chhuak a. Tin, anmahni a hau a, Krista a ni tih an hriat avangin an tawng a phal lo." 
Luke4:42 Tin, khawvar veleh a chhuak a, thlaler hmunah a kal a, tin, mipuite chuan an zawng a, a hnenah an lo kal a, anmahni a kalsan lohna'n chelh an tum a." 
Luke4:43 Nimahsela ani chuan an hnenah, ""Khaw dangate pawh Pathian ram Chanchin Tha ka hril tur a ni, chu mi avang chuan tirh ka ni si a,"" a ti a.Tichuan Galili rama inkhawmna inahte thu a hril a." 
Luke4:44 Tichuan Galili rama inkhawmna inahte thu a hril a. 
Luke5:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, mipuiin Pathian thu an ngaihthlak a, amah an bawr huai huai laiin, ani chu Gennesaret dil kamah chuan a ding a;" 
Luke5:2 tin, dil kamah chuan lawng pahnih awm a hmu a, nimahsela sangha mantute chu an chhuak a, an lente an su a." 
Luke5:3 Tichuan lawng pakhat Simona ta zawkah chuan a chuang a, a hnenah vaukam ata tlema tawlh luh deuh a dil a. Tin, a thu a, lawng atang chuan mipuite chu a zirtir ta a." 
Luke5:4 Tin, thusawi a ban chuan Simona hnenah, ""Li thuk lam pan la, sangha man turin in lente deng rawh,"" a ti a." 
Luke5:5 Tin, Simonan a hnenah, ""Zirtirtu, rim takin zankhuain kan bei a, engmah kan man lo a, nimahsela i thuin lente ka deng leh ang e,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke5:6 Tin, an han den chuan sangha tam tak an khuh a, an lente chu a chat pheuh pheuh a." 
Luke5:7 Tin, lawng danga an pawlpui awmte chu anmahni rawn pui turin kutin an hui a. Tin, an lo kal a, lawng pahnih chu pil lek lek khawpin an chhung khat ve ve a." 
Luke5:8 Tin, Simon Petera'n chu chu a hmuh chuan Isua khup kiangah a bawkkhup a, ""Lalpa, mi kalsan rawh, mi sual ka nih hi,"" a ti a." 
Luke5:9 An sangha man chu ani leh a thianten mak an ti hle si a. 
Luke5:10 Simona pawl vek Zebedaia fapa Jakoba leh Johana pawhin mak an ti hle bawk a. Tin,Isua'n Simona hnenah, ""Hlau suh, tun hnuah zawng mihring i man tawh ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke5:11 Tin, an lawngte chu vaukamah an hruai kai a, engkim kalsanin amah chu an zui ta a." 
Luke5:12 Tin, heti hi a ni a, khaw pakhata a awm laiin ngai teh, mi pakhat phar bawm hi a awm a, ani chuan Isua a lo hmu a, lei siin a bawkkhup a, ""Lalpa, i duh chuan mi tithianghlim thei e,"" a ti a, a ngen chiam a." 
Luke5:13 Tin, ani chuan a han ban a, a dek a, ""Ka duh e, lo thianghlim tawh ang che,"" a ti a. Tin, chawplehchilhin a phar chu a lo reh ta nghal a." 
Luke5:14 Tin, a hnenah, ""Tumah hrilh suh, amaherawhchu puithiam va inentir la, i inthen nan Mosia ruat angin hlan rawh, mite hriattirna turin,"" a ti tlat a." 
Luke5:15 Nimahsela a chanchin thu chu a thang lehzual sauh a; mipui tam tak a thu hriat duh leh an nate tihdam duhin an rawn inkhawm chiam a. 
Luke5:16 Nimahsela ani chu thlalerahte a kal hrang a, a tawngtai thin a." 
Luke5:17 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chung lai chuan ni khat chu a zirtir a. Tin, a kiangah Pharisaite leh dan zirtirtute thuin an awm a, chungte chu Galili leh Judai ram khaw tin atang leh Jerusalem khua atanga lo chhuak an ni a; tin, mi tihdam nan Lalpa thiltihtheihna chu a hnenah a awm." 
Luke5:18 Tin, ngai teh, khum chawpin zeng pakhat an rawn zawn a; a hmaa dah turin zawn luh an tum a." 
Luke5:19 Tin, mipui avang chuan zawn luhna reng an hmu lo a, in chungah an lawn chho a, in chung atang in a lai takah, Isua hmaah, a khum chawpin an puh thlaktir a." 
Luke5:20 Tin, an rinzia chu a lo hmuhin a hnenah chuan, ""Mihring, i sualte ngaihdam a ni tawh e,"" a ti a." 
Luke5:21 Tin, lehkhaziaktute leh Pharisaite chuan, ""Pathian sawichhia hi tu nge maw a nih le? Pathian chauh lo chuan tuin nge sualte ngaidam thei ni?"" tiin an ngaihtuah a." 
Luke5:22 Chutichuan Isua'n an ngaihtuah chu a hria a, an hnenah chuan, ""In thinlungah eng nge in ngaihtuah?" 
Luke5:23 'I sualte ngaihdam a ni tawh,' tih leh 'Tho la, kein kal tawh rawh,' tih hi a eng nge sawi awl zawk ni?" 
Luke5:24 Engpawh ni se la, khawvelah Mihring Fapa hian sual ngaihdam theihna a nei tih in hriatna'n,"" a ti a, (zeng hnenah chuan) ""Tho la, i khum la la, i inah kal rawh; ka ti a che,"" a ti a." 
Luke5:25 Tichuan an mithmuhah a tho ta nghal a, a mutna chu a la a, Pathian fak chung zelin a inah a haw ta a." 
Luke5:26 Tin, an zain mak an ti hle a, Pathian an fak a, ""Vawiinah chuan thil mak tak kan hmu a ni,"" an ti a, an hlau ta em em a." 
Luke5:27 Tin, chung zawhah chuan a chhuak a, chhiah chawina hmuna thu, chhiahkhawntu pakhat a hming Levia a hmu a; tin, a hnenah, ""Mi rawn zui rawh,"" a ti a." 
Luke5:28 Tichuan engkim a kalsan a, a tho a, a zui ta a." 
Luke5:29 Tin, Levia chuan a inah Isua tan ruai ropui tak a theh a; tichuan chhiahkhawntute, mi dangte nen, mi tam takin anmahni an kilpui hlawm a." 
Luke5:30 Tin, Pharisaite, an lehkhaziaktute nen chuan a zirtirte chungah an phunnawi a, ""Engati nge chhiahkhawntute leh mi sualte hnena in ei a, in in le?"" an ti a." 
Luke5:31 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""Mi hriselte chuan daktawr an ngi lo a, mi bawrhsawmte zawkin an ngai a ni." 
Luke5:32 Mi fel takte lam tura lo kal ka ni lo a, mi sualte lama simtir tura lo kal ka ni zawk,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke5:33 Tin, anni'n a hnenah, ""Johana zirtirten chaw an nghei fo a, an tawngtai thin; Pharisai zirtirte pawhin chutiang bawkin an ti thin; nimahsela i zirtirte hian an eiin an in thin,"" an ti a." 
Luke5:34 Isua'n an hnenah, ""Mo hruaitute hnena a pasal tur chu a awm chhung zawng mo hruaitute chu in ngheitir thei thin em ni?" 
Luke5:35 nimahsela a pasal tur chu an hnen ata hruai bo nite a la thleng ang a, chu mi niah erawh chuan an la nghei ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke5:36 Tin, an hnenah tehkhin thu pawh a sawi a:""Tuma'n puan thar pawt thlain puan hlui an bel ngai lo, bel ang se la, a thar chu an titet ang a, a thar them leh a hlui chu a inpawl bawk hek lo ang." 
Luke5:37 Tin, tuma'n uain thar savun uain peng hluiahte an thun ngai lo, thun ang se la, uain thar chuan savun pengte chu a tawn puak ang a, a bua ang a, savun pengte pawh chu a lo chhia ang." 
Luke5:38 Uain thar chu savun uain peng tharahte an thun zawk tur a ni.Tin, tuma'n uain rei in zawhin a thar an duh ngai lo; 'A rei a tha zawk,' an ti si a,"" a ti a." 
Luke5:39 Tin, tuma'n uain rei in zawhin a thar an duh ngai lo; 'A rei a tha zawk,' an ti si a,"" a ti a." 
Luke6:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Chawlhni vawi khat chu, buh hmunahte a kal tlang a; a zirtirte chuan buh vuite chu an thliak a, an kutphahin an nuai fai a, an ei a." 
Luke6:2 Tin, Pharisai tute emaw chuan, ""Engati nge Chawlhnia tih thiang lo chu in tih ni?"" an ti a." 
Luke6:3 Tin, Isua'n a chhang a, ""Davida a riltam laia a thiante nena an thiltih kha, khang angte pawh kha in chhiar lo em ni?" 
Luke6:4 Khatia Pathian ina a luh a, puithiamte chauh lo chuan ei thian loh chhangdah chu a lak a, a ei a, a thiante hnena a pek ve thu kha,"" a ti a." 
Luke6:5 Tin, amah vekin an hnenah chuan, ""Mihring Fapa hi Chawlhni Lal a ni,"" a ti a." 
Luke6:6 Tin,heti hi a ni a, Chawlhni dangah chuan inkhawmna inah a lut a, a zirtir a; tin, chutah chuan mi pakhat kut ding lam zeng a lo awm a." 
Luke6:7 Tin, lehkhaziaktute leh Pharisaite chuan a hekna tur an hmuh theihna'n, Chawlhniin a tih dam dawn leh dawn loh an mit mei a." 
Luke6:8 Nimahsela ani'n an rilru chu a hria a, kut zeng hnenah chuan, ""Tho la, a laiah ding chhuak rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, a tho a, a ding chhuak ta a." 
Luke6:9 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""Chawlhniah hian tihthat nge thiang, tihchhiat? chhandam nge thiang, tihhlum? Ka zawt a che u,"" a ti a." 
Luke6:10 Tin, an za chuan a en vel a, a hnenah, ""I kut phar rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, a phar a, a kut chu a dam ta a." 
Luke6:11 Chutichuan an thin tawtin an puak keh lek lek a, Isua chunga an tihzia tur an inrawn ta a." 
Luke6:12 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chung lai chuan a chhuak a, tawngtai turin tlangah a kal a, Pathian hnenah a tawngtai zankhua a." 
Luke6:13 Tin, khawvar veleh a zirtirte chu a ko a; an zing ata sawm leh pahnih a thlang a, an hmingah pawh tirhkoh a vuah a:" 
Luke6:14 chungte chu Simona (Petera an vuah bawk kha) leh a unau Andria te, Jakoba leh Johana te, Philipa leh Bartholomaia te," 
Luke6:15 Matthaia leh Thoma te, Alphaia fapa Jakoba te, Simona, Zelota an vuah te," 
Luke6:16 Jakoba fapa Juda te, mi vervek Juda Iskariota te an ni." 
Luke6:17 Tin, an rualin a kal chhuk a, hmun zawlah a ding a, a zirtirte mipui tam tak nen, Judai ram zawng zawng ata leh Jerusalem khua ata leh, Tura leh Sidon khaw lama tuifinriat kam ata mi tam tak nen; chungho chu a thu ngai duh leh an nate intihdam duhin an lo kal a ni;" 
Luke6:18 Tichuan ramhuai bawlhhlawh sawisakte pawh an lo dam ta a. 
Luke6:19 Tin, a hnen ata thiltihtheihna a chhuak a, mi tin a tihdam avangin mipui zawng zawng chuan amah deh an tum a." 
Luke6:20 Tin, a dak chhuak a, a zirtirte chu a en a. ""Nangni rethei te u, in eng a thawl e; Pathian ram in ta a ni si a." 
Luke6:21 Nangni tuna riltamte u, in eng a thawl e; in la tlai dawn si a, ""Nangni tuna tapte u, in eng a thawl e; in la nui dawn si a." 
Luke6:22 Mihring Fapa avanga miten an huat che u a, an tuithlara an hau che u a, in hming a tha lo tiin an paih bo der hunah in eng a la thawl ang." 
Luke6:23 Chu mi niah chuan lawm u lang, hlimin zuang rawh u; ngai teh u, vanah in lawman a awm hnem si a; chutiang bawkin an thlahtuten zawlneite chunga an tih thin kha." 
Luke6:24 Amaherawhchu nangni mi hausate u, in chung a pik e; in thlamuanna in hmu tawh si a." 
Luke6:25 Nangni tuna tlaipuarte u, in chung a pik e; in ril a la tam dawn si a. ""Nangni tuna nuite u, in chung a pik e; lungngaiin in la tap dawn si a." 
Luke6:26 Mi zawng zawngin an fak hunah che u in chung a la pik ang, chutiang bawkin an thlahtuten zawlnei derte chunga an tih kha." 
Luke6:27 Ka thu ngaitute u, ka hrilh a che u, In hmelmate chu hmangaih u la, a hua che u chu an thatna tur ti u la," 
Luke6:28 anchhe lawhtu che u chu malsawmsak u la, a sawisatu che u chu tawngtaisak rawh u." 
Luke6:29 Biang lehlama bengtu che chu lehlam pawh dawh rawh; tin i puan laksaktua hnenah chuan i kawr lak pawh hnial suh. 
Luke6:30 A diltu apiang che hnenah pe rawh; tin, i sum laksaktu che hnenah chuan dil leh tawh suh." 
Luke6:31 Tin, miin in chunga an tiha in duh tur ang zelin mi chungah pawh ti ve rawh u." 
Luke6:32 Tin, in hmangaitute chauh in hmangaih hian, lawm eng nge in hlawh ang? mi sualte pawhin an hmangaitute chu an hmangaih thin a sin." 
Luke6:33 Tin, in chunga thate chungah chauh in that hian, lawm eng nge in hlawh ang? mi sualte pawhin chutiang bawkin an ti thin a sin." 
Luke6:34 \ Tin, hmuh leh beiseina hnen chauha thil in puktir hian, lawm eng nge in hlawh ang? mi sualte pawhin a ngai veka hmu leh turin mi sualte hnenah an puktir thin," 
Luke6:35 Amaherawhchu in hmelmate hmangaih u la, an thatna tur ti u la, puktir rawh u, beidawng hauh loin; tichuan in lawmman a tam ang a, Chungnungbera fate in ni bawk ang; ani chuan mi lawm nachang hre lote leh mi sualte a khawngaih thin." 
Luke6:36 In Pain mi a khawngaih angin mi khawngaih ve rawh u. 
Luke6:37 Sawisel suh u, chutichuan sawiselin in awm loing; tumah thiam loah ruat suh u, chutichuan thiam lohin in awm lo ang; ngaidam rawh u, chutichuan ngaihdamin in awm ang;" 
Luke6:38 pe rawh u, chutichuan pekin in awm ang, thahnemngai taka the a, beng muk a, sawi muk a, liam zawih zawihin, inmal chungah an pe ang che u. In tehna ngai bawkin an tehsak leh dawn si che u a,"" a ti a." 
Luke6:39 Tin, an hnenah tehkhin thu a sawi a, ""Mitdelin mitdel vek a hruai thei ang em? an pahnihin khuarkhurumah an tla dun lo ang em?" 
Luke6:40 Zirtir chu a zirtirtu chungah a awm lo; nimahsela mi tin an zir zawhin an zirtirtu angin an awm ang. 
Luke6:41 Tin, engati nge mahni mita khanchhuk awm chu ngaihtuah si loin, i unau mita hmawlh te tak te awm chu i hmuh ni?" 
Luke6:42 Mahni mita khanchhuk awm chu hmu si loin, i unau hnenah, 'Unau, i mita hmawlh te takte awm kha mi lak chhuahtir rawh,' engtin nge i tih theih le? Mi vervek! I mit ata khanchhuk kha la chhuak hmasa rawh, chutichuan i unau mit ata hmawlh te tak te lak chhuah tur chu fiah takin i hmu ang." 
Luke6:43 Thing tha reng reng rah chhiaa rah a awm lo; thing chhia lah rah thaa rah a awm hek lo. 
Luke6:44 Thing tin anmahni rah theuhvah a hriat a ni. Miin hruihlingnei kungah theipui an lo ngai lo, nghardai kungah grep rah an lo ngai bawk hek lo." 
Luke6:45 Mi tha chuan a thinlung ro bawm tha ata thil thate a theh chhuak thin a; mi sual chuan a thinlung ro bawm chhia ata thil chhiate a theh chhuak thin; a thinlunga khat liam chu a kain a sawi thin a ni si a. 
Luke6:46 Tin, nangni'n eng atan nge, ka thu zawm si lo a, 'Lalpa, Lalpa,' mi tih thin?" 
Luke6:47 Mi tin ka hnena lo kal a, ka thu hriaa zawm apiang chu tu ang nge an nih ka hriattir ang che u:" 
Luke6:48 In satu, thuk taka lai a, lungpui chunga lungphum rema ang chu an ni; tin, tui a lo lenin, tuizangkhauhin chu mi in chu a khawh a, a tinghing thei lo a, a sak ngun avangin.Amaherawhchu hriaa zawm lo chu, lung phum lo a, lei chung maia in satu ang chu a ni; tin, tuizangkhauhin chu chu a khawh a, a chim ta nghal a; chu mi in sawp chu nasa tak a ni,"" a ti a." 
Luke6:49 Amaherawhchu hriaa zawm lo chu, lung phum lo a, lei chung maia in satu ang chu a ni; tin, tuizangkhauhin chu chu a khawh a, a chim ta nghal a; chu mi in sawp chu nasa tak a ni,"" a ti a." 
Luke7:1 Tin, mite beng hriata a thu zawng zawng a sawi zawhin Kapernaum khuaah a lut a." 
Luke7:2 Tin, sipai za hotu tu emaw a bawih duh tak a dam lo a, a thi lek lek a." 
Luke7:3 Tichuan, Isua chanchin a hriat veleh a bawih rawn tidam tura ngen chiam turin a hnenah Judaho upate a tir a." 
Luke7:4 Tin, anni chu Isua hnenah an va thleng a, thahnemngai takin an ngen chiam a, ""Ani hi hei hi i tihsak tlak a ni e;" 
Luke7:5 kan hnamte a hmangaih a, kan inkhawmna in pawh aman min saksak a ni,"" an ti a." 
Luke7:6 Tichuan Isua chu an hnenah a kal ta a. Tin, in a thlen dawn dawnin, sipai za hotu chuan a hnenah a thiante a tir a, ""Lalpa, lo kal harsa suh, ka in chhung i luhna tlak a ni lo e;" 
Luke7:7 chuvangin i hnena lo kal tlak pawh niin ka inring lo a; thu chauh sawi la, ka naupang a dam mai ang." 
Luke7:8 Kei pawh mi thua awm ka ni a, ka hnuaiah sipaite an awm a; chu mi kha mi chu, 'Kal rawh,' ka tih leh, a kal thin; mi dang hnenah pawh, 'Lo haw rawh,' ka tih leh, a lo haw thin; ka bawih hnenah pawh, 'Hei hi ti rawh,' ka tih leh, a ti thin,"" a ti a." 
Luke7:9 Tin, Isua'n chung thu chu a hriatin amah chu mak a ti hle a, a hawi a, mipui a zuitute hnenah chuan, ""Ka hrilh a che u, Israelte zingah pawh heti ema rinna nasa hi ka hmu lo,"" a ti a." 
Luke7:10 Tin, a mi tirhte chu inah an haw leh a, bawih chu damin an hmu ta a." 
Luke7:11 Tin, rei lo tean khaw pakhat Nain an tihah chuan a kal a; a zirtirte leh mipui tam tak a hnenah an kal ve a." 
Luke7:12 Tin, kulh kawngkhar kianga a thlenin, ngai teh, mitthi an rawnzawn chhuak a, a nu fapa neih chhun a ni a, a nu chu hmeithai a ni si a; an khuate tam tak chu a hnenah an awm a." 
Luke7:13 Tin, Lalpa chuan hmeithai chu a hmuh veleh, a khawngaih em em a, ""Tap suh,"" a ti a." 
Luke7:14 Tin, a va hnaih a, hlang chu a khawih a; tichuan a zawntute chu an ding ta a. Tin, ""Rawlthar, Tho rawh, ka ti a che,"" a ti a." 
Luke7:15 Tin, mitthi chu a thu chhuak a, a lo tawng ta a. Tin, Isua chuan a nu hnenah a pe ta a." 
Luke7:16 Tin, mi zawng zawngin an hlau a, Pathian an fak a, ""Kan zingah zawlnei ropui tak a lo awm ta a ni,"" an ti a, ""Pathianin a mite a rawn tlawh ta a ni,"" an ti bawk a." 
Luke7:17 Tin, chu mi chungchang thu chu Judai ram zawng zawngah leh a kiang vel ram tinah a thang chhuak ta a." 
Luke7:18 Tin, Johana zirtirte chuan chung thu zawng zawng chu Johana an hrilh a." 
Luke7:19 Tichuan Johanan a zirtirte pahnih a ko a, Lalpa hnenah chuan a tir a, ""Lo kal tura chu i ni nge, mi dang kan la ngai ang?"" tiin." 
Luke7:20 Tin, mite chu a hnenah an lo thlen chuan, ""Baptistu Johanan, 'Lo kal tura chu i ni nge, mi dang kan la ngai ang?' tiin i hnenah min tir a ni,"" an ti a." 
Luke7:21 Tin, chung lai tak chuan Isua'n nate, hripui veite, ramhuai mante tam tak a tidam a, mitdel tam takte pawh an mit a tivar a." 
Luke7:22 Tin, an hnenah, ""Kal leh ta u lang, thil in hmuh leh in hriat hi Johana va hrilh rawh u; mitdelte an mit a lo var ta, kebaite kein an lo kal ta, pharte an lo thianghlim ta, bengngawngte pawh an beng a lo var ta, mitthite kaihthawhin an awm ta, pachhiaten Chanchin Tha hrilh an dawng ta." 
Luke7:23 Tin, tupawh ka chunga lungnih lohna hmu lo chu an eng a thawl e,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke7:24 Tin, Johana tirhkohte chu an hawn hnuin Isua'n mipui hnenah chuan Johana thu a sawi ta a, ""Eng en turin nge thlalera in kal chhuah kha? Luang thli chhem nghin maw?" 
Luke7:25 A nih loh leh, eng en tur berin nge in kal chhuh kha? Puan nem sin maw? Ngai rawh u, puan ropui sin leh mi nuamsate chu lal inahte a sin an awm." 
Luke7:26 A nih loh leh, eng en tur berin nge in kal chhuah kha? Zawlnei maw? A nih ngei kha, ka ti a che u, Zawlnei ai pawha ropui zawk -" 
Luke7:27 'En teh, ka tirhkoh i hmaan ka tir a ni, Ani chuan i hmaah i kawng a siam ang,' tih, a chanchin an ziaka kha, he mi hi a ni." 
Luke7:28 Hmeichhe hrin zingah Johana aia ropui zawk an awm lo; nimahsela Pathian rama mi te deuh pawh ani ai chuan an ropui zawk, ka ti a che u,"" a ti a." 
Luke7:29 Tin, mi zawng zawngin an hriatin, chhiahkhawntute nen, Johana baptisma lo chang tawh an ni a, Pathian an thiam a." 
Luke7:30 Pharisaite leh dan hretute erawh chu a hnenah baptisma lo chang tawh an ni ve lo a, anmahni tan Pathianin rem a ruatsak kha an duh lo." 
Luke7:31 Chutichuan Isua vekin, ""Tun lai chhuante hi eng nen nge ka tehkhin ang le? eng ang nge nih pawh an nih?" 
Luke7:32 Naupang, dawr hmuna thu a, 'Phenglawng kan tumsak che u a, in lam si lo a; kan tap vak a, in tap si lo a,' tia inauvate ang hi an ni." 
Luke7:33 Baptistu Johana chu a lo kal a, chhang a ei lo a, uain pawh a in lo a, nangni'n 'Ramhuai azawl a nih hi,' in ti a." 
Luke7:34 Mihring Fapa a lo kal a, a eiin a in a, nangni'n, 'En teh u, chaw heh mi, uain heh mi, chhiahkhawntute leh mi sulte thian saw!' in ti si a." 
Luke7:35 Nimahsela Finna chu a rah atangin a dikzia a lang a ni a ti a. 
Luke7:36 Tin, Pharisaite zinga mi pakhatin a hnena chaw eiah a sawm a. Tin, Pharisai inah chuan a lut a, chaw a kil a." 
Luke7:37 Tin, ngai teh, chu mi khuaa hmeichhe sual pakhat awm chuan, Pharisai inah chaw kilin a thu tih a hriat veleh alabasta bawmin hriak rimtui a rawn keng a," 
Luke7:38 a hnungah a kephah bulah chuan tap chungin a ding a, a mittuiin a kephah a lo far huh a, a samin a hru a, a kephah chu a fawp ngawih ngawih a, hriak rimtui chuan a chulh a." 
Luke7:39 Tin, a sawmtu Pharisai chuan chu chu a hmuh chuan a rilruin, ""He mi hi zawlnei a nih chuan a dektu hmeichhia hi tu nge a nih, mi eng ang nge a nih hriat awm tak lah ni, mi sual a ni sia,"" a ti a." 
Luke7:40 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, ""Simon, i hnenah thu kam khat sawi tur ka nei,"" a ti a, a chhang a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Sawi ta che, Zirtirtu,"" a ti a." 
Luke7:41 Tin, Isua'n, ""Tangka puktirtu tuin emaw leiba pahnih a nei a; pakhatin duli zanga a ba a, pakhatin sawmnga." 
Luke7:42 Tin, rulhna an nei lo a, a ngaihhnathiam ve ve a. Chutichuan chu mite chuan a tuin nge ani chu hmangaih zawk ang?"" a ti a." 
Luke7:43 Simona chuan, ""A ngaihhnathiam zual zawka chuan niin ka ring,"" a ti a, a chhang a. Tin, ani'n a hnenah, ""I ti dik e,"" a ti a." 
Luke7:44 Tin, hmeichhe lam chu a hawi a, Simona hnenah chuan, ""He hmeichhia hi i hmu em? I inah ka lo lut a, nangin ka kephah silna tur tui mi pe lo a, ani erawh hi chuan a mittuiin ka kephah a tihuh a, a samin a hru a ni." 
Luke7:45 Nangin fawh reng reng mi fawp lo; ani erawh hi chuan ka lo luh tirh ata ka kephah fawh a bang lo. 
Luke7:46 Nangin ka lu-ah hriak mi thih lo; ani erawh hi chuan ka kephahah hriak rimtui a chulh. 
Luke7:47 Chuvangin ka ti a che, A sual tam tak kha ngaihdamin a awm ta; ani pawhin a hmangaih ta em em a nih hi; amaherawhchu ngaihdam tlem chuan, tlemin a hmangaih thin,"" a ti a." 
Luke7:48 Tin, hmeichhe hnenah chuan, ""I sualte ngaihdam a ni ta,"" a ti a." 
Luke7:49 Tin, a chaw kilpuiten, ""Sualte pawh ngaidam hi tu nge maw ni le?"" an inti a.Tin, ani'n hmeichhe hnenah chuan, ""I rinna hi chhandam i nih phah a ni, thlamuang takin kal rawh,"" a ti a." 
Luke7:50 Tin, ani'n hmeichhe hnenah chuan, ""I rinna hi chhandam i nih phah a ni, thlamuang takin kal rawh,"" a ti a." 
Luke8:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, nakin deuhvah chuan Isua'n thu hril leh Pathian ram Chanchin Tha thlen chungin khaw lian leh khaw te te a fang zel a, a hnenah sawm leh pahnihte chu an awm a," 
Luke8:2 hmeichhia tute emaw ramhuai zawl dam leh te leh na dam lehte nen. Chung hmeichhiate chu Mari, a kaw chhung ata ramhuai pasarih chhuak Magdalini an tih te," 
Luke8:3 Heroda sum enkawltu Chuza nupui Johani te, Susani te, mi dang tam tak te nen an ni; chungte chuan mahni neihin an rawng an bawlsak thin." 
Luke8:4 Tin, mipui tam tak an rawn inkhawm a, khaw tina mi a hnena an lo kalin, tehkhin thuin thu a sawi a:" 
Luke8:5 Buh chi thehtu a buh chi thehin a feh a; tin, a theh laiin a then kalkawng dungah a tla a, miin an rap a, chungleng savaten an tlan zo ta a." 
Luke8:6 Tin, a then pialtlep chungah a tla a; tin, a tiah veleh a hnawn loh avangin a rawp ta mai a." 
Luke8:7 Tin, a then hnimhlingnei zingah a tla a, hnim chuan a to rualpui a, a dip ral ta a." 
Luke8:8 Tin, a then lei thaah a tla a, a lo to a, a leh zain a rah ta a,"" a ti a. Tin, chung thu chu a sawi laiin a au a, ""Tupawh hriatna tura beng nei chuan hre rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Luke8:9 Tin, a zirtirte chuan a hnenah, ""He tehkhin thu hi eng tihna nge ni?"" tiin an zawt a." 
Luke8:10 Tin, ani chuan, ""Pathian ram thurukte chu nangni hriat zawng phal a ni a, mi dang hnenah erawh chuan tehkhin thu chauhin sawi a ni; hmu mah se la, hmu lo an nih theihna'n, bengin hre mah se la, a ngaihna an hriat theih lohna'n." 
Luke8:11 Tehkhin thu kha hei hi a ni:Buh chi chu Pathian thu a ni. 
Luke8:12 Tin, kawng dunga mi chu thu hre tawhte hi an ni; tin, diabola chu a lo kal a, an awih loh a, chhandam an nih theih lohna'n an rilru ata chu a laksak thin." 
Luke8:13 Tin, pialtlep chunga mi chu he'ng mi hi an ni:an hriat veleh thu chu lawm taka pawmte hi; nimahsela zung reng an nei lo - rei lo te chauh an awih a, thlem hunin an bansan leh thin." 
Luke8:14 Tin, hnimhlingnei zinga tla chu he'ng mi hi an ni; an hriat hnuin an kal a, dam chhung khawsak lungkhamnate, hausaknate, nawmsaknate chuan a dip a, an rah puitling thin lo a ni." 
Luke8:15 Lei thaa mi erawh chu he'ng mi hi an ni:rilru fel leh thain thu an hria a, an vawng reng a, chhel takin an rah thin." 
Luke8:16 Tuma'n khawnvar halin belin an khuh lo, khum hnuaiah pawh an dah lo; a lut apiangin a eng an hmuh theihna'n a dahnaah an dah zawk thin a ni." 
Luke8:17 Puang lo tura zep engmah a awm si lo a, hriat loh tur leh lang lo tura thuhruk engmah a awm hek lo." 
Luke8:18 Chutichuan eng angin nge in hriat fimkhur rawh u; tupawh a nei apiang an pe belhchhah ang a; tupawh a nei lo apiang neia an inruat chhun pawh an laksak ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke8:19 Tin, a nu leh a unaute chuan Isua lam an rawn pan a, nimahsela mipui avang chuan a kiang an thleng thei si lo." 
Luke8:20 Tin, ""I nu leh i unaute nangmah hmuh tumin pawnah sawn an ding reng e,"" tiin an hrilh a." 
Luke8:21 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Heng Pathian thu hriaa awihte hi ka nu leh ka unaute an ni e,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke8:22 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chung lai chuan ni khat chu lawngah a chuang a, a zirtirte nen; tin, an hnenah, ""Dil ral lehlamah sawn i kai ang u,"" a ti a. Tichuan lawng chu an phelh a, an kal ta a." 
Luke8:23 Tin, an kal laiin Isua a lo muhil ta a; tin, dilah chuan thlipui a lo tleh chhuk phut a, an lawng chu tuiin a khat dawn a, hlauhthawnawm takin an awm ta a." 
Luke8:24 Tin, a hnenah an va kal a, an kaitho a, ""Zirtirtu, zirtirtu, kan boral dawn hi le,"" an ti a. Tin, ani chu a lo harh a, thli leh tuifawn chu a hau ta a; tin, a bang a, a reh ta mai a." 
Luke8:25 Tin, an hnenah, ""Khawiah nge in rinna?"" a ti a. Tin, an hlau a, mak an ti hle a, ""He mi hi tu nge ni le? thli leh tui lam pawh thu a pe a, an awih hi?"" an inti hlawm a." 
Luke8:26 Tin, Galili ram zawna Gerasin mite ram chu an thleng a." 
Luke8:27 Tin, khawmuala a chhuahin, khuaa mi ramhuaiman tuin emaw a rawn tawk a; chu mi chu rei tak puan reng reng sin loin a awm a.inah reng pawh a awm lo a, thlanahte a awm zawk thin a." 
Luke8:28 Tin, Isua a hmuh veleh a au a, a hmaah a bawkkhup a, aw ring takin, ""Isu, Pathian Chungnungbera Fapa, kei leh nang eng nge kan inzawlna awm? mi nghaisa lul suh ang che, ka ngen a che,"" a ti a." 
Luke8:29 (Isua'n ramhuai bawlhhlawh chu, chu mi kawchhung ata chu chhuak turin thu a lo pe tawh si a. Chu mi chu ramhuai chuan a man fo thin a ni; mitten khaidiat leh kawl an buntir a, an veng reng thin a; nimahsela a phuarnate a tichat a, ramhuaiin thlalerahte a hnawt chhuak thin)." 
Luke8:30 Tin, Isua'n, ""I hming eng nge ni?"" tiin a zawt a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Nuaia,"" a ti a, (a kawchhunga ramhuai tam tak an luh avangin)." 
Luke8:31 Tin, leilawta kal thu an hnena pe lo turin Isua hnenah an ngen a." 
Luke8:32 Tin, chutah chuan tlangah vawk rual tam tak an tla a; tin, a hnenah vawk kawchhungahte luh theihna thu an ngen a. Tin, ani chuan thu a pe a." 
Luke8:33 Tin, ramhuaite chu mi kawchhung ata an chhuak a, vawk kawchhungahte an lut a; tin, vawk rual chu khamah an tlan chhuk chiam a, dilah an tlan lut a, tui hakin an thi ta a." 
Luke8:34 Tin, a vulhtute chuan chu thil awmzia chu an hmu a, an tlan a, khuaah leh lovahte chuan an sawi a." 
Luke8:35 Tin, ""Engnge lo ni ta?"" ti a, en turin an chhuak hlawm a; tin, Isua hnen an lo thleng a, ramhuai chhuahsan hnua chu puan sina rilru pangngai puin, Isua ke bula thu an rawn hmu a; tichuan an hlau ta a." 
Luke8:36 Tin, a hretute chuan ramhuai man a tihdamzia thu chu chungho chu an lo hrilh a." 
Luke8:37 Tin, a vel Gerasin mite rama mi zawng zawng chuan an hlauh em em avangin, ani chu an hnen ata kal bo turin an ngen a; tin, lawngah a chuang a, a kir leh ta a." 
Luke8:38 Tin, ramhuai chhuahsan hnua erawh kha chuan Isua hnena awm reng a ngen a." 
Luke8:39 Nimahsela Isua'n, ""I inah haw la, Pathianin i tan thil a tihsak che hi a ropuizia va hrilh rawh,"" tiin a kaltir ta a. Tichuan a kal a, khawpui chhung zawng zawngah chuan Isua'n a tan thil a tihsak ropuizia chu a tlangaupui a." 
Luke8:40 Tin, Isua a lo kir leh chuan mipuiin amah an lawm a; amah lo nghak reng an ni hlawm si a." 
Luke8:41 Tin, ngai teh, mi pakhat a hming Jaira, inkhawmna in hotu chu a lo kal a, Isua ke bulah a bawkkhup a, a ina kalah a ngen a," 
Luke8:42 fanu mal kum sawm leh kum hnih emaw lai tur a nei a, chu mi chu thi chhawnga a lum reng avangin. Tin, Isua a kal laiin mipuihoin an nek huai huai a." 
Luke8:43 Tin, hmeichhe pakhat kum sawm leh kum hnih thi putin a dam lo a, a sum neih zawng zawng chu daktawrte lakah a dek ral zo tawh a, tumahin an tidam thei tawh si lo a;" 
Luke8:44 chu mi chu a hnungah a lo kal a, a puan hmawr a dek a; chawplehchilhin a thi put chu a lo reh ta nghal a." 
Luke8:45 Tin, Isua'n, ""Mi dek kha tu nge ni?"" a ti a. Tin, ""Kei chu ka ni lo,"" an ti theuh a, Petera leh a thianten, ""Zirtirtu, mipui hoin an nek huai huai chia, an chil huai huai che alawm,"" an ti a." 
Luke8:46 Nimahsela Isua'n, ""Tuin emaw zawng mi dek a ni, thiltihtheihna ka chhung ata a chhuak tih ka hre nghe nghe a sin,"" a ti a." 
Luke8:47 Tin, hmeichhia chuan a inthup theih loh a hria a, khur chungin a lo kal a, a hmaah a bawkkhup a, a deh chhan leh chawplehchilha a dam tak nghalzia chu mi zawng zawng hmuhah chuan a sawi ta a." 
Luke8:48 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Ka fanu, i rinna i dampui a ni e, thlamuang takin kal rawh,"" a ti a." 
Luke8:49 A la tawng lai mekin inkhawmna in hotu in ata chu mi pakhat a lo kal a, ""I fanu a thi ta, zirtirtu hi tihah duh suh,"" a ti a." 
Luke8:50 Isua erawh chuan chu thu chu a hriat chuan, ""Hlau suh, ring mai rawh, chutichuan a dam leh ang,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke8:51 Tin, in chu a va thlen chuan Petera te, Johana te, Jakoba te, naupang nu leh pate chauh loh chu tumah luh ve a phal lo." 
Luke8:52 Tin, an zain an lo tap tuar tuar a, an awm an chum an chum a; chutichuan ani chuan, ""Tap suh u, a thi lo e, a muhil a ni zawk,"" a ti a." 
Luke8:53 Tin, a thi tawhin an hre reng si a, an nuihsan ta mai a." 
Luke8:54 Isua erawh chuan a kut a chelh a. Chemte, tho rawh,"" a ti a, a ko a." 
Luke8:55 Tin, a thlarau chu a lo kir leh a, a tho ta nghal a; tin, englo ei tur pek thu a pe a.Tin, a nu leh a pa chuan mak an ti hle a; nimhsela ani chuan a thiltih chu tumah hrilh lo turin a ti tlat a." 
Luke8:56 Tin, a nu leh a pa chuan mak an ti hle a; nimhsela ani chuan a thiltih chu tumah hrilh lo turin a ti tlat a." 
Luke9:1 Tin, Isua'n sawm leh pahnihte chu a ko khawm a, ramhuai zawng zawng chunga thiltihtheihna leh thuneihna leh nate tihdam theihna a pe a." 
Luke9:2 Tichuan Pathian ram thu hril tur leh damlote tidamturin a tir chhuak ta a. 
Luke9:3 Tin, an hnenah, ""Zinna atan tiangte emaw, ipte emaw, chhang emaw, tangka emaw engmah keng suh u; kawr pahnih pawh nei suh u." 
Luke9:4 Tin, in thlenna in apiangah thleng reng zel ang che u." 
Luke9:5 Tin, a lawm lo apiang che u chu chu mi khua ata in chhuah hun chuan anmahni hriattirna turin inkephaha vaivut chu thing thla ang che u,"" a ti a." 
Luke9:6 Tichuan an kal ta a, khua an fang zel a, ram tinah Chanchin Tha an hril a, mi an tidam zel a." 
Luke9:7 Tin, lal Herodan a thiltih zawng zawng chu a lo hre ta a; thenkhatin, ""Johana kha a nung leh ta a nih hi,"" an tih a," 
Luke9:8 thenkhatin, ""Elija a lo inlar ta a nih hi,"" an tih avangin a mangang ta a." 
Luke9:9 Tin, Herodan, ""Johana chu a lu ka tan tawh kha; nimahsela heti kauva a thu ka hriat thina hi tu nge ni?"" a ti a. Tin, amah chu hmuh a tum ta a." 
Luke9:10 Tin, tirhkohte chu an lo hawn lehin, a hnenah an thiltihte an hrilh a. Tin, ani chu anmahni hruaiin Bethsaida khua an tihah chuan a kal hrang ta a." 
Luke9:11 Nimahsela mipuiho chuan an hria a, an zui zel a; tin, ani chuan anni chu a lo lawm a, Pathian ram thu a hrilh a, tihdam ngai apiang a tidam a." 
Luke9:12 Tin, khua chu a lo tlai dawn ta a; tin, sawm leh pahnihte chu an lo kal a, a hnenah, ""Kan kiang vel khuaahte leh loahte kalin, thlen in leh ei tur an hmuh theihna turin mipui hi kaltir ta che; hei thlaler hmuna awm kan ni si a,"" an ti a." 
Luke9:13 Ani erawh chuan anhnenah, ""Nangmahni'n ei tur pe rawh u,"" a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, ""Heng mi zawng zawng tan hian ei tur kan va leisak loh chuan, chhangper panga leh sangha pahnih chauh lo chu engmah kan nei lo,"" an ti a." 
Luke9:14 (Patling hlir pawh sangnga emaw lai an ni si a.) Tin, a zirtirte hnenah, ""Apawl pawlin thuttir rawh u, sawmnga lai zelin,"" a ti a." 
Luke9:15 Chutiangin an ti a, an thuttir ta vek a." 
Luke9:16 Tin, chhangper panga leh sangha pahnih chu a la a, van lam enin mal a sawm a, a phel a, mipui hmaa hlui turin a zirtirte hnenah chuan a pe a." 
Luke9:17 Tin, an ei a, an puar ta vek a; tin, an ei bang nawite chu bawmrang sawm leh pahnih an rut khat a." 
Luke9:18 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Isua'n amah chauha a tawngtai laiin a zirtirte chu a hnenah a awm a; an hnenah, ""Mipuiten tu nge a ni mi tih?"" tiin a zawt a." 
Luke9:19 Tin, anni chuan, "" 'Baptistu Johana a ni,' an ti chia; nimahsela thenkhat erawh chuan, 'Elija a ni,' an ti chia; thenkhatin, 'Hman lai zawlnei tua emaw a tho leh ta a ni,' an ti che,"" tiin an chhang a." 
Luke9:20 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""A nih leh, nangni'n tu nge a ni mi tih?"" a ti a. Tin, Petera'n, ""Pathian Krista chu,"" tiin a chhang a." 
Luke9:21 Tin, chu mi thu chu tumah hrilh loh tur ti tlatin thu a pe a;" 
Luke9:22 Mihring Fapa hian thil tam tak a tuar tur a ni a, upate, puithiam lalte, lehkhaziaktute duh lohin a awm tur a ni a, thahin a awm tur a ni a, ni thum niah kaihthawhin a awm bawk tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Luke9:23 Tin, amah vekin, mi zawng zawng hnenah, ""Tupawhin mi zui a duh chuan mahni hrehawm pawisa loin, ni tin a kraws puin mi zui rawh se." 
Luke9:24 Tupawh a nun humhim duh apiangin a chan ang a; tupawh keimah avanga a nun chan apiangin, chu mi ngei chuan a humhim ang." 
Luke9:25 Miin khawvel hi a pumin nei se la, intiboralin emaw intichhe si se la, a tan eng nge sawt ang?" 
Luke9:26 Tupawh keimah leh ka thu zahpui apiang, Mihring Fapa hian ama ropuina nen, a Pa ropuina nen, a vantirhkoh thianghlimte ropuina nen a lo kal hunah chuan chu mi chu a rawn zahpui ang." 
Luke9:27 Dik takin ka hrilh a che u, heta dingho a thente hi, Pathian ram an hmuh hma loh chuan thihna tem tawp lo tur an awm,"" a ti a." 
Luke9:28 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chung thusawi achin ni riat emaw laiah, Isua'n Petera te, Johana te, Jakoba te chu a hruai a, tawngtai turin tlangah a kal chho a." 
Luke9:29 Tin, a tawngtai laiin a hmel awmzia chu a lo danglam a, a silhfente chu a lo var a, mi enkhalh theiin a lo awm ta a." 
Luke9:30 Tin, ngai teh, mi pahnih amah nen an inbia a, chu mite chu Mosia leh Elija an ni a;" 
Luke9:31 ropuinaa inthuamin an inlar a, Jerusalem khuaa a thih tleitlakna tur thu an sawi a." 
Luke9:32 Petera leh a thiante erawh chu an muthlu a; tin, an harh veleh a ropuizia leh a hnena mi pahnih ding chu an hmu ta a." 
Luke9:33 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chu mite chuan Isua an then dawn laiin, Petera'n Isua hnenah, ""Zirtirtu, kan tan heta awm hi a tha e; bawkte pathum kan khawh ang e, i tan pakhat, Mosia tan pakhat, Elija tan pakhat,"" a ti a - a thusawi pawh hre loin." 
Luke9:34 Tin, chung thu chu a sawi laiin chhum a lo zing a, anmahni a hliah ta a; chhumah chuan an luh laiin an hlau a." 
Luke9:35 Tin, chhumah chuan aw a lo chhuak a, ""Hei hi ka Fapa, ka thlana chu a ni, ama thu ngai rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Luke9:36 Tin, aw chu a reh veleh Isua chu amah chauhin an hmu ta a. Tin, an ngawi reng a, chung lai vel chuan an thil hmuh chu tumah engmah an hrilh lo." 
Luke9:37 Tin, heti hi a ni a, atukah tlang ata chu an chhuk hnu chuan mipui tam takin amah chu an lo hmuak a." 
Luke9:38 Tin, ngai teh, mipui zingah chuan mi pakhat a au a, ""Zirtirtu, ka fapa en turin ka ngen a che, ka fapa neih chhun a ni si a." 
Luke9:39 Ngai teh, ramhuaiin a man thin a, a au chhuak thut thin:tichuan a chilphuante tla khawpin a sawisa thin a, nasa taka tihthitlinin a kalsan tawk thin." 
Luke9:40 Tin, i zirtirte hnenah hnawt chhuak turin ka ngen a; an thei si lo a,"" a ti a." 
Luke9:41 Tin, Isua'n, ""Thangthar rinna nei loa tihmawhte u, eng chen nge in hnenah ka awm ang a, ka ngaihtheih ang che u? I fapa chu hetah rawn hruai rawh,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke9:42 Tin, a lo kal laiin ramhuai chuan a titlu vak a, nasa takin a sawisa ta a. Nimahsela Isua'n ramhuai bawlhhlawh chu a hau a, naupang chu a tidam a, a pa hnenah chuan a kaltir leh ta a." 
Luke9:43 Tin, mi zawng zawngin Pathian ropuizia chu mak an ti hle a. Chutichuan mi zawng zawng chuan a thiltih zawng zawng chu mak an tih lai chuanin, Isua'n a zirtirte hnenah chuan," 
Luke9:44 Chung thu chu in bengah lut rawh se:Mihring Fapa hi mihringte kuta mantirin a awm dawn si a,"" a ti a." 
Luke9:45 Nimahsela a thusawi chu a ngaihna an hre lo a, an hriat theih lohna'n a inthup a ni, chu mi thusawi chanchin chu amah lah an zawt ngam si lo a." 
Luke9:46 Tin, ""Kan zingah tu nge ropui ber ang?"" tiin an lo inhnial a." 
Luke9:47 Tichuan Isua'n an rilrua an ngaihtuah chu a hria a, naupang te a kai a, a sirah a dintir a," 
Luke9:48 an hennah, ""Tupawh ka hming avanga he naupang te hi lawm apiang chu keimah mi lawm an ni ang; tupawh kei mi lawm apiang chu mi tirtu lawm an ni ang; in zavaia zinga te ber hi a ni, ropui ni,"" a ti a." 
Luke9:49 Tin, Johana chuan, ""Zirtirtu, tu emaw i hminga ramhuaite hnawt chhuak kan hmu a, kan zuinaah che a tel ve loh avangin ka khap ta a sin le,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke9:50 Isua erawh chuan a hnenah, ""Khap tawh suh u, tupawh nangni dodal lo chu in lama tang an ni si a,"" a ti a." 
Luke9:51 Tin, heti hi a ni a, amah hruai chhoh a hun dawnin, Jerusalem khuaa kal tumin a hawi tlat a," 
Luke9:52 a hmaah zualkote a tlantir a; tin, an kal a, amah lo buatsaihsak turin Samari mite khaw khatah an lut a." 
Luke9:53 Tin, a mitmei chu Jerusalem khaw lam pana a lan avangin amah an lo lawm lo." 
Luke9:54 Tichuan a zirtir Jakoba leh Johana chuan chu chu an hriat veleh, ""Lalpa, hengho kan vekna'n hian van ata mei ko thla i la rem i ti em?"" an ti a." 
Luke9:55 Ani erawh chu a han hawi a, a kamkhat a." 
Luke9:56 Tin, khaw dangah an kal ta a." 
Luke9:57 Tin, kalkawnga an kal laiin tuin emaw a hnenah, ""I kalna apiangah ka zui ang che,"" a ti a." 
Luke9:58 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, ""Sihalten kua an nei a, chungleng savate pawhin bu an nei a, Mihring Fapa erawh hi chuan a lu nghahna a nei lo,"" a ti a." 
Luke9:59 Tin, mi dang hnenah, ""Mi zui rawh,"" a ti a. Nimahsela ani chuan, ""Lalpa, ka pa mi vuitir zet rawh,"" a ti a." 
Luke9:60 Isua erawh chuan a hnenah, ""Mitthiin anmahni mitthi chu vui rawh se; nang chuan Pathian ram thu va hril darh zawk rawh,"" a ti a." 
Luke9:61 Tin, mi dang pawhin, ""Lalpa, ka zui ang che; amaherawhchu ka ina mite tawng thain mi thlahtir zet rawh,"" a ti a.Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, ""Tupawh leilehnaa kut nghata hnung lam en chu, Pathian rama mi ni tlak a ni lo e,"" a ti a." 
Luke9:62 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, ""Tupawh leilehnaa kut nghata hnung lam en chu, Pathian rama mi ni tlak a ni lo e,"" a ti a." 
Luke10:1 Tin, chu mi zawhah chuan Lalpa'n mi dang sawmsarih a ruat a, a kalna tur khaw tinah leh hmun tinah, a hmaah pahnih zelin a tir a." 
Luke10:2 Tin, an hnenah, ""Buh seng tur a tamhle a, nimahsela a thawktute an tlem; chutichuan a buh seng tura thawktu turte tir turin buh Neitupa hnenah chuan ngen rawh u." 
Luke10:3 Kal rawh u; ngai teh u, chinghne zinga beram no awm angin ka tirh che u hi." 
Luke10:4 Tangka ip te, ipte te, pheikhawk te keng suh u la, kalkawngah tumah chibai buk suh u." 
Luke10:5 Tin, in luhna in apiangah a hmasa berin, ""He inah hian thlamuanna thleng rawh se,"" ti ang che u." 
Luke10:6 Tin, chutah chuan thlamuan fa a awm chuan in thlamuanna thu chu a chungah a awm reng ang; a awm loh erawh chuan in chungah a lo kir leh ang." 
Luke10:7 Chu mi in hlirah chuan awm reng u la, an pek apiang che u eiin bar ang che u; hnathawktu chu hlawh hmu tlak a ni a. In tinah kal lawr suh ang che u." 
Luke10:8 Tin, khua in luhna apiangah an lawm che u chuan an hlui apiang che u chu ei ang che u;" 
Luke10:9 an khuaa damlo awmte pawh tidam u la, an hnenah, 'Pathian ram in kiangah a thleng ta,' ti ang che u." 
Luke10:10 Khua in luhna apiangah an lawm loh che u erawh chuan, an kawtthlerah kal chhuak u la," 
Luke10:11 'In khaw vaivut kan kephaha kai pawh hi in chungah kan tahfai hi; nimhsela Pathian ram in kiangah a lo thleng ta tih hi hre rawh u,' ti ang che u." 
Luke10:12 Ka ti a che u, chu mi niah chuan chu mi khuate tuar tur ai chuan Sodom khaw tuar tur chu a zia a awm zawk ang." 
Luke10:13 Korazin, i chung a pik e! Bethsaida, I chung a pik e! Nangmahnia thilmak tak tihte kha Tura leh Sidon khuaa tih ni se la, saiip puan sina vut zinga thuin an sim daih tawh ang." 
Luke10:14 Nimahsela ngaihtuah niah chuan nangni tuar tur ai chuan Tura leh Sidon khaw tuar tur chu a zia a awm zawk ang. 
Luke10:15 Tin, nang Kapernaum, van thlengin chawimawi i ni dawn em ni? Mitthi khaw thlenga nam thlak a sin i nih dawn." 
Luke10:16 Tupawh nangni thu ngai chu keima thu ngai a ni e; tupawh a duh lo che u chu kei mi duh lo a ni e; tupawh kei mi duh lo chu mi tirtu duh lo a ni e,"" a ti a." 
Luke10:17 Tin, sawmsarihte chu lawm takin an lo hawng a, ""Lalpa, ramhuaite pawh i hming avangin kan thu thuin an awm,"" an ti a." 
Luke10:18 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Tek anga Setana van atanga a lo tla kha ka hmu a sin." 
Luke10:19 Ngai teh u, rulte, khawmualkaikuangte rah theihna thu ka pe che u a; engmahin a tina tawp lo ang che u." 
Luke10:20 Nimahsela ramhuaite in thu thuin an awm avang hian lawm suh u; vana in hming ziak a nih avangin lawm zawk rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Luke10:21 Tin, chu mi lai tak chuan Isua chu Thlarau Thianghlimah a lawm em em a, ""Aw ka Pa, lei leh van Lalpa, nangin mi fing leh mi bengvarte hnenah he'ng thu hi i zep a, nausente hnena i puan avang hian ka fak a che; a ni, ka Pa, chutiang tih chu i ngaihin a tha a ni." 
Luke10:22 Ka Pain engkim mi kawltir tawh, Fapa chu tu nge a nih, Pa lo chuan tuma'n an hre lo; Pa pawh chu tu nge a nih, Fapa leh an hnena Fapain a puan duhnate chauh lo chuan tuma'n an hre lo,"" a ti a." 
Luke10:23 Tin, zirtirte lam a hawi a, arukin, ""In thil hmuhte hi a hmuhna mitte chu a vannei e!" 
Luke10:24 Ka ti a che u, zawlnei tam tak leh lal tam takte pawhin in thil hmuhte hi hmuh an chak thin a, nimahsela an hmu si lo; benga in hriatte pawh hi hriat an chak thin a, nimahsela an hre si lo a ni,"" a ti a." 
Luke10:25 Tin, ngai teh, dan hretu tu emaw a ding a, amah fiahna'n, ""Zirtirtu, chatuana nun neihna turin engtin nge ka tih ang?"" a ti a." 
Luke10:26 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Dan lehkhabuah eng nge ziak ni? chutah chuan eng nge i chhiar thin?"" a ti a." 
Luke10:27 Tin, ani chuan, ""Lalpa i Pathian chu i thinlung zawng zawngin, i thlarau zawng zawngin, i chakna zawng zawngin, i rilru zawng zawngin i hmangaih tur a ni,' 'Nangmah i inhmangaih angin i vengte pawh i hmangaih tur a ni,' tih hi,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke10:28 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""I chhang dik zet mai e; chutichuan ti la, i nung ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke10:29 Ani erawh chuan thiam inchantir a tum a, Isua hnenah, ""A nih leh, ka vengte chu tu nge ni?"" a ti a." 
Luke10:30 Isua'n a chhang a, ""Tu emaw Jerusalem khua atangin Jeriko khuaah a zuk kal dawn a, suamhmangte a tawk hlauh a, chu mite chuan a silhfen an hlihsak vek a, an vaw nek a, thi lek lekin an kalsan ta a." 
Luke10:31 Tin, puithiam tu emaw chu mi kawngah chuan a zuk kal kher a, a hmuh veleh kawng sir lehlamah a hel ta mai a." 
Luke10:32 Tin, chutiang bawkin Levia chi mi pakhat pawh chu mi hmun chu a lo thleng a, a hmuh veleh kawngsir lehlamah a hel ve ta mai a." 
Luke10:33 Amaherawhchu Samari rama mi tu emaw a zin kalin a awmna chu a lo thleng a, a hmuh veleh a khawngaihem em a." 
Luke10:34 A hnenah a va kal a, a pemahte chuan hriak leh uain a leih a, a tuam a, ama sa chungah a chuantir a, khualbukah a kalpui a, a enkawl ta a." 
Luke10:35 Tin, atukah chuan duli pahnih a phawrh a, khualbuk vengtu hnenah a pe a, 'Lo enkawl la, he mi baka i sen zawng chu ka lo kir leh hunah ka rawn rul leh ang che,' a ti a." 
Luke10:36 Chu mite pathum zingah chuan suamhmangho tawka vengte chu tu ber nge nia i rin? a ti a. 
Luke10:37 Tin, ani chuan, ""A khawngaihtu chu,"" a ti a. Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, ""Nang pawh chu ang bawk chuan va ti ve rawh,"" a ti a." 
Luke10:38 Tin, an zin pahin khaw engah emaw a lut a; tin, hmeichhe pakhat a hming Marthiin a lo thleng a." 
Luke10:39 Chu mi chuan laizawn pakhat a nei a, a hming chu Mari a ni a, chu mi chu Lalpa ke bulah a thu a, a thu a ngaithla a." 
Luke10:40 Marthi erawh chu rawngbawl ngawtin a buai hle a; tichuan a hnenah a lo kal a, ""Lalpa, ka laizawnnun keimah chauh rawngbawl tura mi thlahthlam hi pawi i ti lo em ni? Mi pui turin ti rawh khai,"" a ti a." 
Luke10:41 Tin, Lalpa'n, ""Marthi, Marthi, thil tam tak i ngaihtuah a, i buai a nih hi:thil pakhat chauh a pawimawh e; Marin chan tha chu a thlang a, chu chu laksak tur a ni lo e,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke10:42 thil pakhat chauh a pawimawh e; Marin chan tha chu a thlang a, chu chu laksak tur a ni lo e,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke11:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Isua khawii hmunah emaw a tawngtai a, a tawngtai zawh chuan a zirtir mi pakhatin a hnenah, ""Lalpa, tawngtai dan Johanan a zirtirte a zirtir ang khan min zirtir ve ta che,"" a ti a." 
Luke11:2 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""In tawngtai chuan heti hia ti ang che u, 'Kan Pa, I hming zahawm rawh se. I ram lo thleng rawh se." 
Luke11:3 Ni tin kan ei khawpin chaw min pe ang che. 
Luke11:4 Kan sualte min ngaidam ang che, Keini pawhin kan englo bate zawng zawng kan ngaidam thin a ni. Thlemnaah min hruai lut suh ang che,' a ti a." 
Luke11:5 Tin, amah vekin an hnenah, ""In zingan tuin emaw thian nei se la, zan laiah a hnena kalin, 'Thiana, chhangper pathum mi puktir rawh;" 
Luke11:6 Ka thian zinin mi rawn tlawh a, a hmaa hlui tur engmah ka nei si lo,' ti se la;" 
Luke11:7 in chhunga miin, 'Mi tibuai suh; tunah zawng kawng khar a ni a, ka fate pawh ka hnenah khumah an mu tawh a; thoin ka va pe thei lo va che,' tiin chhang sela -" 
Luke11:8 ka ti a che u, a thian a nih avangin thoin a va pe lo na a, a dil ngut ngut avangin thoin a duh zat apiang a va pe ang." 
Luke11:9 Chutichuan ka ti a che u, dil rawh u, tichuan an pe ang che u; zawng rawh u, tichuan in hmu ang; kik rawh u, tichuan an hawnsak ang che u." 
Luke11:10 Tupawh a dil apiang chuan an hmu thin a, tupawh a zawng chuan an hmu thin a, tupawh a kik chu an hawnsak dawn a ni." 
Luke11:11 Nangniho zinga pa hi, a fapain chhangper dil se la, tu nge lung pe ang? a nih leh, sangha dil se la, tu nge sangha aiah rul pe ang?" 
Luke11:12 A nih leh, artui dil se la, khawmualkaikuang a pe ang em ni?" 
Luke11:13 Chutichuan nangni mi sual mahin in fate thil tha pek nachang in hriat chuan, in Pa vana mi chuan a diltute chu Thlarau Thianghlim a va pe dawn em!"" a ti a." 
Luke11:14 Tin, Isua'n ramhuai tawngtheilo pakhat a hnawt chhuak a. Tin, heti hi a ni a, ramhuai chu a chhuah veleh tawngtheilova chu a lo tawng ta a; tichuan mipuihoin mak an ti hle a." 
Luke11:15 Nimahsela a then chuan, ""Ramhuai lal Beelzebula avangin alawm ramhuaite a hnawh chhuah thin ni,"" an ti a." 
Luke11:16 Tin, a thenin amah fiahna'n van ata hriatna an dil a." 
Luke11:17 Ani erawh chuan an ngaihtuahte chu a lo hria a, an hnenah, ""Khawii ram pawh mahni indo apiang an boral thin; chhungkhat pawh mahni indo chu an boral thin." 
Luke11:18 Setana pawh mahni a indo chuan, a ram engtin nge a din chhuah ang? - 'Beelzebula avangin ramhuaite a hnawt chhuak,' min ti si a." 
Luke11:19 Tin, kei hi Beelzebula avanga ramhuaite hnawt chhuak thin ka lo nih chuan in faten tu vangin nge an lo hnawh chhuah thin le? Chuvangin anni chu nangmahni ngaihtuahtu turte an ni ang." 
Luke11:20 Amaherawhchu, kei hian Pathian kutzung avanga ramhuaite hnawt chhuak thin ka nih chuan Pathian ram in hnenah a lo thleng tawh a ni ang." 
Luke11:21 Mi chak chuan hriam famkim kenga a in a ven chhung zawng, a sum chu him takin a awm reng thin;" 
Luke11:22 nimahsela a aia chak zawkin a rawn bei a, a hneh hun chuan a inrinna ralthuam famkim chu a chhuhsak a, a sum a laksak chu a sem darh thin." 
Luke11:23 Tupawh ka lama tang lo chu mi do a ni; tupawh mi lak khawmpui lo chuan a tidarh a ni. 
Luke11:24 Ramhuai bawlhhlawh chu mi kawchhung ata a chhuahin chawlna zawngin tui awm lohna hmunahte a vak a vak thin a; tin, chawlhna reng reng a hmu lo a, 'Ka chhuahna inah khan ka kir leh mai ang,' a ti a;" 
Luke11:25 tin a va thlen chuanin phiah faia cheimawiin a hmu a. 
Luke11:26 Chu veleh a va kal a, amah aia sual zawk ramhuai dang pasarih a rawn hruai a, chutah chuan an lut a, an awm reng thin a; chu mihringa awmze hnuhnung chu a hmasa aiin a lo tha lo zawk thin a ni,"" a ti a." 
Luke11:27 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chung thute chu a sawi laiin mipui zingan hmeichhia tu emaw a lo au chhuak a, a hnenah, ""I paina pum chu a hamtha e, i hnute hnek pawh,"" a ti a." 
Luke11:28 Ani erawh chuan, ""A ni, nimahsela Pathian thu hriaa zawmte hi mi hamtha an ni zawk e,"" a ti a." 
Luke11:29 Tin, mipuite chu a hnena an rawn inkhawm laiin Isua'n, ""Tun lai chhuante hi chhuan sual an ni; chhinchhiahna an zawng a; nimahsela Jona chhinchhiahna chauh lo chu an hnenah chinchhiahna reng reng pek a ni lo ang." 
Luke11:30 Jona chu Ninevi khuaa mite tan chhinchhiahna a lo ni ang khan, Mihring Fapa pawh tun lai chhuante tan hian chhinchhiahna a la ni ang." 
Luke11:31 Chhim lam lalnu kha ngaihtuah hunah chuan tun lai chhuante hnenah hian a tho ve ang a, thiam loh a chantir ang; Solomona fin ngaithla tur mahin kawlkil ata a lo kal si a; ngai teh u, Solomona aia ropui zawk hetah hian a awm a sin." 
Luke11:32 Ninevi khuaa mite chu ngaihtuah hunah chuan tun lai chhuante hnenah hian an ding ve ang a, thiam loh an chantir ang, Jona thuhril avangin an sim si a; ngai teh u, Jona aia ropui zawk hetah hian a awm a sin." 
Luke11:33 Tuma'n khawnvar an halin in hnuai pukah an dah ngai lo, hrai hnuaiah an dah ngai hek lo,mi lutte chuan a eng an hmuh theihna'n a dahnaah chuan an dah zawk thin a ni." 
Luke11:34 I taksa khawnvar chu i mit a ni; i mit a fim chuan i taksa pawh apumin a eng chhuak thin; a chhiat erawh chuan i taksa pawh a thim zo vek thin. 
Luke11:35 Chutichuan i chhunga eng awm chu thim a lo ni dah law maw fimkhur rawh. 
Luke11:36 Chutichuan taksa hi khawi lai mah thim loa apuma a en chhuah chuan, khawnvar eng nasa takin a en che angin a eng chhuak vek ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke11:37 Tin, a sawi laiin Pharisai pakhatin amah chu a hnena chaw eiah a sawm a; tichuan a lut a, chaw a kil a." 
Luke11:38 Tin, Pharisai chuan a chaw kil chu a hmuhin, chaw ei hmaa kut a sil lo chu kam a ti hle a." 
Luke11:39 Tin, Lalpa chuan a hnenah, ""Nangni Pharisaite'n no leh thleng pawn lam chu in silfai thin tak a; in kawchhung lam erawh chu hlepruk leh sualin a khat si a." 
Luke11:40 Mi ate u, pawn lam siamtuin chhung lam pawh a siam lo em ni?" 
Luke11:41 Nimahsela a chhunga thil awm chu mi rethei hnena pek atan hmang rawh u; tichuan ngai teh u, in tan engkim a thianghlim tawh a ni." 
Luke11:42 Nangni Pharisaite u, in chung a pik e! Pudina te, pardi te, thlai tinreng te sawma pakhat in pe thin a, felna leh Pathian hmangaihna chu in ngaihthah si thin; nimahsela chung chu a sin in tih tur ni, a dangte chu tih thulh chuang loin." 
Luke11:43 Nangni Pharisaite u, in chung a pik e! Inkhawmna inah thutphah tha berte leh dawr hmuna chibai bukte in ngaina si thin a." 
Luke11:44 In chung a pik e! Thlan tih hriat loh, a chunga hre loa mi an kal thinna ang chu in ni e,"" a ti a." 
Luke11:45 Tin, dan hretu pakhatin a hnenah, ""Zirtirtu, he'ng thu i sawi hi keini pawh min hau i nih hi,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke11:46 Tin, ani chuan, ""Dan hretute u, nangni pawh in chung a pik e! Thil phurh hrehawm takte mite in bel thin a, nangni chuan phurte chu in kut zungtang pakhat pawhin in khawih ngai si lo." 
Luke11:47 In chung a pik e! Zawlneiho thlan inte in sa thin a, in thlahtute thah an ni si a." 
Luke11:48 Chutichuan in thlahtute thiltihte chu in hriatpuiin in remtihpui a ni; anni'n an that a, nangni'n an thlan inte in sa si a." 
Luke11:49 Chuvangin Pathian finna pawhin, 'An hnenah zawlneite leh tirhkohte ka tir ang a, a then an that ang a, a then an tiduhdah ang;" 
Luke11:50 chutichuan Abela thisen chhuah achin Zakaria, maicham leh biak in inkara thia thisen chhuak thleng khan,zawlnei zawng zawng thisen, leilung pian tirh ata chhuak chu,tunlai chhuante chungah hian phuba an la thei ang,' a tih kha." 
Luke11:51 A ni, ka hrilh a che u, tun lai chhuante chungah hian phuba an la ang." 
Luke11:52 Nangni dan hretute u, in chung a pik e! Finna chabi chu in kal bopui a; nangni lah in lut si lo a, mi lut tur pawh in khap si a,"" a ti a." 
Luke11:53 Tin, chuta ta a chhuah chuan lehkhaziaktute leh Pharisaite chuan amah chu an tai ta ran a, thu tinreng an sawi luihtir a,a tawng sual hlauha man tumin an chang reng a." 
Luke11:54 a tawng sual hlauha man tumin an chang reng a. 
Luke12:1 Chutih chhunga mipui sang tam tak inrap nul nul khawp hial an rawn inkhawm chuan, Isua'n a hmasa berin a zirtirte hnenah, ""Pharisaite dawidim, vervekna lakah chuan fimkhur rawh u." 
Luke12:2 Lang lo tura thuhruk engmah a awm si lo; hriat loh tura zep pawh engmah a awm hek lo. 
Luke12:3 Chuvangin thima in sawi apiang kha engah an la hria ang a; pindan chhungrila beng bula in thusawi kha in chunga chuangin an la tlangaupui ang. 
Luke12:4 Tin, ka thiante u, ka hrilh a che u, 'Taksa tihlum a, chu mi hnua engmah dang ti leh thei tawh lote chu hlau suh ang che u," 
Luke12:5 Amaherawh chu tu nge in hlauh tur ka hrilh lawk ang che u:A tihhlum hnu pawha Gehena-a paih theihna thu neia chu hlau rawh u; a ni, ka hrilh a che u, amah mawlh chu hlau rawh u." 
Luke12:6 Chawngzawng panga dar tangka pahnihah an hralh thin lo em ni? nimahsela an zinga pakhat mah Pathianin a hmaih ngai si lo.
