Luke12:7 In samzaite lam pawh hi chhiar vek a ni a sin. Hlau suh u; chawngzawng tam tak aiin in hlu zawk a ni. 
Luke12:8 Tin, ka hrilh a che u, mite hmaa mi tan apiang Pathian vantirhkohte hmaah Mihring fapain a tan ve ang." 
Luke12:9 Nimahsela mite hmaa mi phat chu Pathian vantirhkohte hmaah phat a ni ve ang. 
Luke12:10 Tin, Mihring Fapa sawisel apiangte chu an sawiselna chu ngaihdamsak a ni ang; Thlarau Thianghlim meuh sawichhia erawh chu a sawichhiatna chu ngaihdamsak a ni lo ang." 
Luke12:11 Tin, inkhawmna ina mite, lalte, hotute hmaa an hruai hunah che u chuan 'Engtin nge, eng thuin nge ka chhan ang, eng thu nge ka sawi ang,' tiin lungkham suh ang che u;" 
Luke12:12 chutih hun takah chuan eng nge in sawi tur rem, Thlarau Thianghlimin a hrilh ang che u,"" a ti a." 
Luke12:13 Mipui zinga tuin emaw Isua hnenah, ""Zirtirtu, ka u hnenah, ro mi sem ve turin hrilh rawh,"" a ti a." 
Luke12:14 Nimahsela ani chuan a hnenah, ""Mihring, nangni chungah tuin nge roreltuah leh sum semtuah mi siam?"" a ti a." 
Luke12:15 Tin, an hnenah, ""Fimkhur u la, awhna reng reng lakah chuan inveng rawh u; sum ngah hi mihring dam chhan a ni lo e,"" a ti a." 
Luke12:16 Tin, an hnenah tehkhin thu a sawi a:""Mi hausa tu emaw a lo a hlawk em em a;" 
Luke12:17 tichuan a inngaihtuah a, 'Engtin nge ka ti ang aw? ka buh leh bal dah khawmna ka nei si lo a,' a ti a." 
Luke12:18 Tin, 'Heti hian ka ti the ang; ka buh inte ka thiat ang a, a aia lianin ka sa ang a; chutah chuan ka buh leh ka sum zawng zawng ka dah khawm ang." 
Luke12:19 Tin, ka thlarau hnenah, 'Thlarau, kum tam tak chhung atan sum tam tak i khawl hi; chawl la, eiin bar la, hlim takin awm rawh ka ti ang,' a ti a." 
Luke12:20 Nimahsela Pathianin a hnenah, 'Mi a, zaninah hian i thlarau an laksak dawn che a ni; i thil dehchhuahte kha tu ta nge ni ta ang le?' a ti a." 
Luke12:21 Mahni tana sum khawla Pathian lama ngah si lo chu, chuti chu a ni thin,"" a ti a." 
Luke12:22 Tin, a zirtirte hnenah, ""Chuvangin ka hrilh a che u, 'Engnge ka ei ang aw?' tiin in nunna thu leh, 'Engnge ka silhin ka fen ang aw?' tiin in taksa thu lungkham suh u." 
Luke12:23 Ei tur aiin nunna a thupui zawk a ni, silhfen ai pawhin taksa a thupui zawk a ni." 
Luke12:24 Choakte hi ngaihtuah rawh u, buh an tuh hek lo, an at hek lo, zem te, buh in te pawh an nei lo; nimhsela Pathianin a chawm si a; nangni chu savate ai chuan in hlut zawkzia mai chu!" 
Luke12:25 Tin, nangni zingh lungkham avangin tuin nge mahni dung lam tawng khata tisang chuang thei?""" 
Luke12:26 He mi te mah ti thei lo che u a, engati nge thil dang in lungkham thin?" 
Luke12:27 Tuktinpar thanzia hi ngaihtuah rawh u; hna an thawk lo, la pawh an kai hek lo; nimahsela ka hrilh a che u, Solomona meuh pawh a ropuina zawng zawnga a inthuam khan he'ng tuktinpar pakhat tluk pawh hian cheiin a awm lo." 
Luke12:28 Chutichuan ram hnim, vawiin anga nung, atuka thuka tuah leh mai tur mah, Pathianin chuti kauva a chei chuan, aw, nangni rin tlem te u, chu mi ai chuan silhfen a va pe dawn che u em!" 
Luke12:29 Tin, in ei tur te, in in tur te zawng suh u; tuilairap angin awm pawh awm suh u." 
Luke12:30 Khawvela hnam tinin chung thil zawng zawng chu an zawng thin a ni; chung chu in mamawh tih in Pain a hre reng si a. 
Luke12:31 Ama ram zawng zawk rawh u, tichuan chung thil pawh chu a pek belhchhah dawn che u nia." 
Luke12:32 Pawl tlemte u, hlau suh u; ram pek che u hi in Pa lawmzawng tak a ni." 
Luke12:33 In neih apiang hralh u la, mi retheite hnenah pe rawh u; vanah rukru kal lohnaah, sulrul ei chhiat lohnaah chuan tangka ip hlui thei lo te, sum ral thei lo te insiam rawh u." 
Luke12:34 In ro awmna apiangah in rilru pawh a awm dawn si a. 
Luke12:35 Puan veng rengin, in khawnvar pawh alh rengin awm u la;" 
Luke12:36 miin an pu lawi chaw ei a lo haw huna kawngkhar a rawn kik veleh a, lo hawn thei nghal tura an lo nghak reng ang hian awm rawh u." 
Luke12:37 An pu a lo kal hunah bawih lo nghak reng a hmuhate chu an eng a thawl ang; tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, ani chuan a puan a rawn veng ang a, anmahni chu chaw kilin a thuttir ang a, an rawng a rawn bawl ang." 
Luke12:38 Zan laiah emaw, thawh hunah emaw a lo kal a, chutianga a rawn hmuh chuan chu bawihte chu an eng a thawl ang." 
Luke12:39 Amaherawhchu hei hi hre rawh u, rukru a lo kal hun tur in neituin hria se la, a veng ang a, a in a rehpawhtir lo ang." 
Luke12:40 Nangni pawh inring rengin awm rawh u, in rin loh hunah Mihring Fapa a lo kal dawn si a,"" a ti a." 
Luke12:41 Tin, Petera'n, ""Lalpa, he tehkhin thu hi keimahni chauh nge mi hrilh, mi zawng zawng?"" a ti a." 
Luke12:42 Tin, Lalpa'n, ""Sum enkawltu rinawm, fing tak, a puin a hun apianga an chaw chan tur semsak turin a chhungte chunga hotua a siam tur chu tu ber nge ni ang le?" 
Luke12:43 A pu a lo kal hunah bawih chutiang tia a rawn hmuha chu a eng a thawl ang. 
Luke12:44 Dik takin ka hrilh a che u, a neih zawng zawng chunga hotuah a siam ang." 
Luke12:45 Amaherawhchu chu bawih chuan a rilruin, 'Ka pu a lo kal lawk dawn lo e,' tiin bawihnute, bawihpate lo vel se la, eiin barin lo rui ta se la," 
Luke12:46 chu bawiha pu chu a rin loh niah, a hriat loh laiin a lo kal ang a, bung hnihah a rawn chhuah ang a, mi rinawm lote chan ang a chantir ang." 
Luke12:47 Bawih, a pu duhzawng hre reng chunga lo inring si lo a, a pu duhzawng ang pawha ti lo chu vawi tam tak an vua ang." 
Luke12:48 Amaherawhchu hre lo chunga vuakna khawp thil ti chu vawi tlem te an vua ang. Tupawh tam tak an peka hnenah chuan tam tak an phut ang; tupawh tam tak an kawltira hnenah chuan tam deuh an phut ang. 
Luke12:49 Khawvelah mei thlak thla tura lo kal ka ni; tunah pawh kang tawh pang se la, ka va ti em!" 
Luke12:50 Nimahsela baptisma chan tur ka nei, chu mi tleitlak hma loh chu ka thaw a va ipik em!" 
Luke12:51 Khawvela rem lentir tura lo kal emaw mi ti elo? Hnai lo e, ka hrilh a che u, do lentir tura lo kal zawk ka ni;" 
Luke12:52 tun hnuah chuan chhung khatah mi panga an indo ang, pathumin pahnih, pahnihin pathum." 
Luke12:53 An indo ang a, pain a fapa, a fapain a pa; a nuin a fanu, a fanuin a nu; a piin a mo, a moin a pi,"" a ti a." 
Luke12:54 Tin, mipui hnenah pawh chuan, ""Thlang lama chhum chhuak in hmuh chuan, 'Ruah a sur dawn,' in ti nghal thin a; tin, a lo ni ngei thin." 
Luke12:55 Tin, chhim thli tleh in hriat chuan, 'Thaw a sa dawn e,' in ti thin a; tin, a lo ni ngei thin." 
Luke12:56 Nangni vervekte u, khawvel leh van awmzia pawh in hre fiah thiam si a, engati nge tun lai thil hi in hriat fiah thiam loh ni?" 
Luke12:57 Engati nge nangmahni'n a fel chu in ngaihtuah loh? 
Luke12:58 Tin, roreltu hmaa i khingpui nen inkal hunin, kal pahin a lakah fihlimna mawlh zawng hram rawh; chutilochuan roreltu hmaah a hruai lui ang chia, roreltu chuan mi man hotu a mantir ang chia, mi man hotu chuan tan inah a khung hlauh dah ang che.Ka hrilh a che, dar tangka dere te pawh i tlak kim hma loh chuan, chuta ta chu i chhuak lo hul hual ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke12:59 Ka hrilh a che, dar tangka dere te pawh i tlak kim hma loh chuan, chuta ta chu i chhuak lo hul hual ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke13:1 Tin, chutih lai tak chuan tute emaw an lo awm a, chu mite chuan Galili rama mi, Pilatan an thisen an Pathian biakna sa talhte zinga a telh sakate chanchin chu Isua an hrilh a." 
Luke13:2 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Chu Galili rama mite chu, chutiang thil an tuar avangin Galili rama mi zawng zawng aiin mi sual bik niin in ring em ni?" 
Luke13:3 Ni suh e, ka hrilh a che u, nangni pawh in sim loh chuan chutiang bawkin in boral vek ang." 
Luke13:4 Tin, Siloam in sangin mi sawm leh pariat a delhhlumte pawh kha, Jerusalem khuaa awmte zawng zawng aiin mi sual bik niin in ring em ni?" 
Luke13:5 Ni suh e, ka hrilh a che u, nangni pawh in sim loh chuan chutiang bawkin in boral vek ang,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke13:6 Tin, he tehkhin thu hi a sawi a:""Tuin emaw a grep huanah theipui phun pakhat a nei a; tin, a kungah chuan a rah a rawn zawng a, pakhat mah a hmu lo a." 
Luke13:7 Tichuan grep hrui enkawltu hnenah, 'Ngai rawh, kum thum chhung hian he theipui kungah hian a rah ka va zawng thin a, pakhat mah ka hmu si lo; kit rawh; enga tinge hmun pawh awha a awm reng ni?' a ti a." 
Luke13:8 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Ka pu, kumin tal hi awm se la, a velin ka lai ang a, ekin ka vur rih ang a;" 
Luke13:9 chu mi achina a rah chuan a tha ang, a rah loh erawh chuan kit mai ang che,' a ti a,"" a ti a." 
Luke13:10 Tin, chawlhniin ani chuan inkhawmna in pakhatah a zirtir a." 
Luke13:11 Tin, ngai teh, kum sawm leh kum riat ramhuai man chak loh vei hmeichhe pakhat a awm; chu mi chu a kun reng a, amah chuan a ding ngil thei tawp lo a." 
Luke13:12 Tin, Isua'n a hmuh veleh a ko a, a hnenah, ""Hmeichhia, i chak lohna chuan a thlah ta a che,"" a ti a." 
Luke13:13 Tin, a chungah a kut a nghat a; tichuan thawklehkhatan a ngil ta nghal a, Pathian a fak ta a." 
Luke13:14 Tin, Isua'n Chawlhnia mi a tihdam avangin inkhawmna in hotu chu a thinur a, mipui chu a bia a, an hnenah, ""Mihring hnathawhna tur ni ruk a awm alawm; chu mi chhungin lo kal u la, intidam rawh u, Chawlhnia lo kal loin,"" a ti a." 
Luke13:15 Lalpa erawh chuan a hnenah, ""Nangni vervekte u, Chawlhniin mahni sebawng emaw, sabengtung emaw a chaw eina ata phelhin, tui in turin in hruai chhuak theuh thin a ni lo em ni?" 
Luke13:16 He hmeichhia hi Abrahama fanu a ni si a, ngai teh u, Setanan kum sawm leh kum riat a man reng hi, Chawlhniah pawh he mi phuar hi han phelhsak lohzia em ni?"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke13:17 Chung thute chu a sawi laiin a hmelmate zawng zawng chu an zak ta a; mipui erawh chu a thil ropui tih zawng zawng avangin an lawm vek a. 
Luke13:18 Chutichuan ani chuan, ""Pathian ram chu eng ang nge ni? Eng chen nge the pawh ka tehkhin ang?" 
Luke13:19 Antam chi fang khat miin a laka a huana a theha ang chu a ni; chu chu a lo to a, thing a lo ni a, chungleng savate chu a zarahte chuan an riak a,"" a ti a." 
Luke13:20 Tin, ""Pathian ram chu eng nen nge ka tehkhin ang?"" a ti leh a," 
Luke13:21 Dawidim hmeichhiain a laka chhangphut tehkhawng thum zingah a zaa a thawh vek thlenga a phuma ang chu a ni,"" a ti a." 
Luke13:22 Tin, ani chuan zirtir chung zela Jerusalem khaw lam panin, khaw lian leh khaw tete a tlawh zel a." 
Luke13:23 Tin, tuin emaw a hnenah, ""Chhandamte chu tlem te em an nih?"" a ti a." 
Luke13:24 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Kawngka zimah chuan luh tum hram rawh u; ka hrilh a che u, mi tam takin luh an tum ang a, an lut thei si lo ang." 
Luke13:25 In neitu a thawh a, kawng a khar hnu chuan nangnin pawna dingin, 'Lalpa, kawng min hawnsak rawh,' tiin kawngkhar in rawn kik hunah, ani'n, 'Khawii lama mi nge in nih ka hre lo a che u,' tiin a chhang ang che u a;" 
Luke13:26 chutih hunah chuan nangni'n, 'I hmuhah pawh kan eiin kan bar tawh kha, kan kawtthlerahte pawh i zirtir thin kha,' in la ti ang a;" 
Luke13:27 tin, ani'n, 'Ka hrilh a che u, khawii lama mi nge in nih ka hre lo; nangni thil sual ti zawng zawngte u, ka hnen ata kal bo vek rawh u,' a la ti ang." 
Luke13:28 Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba te, zawlnei zawng zawngte chu Pathian ram chhunga awm in hmuh a, nangni pawna hnawh chhuah in nih in inhriat hunah, chutah chuan tah leh ha thial chu a awm ang." 
Luke13:29 Tin, chhak leh thlang, chhim leh hmar atangin an lo kal ang a, Pathian ramah an lo thu ang." 
Luke13:30 Tin, ngai teh u, hnuhnung berte pawh hmasa bera awm tur an awm a, hmasa berte pawh hnuhnung bera awm tur an awm,"" a ti a." 
Luke13:31 Chutih lai tak chuan Pharisai tute emaw an lo kal a, a hnenah, 'Chhuak la, heta ta kal bo rawh; Herodan tihhlum che a duh em em a ni,"" an ti a." 
Luke13:32 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Chu sihal hnenah chuan he thu hi va sawi rawh u; 'Ngai rawh, vawiinah nen, naktukah nen, ramhuaite ka hnawt chhuak ang a, nate pawh ka tidam ang a, atuk lehah ka zo ang." 
Luke13:33 Engpawh ni rawh se, vawiinah nen, naktukah nen, atuk lehah nen ka kal zel tur a ni; Jerusalem khaw pawn lamah zawlnei thih theih a ni lo e,"" a ti a." 
Luke13:34 Aw Jerusalem, Jerusalem! Zawlneiho thattu, i hnena an rawn tirhte lunga lo denghlumtu! Arpuiin mahni note a thla hnuaia awp khawm a tum ang in I fate vawi eng zat nge awp khawm ka tum kha! Nimahsela in duh si lo.En teh u, in in chu aruaka hnutchhiah che uin a awm ta. Ka hrilh a che u, 'Lalpa hminga lo kal chu a eng a thawl e,' in tih hma loh chuan mi hmu leh tawh lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke13:35 En teh u, in in chu aruaka hnutchhiah che uin a awm ta. Ka hrilh a che u, 'Lalpa hminga lo kal chu a eng a thawl e,' in tih hma loh chuan mi hmu leh tawh lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke14:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Chawlhniin Pharisai hotu pakhat ina chaw ei tura a kal chu an enthla reng a." 
Luke14:2 Tin, ngai teh, a hmaah chuan dam lo vung mi tu emaw a awm." 
Luke14:3 Tichuan Isua'n dan hretute leh Pharisaite chu a bia a, an hnenah, ""Chawlhniin tihdam a thiang nge thiang lo?"" a ti a." 
Luke14:4 Anni erawh chu an ngawi reng a. Tin, ani chuan damlo chu a chelh a, a tidam a, a kaltir ta a." 
Luke14:5 Tin, an hnenah, ""Nangni zingan in sabengtung emaw, sebawng emaw tuichhunchhuahah lo tla se la, Chawlhni pawhin tu nge hnuk chhuak nghal lo vang che u?"" a ti a." 
Luke14:6 Chung thu chu an chhang thei lo leh bawk a. 
Luke14:7 Tin, an mi sawmten thutphah tha ber an thlan thinzia a hmu a, an hnenah tehkhin thu a sawi ta a;" 
Luke14:8 Lawi chaw ei turin tuin emaw a sawm hunah che chuan thutphah tha berah thu suh ang che; chutilochuan i aia mi tha zawk a lo sawm hlauh ang a," 
Luke14:9 tichuan a sawmtu che chuan, 'He mi thutna tur hi kian rawh,' a rawn ti ang chia; tin, nang zak takin thutphah tha lo berah i thu leh si tur a ni." 
Luke14:10 An sawm hunah che chuan thutphah tha lo berah va thu zawk ang che; chutichuan a sawmtu che a lo kal hunah i hnenah, 'Thiana, thutphah tha deuvah thu rawh,' a ti thei ang che. Chutichuan i chaw kilpuite mithmuhah chuan chawimawiin i awm ang." 
Luke14:11 Inngaihlu apiang an tlawm ang a; inngaitlawm chu chawimawiin an awm ang,"" an hnenah a ti a." 
Luke14:12 Tin, a sawmtu hnenah pawh chuan, ""Chhunah emaw, zanah emaw ruai i theh hunin i thiante, i unaute, i laichinte, i veng hausate chu sawm suh ang che; chutilochuan an sawm ve leh ang chia, an rul leh kher ang che." 
Luke14:13 Ruai i theh hun chuan pachhiate, piangsualte, kebaite, mitdelte sawm zawk ang che;" 
Luke14:14 tichuan chung ang chuan rulhna tur che an neih loh avangin i eng a thawl ang; mi felte thawhleh hunah rulh leh i ni dawn si a,"" a ti a." 
Luke14:15 Tin, a chaw kilpui tuin emaw chung thu chu a hria a, a hnenah, ""Pathian rama chaw ei tur chu an eng a thawl e,"" a ti a." 
Luke14:16 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Mi tuin emaw zanah ruai ropui takin a theh a, mi tam tak a sawm a;" 
Luke14:17 tin, a ei hun chuan a mi sawmte hnenah, 'Lo kal rawh u, tunah engkim peih a ni ta e,' ti turin a bawih a tir a." 
Luke14:18 Tin, an zain thu khat vuain chhuanlam an nei vek a. A hmasa berin a hnenah, 'Lo ka lei ta a, a enin ka kal a tul a ni; mi khawngaih la mi han phatsak ang che,' a ti a." 
Luke14:19 Tin, mi dangin, 'Sebawng tuak nga ka lei ta a, a chhia a tha fiahin ka kal dawn a, mi khawngaih la mi han phatsak ang che,' a ti a." 
Luke14:20 Tin, mi dangin, 'Nupui ka nei ta a, chuvangin ka kal thei lo,' a ti a." 
Luke14:21 Tin, bawih chuan a pu hnenah chung thu chu a va hrilh a. Tin, in neitu chu a thinur a, a bawih hnenah chuan, ""Chhuak la, kawtthlerahte, kawmkarahte kal thuai thuai la, pachhiate, piangsualte, mitdelte, kebaite hetah rawn hruai lut rawh,"" a ti a." 
Luke14:22 Tin, bawih chuan, 'Ka pu, i thu mi pek ang khan ka ti tawh a, nimahsela hmun a la chuang ta fo,' a ti a." 
Luke14:23 Tin, a puin bawih hnenah chuan, 'Chhuak la, lamlianahte, daiahte kal la, ka in khahna'n mi han thlem lut hram rawh." 
Luke14:24 Ka hrilh a che, mi ka sawmte khan pakhat mahin ka ruaitheh an ei lo ang,' a ti a,"" a ti a." 
Luke14:25 Tin, mipui tam tak a hnenah an kal ve a; tichuan ani chu a hawi a, an hnenah," 
Luke14:26 Tupawh ka hnena lo kal chuan, a pa te, a nu te, a nupui te, a fa te, a unau te, a farnu te, ama nun nen lam pawh a huat loh chuan ka zirtir a ni thei lo ang." 
Luke14:27 Tupawh mahni kraws pua mi zui lo apiang chu ka zirtir a ni thei lo ang. 
Luke14:28 Nangni zingah tupawhin in sang sak tum u la, atirin thuin sak zawhna khawp sum in neih leh neih loh hre turin, a man tur chin tu nge chhut lo ang che u?" 
Luke14:29 Chutilochuan lung phum tawh zeta, a sak zawh theih loh chuan a en apiangin," 
Luke14:30 'He mi hian in a rel ting a, a sa zo thei si lo,' tiin an nuihsan dah ang e." 
Luke14:31 Tin, lal tuin nge lal dang do tura a kal dawnin, atirin thuin, mi singhnih nena amah do tura lo kal chu, mi singkhat nen a tawh ngam dawn leh dawn loh mi rawn lo ang?" 
Luke14:32 Chuti a nih loh vek leh, lal dang chu hla taka a la awm laiin inremna lam thutiam dil turin palai a tir ang." 
Luke14:33 Chutiang bawkin nangni zingah hian tupawh a neih zawng zawng kalsan lo apiang chu ka zirtir a ni thei lo ang. 
Luke14:34 Chi hi a tha e; nimahsela chi pawh a dak tawh chuan engin nge an tihal leh ang?Lei tan a tha lo ang, ek dur tan pawh a tha hek lo ang; miin an pai chhuak thin. Tupawh hriatna tura beng nei chuan hre rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Luke14:35 Lei tan a tha lo ang, ek dur tan pawh a tha hek lo ang; miin an pai chhuak thin. Tupawh hriatna tura beng nei chuan hre rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Luke15:1 Tin, chhiahkhawntute leh mi sualte zawng zawngin a thu hre turin a kiang an rawn pan a." 
Luke15:2 Tin, Pharisaite leh lehkhaziaktute chuan, ""He mi hian mi sualte a pawl a, an hnenahte chaw a ei ve thin,"" tiin an phunnawi ve ve a." 
Luke15:3 Tichuan ani'n an hnenah he tehkhin thu hi a sawi a: 
Luke15:4 Nangni zingah tupawhin beram za nei u la, an zinga pakhat hloh ang u la, thlalerah sawmkua leh pakuate chu hnutchhiahin a bo chu in hmuh leh hma loh zawng tu nge zawng lo ang che u?" 
Luke15:5 Tin, in hmuh leh chuan lawm takin in kokiah in pu thin." 
Luke15:6 Tin, in in thlen veleh in thiante leh in vengte in ko khawm a, an hnenah, 'Mi lawmpui rawh u, ka beram bo kha ka hmu leh ta e,' in ti thin." 
Luke15:7 Ka hrilh a che u, chutiang bawkin mi fel sawmkua leh pakua sim chuan tur nei lote ai chuan mi sual pakhat sim chungah hian vana mi an lawm zawk ang." 
Luke15:8 Tin, hmeichhia tupawh duli sawm neiin pakhat hloh ang se la, khawnvar hala in phiatin, a hmuh leh hma zawng tu nge ngun takin zawng lo ang?" 
Luke15:9 Tin, a hmuh leh chuan a thiante leh a vengte a ko khawm a, 'Mi lawmpui rawh u, ka duli hloh kha ka hmu leh ta e,' a ti thin." 
Luke15:10 Ka hrilh a che u, chutiang bawkin Pathian vantirhkohte hmaah chuan mi sual pakhat sim chungah an lawm thin a ni." 
Luke15:11 Tin, mi tuin emaw fapa pahnih a nei a;" 
Luke15:12 tin, a naupang zawk chuan a pa hnenah, 'Ka pa, ro ka chanai mi pe rawh,' a ti a. Tichuan a sum chu an hnenah a sem ta a." 
Luke15:13 Tin, ni rei lo te achinah a fapa naupang zawk chuan a chanai zawng zawng chu a la khawm vek a, khaw lam hla takah a kal ta a, chutah chuan nuam lutukin a awm a, a sum chu a khawral ta mai mai a." 
Luke15:14 Tin, a dehral zawh veleh, chu khaw lamah chuan tam nasa tak mai a lo tla a; ei tur a lo tlachham ta a." 
Luke15:15 Tichuan chu mi khaw lam mi mi pakhat a va bel a; chu mi chuan vawk chaw pe turin a lo lamah a tir a. 
Luke15:16 Tin, englo kawm vawkin an eite chuan intihpuar a duh em em a; tuma'n engmah an pe si lo." 
Luke15:17 Tin, a inhriat chhuah veleh, 'Ka pa hnena inhlawhfate chaw ei sen loha nei an tam vei nen, kei lah chu hetah riltamin ka thi dawn si a!" 
Luke15:18 Ka tho ang a, ka pa hnenah ka kal ang a, a hnenah, Ka pa, vana mi chungah leh nangma mithmuhin thil ka tisual e;" 
Luke15:19 i fapaa vuah tlak ka ni ta lo e; i hnena inhlawhfa pakhat angin mi siam ve rawh, ka ti ang,' a ti a." 
Luke15:20 Tichuan a tho a, a pa hnenah a kal ta a. Chutichuan hla taka a la awm laiin a pain a lo hmu a, a khawngaih em em a, a tlan a, a ir a chuktuah a, a fawp ngawih ngawih a." 
Luke15:21 Tin, a hnenah a fapain, 'Ka pa, vana mi chungah leh nangma mithmuhin thil ka tisual e; i fapaa vuah tlak ka ni ta lo e,' a ti a." 
Luke15:22 Nimahsela a pa chuan a bawihte hnenah, 'Puan tha ber kha han la thuai u la, han sintir rawh u; a kutah zungbun te, a kehphahah pheikhawk te buntir rawh u;" 
Luke15:23 sebawng no thau tak kha han la u la, talh rawh u, hlim takin i ei ang u;" 
Luke15:24 he ka fapa hi a thi a, a lo nung leh ta a nih hi; a bo a, kan hmu leh ta a nih hi,' a ti a. Tichuan hlim takin an awm tan ta a." 
Luke15:25 Tin, a fapa upa zawk chu loah a awm a; tin, in a lo thlen dawn chuan englo tum ri leh lam thawm a hre ta a." 
Luke15:26 Tichuan chhiahhlawh pakhat a ko a, 'Chu eng nge ni ta?' tiin a zawt a." 
Luke15:27 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, 'I nau a lo hawng a, him takin a hmuh leh avangin i pain sebawng no thau tak kha a talh a ni,' a ti a." 
Luke15:28 Tin, a thinur a, a lut duh ta lo a; tin, a pa a lo chhuak a, a thlem a." 
Luke15:29 Nimahsela ani chuan a pa hnenah, 'Ngai rawh, kumkhaw hei leh chen hi ka chawm chia, i thu lah hi ka awih lo ngai si lo a; ka thiante nena hlimna ka siamna turin kelte pawh mi pe ngai si lo a;" 
Luke15:30 nimahsela hei i fapa, nawhchizuarte hnena i sum eiral vektu hi a lo haw veleh ama tan sebawng no thau tak kha i talhsak vei a,' a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke15:31 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, 'Ka fapa, ka hnena awm reng i ni alawm, ka neih zawng zawng hi i ta a ni e.Hlim tak leh lawm taka awm tur a ni reng alawm; he i nau hi a thi a, a lo nung leh ta a; a bo a, kan hmu leh ta a ni si a,' a ti a,"" a ti a." 
Luke15:32 Hlim tak leh lawm taka awm tur a ni reng alawm; he i nau hi a thi a, a lo nung leh ta a; a bo a, kan hmu leh ta a ni si a,' a ti a,"" a ti a." 
Luke16:1 Tin, Isua'n a zirtirte hnenah he thu pawh hi a sawi a:""Mi hausa tuin emaw sum enkawltu a nei a; chu mi chuan a sum a khawhralsak mai mai kawngah a hnenah an hek a." 
Luke16:2 Tichuan ani chuan amah chu a ko va a hnenah, 'I chungchang thu ka hriat hi engtizia nge ni? I sum enkawl chanchin mi ziah vek rawh; tun achinah sum enkawltuah i tang thei tawh lo ang,' a ti a." 
Luke16:3 Tin, sum enkawltu chuan a rilruin, 'Ka puin ka sum enkawl mi ban dawn hi engtin nge ka tih ang aw? lei laih ka peih si lo a, kut dawh lah chu ka zak si a." 
Luke16:4 Sum enkawla mi ban huna an ina mi awmtirna'n ka tihzia tur ka hre ta,' a ti a." 
Luke16:5 Tichuan a pu sum batute chu a ko theuh a, a hmasa ber hnenah chuan, 'Ka pu lakah engzat nge i bat?' a ti a." 
Luke16:6 Ani chuan, 'Hriak tehkhawng zakhat,' a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, 'I lehkha la la, thu thuai la, sawmnga ziak rawh,' a ti a." 
Luke16:7 Tin, mi dang hnenah,'Nang engzat nge i bat?' a ti a. Ani chuan, 'Buh tehkhawng zakhat,' a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, 'I lehkha la la, sawmriat ziak rawh,' a ti a." 
Luke16:8 Tin, a pu chuan sum enkawltu fel lo chu a rem hriat avangin a fak ta a; eng fate aiin he khawvel fate hi an tun lai kawngah chuan an fing zawk a ni." 
Luke16:9 Ka hrilh a che u. Sum lemin in tan, thiante siam rawh u; sum a boral huna chatuana awmnaah chuan an awmtirna'n che u." 
Luke16:10 Tupawh tlemte chunga rinawm chu tam tak chungah pawh a rinawm thin; tupawh tlemte chunga rinawm lo chu tam tak chungah pawh a rinawm lo thin a ni. 
Luke16:11 Sum lem chungah mah in rinawm loh chuan tuin nge sum tak chu kawltir ang che u? 
Luke16:12 Mi dang ta chungah mah in lo rinawm tawh loh chuan nangmahni ta chu tuin nge pe ang che u? 
Luke16:13 Chhiahhlawh tumahin hotu pahnih rawng an bawl kawp thei lo; pakhat huain pakhat a duh ang, a nih loh leh, pakhat tannin pakhat a hmusit ang. Pathian leh sum rawng in bawl kawp thei lo e,"" a ti a." 
Luke16:14 Tin, Pharisai tangka ngaihlute chuan chung thu zawng zawng chu an hria a, an nuihsan a." 
Luke16:15 Tichuan ani chuan an hnenah, ""Mi mithmuha intifel mai in ni e; nimahsela Pathianin in rilru a hre si a; mihring zinga an chawimawi chu Pathian mithmuhin tenawm tak a ni si." 
Luke16:16 Dan leh zawlneite thu chu Johana lo awm thleng khan a awm a; chu mi achinah chuan Pathian ram Chanchin Tha hi an hril a, mi tin an lut lui theuh a." 
Luke16:17 Nimahsela Dan thu chhun han te tak te bo ai pawhin van leh khawvel boral a awl zawk e. 
Luke16:18 Tupawh nupui ma a, nupui dang nei apiang a uire a ni; tupawh mi nupui mak nei apiang a uire a ni." 
Luke16:19 Tin, mi hausa tu emaw a awm, puan sen duk leh puan zai sin tak a sin a, ni tin nuamsa takin a awm thin;" 
Luke16:20 tin, a hming Lazara kutdawh pakhat pan bawm khah luk, a kawngkhar bulah an muttir thin a," 
Luke16:21 mi hausa dawhkana ei nawi tla chu ei a duh a; uite lah chuan a pante an lo liahsak thin a. 
Luke16:22 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kutdawh chu a thi a, vantirhkohten an kalpui a, Abrahama angchhungah an dah a. Mi hausa pawh chu a thi a, phumin a awm ta a." 
Luke16:23 Tin, mitthi khuaah chuan na tak tuar reng rengin a awm a, a han vanvadak a, hla taka Abrahama a angchhunga Lazara awm nen a hmu ta a." 
Luke16:24 Tin, a au a, 'Ka pa Abraham, mi khawngaih la, Lazara kha han tir rawh, a kut zung hmawr tuiah chiah se la, ka lei tihdaihna turin; he mei alhah hian ka na em em a ni,' a ti a." 
Luke16:25 Nimahsela Abrahama'n, 'Ka fapa, nangin i dam lai khan thil tha i chang a, chutiang bawkin Lazaran thil tha lo a chan kha hre ta che; nimahsela tunah ani zawng hetah thlamuang takin a awm a, nang zawng i na a nih kha." 
Luke16:26 Heng lo pawh hi, heta tanga nangni hnena kal tumte chu an kal theih lohna tur leh tumah khata tanga keini hnena an lo kai theih lohna turin, keini leh nangni inkarah hian leikak nasa tak an siam tlat a ni,' a ti a." 
Luke16:27 Tin, ani chuan, 'A nih leh ka pa, ani chu ka pa ina kaltir tur talin ka ngen a che;" 
Luke16:28 pianpui mipa panga ka nei si a; he na awmnaah hian an lo kal ve dah ang e, thahnemngai takin hrilh the se,' a ti a." 
Luke16:29 Abrahama erawh chuan, 'Mosia leh zawlneite an nei alawm; chu mite thu chu ngai rawh se,' a ti a." 
Luke16:30 Tin, ani chuan, 'Ka pa Abraham, ni lo e; mitthi zinga mi meuh an hnenah kal zawk se la an sim ang,' a ti a.Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, 'Mosia leh zawlneite thu an ngaih loh chuan mitthi zinga mi tho leh mah se la an awih chuang lo ang,' a ti a,"" a ti a." 
Luke16:31 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, 'Mosia leh zawlneite thu an ngaih loh chuan mitthi zinga mi tho leh mah se la an awih chuang lo ang,' a ti a,"" a ti a." 
Luke17:1 Tin, Isua'n a zirtirte hnenah, 'Tluknate hi awm lo thei a ni lo; nimahsela tlukna awmtirtu chung chu a pik e!" 
Luke17:2 Heng mi tete zinga pakhat pawh tihtluk ai chuan, a titlutu tur nghawngah chuan buh rawt sawmna lung awrhtirin, tuifinriatah thlak se la, a tan a tha zawk tur a ni." 
Luke17:3 Fimkhur rawh u:I unauin thil a tihsual chuan zilh rawh; a inchhir chuan ngaidam rawh. 
Luke17:4 Ni khatah i chungah vawi sarih thil tisualin, vawi sarih, 'Ka inchhir e,' tia i lama a lo hawi leh chuan i ngaidam tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Luke17:5 Tin, tirhkohte chuan Lalpa hnenah, ""Kan rin tiphui deuh vang che,"" an ti a." 
Luke17:6 Tin, Lalpa chuan, ""Antam mu fang khat ang rin in neih chuan he thingtheihmu kung hnenah hian, 'Lo inphawi la, tuifinriatah lo inphun rawh,' in ti ang a, in thu a awih mai ang." 
Luke17:7 Nimahsela nangni zingah tupawhin lei letin emaw, beram vengin emaw bawih nei u la, a lo sul hawn veleh, 'Chaw rawn kil nghal rawh,' tu nge lo ti ang che u?" 
Luke17:8 'Ka ei tur mi siamsak la, puan veng la, ka ei ka bar zawh hma loh chu ka rawng mi bawl rawh; chu mi hnuah chuan nangin I eiin I bar ang chu,' tu nge lo ti zawk lo ang che u?" 
Luke17:9 In thu ang a a tih avangin in bawih hnenah lawmthu in hrilh ngai em ni? 
Luke17:10 Chutiang bawkin nangni pawhin in hnena thupek zawng zawng anga in tih hnuin, 'Bawih thahnem lo kan ni e; kan tih tur reng a ni kan tih ni,' ti rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Luke17:11 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Jerusalem khuaa an kal dawnin, Samari leh Galili ram chu a kal pel a." 
Luke17:12 Tin, khaw engah emaw a luh dawnin, mi, phar hlir, sawmin an tawk a; chu mite chu hla takah an ding a;" 
Luke17:13 tin, aw ring takin, ""Isu, zirtirtu, min khawngaih rawh,"" an ti a." 
Luke17:14 Tin, ani chuan anmahni chu a han hmuh chuan an hnenah, ""Puithiamte hnenah va inentir rawh u,"" a ti a. Tin, heti hi a ni a, an kal lai chuan an lo thiang ta hlawm a." 
Luke17:15 Tin, an zinga pakhatin a dam ta tih a inhriat veleh, aw ring taka Pathian fak chungin a kir leh ta a;" 
Luke17:16 tin, a ke bulah a bawkkhup a, a lawmthu a sawi a; chu mi chu Samari mi a ni nghe nghe a." 
Luke17:17 Tichuan Isua'n a chhang a, ""Mi sawm kha in lo thiang ta a ni lo'm ni? Pakuate kha khawiah nge?" 
Luke17:18 he awze mi mai hi Pathian fak tura lo kir leh a nih? a ti a. 
Luke17:19 Tin, a hnenah ""Tho la, kal rawh; i rinna hi i dampui a nih hi,"" a ti a." 
Luke17:20 Tin, Pharisaite'n Pathian ram lo thlen hun tur an zawh avangin an hnenah, ""Pathian ram chu hmuh theihin a lo thleng lo e;" 
Luke17:21 'En teh u, heta hi!' emaw, 'Sawta saw!' emaw an ti hek lo ang; ngai teh u, Pathian ram chu in zingah a awm a ni,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke17:22 Tin, zirtirte hnenah chuan, ""Mihring Fapa dam lai nite hi ni khat tal hi in hmuh duh nite a la awm ang, nimahsela in hmu tawh si lo ang." 
Luke17:23 Tin, in hnenah, 'En teh u, sawta saw!' 'En teh u, heta hi!' an ti ang che u; kal chhuak suh u la, anni chu zui hek suh u;" 
Luke17:24 van hnuai lehlama kawl a pheta van hnuai lehlam thlenga a eng thin ang hian, Mihring Fapa hi a lo kal niin a awm dawn si a." 
Luke17:25 Nimahsela chu mi hma chuan thil tam tak a tuar tur a ni a, tun lai chhuante duh lohin a awm bawk tur a ni." 
Luke17:26 Nova dam laia thil awmzia ang khan, Mihring Fapa a lo kal leh nite chuan a awm bawk ang." 
Luke17:27 Nova lawnga a luh a, tui a lo let a, an zaa a tihhlum tak vek ni kha a thlen hma loh zawng, an eiin an bar a, nupui pasal an innei thin a." 
Luke17:28 Chutiang bawkin Lota dam laiin a lo awm; an eiin an bar a, an leiin an hralh a, an chingin an sa thin a;" 
Luke17:29 nimahsela Sodom khua ata Lota a chhuah ni chuan van atangin mei leh kat a sur a, an zain a tihlum ta vek a." 
Luke17:30 Chutiang bawkin Mihring Fapa hi a rawn inlar ni chuan a awm ang. 
Luke17:31 Chu mi niah chuan tupawh a sum in chhunga awm a, amah in chunga awm chu chuh turin chhuk suh se; loa awm chu hawng bawk suh se." 
Luke17:32 Lota nupui hre reng rawh u. 
Luke17:33 Tupawh a nun humhimna zawng apiangin a chan ang a, tupawh a nun chan apiangin a humhim ang""." 
Luke17:34 Ka hrilh a che u, chu mi zanah chuan khum pakhatah mi pahnih an awm ang a, pakhat chu kal bopuiin a awm ang a, pakhat chu hnutchhiahin a awm ang." 
Luke17:35 Hmeichhe pahnih buh rawt sawmin an awm ang a, pakhat chu kal bopuiin a awm ang a, pakhat chu hnutchhiahin a awm ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke17:36 Mi pahnih loah an awm ang a, pakhat chu kal bopuiin a awm ang a, pakhat chu hnutchhiahin a awm ang.Tin, anni chuan a hnenah ""Lalpa khawiah maw?"" an ti a, an chhang a. Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Saruang awmna apiangah mulukawlhte pawh an awm ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke17:37 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah ""Lalpa khawiah maw?"" an ti a, an chhang a. Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Saruang awmna apiangah mulukawlhte pawh an awm ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke18:1 Tin,beidawng loin an tawngtai fo tur a ni tih hriattirna turin an hnenah tehkhin thu a sawi a:" 
Luke18:2 Khaw engah emaw roreltu pakhat a awm a, chu mi chuan Pathian a hlau lo a, mihring lah a ngaihsak hek lo;" 
Luke18:3 tin, chu mi khuaah chuan hmeithai pakhat a awm a; ani chu, 'Ka khingpui chungah phuba mi laksak rawh,' tiin a hnenah a kal fo a." 
Luke18:4 Tin, ani chuan rei fe a duh lo a; nimahsela nakinah chuan a rilruin, 'Pathian hlau loin mihring ngaihsak lo mah i la," 
Luke18:5 he hmeithai hian mi tihbuai avangin a phuba ka laksak teh mai ang, chutilochuan a lo kal fo hian mi la tihah hrep dah ang e,' a ti a,"" a ti a." 
Luke18:6 Tin, Lalpa vekin, ""Roreltu fel lo thu sawi chu hre rawh u." 
Luke18:7 An chungah zaidawh rih mah se la a mi thlan, achhun azana amah kotute phuba chu Pathianin a laksak lo ang em ni?" 
Luke18:8 Ka hrilh a che u, an phuba a laksak thuai ang. Nimahsela Mihring Fapa hi a lo kal hun chuan khawvelah hian rinna a rawn hmu ang em ni?"" a ti a." 
Luke18:9 Tin, mi fel tak nih inring a, mi dang zawng zawng hmusit thin tute emaw hnenah chuan he tehkhin thu pawh hi a sawi a:" 
Luke18:10 Mi pahnih Pathian biak inah tawngtai turin an han kal a; pakhat chu Pharisai a ni a, pakhat chu chhiahkhawntu a ni." 
Luke18:11 Pharisai chu a ding a, amah chauhin heti hian a tawngtai a:'Pathian, mi dang anga hleprute, fel lote, uirete ka nih loh avang leh, he chhiahkhawntu ang pawh hi ka nih loh avangin i chungah ka lawm e." 
Luke18:12 Chawlhkar khat apiangah vawi hnih chaw ka nghei thin a; ka neih apiang sawmah pakhat ka pe thin,' a ti a." 
Luke18:13 Chhiahkhawntu erawh chu hla takah a ding a, van lam pawh a dak ngam lo a, 'Pathian, kei mi sual hi mi khawngaih rawh,' tiin a awm a inchum a inchum ta zawk a." 
Luke18:14 Ka hrilh a che u, a hmasa aiin chu mi zawk chu thiam changing a inah a kal chhuk ta a.Inngaihlu apiang an tlawm ang a, inngaitlawm chu chawimawiin an awm ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke18:15 Tin, a deh atan a hnenah an nausente pawh an rawn hruai a; zirtirte erawh chuan chu chu an hmuh veleh an lo hau a." 
Luke18:16 Nimahsela Isua'n anni chu a ko a,""Naupang tete ka hnenah han kaltir u la,hnar suh u; Pathian ram chu hetiang mite ta a ni si a." 
Luke18:17 Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, tupawh Pathian ram chu naupang tein a lawm anga lawm lo apiang a chhungah an lut tawp loing,"" a ti a." 
Luke18:18 Tin, hotu tuin emaw a hnenah, ""Zirtirtu tha, chatuana nunna channa turin engtin nge ka tih ang?"" tiin a zawt a." 
Luke18:19 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, ""Engati nge tha mi tih? mi pakhat chauh lo chu tumah tha an awm lo, chu chu Pathian a ni." 
Luke18:20 Thupekte chu i hria alawm - 'Uire suh, Tual that suh, Ru suh, Dawtin hek suh, I nu leh i pa chawimawi rawh,' tihte hi,"" a ti a." 
Luke18:21 Tin, ani chuan, ""Chung thu zawng zawng chu ka naupan tet ata ka zawm zel thin,"" a ti a." 
Luke18:22 Tin, Isua'n chu chu a hriatin a hnenah, ""Tunah pawh kawng khat i la bak e; i neih zawng zawng hralh la, pachhiate hnenah sem rawh, chutichuan vanah ro i nei ang; tin, lo kal la, mi zui ang che,"" a ti a." 
Luke18:23 Ani erawh chuan chung thu chu a hriatin, a lungngai ta em em a, a hausak em avangin." 
Luke18:24 Tichuan Isua'n amah chu a en a, ""Sum ngahte chu Pathian rama luh a va harsa dawn em!" 
Luke18:25 Mi hausa Pathian rama luh aiin sanghawngsei, hriau benga luh tlang a awl zawk a ni,"" a ti a." 
Luke18:26 Tin, chu thu hriate chuan, ""A nih leh, tu nge chhandam ni thei ang le?"" an ti a." 
Luke18:27 Ani erawh chuan, ""Mihring tih rual loh hi Pathian tih theih a ni,"" a ti a." 
Luke18:28 Tin, Petera'n, ""Ngai teh, keini'n kan in leh lo kalsanin kan zui ta chia,"" a ti a." 
Luke18:29 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, tupawh Pathian ram avanga in emaw, nupui emaw, unaute emaw, nu leh pa emaw, fate emaw kalsan tawh phawt chu," 
Luke18:30 tun dam chhung la la hian a aia tam zawk hmu lo tur tumah an awm lo, hun lo la thleng tura chatuana nunna nen,"" a ti a." 
Luke18:31 Tin, sawm leh pahnihte chu a hnenah a hruai hrang a, an hnenah, ""Ngai teh u, Jerusalem khuaa kan chhoh dawn hi; zawlnei thu ziak zawng zawng kha Mihring Fapa chungah hian a thleng ang." 
Luke18:32 Jentailte hnenah an pe ang a, nuihza siamna'n an hmang ang a, zahthlak takin an siam ang a, chil an chhak ang;" 
Luke18:33 tin, an vua ang a, an tihlum ang; tin, ni thum niin a tho leh ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke18:34 Tin, chung thu reng reng chu a ngaihna an hre lo a; thusawi chu an lakah thupin a awm a, eng sawi nge a nih pawh an hre lo a." 
Luke18:35 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Jeriko khua a thlen dawnin, mitdel tu emaw kawng sirah kut dawhin a lo thu a;" 
Luke18:36 chu mi chuan mipui kal thawm a hria a, engtizia nge ni ta tih a zawt a." 
Luke18:37 Tin, anni chuan Nazaret Isua a kal a ni tih an hrilh a." 
Luke18:38 Tichuan ani chu, ""Isu Davida Fapa, mi khawngaih rawh,"" tiin a au ta a." 
Luke18:39 Tin, a hmasate chuan ngawi turin an hau a; nimahsela ani chu, ""Davida Fapa, mi khawngaih rawh,"" tiin a au zual sauh a." 
Luke18:40 Tichuan Isua a ding a, a hnena han hruai turin thu a pe a; tin, a kiang a lo thlen chuan," 
Luke18:41 I chungah engtia ka tih nge i duh? a ti a, a lo zawt a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Lalpa, hmuh theih ka duh,"" a ti a." 
Luke18:42 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, ""Hmu thei tawh ang che, i rinna hi i dampui a ni e,"" a ti a.Tin, thawklehkhatan a hmu thei ta nghal a, Pathian fak chung zelin amah chu a zui ta a; tin, mi zawng zawng chuan chu chu an hmuhin Pathian an fak a." 
Luke18:43 Tin, thawklehkhatan a hmu thei ta nghal a, Pathian fak chung zelin amah chu a zui ta a; tin, mi zawng zawng chuan chu chu an hmuhin Pathian an fak a." 
Luke19:1 Tin, Isua Jeriko khuaah a lut a, a chhun pelh dawn a." 
Luke19:2 Tin, ngai teh, mi pakhat a hming Zakaia a awm a; chu mi chu chhiahkhawn hotu a ni a, amah pawh a hausa hle a." 
Luke19:3 Tin, Isua chu mi eng ang nge a nih hmuh a tum a; mipui avngin, amah lah a tawi si a, a hmu thei lo a." 
Luke19:4 Tichuan a tlan khalh a, a en turin theipui kungah a lawn a; chu mi kawng chu a rawn zawh tur a ni si a." 
Luke19:5 Tin, Isua chu, chu mi hmun a thlen chuan a dak a, a hnenah, ""Zakai, lo chhuk thuai rawh; vawiinah i inah ka thleng tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Luke19:6 Tin, hmanhmawh takin a chhuk a, hlim takin amah chu a thleng ta a." 
Luke19:7 Tin, chu chu an hmuh veleh an zain, ""Mi sual hnena thleng turin a luh tak saw,"" an ti a, an phunnawi a." 
Luke19:8 Tin, Zakaia chu a ding a, Lalpa hnenah chuan, ""Ngai teh, Lalpa, ka sum zatve pachhiate hnenah ka pe ang a; tin, tu lakah pawh thil engpawh lo hlepru i la, a leh liin ka rul leh ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke19:9 Tin, Isua'n Zakaia chung thu a sawi a, ""Vawiinah he inah hian chhandamna a lo thleng ta, ani pawh Abrahama fapa a ni si a." 
Luke19:10 Boralte zawnga chhandam turin Mihring Fapa hi a lo kal a ni reng a ni,"" a ti a." 
Luke19:11 Tin, chung thute chu an ngaihthlak laiin, Jerusalem khua a hnaih tak avang leh Pathian ram lo lang nghal tur nia an rin avangin tehkhin thu a sawi tel a." 
Luke19:12 Chutichuan he'ng thu hi a sawi a:Mi tha tu emaw ram awpna thu laa lokir leh turin khaw lam hla takah a kal a. 
Luke19:13 A kal dawnin a bawihte sawm a ko a, an hnenah rangkachak tangka sawm a pe a, an hnenah, 'Ka lo thlen leh hma loh zawng hei hian lo sumdawng rawh u,' a ti a." 
Luke19:14 Nimahsela a khuaten an hua a, 'He mi hi kan lal atan kan duh lo e,' ti turin a hnungah palai an tlantir ve a." 
Luke19:15 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ram awpna thu chu a lak a, a lo kir leh chuan a bawih, tangka a pekate chu, an peipun chin hriatna'n a kohtir a." 
Luke19:16 Tin, a hmasa ber chu a lo kal a, 'Ka pu, i rangkachak tangka kha sawmin a pung e,' a ti a." 
Luke19:17 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, 'Bawih tha, i ti tha e; tlemte chunga i rinawm avangin khaw sawm chungah hotuah awm rawh,' a ti a." 
Luke19:18 Tin, a dawttu chu a lo kal a, 'Ka pu, i rangkachak tangka kha pangain a pung e,' a ti a." 
Luke19:19 Tin, ani chuan ani hnenah pawh chuan, 'Nang pawh khaw panga chungah hotuah awm rawh,' a ti a." 
Luke19:20 Tin, mi dang a lo kal a, 'Ka pu, en teh, hei i rangkachak tangka kha! Thlan hrukna puanin ka vawng reng a ni;" 
Luke19:21 mi in tak i nih avangin ka hlau che a ni; i dah loh pawh i la thin a, i tuh loh pawh i at thin si a,' a ti a." 
Luke19:22 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, 'Bawih sual, i tawngka chhuak ngeiin ka thiam lo ang che. Mi in tak ka nih a, ka dah loh pawh ka lak thin a, ka tuh loh pawh ka ah thin i hria maw?" 
Luke19:23 A nih ahnu, engati nge ka tangka hi sumdawng ina i dah loh? tichuan ka hawnin a pung nen ka thing tur a ni,' a ti a." 
Luke19:24 Tin, a kianga dingte hnenah, 'A rangkachak tangka kha laksak u la, rangkachak tangka sawm neitu hnenah pe rawh u,' a ti a." 
Luke19:25 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, 'Ka pu, ani zawngin rangkachak tangka sawm a nei alawm,' an ti a." 
Luke19:26 'Ka ti a che u, a nei apiang an pe belhchhah ang a, a nei lo chu a neih chhun pawh an laksak ang." 
Luke19:27 Nimahsela he'ng mi dotute, an lal atana mi duh lote hi, rawn hruai u la, ka hmaah that rawh u,' a ti a,"" a ti a." 
Luke19:28 Tin, chutiang thu a sawi zawh chuan Jerusalem khaw lam pan chhoin hma a hruai a." 
Luke19:29 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Bethphage leh Bethani khaw kiang, Oliv tlang an tih chu, a thlen chuan zirtirte zinga mi pahnih a tir a," 
Luke19:30 In hma zawn khuaah sawn va kal ta u la; chutah chuan in luh tirhin sabengtung no thlun, tuma la chuan ngai lohna in va hmu ang; chu chu phelh u la, han kai rawh u." 
Luke19:31 Tin, tupawhin, 'Engah nge in phelh?' tia an zawh che u chuan, heti hian sawi ang che u,'Lalpain a duh a ni,' tiin,"" a ti a." 
Luke19:32 Tin, a tirhte chu an kal ta a, an hnena a sawi ang ngeiin an va hmu a." 
Luke19:33 Tin, sabengtung no chu an phelh lai chuan a neituten an hnenah, ""Sabengtung no kha engah nge in phelh?"" an ti a." 
Luke19:34 Tin, anni chuan, ""Lalpain a duh a ni,"" an ti a." 
Luke19:35 Tichuan Isua hnenah an rawn kai ta a, tin, sabengtung no chungah chuan an puante an phah a, a chungah Isua an chuantir a." 
Luke19:36 Tin, a kalna tur kawngah chuan an puante an phah zel a." 
Luke19:37 Tin, an thlen dawn hnaihin, Oliv tlang liam dawnah chuan, zirtir mipui zawng zawng chuan a thilmak tih zawng zawng an hmuh avangin an lawm a," 
Luke19:38 aw ring takin, ""Lalpa hminga Lal lo kal chu fakin awm rawh se, vanah remthu leng sela, chungnung berah khian ropuina awm rawh se!"" tiin Pathian an fak ta a." 
Luke19:39 Tin, mipui zinga Pharisai thenkhatin a hnenah, ""Zirtirtu, i zirtirte hi zilh rawh,"" an ti a." 
Luke19:40 Ani erawh chuan, ""Ka hrilh a che u, hengte hi an ngawih reng chuan lungte tal an au chhuak tur a ni,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke19:41 Tin, a thlen dawn ruaiin khua chu a hmu ta a, a tah chhan a," 
Luke19:42 Aw, nang lul hian tun chhung hian thlamuanna tur thu hi lo hre teh hram la! Nimahsela tunah zawng i hmuh lohna'n a inthup tawh si a." 
Luke19:43 I ralten i velin lei kulh an siam ang a, an hual ang chia, i velin chhuah theih lohin an awm chhan ang chia, i chhunga i fanaute, nangmah nen leiah an paih vak ang che, i chhunga lung intiang reng reng an zuah lo ang;" 
Luke19:44 an fan lai che i hriat loh avangin chutiang nite chu i chungah a lo la thleng ang,"" tiin." 
Luke19:45 Tin, Pathian biak inah chuan a va lut a, englo zuartute chu a hnawt chhuak ta a;" 
Luke19:46 an hnenah, ""Ka in chu tawngtaina in a ni ang,' tih ziak a ni; nangni erawh chuan suamhmangte pukah in siam zawk hi,"" a ti a." 
Luke19:47 Tin, ni tin Pathian biak inah chuan a zirtir thin a. Tin, puithiam lalte leh, lehkhaziaktute leh vantlang zinga hotu deuhten, amah tihboral an tum a;nimahsela mitten a thu an ngaihthlak kham theih loh avangin a tih dan tur an hre thei lo a ni." 
Luke19:48 nimahsela mitten a thu an ngaihthlak kham theih loh avangin a tih dan tur an hre thei lo a ni. 
Luke20:1 Tin, ni khat chu heti hi a ni a, Pathian biak ina mite a zirtir a, Chanchin Tha a hrilh laiin,puithiam lalte leh lehkhaziaktute chu upate nen, a hnenah an lo kal thut a;" 
Luke20:2 tin, a hnenah, ""Tu thuin nge he'ng thil hi i tih? Tuin nge thu pe che? min hrilh rawh,"" tiin an zawt a." 
Luke20:3 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Kei pawhin thu kam khat ka zawt ve ang che u; mi hrilh rawh u." 
Luke20:4 Johana baptisma kha vana mi thu nge mihring thu? a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke20:5 tin, an inngaihtuah a, "" 'Vana mi thu,' kan tih chuan, 'Engah nge a thu in awih loh?' min ti si ang a." 
Luke20:6 Tin, 'Mihring thu,' kan tih chuan mi zawng zawngin lungin min deng ang; Johana chu zawlnei a nih an ring si a,"" an ti a." 
Luke20:7 Tichuan an chhang a, ""Khawi lam zawk thu nge ni kan hre lo,"" an ti a." 
Luke20:8 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""Kei pawhin tu thuin nge he'ng thil hi ka tih ka hrilh bik lo ang che u,"" a ti a." 
Luke20:9 Tin, vantlang hnenah he tehkhin thu hi a sawi ta a:""Tuin emaw grep huan a siam a, lo enkawltute hnenah thlawhhlawh turin a pe a, rei tak thang turin ram dangah a kal ta a." 
Luke20:10 Tin, a lawh hun chuan huana rah chu a chanai an lo pek turin lo enkawltute hnenah chuan bawih pakhat a tir a; nimahsela lo enkawltute chuan an lo vel a, kut ruakin an kaltir leh ta a." 
Luke20:11 Tin, bawih dang a tir leh a; chu pawh chu an lo vel leh bawk a, zahthlak takin an siam a, kut ruak vekin an kaltir leh ta a." 
Luke20:12 Tin, a pathumna a tir leh pek a; chu mi pawh chu an lo tisil a, an paih chhuak ta a." 
Luke20:13 Tin grep huan neitupa chuan, 'Engtin nge ka tih ang aw? Ka fapa duh tak ka tir mai ang, ani hi an lo zah mahna,' a ti a." 
Luke20:14 Nimahsela lo enkawltute chuan ani chu an lo hmuh veleh, 'He mi hi ro luahtu tur chu a ni; i that ang u, chutichuan a ro kan tan a ni ang,' tiin an inrawn a." 
Luke20:15 Tichuan grep huan ata chu an theh chhuak a, an tihlum ta a. Chutichuan grep huan neitupa chuan an chungah engtin nge a rawn tih ang?" 
Luke20:16 Lo enkawltute chu a rawn tiboral ang a, huan chu mi dangte a pe ang,"" a ti a. Tin, chu chu an hriatin, ""Chung em chu thleng suh se!"" an ti a." 
Luke20:17 Nimahsela ani chuan anniho chu a en a, ""He thu an ziak hi eng nge ni le? 'In satute lung duh loh kha, chu ngei chu a kila lung tangkai ber a lo ni ta,' tih hi." 
Luke20:18 Tupawh chu mi lung chunga tlu apiang an keh sawm ang; a delh lek phei chu a rawt dip ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke20:19 Tin, chutih lai tak chuan lehkhaziaktute leh puithiam lalten man an tum a; nimahsela mipui chu an hlau a; chu tehkhin thu chu anmahni demin a sawi tih an hre si a." 
Luke20:20 Tin, amah chu Ram Awptu rorelna leh thuneihnaa thlen atan, a thusawi sual la turin an chang reng a, enthlatu, mi tha anga awm derte chu an tir a." 
Luke20:21 Anni chuan a hnenah, ""Zirtirtu, dik takin thu i sawiin i zirtir a, tumah thlei bik loin tih tak zetin Pathian kawng thu i zirtir thin kan hria e;" 
Luke20:22 Kaisara hnena chhiah kan chawi a thiang nge thiang lo? tiin an zawt a. 
Luke20:23 Nimahsela ani chuan an ngamthlem a ni tih a hria a," 
Luke20:24 an hnenah, ""Duli mi entir rawh u,"" a ti a. ""Tu lem leh tu hming nge chuang hi?"" a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, ""Kaisara,"" an ti a." 
Luke20:25 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""A nih ahnu, Kaisara thilte chu Kaisara hnenah pe u la, Pathian thilte chu Pathian hnenah pe ta che u,"" a ti a." 
Luke20:26 Tichuan mipui hmaa a thusawi sual lak tur an hmu lo a; a chhanna chu mak an ti hle a, an ngawi reng a." 
Luke20:27 Tin, Saddukai, thawhlehna a awm lo tite zinga mi tute emaw a hnenah an lo kal a;" 
Luke20:28 a hnenah, ""Zirtirtu, Mosia'n tupawh a unaupain nupui nei se la, fa nei loin thi sela, a unaupain a nupui rochungin a unaupa tan chi a thlahsak tur a ni tih, min ziaksak a ni." 
Luke20:29 Aw le, sal sarih an awm a; a upa berin nupui a nei a, fa nei loin a thi a." 
Luke20:30 A pahnihna chuan a rochung a; 
Luke20:31 a pathumna chuan a rochung leh a; chutiang theuhin pasarihte chu fa nei loin an thi zel a. 
Luke20:32 Chu mi hnuah chuan hmeichhia pawh chu a thi ta a. 
Luke20:33 Chutichuan thawhleh hunah chuan a tu bera nupui nge ni ang? An pasarih chuan nupuiah an nei theuh si a,"" tiin an zawt a." 
Luke20:34 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""He khawvel mite hi nupui pasal an innei thin;" 
Luke20:35 nimahsela chung huna tel tlakah leh mitthi zing ata thawhlehnaa tel tlaka ruat apiangte chu, nupui pasal an innei dawn tawh lo e;" 
Luke20:36 thih pawh an thi leh thei dawn tawh lo a ni, vantirhkohte tlukin an awm dawn si a; thawhlehna fate an nih avangin Pathian fate an ni ang." 
Luke20:37 Mitthi kaihthawhin an awm tur tih Mosia pawhin, Hnim Buk thuah, Lalpa chu 'Abrahama Pathian, Isaaka Pathian, Jakoba Pathian,' a tih lai khan a hriattir kha." 
Luke20:38 Ani chu mitthi Pathian a ni lo a, mi nung Pathian a ni zawk e; ani ngaih chuan mi zawng zawng an nung vek si a,"" a ti a." 
Luke20:39 Lehkhaziaktu tuten emaw, ""Zirtirtu, i sawi dik zet mai,"" an ti a, an chhang a." 
Luke20:40 Thu dang an zawt ngam tawh si lo. 
Luke20:41 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Krista chu Davida fapa a ni tih engtiziaa sawi thin nge an ni?" 
Luke20:42 Fakna Hla Buah Davida ngeiin, Lalpa chuan ka Lalpa hnenah," 
Luke20:43 'I hmelmate i ke nghahchhana ka siam hma loh zawng ka ding lamah thu rawh,' a ti, a ti a." 
Luke20:44 Chutichuan Davida'n ani chu, 'Lalpa' a ti si a, engtin nge a fapa a nih theih le?"" a ti a." 
Luke20:45 Tin, mi zawng zawng hriatin a zirtirte hnenah," 
Luke20:46 Lehkhaziaktute lakah fimkhur rawh u; anni chuan kawr fual haa len an duh thin a, dawr hmunah chibai bukte, inkhawmna inah thutphah tha berte, ruaithehnaah hmun tha berte an ngaina thin a,hmeithai sum an ei a, tlang bumna'n rei tak an tawngtai thin; chungho chuan thiam loh an chang nasa lehzual ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke20:47 hmeithai sum an ei a, tlang bumna'n rei tak an tawngtai thin; chungho chuan thiam loh an chang nasa lehzual ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke21:1 Tin, a dak chhuak a, mi hausaten thawhlawm bawma an thawhlawm thlak lai a hmu a." 
Luke21:2 Tin, hmeithai rethei te tu emaw dar tangka dere pahnih rawn thlak a hmu bawk a." 
Luke21:3 Tichuan, ""Tih tak zetin ka hrilh a che u. Heng zawng zawng ai hian he hmeithai rethei te hian a thlak tam zawk;" 
Luke21:4 he'ng zawng zawng hian an neih liama mi thawhlawmah an thlak a ni; ani erawh hi chuan a duh lai tak, a intunnunna tura a neih chhun te a thlak vek a ni,"" a ti a." 
Luke21:5 Tin, tuten emaw Pathian biak in thu, lung tha tak leh thilpek khawma an cheimawizia chu an sawi laiin, ani chuan," 
Luke21:6 Heng in thil hmuh hi tihchim loha lung intiang reng reng hetah a awm lo ang; chutiang ni chu a la thleng ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke21:7 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Zirtirtu, chung chu engtikah nge a lo awm ang le? chung chu a lo thlen dawn hunah chhinchhiahna eng nge awm ang?"" tiin an zawt a." 
Luke21:8 Tin, ani chuan, ""An tihder lohna'n che u fimkhur rawh u. Mi tam takin, 'Krista chu ka ni,''A hun a thleng dawn ta e,' tiin keimah hming chhalin an lo kal ang; chu mite chu zui suh u." 
Luke21:9 Tin, indo thu leh buai thu in hriat hunin hlau suh ang che u; chung chu a thleng hmasa tur reng a ni, tawpna erawh chu a thleng nghal rih lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke21:10 Tin, an hnenah, ""Hnam hrang leh hnam hrang an indo ang a, ram hrang leh ram hrang an indo ang a;" 
Luke21:11 lir nasa takin a nghing a nghing ang a, hmun hrang hrangah tamte a tla ang a, hrite a leng bawk ang a; van atangin thil hlauhawmte leh chhinchhiahna nasa takte a lo awm ang." 
Luke21:12 Nimahsela chung thil zawng zawng thlen hma chuan an man ang che u a, inkhawmna inah leh tan inah hruaiin an tiduhdah ang che u a, keima hming avangin lalte leh hotute hmaah an hruai ang che u." 
Luke21:13 In thiam channa a la ni hlei hlei ang. 
Luke21:14 Chutichuan chhanna tur ngaihtuah lawk lo turin in rilruah intinghet rawh u; 
Luke21:15 in hmelma zawng zawngin an dodala an hnial theih lohna tur ka leh finna ka pe dawn si che u a. 
Luke21:16 Tin, in nu leh in pate, in unaute, in laichinte, in thiante pawhin an mantir ang che u; a then an tihhlumtir ang che u." 
Luke21:17 Keima hming avangin mi zawng zawng huat in ni ang. 
Luke21:18 Nimahsela in samzai khat pawh a boral lo ang. 
Luke21:19 In chhelin in nun in chhanhim ang. 
Luke21:20 Nimahsela sipaihoten Jerusalem khua an hual in hmuh hunah, a boral dawn tih hria ang che u." 
Luke21:21 Chutih hunah chuan Judai rama awmte chu tlangahte tlan bo rawh se; a chhunga awm te chuan chhuahsan rawh se; rama awmte chu a chhungah lut suh se. 
Luke21:22 Chung ni chu phuba lak ni a ni e, thu an ziak zawng zawng a lo thlen theihna turin." 
Luke21:23 Chung ni chuan raite leh nauno pawmte chung a pik ang, khawvelah hian hrehawm nasa tak a thlen dawn avang leh he chite chungah hian thinurna a thlen dawn avangin." 
Luke21:24 Tin, khandaihah an thi ang a, hnam tin hnenah sala hruaiin an awm ang; tin, Jentailte ni a kin hma loh zawng Jerusalem khua chu Jentailte rah behin a awm ang." 
Luke21:25 Tin, niah te, thlaah te, arsiah te chhinchhiahna a awm ang a; tuifinriat rum leh a fawn avangin leiah pawh hnam tin hrehawmna leh manganna a thleng ang;" 
Luke21:26 hlabar avang leh khawvela thil lo thleng tur chu ngaihtuah avangin mite an thidang ang; van thiltihtheihnate chu a nghing dawn si a. 
Luke21:27 Chutih hunah chuan Mihring Fapa hi thiltihtheihna leh ropuina nasa tak nen chhum zinga lo kal an hmu ang. 
Luke21:28 Tin, chung thil chu a lo thlen tirhin, en chho u la, dak chhuak rawh u; in tlanna tur chu a hnaih tak avangin,"" a ti a." 
Luke21:29 Tin,an hnenah tehkhin thu a sawi a:""Theipui kung leh thing zawng zawng en rawh u;" 
Luke21:30 a chawr no veleh chu chu in hmu a, nipui a lo thaw dawn tih mahniin in hre thin." 
Luke21:31 Chutiang bawkin nangni pawhin chung chu a lo thleng in hmuh hun chuan Pathian ram a lo hnai tawh tih hria ang che u. 
Luke21:32 Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, thil zawng zawng a thlen kim hma loh zawng tun lai chhuante hi an ral lo ang." 
Luke21:33 Lei leh van a ral ang a, ka thu erawh chu a ral lo ang." 
Luke21:34 Amaherawhchu fimkhur rawh u, chutilochuan ei puar lutuk nen, zu ruih nen, dam chhung khawsak ngaihtuah nen, in rilru a khat lutuk hlauh ang a, chu mi ni chuan thang awk angin thawklehkhatan in chungah a lo thleng phut ang." 
Luke21:35 Chutiang tak chuan lei chung zawng zawnga awmte chungah chuan a thleng theuh dawn a ni. 
Luke21:36 Chutichuan chung thil lo thleng tur zawng zawng chu pumpelh tlakah leh Mihring Fapa hmaa ding tlaka ruat in nih theihna turin, eng lai pawhin tawngtai chungin ngaihven rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Luke21:37 Tin, ni tin Pathian biak inah a zirtir thin a; zan tin a chhuak a, Oliv tlang an tihah chuan a riak thin a.Tin, zingah a thu ngaithla turin mi zawng zawng Pathian biak inah a hnenah an lo kal thin." 
Luke21:38 Tin, zingah a thu ngaithla turin mi zawng zawng Pathian biak inah a hnenah an lo kal thin." 
Luke22:1 Tin, chhang dawidim telh loh kut, Kalhlen Kut an tih chu a hnai ta a." 
Luke22:2 Tin, puithiam lal leh lehkhaziaktute chuan a tihhlumnazia an zawng a, vantlang an hlau si a." 
Luke22:3 Tin, sawm leh pahnihte zinga tel, Juda Iskariota an tiha chhungah chuan Setana a lut a." 
Luke22:4 Tichuan ani chu a va kal a, an hnena a mantir theihna turzia puithiam lalte leh hotute chu a va rawn a." 
Luke22:5 Tin, anni chu an lawm hle a, a hnenah tangka pek an tiam ta a." 
Luke22:6 Tin, ani chuan a remti a, mipui awm loh hlana mantirna remchang a zawng ta a." 
Luke22:7 Tin, chhang dawidim telh loh ni, Kalhlen Kutna beram no talna tur ni chu a lo thleng ta a." 
Luke22:8 Tichuan Isua'n, Petera leh Johana chu, ""Kalhlen Kut chaw kan ei turin min va buatsaihsak rawh u,"" tiin a tir a." 
Luke22:9 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Khawiah nge va buatsaih i la i duh?"" an ti a." 
Luke22:10 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Ngai teh u, khawpuia in luhin, mipa, bela tui puin a tawk ang che u a; a luhna inah zui lut ang che u." 
Luke22:11 Tin, in neitupa hnenah chuan, 'Zirtirtuin, ka zirtirteho nen Kalhlen Kut chaw kan eina tur, mikhual pindan chu khawiah nge? a ti a che,' ti ang che u." 
Luke22:12 Tichuan ani chuan pindan chungnung zau tak, bungraw awm sa, a entir ang che u; chutah chuan buatsaih ang che u,"" a ti a." 
Luke22:13 Tin, an kal ta a, an hnena a sawi ang takin an hmu a; tin Kalhlen Kut chaw chu an buatsaih ta a." 
Luke22:14 Tin, a ei a lo hun chuan ani chuan chaw a kil a, a tirhkohte chuan an kilpui ve a." 
Luke22:15 Tin, an hnenah, ""Ka thil tuar hmain he Kalhlen Kut chaw hi eipui che u ka duh em em a ni." 
Luke22:16 Ka hrilh a che u, hei hi Pathian rama a taktak a nih hma loh zawng, ka ei leh tawh dawn lo a ni,"" a ti a." 
Luke22:17 Tin, no a la a, lawmthu a sawi zawhin, ""Hei hi la u la, insem rawh u;" 
Luke22:18 ka hrilh a che u, tun achinah Pathian ram a lo thlen hma loh zawng grep hrui rah tui hi ka in leh tawh dawn lo a ni,"" a ti a." 
Luke22:19 Tin, chhang a la a, lawmthu a sawi zawhin a phel a, an hnenah a pe a, ""Hei hi ka taksa, in aia pek tura chu a ni; mi hriat rengna'n hei hi ti thin rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Luke22:20 Tin, zanriah ei zawhin chutiang bawkin no chu a la a, ""He no hi ka thisena thuthlung thar chu a ni, in aia chhuak tura chu." 
Luke22:21 Nimahsela ngai teh u, mi mantirtu tura kut chu ka hnenah dawhkan chungah a awm si a." 
Luke22:22 Mihring Fapa hi an ruat angin a kal dawn a ni; nimahsela a mantirtu tur mihring chung chu a pik e! a ti a. 
Luke22:23 Tin, anni'n, ""Kan zingah chutiang thil ti tur chu tu nge ni ang le?"" tiin an inzawt ta a." 
Luke22:24 Tin, an zingah tu ber nge ropui bera a ruat tih thu-ah inhnialna a lo chhuak a." 
Luke22:25 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Jentailho lalte chu an chungah an lal thin a; an chunga thu neitute chu 'Nu leh pa' an ti thin." 
Luke22:26 Nimahsela nangni zawng chutiang in ni lo ang; in zinga ropui ber chu nau zawk angin awm se la, lal ber chu rawngbawltu angin awm zawk rawh se." 
Luke22:27 Tunge ropui zawk, chaw kiltu nge rawngbawltu? Chaw kiltu a ni lo em ni? Nimahsela kei zawng in zingah rawngbawltu angin ka awm hi." 
Luke22:28 Thlemna ka tawh chhung zawng nangni mi awmpuitu in ni a; 
Luke22:29 tichuan ka rama ka dawnkana in eia in bar theihna turin, ka Pain ram mi ruatsak angin ram ka ruatsak che u a ni;" 
Luke22:30 tichuan Israel hnam sawm leh hnam hnih rorelsakin lalthutphahah in la thu ang. 
Luke22:31 Simon, Simon, ngai teh, Setanan buh thlei anga a thlei theihna tur che uin, nangniho hi a dil che u a sin;" 
Luke22:32 nimahsela i rin a bo lohna'n ka tawngtaisak che a ni; i hawi kir leh hunah nangin i unaute tinghet ang che,"" a ti a." 
Luke22:33 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Lalpa, i hnenah chuan tan inah leh thihnaah pawh kal ve ka huam a sin,"" a ti a." 
Luke22:34 Tin, ani chuan, ""Peter, ka hrilh a che, i mi hriatnaah hian vawi thum i phat hma loh zawng vawiinah hian ar a khuang lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke22:35 Tin, an hnenah, ""Tangka ip lo a, ipte lo a, pheikhawk loa ka tirh chhuah che u khan thil reng reng in tlachham em?"" a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, ""Chham lo,"" an ti a." 
Luke22:36 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Tunah erawh chuan tupawh tangka ip nei chuan keng rawh se, ipte nen; tupawh khandaih nei lo chuan a puan hralh se la lei rawh se." 
Luke22:37 Ka hrilh a che u, 'Ani chu mi sual zingah an chhiar tel ta,' tih ziak kha ka chungah a lo thleng tur a ni; ka chungchang thute kha a thleng zo dawn ta e,"" a ti a." 
Luke22:38 Tin, anni chuan, ""Lalpa, en teh, hei khandaih pahnih a awm,"" an ti a. Ani chuan an hnenah, ""A tawk e,"" a ti a." 
Luke22:39 Tin, ani chu a chhuak a, a dan pangngaiin Oliv tlangah chuan a kal ta a; zirtirte pawhin an zui a." 
Luke22:40 Tin, a hmun chu a va thlen chuan an hnenah, ""Thlemnaa in luh lohna'n tawngtai rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Luke22:41 Tin, lung den phak chinah emaw a va kal hrang ta a; tin, a thingthi a, a tawngtai a," 
Luke22:42 Ka Pa, rem i tih chuan he no hi ka hnen ata la sawn rawh; nimahse keia thu ni loin, nangma thu thu ni zawk rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Luke22:43 Tin, van atangin vantirhkoh pakhat a tiharh turin a hnenah a rawn inlar a." 
Luke22:44 Tin, a thlaphang em em a, thahnemngai lehzualin a tawngtai a; a thlan chu thi far lian tak angin leiah a far a." 
Luke22:45 Tin, a tawngtai zawha a thawhin, zirtirte hnenah chuan a lo kal a, an lungngaih avangin an lo muhil a hmu a;" 
Luke22:46 tin, an hnenah, ""engati nge in muthlilh? thlemnaa in luh lohna'n tho u la, tawngtai rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Luke22:47 Tin, a la sawi lai mekin, ngai teh, mipui an lo kal a, sawm leh pahnihte zinga tel Juda an tih chuan an hma a rawn hruai a; tin, fawh tumin Isua a rawn pan a." 
Luke22:48 Nimahsela Isua chuan a hnenah, ""Juda, Mihring Fapa hi fawpin I mantir dawn em ni?"" a ti a." 
Luke22:49 Tin, a vela mite chuan thil lo thleng tur chu an hriatin, ""Lalpa, khandaihin kan sat ang em?"" an ti a." 
Luke22:50 Tin, an zinga tuin emaw Puithiam Lalber bawih chu a sat a, a beng ding lam a sah thlaksak a." 
Luke22:51 Isua erawh chuan, ""A tawk e,"" a ti a. Tin, a beng chu a dek a, a tidam ta a." 
Luke22:52 Tin, Isua'n a hnena lo kal puithiam lalte, Pathian biak in hotute leh upate hnenah chuan,""Khandaihte, taltumte kengin suamhmang man tur ang rengin, in lo chhuak a ni maw?" 
Luke22:53 Pathian biak ina in hnena ni tin ka awm laite khan mi man tumin mi ban si lo a; nimahsela tun hi in chet hun a ni e, thim thu neihna nen,"" a ti a." 
Luke22:54 Tin, an man a, an hruai a, Puithiam Lalber inah chuan an hruai lut ta a. Tin, Petera'n hla tak atangin a zui a." 
Luke22:55 Tin, in hual chhung kawtlaiah mei an chhem a, an thu khawm a, Petera chu an zingah a va thu ve a." 
Luke22:56 Tin, mei enga a thut laiin nula tuin emaw a hmu a, a melh reng a, ""He mi pawh hi a hnena awm kha a nih hi,"" a ti a." 
Luke22:57 Ani erawh chuan, ""Hmeichhia, ani chu ka hre lo e,"" tiin a pha a." 
Luke22:58 Tin, nakin deuhvah mi dangin a rawn hmu leh a, ""Nang pawh an zinga mi i nih hi,"" a ti a. Petera erawh chuan, ""Mihring, ka ni lo e,"" a ti a." 
Luke22:59 Tin, darkar khat lai chinah chuan mi dangin, ""He mi pawh hi a hnena awm kha a ni ngei mai; Galili rama mi a ni alawm"" a ti tlat a." 
Luke22:60 Tin, Petera'n, ""Mihring, i thusawi chu ka hre lo e,"" a ti a. Tin, thawklehkhatan, a tawng lai tak chuan ar a khuang ta nghal a." 
Luke22:61 Tin, Lalpa chu a hawi a, Petera chu a en a. Tin, Petera chuan Lalpa'n, ""Vawiinah hian ar a khuan hmain vawi thum mi phat ang,"" a hnenah a tih thu kha a lo hre chhuak leh ta a." 
Luke22:62 Tin, a chhuak a, a tap ta zawih zawih a." 
Luke22:63 Tin, Isua chelhtuten nuihza siamna'n an hmang a, an vua a." 
Luke22:64 Tin, a mit an tuam a, ""Sawi rawh, tu nge vua che?"" tiin an zawt thin a." 
Luke22:65 Tin, thu dang tam tak pawhin an sawichhiain an hau a." 
Luke22:66 Tin, khawvar veleh vantlang upaho, puithiam lalte leh lehkhaziaktute chu an rawn inkhawm a, an rorelnaah chuan an hruai a," 
Luke22:67 Krista i nih zet chuan min hrilh rawh,"" an ti a. Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Hrilh che u mah i la in awih lo ang;" 
Luke22:68 zawt che u mah i la in chhang lo ang. 
Luke22:69 Nimahsela tun achinah chuan Mihring Fapa hi Pathian thiltihtheihna ding lamah a thu tawh ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke22:70 Tin, an zain, ""Nang hi Pathian Fapa chu i ni em ni le?"" an ti a. Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Ni e,"" a ti a.Tin, anni chuan, ""Eng hriatna dang nge kan ngaih tawh ang? Keimahni ngeiin ama ka chhuak kan hre tawh alawm,"" an ti a." 
Luke22:71 Tin, anni chuan, ""Eng hriatna dang nge kan ngaih tawh ang? Keimahni ngeiin ama ka chhuak kan hre tawh alawm,"" an ti a." 
Luke23:1 Tin, pungho zawng zawng chu an tho a, Isua chu Pilata hnenah an hruai ta a." 
Luke23:2 Tin, ""He mi hian kan chite a tikhawlo a, Kaisara hnenah chhiah chawi a khap a, Krista, lal, a intih kan hria e,"" tiin an hek ta a." 
Luke23:3 Tin, Pilatan a hnenah, ""Judate lal i ni em?"" tiin a zawt a. Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Ni e,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke23:4 Tin, Pilatan puithiam lalte leh mipuite hnenah chuan, ""He mi chungah hian engmah sual ka hmu lo e,"" a ti a." 
Luke23:5 Nimahsela anni chuan, ""Galili ramah a tan a, he mi hmun thleng hian, Judai ram khaw tinah zirtirin mi zawng zawng a chawk hnawk thin a ni,"" tiin an bei lehzual sauh a." 
Luke23:6 Tin, Pilatan chu chu a hriatin, chu mi chu Galili rama mi a nih leh nih loh a zawt a." 
Luke23:7 Tichuan Heroda biala mi a ni tih a hriat veleh Heroda hnenah a tir ta a; chung lai chuan ani pawh chu Jerusalem khuaah a awm bawk a. 
Luke23:8 Tin, Herodan Isua a hmuh chuan a lawm em em a; a chanchin a hriat avangin, hman ata tawh hmuh a duh hle reng a, a thilmak tih eng emaw tal hmuh pawh a beisei a." 
Luke23:9 Tin, thu tam tak a zawt a; nimahsela a engmah chu a chhang si lo." 
Luke23:10 Tin, puithiam lalte leh lehkhaziaktute chuan dingin nasa takin an hek chiam a." 
Luke23:11 Tin, Heroda leh a sipaite chuan Isua an hmusit a, nuihza siamna'n an hmang a, tin, puan ropui tak sintirin Pilata hnenah a tir leh ta a." 
Luke23:12 Tin, chu mi ni tak chuan Heroda leh Pilata chu an inngeih ta a; chu mi hma zawng chu an intai thin a ni." 
Luke23:13 Tin, Pilatan puithiam lalte, hotute, mi zawng zawngte a ko khawm a," 
Luke23:14 an hnenah, ""'Mite a tikhawlo,' tiin he mi hi ka hnenah in rawn hruai kha a ni a; tin, ngai rawh u, in hmaah ka chhuahchhal a, in hekna thu-ah khan he mi chungah hian engmah sual ka hmu lo a ni;" 
Luke23:15 Heroda pawhin a hmu hek lo; kan hnenah a rawn tir leh ta mai a nih hi; ngai rawh u, thihna khawp meuhin engmah a ti lo e." 
Luke23:16 Chutichuan ka vel ang a, ka chhuah mai dawn a ni,"" a ti a." 
Luke23:17 Kut niah chuan mi pakhat anmahni a chhuahsak ngei tur a ni si a. 
Luke23:18 Nimahsela rual takin an au a, ""He mi hi chu tiboral la, Barabba kha min chhuahsak zawk rawh,"" an ti a." 
Luke23:19 (Chu mi chu khawpuia helna eng emaw avang leh, tual a thah avanga tan ina tang a ni.)" 
Luke23:20 Pilata erawh chuan Isua chhuah a duh a, an hnenah thu a sawi leh a;" 
Luke23:21 nimahsela an au a, ""Kraws-ah khengbet rawh, kraws-ah khengbet rawh,"" an ti a." 
Luke23:22 Tin, ani chuan a vawi thumnaah an hnenah, ""Engah maw? He mi hian eng nge a tihsual ni? Thihna khawp meuh a chungah engmah ka hmu lo; chutichuan ka vel ang a, ka chhuah mai dawn a ni,"" a ti a." 
Luke23:23 Anni erawh chuan aw ring takin kraws-a khengbet turin an ngen lui hram a. Tin, an aw chuan a vaudai ta a." 
Luke23:24 Tin, Pilata chuan an ngen anga ti turin thu a titlu ta a." 
Luke23:25 Helna leh tualthah avanga tan ina tang an dil kha, a chhuah a; Isua erawh chu an duh duha tihah a pe ta a." 
Luke23:26 Tin, an hruai bo laiin Simona, Kurini khuaa mi, ram lam ata lo kal an man a, Isua hnung lama pu turin a chungah kraws chu an nghat a." 
Luke23:27 Tin, mi naran leh hmeichhia awm chuma tap tap, mipui tam takin an zui a." 
Luke23:28 Isua erawh chuan an lam a hawi a, ""Jerusalem fanute u, mi tah suh u, nangmahni leh in fate tan tap rawh u." 
Luke23:29 Ngai teh u, a ni a lo la thleng ang, chung niah chuan, 'Hmeichhe chingte, nau pai ngai lohna pumte, nau hnek ngai loh hnutete chu a eng a thawl e,' an la ti ang." 
Luke23:30 Chutih hunah chuan mitten tlang hnenahte, 'Min delh rawh,' an la ti ang a; mual hnenahte,'Min khuh rawh,' an la ti ang." 
Luke23:31 Thing hring maha hetiang an tih chuan a rovah chuan eng ti takin ti ang maw? a ti a. 
Luke23:32 Tin, a hnenah mi dang pahnih, mi sual, tihhlum turin an hruai ve a." 
Luke23:33 Tin, Lu Ruh an tih hmun chu an thlenin, chutah chuan kraws-ah an khengbet a, mi sualte nen, a ding lamah pakhat, a vei lamah pakhat." 
Luke23:34 Tin, Isua'n, ""Ka Pa, anni hi ngaidam rawh; an thiltih hi an hre lo a nih hi,"" a ti a. Tin, a silhfente chu an insemin thum an vawr a." 
Luke23:35 Tin, vantlangho chuan dingin an thlir a. Tin, hotute pawhin, ""Mi dang mah a tidam thin alawm; Pathian thlan Krista a nih tak zet chuan amah pawh intidam ang hmiang,"" tiin an tiel a." 
Luke23:36 Tin, sipaite pawhin amah chu nuihza siamna'n an hmang a, a hnenah an lo kal a, zu thur an pe a," 
Luke23:37 Judate lal i nih zet chuan, intidam rawh,"" an ti a." 
Luke23:38 Tin, a chung lamah chuan, ""He Mi hi Judate Lal a ni,"" tiin lehkha a awm." 
Luke23:39 Tin, an mi sual khai pakhat chuan Isua a hau a, ""Krista chu i ni lo em ni? Intidam la, keini pawh min tidam ta che,"" a ti a." 
Luke23:40 Nimahsela pakhat chuan chhan pahin a zilhhau a, ""Pathian meuh pawh i hlau na nge? Thuhmun rengin an hrem che hi." 
Luke23:41 Keini zawng hremzia reng kan ni; kan thiltih man chauh hmu kan nih hi; he mi hi zawngin engmah a tisual si lo,"" a ti a." 
Luke23:42 Tin, ""Isu, i ram i thlen hunah mi hre reng ang che,"" a ti a." 
Luke23:43 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che, vawiinah hian ka hnenah Paradis-ah i awm ve ang,"" a ti a." 
Luke23:44 Tin, chawfak hun lai a lo ni a, chumi achin behliang mun hun thlengin khawvel a lo thim ta vek a," 
Luke23:45 ni eng a reh ta a; tin, Pathian biak in puan zar chu a laiah a lo thler ta a." 
Luke23:46 Tin, Isua aw ring takin a au a, ""Ka Pa, i kutah ka thlarau ka kawltir e,"" a ti a. Tin, chu chu a tih zawhin a thlarau a thlah ta a." 
Luke23:47 Tin, sipai za hotu chuan thil awmzia chu a hmuhin, ""He mi hi matheiloin mi fel tak a ni phawt mai,"" tiin Pathian a fak ta a." 
Luke23:48 Tin, chu ennawm chu thlir tura mipui rawn inkhawm zawng zawngte chuan thil awmziate chu an hmuhin an awmte chum chumin an haw leh ta a." 
Luke23:49 Tin, a hmelhriatte zawng zawng leh hmeichhia Galili ram atanga rawn zuite chu, chung thil chu thlirin hla takah an ding a." 
Luke23:50 Tin, ngai teh, mi pakhat a hming Josefa, roreltu, mi tha tak, fel tak a awm," 
Luke23:51 (an rorel leh an thiltih pawh kha a remti lo reng a ni) Judate khua Arimathaia mi a ni a, Pathian ram a beisei thin a." 
Luke23:52 Chu mi chu Pilata hnenah a kal a, Isua ruang a dil a." 
Luke23:53 Tin, a la thla a, puan zai sinin a tuam a, thlan, lung kerkuak, tumah la zalh ngai lohnaah a zalh a." 
Luke23:54 Tin, chu mi ni chu Inrinni a ni a, Chawlhni a lo ni lek lek tawh si a." 
Luke23:55 Tin, hmeichhia Galili ram atanga a hnena lo kalte khan an zui zel a, thlan leh a ruang zalhzia chu an hmu a.Tin, an haw leh a, englo rimtuite leh hriak rimtuite an siam a." 
Luke23:56 Tin, an haw leh a, englo rimtuite leh hriak rimtuite an siam a." 
Luke24:1 Tin, Chawlhni chuan thupek angin an chawl ta a; ni sarih ni hmasa berah erawh chuan vartianah, englo rimtui an siamte chu kengin thlanah chuan an va kal a." 
Luke24:2 Tin, thlan ata lung chu lum sawnin an hmu a;" 
Luke24:3 tin, an lut a, Lal Isua ruang chu an hmu si lo." 
Luke24:4 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chung avanga an mangan lai chuan ngai teh, mi pahnih puan mi enkhalhthei sin an kiangah an lo ding a;" 
Luke24:5 tin, an hlauha an hmaia lei an sik laiin anni chuan an hnenah, ""Engati nge mitthi zinga mi nung in zawn?" 
Luke24:6 Hetah a awm tawh lo e, a tho leh ta; Galili rama a awm laia in hnena a thusawi kha hre leh rawh u," 
Luke24:7 'Mihring Fapa hi mi sualte kuta mantirin a awm ang a, kraws-ah an khengbet ang a, ni thum niah chuan a tho leh tur a ni,' a tih kha,"" a ti a." 
Luke24:8 Tin, a thu chu an lo hre leh ta a," 
Luke24:9 thlan ata chu an haw leh a, sawm leh pakhatte leh mi dang zawng zawngte hnenah chuan chung thil zawng zawng chu an hrilh a." 
Luke24:10 (Chung hmeichhiate chu Magdalini Mari te, Joani te, Jakoba nu Mari te an ni a; an hnena hmeichhe dangte pawhin tirhkohte hnenah chuan chung thu chu an hrilh bawk a.)" 
Luke24:11 Nimahsela chung thu chu thu mai maiah an ruat a, an awihsak lo a." 
Luke24:12 Nimahsela Petera chu a tho a, thlanah chuan a tlan ta a; tin, a kun a, a bih a, puan zai sin awmte chauh chu a hmu a; tichuan thil awmzia chu mak ti takin a inlamah a haw ta a." 
Luke24:13 Tin, ngai teh, chu mi ni tak chuan an zinga mi pahnih chu khaw pakhat Emmau an tihah an kal dawn a, chu mi khua chu Jerusalem khua atangin fing sawmruk a ni a." 
Luke24:14 Tin, thil lo thleng zawng zawng chu an sawi dun zel a." 
Luke24:15 Tin, heti hi a ni a, an sawia an inhnial lai chuan Isua ngeiin a rawn pan a, an hnenah a kal ve ta a." 
Luke24:16 Nimahsela amah chu an hriat theih lohna'n, an mit chu tihvaihin a awm a." 
Luke24:17 Tin, an hnenah, ""Kal paha in sawi dun kha, eng thu nge ni?"" a ti a. Tin, ngui takin an ding ta a." 
Luke24:18 Tin, a hming Kleopa zawkin a hnenah, ""Jerusalem khuaah nangmah chauhin em ni i chen, tun laia thil awmzia hi i hriat loh ni?"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Luke24:19 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Eng thil maw?"" a ti a. Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, 'Nazaret Isua,Pathian leh mi zawng zawng mithmuha a thu-ah leh a thiltiha zawlnei hmingthang tak chanchin thu;" 
Luke24:20 puithiam lalte leh kan hotuten thah thu pek turin an hruai a, kraws-a an khenbehzia thute pawh kha." 
Luke24:21 Keini'n Israelte tlantu tur kha a nih kan beisei tehlul nen. Engpawh ni se la, chung thil thlenna chin chu vawiin nen ni thum a ni tawh." 
Luke24:22 Chung lo pawh chu kan pawlte hmeichhia tute emaw, zingah a thlanah an va kal a, min rawn timangang a;" 
Luke24:23 a ruang hmu si loin, 'Pathian vantirhkohte inlar kan hmu a, chu mite chuan a nung leh tih an sawi e,' an rawn ti a." 
Luke24:24 Tin, kan awmpui zinga tute emaw thlanah chuan an kal a, hmeichhiate sawi ang ngeiin an hmu a; nimahsela amah chu an hmu si lo a,"" an ti a." 
Luke24:25 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Mi ate u! zawlneite thusawi zawng zawng awih kawnga ngawngte u!" 
Luke24:26 Kristan chung thil chu tuarin a ropuinaah a lut tur a ni reng lo em ni? a ti a. 
Luke24:27 Tin, Mosia leh zawlneite zawng zawng lehkhaah a tan a, Pathian Lehkha zawng zawnga ama chanchin ziak apiang chu anmahni a hrilhfiah zel a." 
Luke24:28 Tin, an kalna tur khua chu an thleng dawn ta a; tin, ani chu hla deuha kal tum angin a awm a." 
Luke24:29 Tin, kain an chelh a, ""Kan hnenah awm ta che; khua a tlai dawn ta a, ni pawh a tlak dawn tawh hi,"" an ti a. Tichuan an hnena awm turin a lut ta a." 
Luke24:30 Tin, heti hi a ni a, an hnenah chaw kila a thutin chhang a la a, mal a sawm a, a phel a, an hnenah a pe a." 
Luke24:31 Tin, an mit a lo var a, a hmel an lo hre ta a; tin, ani chu a ral ta mai a." 
Luke24:32 Tin, anni chuan, ""Kalkawnga min biak laia Pathian Lehkha Thute min hrilhfiah lai khan kan thinlung a harh huai reng lawm ni kha?"" an inti a." 
Luke24:33 Tin, chu mi lai tak chuan an tho a, Jerusalem khuaah an kir leh a, sawm leh pakhatte leh an thiante awm khawm chu an hmu a," 
Luke24:34 Lalpa chu a lo tho leh tak zet a ni, Simona hnenah pawh a inlar ta,"" an lo ti a." 
Luke24:35 Tin, anni pawhin kalkawnga thil lo thleng leh, chhang a phel a, a hmel an lo hriat takziate chu an hrilh ve bawk a." 
Luke24:36 Tin, chung thu chu an sawi laiin amah ngei chu an zingah a lo ding a, an hnenah, ""In chungah thlamuanna awm rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Luke24:37 Nimahsela rapthlak an ti em em a, an hlau a, thlarau hmu-ah an inruat a." 
Luke24:38 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Engati nge in mangan? Engah nge in rilruah rinhlelhna a lo awm?" 
Luke24:39 Ka kutte, ka kephahte hi en rwh u, hei keimah ngei kha ka nih hi! Mi dek u la, en rawh u; mi hmuh ang hian thlarauin tisa leh ruh a nei lo e,"" a ti a." 
Luke24:40 Tin, chu chu a sawi zawhin a kutte, a kephahte an hnenah a entir a." 
Luke24:41 Tin, an lawm luattuk avanga an la awih loh cheuva mak an tih chhungin an hnenah, ""Hetah englo ei tur in nei em?"" a ti a." 
Luke24:42 Tin, sangha rawh hrang khat an pe a." 
Luke24:43 Tin, a la a, an hmaah chuan a ei ta a." 
Luke24:44 Tin, an hnenah, ""Heng hi ka thu kha a ni, Mosia Danahte, Zawlnei Lehkhabuahte, Fakna Hla Buahte ka chanchin ziak apiang a lo thlen turzia in hnena ka awm laia ka hrilh thin che u kha,"" a ti a." 
Luke24:45 Tichuan Pathian Lehkha Thu hriatna'n an thinlung a tifing ta a; 
Luke24:46 tin, an hnenah, ""Hetiangin ziak a ni, 'Krista chuan hrehawm a tuar ang a, ni thum niin mitthi zing ata a tho leh ang a," 
Luke24:47 ama hmingin simna thu leh sual ngaihhnathiamna thu Jerusalem khuaa tanin, hnam tin hnenah an hril ang,' tiin." 
Luke24:48 Chung thil zawng zawng chu a hretu in ni e. 
Luke24:49 Tin, ngai teh u, ka Pa thil tiam chu in chungah ka rawn tir dawn e; nimahsela chung lam ata thiltihtheihnaa an thuam hma loh che u zawng khawpuiah hian awm reng rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Luke24:50 Tin, Bethani dai kiang thlengin anni chu a hruai chhuak a; tin, a ban a phar a, mal a sawmsak a." 
Luke24:51 Tin, heti hi a ni a, mal a sawmsak lai takin anni chu a then a, vana hruai chhohin a awm ta a." 
Luke24:52 Tin, chibai an buk a, lawm em emin Jerusalem khuaah an kir leh ta a;tin, Pathian biak inah chuan Pathian fakin an awm fo thin a." 
Luke24:53 tin, Pathian biak inah chuan Pathian fakin an awm fo thin a." 
John1:1 Atirin Thu a awm, Thu chu Pathian hnenah a awm, Thu chu Pathian a ni." 
John1:2 Chu mi chu atirin Pathian hnenah a awm. 
John1:3 Engkim azain ama siam a ni;thilsiam zawng zawng hi ama siam loh engmah a awm lo. 
John1:4 Amahah chuan nunna a awm; chu mi nunna chu mihringte enna a ni a. 
John1:5 Eng chu thim zingah a lo eng a; thimin chu chu a hre lo. 
John1:6 Pathian tirh mi pakhat a lo awm a, a hming chu Johana a ni." 
John1:7 Chu mi chu hriattir turin a lo kal a, eng thu chu hriattir turin; amah avanga mi zawng zawngin an rinna turin." 
John1:8 Ani chu eng chu a ni lo, eng thu chu hriattir tura lo kal a ni zawk e." 
John1:9 Eng tak mi tin tieng thin kha a awm a, khawvelah a lo kal mek a ni." 
John1:10 Ani chu khawvelah a awm, khawvel ama siam a ni, khawvelin amah a hre si lo." 
John1:11 Amah a mite hnenah a lo kal a, amaha miten an lo lawm si lo." 
John1:12 Nimahsela amah lawm apiang chu, an hnenah Pathian fate nih theihna tur a pe, a hming ringtute chu;" 
John1:13 chung mite chu thisen hrin an ni lo a, tisa duhzawnga hrin an ni hek lo, mipa duhzawng pawha hrin an ni hek lo, Pathian hrin an ni zawk e." 
John1:14 Tin, Thu chu tisaah a lo chang a, kan zingah a awm ta a, (Pa fa mal neih ropui angin a ropuizia kan hmu,) khawngaih leh thutakin a khat." 
John1:15 Johanan a thu a hriattir a, a au a, "" 'Ka hnunga mi zui tur khan mi lehkhalh tawh a ni, ka hmaa awm tawh reng a nih avangin,' tia a thu ka sawi kha amah hi a ni,"" a ti a." 
John1:16 A famkimna kan chang theuh, khawngaih chunga khawngaih leh chhawnna nen." 
John1:17 Dan thu Mosia'n a pe, khawngaihna leh thutak Isua Krista avangin a lo awm." 
John1:18 Tuma'n eng lai mahin Pathian an hmu lo, a Fapa mal neih, Pa angchhunga awm ngei khan a chanchin a hril tawh a ni." 
John1:19 Tin, Judaten, ""Tunge i nih?""tia zawt tura Jerusalem khua ata a hnena puithiamte leh Levia chia mite an tirh lai khan he'ng hi Johana thu lo hriattir chu a ni:" 
John1:20 tang loin a inpuang a, ""Krista chu ka ni lo e,"" tiin a inpuang a." 
John1:21 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Tunge i nih le? Elija i ni em?"" an ti a, an zawt a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Ka ni lo e,"" a ti a. ""Zawlnei kha i ni em?"" an ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Ni lo e,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John1:22 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""A nih leh, tu nge i nih? Min tirtute kan chhan theih nan min hrilh ta che. I chanchin reng eng nge i sawi dawn?"" an ti a." 
John1:23 Tin, ani chuan, "" 'Lalpa kalkawng tirual rawh u,' tia thlalera autu aw ka ni, Zawlnei Isaia sawi ang khan,"" a ti a." 
John1:24 An mi tirhate chu Pharisaite hnena mi an ni a. 
John1:25 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Krista tal, Elija tal, zawlnei tal chu i nih si loh chuan engati nge i baptis thin le?"" an ti a, an zawt leh a." 
John1:26 Tin, Johanan an hnenah, ""Keiin tuiin ka baptis thin, in zingah mi pakhat in hriatloh a ding a ni." 
John1:27 ani chu mi zuitu tur chu a ni a, a pheikhawk hrui phelh tlak pawh ka ni lo e,"" a ti a, a chhang a" 
John1:28 Chung thil chu Jordan rala Bethani khuaah, Johana baptisnaah khan an ti a ni." 
John1:29 Tin, atukah chuan Johanan Isua a hnenah lo kal dawnin a hmu a. Tin, a sawi a, ""En teh u, Pathian Beram No, khawvel sual kalpuitu tur saw!" 
John1:30 Saw mi saw a ni, 'Mi pakhat mi lehkhalh khan mi zui dawn,ka hmaa awm sa reng a ni,' ka tiha kha." 
John1:31 Amah chu ka lo hre si lo; nimahsela Israelten amah an hriat theihna'n, tuia baptis-in ka lo kal a ni,"" a ti a." 
John1:32 Tin, Johanan a thu a hriattir a, a sawi a, ""Thlarau chu thuro angin van atanga chhuk ka hmu a, a chungah a fu reng a." 
John1:33 Amah chu ka hre si lo a, nimahsela tuia baptis tura mi tirtu khan ka hnenah, 'Tu chungah pawh Thlarau zuk fua a chunga awm reng i hmuh apiang, amah chu Thlarau Thianghlima baptistu tur chu a ni ang,' mi ti a." 
John1:34 Chu chu ka hmu tawh a, he mi hi Pathian Fapa a ni tih ka hriattir tawh,""a ti a." 
John1:35 Tin, atuk lehah Johana a ding a, zirtirte pahnih nen:" 
John1:36 tin, Isua veivak lai a en a, ""En teh u, Pathian Beram No saw,"" a ti a." 
John1:37 Tin, a zirtirte pahnih chuan a thusawi chu an hria a, Isua an zui ta a." 
John1:38 Tin, Isua a hawi a, an rawn zui a hmu a, an hnenah, ""Engnge in zawn?"" a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, ""Rabbi (chu chu Zirtirtu tihna a ni), khawiah nge i awm?"" an ti a." 
John1:39 Ani'n an hnenah,: Lo kal u la in hmu ang,"" a ti a. Chutichuan an kal a, a awmna chu an hmu a, chu mi ni chuan a hnenah an awm reng a; zanriah chum hun lai a ni a." 
John1:40 Johana thusawi chu hriaa Isua zuitute pahnih chu, a pakhat zawk chu Andria, Simon Petera unau a ni." 
John1:41 Ani chuan a hmasa berin ama unau Simona a hmu a, a hnenah, ""Messia kan hmu ta,"" a ti a (chu chu Krista tihna a ni)." 
John1:42 Tichuan Isua hnenah a rawn hruai a. Isua'n ani chu a lo en a, ""Johana fapa Simona i ni, Kiphaa an vuah ang che,"" a ti a (chu chu Petera tihna a ni)."
