John1:43 Tin, atukah chuan Isua chuan Galili rama kal a tum a, Philipa a hmu a, a hnenah, ""Mi zui rawh,"" a ti a." 
John1:44 Philipa chu Bethsaida khuaa mi a ni, chu chu Andria leh Petera awmna khua bawk a ni." 
John1:45 Philipa chuan Nathanaela a hmu a, a hnenah, ""A chanchin Mosia'n Dan Lehkhabua a ziak leh, Zawlneiten an ziak kha, amah chu kan hmu ta, Nazaret Isua, Josefa fapa chu,"" a ti a." 
John1:46 Tin, Nathanaela chuan a hnenah, ""Nazaret khuaah thil tha a chhuak thei em ni?"" a ti a. Philipa chuan a hnenah, ""Lo kal la, en rawh,"" a ti a." 
John1:47 Isua'n Nathanaela a hnena lo kal dawnin a hmu a, a chanchin a lo sawi a, ""En teh u, Israel mi tak, ngamthlemna reng nei lo saw,"" a ti a." 
John1:48 Nathanaela chuan a hnenah, ""Nangin engtin nge mi hriat?"" a ti a. Isua'n a hnenah, ""Philipan a koh hma che a, theipui bula i awm lai khan ka hmu che a sin, a ti a, a chhang a." 
John1:49 Nathanaelan a hnenah, ""Rabbi, Pathian Fapa i ni, Israelte Lalber i nih hi,"" tiin a chhang a." 
John1:50 Isua'n a hnenah, "" 'Theipui bulah ka hmu che a sin,' i hnena ka tih avangin i ring a ni maw? Heng aia thil ropui zawk hi i la hmu ang,"" a ti a, a chhang a.Tin, Isua vekin a hnenah, ""Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, van inhawngah, Pathian vantirhkohte Mihring fapa chungah hian chhuk leh chho in la hmu ang,"" a ti a." 
John1:51 Tin, Isua vekin a hnenah, ""Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, van inhawngah, Pathian vantirhkohte Mihring fapa chungah hian chhuk leh chho in la hmu ang,"" a ti a." 
John2:1 Tin, ni thum niah, Galili rama Kana khuaah lawi chaw a awm a, chutah chuan Isua nu a awm." 
John2:2 Isua leh a zirtirte pawh lawi chaw eiah an sawm a. 
John2:3 Tin, uain-in a daih ta lo a, Isua nu chuan a hnenah, ""Uain an tlachham ta e,"" a ti a." 
John2:4 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, ""Hmeichhia, nanga mi lo hriatsak tur eng nge awm? ka hun a la thleng lo e,"" a ti a." 
John2:5 Tin, a nuin rawngbawltute hnenah, ""In hnena a sawi apiang chu ti zel ang che u,"" a ti a." 
John2:6 Tin, Judate silfai dan angin lung tuibel paruk, buk sawmli hmun hnih emaw, hmun thum emaw leng theuh, chutah chuan an hung a." 
John2:7 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""Tuibelahte tui tikhat rawh u,"" a ti a. Tin, a rawng rualin an tikhat theuh a." 
John2:8 Tin, an hnenah, ""Tunah thal u la, ruaitheh fatu hnenah kalpui rawh u,"" a ti a. Tin, an kalpui ta a." 
John2:9 Tin, ruaitheh fatu chuan tui uain-a lo chang ta chu a tem a, a chhuahna chin a hre lo a, (tui thal rawngbawltute erawh chuan an hria a) nupui nei tura chu a ko ta a," 
John2:10 a hnenah, ""Mi tinin atirin uain tha an dah chhuak thin, tin, a tam deuh an in hnuin a tha lo deuh chu an dah chhuak thin; nang zawngin tun thlengin uain tha i la vawn hi,"" a ti a." 
John2:11 Isua'n he a chhinchhiahna tih tantirhna hi Galili ram Kana khuaah chuan a ti a, a ropuizia a lantir ta a; tin, a zirtirte chuan ani chu an ring a." 
John2:12 Tin, chu mi hnuah chuan Kapernaum khuaah a zuk kal a, amah leh a nu nen, a unaute nen, a zirtirte nen; chutah chuan ni rei lo te an awm a." 
John2:13 Tin, Judate Kalhlen Kut a hnai tawh a, Isua Jerusalem khuaah a han kal a." 
John2:14 Tin, Pathian biak ina sebawngte, beramte, thurote zuartuho leh, tangka thlengtuho thu a hmu a." 
John2:15 Tin, hruihrualin vuakna a siam a, beram leh sebawng azain Pathian biak in atang chuan a hnawt chhuak a, tangka thlengtute tangka chu a leihbua a, an dawhkante a namthluksak bawk a;" 
John2:16 tin, thuro zuartute hnenah chuan, ""Heng thil hi heta tangin kalpui rawh u, ka Pa in sumdawnna inah siam suh u,"" a ti a." 
John2:17 (Tin, ""I ina ka thahnemngaihin mi ei zo ang,"" tih ziak a ni tih, a zirtirte chuan an hre leh ta a)." 
John2:18 Chutichuan Judaten a hnenah, ""Heng thil i tih hi chhinchhiahna eng nge min hmuhtir theih?"" an ti a, an chhang a." 
John2:19 Isua'n an hnenah, ""He in hi tichhia u lang, ni thum chhungin ka tungding leh ang,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John2:20 Tin, Judate chuan, ""He in hi kum sawmli leh kum ruk sak a ni, nangin ni thum chhungin i tungding ang maw?"" an ti a." 
John2:21 (Nimahsela a taksa in thu sawi a lo ni zawk si. 
John2:22 Chuvangin, mitthi zing ata a thawhlehin, chu mi thu chu a saiw tawh tih a zirtirten an hre leh ta a; tin, Pathian Lehkha Thu leh Isua thusawi chu an ring ta a)." 
John2:23 Tin, Kalhlen Kuta Jerusalem khuaa a awm lai chuan a thilmak tihte an hmu a, mi tam takin a hming an ring ta a." 
John2:24 Nimahsela Isua chu an lakah a ngampa lo, mi zawng zawng a hriata,mihring thu tumaha hrilhfiah a ngaih loh avangin; amahin mihring chhunga awm apiang chu a hre si a." 
John2:25 mihring thu tumaha hrilhfiah a ngaih loh avangin; amahin mihring chhunga awm apiang chu a hre si a. 
John3:1 Tin, Pharisaite zinga mi, a hming Nikodema, Judate hotu pakhat a awm:" 
John3:2 chu mi chu zanah Isua hnenah a lo kal a, a hnenah, ""Rabbi, Pathian hnen ata zirtirtua lo kal i ni tih ka hria; Pathian an chunga a awm loh chuan he'ng thilmak i tih ang hi tuma'n an ti thei lo ang,"" a ti a." 
John3:3 Tin, Isua'n a chhang a, a hnenah, ""Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che, mi tupawh an pian thar loh chuan Pathian ram an hmu thei lo ang,"" a ti a." 
John3:4 Nikodeman a hnenah, ""Mi, a tar hnuin engtin nge a pian theih ang? A nu pumah vawi hnih lutin a piang thei em ni?"" a ti a." 
John3:5 Isua'n a chhang a, ""Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che, mi tupawh tuiah leh thlarauva an pian loh chuan Pathian ramah an lut thei lo ang." 
John3:6 Tisaa piang apiang tisa a ni; Thlarauva piang apiang thlarau a ni. 
John3:7 I pian thar tur ka tih che hi mak ti suh. 
John3:8 Thli khawiah pawh a duh duhin a tleh thin, a ri i hria e, nimahsela khawi atanga lo kal nge, khawiah nge a kal dawn tih pawh i hre si lo; tupawh Thlarauva piang chu chutiangin an awm,"" a ti a." 
John3:9 Tin, Nikodeman a chhang a, a hnenah, ""Chung thil chu engtin nge a awm theih ang?"" a ti a." 
John3:10 Isua'n a chhang a, a hnenah, ""Israelte zirtirtu i ni si a, chung chu i hre lo maw?" 
John3:11 Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che, keinin kan hriat chu kan sawi thin, kan hmuh chu kan hriattir thin; nimahsela kan thu hriattir in awih si thin lo." 
John3:12 Khawvela thil ka hrilh che u mah awih lo che u a, vana thil hrilh che u i la engtin nge in awih ang?" 
John3:13 Vanah tumah an lawn ngai lo, van atanga lo chhuka chauh lo hi chu, Mihring Fapa vana awm hi." 
John3:14 Tin, Mosia'n thlalerah rul a khaikan ang khan, Mihring Fapa hi khaikanin a awm bawk tur a ni;" 
John3:15 tupawh a ring apiangin amah avanga chatuana nunna an neihna turin. 
John3:16 Pathianin khawvel a hmangaih em em a, chutichuan a Fapa mal neih chhun a pe a, amah chu tupawh a ring apiang an boral loh a, chatuana nunna an neih zawkna'n." 
John3:17 Khawvel thiam loh chantir turin Pathianin a Fa khawvelah a tir lo, khawvel amah avanga an dam theihna turin a tir a ni zawk e." 
John3:18 Tupawh amah ring chu thiam lohin an awm lo ang, tupawh ring lo chu tun apangin thiam lohin an awm, Pathian Fapa mal neih hming an rin loh avangin." 
John3:19 Hei hi thiam lohna a ni, eng khawvelah a lo kal a, nimahsela miten eng aiin thim an duh zawk, an thiltihte a sual avangin." 
John3:20 Tupawh thil tisual apiangin eng an haw thin, engah pawh an lo kal lo, chutilochuan an thiltihte a lang ang." 
John3:21 Amaherawhchu tupawh tidik apiang an thiltihte Pathian avanga ti an ni tih a lan nan, engah an lo kal thin,"" a ti a." 
John3:22 Chung hnuah chuan Isua a zirtirte nen Judai ramah an kal a, chutah chuan Isua an hnenah a awm reng a, a baptis thin a," 
John3:23 Johana pawhin Ainon-ah, Salim khaw kiangah a baptis bawk a, chutah chuan tui a tam avangin; tin, mi an lo kal a, baptisma an chang hlawm a." 
John3:24 Chutih lai chuan Johana tan inah an la khung si lo a. 
John3:25 Tin, Johana zirtirte leh Juda pakhat, silfai thu-ah an lo inhnial a." 
John3:26 Tin, Johana hnenah an lo kal a, a hnenah, ""Rabbi, Jordan rala i hnena awm, a thu mi i hriattir khan ngai teh, kha mi khan mi a baptis a, mi zawng zawng a hnenah an lo kal a ni,"" an ti a." 
John3:27 Johanan a chhang a, ""Mihringin engmah an nei thei lo, vana mi pek a nih loh chuan." 
John3:28 'Kei, Krista ka ni lo e, a hmaa mi tirh ka ni,' ka tih kha, nangni ngei mi hriatpuitu in ni." 
John3:29 Mo neitu chu a pasal chu a ni; nimahsela moneitu thian, a thu lo ngaichang rengtu chuan moneitu aw a hriat chuan a lawm em em thin; hei ka lawmna a thleng ta a nih hi." 
John3:30 Ani chu tlatlum tur a ni, kei erawh chu lang tur ka ni." 
John3:31 Chung lam atanga lo kal chu mi zawng zawng aia chungnung ber a ni; leia piang chu leia mi a ni a, lei thu a sawi thin, van atanga lo kal chu mi zawng zawng aia chungnung ber a ni." 
John3:32 A hmuh leh ahriat apiang a hriattir thin a ni; tuma'n a thu hriattir an awih lo. 
John3:33 A thu hriattir awih chuanin, 'Pathian chu mi dik tak a ni,' tiin a hming nemin a ziak." 
John3:34 Pathian tirh chuanin Pathian thu a sawi thin; ani chuan teh kherin Thlarau a pe si lo. 
John3:35 Pain Fa a hmangaih a, a kutah engkim azain a pe tawh.Tupawh Fa ring apiangin chatuan nunna an nei tawh; nimahsela tupawh Fa thu awih lo apiangin nunna an nei lo ang a, Pathian thinur an chungah a awm reng zawk a ni,"" a ti a." 
John3:36 Tupawh Fa ring apiangin chatuan nunna an nei tawh; nimahsela tupawh Fa thu awih lo apiangin nunna an nei lo ang a, Pathian thinur an chungah a awm reng zawk a ni,"" a ti a." 
John4:1 Tin, Isua'n Johana aiin zirtir tam zawk a siam leh a baptis tih Pharisaite'n an hria tih Lalpa chuan a hriat veleh," 
John4:2 (nimahsela Isua meuh chuan a baptis lo, a zirtirten an baptis zawk thin)," 
John4:3 Judai ram chu a kalsan a, Galili ramah a kir leh ta a." 
John4:4 Tichuan Samari ram a kal tlang tur a ni. 
John4:5 Chutichuan Samari ram khaw pakhat Sukar an tih chu a lo thleng a, Jakoba'n a fa Josefa hnena hmun a pek kiang kha;" 
John4:6 Jakoba tuichhunchhuah pawh kha chutah chuan a awm. Chutichuan Isua chu a kal hah avangin tuichhunchhuah sirah chuan a thu chawt a: chawfak hun lai a ni a. 
John4:7 Tin, Samari hmeichhe pakhat tui chawiin a lo kal a. Isua'n a hnenah, ""In tur mi pe rawh,"" a ti a." 
John4:8 (A zirtirte lah chu ei tur leiin khuaah an kal tawh si a). 
John4:9 Chutichuan Samari hmeichhia chuan a hnenah, ""Nang Juda mi i ni si a, kei Samari hmeichhia ka ni si a, engtizia nge ka hnena in tur mi dil?"" a ti a. (Judaten Samari mite engah mah an hmang ngai si lo)." 
John4:10 Tin, Isua'n a chhang a, a hnenah, ""Pathian thilpek leh, 'In tur mi pe rawh,' i hnena titu hi hria la chu, nangin a hnenah i dil zawk tur a ni a, tin, ani'n tui nung a pe tawh tur che a ni,"" a ti a." 
John4:11 Tin, hmeichhia chuan a hnenah, ""Ka pu, khaina engmah i nei si lo a, tuichhunchhuah a thuk vei nen, khawi ata nge tui nung chu i hmuh?" 
John4:12 Kan pu Jakoba aiin i ropui zawk em ni? Ani chuan he tuichhunchhuah hi min pe a, amah pawhin a in a, a fapate, a rante nen,"" a ti a." 
John4:13 Tin, Isua'n a chhang a, a hnenah, ""Tupawh he tui in apiang an tuihal leh ang;" 
John4:14 tupawh an hnena ka pek tur tui in apiang erawh chu kumkhuain an tuihal lo ang, keiin an hnena tui ka pek tur chu an kawchhungah tui hna a lo awm ang a, chatuana nun thlengin a chik chho ang,"" a ti a." 
John4:15 Tin, hmeichhia chuan a hnenah, ""Ka pu, chu tui chu mi pe rawh, ka tuihal lohna'n leh, he'ng thleng thlenga tui chawi tura ka lo kal thin lohna'n,"" a ti a." 
John4:16 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, ""I pasal va ko la, hetah lo haw leh ang che,"" a ti a." 
John4:17 Tin, hmeichhia chuan a hnenah, ""Pasal ka nei hlei nem,"" a ti a, a chhang a. Isua'n a hnenah, "" 'Pasal ka nei hlei nem' i tih hi i tidik e;" 
John4:18 pasal panga i nei tawh, tuna mi i neih hi i pasal a ni lo reng a ni, he thu hi i tidik e,"" a ti a." 
John4:19 Hmeichhia chuan a hnenah, ""Ka pu, zawlnei i ni tih ka hre ta." 
John4:20 Keini thlahtute chuan he tlangah hian Pathian chibai an buk thin; nimahsela nangni zawngin, 'Mihringin Pathian chibai an bukna hmun tur chu Jerusalem khuaah a awm,' in ti thin,"" a ti a." 
John4:21 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, ""Hmeichhia, ka thu awih rawh, he tlangah kher lo pawh, Jerusalem khuaah kher lo pawh Pa chibai in buk hun a thleng dawn ta." 
John4:22 Nangni'n in hriat loh chibai in buk thin; keini zawngin kan hriata chu chibai kan buk thin. Chhanhimna Judate hnen ata a lo chhuak dawn si a. 
John4:23 Chutichuan a hun a thleng dawn ta, tunah pawh a thleng tawh mek, chu mi hunah chuan Pathian chibai buktu taktakten thlarau leh tih tak zetin Pa chibai an buk ang, Pain chutiang mi chu a chibai buktu turin a zawng a ni." 
John4:24 Pathian chu Thlarau a ni; a chibai buktuten thlarau leh tih tak zetin chibai an buk tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
John4:25 Tin,hmeichhia chuan a hnenah, ""Messia, Krista an tih chu a lo kal dawn tih ka hria, ani chu a lo kal hunah engkim min la hrilh ang,"" a ti a." 
John4:26 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, ""Keimah a betu che hi amah chu ka ni a sin,"" a ti a." 
John4:27 Tin, chutih lai chuan a zirtirte chu an lo kal a, hmeichhia a bia chu mak an ti hle a; nimahsela tuma'n, ""Engnge i zawn? Engati nge hmeichhia i biak?"" pawh an ti lo." 
John4:28 Tin, hmeichhia chuan a tuibel a kalsan a, khuaah a kal a, mite hnenah," 
John4:29 Ka thil tih apiang min hrilh zeltu mi pakhat a awm a, lo kal u la, en teh u; Krista a ni thei awm em?"" a ti a." 
John4:30 Tin, anni chu khua ata chu an lo chhuak a, a hnen lam an pan ta a." 
John4:31 Chu mi hlanin zirtirte chuan a hnenah, ""Zirtirtu ei rawh,"" an ti chiam a." 
John4:32 Nimahsela ani chuan an hnenah, ""Chaw, in hriat loh ei tur ka nei e,"" a ti a." 
John4:33 Tin, zirtirte chu an inbia a, ""A ei tur miin an rawn kensak em ni chu le?"" an inti a." 
John4:34 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah a sawi a, ""Mitirtu duhzawng tih leh, a hna thawh zawh tur hi ka chaw a ni." 
John4:35 Nangni'n, 'Buh sengna tur thla li a la awm,' in ti lo'm ni? Ngai rawh u, ka hrilh a che u, dak u lang lote en rawh u, tun apangin seng turin a eng a ni." 
John4:36 A attuin hlawh a hmu thin a, chatuana nun thlenga awm turin rah a seng thin, a tuhtu leh a attu an lawm dun theihna'n." 
John4:37 'Pakhatin a tuh thin a, mi dangin a at thin,' tih thu hi, chu miah chuan a dik hle a ni." 
John4:38 In thawhrim loh at turin ka tirh che u kha; mi dangin an thawk a, nangni'n an thawhsa chu in chhunzawm a ni,"" a ti a." 
John4:39 Tin, hmeichhia chuan, ""Ka thiltih apiang mi hrilh zel,"" ti a, a hriattir thu avang khan, chu mi khuaa awm Samari mi tam takin Isua an ring ta a." 
John4:40 Chutichuan Samari mite chu Isua hnenah an lo kal a, an hnena awmah an ngen chiam a; tichuan chutah chuan ni hnih a cham a." 
John4:41 Tin, mi dang tam takin ama thu avangin an ring ve ta a:" 
John4:42 tin, anni chuan hmeichhe hnenah chuan, ""Tunah zet chuan i thu sawi avanga ring kan ni ta lo; keimahni ngeiin a thu kan hria a, he mi hi khawvel Chhandamtu a ni ngei tih kan hre ta,"" an ti a." 
John4:43 Tin, chu mi ni hnih hnuah chuan chuta tangin a chhuak a, Galili ramah a kal ta a." 
John4:44 Isua ngeiin, zawlnei chu ama khaw lamah chuan chawimawiin a awm ngai lo tih a hriattir si thin a." 
John4:45 Chutichuan Galili ram a lo thlenin Galili rama miten an lo lawm a, Jerusalem khuaa kut laia a thiltih zawng zawng an hmuh avang khan; anni pawh chu kutnaah chuan an kal ve si a." 
John4:46 Tin, Galili rama Kana khua, tui uain-a a chantirna kha a lo thleng leh a. Tin, upa tu emaw a awm a, a fapa Kapernaum khuaah a dam lo a." 
John4:47 Tin, Isua Judai ram ata Galili ramah a lo kal tih a hriat veleh a hnenah a han kal a, a fapa zuk tidam turin a ngen chiam a, a thi lek lek si a." 
John4:48 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, ""Chhinchhiahnate leh thilmakte in hmuh loh chuan in ring tawp lo ang,"" a ti a." 
John4:49 Tin, upa chuan a hnenah, ""Ka pu, ka fa thih hmain lo chhuk ta che,"" a ti a." 
John4:50 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, ""Haw leh ta mai rawh, i fapa chu a dam tawh e,"" a ti a. Tin, chu mi chuan Isua'n a hnena thu a sawi chu a ring a, a kal ta a." 
John4:51 Tin, a kal chhuk lai mekin a bawihten an lo hmuak a, ""I fapa chu a dam ta,"" an lo ti a." 
John4:52 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah a dam tirh lai a zawt a. Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Niminah ni her chauhin a khawsik a reh ta a ni,"" an ti a." 
John4:53 Chutichuan a pain Isua'n a hnenah, ""I fapa chu a dam tawh e,"" a tih lai tak chu a ni tih a hre ta a; tin, amah leh a chhungten an zain an ring ta a.Chu chu Isua'n a chhinchhiahna tih a vawi hnihna a ni, Judai ram ata Galili rama a lo kalin." 
John4:54 Chu chu Isua'n a chhinchhiahna tih a vawi hnihna a ni, Judai ram ata Galili rama a lo kalin." 
John5:1 Chung thil hnuah chuan Judate kut pakhat a awm a; Isua Jerusalem khuaah a han kal a. 
John5:2 Tin, Jerusalem-ah chuan beram kawngkhar kiangah dil a awm a, chu chu Hebrai tawngin Bethesda an ti a, hulhliap panga a nei nghe nghe a." 
John5:3 Chungah chuan damlo te, mitdel te, kebai te, zengte tam tak an mu hlawm a." 
John5:4 Dilah chuan vantirhkoh a zuk kal thin a, tui a tifawn thin; tichuan, tui a lo fawn huna zuang lut hmasa ber chu eng natnaa na pawh ni se, a lo dam thin a ni." 
John5:5 Tin, chutah chuan kum sawmthum leh kum riat na mi tu emaw a awm a." 
John5:6 Tin, Isua'n a mu chu a hmu a, chutiangin rei tak a awm tawh tih a hria a, a hnenah, ""Tihdam i duh em?"" a ti a." 
John5:7 Tin, mi damlo chuan, ""Ka pu, tui a fawnin dila mi dahtu ka nei lo a, ka kal chhungin mi dangin mi pen thlak khalh thin,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John5:8 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, ""Tho la, i awngphah la la, kein kal tawh rawh,"" a ti a." 
John5:9 Tin, thawklehkhatan chu mi chu a dam ta nghal a,a awngphah chu a la a,a kal ta a. Chu mi ni chu Chawlhni a ni a." 
John5:10 Chutichuan Judaten a dam taa hnenah chuan, ""Chawlhni a nih hi, i awngphah i lak a thiang lo e,"" an ti a." 
John5:11 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Mi tidamtu ngeiin ka hnenah, 'I awngphah la la, kein kal tawh rawh,' mi ti a ni,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John5:12 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, "" 'I awngphah la la, kein kal tawh rawh,' i hnena titu chu tu nge ni?"" an ti a, an zawt a." 
John5:13 Nimahsela a dama chuan tu nge a nih a hre lo a, chutah chuan mipui an awm avangin Isua a kal bo ta si a." 
John5:14 Nakinah chuan Isua'n ani chu Pathian biak inah a hmu a, a hnenah, ""Ngai rawh, i dam tak hi, thil tisual leh tawh su, chutilochuan thil tha lo lehzual i chungah a lo awm dah ang e,"" a ti a." 
John5:15 Tin, chu mi chu a va kal a, Judate hnenah chuan a tidamtu chu Isua a ni tih a hrilh a." 
John5:16 Chutichuan Chawlhnia chung thilte chu a tih avangin Judaten Isua an tiduhdah ta a. 
John5:17 Nimahsela Isua'n anni chu a bia a, an hnenah, ""Ka Pain tun thleng pawhinhna a thawk reng a ni, kei pawhin ka thawk ve a ni,"" a ti a." 
John5:18 Chutichuan Judaten tihhlum an tum lehzual a, Chawlhni a bawhchhiat avang chauh pawh a ni lo a, Pathian ama Paah a vuah a, Pathian tluka a insiam avang pawhin a ni." 
John5:19 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, Fapain mahniin engmah a ti thei lo, Pa thiltih a hmuhchauh lo chu; thil a tih ang apiang chu, Fapa pawhin a ti ve thin." 
John5:20 Pain Fapa a hmangaih a, a thiltih apiang a hnenah a entir thin; he'ng aia thiltih ropui zawk hi a hnenah a la entir ang, mak in tih atan." 
John5:21 Pain mitthite a kai tho a, a tinung thin angin, Fapa pawhin a duh apiang a tinung thin." 
John5:22 Pain tuma thu a relsak ngai lo, thu zawng zawng Fapa a reltir ta zawk;" 
John5:23 mi zawng zawngin Pa an zah angin, Fapa pawh an zahna turin. Tupawh Fapa zah lo chu, Pa a tirtu pawh chu zah lo a ni." 
John5:24 Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, tupawh ka thu hriaa mi tirtu ring chuan, chatuana nunna a nei tawh, thiam lohin a awm lo a, thihna ata a chhuak a, nunnaah a lut ta zawk a ni." 
John5:25 Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, a hun a thleng dawn ta, tunah pawh a thleng tawh mek, chutih hunah chuan mitthiten Pathian Fapa aw an hria ang a, a hria apiang an nung ang." 
John5:26 Pain mahnia nun a nei ang bawkin Fapa pawh mahnia nun neiin a siam: 
John5:27 tin, Mihring Fapa a nih avangin a hnenah rorel tur thu a pe." 
John5:28 Heng hi mak ti suh u, a hun a thleng dawn ta, chutih hunah chuan thlana awm zawng zawngin a aw an hria ang a, an chhuak vek ang;" 
John5:29 thil tha titute chu nunna changing an tho leh ang a, thil sual titute chu thiam loh changing an tho leh ang." 
John5:30 Keimahin engmah ka ti thei lo: benga ka hriat ang zelin ro ka rel thin; ka rorel chu dik tak a ni, keima thu thuin awm ka tum lo a, mi tirtu thu thu zawka awm ka tum thin avangin." 
John5:31 Mahni chanchin hriattir i la, ka thu hriattir a dik lo ang." 
John5:32 Ka chanchin hriattirtu chu mi dang a ni; ani chuan ka chanchin a hriattir chu a dik tih ka hria. 
John5:33 Nangni'n Johana hnenah mi in tir a, tin, ani chuan thutak chanchin a lo hriattir kha." 
John5:34 Thu hriattir ka pawm erawh chu mihring thu a ni lo, nimahsela in damna turin he'ng thu hi ka sawi a nih hi." 
John5:35 Chu Johana chu khawnvar alh tak leh eng tak chu a ni, a engah chuan hlim rih in duh kha." 
John5:36 Nimahsela hriattirna ka neih hi Johana hriattirna thu ai khan a ropui zawk a ni: Pain thiltih zawh tura mi pek, ka thiltih ngei hian Pain mi tir tih ka chanchin a hriattir a ni." 
John5:37 Pa mi tirtu pawh chuan ka chanchin a hriattir tawh. Nangni'n eng tikah mah a aw in hre ngai lo a, a hmel pawh in hmu ngai hek lo." 
John5:38 A thu pawh in rilruah in pai reng lo, a tirha hi in rin loh avangin." 
John5:39 Pathian Lehkha in chhiar ngun thin, a chhungah chatuana nunna awmin in rin avangin: chung Lehkha chu ka chanchin hriattirtu chu a ni si a." 
John5:40 Nimahsela nunna nei turin ka hnenah in lo kal duh si lo. 
John5:41 Mihring chawimawina ka zawng lo. 
John5:42 Nangni ka hria a che u, Pathian hmangaihna in rilruah in nei lo e." 
John5:43 Ka Pa hmingin ka lo kal a nih hi, nangni'n mi lawm si lo: mi dang mahni hmingin lo kal se la, ani chu in lawm ang." 
John5:44 Nangni inchawimawi tawn lawm te u, engtin nge in rin theih ang? Pathian tak chauha chhuak chawimawina chu in zawng si lo." 
John5:45 Keiin Pa hnena ka hek che u ring suh u: in hektu chu pakhat a awm, in rin Mosia hi." 
John5:46 Mosia in rin chuan kei pawh mi ring tawh tur in ni; ani chuan keima chanchin a sin a ziak ni.Nimahsela a thu ziak chu in rin si loh chuan engtin nge ka thu in rin ang? a ti a. 
John5:47 Nimahsela a thu ziak chu in rin si loh chuan engtin nge ka thu in rin ang? a ti a. 
John6:1 Chung thil hnuah chuan, Isua chu Galili dil, Tiberi dil an tih ral lehlamah chuan a kal ta a." 
John6:2 Tin, damlote chunga chhinchhiahna a tihte chu an hmuh avangin mipui tam takin amah an zui a." 
John6:3 Tin, Isua chu tlangah chuan a kal chho a, chutah chuan a zirtirte hnenah a thu a." 
John6:4 Tin, Kalhlen Kut (Judate kut chu) a hnai tawh a." 
John6:5 Tin, Isua a dak a, mipui tam takin a hnen lam rawn panin a hmu a, Philipa hnenah, ""Hengho ei tur chhang khawi ata nge kan lei ang?"" a ti a." 
John6:6 Chung thu chu amah fiahna'n a sawi a ni, a tih tur chu amahin a hre reng si a." 
John6:7 Tin, Philipa chuan a hnenah, ""Mi tinin tlemtea an chan theuh tur pawh, duli zahnih man chhangin a daih lo ang,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John6:8 Tin, a zirtirte zinga pakhat Simon Petera unau Andria chuan a hnenah," 
John6:9 Barli chhangper panga leh sangha pahnih nei mipa naupang pakhat hetah a awm; nimahsela mi he'ng zozai zingah hian chung chu eng tham nge ni ang? a ti a. 
John6:10 Tin, Isua'n, ""Mite chu thuttir rawh u,"" a ti a. Tin, chu mi hmunah chuan hlobet tam tak a awm. Chutichuan patlingte chu an thu a, an tam lam chu sangnga lai an ni a." 
John6:11 Tin, Isua'n chhangperte chu a la a, lawmthu a sawi zawhin a thuhote hnenah chuan a sem a, chutiang bawkin sanghate pawh chu an duh tawkin a sem bawk a." 
John6:12 Tin, an kham hnuin, a zirtirte hnenah chuan, ""Engmah bo lo turin a bang nawite char rawh u,"" a ti a." 
John6:13 Chutichuan an char a, Barli chhangper panga eitute ei bang nawite chuanin bawmrang sawm leh pahnih an tikhat a." 
John6:14 Tin, mite chuan chhinchhiahna a tih chu an hmuh veleh, ""He mi hi zawlnei, khawvela lo kal tur kha a lo nih ngei hi,"" an ti a." 
John6:15 Chutichuan amah chu lala siam tura man luih tumin an lo kal dawn tih Isua'n a hria a, tlangah amah chauhin a kal hrang leh ta a." 
John6:16 Tin, khua a lo tlai lam chuan a zirtirte chu dilah chuan an zuk kal a;" 
John6:17 lawngah an chuang a, dilah chuan Kapernaum khua an pan a. Tin, khua a thim ta a, Isua lah chu an hnen a la thleng si lo." 
John6:18 Thlipui nasa tak a tleh avangin tui a fawn sang telh telh si a. 
John6:19 Tin, fing sawmhnih leh fing nga emaw, fing sawmthum emaw an kar chuan Isua chu dil chungah chuankea kala lawng rawn hnaihin an hmu a, an hlau a." 
John6:20 Nimahsela ani chuan an hnenah, ""Keimah ka ni alawm, hlau suh u,"" a ti a." 
John6:21 Chutichuan lawngah chuan chuantir an duh ta a; tin, chawplehchilhin lawng chuan an pan khawmual chu an thleng ta nghal a." 
John6:22 Atukah chuan dil ral lehlama mipui dingte chuan, lawng pakhat lo chu lawng dang a awm lo a, Isua chu a zirtirte hnenah lawngah chuan a chuang ve lo a, a zirtirte anmahni chauhin an kal tih an hria a." 
John6:23 (Nimahsela Lalpa'n lawmthu a sawi hnua chhang an eina hmun kiangah khan, Tiberi khua atangin lawng tete a lo thleng si a)." 
John6:24 Chutichuan,mipui chuan Isua leh a zirtirte chu an awm ta lo tih an hriatin, anni pawh lawng teahte chuan an chuang a, Isua zawngin Kapernaum khua an lo thleng a." 
John6:25 Tin, dil rala an rawn hmuhin a hnenah, ""Rabbi, engtikah nge he lam i lo thlen?"" an ti a." 
John6:26 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, chhinchhiahnate in hmuh avanga mi zawng in ni lo a, chhangper in ei puar avang khan a nih zawk hi." 
John6:27 Chaw dangral mai umin phe phe suh u, chatuana nun thlenga awm reng tur chaw, Mihring Fapain a pek tur che u chu, umin phe zawk rawh u; Pa Pathian chuan ani chu a chhinchhiah tawh si a,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John6:28 Tin, anni chuan a hneh, ""Pathian hna kan thawh theihna'n thil eng nge kan tih tur?"" an ti a." 
John6:29 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""Pathian hnathawh chu hei hi a ni, a mi tirh hi ring u la,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John6:30 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Chhinchhiahna eng nge i tih ang, kan hmuha kan rin theihna tur chein? Thil eng nge i tih ang?" 
John6:31 Kan thlahtuten thlalerah manna kha an ei thin, 'Van atang chuan an hnenah chhang ei tur a pe,' tih ziak angin,"" an ti a." 
John6:32 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, van atanga chhang in hmuh kha Mosia pek che u a ni lo, ka Pa erawh chuan van atangin chhang tak a pe che u a nih hi." 
John6:33 Pathian chhang chu van atanga lo chhuka khawvel hnena nun petu hi a ni,"" a ti a." 
John6:34 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Lalpa, chu chhang chu kumkhuain min pe rawh,"" an ti a." 
John6:35 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""Kei hi nunna chhang chu ka ni; tupawh ka hnena lo kal chu a ril a tam lo ang, tupawh mi ring chu engtikah mah a tuihal lo ang." 
John6:36 Nimahsela nangni'n mi hmuh pawhin mi ring si lo tih ka hrilh che u kha. 
John6:37 Pain mi pek zawng zawng ka hnenah an lo kal vek ang; tupawh ka hnena lo kal chu ka hnawt chhuak tawp lo ang. 
John6:38 Mahni duhzawng ti turin van atanga lo chhuk ka ni lo a, mi tirtu duhzawng ti tura lo chhuk ka ni zawk e." 
John6:39 Hei hi mi tirtu duhzawng chu a ni, ani'n mi pek zawng zawng engmah hloh lo i la, ni kin niah chuan kai tho zawk i la." 
John6:40 Tin, hei hi ka Pa duhzawng a ni, tupawh Fa hmu a, ring apiangin chatuana nunna nei se la; tin, keiin ni kin niah chuan ani chu ka kai tho ang,"" a ti a." 
John6:41 Tin, ""Van atanga chhang lo chhuk chu ka ni,"" a tih avangin Judate chu a chungah an phunnawi a." 
John6:42 He mi hi Josefa fa, Isua a ni lo em ni, a nu leh pa pawh kan hriat hi? 'Van atanga lo chhuk kan ni,' eng ti tiha ti nge ni le?"" an ti a." 
John6:43 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""Phun phunnawi suh u." 
John6:44 Pa mi tirtuin a hip loh chuan tumah ka hnenah an lo kal thei lo ang; tin, keiin ni kin niah chuan a lo kala chu ka kai tho ang." 
John6:45 Zawlneite lehkhabuah, 'Pathian zirtirin an awm vek ang,' tih ziak a ni. Mi tin Pa thu hriaa zir apiang chu ka hnenah an lo kal thin." 
John6:46 Tumahin Pa an hmu ngai ka ti lo, Pathian hnena lo chhuaka chauh lo chuan; ani chuan Pa chu a hmu." 
John6:47 Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, tupawh a ring chuan chatuana nunna an nei tawh a ni." 
John6:48 Kei hi nunna chhang ka ni. 
John6:49 In thlahtuten thlalerah manna kha an ei na a, an thi a." 
John6:50 Hei hi van atanga chhang lo chhuk chu a ni, miin a eia a thih lohna'n." 
John6:51 Kei hi van atanga chhang nung lo chhuk chu ka ni, tupawhin he chhang hi a ei chuan chatuanin a nung reng ang, a ni, khawvel nunna'na ka pek tur chhang chu ka tisa hi a ni,"" a ti a." 
John6:52 Chutichuan Judate an inhnial a, ""He mi hian engtin nge a tisa ei turin min pek theih ang?"" an ti a." 
John6:53 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, Mihring Fapa tisa in ei a, a thisen in a in bawk loh chuan, nangmahniin nunna nei hek lo che u." 
John6:54 Tupawh ka tisa eia ka thisen in chuan chatuana nunna a nei tawh, tin, ni kin niah chuan ani chu ka kaitho ang." 
John6:55 Ka tisa hi chaw tak a ni a, ka thisen hi in tur tak a ni si a." 
John6:56 Tupawh ka tisa eia ka thisen in chu, keimahah a awm reng thin, kei pawh amahah ka awm reng thin." 
John6:57 Pa nung chuan mi tir a, Pa zara nung ka ni ang bawkin, tupawh mi ei chu keima zarah ani pawh a nung ang." 
John6:58 Hei hi van atanga chhang lo chhuk chu a ni; chi thlahtute chuan chhang an ei a, an thi ang kha a ni lo, tupawh he mi chhang hi ei chu chatuanin a nung reng ang,"" a ti a." 
John6:59 Chung thu chu inkhawmna inah a sawi a, Kapernaum khuaa a zirtir lai khan." 
John6:60 Chutichuan a zirtirte a then tam takin chu chu an hriatin, ""Hei hi thu khirh tak a ni, tu nge dawngsawng thei ang?"" an ti a." 
John6:61 Chutichuan chu mi thu-ah chuan a zirtirte an phunnawi tih Isua'n a rilruin a hria a, an hnenah, ""He thu hian a tilungni lo che u elo?" 
John6:62 Mihring Fapa hi hmana a awmna ngaia lawn chhova in hmuh chuan, engtin nge in tih ang le?" 
John6:63 Tinungtu chu thlarau a ni, tisa chu engmahah a tlaktlai lo; in hnena thu ka sawite hi thlarau a ni, nunna pawh a ni." 
John6:64 Nimahsela in zingah a then ring lo in awm e,"" a ti a. (Isua'n a ring lotute leh a mantirtu tur chu a tir ata a hre reng si)." 
John6:65 Tin, amah vek chuan, ""Chuvangin a ni, in hnenah, 'Pain a puih loh chuan tumah ka hnenah an lo kal thei lo ang,' ka tih kha ni,"" a ti a." 
John6:66 Chu veleh chuan a zirtirte a then tam tak an kal bo a, amah an pawl leh ta lo a." 
John6:67 Chutichuan Isua'n sawm leh pahnihte hnenah chuan, ""Nangni pawhin kal bo in duh ve em?"" a ti a." 
John6:68 Tin, Simon Petera'n a hnenah, ""Lalpa, tu hnenah nge kan kal ang? Nangin chatuana nunna thu i nei alawm." 
John6:69 Nang Pathian mi thianghlim chu i ni tih kan awih ta a, hriat pawh kan hria e,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John6:70 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""Nangni sawm leh pahnihte hi keima thlan inni lo'm ni? In zinga mi pakhat diabola a ni leh nghal vei nen,"" a ti a.(Iskariot Simona fapa Juda, sawm leh pahnihte zinga tel vea thu kha a sawi a ni,ani chu a mantirtu tur a ni si a)." 
John6:71 (Iskariot Simona fapa Juda, sawm leh pahnihte zinga tel vea thu kha a sawi a ni,ani chu a mantirtu tur a ni si a)." 
John7:1 Chu mi zawhah chuan Isua'n Galili ram a fang a; Judaten amah tihhlum an tum avangin Judai ram chu a fang duh lo a. 
John7:2 Tin, Judate Bawkte Kut chu a hnai tawh a." 
John7:3 Chutichuan a unauten a hnenah, ""Heta tangin Judai ramah va kal rawh, i zirtirte pawhin i thiltih hi an hmuh theihna'n." 
John7:4 Tuma'n arukin thil engmah an ti lo, mahni hmingthan duh siin. Heng thilte hi i tih tak zet chuan khawvel hnenah inentir rawh,"" an ti a." 
John7:5 (A unaute pawh chuan amah an ring si lo va). 
John7:6 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""Ka hun a la thleng lo; nangni hun erawh chu kumkhuain a thleng reng a ni." 
John7:7 Khawvelin nangni an haw thei lo a che u, kei erawh chu mi haw thin, an thiltihte a sual tih ka hrilhfiah thin avangin." 
John7:8 Nangni kutnaah han kal rawh u, kei zawng tun kutah hian ka han kal dawn rih lo ve, ka hun a la thlen loh avangin,"" a ti a." 
John7:9 Tin, chung thu chu an hnenah a sawi a, Galili ramah a la awm reng a." 
John7:10 Nimahsela a unaute chu kutnaa an chhoh tak hnu chuan ani pawh vantlang hriat lohin, aruk angin a han kal ve a." 
John7:11 Tin, Judaten kutnaah chuan ani chu an zawng a, ""Khawiah nge a awm?"" an ti a." 
John7:12 Tin, a chungah mipuite zinga mi an phunru sup sup a, a thenin, ""Mi tha a ni e,"" an ti a; thenkhatin, ""Hnai lo e, mipui a bum zawk thin a ni,"" an ti a." 
John7:13 Nimahsela Judate an hlauh avangin tuma'n a chungchang thu an sawi lang lo. 
John7:14 Tin, kut vang lai takin Isua Pathian biak inah a han kal a, a zirtir a." 
John7:15 in, Judaten, ""He mi hian zir ngai loin engtin nge lehkha a thiam?"" an ti a, mak an ti hle a." 
John7:16 Tin, Isua'n anni chu a chhang a, ""Ka thu zirtir hi ka ta a ni lo a, mi tirtu ta a ni zawk." 
John7:17 Tupawh ama duhzawng tih duh chuan, ka thu zirtir hi Pathian tihchhuah nge keima phuahchawpa ka sawi a hria ang." 
John7:18 Tupawh mahni phuahchawp thu sawi chu, mahni mawina zawng a ni; a tirtu mawina zawng erawh chu, chu mi chu mi tak zet a ni, amahah chuan dik lohna reng a awm lo." 
John7:19 Mosia'n Dan chu in hnenah a pe lo che u em ni? Nimahsela in zingah tumahin Dan chu in zawh si lo. Nangni'n engati nge mi tihhlum in tum? a ti a. 
John7:20 Tin, mipui chuan, ""Ramhuai zawl i nih hi; tuin nge tihhlum tum che?"" an ti a, an chhang a." 
John7:21 Tin, Isua'n a chhang a, a hnenah, ""Thil pakhat ka tih kha nangni zawng zawngin mak in tih hi." 
John7:22 He mi avang a ni, Mosia'n serhtan thu kha a pek che u a, (Mosia tihchhuah a ni si lo a, thlahtute tihchauh a ni zawk si a,) Chawlhni pawha mi serh in tan thin ni." 
John7:23 Mosia Dan bawhchhiat lohna'n Chawlniah pawh mipain a serh a tantir si chuan, keiin Chawlhnia mi ka tihdam tak viah avangin ka chungah in thinur bik maw?" 
John7:24 A lan angin ngaihtuah suh u la, fel takin ngaihtuah zawk rawh u,"" a ti a." 
John7:25 Tin, Jerusalem khuaa mi thenkhatin, ""He mi hi tihhlum an tuma chu a ni lo'm ni?" 
John7:26 En teh u, alangin thu a sawi a, a hnenah engmah an sawi si lo. Amah hi Krista a ni tih hotuten an hre ta tak zet em maw ni aw?" 
John7:27 He mi hi a pianna chin lam kan hre si a, Krista erawh chu a lo thlen hunah chuan a pianna chin tuma'n an hre loing,"" an ti a." 
John7:28 Chuvang chuan Isua'n Pathian biak ina a zirtir pahin a au a, ""Nangni'n mi hria e, ka pianna chin pawh in hria e. Nimahsela mahni thua lo kal ka ni lo, mi tirtu hi mi tak zet a ni, ani chu in hre si lo." 
John7:29 Kei erawh chuan ani chu ka hria; a hnen atanga lo chhuak ka ni a, ani chuan mi tir a ni si a,"" a ti a." 
John7:30 Chutichuan ani chu man an tum a, nimahsela a hun a la thlen loh avangin tuma'n an khawih si lo." 
John7:31 Mipui a then tam tak erawh chuan ani chu an ring a, ""Krista chu a lo thlen hunah, he mi tih aia tam zawk thilmak a rawn ti ang em ni?"" an ti a." 
John7:32 Tin, Pharisaite'n a chunga mipui phunrukna thute chu an hria a; tichuan puithiam lalte leh Pharisaite'n a man turin tiangkengtute an tir ta a." 
John7:33 Tin, Isua'n, ""Rei lo te in hnenah ka awm rih zet ang a, mi tirtu hnenah ka kal ang." 
John7:34 Nangni'n mi zawng ang a, mi hmu si lo ang; ka awmnaah pawh in lo kal thei lo vang,"" a ti a." 
John7:35 Tin, Judate an inbia a, ""Kan hmuh loh turin he mi hi khawiah nge a kal dawn? Grikte zinga Pem darhho hnena kalin Grikte chu a zirtir dawn em ni ang?" 
John7:36 'Nangni'n mi zawng ang a, mi hmu si lo ang a; ka awmnaah pawh in lo kal thei lo vang,' a tih hi, eng a tihna nge ni ang?"" an ti a." 
John7:37 Tin, kut tiak dawn ni, ni ropui berah chuan Isua a ding a, a au a, ""Tupawh a tuihal chuan ka hnenah lo kal se la in rawh se." 
John7:38 Tupawh mi ring chu Pathian Lehkha sawi angin tui nung luite a pumah a luang chhuak ang,"" a ti a." 
John7:39 (Chung thu chu a ringtuten Thlarau an neih tur thu a sawi a ni; Thlarau chu pek a la ni rih lo, Isua chu chawimawia a la awm loh avangin)." 
John7:40 Chutichuan mipui zinga thenkhatin chung thu chu an hriatin, ""Hei hi zawlnei chu a nih tak hi,"" an ti a." 
John7:41 Thenkhatin, ""Hei hi Krista chu a ni,"" an ti a. Thenkhat erawh chuan, ""Khaw nge Krista chu Galili rama a lo chhuah tehlul ang?" 
John7:42 Krista chu Davida thlahte zingah, Davida awmna khua Bethlehemah chhuak tur a ni tih Pathian Lehkhain a sawi lo em ni?"" an ti a." 
John7:43 Chutichuan amah avangin mipui chu an inthen a, an inkhing ta a." 
John7:44 Thenkhat chuan man an duh a, nimahsela tuma'n an khawih si lo." 
John7:45 Tin, tiangkengtute chu puithiam lalte leh Pharisaite hnenah an lo kal leh a; tin, anni chuan an hnenah, ""Engati nge in rawn hruai loh?"" an lo ti a." 
John7:46 Tiangkengtute chuan, ""Sawtiang rengin miin thu an sawi ngai lo,"" an ti a, an chhang a." 
John7:47 Tin, Pharisaite chuan an hnenah, ""Nangni pawh bumin in awm ve ta elo?" 
John7:48 Hotute leh Pharisaite zinga mi reng reng amah ring an awm tawh em ni? 
John7:49 Heng Dan hre lo mipuite tehchai hi anchhe dawng an ni a sin,"" an ti a, an chhang a." 
John7:50 Nikodema, hmana Isua hnena lo kal kha, an zinga tel ve a ni a, an hnenah," 
John7:51 Ama ka ngeia a thu hriat leh a thiltih hriat hmain kan danin mi thiam loh a chantir ngai em ni? a ti a. 
John7:52 Anni chuan a hnenah, ""Nang pawh chu Galili mi i ni ve elo? Zawng la, Galili ramah chuan zawlnei tumah chhuak tur an awm lo tih hre ta che,"" an ti a, an chhang a.Tin, mi tin mahni in theuhvah an kal ta a." 
John7:53 Tin, mi tin mahni in theuhvah an kal ta a." 
John8:1 Isua erawh chu Oliv tlangah a kal ta zawk a. 
John8:2 Tin,zingah Pathian biak inah a lut leh a, mi zawng zawng a hnenah an lo kal a; tin, ani chu a thu a, anmahni a zirtir a." 
John8:3 Tin, lehkhaziaktute leh Pharisaite'n hmeichhe pakhat a uire lai an man an rawn hruai a; tin, a laiah an dintir a," 
John8:4 Isua hnenah, ""Zirtirtu, he hmeichhia hi a uire lai an man a ni, a uire lai takin." 
John8:5 Dan Lehkhabuah, Mosia'n hetiang mi hi lunga den hlum thu min pe a; nangin engtin nge i ngaih?"" an ti a." 
John8:6 Chu thu chu amah fiahna'n an ti a, a hekna tur an hmuh theihna'n. Chutichuan Isua a kun a, a kut zungin leiah a ziak a." 
John8:7 Tin, an zawh sek sek avangin ani chu a tho a, an hnenah, ""In zinga sual nei lo apiangin amah chu lungin deng hmasa rawh se,"" a ti a." 
John8:8 Tin, a kun leh a, a kutzungin leiah a ziak leh a." 
John8:9 Tin, anni chuan a thusawi chu an hriatin, upa berin a tan a, a tawp thlengin, pakhat khatin an relh chhuak ta zel a; chutichuan Isua chauh a awm ta a, hmeichhia a laia a awmna ngaia awm nen khan." 
John8:10 Tin, Isua a tho a, a hnenah, ""Hmeichhia, khawiah nge an awm tak? Tuma'n thiam loh an chantir na che nge?"" a ti a." 
John8:11 Tin, ani chuan, ""Lalpa, tuma'n mi chantir lo e,"" a ti a. Tin, Isua'n, ""Kei pawhin thiam loh ka chantir lo va che; kal la, tun hnuah tisual leh tawh suh,"" a ti a." 
John8:12 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah thu a sawi leh a, ""Kei khawvel entu ka ni; tupawh mi zui chu thimah a leng tawp loing a, nunna eng a nei zawk ang,"" a ti a." 
John8:13 Chutichuan Pharisaite'n a hnenah, ""Mahni thu hriattir i ni; i thu hriattir a dik lo e"" an ti a." 
John8:14 Isua'n an hnenah, ""Mahni thu hriattir mah i la, ka thu hriattir a dik a ni; keiin ka lo chhuahna leh ka kalna tur chin pawh ka hria e; nangni zawngin ka lo chhuahna leh ka kalna tur chin pawh in hre si lo." 
John8:15 Nangni'n tisa angin in sawisel thin; kei zawngin tumah ka sawisel lo. 
John8:16 A ni, sawisel mah i la ka sawiselna a dik ang; keimah chang ka ni lo a, kei leh Pa mi tirtu kan ni zawk si a." 
John8:17 A ni, in Dan Lehkhabuah pawh, 'Mi pahnih thu a dik,' tih ziak a ni bawk alawm." 
John8:18 Kei hi mahni thu hriattirtu ka ni, Pa mi tirtu chuan ka thu a hriattir bawk,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John8:19 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""I Pa khawiah nge?"" an ti a. Isua'n, ""Nangni'n kei min hre lo, ka Pa pawh in hre lo; kei mi hriat chuan ka Pa pawh in hria ang,"" tiin a chhang a." 
John8:20 Chung thu chu Pathian biak inah a zirtir pahin, thawhlawm dahna hmunah a sawi a; tuma'n amah an man si lo, a hun a la thlen loh avangin." 
John8:21 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Ka kal bo dawn hi, nangni'n mi zawng ang a, in sual nei rengin in thi ang; ka kalna turah in lo kal thei lo ang,"" a ti leh a." 
John8:22 Tin, Judaten, "" 'Ka kalna turah in lo kal thei lo ang,' a tih hi, a intihlum dawn em ni?"" an ti a." 
John8:23 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Nangni hnuai lama chhuak in ni; kei zawng chung lama chhuak ka ni; nangni he khawvela chhuak in ni; kei zawng he khawvela chhuak hi ka ni lo." 
John8:24 Chuvangin in hnenah,'In sual nei rengin in thi ang,' ka tih kha; ani chu ka ni tih in awih loh chuan in sual nei rengin in thi mawlh ang,"" a ti a." 
John8:25 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Tunge maw i nih leh?"" an ti a. Isua'n an hnenah, ""Atir ata in hnena ka sawi thin kha." 
John8:26 Nangni chungchang thu-ah hian thil tam tak sawi tur leh ngaituah tur ka nei; engpawh ni rawh se, mi tirtu chu mi dik tak a ni; a hnena thu ka hriat apiang khawvel hnenah ka hrilh hi,"" a ti a." 
John8:27 Pa thu an hnenah a sawi tih an hre lo. 
John8:28 Chutichuan Isua vekin, ""Nangni'n Mihring Fapa hi in khaikan hnuah, ani chu ka ni tih leh, keiin mahni thuin thil engmah ka ti lo a, Pain mi hrilh ang zelin he'ng thu hi ka sawi zawk a ni tih in lo la hria ang." 
John8:29 Mi tirtu chu ka hnenah a awm a, mi thlahthlam lo e; a thil lawmzawng apiang ka tih fo avangin,"" a ti a." 
John8:30 Tin, chung thu chu a sawi laiin mi tam takin amah chu an ring ta a." 
John8:31 Chutichuan Isua'n a ringtu Judate hnenah chuan, ""Ka thua in awm reng chuan ka zirtirte in ni tak tak ang." 
John8:32 Tin thutak in hria ang a, thutak chuan bawih a ban ang che u,"" a ti a." 
John8:33 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Abrahama thlahte kan ni a sin, tun thlengin tuma bawihah kan awm ngai lo, 'Bawih a ban ang che u,' eng ti tiha i ti nge ni?"" an ti a,an chhang a." 
John8:34 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, tupawh thil tisual apiang, sual bawih a ni." 
John8:35 Bawih chu kumkhuain inah a awm reng lo; fapa erawh chu kumkhuain a awm reng thin. 
John8:36 Chutichuan Fapain bawih a ban che u chuan in chhuak tak meuh ang. 
John8:37 Abrahama thlahte in ni tih ka hria e; ni mah u la, mi thah in tum si, ka thuin in rilrua awmna a neih loh avangin." 
John8:38 Keiin ka Pa hnena thil ka hmuh chu ka sawi thin; nangni pawhin in pa hnena thil in hriat chu in ti thin,"" a ti a." 
John8:39 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Kan pa Abrahama a ni,"" an ti a, an chhang a. Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""Abrahama fate in nih chuan Abrahama thil in ti ang chu." 
John8:40 Nimahsela tunah mi thah in tum si. Pathian hnena thutak ka hriat hrilhtu che u ka ni a sin; Abrahama zawngin hetiangin a ti lo e. 
John8:41 Nangni zawngin in pa thil chu in ti thin,"" a ti a. Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Inuirea hrin kanni lo e, Pa pakhat chauh kan nei, Pathian chu,"" an ti a." 
John8:42 Isua'n an hnenah, ""Pathian in Pa a nih chuan nangni'n mi hmangaih ang chu; Pathian hnena chhuak leh a hnen ata lo kal ka ni si a; keima thua lo kal ka ni hek lo, amahin mi tir zawk a ni." 
John8:43 Engati nge ka tawng awmzia in hriat loh? Ka thu in dawnsawn theih loh avang a ni. 
John8:44 Nangni zawng in pa diabola hnena chhuak in ni a, in pa duhzawng tih in duh a ni. Ani chu atir ata tualthat a ni, thutakah a awm lo, a chhungah thu tak reng a awm loh avngin. Dawt thu a sawiin ama tihchhuah a sawi a ni thin; dawthei a ni si, dawt pa pawh a ni." 
John8:45 Thutak ka sawi avangin nangni'n mi ring lo a ni. 
John8:46 In zingah tuin nge sual kawngah thiam loh mi chantir thei awm? Thutak ka sawi pawhin nangni'n engati nge mi rin loh? 
John8:47 Pathian hnena chhuak chuan Pathian thu a pawm thin; he mi avang hian in pawm lo a ni, Pathian hnena chhuak in nih loh avangin,"" a ti a." 
John8:48 Tin, Judate chuan a hnenah, ""Samari mi, ramhuai zawl i ni kan tih kha kan tidik zet lo em ni?"" an ti a, an chhang a." 
John8:49 Isua'n, ""Ramhuai zawl ka ni lo e; ka Pa ka chawimawi a ni zawk e, nangni'n ka hming in tihchhiat hi." 
John8:50 Nimahsela mahni mawina zawng ka ni lo; a zawngtu leh a ngaihtuahtu mi pakhat a awm a ni. 
John8:51 Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, miin ka thu a zawm chuan kumkhuain thih ni hmel a hmu lo ang,"" a ti a." 
John8:52 Tin, Judaten a hnenah, ""Ramhuai zawl i ni tih tunah kan hre ta. Abrahama a thi tawh, zawlneite nen, nangin, 'Miin ka thu a zawm chuan kumkhuain thihna a tem lo vang,' i ti si a." 
John8:53 Kan thlahtu Abrahama aiin i ropui zawk em ni? Ani pawh a thi tawh, zawlneite pawh an thi tawh; tuah nge i insiam ni?"" an ti a." 
John8:54 Tin, Isua'n, ""Mahni inchawimawi i la ka mawi engah mah a ni lo: 'Kan Pathian,' in tih ka Pa chu mi chawimawitu a ni;" 
John8:55 nangni'n amah in hre si lo; kei erawh chuan amah ka hria; 'Amah ka hre lo,' ti i la, nangmahni anga dawthei bawk ka ni ang: chutichuan amah ka hria a, a thu pawh ka zawm thin." 
John8:56 In thlahtu Abrahama kha, ka ni hmu tur a nih avngin a hlim em em thin, tin, a hmu ngei a, a lawm hle a,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John8:57 Tin, Judate chuan a hnenah, ""Nang kum sawmnga pawh la ni lo pui che, Abrahama i hmu em ni?"" an ti a." 
John8:58 Isua'n an hnenah, ""Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, Abrahama awm hma pawhin ka awm,"" a ti a.Chutichuan a denna'n lung an char a; nimahsela Isua a biru a, Pathian biak in ata chu a chhuak ta a." 
John8:59 Chutichuan a denna'n lung an char a; nimahsela Isua a biru a, Pathian biak in ata chu a chhuak ta a." 
John9:1 Tin, Isua'n a kal pahin a pian tirh ata mitdel pakht a hmu a." 
John9:2 Tin, a zirtirten a hnenah, ""Rabbi, mitdel saa a pian hi tuin nge thil tisual, he mi hian nge a nu leh a pain?"" an ti a, an zawt a." 
John9:3 Isua'n, ""He mi hian a tisual hek lo, a nu leh a pain an tisual hek lo; Pathian hnathawh a chunga a lanna tur a nih zawk hi." 
John9:4 Chhun a nih laiin mi tirtu hna kan thawk tur a ni; zan a nih dawn tak hi, chu mi hunah chuan tuma'n hna an thawk thei lo ang." 
John9:5 Khawvela ka awm chhungin khawvel entu ka ni,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John9:6 Chutianga a sawi zawh chuan leiah chil a chhak a, chil chuanin hlum a siam a, tin hlum chu a mitah a hnawih a," 
John9:7 tin, a hnenah, ""Siloam dilah va sil rawh,"" a ti a. (Siloam chu ""Tirh"" tihna a ni.) Tin, a va kal a, a sil a, mitvarin a lo haw leh ta a." 
John9:8 Chutichuan a vengte leh hmana a kutdawh hmu thinten, ""He mi hi thu chunga kutdawh thina kha a ni lo em ni?"" an ti a." 
John9:9 Mi dangin, ""Ani kha a nih hi,"" an ti a. Mi dangin, ""A ni lo e, a anpui a nih zawk hi,"" an ti a. Ani chuan ""Kha kha ka ni,"" a ti a." 
John9:10 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""I mit engtin nge a lo var le?"" an ti a." 
John9:11 Ani chuan, ""Isua an tih khan hlum a siam a, ka mitah a hnawih a, 'Siloam dilah va kal la, sil rawh,' mi ti a, chutichuan ka va kal a, ka sil a, mitvarna ka hmu ta a nih hi,"" a ti a." 
John9:12 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Ani chu khawiah nge a awm?"" an ti a. ""Ka hre lo,"" a ti a." 
John9:13 Tin, chu mi hmaa mitdela chu Pharisaite hnenah an hruai a." 
John9:14 Tin, Isua'n hlum a siam a, a mit a tihvar ni kha Chawlhni a ni a." 
John9:15 Chutichuan Pharisaite'n a mit a lo var tak danzia an zawt leh a. Ani chuan an hnenah, ""Ka mitah hlum a dah a, ka sil a, ka hmu thei ta mai a ni,"" a ti a." 
John9:16 Tin, Pharisai thenkhatin, ""Chu mi chu Chawlhni a puithu loh avangin Pathian hnena chhuak a ni lo ang,"" an ti a. Thenkhat erawh chuan ""Mi sualin engtin nge hetiang thilmak a tih theih ang?"" an ti a. Tin, an inthen a, an inkhing ta a." 
John9:17 Tin, mitdel hnenah chuan, ""I mit a tihvar kha nang eng angin nge amah chu i ngaih?"" an ti leh a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Zawlnei a ni,"" a ti a." 
John9:18 Nimahsela Judaten a mit lo var taa nu leh pa chu an koh hma loh chuan mitdel a ni thin a, a mit a lo var ta tih a chungchang thu chu an awih lo a." 
John9:19 Tin, a nu leh a pa hnenah, ""He mi hi in fapa, mitdel saa piang a ni in tih kha a ni em? Engtin nge tunah a hmuh theih tak le?"" tiin an zawt a." 
John9:20 Tin, a nu leh a pa chuan, ""Hei hi kan fapa a ni tih kan hria;" 
John9:21 nimahsela engtin nge tunah hian a lo hmuh theih tak hi kan hre lo, a mit tivartu pawh kan hre hek lo; amah zawt rawh u; patling a ni alawm; ama thu chu ama'n sawi ang hmiang,"" an ti a, an chhang a." 
John9:22 Judate an hlauh avangin a nu leh a pa chuan chung thu chu an sawi a ni; Judaten, chung hma pawh chuan tupawhin, ""Ani chu Krista a ni,"" tia a tan chuan inkhawmna in a hnawng ang tih an remti tlang si a." 
John9:23 Chuvang chuan a ni, a nu leh apa chuan, ""Patling a ni alawm, amah zawt rawh u,"" an tih ni." 
John9:24 Chutichuan mitdel chu an ko nawn leh a, a hnenah, ""Pathian fak rawh u, kha mi kha zawng mi sual a ni tih kan hria e,"" an ti a." 
John9:25 Tin, ani chuan, ""Mi sual a ni nge ni lo ka hre lo, kawng khat ka hria, tun hma khan ka mit a del a, tunah ka hmuh theih tak hi,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John9:26 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""I chungah engtin nge a tih? I mit engtin nge a tihvar?"" an ti a." 
John9:27 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Nichinah khan ka hrilh che u kha, in hre duh si lo; engati nge in hriat leh duh tak ni? Nangni pawh a zirtirte nih ve in duh elo?"" tiin a chhang a." 
John9:28 Tin, anni chuan an hau a, ""Nang hi ama zirtir i ni a, keini zawng Mosia zirtirte kan ni a sin." 
John9:29 Pathianin Mosia a bia tih kan hria, he mi teh chai hi khawia lo chhuak nge a nih kan hre hrep lo e,"" an ti a." 
John9:30 Tin, chu mi chuan an hnenah, ""Chu tak chu a ni a makna chu, khawia lo chhuak nge a nih in hriat loh a, ka mit a tihvar miau si hi." 
John9:31 Pathianin mi sual thu a ngaithla thin lo tih kan hria; nimahsela tupawhin Pathian a ngaihsak a, a duhzawng a tih chuan Pathianin ani chu a ngaithla thin." 
John9:32 Khawvel awm tirh ata tuma'n mitdel saa piang mit an tivar leh tih an hre ngai lo. 
John9:33 He mi hi Pathian hnena chhuak a nih loh chuan engmah a ti thei lo ang,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John9:34 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Nang sual lailet dera piang i ni alawm, nangin min hrilh vei em ni?"" an ti a, an chhang a. Tichuan ani chu an hnawt chhuak ta a." 
John9:35 Tin, an hnawt chhuak tih Isua'n a lo hria a; tin, a zawng chhuak a, ""Pathian Fapa i ring em?"" a ti a." 
John9:36 Tin, ani chuan, ""Ka pu, ani chu tu nge ni, ka rin theihna'n?"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John9:37 Isua'n a hnenah, ""Ani chu i hmu tawh reng alawm, a betu mek che hi a ni alawm,"" a ti a." 
John9:38 Tin, ani chuan, ""Lalpa, ka ring e,"" a ti a, chibai a buk a." 
John9:39 Tin, Isua'n, ""Rorel turin he khawvelah hian lo kal ka ni, mitdelte chu an mit a lo varna tur leh, mitvarte chu an mit a lo delna turin,"" a ti a." 
John9:40 Tin, a hnena Pharisai awmte chuan chung chu an hria a, a hnenah, ""Keini pawh hi mitdel kan ni ve elo?"" an ti a.Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""Mitdel in nih chuan sual in nei lo ang; nimahsela, 'Kan hmu thei e,' tunah in ti si a, chuvangin in sual a awm reng a ni." 
John9:41 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""Mitdel in nih chuan sual in nei lo ang; nimahsela, 'Kan hmu thei e,' tunah in ti si a, chuvangin in sual a awm reng a ni." 
John10:1 Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, tupawh beram huanga kawngkhara lut lo a, dang lama lawn lut chu,chu mi chu englo ruk hmang leh suam hmang a ni e." 
John10:2 Tupawh kawngkhara lut erawh chu beram vengtu a ni. 
John10:3 Kawngkhar vengtuin ani chu a lo hawnsak thin a; beramten a aw an hre thin a;ama beramte chu an hmingah a ko theuh a, a hruai chhuak thin a." 
John10:4 A ta zawng zawng a chhuahtir veleh, an hma a hruai a, beramte chuan amah an zui thin a, a aw an hre si a." 
John10:5 Mi dang zawng an zui lo ang a, an tlan bosan zawk ang: mi dangte aw zawng an hriat loh avangin,"" a ti a." 
John10:6 Chu tehkhin thu chu Isua'n an hnenah a sawi a; nimahsela eng thu nge an hnenah a sawi tih an hre si lo. 
John10:7 Chutichuan Isua'n an hnenah a sawi leh a, ""Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, kei hi beram kawngkhar chu ka ni." 
John10:8 Ka hmaa lo kal zawng zawngte kha ruk hmangte,suam hmangte an ni vek a;nimahsela beramte chuan an thu an awih lo." 
John10:9 Kei kawngkhar chu ka ni; tupawh keimahah a luh chuan humhimin a awm ang a, a lutin a chhuak ang a, a ei tur a hmu bawk ang." 
John10:10 Ruk hmang chu, ru tur leh tihlum tur leh tichhe tur lo chuan a lo kal lo; kei zawng nun an neihna'n, tam taka an neihna'n, lo kal ka ni." 
John10:11 Kei beram vengtu tha ka ni; beram vengtu thain beramte tan a nun a pe thin. 
John10:12 Inhlawhfa, beram vengtu tak ni lo a, beramte a ta ni loa chuan chinghne lo kal a hmuhin beramte a tlansan thin; tin, chinghnia chuan beramte a she a, a tidarh thin;" 
John10:13 inhlawhfa a ni a, beramte a ngaihsak loh avangin a tlan bo thin a ni." 
John10:14 Kei zawng beram vengtu tha ka ni; Pain mi hriat leh keiin Pa ka hriat ang hian ka ta ka hria a, ka ta pawhin mi hria a ni;" 
John10:15 tin, beramte tan chuan ka nun ka pe." 
John10:16 Tin, he beram huanga mi lo hi, beram dang ka nei; anni pawh ka la rawn hruai tur a ni, ka aw pawh an hria ang; chutichuan pawl khatin an awm ang a, a vengtu pakhat nen." 
John10:17 He mi avangin Pain mi hmangaih a ni, lak leh tura ka nun ka pek dawn avang hian." 
John10:18 Tuma'n mi laksak lo ang, keima thu thuin ka pe zawk dawn a ni. Pe thei ka ni, la leh thei pawh ka ni. He thupek hi ka Pa hnenah ka hmu a ni,"" a ti a." 
John10:19 Chung thu avang chuan Judate an inthen a, an inkhing leh a." 
John10:20 A then tam takin Ramhuai a zawl a, a a a nih hi; engati nge a thu in ngaihthlak?"" an ti a." 
John10:21 A thenin, ""Heng thu hi ramhuai zawl thusawi a ni lo e. Ramhuaiin mitdel mit a tivar thei em ni?"" an ti a." 
John10:22 Tin, Jerusalem khuaa Inpumpek Kut lai a ni a, chu chu thlasik lai a ni." 
John10:23 Tin, Isua Pathian biak inah, Solomona hulhliapah a vei a vei a." 
John10:24 Tin, Judate a velah an lo kal a, a hnenah, ""Eng chen nge tuilairapin min siam dawn? Krista i nih chuan fiah takin min hrilh rawh,"" an ti a." 
John10:25 Isua'n an hnenah, ""Ka hrilh tawh che u kha, in awih si lo; ka Pa hminga thil ka tih hi, he'ng hian ka chanchin a hriattir a nih hi." 
John10:26 Nimahsela in awih si lo, ka beram zinga mi in nih loh avangin." 
John10:27 Ka beramten ka aw an hre thin, kei pawhin anni chu ka hria, anni chuan mi zui thin;" 
John10:28 an hnenah chatuana nunna ka pe a; kumkhuain an boral lo ang a, tuma'n ka kut ata mi chhuhsak hek lo ang." 
John10:29 Anni mi petu, ka Pa chu, mi zawng zawng aia ropui ber a ni a; tuma'n Pa kut ata chu an chhuhsak thei lo ang." 
John10:30 Kei leh Pa chu pumkhat kan ni,"" tiin a chhang a." 
John10:31 Tin, Judate chuan a denna turin lung an char leh a." 
John10:32 Tin, Isua'n anni chu a bia a, ""Pa hnena chhuak hnathawh tha tam tak ka entir che u a, khang hnathawhte zingah khan hna eng avang khan nge lunga mi den dawn hi?"" a ti a." 
John10:33 Judate chuan a hnenah, ""Hna tha chungah lungin kan den dawn loh che hi; Pathian i sawichhiat chungah leh, nang, mihring ni si a, Pathiana i insiam avang zawk hian a ni,"" tiin an chhang a." 
John10:34 Isua'n an hnenah, ""In Dan Lehkhabuah 'Pathiante in ni ka ti,' tih ziak a ni lo vem ni?" 
John10:35 Pathian thu thlennate mah pathianho an tih chuan, (Pathian Lehkha Thu ban theih a ni si lo va)," 
John10:36 Pain a ruat a, khawvela a tirha chungah hian, 'Pathian Fapa ka ni,' ka tih avangin, 'Pathian i sawichhia,' in ti a ni maw?" 
John10:37 Ka Pa hna thawk ka nih loh chuan mi ring suh u. 
John10:38 Amaherawhchu thawk ka nih chuan kei mi ring lo mah u la, hnathawhte tal hi ring rawh u; Pa keimahah a awm tih leh, kei Paah ka awm tih in hriata in rinna'n,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John10:39 Chutichuan ani chu man an tum leh a, nimahsela an kut ata a chhuak a," 
John10:40 Jordan lui ralah, Johanan atira mi a baptisma lamah khan a kal bo leh a, chutah chuan a awm ta reng a." 
John10:41 Tin, mi tam tak a hnenah an lo kal a; ""Johanan chhinchhiahna engmah zawng a ti lo a; nimahsela Johanan he mi chungchang thu a sawi apiang kha a lo dik hle hi,"" an ti a.Tin, chutah chuan mi tam takin amah an ring ta a." 
John10:42 Tin, chutah chuan mi tam takin amah an ring ta a." 
John11:1 Tin, mi pakhat, Mari leh a laizawn Marthi awmna khua Bethani-a mi, Lazara, damlo a awm a." 
John11:2 (Mari, hriak rimtui Lal hnawiha a sama a ke hrutu kha, kha mi nuta Lazara a ni, damlo chu)." 
John11:3 Tin, a farnuten Isua hnenah, ""Lalpa, ngai teh, i hmangaih kha a dam lo e,"" tiin mi an tir a." 
John11:4 Tin, Isua'n chu chu a hria a, ""He na hi thihna tur a ni lo, Pathian mawina'n a ni zawk e, Pathian Fapa chu he mi avang hian a la mawina turin,"" a ti a." 
John11:5 Tin, Isua'n Marthi te, a laizawn te, Lazara te a hmangaih a." 
John11:6 Chuvangin a dam lo tih a hriatin a awmna ngaiah ni hnih a la awm ta cheu a. 
John11:7 Tin, chu mi hnuah chuan a zirtirte hnenah, ""Judai ramah i kal leh ang u,"" a ti a." 
John11:8 Tin, zirtirte chuan a hnenah, ""Rabbi, hman lawkah khan Judaten lunga den an tum che kha; chuti pawhin chutah chuan i kal leh bawk dawn em ni?"" an ti a." 
John11:9 Tin, Isua'n, ""Chhunah darker sawm leh pahnih a awm lo em ni? Mi, chhuna a len chuan a pai ngai lo, he khawvel eng hi a hmuh avangin." 
John11:10 Amaherawhchu mi, zana a len chuan a pai thin, amahah chuan eng a awm loh avangin,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John11:11 Chung thu chu a sawi a; tin, chu mi hnuah chuan an hnenah, ""Kan thian Lazara chu a muhil ta a; a muhil kai harh turin ka kal dawn a ni,"" a ti a." 
John11:12 Chutichuan zirtirte chuan a hnenah, ""Lalpa, a muthilh tawh chuan a dam leh ang chu,"" an ti a." 
John11:13 (Isua'n a thih thu a sawi a ni a; nimahsela anni chuan a chawlh chhunga a muthilh thu a sawi emaw an ti a). 
John11:14 Chutichuan Isua'n fiah takin an hnenah a sawi a, ""Lazara a thi a ni." 
John11:15 Chuta ka awm lo chu ka lawmsak a che u, in rin theihna'n; nimahsela a hnenah i kal ang u,"" a ti a." 
John11:16 Tin, Thoma, Phira an tih chuan a zirpuihote hnenah, ""A thihnaa thi ve turin i kal ve ang u,"" a ti a." 
John11:17 Chutichuan Isua'n a thlenin, ni li thlanah a lo awm tawh tih a hria a." 
John11:18 Bethani khua chu Jerusalem khaw kiang a ni a, fing sawm leh fing nga laia hla a ni;" 
John11:19 tichuan an nuta thih chunga tithlamuang turin Judateho tam tak Marthi leh Mari hnenah an lo kal a. 
John11:20 Tin, Marthi chuan Isua a lo kal dawn tih a hriat veleh a hmuak a; Mari erawh chu inah a la thu reng a." 
John11:21 Tin, Marthi chuan Isua hnenah, ""Lalpa, heta awm ni la chu ka nuta a thi lo tur." 
John11:22 Tunah pawh Pathian hnena i ngen apiang Pathianin a pe ang che tih ka hria e,"" a ti a." 
John11:23 Isua'n a hnenah, ""I nuta a tho leh ang,"" a ti a." 
John11:24 Marthi chuan a hnenah, ""Ni kin nia thawhlehnaah chuan a tho leh ang tih ka hria e,"" a ti a." 
John11:25 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, ""Kei hi thawhlehna leh nunna chu ka ni; tupawh mi ring chu thi mah se la a nung reng ang;" 
John11:26 nung apiangin mi ring chu kumkhuain an thi lo ang; chu thu chu i ring em? a ti a. 
John11:27 Ani chuan a hnenah, ""Ring e, Lalpa, Krista, Pathian Fapa, khawvela lo kal tura chu i ni tih ka ring e,"" a ti a." 
John11:28 Tin, chu thu chu a sawi zawh veleh a kal a, a laizawn Mari chu arukin a ko a, ""Zirtirtu hetah a awm a, a ko va che,"" a ti a." 
John11:29 Tin, ani chuan chu chu a hriat veleh a tho thuai a, a hnenah a va kal a." 
John11:30 (Isua chu khuaah a la lut lo a, Marthiin a va hmuah laia a awmna ngaiah a la awm a)." 
John11:31 Tin, in chhunga a thlamuantu a awmpui Judate chuan Mari a tho thuai a, a chhuak an hmuh veleh, thlanah tap turin a kal dawn emaw an ti a, an zui a." 
John11:32 Tin, Mari chuan Isua awmna chu a va thleng a, a hmuh veleh a ke bulah a bawkkhup a, a hnenah, ""Lalpa, heta awm ni la chu, ka nuta a thi lo tur,"" a ti a." 
John11:33 Tin, Isua'n Mari tap leh a rawn zuitu Judate tap chu a hmu a, a rilruin a rum a, a lungngai a," 
John11:34 Ani chu khawiah nge in zalh? a ti a. Anni chuan a hnenah, ""Lalpa, lo kal la, en teh,"" an ti a." 
John11:35 Isua a tap ta a. 
John11:36 Tin, Judate chuan, ""En teh u, Lazara hi a va lo hmangaih em ve e!"" an ti a." 
John11:37 Nimahsela thenkhat chuan, ""He mi, mit del mit tivartu hian he mi pawh hi a thih lohtir thei lo em ni?"" an ti a." 
John11:38 Tin, Isua chu a rilruin a rum leh a, thlan chu a thleng ta a. Chu thlan chu puk a ni a, a kawngkaah chuan lung pakhat a awm." 
John11:39 Isua'n, ""Lung hi chawi sawn rawh u,"" a ti a. A thia farnu Marthi chuan a hnenah, ""Lalpa, tunah zawng a uih tawh ang, a thihna ni li a ni tawh si a,"" a ti a." 
John11:40 Isua'n a hnenah, ""I rin chuan Pathian ropuizia i hmu ang, ka ti lo che em ni?"" a ti a." 
John11:41 Chutichuan lung chu an chawi sawn a. Tin, Isua a vanvadak a, ""Ka Pa, ka thu i ngaihthlak avangin i chungah ka lawm e." 
John11:42 Kumkhuain ka thu i ngaithla thin tih ka hre reng a ni; nimahsela mipui din vel avangin chu chu ka ti a ni, nangin mi tir tih an rin theihna'n,"" a ti a." 
John11:43 Tin, chutia a tawng zawh veleh chuan aw ring takin, ""Lazar, lo chhuak rawh,"" a ti a, a au a." 
John11:44 Tin, mitthi chu a kut a ke thlan puana tuam chungin a lo chhuak ta a, a hmai pawh inhrukna puana tuam a ni a. Isua'n an hnenah, ""Phelh u la, kaltir rawh u,"" a ti a." 
John11:45 Chuvang chuan Mari lenpuitu, Isua thiltih hmu Judate chuan a then tam takin Isua an ring ta a." 
John11:46 Nimahsela a then Pharisaite hnenah an v kal a, an hnenah Isua thiltihte chu an hrilh a." 
John11:47 Chutichuan puithiam lalte leh Pharisaite chuan roreltuho an ko khawm a, ""Engtin nge kan tih ang? He mi hian thilmak tam tak a ti si a." 
John11:48 Hetianga kan thlahthlam chuan mi zawng zawngin amah an ring ang a, tin, Roma mite an lo kal ang a, kan hmuh leh kan chite hi min laksak ang,"" an ti a." 
John11:49 Tin, an zinga mi pakhat Kaiapha, chu mi kuma Puithiam Lalber chuan an hnenah, ""Nangni'n engmah in hre hauh lo," 
John11:50 kan chi zawng zawng boral lohna turin mi zawng zawng aia mi pakhat thih, in tan a tha tih in ngaihtuah bawk lo,"" a ti a." 
John11:51 (Chu thu chu ama phuahchawpin a sawi lo, chu mi kum chuan Puithiam Lalber a ni a, an chite aia Isua a thih tur thu a sawi lawk a ni zawk e." 
John11:52 Chu mi chite ai chauh chuan a ni lo, Pathian fa khawvela darhte zawng zawng pawl khata a hruai khawmna tur pawhin a ni bawk)." 
John11:53 Chutichuan chu mi ni achin chu, amah tihlum turin an inrawn thin a." 
John11:54 Chuvangin Isua chu Judate zingah alangin a leng leh ta lo a, chuta tangin thlaler dep lama khaw pakhat Ephraim an tihah chuan a va kal ta zawk a; chutah chuan zirtirte nen chuan an awm ta reng a." 
John11:55 Tin, Judate Kalhlen Kut chu a hnai tawh a, mi tam tak inthian turin, ram ata, Kalhlen Kut hmain, Jerusalem khuaah an han kal a." 
John11:56 Chutichuan Isua an zawng a, Pathian biak inah ding chungin an inbia a, ""eng nge in rin? Kutnaah a lo kal lo ang maw?"" an inti a.Puithiam lalte leh Pharisaite'n amah chu an man theihna'n tupawhin a awmna an hriat chuan puan tur a ni tih thu an pe tawh si a." 
John11:57 Puithiam lalte leh Pharisaite'n amah chu an man theihna'n tupawhin a awmna an hriat chuan puan tur a ni tih thu an pe tawh si a. 
John12:1 Tin, Kalhlen Kutna tur ni ruk a la awmin, Isua'n mitthi zing ata a kaihthawh Lazara awmna Bethani khua kha a lo thleng a." 
John12:2 Tin, chutah chuan amah atan zan ruai an theh a; Marthiin rawng a bawl a, Lazara erawh chu a chawhlui kilpuitu pakhat a ni a." 
John12:3 Tin, Marin buk zatve spiknard hriak rimtui to tak a rawn keng a, Isua kete a chulh a, a samin a kete chu a hru a; tichuan chu hriak rim chuan in chu a khat ta rum rum a." 
John12:4 Nimahsela Iskariot Juda, a zirtir pakhat, a mantirtu tur chuan," 
John12:5 He hriak rimtui hi engati nge duli zathuma hralhin mi retheite hnena an pek zawk loh? a ti a. 
John12:6 (Mi retheite a ngaihsak vanga chu thu chu sawi a ni lo; rukru a ni a, tangka ip a kawl a, a chhunga dah chu a lak thin vang zawk a ni)." 
John12:7 Tin, Isua'n, ""Mi phum ni atan khek rawh se." 
John12:8 Mi retheite chu kumkhuain in hnena awm an ni alawm; kei erawh chu kumkhuaa in hnena awm tur ka ni lo,"" a ti a." 
John12:9 Tin, Isua chutah chuan a awm tih Juda hnamchawmten an lo hre ta a; tin, an lo kal a, Isua chauh rawn kal chhan an ni lo a, mitthi zing ata a kaihthawh Lazara pawh kha hmuh duh fawmin an ni bawk." 
John12:10 Tin, puithiam lalte chu Lazara pawh tihlum turin an inrawn a;" 
John12:11 amah avanga Judate tam takin an pakaisan a, Isua an rin thin avangin." 
John12:12 A tukah chuan kutnaa lo kal mipui tam takin,Isua Jerusalem khuaah a lo kal dawn tih an hriatin," 
John12:13 tum kaute an keng a, a hmuak turin an va chhuak a, ""Hosana, Lalpa hminga Israel Lal lo kal chu fakin awm rawh se,"" tiin an au a." 
John12:14 Tin, Isua'n sabengtung no a hmu a, a chungah a chuang a;" 
John12:15 Hlau suh, Zion fanu; en teh, i Lal chu, sabengtung no chunga chuangin, a lo kal dawn e,"" tih ziak ang khan." 
John12:16 Chung chu atirin a zirtirten an hre lo a; nimahsela Isua chawimawia a awm hnuah chuan a chanchinah chung thu chu ziak a ni tih leh, a chungah chung thil chu an lo ti nge tih an lo hre ta a." 
John12:17 Tin, Lazara, thlan ata a koh chhuah a, mitthi zing ata a kaihthawh laia a hnena mipui awmte khan, a thu chu an hriattir ta zel a." 
John12:18 Chu mi avang chuan a ni, mipuite pawh chuan amah chu an va hmuah ni, chu thilmak chu a ti tih an hre si a." 
John12:19 Chutichuan Pharisaite chuan, ""Hre rawh u, engmah in tih theih loh hi; en rawh u, khawvelin amah an zui tak hi,"" an ti a." 
John12:20 Tin, kutnaa Pathian chibai buk tura han kalte zingah Grik tute emaw an awm a;" 
John12:21 tin, chungte chu Galili rama Bethsaida khuaa mi Philipa hnenah chuan an lo kal a, a hnenah, ""Ka pu, Isua hmuh kan duh e,"" an ti a, an ngen a." 
John12:22 Philipa chuan Andria a rawn hrilh a; tin, Andria leh Philipa chuan Isua an rawn hrilh a." 
John12:23 Tin, Isua'n a chhang a, an hnenah, ""Mihring Fapa chawimawia a awm hun chu a thleng tawh." 
John12:24 Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, buh fang leia a tlak loh a, a thih loh chuan a mal chauhin a awm reng thin; a thih erawh chuan tam takin a rah thin." 
John12:25 Tupawh a nun thlahlel chuan a hloh thin; tupawh he khawvelah hian a nun ngaitlawm chuan chatuana nunna tur a vawng reng ang. 
John12:26 Tupawhin ka rawng a bawl chuan mi zui rawh se; ka awmnaah ka rawngbawltu pawh a awm ang: tupawhin ka rawng a bawl chuan ani chu Pain a chawimawi ang. 
John12:27 Tunah ka rilru a mangang e; eng nge ka sawi ang aw? 'Ka Pa, he mi hun lakah hian mi chhandam rawh,' ka ti ang em ni? Engpawh ni se la, he mi tur hi, he mi hun thleng hianka awm chhan a ni." 
John12:28 Ka Pa, i hming chawimawi rawh,"" a ti a. Chutichuan van atangin aw a lo chhuak a, ""Ka chawimawi tawh, ka chawimawi leh bawk ang,"" a ti a." 
John12:29 Tin, mipui a kianga dingte chuan chu chu an hria a, ""Khawpui a ri a ni,"" an ti a; mi dangten, ""Vantirhkohin amah a bia a ni,"" an ti a." 
John12:30 Isua'n a chhang a, ""chu aw chu ka tana lo chhuak a ni lo, nangmahni tan a ni zawk e." 
John12:31 Tunah he khawvel hi ngaihtuah lai a ni; tunah he khawvel lal hi paih chhuah a ni ang. 
John12:32 Tin, kei, lei ata khaikanin ka awm chuan mi zawng zawng keima hnenah ka hip ang,"" a ti a." 
John12:33 Chu thu chu a thihzia tur hriattirna'n a sawi a ni. 
John12:34 Tin, mipui chuan a hnenah, ""Krista chu chatuanin a awm reng dawn tih Dan Lehkhabuah kan hria e; nangin, 'Mihring Fapa khaikanin a awm tur a ni,' eng ti tiha ti nge i nih? Chu Mihring Fapa chu tu nge ni?"" an ti a, an chhang a." 
John12:35 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""Eng hi rei lo te in zingah a la awm rih e. Eng in neih chhung hian leng rawh u, thimin ana'n lohna'n che u; tupawh thima leng chuan a kalna chin a hre thin lo." 
John12:36 Eng in neih chhung hian eng hi ring rawh u, eng fate in lo nih theihna'n,"" a ti a. Chung thu chu Isua'n a sawi a; tin, a kal a, an hmuh loh turin a biru ta a." 
John12:37 An hmaah chutiang thilmak tam tak ti mah se la, amah an ring si lo:" 
John12:38 'Lalpa kan thusawi tuin nge ring? Lal kut pawh tu hnenah nge a lan?' tih, Zawlnei Isaia thusawi kha a thlenna'n." 
John12:39 He mi avang hian a ni an rin theih loh, Isaian," 
John12:40 'Aman an mit a tidel a, an thinlung a tia a; chutilochuan an mitin an hmu dah ang a, an thinlungin an hre dah ang a, tin, an hawi kir leh dah ang a, keiin anni ka tidam dah ang e, tih, a sawi leh avang hian." 
John12:41 Isaian a ropuizia a hmuh leh a chanchin thu a sawi avangin chung thu chu a sawi a ni. 
John12:42 Nimahsela hotute a then tam takin Isua an ring ta a; amaherawhchu Pharisaite avangin an inpuang lo, chutilochuan inkhawmna in hnawngin an awm ang;" 
John12:43 Pathian hnena ropuina ai chuan mihring hnena ropuina an duh zawk si a. 
John12:44 Tin, Isua a au a, ""Tupawh mi ring chu kei mi ring a ni lo, mi tirtu ring a ni zawk e." 
John12:45 Tupawh mi hmu chu mi tirtu hmu a ni. 
John12:46 Entua khawvela lo kal ka nih hi, tupawh mi ring apiang thima an awm reng lohna'n." 
John12:47 Tupawh ka thusawi hriain, awih lo mah se la, keiin thiam loh ka chantir lo: khawvel thiam loh chantir tura lo kal ka ni lo a, khawvel chhanhim tura lo kal ka ni zawk si a." 
John12:48 Tupawh mi duh lo a, ka thusawite vawng lo chuan thiam loh chantirtu pakhat a nei a ni, ka thusawi kha, kha mi thu ngei khan, ni kin niah chuan amah chu thiam loh a la chantir ang." 
John12:49 Keimaha phuahchawpin ka sawi si lo; Pa mi tirtu chuan ka sawi tur leh ka hrilh tur hi thu mi pe zawk a ni.Ama thupek chu chatuana nunna a ni tih ka hria; chuvang chuan thu ka sawi hi, Pa mi hrilh ang zelin ka sawi a ni,"" a ti a." 
John12:50 Ama thupek chu chatuana nunna a ni tih ka hria; chuvang chuan thu ka sawi hi, Pa mi hrilh ang zelin ka sawi a ni,"" a ti a." 
John13:1 Tin, Kalhlen Kut hmain Isua'n he khawvel hi chhuahsana Pa hnena a kal hun a thleng tawh tih a hria a, amaha mi khawvela awm a hmangaih thinte chu a tawp thleng pawhin a hmangaih reng a." 
John13:2 Tin, zanriah ei laiin, (chu mi hma pawhin diabolan Simona fapa Iskariot Juda chu Isua mantir a rilruktir a)," 
John13:3 Isua'n, - Pain a kutah thil engkim a vawntir te, Pathian hnena lo chhuak a nih te, Pathian hnena a kal dawn te hre reng chungin -" 
John13:4 a zanriah chaw kil chu a tho a, a puante a dah a, inhrukna puan a la a, a veng a." 
John13:5 Tin, maihunah tui a bun a, zirtirte ke a sil ta a, inhrukna puan a ven chuan an hru zel a." 
John13:6 Chutichuan Simon Petera hnenah a lo kal a. Ani chuan, ""Lalpa, nang emin ka ke i sil dawn em ni?"" a ti a." 
John13:7 Isua'n a hnenah, ""Ka thiltih hi tunah i hre lo; nimahsela nakin hnuah i la hria ang,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John13:8 Petera'n a hnenah, ""Ka ke i sil tawp lo ang,"" a ti a. Isua'n a hnenah, ""Ka sil loh che chuan ka hnenah engmah chan i nei lo ang,"" a ti a." 
John13:9 Simon Petera'n a hnenah, ""Lalpa, chuti a nih chuan ka ke chauh ni loin, ka kut leh ka lu pawh le,"" a ti a." 
John13:10 Isua'n a hnenah, ""Inbual tawh chu a ke lo chu sil a ngai lo, a fai var alawm; nangni in fai e - in za erawh chuan a ni lo,"" a ti a." 
John13:11 (A mantirtu tur chu a hre si a; chuvangin, ""In za chuan in fai lo,"" a ti a ni)." 
John13:12 Chutichuan an ke a sil a, a puante a lak a, a thut leh chuanin an hnenah, ""In chunga ka thiltih hi engtihna nge ni in hria em?" 
John13:13 Nangni'n Zirtirtu leh Lalpa mi ti thin; in tidik e, ka ni nge reng a." 
John13:14 Kei Lalpa leh Zirtirtu mahin in ke ka sil chuan nangni pawhin in ke in insilsak tur a ni. 
John13:15 In chunga ka tih ang hian nangni pawhin in tih vena turin ka tihhmuh che u a ni si a. 
John13:16 Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, bawih a pu aiin a ropui lo; tirhkoh pawh a tirtu aiin a ropui hek lo." 
John13:17 Chung thil chu in hriat chuan ti u la in eng a thawl ang. 
John13:18 In zaa thu ka sawi lo e; ka thlante chu ka hria, nimahsela chu chu, 'Ka chhang eituin a keartui ka chungah a lek ta,' tih Pathian Lehkha Thu kha a lo thlen theihna tur a ni." 
John13:19 Tun achinah a lo thlen hmain ka hrilh che u hi, a lo thlen hunah kei, amah kha ka ni tih in rin theihna turin." 
John13:20 Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, tupawh ka tirh apiang lawm chu, keimah mi lawm a ni; tupawh kei mi lawm chu, mi tirtu lawm a ni,"" a ti a." 
John13:21 Isua'n chutianga a sawi zawhin a rilruin a mangang a, ""Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, in zinga mi pakhatin mi mantir ang,"" tiin a hriattir ta a." 
John13:22 Tin, zirtirte chuan a tih bik an hre lo a, an inen hlawm a." 
John13:23 Tin, a zirtirte zinga mi pakhat Isua'n a hmangaiha chu dawhkan sirah Isua angchhungah bawkin a awm a." 
John13:24 Tin, Simon Petera'n chu mi hnenah chuan, ""Tu thu ber nge a sawi, min hrilh teh,"" tiin a zaizir a." 
John13:25 Tin, ani chu a awmna ngaiah a awm a, Isua awm nghengin a lo thle phei a, a hnenah, ""Lalpa, tu ber nge ni?"" a ti a." 
John13:26 Tin, Isua'n, ""Chhang them ka chhiahsaka ka peka chu a ni ang,"" a ti a, a chhang a. Chutichuan chhang them chu a chiah hnuin a la a, Iskariot Simona fapa Juda hnenah chuan a pe a." 
John13:27 Tin, chhang them chu a pek hnu chuan Setana a chhungah a lut ta nghal a. Chutichuan Isua'n a hnenah, ""I tih tur chu ti thuai rawh,"" a ti a." 
John13:28 (Tin, dawhkan sira mite chuan tuma'n engtiziaa ti nge a nih an hre lo." 
John13:29 Thenkhatin, Juda chuan tangka ip a vawn avangin, ""Isua'n, 'Kut atan thil kan chakkhai apiang lei rawh,' a ti emaw, 'Mi retheite hnenah englo pek tur,' a ti emaw,"" an ti a ni)." 
John13:30 Tin, ani chuan chhang them chu a la a, a chhuak ta nghal a; chu mi lai chu zan a ni a." 
John13:31 Chutichuan a chhuah hnuin Isua'n a sawi a, ""Tunah chuan Mihring Fapa chawimawiin a awm ta, amah avangin Pathian pawh chawimawiin a awm a ni." 
John13:32 Pathianin amahah chuan ani chu a chawimawi ang, a chawimawi nghal ang." 
John13:33 Naute u, rei lo te in hnenah ka la awm rih e. Nangnin mi zawng ang; tin, Judate hnenah, 'Ka kalna turah in lo kal thei lo ang,' tih ka sawi ang khan, tunah chuti bawkin in hnenah ka sawi hi." 
John13:34 Thupek thar ka pek che u hi, inhmangaih u la; keiin ka hmangaih ang che u hian nangni pawh inhmangaih u la." 
John13:35 In inhmangaih chuan mi zawng zawngin ka zirtirte in ni tih chu miah chuan an hria ang,"" a ti a." 
John13:36 Simon Petera'n a hnenah, ""Lalpa, khawiah nge i kal dawn?"" a ti a. Isua'n, ""Ka kalna turah nangin tunah mi zui thei lo ang; nakin hnuah erawh chuan mi zui ang,"" a ti a,a chhang a." 
John13:37 Petera'n a hnenah, ""Lalpa engati nge tunah pawh ka zui theih loh vang che? Nangmah avangin ka nun ka paih ang,"" a ti a.Isua'n, ""Keimah avangin i nun i paih ang maw? Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che, nangin vawi thum mi phat hma loh chuan ar a khuang lo ang." 
John13:38 Isua'n, ""Keimah avangin i nun i paih ang maw? Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che, nangin vawi thum mi phat hma loh chuan ar a khuang lo ang." 
John14:1 In thinlung mangang suh se; Pathian in ring e, kei pawh mi ring ve rawh u." 
John14:2 Ka Pa inah awmna tam tak a awm a, a awm loh chuan ka hrilh tawh tur che u a ni; intan hmun siaminka kal dawn hi." 
John14:3 Tin, in tanhmunka han siam chuan ka lo kir leh ang a, ka hnenah ka la ang che u; ka awmnaah nangni pawh in awm theihna'n." 
John14:4 Ka kalna tur a kawng chin in hria e,"" a ti a." 
John14:5 Thoman a hnenah, ""Lalpa, i kalna tur chin kan hre lo a sin, a kawng engtin nge kan hriat ang?"" a ti a." 
John14:6 Isua'n a hnenah, ""Keimah hi kawng leh thutak leh nunna ka ni; keimaha kal lo chu tumah Pa hnenah an thleng ngai lo." 
John14:7 Kei mi hria ni u la, ka Pa pawh in hre tawh tur; tun achinah amah in hria e, amah in hmu tawh bawk,"" a ti a." 
John14:8 Philipan a hnenah, ""Lalpa, Pa chu keini min hmuhtir ta che, chutichuan kan tan a tawk ang,"" a ti a." 
John14:9 Isua'n a hnenah, ""Philip, hei leh chen hi in hnenah ka awm a, chuti pawhin mi hre lo maw? Tupawh mi hmu chu Pa hmu a ni. 'Pa chu keini min hmuhtir rawh,' eng ti tiha i ti nge ni?" 
John14:10 Kei Paa ka awm leh Pa keimahah a awm tih i awih lo em ni? In hnena thu ka sawi hi keima phuahchawpin ka sawi lo; Pa keimahah a awm reng a, a thil a ti zawk thin a ni." 
John14:11 Kei Paa ka awm leh Pa keimahah a awm tih mi ring rawh u; a nih loh leh, thiltih avang tal hian mi ring rawh u." 
John14:12 Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, tupawh mi ring chuan thil ka tihte hi ani pawhin a ti ve ang; he'ng aia thil ropui pawh hi a la ti ang, Pa hnenah ka kal dawn avangin." 
John14:13 Tin, ka hmingin engpawh in dil apiang chu ka ti zel ang, Pa, Fapa avanga chawimawia a awm theihna'n." 
John14:14 Nangni'n ka hmingin engpawh mi dil chuan chu chu ka ti zel ang. 
John14:15 Nangni'n mi hmangaih chuan ka thupekte chu in zawm ang. 
John14:16 Tin, Pa ka dil ang a, ani chuan Thlamuantu dang a pe ang che u, chatuana in hnena awm turin;" 
John14:17 chu chu Thlarau dik tak a ni; khawvelin chu mi chu an nei thei lo, amah an hmuh loha an hriat hek loh avangin; nangni'n ani chu in hria e, in hnenah a awm reng si a, nangmahniah chuan a awm dawn a ni." 
John14:18 Fahrahin ka kalsan lo ang che u; in hnenah ka lo kal leh ang. 
John14:19 Rei lo deuh chinah khawvelin mi hmu leh tawh lo ang; nimahsela nangni zawngin mi hmu ang; keimah ka nun avangin nangni pawh in nung ve ang. 
John14:20 Chu mi niah chuan kei ka Paa ka awmte, nangni keimaha in awm te, kei nangmahnia ka awmte in hria ang." 
John14:21 Tupawh ka thupekte neia zawm chu mi hmangaihtu a ni; tupawh mi hmangaih chu ka Pain a hmangaih ang, kei pawhin ani chu ka hmangaih ang a, a hnenah ka inlar ang,"" a ti a." 
John14:22 Tin, Juda (Iskariota lo zawk) chuan a hnenah, ""Lalpa, keini hnenah i inlar ang a, khawvel hnena i inlar si lo tur chu, engati nge?"" a ti a." 
John14:23 Isua'n a chhang a, a hnenah, ""Miin mi hmangaih chuan ka thu a zawm ang a; ka Pain ani chu a hmangaih ang a, a hnenah kan lo kal ang a, a hnenah kan awm reng ang." 
John14:24 Tupawh mi hmangaih lo chuan ka thu a zawm lo; thu inhriatte hi ka ta a ni lo, Pa mi tirtu ta a ni zawk e." 
John14:25 In hnena ka la awm chhung hian he'ng thu hi ka hrilh che u hi. 
John14:26 Tin, Thlamuantu, Thlarau Thianghlim, Pain ka hminga a rawn tirh tur khan, chu mi chuan engkim a zirtir ang che u a, inhnena ka sawi zawng zawng a hriat chhuahtir leh ang che u." 
John14:27 Thlamuanna ka hnutchhiah a che u; keima thlamuanna ka pe a che u; khawvelin a pek angin ka pek loh che u hi. In thinlung mangang suh se, hlauh pawh hlau suh se." 
John14:28 'Ka kal bo dawn a, in hnenah ka lo kal leh ang,' ka tihzia che u kha in hre tawh e. Nangni'n mi hmangaih ni u lang Pa hnena ka kal dawn avangin in lawm tur a ni; pa chu keimah aiin a ropui zawk si a." 
John14:29 Tunah a lo thlen hma hianka hrilh tawh che u hi, a lo thlen huna in rinna'n." 
John14:30 In hnenah thu ka sawi leh tawh mang lo ang, khawvel lal a lo kal dawn si a, ani chuan keimahah engmah reng a nei lo;nimahsela keiin Pa ka hmangaih leh, Pain thu mi pek ang zelin thil ka ti tih khawvelin an hriatna tur a nih hi. Tho rawh u, heta ta i chhuak ang u." 
John14:31 nimahsela keiin Pa ka hmangaih leh, Pain thu mi pek ang zelin thil ka ti tih khawvelin an hriatna tur a nih hi. Tho rawh u, heta ta i chhuak ang u." 
John15:1 Kei grep hrui taktak ka ni, ka Pa a huan enkawltu a ni." 
John15:2 Ka zawmpui peng rah lo apiang a paih thin a; a rah apiang a tithianghlim thin, a rah tam lehzualna'n." 
John15:3 In hnena ka thusawi avang chuan tunah pawh in thianghlim tawh pang a ni. 
John15:4 Keimahah awm reng rawh u, kei pawh nangmahniah ka awm reng ang. Peng chu grep hruia a awm reng loh chuan amahin a rah thei lo ang bawkin, nangni pawh keimahah in awm reng loh chuan in rah thei lo ang." 
John15:5 Kei grep hrui chu ka ni, nangni a pengte chu in ni; tupawh keimaha awm renga kei pawh amaha ka awm rengna chu, chu mi chu tam takin a rah thin; keimah loin engmah in ti thei si lo." 
John15:6 Mi keimaha a awm reng loh chuan peng anga paih chhuahin a awm a, a vuai thin; tin, an fawm a, meiah an paih a, a kang thin."
