John15:7 Nangni keimaha in awm reng a, ka thu nangmahnia a awm reng bawk chuan in duh apiang dil rawh u, in tan tihin a awm zel ang." 
John15:8 He mi avangin ka Pa chu chawimawiin a awm thin, tam taka in rah hian; chutichuan ka zirtirte in ni ang." 
John15:9 Pain mi hmangaih ang bawkin kei pawhin ka hmangaih che u hi; ka hmangaihin awm reng rawh u. 
John15:10 Nangni'n ka thupekte in zawm chuan ka hmangaihin in awm reng ang; keiin ka Pa thupekte ka zawm a, a hmangaihin ka awm reng ang bawk hian." 
John15:11 Ka lawm nangmahnia a awm rengna'n leh, in lawm a kimna'n, he'ng thu hi in hnenah ka sawi hi." 
John15:12 Hei hi ka thupek a ni, keiin ka hmangaih che u ang bawkin nangni inhmangaih u la." 
John15:13 Mihringin a thian aia a nun a paih aliama hmangaihna nasa zawk tuma'n an nei lo. 
John15:14 Thu ka pek apiang che u in tih chuan ka thiante in ni ang. 
John15:15 Bawih ka ti leh tawh lo ang che u; a pu thiltih bawihin a hre si lo; thiante ka ti tawh zawk ang che u; Pa hnena thil ka hriat zawng zawng in hnenah ka puang tawh si a. 
John15:16 Nangni'n mi thlang lo, keima'n ka thlang zawk che u a, va rah tur leh in rah awm reng turin ka ruat bawk a che u; ka hminga Pa hnena in dil apiang a pekna tur che u in." 
John15:17 In inhmangaih theihna'n he'ng thu hi ka pe a che u. 
John15:18 \ Khawvelin a huat che u chuan, a huat hma che u pawhin keimah mi hua tih in hria e." 
John15:19 Nangni khawvela mi ni u la, khawvelin amaha mi a hmangaih tur; khawvela mi in ni si lo a, khawvela mi ka thlan chhuah zawk che u avang hian khawvelin a hua che u a ni e." 
John15:20 'Bawih a pu aiin a ropui lo,' tih thu ka hrilh tawh che u kha hre reng rawh u. Anni'n kei mi tihduhdah tawh chuan nangni pawh an tiduhdah ang che u; ka thu an zawm tawh chuan nangni thu pawh an zawm ang." 
John15:21 Nimahsela he'ng thil zawng zawng hi ka hming avangin in chungah an ti ang, mi tirtu an hriat loh avangin." 
John15:22 Kei lo kalin anhnenah thu sawi suh i la, sual an nei lo tur; tunah erawh zawng an sual chhuanlam tur an nei ta lo a ni." 
John15:23 Tupawh kei mi hua chuan ka Pa pawh a hua a ni. 
John15:24 Thil, mi dang tuma tih ngai lohte an zingah ti suh i la, sual an nei lo tur; tunah erawh zawng anni'n kei leh ka Pa kan pahnihin min hmu tawh a, huat pawh min haw tawh a ni." 
John15:25 Engpawh ni rawh se, an Dan Lehkhabuah, 'Anni'n enga khawlawi loin mi hua,' tih thu ziak kha a lo thlenna turin an ti a nih hi." 
John15:26 Tin, Pa hnen ata Thlamuantu in hnena ka tirh tur, Paa chhuak Thlarau dik tak chu a lo thlen hunah, ani chuan ka thu a hriattir ang;nangni pawhin in hriattir bawk ang, atir ata ka hnena in awm avangin." 
John15:27 nangni pawhin in hriattir bawk ang, atir ata ka hnena in awm avangin." 
John16:1 Tihlungnihloha in awm lohna turin he'ng hi in hnenah ka sawi tawh hi. 
John16:2 inkhawmna inahte an hnawntir ang che u a; a ni, tupawh a tihlum tur che u apiangin Pathian chungah thil tha tiin an inhria ang, chutiang hun chu a thleng dawn." 
John16:3 Chung thil chu an ti ang, Pa leh kei min hriat loh avangin." 
John16:4 Heng thu hi in hnenah ka sawi tawh hi, a hun a lo thlen hunah, ka hrilh tawh che u tih in hriat lehna turin. Heng thil hi atir ata ka la hrilh lo reng che u a ni, in hnena ka la awm avangin." 
John16:5 Tunah erawh zawng mi tirtu hnenah ka kal dawn a ni; nangniho tuma'n, 'Khawiah nge i kal dawn?' tiin mi zawt si lo." 
John16:6 Heng thu in hnena ka sawi avangin in thinlung chu lungngaiin a khat thlu hial ta zawk a. 
John16:7 Nimahsela thu dik tak ka hrilh a che u; ka kal in tan a tha e; ka kal loh chuan Thlamuantu chu in hnenah a lo kal dawn si lo; ka kal erawh chuan in hnenah ka rawn tir ang. 
John16:8 Ani chu a lo thlen chuan sual thu-ah te, fel thu-ah te, rorel thu-ah te khawvel an thiam loh a hriattir ang:" 
John16:9 sual thu-ah te thiam loh an chang ang, kei mi rin loh avang hian;" 
John16:10 fel thu-ah te thiam loh an chang ang; Pa hnenah ka kal dawn a, nangni'n mi hmuh leh dawn tawh loh avang hian;" 
John16:11 rorel thu-ah te thiam loh an chang ang, he khawvel lal hi thiam loha a tluk tawh avang hian." 
John16:12 In hnenah thusawi tur tam tak ka la nei cheu a, nimahsela tunah zawng in tlin rih lo ang." 
John16:13 Nimahsela amah, Thlarau dik tak chu, a lo thlen hun chuan thutak zawng zawngah chuan a hruai lut ang che u: amaha phuahchawpin thu a sawi dawn si lo; thu a dawn apiang chu a hril zawk ang; thil lo thleng turte pawh a hriattir ang che u." 
John16:14 Ani chuan mei mi chawimawi ang; ka taa mi a la ang a, in hnenah a hriattir dawn si che u a." 
John16:15 Pa-in thil a neih zawng zawng ka ta a ni; chuvang, 'Ka taa mi a la ang a, in hnenah a hriattir ang che u,' ka tih hi." 
John16:16 Rei lo teah nangni'n kei mi hmu lo ang a; rei lo teah bawk nangni'n kei mi hmu leh ang,"" a ti a." 
John16:17 Tin, a zirtirte thenkhatin, ""Kan hnena a thusawi hi eng nge ni, 'Rei lo teah nangni'n kei mi hmu lo ang a, rei lo teah bawk nangni'n kei mi hmu leh ang,' a tih leh, 'Pa hnena ka kal dawn avangin,' a tih hi?"" an inti a." 
John16:18 Tin, anni vek chuan, ""Hei, 'Rei lo te,' a tih hi eng tihna nge ni? A thusawi hi a ngaihna kan hre lo,"" an ti a." 
John16:19 Tin, amah zawh an duh tih Isua'n a hria a, an hnenah, "" 'Rei lo teah nangni'n kei mi hmu lo ang a, rei lo teah bawk nangni'n kei mi hmu leh ang,' tia hei ka thusawi hi in inzawt maw?" 
John16:20 Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, nangni in mittui a tla ang a, in tap vak bawk ang a, khawvel erawh chu an lawm ang; nangni in lungngai ang a, nimahsela in lungngaih chu lawmah a chang ang." 
John16:21 Hmeichhiain nau a veiin a lungngai thin, a hun a thlen tawh avangin; nimahsela nau a hrin veleh a thlaphan chu a hre leh tawh thin lo, khawvela mihring lo piang chu a lawm avangin." 
John16:22 Tin, tunah nangni in lungngai e; nimahsela ka hmu leh ang che u a, in thinlung a lawm ang, in lawm chu tuma'n an laksak lo ang che u." 
John16:23 Chu mi niah chuan nangni'n engmah kei mi zawt lo ang. Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che u, Pa hnenah engpawh in dil chuan, keima hmingin a pe ang che u." 
John16:24 Tun thlengin ka hmingin engmah in la dil lo; dil rawh u, tichuan in hmu ang, in lawm a kimna turin." 
John16:25 Chung thu chu athawiin in hnenah ka sawi tawh; a hun a thleng dawn, chu mi hunah huan in hnenah athawiin ka sawi leh tawh lo ang a, fiah takin Pa chanchin ka hrilh zawk ang che u." 
John16:26 Chu mi niah chuan keima hmingin thil in dil ang; tin, 'Pa hnenah keiin ka ngensak ang che,' ka ti lo a che u;" 
John16:27 Pa ngeiin a hmangaih si che u a, nangni'n kei mi hmangaih a, Paa chhuak ka ni tih mi rin vangin." 
John16:28 Kei, Pa hnen ata lo chhuaka khawvela lo kal ka ni; khawvel kalsana Pa hnena hawng leh ur ka ni,"" a ti a." 
John16:29 Tin, zirtirten, ""Ngai teh, tunah zawng fiah takin thu i sawi a, athawi reng rengin i sawi tak loh hi." 
John16:30 Nangin engkim i hria a, tuma zawh che i ngai lo tih tunah kan hre ta; he mi avang hian Pathian hnen ata lo chhuak i ni tih kan awih e,"" an ti a." 
John16:31 Tin, Isua'n a chhang a, an hnenah, ""Tunah chuan in awih ta maw?" 
John16:32 Ngai rawh u, a hun a thleng dawn, a ni, a thleng tawh mek, chu mi hunah chuan mahni in theuhvah in darh vek ang a, keimah chauhin mi thlahthlam ang; nimahsela Pa ka hnenah a awm avangin mahni chauhin ka awm si lo.Heng thu hi in hnenah ka sawi tawh hi, keimahah hian in thlamuanna turin. Khawvelah hian hrehawmin in awm thin; nimahsela thlamuang takin awm rawh u, keiin khawvel ka ngam ta,"" a ti a." 
John16:33 Heng thu hi in hnenah ka sawi tawh hi, keimahah hian in thlamuanna turin. Khawvelah hian hrehawmin in awm thin; nimahsela thlamuang takin awm rawh u, keiin khawvel ka ngam ta,"" a ti a." 
John17:1 Chung thu chu Isua'n a sawi a; tin, vanvadakin, ""Ka Pa, a hun a thleng ta; i Fapa chawimawi rawh, Fapain a chawimawina'n che;" 
John17:2 khatia mi zawng zawng chunga thuneia i siam khan, a hnena i pek apiangte chu chatuana nunna a pek theihna'n." 
John17:3 Hei hi chatuana nunna a ni, nang Pathian tak chauh leh I tirh Isua Krista hriat hi." 
John17:4 Nangin thil tihtur mi pek kha ka ti zo a, khawvelah ka chawimawi tawh a che." 
John17:5 Aw ka Pa, khawvel awm hmaa i hnena mawina ka neih khan, tunah nangma hnen ngeiah mi chawimawi rawh." 
John17:6 Nangin khawvel zinga chhuak mite kei mi pek hnenah khan i hming ka tilang ta; anni chu i ta an nih kha, nangin anni chu kei mi pe a ni; anni chuan i thu an zawm ta a." 
John17:7 Nangin thil kei mi pek apiang, i hnena chhuak a ni tih tunah an hre ta." 
John17:8 Nangin thu mi pekte kha an hnenah ka pe tawh si a; chung chu an vawng a, i hnena chhuak ka ni tih dik takin an hre ta a, nangin mi tir tih pawh an awi ta." 
John17:9 An tan ka ngensak hi; khawvel tana ngensak ka ni lo, nangin mi pekteho tan zawk a ni; i ta an ni si a." 
John17:10 Thil zawng zawng ka ta apiang i ta a ni e, i ta chu ka ta a ni e; anmahni avangin chawimawiin ka awm thin." 
John17:11 Tin, kei zawng khawvelah ka awm tawh lo ang, hengho erawh hi chu khawvelah an awm ang, kei i hnenah ka lo haw dawn ta. Ka Pa thianghlim, nangin kei mi pekteho hi i hmingin hum rawh, pumkhat an nih theihna'n, keimahni ang bawk hian." 
John17:12 An hnena ka awm chhung khan, nangin kei mi pekteho hi i hmingin ka hum thin; anni chu ka veng a, an zingah pakhat mah an boral lo, boral fapa lo kha chu; Lehkha Thu kha a lo thlenna turin." 
John17:13 Nimahsela tunah i hnenah ka lo haw dawn ta; khawvelah he'ng thu hi ka sawi a ni, ka lawm anmahnia an neih kimna turin." 
John17:14 I thu an hnenah ka pe ta e; tin, khawvelin anni chu an hua a, khawvela mi an nih loh avangin, kei khawvela mi ka ni lo ang bawk hian." 
John17:15 Nangin anni chu khawvel ata i lak chhuah tura ngen ka ni lo a, mi sual lakah chuan i hum tur ka ti zawk a ni." 
John17:16 Anni chu khawvela mi an ni lo, kei khawvela mi ka ni lo ang bawk hian." 
John17:17 Anni chu thutakin tithianghlim rawh, i thu chu thutak a ni." 
John17:18 Nangin khawvela kei mi tir ang khan, kei pawhin anni chu khawvelah ka tirh hi." 
John17:19 Anmahni avangin ka intithianghlim a ni, anni pawh thutaka an thianghlimna turin." 
John17:20 Henghote tan chauh hian ngensak ka ni lo, an thu avanga kei mi la ring turte tan pawh ngensak ka ni bawk e;" 
John17:21 an zaa pumkhat an nihna turin; ka Pa, nang keimaha i awm leh, kei nangmaha ka awm ang bawk hian, anni pawh keimahnia an awmna turin; nangin kei mi tir tih khawvelin an awih theihna turin." 
John17:22 Tin, nangin ropuina mi pek kha keiin anmahni ka pe ta; anni chu pumkhat an nihna turin, keini pumkhat kan ni ang bawk hian;" 
John17:23 kei anmahniah, nang keimahah, anni pumkhata an awm a, an famkim theihna turin; nangin kei mi tir tih leh, mi hmangaih angin anni hi i hmangaih tih, khawvelin an hriat theihna turin." 
John17:24 Ka Pa, nangin kei mi pekte hi ka awmnaa ka hnena awmah ka duh; nangin mi pek ka ropuina kha an hmuhna turin; leilung pian hma pawhin nangin mi hmangaih tawh si a." 
John17:25 Aw ka Pa, fel tak, khawvel zawngin an hre lo chia, kei erawh chuan ka hriat che kha; hengho pawh hian nangin kei mi tir tih an hriat kha.Tin, an hnenah i hming ka hriattir a, ka hriattir leh fo ang; nangin kei mi hmangaihna kha anmahniah a awm a, kei pawh anmahnia ka awm theihna turin,"" a ti a." 
John17:26 Tin, an hnenah i hming ka hriattir a, ka hriattir leh fo ang; nangin kei mi hmangaihna kha anmahniah a awm a, kei pawh anmahnia ka awm theihna turin,"" a ti a." 
John18:1 Isua'n chung thu chu a sawi zawhin a zirtirte nen an chhuak a, Kidron luikawr an kan a; chutah chuan huan a awm a, chu miah chuan an lut a, amah leh a zirtirte nen." 
John18:2 Tin, a mantirtu Juda pawh chuan chu mi hmun chu a hria; Isua chu a zirtirte nen chutah chuan a leng fo si a." 
John18:3 Chutichuan Juda chuan sipai pawl nen, puithiam lalte leh Pharisaite hnena awm tiangkengtute nen a hruai a, khawnvarte, meichherte, hriamte kengin chutah chuan an lo kal a." 
John18:4 Isua'n a chunga thil thleng tur zawng zawng chu a hre reng a, a va chhuak a, an hnenah, ""Tunge in zawn?"" a ti a." 
John18:5 Anni chuan a hnenah, ""Nazaret Isua,"" an ti a, an chhang a. Isua'n an hnenah, ""Keimah hi ka ni,"" a ti a. Tin, a mantirtu Juda pawh chu an zingah a ding a." 
John18:6 Tin, ""Keimah hi ka ni,"" a tih veleh an hnungtawlh a, leiah an tlu hlawm a." 
John18:7 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Tunge in zawn?"" a ti a, a zawt leh a. Tin, anni chuan, ""Nazaret Isua,"" an ti a." 
John18:8 Tin, Isua'n, ""Keimah hi ka ni tih ka hrilh che u alawm; nangni'n kei mi zawng in nih chuan hengho hi thlah tha rawh u,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John18:9 (A thusawi, ""Nangin kei mi pekteho pakhat mah ka hloh ral lo,"" a tih kha a thlen nan)." 
John18:10 Tin, Simon Petera'n khandaih a vawng a, a phawi a, Puithiam Lalber bawih a sat a, a beng ding lam a sah thlaksak a. (Bawih hming chu Malka a ni a)." 
John18:11 Tichuan Isua'n Petera hnenah, ""Khandaih kha a paiah khung rawh; Pain no kei mi pek hi ka in lo ang em ni?"" a ti a." 
John18:12 Chutichuan sipai pawl nen, an hotu lalber nen, Judate tiangkengtute nen chuan Isua an man a, an phuar a," 
John18:13 Ana hnenah an hruai hmasa a, Kaiapha puzawn a nih avangin. Kaiapha chu, chu mi kum chuan Puithiam Lalber a ni a." 
John18:14 Kaiapha chu, ""Mi zawng zawng aia mi pakhat thih a tha,"" tia Judate rawtpuitu kha a ni." 
John18:15 Tin, Simon Petera'n Isua a zui a, a zirtir dang pakhat nen. Chu mi zirtir chu Puithiam Lalber hmelhriat a ni a, Puithiam Lalber in hual chhung kawtlaiah Isua hnenah a lut ve a;" 
John18:16 nimahsela Petera chu pawnah kawngkhar bu lah a ding reng a. Chutichuan zirtir dang, Puithiam Lalber hmelhriata chu a va chhuak a, kawngkhar vengtu a bia a, Petera a hruai lut a." 
John18:17 Tin, kawngkhar vengtu nula chuan Petera hnenah, ""Nang pawh he mi zirtirte zinga tel ve i ni em?"" a ti a. Ani chuan, ""Ka ni lo,"" a ti a." 
John18:18 Tin, bawihte leh tiangkengtute chu chutah chuan an ding hlawm a, a vawh avangin meihawlin mei an chhem a, a lum an ai a; Petera pawh an hnenah a tel a, ding chungin mei lum a ai ve a." 
John18:19 Tin, Puithiam Lalber chuan Isua chu a zirtirte chanchin leh a zirtirzia thu a zawt a." 
John18:20 Isua'n a chhang a, a hnenah, ""Khawvel mi hnenah, vantlang hriatin thu ka sawi thin kha; inkhawmna in leh Pathian biak in, Juda zawng zawng awm khawmnaahte chuan ka zirtir fo thin kha, arukin engmah ka sawi lo." 
John18:21 Engati nge kei mi zawh? An hnena ka thu sawizia chu ka thu hretu zawt rawh; ngai rawh, chung chuan ka thusawi chu an hria alawm,"" a ti a." 
John18:22 Chu chu a sawi veleh a kianga ding tiangkengtu pakhatin Isua a beng a, ""Puithiam Lalber heti hian i chhang maw?"" a ti a." 
John18:23 Isua'n a hnenah, ""Thu sual sawi ka nih chuan ka sualna mi hriattir rawh; nimahsela thu tha ka sawi pawhin engah nge mi ben?"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John18:24 Tin, Ana chuan phuar chungin Puithiam Lalber Kaiapha hnenah a tir a." 
John18:25 Tin, Simon Petera'n dingin mei lum a ai a. Tin, ""Nang pawh a zirtir zinga tel ve i ni em?"" an ti a. Ani chuan, ""Ka ni lo,"" tiin a pha a." 
John18:26 Tin, Puithiam Lalber bawih pakhat, Petera beng sah thlaka laichin chuan, ""A hnenah huanah khan ka hmu lo che em ni?"" a ti a." 
John18:27 Tichuan Petera a pha leh a; tin, ar a khuang ta nghal a." 
John18:28 Tin, Isua chu Kaiapha in atang chuan lal inah an hruai leh a; zing a ni a; tin, anni zawng lal inah an lut lo, an luh zawngin an bawlhhlawh ang a, Kalhlen Kut chaw an ei thei lo ang." 
John18:29 Tin, Pilata an hnenah a va chhuak a, an hnenah, ""He mi chungah hian thupawi eng nge in neih?"" a ti a." 
John18:30 Anni chuan a hnenah, ""He mi hi mi sual ni suh se la i hnenah kan rawn hruai lo vang,"" an ti a, an chhang a." 
John18:31 Tin, Pilata chuan an hnenah, ""Nangni'n hruai u langin, in dan angin a thu rel rawh u,"" a ti a. Judate chuan a hnenah, ""Keini thuin tumah tihhlum dan a ni lo,"" an ti a." 
John18:32 (A thihzia tur thu, Isua'n a sawi anga a thlenna'n)." 
John18:33 Chutichuan Pilata chu a inah a lut leh a, Isua a ko a, a hnenah, ""Judate lal i ni em?"" a ti a." 
John18:34 Isua'n, ""Hei hi nangma rilru puak chhuaka i sawi nge, mi dangin an hrilh che, ka chungchang thu hi?"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John18:35 Pilata'n, ""Kei Juda kan ni em ni? Nangma chite leh puithiam lalte'n ka hnenah an rawn hruai che a nih hi; thil eng nge i tih?"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John18:36 Isua'n, ""Ka ram chu he khawvela mi hi a ni lo; ka ram chu he khawvela mi hi ni se la, ka thuihruaiten an bei ang, Judate hnena peka ka awm lohna'n; nimahsela ka ram zawng heta mi hi a ni lo,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John18:37 Tin, Pilatan a hnenah, ""Chu, lal i ni elo?"" a ti a. Isua'n, ""Ni e, lal ka ni a sin. Thutak hriattir hi ka pian chhan leh khawvela ka rawn kal chhan a ni. Tupawh thutaka mi apiangin ka thu an pawm thin,"" a ti a." 
John18:38 Pilatan a hnenah, ""Thutak eng nge ni?"" a ti a. Tin, chu thu chu a sawi zawh veleh, Judate hnenah a va chhuak leh a, an hnenah, ""Engmah a sualna ka hmu lo." 
John18:39 Nimahsela, Kalhlen Kutah mi pakhat ka chhuahsak tur che u dan in nei; chutichuan Judate lal hi chhuahsak che u i la in duh em?"" a ti a.Tin, anni chu an au leh a, ""He mi hi chu ni suh se, Barabba kha ni zawk rawh se,"" an ti a. Barabba chu suam hmang a ni." 
John18:40 Tin, anni chu an au leh a, ""He mi hi chu ni suh se, Barabba kha ni zawk rawh se,"" an ti a. Barabba chu suam hmang a ni." 
John19:1 Tin, chutih lai chuan Pilatan Isua a hruai a, a vua a." 
John19:2 Tin, sipaite chuan hling lukhum an phiar a, an khumtir a, puan sen duk an sintir bawk a;" 
John19:3 tin, a kiangah an lo kal a, ""Chibai! Judate Lal!"" an ti a, an beng a." 
John19:4 Tin, Pilata chu a chhuak leh a, an hnenah, ""En teh u, engmah a sualna ka hmu lo tih in hriatna'n, in hnenah ka rawn hruai chhuah hi,"" a ti a." 
John19:5 Tin, Isua chu hling lukhum leh puan sen duk chu sin chungin a lo chhuak a. Tin, Pilatan an hnenah, ""En teh u, mihringa hi!"" a ti a." 
John19:6 Tin, puithiam lalte leh tiangkengtute chuan amah an hmuh veleh an au a, ""Kraws-ah khengbet rawh, kraws-ah khengbet rawh,"" an ti a. Pilatan an hnenah, ""Nangni'n kalpui u la, kraws-ah khengbet rawh u; kei zawngin engmah a sualna ka hmu si lo,"" a ti a." 
John19:7 Judate chuan a hnenah, ""Kan dan kawng khat a awm, chu mi dan ang zelin Pathian Fapaa a insiam avangin a thi tur a ni,"" an ti a, an chhang a." 
John19:8 Tin, Pilatan chu thu chu a hriatin a hlau lehzual a;" 
John19:9 a inah a lut leh a, Isua hnenah, ""Khawi lama mi nge i nih?"" a ti a. Nimahsela Isua'n a chhang lo." 
John19:10 Tin, Pilatan a hnenah, ""Nangin kei mi be lo vei maw? Thlah thei che ka ni, kraws-a khengbet thei che ka ni tih i hre lo em ni?"" a ti a." 
John19:11 Isua'n, ""Chung lam atanga pek i nih loh chuan ka chungah hian ti theih reng reng i nei lo ang; chuvangin i hnena mi petu khan sual a phur zual a ni,"" a ti a." 
John19:12 Chu mi achin chu Pilatan thlah a tum a; nimahsela Judate an au a, ""He mi hi i thlah chuanin Kaisara thian i ni lo ang; tupawh lala insiam apiang Kaisara do an ni,"" an ti a." 
John19:13 Tin, Pilatan chung thu chu a hriat veleh, Isua a hruai chhuak a, a hming Lungrem, - Hebrai tawng erawh chuan Gabbatha an ti, - chu mi hmunah chuan rorelna thutphahah a thu a." 
John19:14 (Tin, chu mi ni chu Kalhlen Kut Inrinni a ni a, tukthuan ei hun lai a ni). Tin, ani chuan Judate hnenah, ""En teh u, in Lal hi!"" a ti a." 
John19:15 Tin, anni chu an au a, ""Tiboral rawh, tiboral rawh, kraws-ah khengbet rawh,"" an ti a. Pilatan an hnenah, ""In Lal hi kraws-ah ka khengbet ang maw?"" a ti a, Puithiam lalten, ""Kaisara lo chu lal dang kan nei lo,"" an ti a, an chhang a." 
John19:16 Chutichuan Pilatan kraws-a khenbeh turin amah chu an hnenah a pe ta a. Chutichuan Isua chu an hruai ta a. 
John19:17 Tin, ani chuan mahni tana kraws puin 'Lu ruh hmun,' an tih, Hebrai tawnga Golgotha an tih chu, chu mi hmun thleng chuan a va chhuak a;" 
John19:18 chutah chuan kraws-ah an khengbet a, mi dang pahnih nen, a sir tuakah pakhat ve vein, a laiah Isua." 
John19:19 Tin, Pilatan lehkha a ziak a, kraws ler lamah a bel a. 'Nazareth Isua Judate Lal,' tiin a ziak a ni." 
John19:20 Tin, chu lehkha chu Judate a then tam takin an chhiar a; Isua kraws-a an khenbehna hmun chu khawpui kiang a ni a; Hebrai tawng te, Rom tawng te, Grik tawngtein ziak a ni si a." 
John19:21 Chutichuan Judate puithiam lalte chuan Pilata hnenah, 'Judate Lal' tiin ziak suh; 'Judate Lal ka ni, a ti,' tiin ziak rawh,"" an ti a." 
John19:22 Pilatan, 'Ka ziak kha ka ziak zo tawh,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John19:23 Tin, sipaiten Isua chu kraws-a an khenbeh zawh chuan a silhfente an la a, phel liah an siam a, sipaiten phel khatin an chang theuh a; a kawr an la bawk a. Kawr chu thui loh kawr a ni a, a nghawng ata apumin tah vek a ni;" 
John19:24 chuvangin anni chuan, ""I pawt thler suh ang u, tu ta ber tur nge thum i vawr zawk ang u,"" an inti a. (Pathian Lehkha Thu, ""Ka silhfente an insem a, ka kawr atan thum an vawr a,"" tih a thlenna turin). Chung thil chu sipaiten an ti a." 
John19:25 Tin, Isua kraws kiangah a nu leh a nu laizawn, Mari, Klopa nupui leh Mari Magdalini an ding a." 
John19:26 Tin, Isua'n a nu leh a zirtir a hmangaih kha a kianga ding a hmu a, a nu hnenah, ""Hmeichhia, en teh, i fapa kha!"" a ti a." 
John19:27 Tin, zirtir hnenah chuan, ""En teh, i nu kha!"" a ti a. Tin, chuta chin chu, chu zirtir chuan ama inah ani chu a hruai ta a." 
John19:28 Chu mi hnuah chuan Isua'n thil engkim tunah a kim tawh tih a hria a, Pathian Lehkha Thu kha a thlenna'n, ""Ka tui a hal e,"" a ti a." 
John19:29 Chutah chuan bel pakhat uain thura khat an hung a, chutichuan spanj pakhat chu uain tura chiah khatin, husop tiangah an tar a, a hmuiah an han thlen a." 
John19:30 Tin, Isua'n uain thur chu a lo in zawh chuan ""A kin ta"" a ti a. Tin, a lu a kun a, a thlarau a thlah ta a." 
John19:31 Tin, Inrinni a nih avangin ruangte chu Chawlhnia kraws-a a awm reng lohna'n, (chu Chawlhni chu ni ropui a ni si a), Judaten Pilata hnenah an kete tihtliaha an ruang kalpuiah an ngen a." 
John19:32 Tin sipaite chu an lo kal a, a hnena kraws-a an khenbeh mi tawntirh leh mi pakhat chu an kete an titliak a;" 
John19:33 nimahsela Isua kiangah an lo kal a, a thi tawh reng tih an hria a, a kete an titliak ve lo a;" 
John19:34 nimahsela sipaite zinga mi pakhatin a nakah feiin a chhun a, tichuan thisen leh tui a chhuak ta nghal a." 
John19:35 A hmutu chuan a hriattir tawh, (a thu hriattir a dik a ni; a sawi dik tih a inhria), nangni pawhin in rinna turin." 
John19:36 Pathian Lehkha Thu, ""A ruh pakhat mah tihtliah a ni lo ang,"" tih, thlenna turin chung thil chu a lo awm ta." 
John19:37 Tin, Pathian Lehkha Thu dangin, ""An chhuna chu an la en ang,"" a ti bawk a." 
John19:38 Tin, chung thil tih hnuah chuan Josefa, Arimathai khua mi, Isua zirtir a ni a, nimahsela Judate a hlauh avnga aruka awm a ni a, ani chuan Isua ruang chu kalpui atan Pilata hnenah a dil a; tin, Pilatan a phal a. Chutichuan a lo kal a, a ruang chu a kalpui ta a." 
John19:39 Tin, Nikodema, atira zana a hnena lo kal kha, murra leh aloe inpawlh sa buk sawmnga lai sinin a lo kal ve a." 
John19:40 Tin, Isua ruang chu an la a, Judate inphum dan angin englo rimtuite nen chuan puan zai sinin an tuam a." 
John19:41 Tin, kraws-a an khenbehna hmunah chuan huan pakhat a awm a; huanah chuan tumah la zalhna ngai loh thlan thar pakhat a awm.Tin, Judate Inrinni a nih avangin, thlan chu an kiang lawk a ni si a, chutah chuan Isua chu an zalh ta a." 
John19:42 Tin, Judate Inrinni a nih avangin, thlan chu an kiang lawk a ni si a, chutah chuan Isua chu an zalh ta a." 
John20:1 Tin, ni sarih ni hmasa berah, zingah, khua a la thim laiin, Mari Magdalini chu thlanah chuan a va kal a, lung chu thlan ata lak sawnin a hmu a." 
John20:2 Chutichuan a tlan a, Simon Petera leh zirtir dang Isua'n a hmangaiha hnenah chuan a lo kal a, an hnenah, ""Thlan ata kha Lalpa chu an kal bopui ta, an dahna chin ka hre si lo,"" a ti a." 
John20:3 Chutichuan Petera chu a chuak a, zirtir dang nen chuan, tin, thlan lam an pan a." 
John20:4 Tin, an tlan dun a; zirtir dang chuan Petera a tlan khalh a, thlan chu a thleng hmasa a." 
John20:5 Tin, a kun a, a bih a, puan zai sinte chu awm rengin a hmu a; nimahsela a chhungah a lut lo." 
John20:6 Tin, Simon Petera pawhin a hnungah a rawn um thleng a, thlan chhungah a lut a; puan zai sinte chu awm reng leh," 
John20:7 a lua inhrukna puan awm chu, puan zai sinte zinga awm loin, zial sain hmun hranga awm a hmu a." 
John20:8 Chutichuan zirtir dang thlan thleng hmasaa pawh chu a lut ve a, a hmu a, a awih a." 
John20:9 Mitthi zing ata a tho leh tur a ni tih Pathian Lehkha Thu kha an la hre si lo. 
John20:10 Chutichuan zirtirte chu anmahni inah an haw leh ta a. 
John20:11 Nimahsela Mari chu pawnah thlan kiangah tap chungin a ding a; tichuan tap chungin a kun a, thlan chhung chu a bih a;" 
John20:12 tin, vantirhkoh pahnih puan var sinin, Isua ruang zalhna hmunah chuan, pakhat a lu lamah, pakhat a ke lamah thu a hmu a." 
John20:13 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Hmeichhia, engati nge i tah?"" an ti a. Ani chuan an hnenah, ""Ka Lalpa an kal bopui a, an dahna chin ka hriat loh avangin,"" a ti a." 
John20:14 Tin, chutia a sawi veleh a hnung lam a hawi a, Isua ding a hmu a, Isua a ni tih a hre si lo a." 
John20:15 Isua'n a hnenah, ""Hmeichhia, engati nge i tah? Tunge i zawn?"" a ti a. Ani chuan huan enkawltu emaw a ti a, a hnenah, ""Ka pu, amah heta ta i kalpui a nih chuan i dahna chin mi hrilh ang che, chutichuan ka la ang,"" a ti a." 
John20:16 Isua'n a hnenah, ""Mari,"" a ti a. Ani chu a hawi a, a hnenah Hebrai tawngin, ""Rabboni,"" a ti a; (chu chu Zirtirtu tihna a ni a)." 
John20:17 Tin, Isua'n a hnenah, ""Mi vuan tawh suh; tun thleng pawhin Pa hnenah ka la lawn chho lo a ni; amaherawhchu ka unaute hnenah va kal la, an hnenah, 'Ka Pa, in Pa, a Pathian, in Pathian hnenah ka lawn chho dawn,' a ti e, ti rawh,"" a ti a." 
John20:18 Mari Magdalini chu a va kal a, zirtirte hnenah, ""Lalpa chu ka hmu ta,"" a ti a, a hnena thu a sawiziate pawh chu a hrilh a." 
John20:19 Tin, chu mi ni, ni sarih ni hmasa berah, khua a lo tlai lamin, Judate hlauh avanga zirtirte awmna kawngkharte chu an khar hnu chuan, Isua an zingah a lo ding a, an hnenah, ""In chungah thlamuanna awm rawh se,"" a ti a." 
John20:20 Tin, chu chu a sawi zawh chuan a kut leh a nak an hnenah a entir a. Tin, Lalpa chu an hmuh chuan zirtirte chu an lawm ta a." 
John20:21 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""In chungah thlamuanna awm rawh se; Pain kei mi tir ang bawkin ka tirh che u hi,"" a ti leh a." 
John20:22 Tin, chung thu chu a sawi zawhin an chungah a thaw a, an hnenah ""Thlarau Thianghlim nei rawh u; tu sual pawh in ngaihdam apiang ngaihdam a ni ang;" 
John20:23 tu sual pawh in ngaihdam loh apiang ngaihdam loh a ni ang,"" a ti a." 
John20:24 Tin, Isua a lo kal lai khan sawm leh pahnihte zinga tel ve Thoma, Phira an tih chu, an hnenah a awm ve lo a." 
John20:25 Chutichuan zirtir dangte chuan a hnenah, ""Lalpa chu kan hmu ta,"" an ti a. Nimahsela ani chuan an hnenah, ""A kuta thir khenna serte kha ka hmuh a, thir khenna serahte chuan ka kutzung ka khawih luh a, a naka ka zen meuh loh chuan ka ring lo ang,"" a ti a." 
John20:26 Tin, ni riat hnuah, a zirtirte chu in chhungah an awm leh a, Thoma pawh an hnenah a awm ve a. Tin, Isua a lo kal a, kawngte chu khar a ni si a, an zingah a lo ding ta a, an hnenah, ""In chungah thlamuanna awm rawh se,"" a ti a." 
John20:27 Tin, Thoma hnenah chuan, ""I kutzungin han khawih la, ka kutte en rawh; i kut han ban la, ka nakah zen rawh; ring loin awm suh la, ring rawh,"" a ti a." 
John20:28 Thoma'n a hnenah, ""Ka Lalpa leh ka Pathian i ni,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
John20:29 Isua'n a hnenah, ""Nang chuan mi hmuh avangin i ring a ni; hmu loa ring apiang te chu an eng a thawl e,"" a ti a." 
John20:30 Tin, Isua'n zirtirte hmaah chuan chhinchhiahna dang tam tak a ti teuh a, chung chu he lehkhabuah hian ziak a ni lo;nimahsela he'ng hi Isua chu, Krista, Pathian Fapa a ni tih in rinna tur leh, in rin a, a hminga nun in neihna turin ziak a ni." 
John20:31 nimahsela he'ng hi Isua chu, Krista, Pathian Fapa a ni tih in rinna tur leh, in rin a, a hminga nun in neihna turin ziak a ni." 
John21:1 Chu mi hnuah chuan Tiberia dilah Isua a zirtirte hnenah a inlar leh a; heti hian a inlar: 
John21:2 Simon Petera te, Thoma (Phira an tih) te, Galili rama Kana khuaa mi Nathanaela te, Zebedaia fapa pahnihte leh a zirtir dang pahnihte an awm khawm a." 
John21:3 Simon Petera chuan an hnenah, ""Sangha manin ka kal dawn e,"" a ti a. Anni chuan a hnenah, ""Keini pawh i hnenah kan kal ve ang,"" an ti a. Tin, an kal chhuak a, lawngah an chuang a; chu mi zan chuan engmah an man lo." 
John21:4 Tin, khawfing chahin Isua tiauphovah a ding a; nimahsela zirtirte chuan Isua a ni tih an hre si lo." 
John21:5 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""Naute u, ei tur engilo in nei em?"" a ti a. Anni chuan a hnenah, ""Nei lo,"" an ti a, an chhang a." 
John21:6 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Lawng sir ding lamah khan len deng u lang in hmu ang,"" a ti a. Tin, an deng a, sangha tam avangin an hnuk chhuak zo ta lo a." 
John21:7 Chutichuan, zirtir Isua'n a hmangaiha khan, Petera hnenah, ""Lalpa a nih saw,"" a ti a. Chutichuan Lalpa a ni tih Simon Petera'n an hriat veleh a kawr a veng a, (saruaka awm a ni si a), dilah a zuang thla ta a." 
John21:8 Nimahsela zirtir dangte chuan lawng te tak te chuan len, sangha chawpa hnuk chungin an rawn pan a, (khawmual atangin an hla si lo a, tawng zahnih emaw lek a ni a)." 
John21:9 Tin, khawmuala an chhuah veleh, chutah chuan meihawla mei chhem an hmu a, a chunga sangha leh chhangper rawh nen." 
John21:10 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""Tunah in sangha man kha a then han la rawh u,"" a ti a." 
John21:11 Chutichuan Simon Petera a va chuang a, len chu sangha lian pui puia khatin khawmualah a hnuk chhuak a, za leh sawmnga leh pathum a ni; chuti zozai chu awm mah se la len chu a tet si lo." 
John21:12 Tin, Isua'n an hnenah, ""Tukthuan lo ei rawh u,"" a ti a. Tin, zirtirte zingah tumahin a hnenah, ""Tunge i nih?"" tiin an zawt ngam lo, Lalpa a ni tih an hre reng a." 
John21:13 Tin, Isua a lo kal a, chhangper chu a la a, an hnenah a pe a, sanghate pawh chu chutiangin a pe bawk a." 
John21:14 Chu chu Isua mitthi zinga ata a thawhleh hnua a zirtirte hnena a inlar a vawi thumna a ni. 
John21:15 Tin, tukthuan an ei zawhin, Isua'n Simon Petera hnenah chuan, ""Simon, Johana fapa, hengte ai hian nangin kei mi hmangaih zawk em?"" a ti a. Ani chuan a hnenah,""Aw, Lalpa; ka ngaina che tih i hria e,"" a ti a. Ani chuan a hnenah, ""Ka beram note chawm rawh,"" a ti a." 
John21:16 Tin, a vawi hnihnaah a hnenah, ""Simon, Johana fapa, nangin kei mi hmangaih em?"" a ti leh a. Ani chuan a hnenah, ""Aw, Lalpa, ka ngaina che tih i hria e,"" a ti leh a. Ani chuan a hnenah, ""Ka beramte enkawl rawh,"" a ti a." 
John21:17 Tin, a vawi thumnaah chuan a hnenah, ""Simon, Johana fapa, nangin kei mi ngaina em? a ti a. Tin, a vawi thumnaah, ""Nangin mi ngaina em?"" a hnena a tih avang chuan Petera a lungngai a, a hnenah, ""Lalpa, engkim i hria a, ka ngaina che tih i hria e,"" a ti a. Isua'n a hnenah, ""Ka beramte chawm rawh." 
John21:18 Tih tak meuhin, tih tak meuhin ka hrilh a che, i naupan lai khan i taiah i inhreng a, i duhna apiangah i kal thin a; nimahsela i upat hunah i kutte i phar ang a, mi dangin an hrensak ang chia, i duh lohna lamah an kai ang che,"" a ti a." 
John21:19 (Chung thu chu engtiziaa thiin nge Pathian a chawimawi ang tih hriattirna'n a sawi a ni). Tin, chu chu a sawi zawhin, a hnenah, ""Mi zui rawh,"" a ti a." 
John21:20 Tin, Petera chu a hawi a, Isua'n zirtir a hmangaih, zanriah ei laia a awm nghenga lo thle phei a, ""A mantirtu tur che chu tu ber nge ni?"" titua khan a rawn zui a hmu a." 
John21:21 Tin, Petera'n a ni chu a hmu a, Isua hnenah, "" Lalpa he mi hian e nge a tih ang?"", a ti a." 
John21:22 Isua'n a hnenah, ""Ka lo kal leh thlenga awm rengah phei duh i la, chu chu enga i hman tur nge ni? Nangin mi zui mai rawh,"" a ti a." 
John21:23 Chutichuan chu zirtir chu thi lo turin a thu chu unaute zingah chuan a thang ta a; nimahsela Isua'n a thi lo ang tih a hnenah a sawi si lo, ""Ka lo kal leh thlenga awm rengah phei duh i la, chu chu enga i hman tur nge ni?"" a ti mai a ni si a." 
John21:24 Chu zirtir chu he'ng thu hriattirtu leh ziaktu hi a ni; a thu hriattir hi dik tak a ni tih kan hria e.Tin, he'ng lo hi Isua thiltih a dang tam tak a la awm, chung chu ziak fai vek ni dawn se la, lehkhabu ziak tur zawng zawng chu khawvelah pawh hian lengin ka ring lo." 
John21:25 Tin, he'ng lo hi Isua thiltih a dang tam tak a la awm, chung chu ziak fai vek ni dawn se la, lehkhabu ziak tur zawng zawng chu khawvelah pawh hian lengin ka ring lo." 
Acts1:1 Theophil, hmana lehkhaah khan, Isua thiltih leh a zirtir tantirh zawng zawng thu kha ka ziak a ni;" 
Acts1:2 Thlarau Thianghlim tanpuia a tirhkoh thlante hnena thu a tiam zawha vana hruai chhoha a awm tak ni thlenga thu kha. 
Acts1:3 Chu tirhkohte hnenah chuan hrehawm chu a tuar hnuin hriatna tam takin nungin a inentir a, ni sawmli zet an hnenah a inlar a, Pathian ram thu a sawi thin." 
Acts1:4 Tin, an awm khawm a pawl ve a, ""Jerusalem khua kalsan suh u, Pa thiltiam ka sawi in hriat kha lo nghak rawh u,"" a ti tlat a." 
Acts1:5 Johana khan tuiin a baptis thin a, nimahsela ni rei lo tean Thlarau Thianghlimin baptisma in chang ang,"" a ti a." 
Acts1:6 Tin, anni chuan an rawn inkhawmin a hnenah, ""Lalpa, tunah em ni Israelte hnenah ram i pek leh dawn?"" an ti a, an zawt a." 
Acts1:7 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Pain a hun leh a ni, ama thu thua awma a ruat chu, nangni lo hriat tur a ni lo e." 
Acts1:8 Nimahsela Thlarau Thianghlim chu in chunga a lo thlen hunah thiltihtheihna in la nei ang; tichuan Jerusalem khuaah te, Judai leh Samari ram khaw tinah te, kawlkil thleng pawhin ka thuhretute in ni ang,"" a ti a." 
Acts1:9 Tin, chung thu chu a sawi zawhin an hmuh reng chungin, vana hruai chhohin a awm a; tin, chhumin an hmuh phak lohvah a hruai bo ta a." 
Acts1:10 Tin, a chhoh laia van lam an en reng laiin mi pahnih, puan var sinin, an kiangah an lo ding a;" 
Acts1:11 chu mite chuan, ""Galili rama mite u, engati nge van lam ena in din reng? He Isua in hnen ata vana hruai chhoha a awm hi, vana a chho in hmu ang bawk hian amah ngei hi a lo kal leh ang,"" an ti a." 
Acts1:12 Tin, Olivet tlang an tih ata chu Jerusalem khuaah an kir leh ta a; chu mi tlang chu Jerusalem khaw kiang a ni a, Chawlhnia kalna tawk chauh a ni." 
Acts1:13 Tin, an luhin, an awmna pindan chungnungah chuan an chho va - Petera leh Johana nen, Jakoba leh Andria nen, Philipa leh Thoma nen, Bartholomaia leh Matthaia nen, Alphaia fapa Jakoba leh Simona, Zelot pawla mi leh, Jakoba fa Juda nen an ni." 
Acts1:14 Chungho zawng zawng chu hmeichhia tute emaw leh Isua nu Mari nen, Isua unaute nen, rilru hmunkhata thahnemngai taka tawngtaiin an awm reng a." 
Acts1:15 Tin, chung ni chuan unaute zingah Petera a ding a, an za chuan za leh sawmhnih lai an ni a," 
Acts1:16 Unaute u, Thlarau Thianghlimin, Davida kaa, Isua mantute hruaitu Juda thu a sawi lawk kha, kha Pathian Lehkha Thu kha lo thleng reng tur a ni." 
Acts1:17 Ani chu kan zinga chhiar tel a ni a, he'ng rawngbawlah hian chan pawh a nei ve si a." 
Acts1:18 (Tin, chu mi chuan a sual manin hmun pakhat a lei a, a bawkkhupin a tla a, a laiah a puak keh a, a ril zawng zawng a chhuak vek a." 
Acts1:19 Tin, chung thu chu Jerusalem khuaa awmte zawng zawngin an lo hria a; chutichuan chu hmun chu, anmahni tawngin, 'Akeldama' an ti a, chu chu 'Thisen Hmun' tihna a ni)," 
Acts1:20 Fakna Hla Bu-ah he'ng thu hi ziak a ni: 'A awmna tihramin awm rawh se, a chhungah tumah awm suh se,' tih leh, 'A hotu nihna chu mi dangin chang rawh se,' tih hi." 
Acts1:21 Chutichuan Lal Isua kan zinga lut thin chhuak thina a awm chhung zawnga - 
Acts1:22 Johana baptisma achin, kan hnen ata vana hruai chhoha a awm ni thleng khan - he'ng min pawl thinte zingah hian mi pakhat a thawhlehna min hriatpuitu atan a awm tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Acts1:23 Tin, mi pahnih an ruat a, pakhat chu Josefa Barsaba an tiha chu, (a hming dang Justa an ti bawk a), tin, pakhat chu Matthia a ni a." 
Acts1:24 Tin, an tawngtai a, ""Nang, Lalpa, mihring zawng zawng rilru hretu, Juda chuan ama awmnaa kal turin he'ng rawngbawl leh tirhkoh hna a tlawmsan hi," 
Acts1:25 a ai awh turin he mite pahnih hi a tu zawk nge i thlan min hriattir ang che,"" an ti a.Tin, ai an ensak a, an ai en chu Matthia chungah a lo tlu a; tichuan ani chu tirhkoh sawm leh pakhatte zingah chuan chhiar tel a ni ta a." 
Acts1:26 Tin, ai an ensak a, an ai en chu Matthia chungah a lo tlu a; tichuan ani chu tirhkoh sawm leh pakhatte zingah chuan chhiar tel a ni ta a." 
Acts2:1 Tin, Pentikost ni a lo thlenin, an zain hmun khatah an awm khawm vek a." 
Acts2:2 Tin, thawklehkhatan van ata ri, thlipui tleh angin a lo thleng ta phut a. Tin, chu chuan an thutna in chu a tikhat ta vek a," 
Acts2:3 tin, leite te, amaha insem darhin, mei angin an hnenah a lo inlar ta a. Tin, an chungah chuang theuh a," 
Acts2:4 an zain Thlarau Thianghlimin an khat ta vek a, Thlarauin a tawngtir ang zelin tawng dangin an lo tawng ta a." 
Acts2:5 Tin, van hnuaia hnam tin zing ata Pathian ngaihsak Judate Jerusalem khuaah an cham a." 
Acts2:6 Tin, chu ri chu an hriat veleh mipui an rawn inkhawm a, mi tinin an tawng chu mahni tawng theuhin an lo hriat avangin an rilruin an lo buai a." 
Acts2:7 Tin, an za chuan an mangang a, mak an ti hle a, ""En teh u, henga twngte zawng zawng hi Galili rama mi an ni lo em ni?" 
Acts2:8 Engtin nge kan zaa kan tawng pianpui anga kan hriat theuh? 
Acts2:9 Thenkhat Parthai hnam te, Medai hnam te, Elamitai hnam te kan ni a; thenkhat Mesopotamia rama awm te, Judai rama awm te, Kappadokia rama awm te, Ponto rama awm te, Asia rama awm te," 
Acts2:10 Phrugia rama awm te, Pamphulia rama awm te, Aigupta rama awm te, Kurini khaw kiang vela Libua rama awm te kan ni a; thenkhat Rom khaw khual - Judate leh an saphunte nen - kan ni a," 
Acts2:11 thenkhat Krit thliarkara mi leh Arab rama mi kan ni si a; nimahsela Pathian thiltih ropuite an sawi, mahni tawng theuhin kan hriat si hi!"" an ti a." 
Acts2:12 Tin, an za chuan mak an ti hle mai a, a ngaihna an hre lo a, ""Heng hi engtizia nge ni?"" an inti a." 
Acts2:13 Thenkhatin an nuihsan a, ""Uain thar an rui a nih hi,"" an ti a." 
Acts2:14 Nimahsela Petera chu sawm leh pakhatte nen an ding za a, ani chuan aw ring takin an hnenah a sawi a, ""Nangni Judai rama mite u, nangni Jerusalem khuaa awm zawng zawngte u, he'ng hi hria u la, ka thu pawh ngai rawh u." 
Acts2:15 Hengho hi in rin angin an rui lo e, fehrehsan lai chauh a nih hi." 
Acts2:16 Heng hi zawlnei Joelan a sawi kha a ni zawk: 
Acts2:17 Pathianin, 'Ni hnuhnungahte chuan heti hi a ni ang a, Mi zawng zawng chungah ka Thlarau ka leih ang a; tichuan in fapate, in fanuten ka thu an hril ang a; in tlangvalten inlarnate an hmu ang a, in putarten mumangah an mang ang a;" 
Acts2:18 A ni, chung niahte chuan ka bawihpate, ka bawihnute chungah pawh, ka Thlarau ka leih ang a, ka thu an hril ang," 
Acts2:19 Tin, chung lam vanah thilmak te, hnuai lam leiah chhinchhiahna te ka hmuhtir ang a; thisen te, mei te, meikhu hu te nen:" 
Acts2:20 Ni thimah a chang ang a, thla thisenah a chang ang a, Lalpa ni ropui tak leh hmingthang tak chu a lo thlen hmain;" 
Acts2:21 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, tupawh Lalpa hming lam apiang chu an him ang,' a ti e," 
Acts2:22 Nangni Israel mite u, he'ng thu hi hre rawh u: Nazaret Isua, Pathianin amah hmangin in zingah thil ropui te, thilmak tak te, chhinchhiahna te a tih khanin a hriat chiantir che u kha; nangni ngeiin chung chu in hre si a: a tih kha." 
Acts2:23 kha mi kha Pathian rel tlat leh hriat lawk angin an mantir a, nangni'n mi sualte kutin krawsah in khengbet a, in tihlum ta a." 
Acts2:24 Kha mi kha, Pathianin thihna phuarnate chu a phelhsak a, a kai tho ta a; amah chu thihna chelh hlen rual a nih loh avangin." 
Acts2:25 Tin, Davida chuan a thu a sawi a, 'Ka hmaah kumkhuain Lalpa chu ka hmu thin a, ka mangan lohna'n ka ding lamah a awm a ni;" 
Acts2:26 Chuvangin ka thinlung a hlim a, ka lei pawh a lawm a; chuvangin, ka tisa pawh beisei takin a awm bawk ang." 
Acts2:27 Ka thlarau mitthi khuaah i hnutchhiah lo ang a, I mi thianghlim tawihral i phal hek lo ang a," 
Acts2:28 Nangin nunna kawngte mi hriattir a, nangin i hmelin lawmin mi tikhat ang,'tiin." 
Acts2:29 Unaute u, chi thlahtu Davida thu hi hlau loin in hnenah ka sawi thei e; ani zawng a thi a, phum pawh an phum tawh alawm, a thlan pawh tun thlengin kan hnenah a la awm reng a." 
Acts2:30 Ani chu zawlnei a ni a, Pathianin a thalbea mi tu emaw a thutphah chungah a thuttir dawn tih chhechhamin a sawi tih a hria a;" 
Acts2:31 tichuan, chung chu a lo hriat lawk reng avangin Krista thawh leh tur thu a sawi a ni, 'Mitthi khuaa hnutchhiahin a awm hek lo, a ruang pawh a tawih hek lo,' tiin." 
Acts2:32 Chu Isua chu Pathianin a kai tho leh ta reng a ni, chu chu a hretu kan zain kan ni e." 
Acts2:33 Pathian kut ding lamah chawimawiin a awm a, Thlarau Thianghlim tiam chu Pa hnen ata a hmu a, in hmuh leh in hriat hi a han leih a nih hi." 
Acts2:34 Davida zawng vanah a lawn chho lo a ni, amah ngeiin, Jehoa'n ka Lalpa hnenah 'Ka ding lamah thu reng rawh," 
Acts2:35 I hmelmate i kephah nghahchhana ka siam hma loh zawng,' a ti e, a ti zawk a nih kha." 
Acts2:36 Chutichuan Isua in khenbeha ngei kha, Pathianin Lal leh Krista ni fawmin a siam ta tih Israel hnam tinin hre mawlh rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Acts2:37 Tin, chung thu chu an hriatin an thinlunga chhun ang an lo ni ta a, Petera leh tirhkoh dangte hnenah chuan, ""Unaute u, engtin nge kan tih tak ang?"" an ti a." 
Acts2:38 Tin, Petera chuan an hnenah, ""Sim u la, in sual ngaihdamna'n Isua Krista hmingin baptisma chang theuh rawh u; tichuan Thlarau Thianghlim pek hi in hmu ang." 
Acts2:39 A tiam kha nangni tan pawh, in fate tan pawh, hla taka mi zawng zawng tan pawh, Lalpa kan Pathianin a hnena a koh apiangte tan a ni e,"" a ti a." 
Acts2:40 Tin, thu dang tam takin a hrilhfiah a; ""Tun lai thangthar bengtla lote lakah hian intihim rawh u,"" tiin a fuih a." 
Acts2:41 Tin, a thu zawm apiangin baptisma an chang ta a; chu mi niah chuan mi sangthum lai belhchhahin an awm a." 
Acts2:42 Tin, tirhkohte zirtirin, inpawlin, chhang phelin, tawngtaiin thahnemngai takin an awm reng a." 
Acts2:43 Tin, mi tinin an hlau ta a; tirhkohte chuan thilmak leh chhinchhiahna tam tak an ti a." 
Acts2:44 Tin, a ring apiang chuan engkim an intawm hlawm a," 
Acts2:45 an rote, an sumte an hralh a, an chakkhai daih lek theuhin an zaa hnenah chuan an sem thin a." 
Acts2:46 Tin, ni tin rilru hmun khatin Pathian biak inah chuan thahnemngai takin an awm thin a, an in lamahte pawh chhang an phel a, hlim tak leh lungawi takin an chaw an ei thin a,Pathian an fak a, mi zawng zawng lawmzawngin an awm thin. Tin, a chhandam mek apiangte chu Lalpain ni tin an hnenah a teltir zel thin." 
Acts2:47 Pathian an fak a, mi zawng zawng lawmzawngin an awm thin. Tin, a chhandam mek apiangte chu Lalpain ni tin an hnenah a teltir zel thin." 
Acts3:1 Tin, Petera leh Johana chu behliang mun hunin tawngtai hun lai chuan Pathian biak ina lut turin an chho a." 
Acts3:2 Tin, patling tu emaw a pian tirh ata kebai an rawn zawn a, chu mi chu biak ina lutte hnena kut dawh atan, biak in kawngkhar, Mawi an tih bulah chuan ni tin an muttir thin a ni a;" 
Acts3:3 chu mi chuan Petera leh Johana Pathian biak ina lut tur chu a hmu a, kut a dawh a." 
Acts3:4 Tin, Petera'n ani chu a en reng a, Johana pawhin; tin, Petera'n, ""Min han en rawh,"" a ti a." 
Acts3:5 Tin, ani chuan an lakah engemaw hmuh a beisei a, a han en a." 
Acts3:6 Nimahsela Petera'n, ""Tangka leh rangkachak engmah ka nei lo; nimahsela ka neih chhun ka pe ang che: Nazaret Isua Krista hmingin kein kal tawh rawh,"" a ti a." 
Acts3:7 Tin, a kut ding lam a chelh a, a kai tho ta a; tin, thawklehkhatan a kete leh a kheimit ruhte chu a lo chak ta nghal a." 
Acts3:8 Tin, ani chu a zuang tho a, a ding a, kein a kal tan ta a. Tin, kea kal kal leh, zuang zuang leh, Pathian fak chung zelin biak inah chuan a lut ve ta a." 
Acts3:9 Tin, kea a kal leh Pathian a fak chu mi zawng zawngin an hmu a;" 
Acts3:10 biak in Kawngkhar Mawi bula kut dawha thu thin kha a ni tih an hria a; a chunga thil thleng chu mak an ti em em a, an buai hle mai a." 
Acts3:11 Tin, ani chuan Petera leh Johana chu a chelh reng laiin mi zawng zawngin mak an ti em em a, hulhliap, Solomona ta an tihah chuan an hnenah an lo tlan khawm a." 
Acts3:12 Tin, Petera'n chu chu a hmuhin, mite chu a bia a, ""Nangni Israel mite u, he'ng hi engati nge mak in tih? Keimahni thiltihtheihna leh Pathian kan ngaihsak avanga ani hi kan kaltir ang em chuan engati nge min en reng?" 
Acts3:13 Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba te Pathian, min thlahtute Pathian chuan a chhiahhlawh Isua a chawimawi ta a nih hi; ani chu in mantir a, Pilatan chhuah a tum pawhin a hmaah in lo duh loh kha." 
Acts3:14 Mi Thianghlim leh Fel tak kha in duh lo a, tualthattu kha in hnena pek in ngen ta zawk a." 
Acts3:15 Nunna Siamtu chu in that a; nimahsela Pathianin ani chu mitthi zing ata a kai tho leh a; chu chu a hretute kan ni e. 
Acts3:16 Tin, ama hming rin avangin a hming chuan he mi in hmuh leh in hriat hi a tichak ta a ni; a ni, amah avangin rinna lo awm hian in zaa mithmuhah a tidam ta viah a nih hi." 
Acts3:17 Nimahsela unaute u, in hotute pawhin an at avanga an tih ang khan, in at avangin he'ng hi in ti a ni tih ka hria e." 
Acts3:18 Nimahsela Pathianin zawlnei zawng zawng kaan, a Krista-in hrehawm a tuar tur thu a hriattir lawk kha, khati khan a thlentir ta a ni." 
Acts3:19 Chuvangin in sualte thai bo a nih theihna'n sim u la, hawi kir leh rawh u, chutichuan Lalpa hnen ata harh unte a lo la thleng thei ang a," 
Acts3:20 Krista Isua, in tana a ruat pawh kha, a rawn tir thei ang;" 
Acts3:21 Amaherawhchu, engkim siamthat hun a thlen hma loh zawng vanin ani chu a kawl rih tur a ni; chu mi siamthat tur thu chu Pathianin leilung pian tirh ata a zawlnei thianghlim awmte kain a sawi tawh kha," 
Acts3:22 Mosia ngeiin, 'Lal Pathianin keimah mi siam ang hian in unaute zingah zawlnei pakhat a siamsak ang che u; ani chuan thu zawng zawng in hnena a sawi apiang chu in ngaihthlaksak ang;" 
Acts3:23 tin, mi tupawh, chu zawlnei thu chu ngaihthlaksak lo apiang mi zing ata tihboral daih an ni ang,' a tih kha." 
Acts3:24 A ni, Samuela awm achin zawlnei zawng zawng, an hnunga mite nen, thu sawi apiang kha, tun lai chanchin hi an hril lawk bawk thin." 
Acts3:25 Nangni hi zawlneite leh thuthlung fate in ni a sin; Pathianin Abrahama hnenah, 'I thlah avangin khawvela hnam tin an thawveng ang,' tiin in thlahtute hnenah a tiam kha.Pathianin a Chhiahhlawh chu a ruat a, in sualte hawisantir theuhin malsawmsak tur che uin, nangmahni hnenah a rawn tir hmasa ber a nih hi,"" a ti a." 
Acts3:26 Pathianin a Chhiahhlawh chu a ruat a, in sualte hawisantir theuhin malsawmsak tur che uin, nangmahni hnenah a rawn tir hmasa ber a nih hi,"" a ti a." 
Acts4:1 Tin, Petera leh Johanan mite hnena thu an sawi lai chuan, puithiamho te, biak in hotu te, 1Saddukaiho te chu an hnenah an lo thleng phut a," 
Acts4:2 mi an zirtir leh Isua avnga mitthi zing ata thawhleh thu an hrilh avngin an lungni lo em em a. 
Acts4:3 Tin, an man a, tlai lam a nih avangin atuk thlengin tan inah an khung ta a." 
Acts4:4 Nimahsela thu ngaithlahote zinga tam takin an awih a; an tam lam pawh patling hlir pawh sangnga lai an tling a. 
Acts4:5 Tin, atukah chuan an hotute, upate, lehkhaziaktute," 
Acts4:6 Puithiam lalber Ana te, Kaiapha te, Johana te, Aleksandra te, Puithiam Lalber chi zawng zawngte pawh Jerusalem khuaah an awm kham a." 
Acts4:7 Tin, Petera leh Johana chu a laiah an dintir a, ""Eng tihtheihnain nge, tu hmingin nge he'ng hi in tih?"" an ti a, an zawt a." 
Acts4:8 Tichuan Petera chu Thlarau Thianghlimin a khat a, an hnenah, ""Mi zawng zawng hotute u, upate u," 
Acts4:9 mi chak lo tihthat thu-ah, 'He mi hi eng vangin nge a lo dam tak?' tiin vawiinah hian min chhuahchhal chuan," 
Acts4:10 nangni zawng zawngin hre rawh u, Israel mi zawng zawng pawhin hre rawh se, Nazareth Isua Krista, kraws-a in khenbeh, Pathianin mitthi zing ata a kaihthawh leh kha, amaha hming ngeiin he mi hi hetah in hmaah damin a ding ta a nih hi." 
Acts4:11 Nangni in satute u, in lung paih, a kila lung tangkai ber lo ni ta kha amah hi a ni e." 
Acts4:12 Mi dang tuma hnenah chhandamna a awm lo; van hnuaia mihring sak zingah, min chhandam tur hming dang reng a awm lo,"" a ti a." 
Acts4:13 Tin, Petera leh Johana huaizia chu an hmuhin, lehkha thiam lo, mi mawl tak an ni tih an hriatin mak an ti hle a; Isua hnenah an awm tawh tih an hre ta a." 
Acts4:14 Tin, mi an tihdama chu an hnena ding an hmu a, engmah an sawisel thei si lo." 
Acts4:15 Chutichuan an rorelna ata an kal hrantir hnuin an inrawn a," 
Acts4:16 Heng mite hi engtin nge kan tih ang? thilmak thang tak an ti tih Jerusalem khuaa awm zawng zawngin fiah takin an hriat tak hi; keini pawhin kan hnial teh si lo. 
Acts4:17 Nimahsela mi hnena a puan lehzual theih lohna'n, tun achinah tu hnenah mah he hminga thu an sawi lohna turin i vau ang u,"" an ti a." 
Acts4:18 Tichuan anni chu an ko a, Isua hminga thu sawi tawp loh tur leh zirtir tawp loh tur an ti tlat a." 
Acts4:19 Nimahsela Petera leh Johanan an hnenah, ""Pathian mithmuhin Pathian thu zawm aiin nangni thu zawm a dik zawk emaw chu ngaihtuah rawh u." 
Acts4:20 Keini zawng thil kan hmuh leh kan hriatte kha sawi loin kan awm thei lo,"" an ti a." 
Acts4:21 Tin, anni chuan an vau lehzual a, an chhuah ta a, mipui avangin hremna remchang an hmu lo; an thiltih avang khan mi zawng zawngin Pathian an chawimawi si a." 
Acts4:22 Thilmaka an tihdama chu kum sawmli aia tam zawk mah a ni si a. 
Acts4:23 Tin, Petera leh Johana chu an chhuahin, anmahni pawlte hnenah an va kal a, puithiam lalte leh upaten an hnena an sawi apiang chu an hrilh vek a." 
Acts4:24 Chutichuan a ngaithlatute chuan arualin aw ring takin Pathian hnenah, ""Lalpa, nang van te, lei te, tuifinriat te, a chhunga awmte zawng zawng Siamtu i ni;" 
Acts4:25 nangin Thlarau Thianghlimin, min thlahtu i chhiahhlawh Davida kain, he'ng thu hi i sawi a ni: 'Jentailte engati nge an thinur kha? Hnam tinin engati nge thil sawt lo an ngaihtuah?" 
Acts4:26 Khawvel lalten an ep huai huai a, hotute pawh an pungkhawm a, Lalpa leh a Krista chungah chuan,' tiin." 
Acts4:27 He khuaah hian i Chhiahhlawh thianghlim i hriak thih Isua chungah khan, Heroda leh Pontia Pilata nen, Jentailte leh Israel mite nen an pungkhawm tak zet a ni," 
Acts4:28 i kut leh i rilruin lo thleng tura a ruat lawk apiang kha ti turin. 
Acts4:29 Tichuan, tunah Lalpa an mi vauziate hi ngai teh; i bawihte hi huai takin i thu hriltir la," 
Acts4:30 mite tidam turin nangin i kut phar ang che; i chhiahhlawh thianghlim Isua hming avangin chhinchhiahna leh thilmak takte tihtir bawk ang che,"" an ti a." 
Acts4:31 Tin, an tawngtai zawhin an awmkhawmna chu a lo nghing a, an zain Thlarau Thianghlimin an lo khat a, huai takin Pathian thu an hril ta a." 
Acts4:32 Tin, a ringtu mipuite chu rilru hmun khat leh ngaihtuah hmun khatin an awm a: an zinga pakhat mahin an sum neih, ""Ka ta bik a ni,"" an ti lo; thil zawng zawng an intawm zawk thin." 
Acts4:33 Tin, tirhkohte chuan awihawm takin Lal Isua thawh leh thu an hriattir thin a; an zaa chungah khawngaihna nasa tak a awm a." 
Acts4:34 Tin, an zingah pawh tlachham tumah an awm lo; ramte, inte nei apiangin an hralh a, an thil hralhte chu a man an rawn keng a," 
Acts4:35 tirhkohte ke bulah an dah thin a; an chakkhai daih tawk theuhin an sem theuh thin a. 
Acts4:36 Tin, Josefa, tirhkohten Barnaba an tiha chu, (chu mi hming awmzia chu, ""Thlamuanna Fa,"" tihna a ni a,) Levia chi, Kupra thliarkara mi a ni a,a lo neih chu hralhin a man a rawn keng a, tirhkohte ke bulah a dah ta a." 
Acts4:37 a lo neih chu hralhin a man a rawn keng a, tirhkohte ke bulah a dah ta a." 
Acts5:1 Nimahsela mi pakhat a hming Anania, a nupui Saphiri nen an awm a; Anania chuan ram a hralh a," 
Acts5:2 a nupui hriatin a man a then a zep ta a; tin, a then a rawn keng a, tirhkohte ke bulah chuan a dah a." 
Acts5:3 Nimahsela Petera'n, ""Anani, Thlarau Thianghlim bum tur leh, ram man a then zep turin engati nge Setanan i thinlung a tihkhah le?" 
Acts5:4 A awm chhung zawng khan i ta a ni reng lo em ni? i hralh hnu pawh khan i thu thuin a awm lo em ni? Engti nge he'ng thu hi i rilrua i ngaihtuah? Mihring bum i ni lo e, Pathian bum i ni zawk e,"" a ti a." 
Acts5:5 Tin, Anania chuan chung thu chu a hriat veleh a tlu a, a thi ta a; tin a hria apiangin an hlau ta em em a." 
Acts5:6 Tin, tlangvalhote chu an tho a, an tuam a, an zawn chhuak a, an phum ta a." 
Acts5:7 Tin, darkar thum lai emaw chinah chuan a nupui chu, thil awmzia chu hre loin a lut a." 
Acts5:8 Tin, Petera'n a hnenah, ""Mi hrilh rawh, ram chu heti zat chauhin maw in hralh?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Aw, heti zat chauh hian a ni,"" a ti a." 
Acts5:9 Tin, Petera'n a hnenah, ""Engati nge Lalpa Thlarau fiahna'n in inthurual ni? Ngai teh! I pasal phumtute kephah chu kawngka bulah a lo awm ta, nang pawh an zawn chhuak ang che,"" a ti a." 
Acts5:10 Tin, thawklehkhatan a ke bulah chuan a tlu ta nghal a, a thi ve ta a; tin, tlangvalhote chu an lo lut a, ani chu thiin an rawn hmu a, an zawn chhuak a, a pasal kiangah chuan an phum ta a." 
Acts5:11 Tin, kohhranhote zawng zawng leh chung thu hria apiangte chuan an hlau ta em em a." 
Acts5:12 Tin, mi zingah Pathianin tirhkohte kutin chhinchhihna leh thilmak tam tak a ti thin. Tin, anniho chu an zain rilru hmun khatin Solomona Hulhliapah chuan an inkhawm thin a." 
Acts5:13 Mi dang erawh chu tumah an zingah an tel ve ngam ta lo a; nimahsela miin anniho chu an fak si thin. 
Acts5:14 Tin, a ring tharho hmeichhia leh mipa tam takin Lalpa hnenah chuan an rawn belhchhah lehzual thin a;" 
Acts5:15 chutichuan mi damlote pawh kawtthlerahte an zawn chhuak a, khumahte, awngphahahte an muttir a, Petera kal pahin a hlim talin athen azar a hliah theihna'n, an ti a." 
Acts5:16 Tin, Jerusalem khaw kiang vel khua ata mipuite pawh chu damlote, ramhuai bawlhhlawh sawisakte rawn hruaiin an lo kal khawm a; chungte pawh chu an lo dam ta theuh a." 
Acts5:17 Tin, Puithiam Lalber leh a thiante zawng zawng an lo thawk a (chung a thiante chu Saddukai pawl an ni a), an itsik em em a," 
Acts5:18 tirhkohte chu an man a, vantlang tan inah an khung ta a." 
Acts5:19 Nimahsela zanah Lalpa vantirhkoh pakhatin kawngkharte chu a rawn hawng a, a hruai chhuak a," 
Acts5:20 Pathian biak inah va ding u la, mi hnenah he'ng Nunna thu zawng zawng hi va sawi rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Acts5:21 Tin, chu thu chu an hriatin khawvar hun lai velin Pathian biak inah chuan an va lut a, an zirtir ta a. Nimahsela Puithiam Lalber leh a thiante chu an lo kal a, roreltuho leh Israel thlahte upaho zawng zawng an ko khawm a, tirhkohte chu rawn hruaitir turin tan inah chuan mi an tir a." 
Acts5:22 Nimahsela tiangkengtute chu an va kal a, tan inah chuan anni chu an hmu si lo; tichuan an kir leh a," 
Acts5:23 Tan in chu him taka inkharin, a vengtute pawh kawngkhar bulah dingin kan hmu si a; nimahsela kan han hawng a, a chhungah tumah kan hmu si lo!"" tiin an hrilh a." 
Acts5:24 Tin, Pathian biak in hotu leh puithiam lalten, chung thu chu an hriatin, ""Heng hi eng ti takin puang ang maw?"" tiin an thu-ah chuan an mangang ta em em a." 
Acts5:25 Tin, mi pakhat a lo kal a, an hnenah, ""Ngai teh u, tan ina mi in khungte khan Pathian biak inah dingin mi an zirtir ka ti!"" tiin a rawn hrilh a." 
Acts5:26 Tichuan hotu chu tiangkengtute nen chuan an va kal a, vantlang an hlauh avangin tlang takin an rawn hruai a, chutilochuan lunga den an hlau a." 
Acts5:27 Tin, an rawn hruai thlen chuan roreltuho hmaah chuan an dintir a. Tin, Puithiam Lalber chuan an hnenah." 
Acts5:28 He hming hian zirtir loh tur kan tih tlat tawh che u kha; hre rawh u, in thu zirtirin Jerusalem khua in tihkhah vek tawh hi, chu mi tihhlum bul chu tumtir min tum a nih hi le,"" tiin a chhal a." 
Acts5:29 Nimahsela Petera leh tirhkohte chuan Mihring thu aiin Pathian thu kan zawm zawk tur a ni. 
Acts5:30 Nangni'n Isua thingah khai kangin in tihhlum kha, min thlahtute Pathianin a kai tho leh ta a ni." 
Acts5:31 Amah ngei kha Pathianin Lalah leh Chhandamtua awm atan a ding lamah a chawimawi ta a, Israelte sual simtir tur leh ngaidam turin." 
Acts5:32 Chung thu chu a hretute kan nih hi; Thlarau Thianghlim, Pathianin a thu zawm apiangte hnena a pek kha, a hretu a ni ve bawk a,"" an ti a, an chhang a." 
Acts5:33 Tin, anni chuan chung thu chu an hriatin an thin a khei ta em em a, tihhlum an tum ta a." 
Acts5:34 Nimahsela roreltute zingah chuan a hming Gamaliela, Pharisai, Dan hretu, mi zawng zawng zinga hmingthang tak mi pakhat chu a ding a, chu mite chu chhuahtir rih tur thu a pe a." 
Acts5:35 Tin, roreltute hnenah chuan ""Nangni Israel mite u, he mite chunga in thil tih tum hi fimkhur rawh u." 
Acts5:36 Tun hma pawh kha, Theoda, 'Mi lian ka ni,' tiin a lo awm a; chu mi hnenah chuan mi tam tak, zali lai an lo pakai a; ani chu tihhlumin a awm ta a; a thu zawm apiang an zain an darh ta vek a, engmah an ni tawh lo." 
Acts5:37 Chu mi awm hnu-ah chuan hming ziak lai khan, Galili rama mi Juda kha a lo awm leh a; a hnenah mi thenkhat a hip leh a; nimahsela ani pawh chu a thi ta a, a thu zawm apiangte chu an zain an darh ta vek mai a." 
Acts5:38 Chuvangin tunah ka ti a che u, he'ng mite hi tawk suh u la, awm mai rawh se; he'ng an thiltih tum leh an thiltih hi mihring tihchhuah mai a nih chuan a boral ang;" 
Acts5:39 amaherawhchu Pathian tihchhuah a nih chuan anmahni in tiboral thei lo ang; chutilochuan Pathian do in lo ni hlauh dah ang e,"" a ti a." 
Acts5:40 Tin, a sawi chu rem an ti ta a; tichuan tirhkohte chu an ko a, an vel a; an velh zawhin, Isua hminga thu sawi loh tur ti tlatin an thlah ta a." 
Acts5:41 Chutichuan roreltute zing ata an kal chhuak a, chu Hming avang chuan mualpho tuar tlaka ruat an nih avangin an lawm hle a.Tin, ni tin Pathian biak inah leh anmahni inahte, ""Isua chu Krista a ni,"" tiin zirtir leh hrilh an bang chuang lo." 
Acts5:42 Tin, ni tin Pathian biak inah leh anmahni inahte, ""Isua chu Krista a ni,"" tiin zirtir leh hrilh an bang chuang lo." 
Acts6:1 Tin, chung laia zirtirho an pun an pun lai chuan, an ni tin thil semah anmahni hmeithaite an ngaihsak thin loh avangin Grik Judate chu Hebraite chungah an lo phunnawi ta a." 
Acts6:2 Tin, sawm leh pahnihte chuan zirtir mipuite chu an ko a, ""Pathian thu hril bansanin, dawhkanahte rawng kan bawl chuan a tha lo ang." 
Acts6:3 Chutichuan unaute u, in zingah Thlarau leh fina khat mi hmingtha hlir pasarih thlang rawh u, anni chu he'ng thil reltu atan hian kan siam ang;" 
Acts6:4 keini erawh chu tawngtai leh thu rawngbawlin kan awm leh tlat zel ang,"" an ti a." 
Acts6:5 Chung thu chuan mipui zawng zawng chu a tilawm a; tichuan Stephana, rinna leh Thlarau Thianghlima khat nen, Philipa nen, Prokora nen, Nikanora nen, Timona nen, Parmena nen, Nikola, Judate saphun Antiokei khuaa mi nen an thlang a;" 
Acts6:6 chu mite chu tirhkohte hmaah an dintir a; tin, anni chuan an tawngtai a, an chungah an kut an nghat a." 
Acts6:7 Tin, Pathian thu chu a lo darh a; Jerusalem khuaah zirtirteho an pung ta em em a; puithiamte zingah pawh mi tam takin rinna chu an awih ta a." 
Acts6:8 Tin, Stephana chu ngilneihna leh thiltihtheihnain a khat a, mi zingah thilmak leh chhinchhiahna ropui tak a ti thin a." 
Acts6:9 Nimahsela, Sal Chhuakho te, Kurini khuaa mi te, Aleksandria khuaa mi te inkhawmna an tiha mi, mi thenkhat leh Kiliki rama mi te, Asia rama mi te inkhawmnaa mi, mi thenkhatte chu an lo thawk a, Stephana chu an rawn hnial a." 
Acts6:10 Nimahsela a finna leh a sawipuitu Thlarau chu an letthla thei ta lo a. 
Acts6:11 Tin, mite an tham a; chu mite chuan, ""Mosia leh Pathian a sawichhiat kan hria,"" an ti a." 
Acts6:12 6:12 Tin, mite, upate, lehkhaziaktute an fuihpawrh a, Stephana an bei a, an man a, roreltute hnenah an hruai a;" 
Acts6:13 tin, hretu derte an siam a, chu mite chuan, ""He mi hian he in Thianghlim leh Dan hi a sawichhe fo thin a;" 
Acts6:14 he Nazaret Isua hian he in hi a thiat ang a, Mosia dan min pekte kha a tidanglam dawn tih a sawi kan hria,"" an ti a.Tin, roreltuho thute zawng zawng chuan Stephana an en reng a, a hmel chu vantirhkoh hmel angin an hmu a." 
Acts6:15 Tin, roreltuho thute zawng zawng chuan Stephana an en reng a, a hmel chu vantirhkoh hmel angin an hmu a." 
Acts7:1 Tin, Puithiam Lalber chuan, ""Heng thu hi a dik em?"" a ti a." 
Acts7:2 Tin, Stephana chuan, ""Unaute u, pate u, ngai teh u, min thlahtu Abrahama, Haran khuaa a awm hmaa Mesopotamia rama a awm lai khan, Ropuina Pathian chu a hnenah a rawn inlar a," 
Acts7:3 a hnenah, 'I khaw lam leh i chiteho zing ata chhuak la, ram ka la entir tur che lamah kal rawh,' a ti a." 
Acts7:4 Tin, ani chu Kaldaiho ram ata a kal chhuak a Haran khuaah a va awm ta a; tin, a pa a thih hnuin chuta tangin hei tuna in awmna khaw lamah hian Pathianin a pem luhtir a." 
Acts7:5 Tin, hetah hi chuan engmah hmun luah tur, a ke nghahna tham pawh a pe lo a; nimahsela amah leh a hnua a thlahte thlenga ro turin pek a tiam a, fa a la neih hma pawhin." 
Acts7:6 Tin, Pathianin hetiangin a sawi: 'A thlahte mi ram lamah kum zali an thang ang a, min bawihah an siam ang a, an tiduhdah bawk ang,' tiin." 
Acts7:7 Tin, Pathian in 'A bawihtu turte hnam chu keimahin ka la ngaihtuah ang a, tin, chu mi zawhah chuan an lo chhuak ang a, he mi hmunah hian ka rawng an la bawl ang,' a ti bawk a." 
Acts7:8 Tin, Pathianin a hnenah serhtan thu kha a thlung a; chutichuan Abrahama chuan Isaaka a hring a,a ni riat niah a serh a tan a; tin,Isaaka chuan Jakoba a hring a, tin, Jakoba chuan chi thlahtu sawm leh pahnihte kha a hring a." 
Acts7:9 Tin, chi thlahtute khan Josefa an itsik a, Aigupta ram lamah an hralh a; nimahsela Pathian a hnenah a awm a," 
Acts7:10 a hrehawm tuar zawng zawngah a chhan chhuak zel a, Aigupta ram lal Pharaoa pawh a khawngaihtir a, mi fing tak a ni tih a hriattir bawk a; tichuan ani chuan Aigupta ram leh a ina mi zawng zawng chungah hotuah a siam ta a." 
Acts7:11 Tin, Aigupta leh Kanaan ram zawng zawngah chuan tam a lo tla a, hrehawm nasa tak a lo thleng ta a; min thlahtute chuan ei tur reng reng an hmu ta lo a." 
Acts7:12 Nimahsela Jakoba chuan Aigupta ramah buh a awm tih a hriat veleh min thlahtute chu a tir chhuak a; chu chu an kal tantirhna ber a ni. 
Acts7:13 Tin, an kal vawi hnihnaah chuan Josefa chu a unaute hnenah chuan a inhriattir a; tin, Josefa unaute chu Pharaoa an hriattir ta a." 
Acts7:14 Tin, Josefan a pa Jakoba leh a unau zawng zawng a kohtir a; anmahni chu sawmsarih leh panga an ni a." 
Acts7:15 Tichuan Jakoba chu Aigupta ramah a zuk kal a; tin, ani leh min thlahtute chu an thi ta a," 
Acts7:16 Sukem khua an zawn thleng a, Abrahama'n Sukem khuaa Hamora fapate laka thlan a tangka suma a leiah khan an zalh ta a." 
Acts7:17 Tin, Pathianin Abrahama hnena thu a tiam kha a thlen hun chu a lo thlen dawnin, mite chu Aigupta ramah chuan an lo pung a, an lo tam ta deuh deuh a," 
Acts7:18 Josefa hre lo lal dang a lo awm thleng khan. 
Acts7:19 Chu mi chuan kan chite a ngamthlem a, min thlahtute chu a tiduhdah a, an nausente nung lo turin a paih chhuahtir thin a." 
Acts7:20 Chu mi lai chuan Mosia a lo piang a, a hmel a tha em em mai a; a pa inah thla thum an chawm a;" 
Acts7:21 tin, an paih chhuahin Pharaoa fanuin a la a, ama fa atan a chawm ta a." 
Acts7:22 Tin, Mosia chu Aigupta rama mite finna zawng zawng an zirtir a, a thu-ah leh a thiltihah a ropui em em a." 
Acts7:23 Tin, ani chu kum sawmli a tlin dawn laiin a unau, Israela thlahte chu kan a tum a." 
Acts7:24 Tin, an zinga mi pakhat tihretheih tuar lai a hmu a, a chhan a, tihduhdah tuartu phuba chu a la a, Aigupta mi chu a tihlum ta a." 
Acts7:25 Mosia chuan ama kutin Pathianin anmahni a chhanhim tih a unauten an hria emaw a ti a, nimahsela an hre si lo." 
Acts7:26 Tin a tukah an zinga mi pahnih an insuallaiin an hnenah a lo thleng a, 'Pute u, unau in ni alawm; engati nge dik lo taka in intih?' tiin rem a tum a." 
Acts7:27 Nimahsela a thenawm chunga kawhmawhbawltu zawk chuan Mosia a nam kiang a, 'Kan chungah hotuah leh roreltuah tuin nge siam che?" 
Acts7:28 Nimina Aigupta mi i tihhlum ang khan mi tihhlum i tum a ni maw?' a ti a. 
Acts7:29 Tin, chu mi thu avang chuan Mosia a tlan bo a. Midian ramah a thang reng a, chutah chuan fapa pahnih a nei a." 
Acts7:30 Tin, kum sawmli a vei hnuin Sinai Tlang thlalerah, hnimbukah, mei alh zingah vantirhkoh pakhat a hnenah a lo inlar a." 
Acts7:31 Tin, Mosia'n a hmuh chuan a thil hmuh chu mak a ti em a; tin, a en tura a va hnaih laiin Lalpa awin," 
Acts7:32 'Kei i thlahtute Pathian ka nih hi, Abrahama Pathian, Isaaka Pathian, Jakoba Pathian chu,' a lo ti a. Tichuan Mosia chu a khur a, a en ngam ta lo a." 
Acts7:33 Tin, Lalpa chuan a hnenah, 'I kephah ata i pheikhawk kha phelh rawh; i dinna hmun kha lei thianghlim a ni e." 
Acts7:34 Aigupta rama ka mi awmte chu an hrehawmzia ka hmu reng a sin, an rum pawh ka hre reng a, anmahni chhanhim turin ka lo chhuk ta a ni. Hawh teh, Aigupta ramah ka tir ang che,' a ti a." 
Acts7:35 Chu Mosia, 'Hotu leh roreltuah tuin nge siam che?' tia an hnar chu, hnimbuka vantirhkoh a hnena inlar khan a pui a, Pathianin amah ngei chu hotu leh chhanhimtu ni fawm turin a tir a ni." 
Acts7:36 Ani chuan Aigupta ramah te, Tuifinriat Senah te, thlalerah te chuan kum sawmli chhungin thilmak leh chhinchhiahnate a hmuhtir zet a, anmahni a hruai chhuak ta a." 
Acts7:37 Israela thlahte hnena, 'Pathianin keimah mi siam ang hian, in unaute zinga mi zawlnei pakhat a siamsak ang che u,' titu kha a ni, chu Mosia chu." 
Acts7:38 Chu mi chu thlalera mi pung zinga Sinai tlanga a betu vantirhkoh hnenah leh min thlahtute hnena awm kha a ni; chu mi chu min pek chhawn tura thu nungte chu latu kha a ni; 
Acts7:39 min thlahtute chuan a thu an zawm duh lo a, an hnar a, an rilrute chu Aigupta ram lamah a let leh ta a." 
Acts7:40 Arona hnenah, 'Kan hma hruai turin pathiante min siamsak rawh; he Mosia Aigupta ram ata min hruai chhuaktu lah hi a chanchin kan hre ta si lo a,' an ti a." 
Acts7:41 Tin, chung lai chuan sebawng no lem an siam a, a lem chu ran talhin an bia a, anmahni kut chhuak chungah chuan an hlim ta a." 
Acts7:42 Chutichuan Pathianin a hawisan a, vana arsiho chibai an buk theihna turin anmahni a ensan ta a; Zawlnei lehkhabua, 'Israel chite u, thlalerah khan kum sawmli chhungin sa talh leh ran talhin kei mi bia em ni?" 
Acts7:43 Moloka puan in leh pathian Rephana arsi pawh chu, chibai buk turin a lem in siamte kha, in zawn zawk thin a; chuvangin, Babulon khaw piah lamah ka hruai bo ang che u,' tih ziak ang kha." 
Acts7:44 A lem a hmuh anga siam tura Mosia hrilhtuin a ruat ang khan, min thlahtuten thlalerah khan hriattirna puan in chu an nei a." 
Acts7:45 Chu bawk chu min thlahtute thleh leh pawhin an nei chhawng zel a, Pathianin min thlahtute hmaa Jentail a hnawh chhuahteho ram an luah lai khan Josua luh rualin an luhpui a; Davida lo awm thleng khan chutah chuan a awm ta reng a." 
Acts7:46 Chu Davida chu Pathian mithmuhin duhsak tlakin a awm a, Jakoba Pathian tan awmna siamsak a dil a." 
Acts7:47 Nimahsela Solomonan in chu a saksak ta zawk a ni. 
Acts7:48 Nimahsela Chungnungbera chu kuta sak inahte a awm ngai lo; zawlnei chuan: 
Acts7:49 Lalpain, 'Van ka thutphah a ni a, lei ka kephah nghahchhan a ni: in eng angin nge mi saksak ang? Ka chawlhna hmun pawh eng nge ni?" 
Acts7:50 Keima kutin he'ng thil engkim hi ka siam lo em ni?' a ti e, tia a sawi ang khan." 
Acts7:51 Mi tihmawh, thinlung leh beng tan lohte u, kumkhuain Thlarau Thianghlim in dodal fo e; in thlahtute tih ang zel khan in ti thin." 
Acts7:52 In thlahtuten zawlneite zingah tu nge an tihduhdah loh ni? Mi Fel tak lo kal tur thu hril lawktute kha an tihlum a; chu Mi Takzet chu mantirtu leh thattute nangmahni hi tunah in ni a sin 
Acts7:53 Dan, vantirhkohte pek chhawn kha, hmu zeta zawm si lote u!"" a ti a." 
Acts7:54 Tin, chung thu chu an hriatin an thin a khei ta a, Stephana chungah chuan an ha an thial a." 
Acts7:55 Nimahsela ani chu Thlarau Thianghlima khat a ni a, van lam a en tlat a, Pathian ropuizia leh Pathian ding lama Isua ding a hmu a;" 
Acts7:56 Ngai teh u, van inhawngte ka hmu a, Pathian ding lama Mihring Fapa ding pawh ka hmu,"" a ti a." 
Acts7:57 Chutichuan anni chu aw ring takin an au a, an beng an hup a, rual takin an bei chiam a," 
Acts7:58 khua ata chu an hnawt chhuak a, lungin an deng a, a hretute chuan tlangval pakhat a hming Saula ke bulah chuan an puante an dah hlawm a." 
Acts7:59 Chutichuan, Stephanan ""Lal Isu, ka thlarau la ang che,"" tia Lalpa a koh laiin lungin an deng ruih ruih a.Tin, a thingthi a, aw ring takin a au a, ""Lalpa, hei an thil tihsual hi an chungah mawh phurhtir suh ang che,"" a ti a. Tin, chu thu chu a sawi zawh veleh a muhil ta a. Saula pawh chuan a thih chu a remti a." 
Acts7:60 Tin, a thingthi a, aw ring takin a au a, ""Lalpa, hei an thil tihsual hi an chungah mawh phurhtir suh ang che,"" a ti a. Tin, chu thu chu a sawi zawh veleh a muhil ta a. Saula pawh chuan a thih chu a remti a." 
Acts8:1 Tin, chu mi ni chuan kohhran, Jerusalem khuaa awmhote chu nasa takin an tiduhdah tan ta a; tichuan tirhkohte chauh lo chu Judai leh Samari ram khaw tinah an darh ta vek a." 
Acts8:2 Tin, Pathian ngaihsak tuten emaw Stephana chu an phum a, nasa takin an tah a." 
Acts8:3 Saula erawh chuan kohhranhote a tiduhdah em em a, in tinah a lut a, a hmei a pain a hnuk chhuak a, tan inah a khung thin." 
Acts8:4 Tin, a darhte chu khaw tinah an kal a, thu chu an hril zel a." 
Acts8:5 Tin, Philipa chu Samari khuaah a zuk kal a, an hnenah Krista thu a tlangaupui a." 
Acts8:6 Tin, ramhuai bawlhhlawhte chu mi tam tak an manate kawchhung ata aw ring taka auva an chhuah avang leh zeng leh kebai tam takte pawh an lo dam tak avangin," 
Acts8:7 mipuiten a thu an hriata a thilmak tihte an hmuhin, Philipa thusawi chu rilru hmunkhatin an ngaihsak a," 
Acts8:8 Tin, chu mi khuaah chuan nasa takin an lawm ta a." 
Acts8:9 Tin, a hming Simona, mi pakhat a awm a; ani chuan, ""Mi lian ka ni,"" tiin hmanah chu mi khuaah chuan dawi hmangin Samari khuaa mite mak ti takin a siam thin a;" 
Acts8:10 mi zawng zawng chuan mi chhe ber atangin lal ber thlengin, ""He mi hi Pathian thiltihtheihna, Ropui an tih kha, a nih hi,"" tiin a thu an ngaihsak hlawm thin a." 
Acts8:11 A dawi hmangin rei tak mak ti taka a siam thin avangin a thu an ngaihsak thin a ni. 
Acts8:12 Nimahsela anni chuan Pathian ram chanchin tha leh Isua Krista hming chanchin tha Philipa hrilh chu an awih veleh ahmei apain baptisma an chang ta a. 
Acts8:13 Tin, Simona meuh pawhin a awih ve ta a; tin, baptisma a chan zawhin Philipa hnenah a awm reng a, chhinchhiahna leh thilmak nasa tak tihte a hmu a, mak a ti hle mai thin a." 
Acts8:14 Tin, tirhkoh Jerusalem khuaa awmte khan Samari khuaa mitten Pathian thu an awih tih an hriatin, an hnenah Petera leh Johana chu an tir a;" 
Acts8:15 chu mite chu an zuk thlen chuan Thlarau Thianghlim an hmuh theihna'n an tawngtaisak a. 
Acts8:16 Chu mi hma chuan an zingah tuma chungah a la thleng lo; Lal Isua hmingin baptisma an chang chauh a la ni. 
Acts8:17 Tin, tirhkohte chuan an chungah an kut an nghat a, Thlarau Thianghlim an hmu ta a." 
Acts8:18 Tin, tirhkohte kut nghah avanga Thlarau Thianghlim pek a ni tih Simona'n a hmuhin an hnenah tangka pek a tum ta a." 
Acts8:19 Hetiang thuneihna hi mi pe ve rawh u, tu chungah pawh kut ka nghahna apiangin Thlarau Thianghlim an hmuh vena'n,"" a ti a." 
Acts8:20 Nimahsela, Petera'n a hnenah, ""I tangka hi i boral rualin boral ve rawh se, Pathian thilpek tangka suma lei i tum avangin." 
Acts8:21 Heng thu-ah hian i tel ve lo e, chan pawh i nei hek lo; i rilru Pathian ngaihin a fel lo e." 
Acts8:22 Chuvangin, i sual hi sim la, Lalpa hnenah tawngtai rawh, chutichuan i rilrua i ngaihtuah hi a ngaidam mahna che." 
Acts8:23 Awhna sual nasa tak phuarin i awm tih ka hria e,"" a ti a." 
Acts8:24 Tin, Simonan, ""In thil sawi hi engmah ka chunga a thlen lohna'n nangnin Lalpa hnenah mi tawngtaisak rawh u,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Acts8:25 Chutichuan anni chuan Lalpa thu chu an hriattira an sawi zawhin, Jerusalem khuaah an haw leh a; Samari rama mite khaw tam tak hnenah Chanchin Tha chu an hril zel a." 
Acts8:26 Tin, Lalpa vantirhkoh pakhatin Philipa chu a bia a, ""Tho la, chhim lama Jerusalem khua atanga Gaza khaw zuk chhun kawngah khan kal rawh; chu mi kawng chu thlalerah a kal tlang a ni,"" a ti a." 
Acts8:27 Tichuan, a tho a, a kal ta a. Tin, ngai teh, Ethiopia rama mi pakhat, Ethiopia lalnu Kandaki hnuaia mi tilreh lal tak, a ro zawng zawng enkawltu, Jerusalem khuaah Pathian be turin a han kal a;" 
Acts8:28 a haw lam chuan a tawlailira thu chungin zawlnei Isaia lehkhabu a chhiar zel a. 
Acts8:29 Tin, Thlarau chuan Philipa hnenah, ""Saw tawlailir saw va hnaih la, va pawl rawh,"" a ti a." 
Acts8:30 Tin, Philipa chu mi tilreh hnenah chuan a va tlan a, zawlnei Isaia lehkhabu a chhiar a hria a, ""I chhiar kha a awmzia i hria em?"" a ti a." 
Acts8:31 Tin, ani chuan, ""Tuma mi hrilhfiah lohin engtin nge ka hriat thei ang?"" a ti a. Tin, a hnena thu chhuak turin Philipa chu a sawm ta a." 
Acts8:32 Tin, Pathian Lehkha a chhiar lai chu hei hi a ni: ""Talh turin beram angin ani chu an hruai a; beram no a hmul mettu hmaa a ngawi reng angin Ani pawhin a ka a ang lo;" 
Acts8:33 A tlawm laiin a chungah thu rel an phal lo; A thlahte chanchin tuin nge la hril ang? Khawvel atangin a nun an laksak si a,"" tih hi." 
Acts8:34 Tin, mi tilreh chuan Philipa a bia a, a hnenah, ""Zawlneiin he'ng thu hi tu thu nge a sawi, ama thu nge mi dang thu? ka zawt a che,"" a ti a." 
Acts8:35 Tin, Philipa chuan a sawi a, chu Pathian Lehkha thu chu a bulah a tan a, a hnenah Isua thu a hrilh a." 
Acts8:36 Tin, kalkawnga an kal laiin tui eng emaw an thleng a; tin, mi tilreh chuan, ""En teh, heta hi tui a awm, baptisma channa tur engin nge mi dal kher?"" a ti a." 
Acts8:37 Tin, Philipa chuan, ""I thinlung zawng zawnga i rin chuan, i chang thei e,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Isua Krista chu Pathian Fapa a nih ka ring,"" tiin a chang a." 
Acts8:38 Tin, tawlailir chu a dintir a, an pahnihin, Philipa leh mi tilreh chu tuiah chuan an zuk kal dun a; tin, Philipa chuan ani chu a baptis ta a." 
Acts8:39 Tin, tui ata an chhuah chhoh veleh Lalpa Thlarau chuan Philipa chu a la bo ta a; tin, mi tilreh chuan ani chu a hmu leh ta lo, hlim taka a kal tak zel avangin.Nimahsela Philipa chu miin Azota khuaah an hmu leh ta a; tin, a kal tlang a, Kaisari khaw thlengin khaw tinah Chanchin Tha chu a hril zel a." 
Acts8:40 Nimahsela Philipa chu miin Azota khuaah an hmu leh ta a; tin, a kal tlang a, Kaisari khaw thlengin khaw tinah Chanchin Tha chu a hril zel a." 
Acts9:1 Saula erawh chuan Lalpa zirtirho a vau thu leh thah a tum thu a la chhak chhuak ta cheu a, Puithiam Lalber hnenah a kal a," 
Acts9:2 Damaska khuaa inkhawmna in zawng zawnga mite hnena pek turin lehkhate a dil a, Kawnga mi chu tupawh a hmuh chuan hmeichhia pawh, mipa pawh, Jerusalem khuaah phuar chunga a rawn hruai theihna turin." 
Acts9:3 Tin, a kal laiin, Damaska khua a thlen dawnin, thawklehkhatan eng, van ata a velin a lo eng ta phut a;" 
Acts9:4 tin, leiah a tlu a, a hnenah, ""Saula, Saula, nangin engati nge mi tihduhdah hi?"" tiin aw a hria a." 
Acts9:5 Tin, ani chuan, ""Lalpa, tu nge i nih?"" a ti a. Tin, Lalpa chuan, ""Isua, i tihduhdah hi ka ni e;" 
Acts9:6 nimahsela, tho la, khua-ah lut rawh; tichuan, i tihtur an lo hrilh ang che,"" a ti a." 
Acts9:7 Tin, a hnena kal vete chu dang rengin an ding a, aw zawng an hre na a, nimahsela tumah an hmu si lo a." 
Acts9:8 Tin, Saula chu lei ata chu a tho a; tin, a han meng a, engmah a hmu thei ta lo a; tichuan a kutah an kai a, Damaska khuaah an hruai lut a." 
Acts9:9 Tin, ni thum khaw hmu loin a awm a, engmah a eiin a in lo a." 
Acts9:10 Tin, Damaska khuaah chuan a hming Anania zirtir pakhat a awm. Tin, Lalpa chuan mumang angin a hnenah, ""Anani"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""En teh, Lalpa, heta hi ka awm,"" a ti a." 
Acts9:11 Tin, Lalpa chuan a hnenah, ""Tho la, kawtthler, Ngil an tihah chuan kal la, Juda inah, Tarsa khuaa mi, a hming Saula zawt chhuak rawh; ngai teh, a tawngtai mek a ni a;" 
Acts9:12 a hming Anania mi pakhat luta a mit tivar turin a chungah kut nghatin a hmu tawh e,"" a ti a." 
Acts9:13 Tin, Anania chuan, ""Lalpa, chu mi chu Jerusalem khuaa i mi thianghlimte chunga a tihsual tamzia thu mi tam tak kaah ka hria a ni!" 
Acts9:14 tin, hetah pawh i hming lam apiang phuarna turin puithiam lalte hnen ata thu a hmu reng a sin,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Acts9:15 Nimahsela Lalpa chuan a hnenah, ""Kal mai rawh; Jentailte, lalte, Israela thlahte hnena ka hming put luhna'na ka bel ruat a ni alawm;" 
Acts9:16 ka hming avangin hrehawm engtia nasa nge a tuar tur amah ka la hriattir dawn a ni,"" a ti a." 
Acts9:17 Tin, Anania chu a va kal a, inah a lut a; tin, a chungah a kut a nghat a, ""Ka nau Saul, i mit varna tur leh, Thlarau Thianghlim khata i awm theihna'n, Lalpa, i lo kalna kawnga i hnena inlar Isua khan mi rawn tir a ni,"" a ti a." 
Acts9:18 Tin, thawklehkhatan a mit ata phuhlip ang a tla ta nghal a, a mit a var leh ta a; tin, a tho a, baptisma a chang ta a." 
Acts9:19 Tin, chaw a ei a, a harh leh ta a. Tin, Damaska khuaa zirtirho awmte hnenah chuan ni engzat emaw lai a awm a." 
Acts9:20 Inkhawmna inahte chuan Isua chu Pathian Fapa a nihzia thu a tlangaupui ta nghal a. 
Acts9:21 Tin, a thu hretu zawng zawng chuan mak an ti hle a, ""He mi hi Jerusalem khuaa he hming lamtute tiduhdah thin kha a ni lo em ni? Chung mite chu puithiam lalte hnena phuar chunga hruai, a rawn kalchhan a nih kha,"" an ti a." 
Acts9:22 Saula erawh chu a lo chak lehzual a, chu mi chu Krista a ni tak zet tih a hrilhfiah a, Damaska khuaa Juda awmte chu a tidang hiau thin a." 
Acts9:23 Tin, ni rei tak hnuah chuan Saula tihlum turin Judate chu an inrawn a;" 
Acts9:24 nimahsela, ani chuan an phiar chu a lo hre ta a. Tin, tihlum turin kulh kawngka tinah chuan achhun azanin an chang thin a." 
Acts9:25 Nimahsela, a zirtirten ani chu an hruai a, zanah kulh tukverhah bawmin an thlak thla ta a." 
Acts9:26 Tin, Saula chuan Jerusalem khua a thlen veleh zirtirhote chu pawl a tum a; anni erawh chuan an zain ani chu an hlau a,zirtir a ni ve tih an ring lo a." 
Acts9:27 Barnaba erawh chuan ani chu a hruai a, tirhkohte hnenah chuan a rawn kalpui a, kalkawngah Lalpa a hmuha a biakzia te, Damaska khuaa Isua hminga huai taka thu a hrilzia te pawh chu an hnenah a sawi ta a." 
Acts9:28 Chutichuan Saula chu Jerusalem khuaah chuan an hnenah lut thin chhuak thinin a awm ta a," 
Acts9:29 Lalpa hmingin huai takin thu a hril thin a. Tin, Grik Judate hnenah thu a sawi a, a hnial a; anni erawh chuan ani chu tihhlum an tum a." 
Acts9:30 Tin, unaute chuan chu chu an hriatin Kaisari khuaah an hruai chhuk a, Tarsa khuaah an tir ta daih a." 
Acts9:31 Chutichuan kohhranhote chu Judai ram velah te, Galili ram velah te, Samari ram velah te chuan an nghet deuh deuh a, muang takin an awm ta a; tin, Lalpa tih dekin, Thlarau Thianghlim thlamuanin an awm a, an lo pung ta telh telh a." 
Acts9:32 Tin, Petera'n khawvel a fan pahin Ludda khuaa mi thianghlim awmte hnenah a zuk kal bawk a." 
Acts9:33 Chutah chuan mi pakhat a hming Ainia, a zen avanga kum riat khuma mu reng a hmu a." 
Acts9:34 Tin, Petera chuan a hnenah, ""Aini, Isua Krista chuan a tidam a che; tho la, i awngphah zial rawh,"" a ti a. Tichuan a tho ta nghal a." 
Acts9:35 Tin, Ludda khua leh Saron phaia awmte zawng zawng chuan Ainia chu an hmu a, Lalpa lam an hawi ta hlawm a." 
Acts9:36 Tin, Joppa khuaah a hming Tabithi zirtir pakhat a awm a, (A Greek hming chu Dorki a ni a, 'sazuk la' tihna a ni.) chu hmeichhia chuan thil tihthat leh thilpek a ngah hle a." 
Acts9:37 Tin, chung lai chuan a dam lo a, a thi ta a; tin, an bualfai a, pindan chungnungah an zalh a." 
Acts9:38 Tin, Ludda khua chu Joppa khaw kiang a nih avangin zirtirteho chuan Petera chutah chuan a awm tih an hria a, ""Rei rial loin kan hnenah lo kal ang che,"" tia ngen chiam turin a hnenah mi pahnih an tir a." 
Acts9:39 Tin, Petera chu a tho a, an hnenah a kal ve ta a. Tin, a thlen veleh pindan chungnungah chuan an hruai a; hmeithai zawng zawng chu a kianga dingin Dorki an hnena a awm laia a kawr siam te, a puan siamte entir chungin an tap hlawm a."
