Acts9:40 Nimahsela Petera chuan an zain a chhuahtir vek a, a thingthi a, a tawngtai ta a; tin, a ruang lam a hawi a, ""Tabith, tho rawh,"" a ti a. Tichuan a mit a han meng a, Petera chu a hmuh veleh a thu ta hlawl a." 
Acts9:41 Tin, Petera chuan a kut a pe a, a kai tho ta a; tin, mi thianghlimte leh hmeithaite chu a ko a, damin a kawhhmuh a." 
Acts9:42 Tin, chu chu Joppa khua zawng zawng chuan an hre ta vek a; mi tam takin Lalpa chu an ring ta a.Tin, Petera chu ni tam tak Joppa khuaah Simona, savun siamtu inah a cham reng a." 
Acts9:43 Tin, Petera chu ni tam tak Joppa khuaah Simona, savun siamtu inah a cham reng a." 
Acts10:1 Tin, Kaisari khuaah a hming Kornelia mi pakhat a awm a, Itali pawl an tih, chu mi pawla sipai za hotu a ni a," 
Acts10:2 Pathian ngaihsak mi a ni a, a chhungte zawng zawng nen Pathian an tih thin a, mite hnenah thil tam tak a pe thin a, Pathian hnenah pawh a tawngtai fo a." 
Acts10:3 Chu mi chuan behliang mun hun lai velah mumang angin fiah takin Pathian vantirhkoh pakhat a hnenah luta, ""Korneli,"" tiin a hmu a." 
Acts10:4 Tin, Kornelia chuan ani chu a lo en reng a, a hlau a, ""Lalpa, eng nge ni?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""I tawngtainate leh i thilpek thute kha hriat reng turin Pathian hmaah a thleng chho ta a." 
Acts10:5 Tunah Joppa khuaah mite tir la mi pakhat Simona, Petera an tiha chu, han hruaitir rawh;" 
Acts10:6 savun siamtu Simona hnenah a thleng a ni, a in chu tuifinriat kamah a awm,"" a ti a." 
Acts10:7 Tin, vantirhkoh a betu chu a kal veleh, Kornelia chuan a chhiahhlawhte zinga mi pahnih leh a rawngbawl fote zinga Pathian ngaihsak sipai pakhat a ko a;" 
Acts10:8 tin, thu zawng zawng chu an hnenah a hrilh zawhin Joppa khuaah chuan a tir ta a." 
Acts10:9 Tin, atukah an kal laia khaw kiang an thlen dawnin, Petera chu tawngtai turin chawfak hun laiin, in chungah a lawn chho a;" 
Acts10:10 tin, a ril a lo tam a, chaw ei a duh ta a; nimahsela ei tur an siam lai chuan engloin a zel ta a." 
Acts10:11 Tin, van inhawngin englo bawm, puan lian tak ang, a kil lia hlina leia uai thlain a hmu a;" 
Acts10:12 chu mi chhungah chuan fuliafa leh rannung leh chungleng sava tinrengte an awm a. 
Acts10:13 Tin, a hnenah awin, ""Peter, tho rawh; talh la, ei rawh,"" a rawn ti a." 
Acts10:14 Nimahsela Petera chuan, ""Lalpa, ni lo e; thiang lo leh bawlhhlawh engmah reng ka ei ngai lo e,"" a ti a." 
Acts10:15 Tin, aw chuan a vawi hnihnaah, ""Pathianin a tihthiaghlim tawh chu nangin thiang lo ti suh,"" a ti a." 
Acts10:16 Chutiang hlirin vawi thum a lo awm a: tin, bawm chu vana khai chhohin a awm leh ta nghal a." 
Acts10:17 Tin, Petera chuan mumang anga a hmuh chu a ngaihna hre loa a mangan laiin Kornelia mi tirhte chuan Simona in chu an lo zawt chhuak tawh a, kawngkhar bulah an lo ding a," 
Acts10:18 an au a, Simona, Petera an tiha chu, chutah chuan a thlen leh thlen loh an zawt a." 
Acts10:19 Tin, Petera chuan a mumang ang thu chu a ngaihtuah laiin Thlarauin a hnenah, ""Ngai teh, mi pathumin an zawng a che." 
Acts10:20 Chutichuan, tho la, chhuk la, engmah ringhlel loin anmahni zui rawh; anni chu `ka tirh an ni e,"" a ti a." 
Acts10:21 Chutichuan, Petera chu, chu mite hnenah chuan a chhuk a, an hnenah, ""In zawn hi ka ni e; eng nge in rawn kal chhan?"" a ti a." 
Acts10:22 Tin, anni chuan, ""Vantirhkoh thianghlim pakhatin, Kornelia, sipai za hotu, mi fel tak, Pathian tih, Juda hnam zawng zawng zinga mi hmingtha hnenah chuan i thusawi a hriatna'n, a inah nangmah ko tur chein a hrilh a ni,"" an ti a." 
Acts10:23 Chutichuan mite chu a ko lut a, a riahtir ta a. Tin, atukah chuan Petera chu a tho a, an hnenah a kal a, Joppa khuaa mi unau tute emaw pawh a hnenah an kal ve a," 
Acts10:24 Tin, atuk lehah Kaisari khuaah chuan an lut ta a. Tin, Kornelia chuan a laichinte leh a thian duh berte ko khawmin, anni chu a lo nghak reng a." 
Acts10:25 Tin, Petera chu a luh dawn lai takin Kornelia chuan a lo hmuak a, a ke bulah a bawkkhup a, Pathian chibai buk angin a buk a." 
Acts10:26 Nimahsela Petera chuan ani chu a kai tho a, ""Ding rawh, kei pawh mihring ka ni alawm,"" a ti a." 
Acts10:27 Tin, a hnenah thusawi chungin a lut a, mi tam tak awm khawm chu a va hmu a." 
Acts10:28 Tin, an hnenah, ""Juda miin hnam dang pawl leh an hnena kal a thian lohzia nangnin in hria a ni; nimahsela tumah thiang lo leh bawlhhlawh ka tih tur a ni lo tih Pathianin mi hriattir a ni." 
Acts10:29 Chuvangin mi rawn koh veleh khan hnial loin ka lo kal ta a nih hi. Tichuan ka zawt a che u, eng nge mi rawn koh chhan le?"" a ti a." 
Acts10:30 Tin, Kornelia chuan, ""Ni li a ni ta, tun hun ang thleng hian ka inah, behliang mun hun tawngtainaah ka tawngtai a; tin, ngai teh, mi pakhat puan eng tak sinin ka hmaah a lo ding a," 
Acts10:31 'Korneli, i tawngtaina kha hriatin a awm ta, mi hnena i thilpekte pawh kha Pathianin a hre reng a." 
Acts10:32 Chuvangin Joppa khuaah mi tir la, Simona,Petera an tiha chu,i hnenah ko rawh; ani chu tuifinriat kamah savun siamtu Simona inah a thleng a ni,' a ti a." 
Acts10:33 Chuvangin i hnenah mi ka rawn tir ta nghal a ni; i lo kal hi a tha e. Chutichuan, Lalpa'n thu a pek apiang che hre turin tunah Pathian mithmuhin kan zain hetah kan awm a nih hi,"" a ti a." 
Acts10:34 Tin, Petera chuan a sawi a: ""Pathianin mi duhsak bik a nei lo tih dik takin ka hria e;" 
Acts10:35 nimahsela hnam tin zingah tupawh amah tiha fel taka ti apiang a lawmzawng mi an ni thin. 
Acts10:36 Ani chuan thlamuanna Chanchin Tha Isua Krista kaa hrilin, Israela thlahte hnenah thu a thawn a, (Isua chu mi zawng zawng Lal a ni a)" 
Acts10:37 Johanan a tlangaupui thin baptisma zawhah khan, thu, Galili ram atanga lo thang tana Judai ram zawng zawnga thang chhuak kha, nangnin in hre bawk alawm;" 
Acts10:38 Nazaret Isua chungchang thu kha, khatia Pathianin ani chu Thlarau Thianghlim leh thiltihtheihnaa a vurzia kha; ani chuan mi chunga titha leh diabola tihduhdah zawng zawng tidamin a fang vel thin a, Pathian a hnenah a awm avangin." 
Acts10:39 Judate ramah leh Jerusalem khuaa a thiltih zawng zawng hretute kan ni e; ani chu thinglerah khaiin an tihlum ta a. 
Acts10:40 Pathianin ani chu ni thum niin a kai tho leh a, fiah takin a entir a," 
Acts10:41 amaherawhchu, mi zawng zawng hnenah a ni lo, Pathianin hretua a ruat lawkate hnenah chauh a ni, - keimahni, mitthi zing ata a thawh leh hnua a hnena eia barte hnenah hian." 
Acts10:42 Ani chu mitthite leh mi nungte chunga Roreltua Pathian ruat chu a ni tih, mi hnena tlangaupui leh hriattir turin Pathianin thu min pe a ni." 
Acts10:43 Tupawh amah chu ring apiang a hming avangin sualte ngaihhnathiamin an awm ang tih, he'ng a chanchin hi zawlnei zawng zawngin an hriattir thin kha,"" a ti a." 
Acts10:44 Tin, Petera'n chung thu chu a sawi lai tak chuan thu hretute zawng zawng chungah chuan Thlarau Thianghlim a lo thleng ta a." 
Acts10:45 Tin, Serhtanho zinga ringtute Petera rawn zui apiang chuan Thlarau Thianghlim pek chu Jentailte chungah pawh leih a nih avangin mak an ti hle a;" 
Acts10:46 tawng hriat lohtea thu sawiin Pathian fakin an hre si a. Tin, Petera'n a bia a," 
Acts10:47 Heng mite, keimahni anga Thlarau Thianghlim hmu ve hi baptisma an chan lohna'n miin tui hman an khap thei em ni?"" a ti a.Tichuan isua Krista hminga baptisma chan tur thu a pe a. Chung zawhah chuan ni engzat emaw chamah an ngen a." 
Acts10:48 Tichuan isua Krista hminga baptisma chan tur thu a pe a. Chung zawhah chuan ni engzat emaw chamah an ngen a. 
Acts11:1 Tin, Judai rama tirhkoh leh unau awmte chuan Jentailte pawhin Pathian thu an zawm tih an hre ta a." 
Acts11:2 Tichuan, Petera chu Jerusalem khua a thlen chhoh veleh Serhtanhoten a hnenah," 
Acts11:3 Serhtanlote inah i lut a, an hnenah i ei vei a,"" an ti a, an kalh a." 
Acts11:4 Nimahsela Petera chuan a bul atangin indawt ziahin an hnenah a hrilhfiah a: 
Acts11:5 Joppa khuaah tawngtaiin ka awm a; tin, engloin mi zel a, mumang angin englo bawm, puan lian tak ang, a kil lia hlina van ata uai thla ka hmu a; ka kiangah ngei mi rawn hnaih a;" 
Acts11:6 tin, chu chu ka en reng a, ka ngaihtuah a, leia mi fuliafate, ram sate, rannungte leh chungleng savate ka hmu a." 
Acts11:7 Tin, awin, 'Peter, tho rawh; talh la, ei rawh' mi tiin ka hre bawk a." 
Acts11:8 Nimahsela keiin, 'Lalpa, ni lo e; thiang lo leh bawlhhlawh engmah reng ka kaah a lut ngai lo,' ka ti a." 
Acts11:9 Nimahsela van ata aw chuan a vawi hnihnaah, 'Pathianin a tihthianghlim tawh chu nangin thiang lo ti suh,' tiin mi chhang a." 
Acts11:10 Chutiang hlirin vawi thum a lo awm a; tin, engkim chu vanah khai chhohin a awm leh ta a." 
Acts11:11 Tin, ngai teh u, mi pathum Kaisari khua ata ka hnenah an rawn tir a, kan awmna kawtah chuan an lo ding reng tawh a." 
Acts11:12 Tin, Thlarauin tumah thlei bik loa anmahni zui turin mi tir a. Heng unau paruk pawh hian mi zui ve a, mi inah chuan kan lut a;" 
Acts11:13 tin, ani chuan kan hnenah, a ina vantirhkoh ding a hmuhzia leh, vantirhkoh chuan a hnena, 'Joppa khuaah mi tir la, Simona, Petera an tiha chu han hruaitir rawh;" 
Acts11:14 ani chuan thu a hrilh ang chia, chu mi thuin nang leh i chhungte chu chhandamin in awm ang,' a tihzia pawh min hrilh a." 
Acts11:15 Tin, thu ka sawi tirhin, Thlarau Thianghlim kan chunga a lo thlen tirh lai ang bawk khan an chungah a lo thleng ta a." 
Acts11:16 Tin, Lalpa thu, 'Johanan tuiin mi a baptis thin kha; amaherawhchu nangni zawng Thlarau Thianghlimin baptisma in la chang ang,' a tihziate kha ka lo hre chhuak leh ta a." 
Acts11:17 Chutichuan, Lalpa Isua Krista an rin veleh, Pathianin thilthlawnpek min pek ang kha an hnena a pek ve ahnuin kei tehlul hi Pathian hnial rual em ka nih?"" a ti a." 
Acts11:18 Chung thu chu an hriatin an ngawi ta a, ""Chuti a nih chuan Pathianin Jentailte pawh nung atan sim a phal ta a nih tak chu,"" tiin Pathian an fak ta a." 
Acts11:19 Tin, Stephana avanga an tihduhdaha darhte kha, Phoiniki ram te, Kupra thliarkar te, Antiokei khua te thlengin an kal a, Judate hnenah chauh lo chuan tu hnenah mah thu chu an hril lo zel a." 
Acts11:20 Nimahsela an zinga a then chu Kupra thliarkar leh Kurini khuaa mite an ni a, chu mite chuan Antiokei khua chu an thlenin Grikte hnenah pawh thu an sawi a, Lalpa Isua Chanchin tha chu an hrilh ve ta a." 
Acts11:21 Tin, Lalpa kutin anmahni a tanpui a; mi tam takin an ring a, Lalpa lam chu an hawi ta hlawm a." 
Acts11:22 Tin, an chanchin thu chu Jerusalem khuaa kohhran awmte bengah chuan a lo lut ta a: chutichuan Antiokei khaw thleng chuan Barnaba chu a tir chhuak ta a." 
Acts11:23 Tin, ani chu a va thleng a, Pathian khawngaihzia chu a hmuh chuan a lawm hle a, thahnemngai taka Lalpa vuan reng turin an zain a fuih ta a." 
Acts11:24 Barnaba chu mi tha tak a ni a, Thlarau Thianghlim leh rinnaa khat a ni. Tin, mi tam takin Lalpa hnenah an tel belhchhah ta a." 
Acts11:25 Tin, Barnaba chu Saula zawng turin Tarsa khuaah a kal a;" 
Acts11:26 tin, a hmuh chuan Antiokei khuaah chuan a rawn hruai a. Tin, kum khat zet kohhrante inkhawmnaah chuan an tel ve thin a, mi tam tak an zirtir bawk thin a. Antiokei khuaah chuan a ni, zirtirteho chu ""Kristian"" an tih hmasak ber ni." 
Acts11:27 Tin, chung lai chuan zawlnei tute emaw Jerusalem khua atangin Antiokei khuaah chuan an zuk kal a." 
Acts11:28 Tin, an zinga mi pakhat, a hming Agaba, a ding a, khawvel zawng zawngah tam nasa tak a tla dawn tih Thlarau hrilhin a hriattir a; chu tam chu Klaudia lal laiin a lo thleng ta a." 
Acts11:29 Tichuan zirtirteho chuan an theih tawk theuhin, Judai rama unau awmte hnenah chuan chhawmdawlna tur thawn a tum a;chu chu an ti ta ngei a, Barnaba leh Saula kutah chuan upate hnenah an thawn ta a." 
Acts11:30 chu chu an ti ta ngei a, Barnaba leh Saula kutah chuan upate hnenah an thawn ta a." 
Acts12:1 Tin, chutih lai vel chuan Lal Herodan kohhrante zinga tute emaw tihduhdah tumin a kut a lek ta a." 
Acts12:2 Tin, Jakoba, Johana unau chu, khandaihin a sathlum a." 
Acts12:3 Chu chuan Judate a tilawm tih a hriatin Petera pawh chu man a tum leh zel a. (Chung nite chu chhang dawidim telh loh ni a ni). 
Acts12:4 Tin, a man hnuah chuan tan inah a khung a, sipai pawl li, pali theuh zelin a ven chhawktir a; Kalhlen Kut zawhin mi zawng zawng hnenah hruai chhuah a tum a." 
Acts12:5 Chuvangin Petera chu tan inah chuan a awmtir rih a; nimahsela kohhranhoin ama tan, thahnemngai takin Pathian hnenah an tawngtaisak thin a." 
Acts12:6 Tin, Heroda chuan a hruai chhuah dawnin, chu mi zan takah chuan Petera chu sipai pahnih inkarah khaidiat pahnih bunin a muhil a; a vengtute pawh kawngkhar bulah an awm a, tan in chu an veng a." 
Acts12:7 Tin, ngai teh, Lalpa vantirhkoh pakhat a kiangah a lo ding a, ripah chuan eng eng emaw a lo eng a; tin, Petera nakah a beng harh a, ""Tho thuai rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, a khaidiatte chu a kut ata a tla ta a." 
Acts12:8 Tin, vantirhkoh chuan a hnenah, ""Puan veng la, i pheikhawk bun rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan chutiangin a ti a. Tin, vantirhkoh chuan a hnenah, ""I puan bat tha la, mi zui rawh,"" a ti a." 
Acts12:9 Tin, Petera chu a chhuak a, a zui ta a; vantirhkoh chetzia chu atak a ni tih a hre lo a, mumanga a hmuh emaw a ti zawk a." 
Acts12:10 Tin, vengtu tawntirh leh a dawttu an pelh hnu chuan pawn chhuahna tur thir kawngkhar chu an va thleng a, chu chu an tan a inhawng chawp ta a; tin, an chhuak a, kawtthler pakhat an pel a; tin, vantirhkoh chuan a kalsan ta nghal a." 
Acts12:11 Tin, Petera chuan a harh veleh, ""Lalpain a vantirhkoh a tir chhuak a, Heroda kuta mi leh Juda mite beiseina zawng zawng ata mi chhandam tih tunah dik takin ka hre ta,"" a ti a." 
Acts12:12 Tin, a inngaihtuah zawhin, Johana, Marka an tih, chu mi nu Mari inah chuan a va kal a; chutah chuan tawngtaiin mi tam tak an lo awm khawm a." 
Acts12:12 Tin, a inngaihtuah zawhin, Johana, Marka an tih, chu mi nu Mari inah chuan a va kal a; chutah chuan tawngtaiin mi tam tak an lo awm khawm a." 
Acts12:13 Tin, sumhmun kawngkhar a kik veleh, a hming Rodi nula pakhat, chhang turin a va kal a." 
Acts12:14 Tin, Petera aw a hriat veleh a lawm avangin kawng chu hawng loin a tlan lut leh ta zawk a, Petera kawngkhar bulah a ding tih a va hrilh a." 
Acts12:15 Nimahsela anni chuan a hnenah, ""I a ta a nih hi,"" an lo ti a. Ani erawh chu, ""Tih tak zet a ni,"" tiin a tang talh a. Tin, anni chuan, ""A vantirhkoh a nih chu,"" an ti a." 
Acts12:16 Nimahsela Petera chuan a kik fo a; tin, an han hawn chuan amah chu an hmu a, mak an ti hle a." 
Acts12:17 Chutichuan ani chuan an ngawihna turin kutin a zap a, Pathianin tan in ata amah a hruai chhuahziate chu a hrilh ta a. Tin, ""Heng thu hi Jakoba leh unaute va hrilh rawh u,"" a ti a. Tin, a chhuak a, dang lamah a kal ta a." 
Acts12:18 Tin, ni a chhuah veleh sipaihote chu, Petera khawiahnge a awm tak? tiin buai namen lohin an buai a." 
Acts12:19 Tin, Heroda chuan a zawng a, a hmu si lo a, a vengtute chu a chhuahchhal a, tihhlum turin thu a pe ta a. Tin, Heroda chu Judai ram ata Kaisari khuaah a zuk kal a, chutah chuan a awm reng a." 
Acts12:20 Tin, Tura leh Sidon khuaa mite chungah chuan a lungni lo em em a; tin, anni chuan Blasta, lal khum vengtu chu, an thianah an siam a, thu khat vuain a hnenah an lo kal a, an khaw lamin lal khaw lama pur chaw thin an nih avangin rem an ngen a." 
Acts12:21 Tin, a ni tiam niin Heroda chuan lal puan a sin a, lalthutphahah a thu a, an hnenah thu a sawi a." 
Acts12:22 Tin, mi zawng zawng chuan, ""Pathian aw a nih hi, mihring aw a ni lo e,"" an ti a, an au thin a." 
Acts12:23 Tin, ani chuan Pathian hnenah chawimawina chu a pek loh avangin Lalpa vantirhkohin chawplehchilhin a man a, rulhutin a ei a, a thi ta a." 
Acts12:24 Pathian thu erawh chu a darh a, a pung ta zel a.Tin, Barnaba leh Saula chuan rawng chu an bawl zawhin, Jerusalem khua ata chu an kir leh ta a, Johana, Marka an tiha chu an hnenah an hruai a." 
Acts12:24 Pathian thu erawh chu a darh a, a pung ta zel a.Tin, Barnaba leh Saula chuan rawng chu an bawl zawhin, Jerusalem khua ata chu an kir leh ta a, Johana, Marka an tiha chu an hnenah an hruai a." 
Acts12:25 Tin, Barnaba leh Saula chuan rawng chu an bawl zawhin, Jerusalem khua ata chu an kir leh ta a, Johana, Marka an tiha chu an hnenah an hruai a." 
Acts12:25 Tin, Barnaba leh Saula chuan rawng chu an bawl zawhin, Jerusalem khua ata chu an kir leh ta a, Johana, Marka an tiha chu an hnenah an hruai a." 
Acts13:1 Tin, Antiokei khuaa kohhranho awmte zingah chuan thu hriltute leh zirtirtute an awm; chung chu Barnaba te, Sumeona Nigera an tih te, Kurini khuaa mi Lukia te, lal Heroda unau tur Manaina te, Saula te an ni." 
Acts13:2 Tin, Lalpa rawng an bawl a, chaw an nghei laiin Thlarau Thianghlimin, ""Barnaba leh Saula hi anmahni ka ruat chhan ti turin mi tihhransak rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Acts13:3 Chutichuan chaw an ngheia an tawngtai zawh chuan an chungah kut an nghat a, an kaltir ta a." 
Acts13:4 Chutichuan Thlarau Thianghlim tirh chhuahin an kal a, Selukai khuaah an chhuk a, chuta tangin Kupra thliarkarah lawngin an kal a." 
Acts13:5 Tin, Salamis khuaa an awm laiin Juda inkhawmna inahte Pathian thu an hril thin a; Johana pawh kha an rawng bawl turin an hruai ve a." 
Acts13:6 Tin, thliarkar chu Paphos khaw thlengin an fang chhuak a, dawithiam, zawlnei der, Juda mi pakhat an hmu a, a hming chu Barisua a ni a." 
Acts13:7 Chu mi chu lal aiawhtu, Serjia-Paula, mi fing tak hnena awm a ni a. Chu lal aiawhtu chuan Barnaba leh Saula chu a ko a, Pathian thu hriat a tum a." 
Acts13:8 Nimahsela, Eluma, (Barisua hming dang awmzia hi Dawithiam a ni a,) chu mi chuan lal aiawhtu chu rin lohtir tumin anni chu a lo dodal a." 
Acts13:9 Chutichuan Saula, (Paula an tih bawk chu,) Thlarau Thianghlimin a khat a, ani chu a en reng a," 
Acts13:10 Nang mi bum leh huatthlalak tinrenga khat pa, nang diabola fapa, nang fel tinreng malmak pa, Lalpa kawng fel takte hi tihchhiat i bang lo ang maw?" 
Acts13:11 Hre rawh, tunah Lalpa kut i chungah a tla a nih hi, i mit a lo del ang a, khaw eng i hmu rih lo ang,"" a ti a. Tichuan chum leh thimin amah a bawh ta nghal a, kuta kaitu tur zawngin a vak a vak a." 
Acts13:12 Tin, lal aiawhtu chuan chu thiltih chu a hmu a, Lalpa zirtir thu chu mak a ti hle a, a ring ta a." 
Acts13:13 Tin, Paula chu a hote nen chuan Paphos khua atang chuan lawngin an kal a, Pamphulia rama Perga khua an thleng a; tin, Johana khan anni chu a kalsan a, Jerusalem khuaah a kir leh ta a." 
Acts13:14 Nimahsela anni chu Perga khua ata an kal zel a, Pisidia rama Antiokei khua an thleng a; tin, Chawlhniin inkhawmna inah an lut a, an thu a." 
Acts13:15 Tin, Dan Lehkhabu leh Zawlneite Lehkhabu chhiar zawhin, inkhawmna in hotuten an hnenah mi an tir a, ""Unaute u, mite fuihna thu eng emaw in neih chuan sawi rawh u,"" an ti a." 
Acts13:16 Tin, Paula a ding a, kutin a zap a, a sawi a: ""Israel mite leh Pathian tihtute u, ngai teh u." 
Acts13:17 Heng Israel chite Pathian hian min thlahtute a thlang a, mi Aigupta rama an thang lai khan a chawimawi a, chungnung kutin chuta tang chuan a hruai chhuak ta a." 
Acts13:18 Tin, kum sawmli lai thlalerah khan an thiltihte chu a en thei reng a." 
Acts13:19 Tin, Kanaan rama hnam sarih a tihtlawm zawh hnu khan an ram chu luah turin a pe zel a," 
Acts13:20 kum zali leh kum sawmnga chhung zawng khan. Chung hnuah chuan roreltute a pe thin a, zawlnei Samuela thleng khan." 
Acts13:21 Tin, chu mi hnuah chuan lal an dil a; tichuan Pathianin, Saula, Kisa fa, Benjamina chia mi kha, an hnenah a pe a, kum sawmli chhung atan." 
Acts13:22 Tin, ani chu a sawm bo hnu khan an lal atan Davida a siam ta a: Pathianin chu mi thu chu hriattirin, 'Davida, Jesaia fa, ka thinlung ang pu mi ka char ta, ani chuan ka duhzawng ang apiang a ti ang,' a ti a." 
Acts13:23 Chu mi thlahte zingah chuan Pathianin, thutiam ang zelin, Israelho hnenah Chhandamtu Isua a rawn thlen a:" 
Acts13:24 a lo kal hmain Johanan simna baptisma thu Israel mi zawng zawng hnenah a lo hrilh te te a. 
Acts13:25 Tin, Johanan a rawngbawlna a zawh dawn lai khan, 'Nangnin tu-ah nge mi ruat? Ani chu ka ni lo e. Nimahsela ngai teh u, ka hnu-ah mi tu emaw a lo kal dawn a ni, kei hi zawng a kephaha pheikhawk phelh tlak pawh ka ni lo e,' a ti a." 
Acts13:26 Unaute u, Abrahama thlaha fate u, in zinga Pathian tih zawng zawngte u, keimahniho hnenah hian he'ng chhandamna thu hi min rawn thawn chhuak a nih hi." 
Acts13:27 Jerusalem khuaa awmten an hotute nen, ani chu an hriat loh avang leh zawlneite thu, Chawlhni apianga chhiar thin kha, an hriat hek loh avangin, ani chu thiam loh chantirin, chu mi thu chu an hlen ta a." 
Acts13:28 A thihna khawp meuh a chungah engmah an hmuh loh pawhin Pilata hnenah tihhlum an ngen a. 
Acts13:29 Tin, a thu zawlneiten an ziak lawk zawng zawng kha a hlen zawhin thing ata chu an la thla a, thlanah an zalh ta a." 
Acts13:30 Nimahsela Pathianin mitthi zing ata a kai tho leh ta a; 
Acts13:31 tin, Galili ram ata Jerusalem khuaa ama ruala chho vete hnenah chuan ni rei tak chhungin a inlar thin a; chung mite chu tunah hian mi hnenah a thuhretute an ni e." 
Acts13:32 Keini pawhin thlahtute hnena thutiam kha a chanchin lawmawm kan rawn hrilh che u hi," 
Acts13:33 khatia Pathianin Isua a kaihthawhah khan, kan fate hnenah hian chung chu a hlen a ni; Sam pahnihnaah, 'Ka Fapa i ni e, vawiinah hian ka hring a che,' tih ziak ang bawk khan." 
Acts13:34 Tawihna hmuna kal leh lo turin Pathianin ani chu mitthi zing ata a kaihthawh turzia thu chu heti hian a sawi, 'Davida hnenah khawngaihna ka tiam tlatte kha nangmah ka pe ang che,' tiin." 
Acts13:35 Chuvangin Hla dangah, 'I Mi Thianghlim chu tawihral i phal lo ang,' a ti bawk a." 
Acts13:36 Davida zawng, Pathian rorelsak angin a dam rualpuite rawng a bawl zawhah khan a muhil a, a thlahtute hnenah an zalh a, a tawihral tawh alawm;" 
Acts13:37 Pathian kaihthawh erawh kha chu a tawihral loh kha. 
Acts13:38 Chutichuan unaute u, hre rawh u; amah avang chuan sual ngaihhnathiamna thu in hnenah hrilh a nih hi;" 
Acts13:39 tupawh a ring apiang engkimah ama thiam chantirin an awm, chungah chuan Mosia danin thiam chantirin in awm thei lo e." 
Acts13:40 Chuvangin fimkhur rawh u, chutilochuan zawlneite lehkhabua an sawi kha in chungah a lo thleng dah ang e," 
Acts13:41 'Hmusittute u, en rawh u, mak ti u la, boral rawh u; in dam chhung hian thil kawng khat ka tih hi, chu thil chu miin hrilh che u mah se la in awih tawp lo vang,' tih kha,"" a ti a." 
Acts13:42 Tin, an chhuahin Chawlhni lehah chung thu chu sawi leh atan an ngen a." 
Acts13:43 Tin, inkhawmhote chu an tin veleh Judate leh an saphun Pathian ngaihsak zinga mi tam takin Paula leh Barnaba chu an zui zel a; anni chuan an lo bia a, Pathian khawngaihnaah chuan awm reng turin an fuih a." 
Acts13:44 Tin, Chawlhni lehah chuan akhua thawin Pathian thu ngaithla turin an rawn inkhawm a." 
Acts13:45 Nimahsela Judaten mipuite chu an hmuh veleh an itsik em em mai a; Paula thusawi chu an hnial kalh a, an sawt hle a." 
Acts13:46 Tin, Paula leh Barnaba chuan huai takin an sawi chhuak a, ""Pathian thu hi nangmahni hnenah sawi hmasak tur reng a ni; nimahsela in hnar kir a, chatuana nung tlak loa in inruat tak ahnuin, hre rawh u, Jentailte lam kan hawi ta ve ang." 
Acts13:47 Chutiang chuan Lalpain thu min pe a ni, 'Jentailte tiengtuah ka ruat a che, kawlkil thlenga Chhandamtua i awm theihna turin, tih ziak ang khan,"" an ti a." 
Acts13:48 Tin, Jentailte chuan chung thu chu an hriatin an lawm a, Pathian thu an chawimawi a, tin, chatuana nung tura ruat apiang chuan an ring ta a." 
Acts13:49 Tin, Lalpa thu chu, chu mi ram khawvelah chuan a darh ta a." 
Acts13:50 Nimahsela Judate chuan hmeichhe zahawm Pathian ngaihsakte leh khuaa upahote chu an fuih a, Paula leh Barnaba chu an tihduhdahtir a, an ram ata an hnawt chhuak ta a." 
Acts13:51 Tin, anni chuan an chungah an kephaha vaivut an thing thla a, Ikonion khua an thleng a.Tin, zirtirhote chu lawmna leh Thlarau Thianghlimin an khat hlawm a." 
Acts13:52 Tin, zirtirhote chu lawmna leh Thlarau Thianghlimin an khat hlawm a." 
Acts14:1 Tin, Ikonion khuaah chuan Judate inkhawmna inah an lut dun a, thu an sawi thin a, chutichuan Juda leh Grik tam tak pawhin an ring ta hial a." 
Acts14:2 Nimahsela ring duh lo Judaten Jentailte an fuih pawrh a, unaute chu an huattir a." 
Acts14:3 Chuvangin Lalpaah huai taka thu sawiin chutah chuan rei fe an awm a, ani chuan chhinchhiahna leh thilmakte an kuta tihtirin, a khawngaih thu a hriattir thin a." 
Acts14:4 Nimahsela khuaa mipuite chu an inkhing ta a; a thenin judate chu an tan a, a thenin tirhkohte chu an tan a." 
Acts14:5 Tin, Jentailte, Judate, an hotute nen chuan tirhkohte chu zahthlak taka siam leh lunga den tuma an beih dawn lain," 
Acts14:6 anni chuan an lo hria a, Lukaoni ram vekah chuan Lustra leh Derbe khuaahte leh a vel ramahte an tlan bo a;" 
Acts14:7 chungah chuan Chanchin Tha an hril zel a. 
Acts14:8 Tin, Lustra khuaah chuan ke zeng tu emaw a thu thin a, a pian tirh ata kebai reng a ni a, kein a kal ngai lo a." 
Acts14:9 Chu mi chuan Paula thusawi a ngaithla a; tin, Paula chuan ani chu a en reng a, damna turin rin a nei tih a hria a," 
Acts14:10 aw ring takin, ""I kein ding ngil rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chu a zuang tho a, kein a kal ta a." 
Acts14:11 Tin, mipuiten Paula thiltih chu an hmuh veleh Lukaoni tawngin, ring takin, ""Pathiante chu mihring angin kan hnenah an lo chhuk ta a nih hi!"" an ti a." 
Acts14:12 Tin, Barnaba chu 'Jupita' an ti a, Paula chu thusawitu zawk a nih avangin, 'Merkuria' an ti a." 
Acts14:13 Tin, Jupita, a biak in daipawna awm chu, a puithiamin sebawngpate leh pangpar thihruite, kawngkhar kiangahte a rawn la a, mipuite nen chuan biakna'n talh an tum ta a." 
Acts14:14 Nimahsela tirhkoh Barnaba leh Paula chuan chu chu an hriat veleh an puan an pawt thler a, mipui zingah chuan an zuang lut a, an au a," 
Acts14:15 Pute u, he'ng thil hi engah nge in tih? Keini pawh in nungchang ang pu mihring kan nih hi; he'ng thil lawilote hi in hawisan a, van te, lei te, tuifinriat te, an chhunga awm zawng zawng nena siamtu Pathian nung hnenah chuan in lo pakaina turin Chanchin Tha kan rawn thlen che u a nih hi." 
Acts14:16 Chu Pathian chuanhman laiin hnam tin mahni kawng theuh zawh a phal thin a," 
Acts14:17 nimahsela amah hriattirna awm loin a insiam lo, chutin thil a ti tha thin a, van ata ruahte leh kum that kumte a pe che u a, in rilru ei tur leh lawmnain a tikhah thin che u kha,"" an ti a." 
Acts14:18 Tin, chung thu chuan mipuiten anmahni biakna'na ran an talh tur chu an khap zo ta hram hram a." 
Acts14:19 Nimahsela Antiokei leh Ikonion khuaa mi Juda tute emaw chutah chuan an lo kal a, mipuite chu an thlem thlu ta a; tichuan Paula chu lungin an deng a, thia an rin avangin khua ata chu an hnuk chhuak ta a." 
Acts14:20 Nimahsela zirtirhote chu a vela an din laiin, a lo tho a, khuaah chuan a lut leh ta a.Tin,atukah chuan Barnaba nen Derbe khuaah an kal ta a." 
Acts14:21 Tin, chu mi khuate hnenah chuan Chanchin Tha an hrilh a, zirtir tam tak an siamhnuin Lustra khuaah te, Ikonion khuaah te, Antiokei khuaah te an kir leh zel a," 
Acts14:22 Hrehawm tam tak tuarin Pathian ramah kan lut tur a ni reng a ni,"" tiin zirtirhote rilru an tinghet a, rinnaah chuan awm reng turin an fuih zel a." 
Acts14:23 Tin, kohhran pawl tinah chuan upate an ruatsak a, chaw nghei chunga tawngtai zawhin an rin Lalpa hnenah chuan an kawltir zel thin a." 
Acts14:24 Tin, Pisidia ram chu an fang chhuak a, Pamphulia ram chu an thleng a." 
Acts14:25 Tin, Perga khuaa thu an hril zawhin Attalia khuaah an zuk kal a;" 
Acts14:26 chuta tang chuan lawngin an chhuak a, Antiokei khua chu an lo thleng leh ta a, chu chu an thil tih zawh tak chu ti tura unauten Pathian khawngaihna kawltira an chhuahna kha a ni." 
Acts14:27 Tin, an thlen hnuin kohhranhote chu an ko khawm a, Pathianin anmahni hmanga thil a tih zawng zawngte leh, Jentailte tana rinna kawngkhar a hawnsakziate chu an hrilh a.Tin, zirtirhote hnenah chuan reife an awm ta a." 
Acts14:28 Tin, zirtirhote hnenah chuan reife an awm ta a." 
Acts15:1 Tin, mi tte emaw Judai ram ata an lo chhuk a, ""Mosia dan anga serh in tantir loh chuan chhandam in ni thei lo ang,"" tiin unaute chu an zirtir a." 
Acts15:2 Chutichuan Paula leh Barnaba chu anmahni nen inhnial namena an inhnial loh a, an inkhin tlat avangin, Paula leh Barnaba chu an zinga tute emaw nen, chu thubuai chungah chuan Jerusalem khuaa tirhkohte leh upate hnenah chho turin an ruat a." 
Acts15:3 Chutichuan kohhrante chuan an han thlah a, anni chuan Jentailte hawi kir lehzia thu chu hril zelin, Phoiniki ram leh Samari ram an fang chhuak ta a; tichuan unaute zawng zawng an tilawm em em a." 
Acts15:4 Tin, Jerusalem khua chu an han thlen chuan kohhranhote, tirhkohte, upate chuan an lo lawm a, tin, Pathianin anmahni hmanga thil a tih zawng zawngte chu an hrilh a." 
Acts15:5 Nimahsela Pharisai pawla mi ring ve tute emaw an tho a, ""Jentailte chu an serh tan tur a ni, Mosia dan awih pawh an hnenah tiam kher tur a ni,"" an ti a." 
Acts15:6 Tin, tirhkohte leh upate chu, chu mi thu chu ngaihtuah turin an inkhawm a." 
Acts15:7 Tin, an inhnial chiam hnuin Petera a tho a, an hnenah: ""Unaute u, Jentailten keima kaa Chanchin Tha thu hriaa awih tura Pathianin hmana in zing ata mi ruatzia kha in hria e." 
Acts15:8 Tin, rilru hretu Pathianin keini min pek ang bawk khan Thlarau Thianghlim an hnenah pe vein an chungah a lawm tih a hriattir a;" 
Acts15:9 tin, keini leh anni thlei bik loin rinin an rilru a tithianghlim a." 
Acts15:10 Chutichuan min thlahtu leh keini zawh tawh loh nghawngkawl kha tunah zirtirhote chunga nghah tumin engati nge Pathian fin in hnial kalh le? 
Acts15:11 Anmahni rin ang bawk hian keini pawhin Lalpa Isua khawngaihna avanga chhandam tur niin kan inring si a,"" a ti a." 
Acts15:12 Tichuan mipui zawng zawng chu an ngawi reng a, Barnaba leh Paulan Pathianin anmahni hmanga Jentailte zinga chhinchhiahna leh thilmak a tih thu kha an hrilh chhung zawng an ngaithla a." 
Acts15:13 Tin, an sawi zawhin Jakoba'n a sawi ve thung a: ""Unaute u, ka thu ngaithla rawh u," 
Acts15:14 Pathianin ama hming pu atan an zing ata mite la chhuak turin Jentailte a kan tan tirh dan thu chu Sumeona hian a sawi ta a. 
Acts15:15 Tin, chung thu leh zawlneite thu hi a inhmeh a ni:" 
Acts15:16 'Chung zawhah chuan ka kir leh ang a, Davida bawkte chim kha ka siam leh ang a, a chhe lai apiang pawh ka rem chho leh ang;" 
Acts15:17 Mi dang, Jentail zawng zawng ka hming mi tawmhote chuan, Lalpa an zawnna'n chu bawkte chu ka tungding ang' tiin." 
Acts15:18 Khawvel siam tirh ata he'ng thu hriattir thintu Lalpa chuan a ti e, tih ziak hi." 
Acts15:19 Chuvangin heti hian ka ruat a ni, Jentailte zinga Pathian lam hawite chu tihrehawm lo i la," 
Acts15:20 milem biakna thil bawlhhlawh ei te, inngaih te, sa rehhlum leh thisen eite banna turin an hnenah lehkha thawn zawk i la ka ti ber a ni." 
Acts15:21 Mosia'n hman lai ata tawh khaw tinah a thu tlangaupuitu a nei thin si a, inkhawmna inahte Chawlhni apiangin a thu chu chhiar a nih thin kha,"" a ti a." 
Acts15:22 Tin, tirhkohte, upate, kohhran zawng zawngte nen chuan, an pawla mi thlana Paula leh Barnaba hnenah Antiokei khuaa kaltir tha an ti a; an thlante hming chu Juda (Barsaba an tih) leh Sila an ni a, chu mite chu unaute zinga hotu deuh an ni a." 
Acts15:23 Tin, hetiangin an ziak a, an kutah an thawn a. ""Tirhkohte leh unaute zinga upaten Antiokei khua te, Suria ram te leh Kilikia rama Jentail unau awmte chibai an buk e." 
Acts15:24 Kan pawl zinga mi tuten emaw thu sawiin an tibuai che u a, in rilru an timangang tih kan hria e, an hnenah thu engmah kan pe si lo a." 
Acts15:25 Chuvangin thu khat vuaa kan inkhawmin, kan duh tak Barnaba leh Paula," 
Acts15:26 Lalpa Isua Krista hming avanga thih dawn lote kal rual hian mi thlante in hnena rawn kaltir ve tha kan ti a. 
Acts15:27 Chutichuan Juda leh Sila kan rawn tir a nih hi, anni pawhin he'ng thu bawk hi tawngkain an hrilh ang che u." 
Acts15:28 Thlarau Thianghlim leh keinin, he'ng thu pawimawh lo hi chu, phurrit zual in chungah nghat lo i la a tha kan ti;" 
Acts15:29 milem biakna sa ei te, sa thisen ei te, sa rehhlum ei te, inngaih te bang u la kan ti; he'ng hi in ban chuan in tan a tha ang. Dam takin awm rawh u,"" tiin." 
Acts15:30 Chutichuan an tirhin an kal a, Antiokei khua an thleng chhuk a; tin, mipui chu an ko khawm a, lehkha chu an pe a;" 
Acts15:31 tin, an chhiar zawhin thlamuanna thu avang chuan an lo lawm ta hle a." 
Acts15:32 Tin, Juda leh Sila chu zawlnei an ni bawk a, thu tam takin unaute chu an thlamuan a, an tinghet a." 
Acts15:33 Tin, chutah chuan rei deuh an awm hnuin, anmahni tirtute hnena hawng leh turin unaute chuan thlamuang takin anchhuahtir leh ta a." 
Acts15:34 Nimahsela, Sila chuan chutah la awm rih chu thain a hria a." 
Acts15:35 Paula leh Barnaba erawh chu Antiokei khuaah chuan Lalpa thu zirtir leh hrilin an awm reng a, mi dang tam takte nen." 
Acts15:36 Tin, ni eng emaw zat hnuah chuan Paulan Barnaba hnenah, ""Tunah kal leh i la, khaw tina Lalpa thu kan hrilhna apianga unau awmte kha kan zel i la, an awm dan i en ang,"" a ti a." 
Acts15:37 Tin, Barnaban Johana (Marka an tih chu) an hnenah hruai a tum a," 
Acts15:37 Tin, Barnaban Johana (Marka an tih chu) an hnenah hruai a tum a," 
Acts15:38 Paula erawh chuan ani chu an hnena hruai tha a ti lo, Pamphulia ramah anmahni a kirsan a, hnathawhnaa an hnena a kal ve tak loh avang khan." 
Acts15:39 Tichuan nasa takin an lo inhnial ta a, chutichuan an inthen a, Barnaban Marka chu a hnenah a hruai a, Kupra thliarkar lamah lawngin a kal ta a." 
Acts15:39 Tichuan nasa takin an lo inhnial ta a, chutichuan an inthen a, Barnaban Marka chu a hnenah a hruai a, Kupra thliarkar lamah lawngin a kal ta a." 
Acts15:40 Paula erawh chuan Sila a thlang a, unauten Lalpa khawngaihnaa an kawltir hnuin a kal chhuak ta a.Tin, kohhran pawlte chu tinghet zelin Suria leh Kilikia ram a fang chhuak ta." 
Acts15:41 Tin, kohhran pawlte chu tinghet zelin Suria leh Kilikia ram a fang chhuak ta." 
Acts16:1 Tin, Derbe khuaah leh Lustra khuaah chuan a kal bawk a; tin, chutah chuan a hming Timothea zirtir pakhat a awm; ani chu ring ve Juda hmeichhe fapa a ni a, a pa erawh chu Grik a ni;" 
Acts16:2 Lustra leh Ikonion khuaa unau awmte chuan ani chu an fak thin a. 
Acts16:3 Paulan ani chu an hnena kal veah a duh a; tichuan chu mi lama Juda awmte avang chuan a serh a tansak a, a pa chu Grik a ni tih an hre vek si a." 
Acts16:4 Tin, khaw tinah an kal pahin Jerusalem khuaa tirhkoh leh upa awmte thu rel kha zawm atan unaute hnenah an pe zel a." 
Acts16:5 Chutichuan kohhran pawlte chu rinnaah chuan an nghet ta a, ni tin an pung ta deuh deuh a." 
Acts16:6 Tin, Thlarau Thianghlimin Asia rama thu hril a khap avangin Phrugia leh Galatia ram chu an fang chhuak ta a;" 
Acts16:7 tin, Musia ram kiang an thlenin Bethunia rama luh an tum a, nimahsela Isua thlarauin a phal si lo a." 
Acts16:8 Chutichuan Musia ram chu an pel a, Troas khuaah an chhuk ta a." 
Acts16:9 Tin, zanah Paulan mumang angin Makedonia rama mi mi pakhat dingin,""Makedonia ramah lo kai la, min pui rawh,"" tia ngen chiamin a hmu a." 
Acts16:10 Tin, chu mang chu a man zawh veleh Makedonia ramah chuan kal kan tum ta nghal a, an hnena Chanchin Tha hrilah Pathianin min ko tih kan hria a." 
Acts16:11 Tin, Troas khua ata lawngin kan chhuak a, tluang takin Samathraki khuaah kan kal a, atukah chuan Neapoli khuaah kan kal leh a;" 
Acts16:12 tin, chuta tang chuan Philippi khuaah kan kal a, chu mi khua chu Makedonia rama khaw pakhat a ni a, chu mi bialah chuan khaw pawimawh ber a ni a, Rom khuaa mi pemte khua a ni. Chu mi khuaah chuan ni tam deuh kan cham a." 
Acts16:13 Tin, Chawlhniin kulh kawngkhar pawn lamah lui kamah tawngtaina hmun nia kanrinah chuankan kal a; tin, kan thu a, hmeichhe lo kal khawmhote hnenah chuan thu kan sawi a." 
Acts16:14 Tin, a hming Ludi, puan sen duk zuartu, Thuatira khua a mi, Pathian betu hmeichhe pakhatin kan thu a hria a, tin, Paula thusawi zawm turin Lalpa chuan a thinlung a tivar ta a." 
Acts16:15 Tin, amah leh a chhungten baptisma an chan zawhin, ""Lalpa ring tak zeta mi ruat chuan ka inah lo thleng rawh u,"" tiin min ngen chiam a, min chelh ta a." 
Acts16:16 Tin, tawngtaina hmunah chuan kan kal laiin, nula tu emaw ramhuai aienthiam zawlin min tawk a, ani chuan a ai en avangin a pute chu sum tam tak a hmuhtir thin a." 
Acts16:17 Chu mi chuan Paula leh keini min zui a, ""Heng mi chhandamna kawng hrilhtu che u hi, Chungnungber Pathian bawih an nih hi,"" tiin a au a." 
Acts16:18 Chutiang chuan ni rei tak a ti thin a. Chutichuan Paula chu a lungni ta lo a,a hawi a,ramhuai hnenah chuan,""Isua Krista hmingin a kawchhung ata chhuah thu ka pe a che,"" a ti a. Tin, chutih lai tak chuan a chhuak ta nghal a." 
Acts16:19 Tin, a pute chuan an sum hmuhna a bo tih an hriatin, Paula leh Sila chu an man a, hotute hmaah dawr hmunah an hnuk lut a." 
Acts16:20 Tichuan thu reltute hnenah an hruai a, ""Heng mite hi Judate an ni a, kan khua an tibuai em em a," 
Acts16:21 dan eng emaw kan lawm leh zawm thiang lote hi an hril thin a, Rom mi kan ni si a,"" an ti a." 
Acts16:22 Chutichuan mipuite pawh chu tirhkohte bei turin an lo thawk ve a, thu reltute chuan an puante an phih hlihsak a, tianga vuak thu an pe a." 
Acts16:23 Tin, vawi tam tak an vuak zawhin tan inah an khung a, a vengtu hnenah him taka ven tur an ti tlat a;" 
Acts16:24 chuti kauva thu an pek avangin ani chuan rip chhungnungah a khung a, an keahte chuan thing kawl a buntir tlat a." 
Acts16:25 Nimahsela zan laiah Paula leh Sila chuan Pathian hnenah an tawngtai a, hla an sa a, mi tangten an ngaithla a;" 
Acts16:26 tin,thawklehkhatah lir nasa takin a lo nghing a,chutichuan tan in lungphumte lam chu a nghing a; tin, kawngkhar zawng zawng a inhawng nghal a, mi tin kawl bunte chu a lo inphelh ta vek a." 
Acts16:27 Tin, a vengtu chu a muhil a lo harh a, tan in kawngkharte chu inhawngin a hmu a, mi tangte chu an tlan bo emaw a ti a, a khandaih a phawi a, a intihhlum dawn a." 
Acts16:28 Nimahsela Paula chu aw ring takin a au a, ""Engmah intih suh; kan zain hetah kan la awm vek alawm,"" a ti a." 
Acts16:29 Tin, a vengtu chuan khawnvarte a lam a, a zuang lut a, hlauva khur chungin Paula leh Sila hmaah a bawkkhup a;" 
Acts16:30 tin, anni chu a hruai chhuak a, ""Pute u, chhandama awm turin eng nge ka tih tur?"" a ti a." 
Acts16:31 Tin, anni chuan, ""Lalpa Isua ring la, tichuan chhandamin i awm ang, nang leh i chhungte nen,"" an ti a." 
Acts16:32 Tin, a hnenah leh a ina awm zawng zawngte hnenah chuan Lalpa thu an sawi a." 
Acts16:33 Tin,chu mi zanah,chu mi lai la la chuan a hruai a,an vuakna vualte chu a silfai a;tin,anileh a chhungte zawng zawng chuan baptisma an chang ta nghal a." 
Acts16:34 Tin, a inah a hruai chho a, ei tur a hlui a, tin, Pathian an rin avangin, ani chu a chhungte zawng zawng nen an hlim ta em em a." 
Acts16:35 Tin, ni a chhuahin, thu reltute chuan, ""Kha mite kha chhuah rawh,"" tiin mi mantute an tir a." 
Acts16:36 Tin, tan in vengtu chuan Paula hnenah an thu a hrilh a, ""Thu reltute chuan chhuah tur che uin mi an rawn tir a ni; chuvangin tunah lo chhuak u la, thlamuang takin kal rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Acts16:37 Nimahsela Paula chuan an hnenah, ""Rom mi kan ni si a, kan thiam leh thiam loh hre loin vantlang mithmuhin min vua a, tan inah min khung a; tunah hian arukin min hnawt chhuak dawn vei a ni maw? a ni tawp lo ang; anmahni ngei lo kal se la min rawn hruai chhuak rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Acts16:38 Chutichuan mi mantute chuan chung thu chu thu reltute hnenah chuan an hrilh a. Tin, Rom mi an ni tih an hriat chuan an hlau ta a;" 
Acts16:39 tin, an va kal a, an thlem chiam a, an hruai chhuak a, khua ata chu kal bovah an ngen a,Tin, tan in ata chu an chhuak a, Ludi inah chuan an lut a; tin, unaute chu an hmu a, an thlamuan a, an chhuak ta a." 
Acts16:40 Tin, tan in ata chu an chhuak a, Ludi inah chuan an lut a; tin, unaute chu an hmu a, an thlamuan a, an chhuak ta a." 
Acts17:1 Tin, Amphipoli khua leh Apollonia khua an kal pel a, Thessalonika khua an thleng ta a, chutah chuan Judate inkhawmna in a awm a;" 
Acts17:2 tin, Paula a dan pangngaiin an hnenah a lut a, Chawlhni vawi thum Pathian Lehkha Thu atangin khun taka chhutpuiin," 
Acts17:3 Krista chu hrehawm tuar tur reng a nihzia te, mitthi zing ata pawh tho leh tur reng a nihzia te chu a hrilhfiah a, a tilang thin a; ""He Isua, a thu ka hrilh che u hi, amah hi Krista chu a ni,"" a ti bawk thin a." 
Acts17:4 Tichuan an zinga thenkhat chu thlemthlukin an awm a,Paula leh Sila chu an pawl ta a; Pathian ngaihsak Grik mipui tam tak leh hmeichhe puipa tam takte nen." 
Acts17:5 Nimahsela Judaten an huphurh a; dawr hmuna mi sual thatchhia tute emaw an hnenah an hruai a, mipui an ko khawm a, khua zawng zawng chu an chawk buai a; Jasona in an rawn thawng a, vantlang hnena hruai chhuah tumin." 
Acts17:6 Tin, anni chu an hmu lo a, Jasona leh unau dang tute emaw khaw hotute hnenah an hnuk lut a, an au a, ""Khawvel chawk buaitute kha hetah pawh an lo kal a," 
Acts17:7 Jasona hian a lo thleng vei a; hengho zawng zawng hi, 'A hming Isua, lal dang a awm,' tiin Kaisara thu kalhin an awm thin a ni,"" an ti a." 
Acts17:8 Tin, mipui leh khaw hotute chuan chung thu chu an han hriat chuan an buai ta a;" 
Acts17:9 tin, Jasona leh mi dangte hnen ata chu an aia hren tur englo an la a, an chhuah ta a." 
Acts17:10 Tin, unaute chuan azan azanin Paula leh Sila chu Beroia khuaah an kaltir ta nghal a; chutah an va thlen chuan Judate inkhawmna inah an lut a." 
Acts17:11 Chuta mite chu Thessalonika khuaa mi ai chuan an lo tha zawk a, chutichuan rilru lawm takin thu chu an pawm a, an thusawi chu a dik leh dik loh hriat nan ni tin Pathian Lehkhaah an zawng thin a;" 
Acts17:12 Chutichuan chungho chuan mi tam takin an ring ta a; Grik hmeichhe zahawm te leh mipate pawh duaiin an ring ta lo bawk a. 
Acts17:13 Nimahsela Thessalonika khuaa Judahote chuan Paulan Beroia khuaah Pathian thu a hril tih an hriat veleh chutah pawh chuan an va kal a, mipuite an fuih pawrh a, an tibuai leh ta a." 
Acts17:14 Chutichuan unauten tuifinriat thlenga kal turin Paula chu an tir chhuak ta nghal a. Sila leh Timothea erawh chu chutah chuan an la awm reng a. 
Acts17:15 Tin, Paula hruaitute chuan Atheni khaw thlengin an hruai a; tin, Sila leh Timothea chu theihtawpa a hnena kal thuaina tur thuchah sinin an haw ta a." 
Acts17:16 Tin, Paulan Atheni khuaah anni chu a lo nghah lai chuan, khua chu Pathian lema khatin a hmu a, a rilruin a helh ta a." 
Acts17:17 Chutichuan inkhawmna inah Judate leh Pathian ngaihsakte a hnial thin a, dawr hmunah pawh chuta lo awm apiangte chu ni tin a hnial bawk thin." 
Acts17:18 Tin, Epikuria mi leh Stoik mi zinga mi fing tute emaw pawhin ani chu an rawn hnial a. A thenin, ""He mi kamtam hian eng nge sawi a tum?"" an ti a. A thenin, (Isua thu leh Thawhlehna thu a hril avangin), ""Ram dang pathiante thu hriltu a ni awm e,"" an ti a." 
Acts17:19 Tin, ani chu an chelh a, Areopagi-ah chuan an rawn hruai a, a hnenah, ""He zirtirna thar i sawi thin hi min hriattir thei ang em?" 
Acts17:20 Thil mak eng emaw kan bengahte i rawn thlen a ni; chutichuan he'ng thil awmzia hi hriat kan duh e,"" an ti a." 
Acts17:21 Atheni khuaa mi zawng zawng chu, an khuaa mikhual awmte pawh, an hman chang apiangin thu thar tawh phawt chu sawiin emaw, a ngaithla talin emaw an awm chawt thin reng a ni." 
Acts17:22 Tin, Paula chu, Areopagi lai takah chuan a ding a, a sawi a. ""Nangni Atheni khuaa mite u, engkimah sakhaw ngaihsak tak mi ni ni tih ka hria e." 
Acts17:23 Ka len paha in chibai bukate ka en laiin, maicham pakhat, a chungah, 'Hriat Loh Pathian tan' tia ziak ka hmu a ni. Chutichuan hre loa chibai in buk thina kha, chu mia thu chu ka hrilh che u a nih hi." 
Acts17:24 Pathian, khawvel leh a chhunga thil zawng zawng siamtu chu lei leh van lal a nih avangin kuta sak inahte a awm lo a;" 
Acts17:25 thil tlachham angin mihring kuta rawngbawlsakin a awm hek lo, amah ngei chu engkim hnena nunnate, thawknate leh thil zawng zawngte petu a ni zawk e." 
Acts17:26 Tin, lei chung zawng zawnga awm turin bul hmun khat vekin hnam tin mi a siam a, an tan hun bite a ruat a, an awmna rite pawh a khamsak a," 
Acts17:27 Pathian an zawn a, an dap an dap a, an hmuh mial theihna'n; nimahsela ani chuan min hlat lo theuh si a." 
Acts17:28 Amah avangin kan nung, kan che, kan awm a ni si a; nangmahni hlaphuahthiam tute emaw pawhin, 'Keini pawh a thlahte kan ni si,' tia an sawi ang khan." 
Acts17:29 Chutichuan Pathian thlahte kan nih ahnuin, Pathian pangti chu rangkachak te, tangka te, lung te mihring themthiam leh remruata chherte ang hi emaw tih, kan rin tur a ni lo e." 
Acts17:30 Chutichuan Pathianin kan hriat loh laite a haider thin a; nimahsela tunah hian ram tina mi zawng zawng sim tur thu a pe ta a ni, ni a tiam avangin;" 
Acts17:31 chu mi niah chuan a mi ruata chu, leia mite fel takin a ngaihtuahtir ang; chu chu Pathianin amah chu mitthi zing ata kai thoin, mi zawng zawng hnenah a hriattir tawh a ni,"" tiin." 
Acts17:32 Tin, mitthi zing ata thawhlehna thu chu an hriat veleh a thenin an nuihsan a; a thenin, ""He thu hi i hnenah kan la ngaithla leh ang e,"" an ti a." 
Acts17:33 Chutichuan Paula chu an zing ata a chhuak ta a.Nimahsela mi tute emaw a hnenah an tel ta tlat a, an ring ta a; chung zinga thenkhat chu Areopagi-a mi Dionusia leh hmeichhe pakhat a hming Damari leh an hnena mi dangte nen chuan an ni." 
Acts17:34 Nimahsela mi tute emaw a hnenah an tel ta tlat a, an ring ta a; chung zinga thenkhat chu Areopagi-a mi Dionusia leh hmeichhe pakhat a hming Damari leh an hnena mi dangte nen chuan an ni." 
Acts18:1 Chung thil hnuah chuan Paula chu Atheni khua ata chu a chhuak a, Korinth khuaah a kal ta a." 
Acts18:2 Tin, a hming Akuilia Juda pakhat a hmu a, chu mi chu Ponto rama piang a ni a, Klaudian Juda zawng zawng Rom khua ata chhuah thu a pek avangin a nupui Priskili nen Itali ram ata lo kal hlim an ni a." 
Acts18:3 Tin, Paula chu, chu mite hnenah chuan a thleng ta a, tin, an hnathawh ang thawk a nih avangin anmahni a hrawn a, an hnenah a thawk ve thin a; an hnathawh chu puan in siam a ni a." 
Acts18:4 Tin, Chawlhni apiangin inkhawmna inah khun takin thu a hril thin a, Judate leh Grikte chu thlem thluk a tum thin a." 
Acts18:5 Tin, Sila leh Timothea chu Makedonia ram ata chu an lo chhukin, Paula chu thu hril chauhin a awm ta a, Isua kha Krista chu a ni tih Judate hnenah a hrilhfiah thin a." 
Acts18:6 Nimahsela an dodala an sawtin Paulan a puan a thing a, an hnenah, ""In thihna mawh chu nangmahniin phur ang che u; kei zawng ka hul a ni e; tun achinah Jentailte hnenah ka kal ang,"" a ti a." 
Acts18:7 Tin, chuta ta chu a kal a, a hming Tita Justa mi pakhat inah a lut a, chu mi chuan Pathian a be thin a; a in pawh chu inkhawmna in nen a inzawm a ni." 
Acts18:8 Tin, Krispa, inkhawmna in hotu chuan a chhungte zawng zawng nen Lalpa an ring a, Korinth khuaa mitam tak pawhin an hria a, an ring ve a, baptisma an chang ta a." 
Acts18:9 Tin, zanah Lalpa'n Paula hnenah chuan mumang angin, ""Hlau suh la, ngawi loin thu sawi zel rawh;" 
Acts18:10 kei I hnenah ka awm alawm, tina tur chein tuma'n I chungah kut an thlak lo vang; he khuaah hian mi tam tak ka nei si a,"" a ti a." 
Acts18:11 Tin, Paula chu chutah chuan an zingah Pathian thu zirtirin kum khat leh thla ruk a awm ta a." 
Acts18:12 Tin, Galliova Akaia rama lal aiawha a awm laiin Judaten rual takin Paula an bei a, rorelna thutphah hmaah an hruai a," 
Acts18:13 He mi hrep hian Dan lo anga Pathian be turin mi a thlemthlu thin a ni,"" an ti a." 
Acts18:14 Tin, Paulan a chhan dawnin, Galliovan Judate hnenah chuan ""Judate u, he'ng hi thil dik lo thu emaw thiltih sual emaw tal ni se la, mathei loin ka ngaihsak ang che u a;" 
Acts18:15 nimahsela thute, hmingte, in dan chung thute mai a nih chuan nangmahni'n rel zawk rawh u; kei zawngin chutiang thu chu ngaihtuah ka duh lo e,"" a ti a." 
Acts18:16 Tin, rorel thutphah atang chuan anni chu a hnawt bo ta a." 
Acts18:17 Tin, Grik mi zawng zawngin inkhawmna in hotu Sosthena an man a, rorel thutphah hmaah chuan an vua a, Galliova chuan chung an thiltih chu engah mah a ngai lo a." 
Acts18:18 Tin, chu mi hnuah chuan Paula chu ni rei tak a la cham reng a; chu mi zawh chuan unaute chu tawng thain a then a, chuta ta chu Suria ram lamah lawngin a kal ta a, a hnenah Priskili leh Akuila chu an kal ve bawk a; Paulan thutiam a neih avangin Kenkriai khuaah a lu a met zet a." 
Acts18:19 Tin, Ephesi khua chu an thleng a,chutah chuan anni chu a hnutchhiah ta a;ani erawh chu inkhawmna inah a lut a, Judate hnenah khun takin thu a sawi rih a." 
Acts18:20 Tin, rei deuh chamah an ngen a, nimahsela a remti lo a," 
Acts18:21 Pathianin a phal chuan in hnenah ka lo kal leh ang,"" tiin tawng thain a then a, Ephesi khua ata chu lawngin a kal ta a." 
Acts18:22 Tin, lawng ata chu Kaisari khuaah a chhuak a, Jerusalem khuaah a han kal a, kohhranhote chu chibai a buk a; tin, chu mi zawhah chuan Antiokei khuaah a zuk kal ta a." 
Acts18:23 Tin, chutah chuan rei ngial a awm hnuin a kal leh a, zirtirho zawng zawng tinghetin Galatia ram leh Phrugia ram chu a fang chhuak vek a." 
Acts18:24 Tin, Juda pakhat, a hming Appollova, Aleksandria khuaa piang, mi fing tak, Ephesi khuaah chuan a zuk kal a; ani chuan Pathian Lehkha Thute a hre nasa em em a." 
Acts18:25 Chu mi chu Lalpa Kawng thu zir tawh a ni a, rilrua thahnemngai tak a nih avangin Isua chanchin chu ngun takin a hril a, a zirtir thin a, Johana baptisma thu chauh a hre si a." 
Acts18:26 Tin, inkhawmna inah huai takin thu a sawi tan ta a. Chutichuan Priskili leh Akuila chuan a thusawi an hriatin an inah an hruai a, a hnenah Pathian Kawng thu fel lehzualin an hrilhfiah ta a." 
Acts18:27 Tin, ani chuan Akaia rama kal kai a tum veleh unauten an fuih a, amah an lo lawmna turin zirtirhote hnenah lehkha an ziaksak a; tin, a thlen chuanin Pathian khawngaihna avanga ringtute chu, nasa takin a pui a;vantlang hriatin Judate chu nasa takin a tidang a, Pathian Lehkha Thu hmangin Isua kha Krista chu a ni tih a hriattir thin a." 
Acts18:28 vantlang hriatin Judate chu nasa takin a tidang a, Pathian Lehkha Thu hmangin Isua kha Krista chu a ni tih a hriattir thin a." 
Acts19:1 Tin, Paula chuan khaw chhak bial a fang chhuak zet a, Apollova Korinth khuaa a awm hlan khan Ephesi khua chu a thleng a, zirtirho tute emaw a hmu a;" 
Acts19:2 tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""In rin tirh lai khan Thlarau Thianghlim in chang em?"" a ti a. Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Chang lo, Thlarau Thianghlim a awm tih reng hriat pawh kan hre lo,"" an ti a." 
Acts19:3 Tin, ani chuan, ""Eng baptismaah nge in chan le?"" a ti a. Anni chuan, ""Johana baptismaah,"" an ti a." 
Acts19:4 Tin, Paula chuan, ""Johana kha chuan mi hnenah, 'Mi rawn zuitu tur (Isua) chu in la ring tur a ni,' tiin simna baptismain a baptis thin a nih kha,"" a ti a." 
Acts19:5 Tin,chu thu chu an hriat veleh Lalpa Isua hmingin baptisma an chang ta a." 
Acts19:6 Tin, Paulan an chungah a kut a nghat a, Thlarau Thianghlim chu a chungah a lo thleng ta a; tichuan tawng hriat lohtein thu an sawi a, Pathian thu pawh an hril ta a." 
Acts19:7 An za chuan patling sawm leh pahnih lai an ni. 
Acts19:8 Tin, Paula chu inkhawmna inah a lut thin a, thla thum lai huai takin thu a sawi a, Pathian ram kawng thu-ah chuan mi a hnial a, mi a thlemthlu thin a." 
Acts19:9 Nimahsela a then an tihmawh a, an awih duh loh a, mipui hmaah Kawng chu an sawichhiat veleh chuan, ani chuan anmahni a kalsan a, zirtirhote chu a kai hrang a, ni tinTuranna zirtirna inah mi a hnial thin a." 
Acts19:10 Chutiang hlirin kum hnih lai a ti a; chutichuan Asia rama awm zawng zawng Judate leh Grikte pawhin Lalpa thu chu an hre ta hial a. 
Acts19:11 Tin, Pathianin Paula kutin thilmak namen a tihtir lo a;" 
Acts19:12 chutichuan a taksa ata inhrukna puante emaw, fenthuahte emaw damlote hnenah an rawn keng a, an nate a reh thin a, an kawchhung ata ramhuaite pawh an chhuak thin a." 
Acts19:13 Tin, thiam zuara vak vak Juda mi tuten emaw, ""Paulan a thu a tlangaupui thin Isua hmingin kan vau a che,"" tiin ramhuai paite chungah Lalpa Isua hming an lam vei thin a." 
Acts19:14 Tin, Juda mi puithiam lal pakhat, Skeva chuan chutiang ti ve thin fapa sarih a nei a." 
Acts19:15 Nimahsela ramhuaiin an hnenah, ""Isua ka awih e, Paula pawh ka hria e, nangni erawh chu tu nge maw in nih le?"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Acts19:16 Tin, ramhuai pai chuan a rawn zuan a, an za chuan a hneh a, a ngam ta zawk a, chutichuan chu mi in ata chu saruak leh inhliamin an tlan chhuak ta hial a." 
Acts19:17 Chutichuan Ephesi khuaa awm zawng zawng, Judate leh Grikte hnenah pawh, chu mi thu chu a thang ta a; tichuan an zain an hlau a, Lalpa Isua hming a lian ta a." 
Acts19:18 Tin, ringhote pawh chu a then tam tak an lo kal a, an thiltihte thupha an chawi a, an inpuang ta a." 
Acts19:19 Dawihmang a then tam tak pawhin an lehkhabute an rawn la khawm a, mi zawng zawng mithmuhah an hal ta a,tin, a man an chhut a,cheng singnga niin an hria." 
Acts19:20 Chuti kauva nasa chuan Lalpa thu chu a darh a, a hneh ta zel a." 
Acts19:21 Tin, chung zawhah chuan Paulan, Makedonia ram leh Akaia ram chu fan chhuah riha Jerusalem khuaa kal a rilruk a, ""Chuta ka kal zawh chuan Rom khua ka tlawh bawk tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Acts19:22 Chutichuan a rawngbawltu pahnih, Timothea leh Erasta chu Makedonia ramah a kaltir zet a, ani erawh chu Asia ramah a awm rih a." 
Acts19:23 Tin, chung lai vel chuan Kawng avang chuan mi buai namen lohin an buai ta a." 
Acts19:24 Mi pakhat, a hming Demetria, tangkarua chhera tangkaruaa Diani lem siamtu chuan, a siam thiamte hnenah inhlawhfakna tam tak a pe thin a;" 
Acts19:25 chu mi chuan anni chu a ko khawm a, an hnathawh ang thawktute nen; tin, an hnenah, ""Pute u, he hna hi kan hausakna a ni tih in hria e." 
Acts19:26 Hetah Ephesi khua chauhvah hian ni loin, Asia ram khawvel zawng zawng thawah pawh he Paula hian,'Kuta siam pathiante hi pathian an ni lo,'tiin mi tam tak a thlemthlu a, a pakaitir zo tawh a ni tih nangni ngei pawhin in hmuin in hre bawk a:" 
Acts19:27 chutichuan kan hnathawh a lan ang tih a hlauhawm chauh hi a ni lo a, pathiannu ropui tak Diani biak in pawh hi an rawn ngai tlawm ang a, Asia rama mi zawng zawng leh khawvela miin an biak thin hi, a ropui tehlul nen, a tlawm ang tih a hlauhawm bawk a ni,"" a ti a." 
Acts19:28 Tin, chung thu chu an hriat veleh an thinur ta em em a, ""Ephesi khuaa mi Diani hi ropui tak a ni!"" tiin an au a." 
Acts19:29 Tichuan akhuain an buai ta vek a, Gaia leh Aristarka, Makedonia rama mi, Paula hnungzuitute chu an man a, arualin ennawm inah an tlanpui chiam a." 
Acts19:30 Tin, Paulan mipui zinga luh a tum chuan zirtirhoten an phal lo a." 
Acts19:31 Tin, Asia ram hotu berte zinga thenkhat tute emaw Paula thiante an ni a, a hnenah mi an tir a, ennawm inah chuan lut lui lo turin an thlem chiam a." 
Acts19:32 Tin, awmkhawmhote chu an buai a, mi tam zawkin an inkhawm chhan pawh an hre lo a, chuvangin thenkhat thu pakhatin an au a, thenkhat thu dangin an au a." 
Acts19:33 Tin, mipui zinga mi thenkhatin Aleksandra chu an thiamna thu sawi dan tur chu an hrilh a, Judaten ani chu mi hma lamah an nam phei a. Tin, Aleksandra chuan a kutin a zap a, mi zawng zawng hnenah chuan an thiamna thu sawi a tum a." 
Acts19:34 Nimahsela ani chu Juda mi a ni tih an hriat veleh, darkar hnih lai aw rual takin, ""Ephesi khuaa mi Diani hi ropui tak a ni!"" ti hlirin an au an au a." 
Acts19:35 Tin, khaw lehkhaziaktuin mipui chu a uidaih zawh chuan, ""Ephesi khuaa mite u,Diani ropui tak biak in leh van atanga milem tla kha, Ephesi khuaa mite hi a vengtu in ni tih tu nge hre lo awm ni?" 
Acts19:36 Chutichuan he'ng thu hi hnial rual a nih loh ahnuin, in ngawi reng tur a ni, thu dawn loin engmah in ti tur a ni lo." 
Acts19:37 Heng mi, heta in rawn hruaite hi, biak in suamhmangte an ni hek lo, kan pathiannu sawichhetu lah an ni hek lo." 
Acts19:38 Chutichuan Demetria leh a thian themthiamte pawhin tu lakah pawh thupawi an neih chuan, thupawi sawina inte chu hawn sa a ni alawm, lal aiawhtute pawh an awm a; inchhal rawh se." 
Acts19:39 Thil dang pawi nei reng in nih chuan inkhawm pangngaiah an rem ang. 
Acts19:40 Vawiinah bengchhen avang hian chhal hlauhawmin kan awm tak hi a bul awm si loin; chuti chu a ni si a he inkhawm chhan hi engmah kan sawi theih dawn loh hi,"" a ti a.Tin, chutiang thu a sawi zawh chuan awmkhawmhote chu an tintir ta a." 
Acts19:41 Tin, chutiang thu a sawi zawh chuan awmkhawmhote chu an tintir ta a." 
Acts20:1 Tin, bengchheng chu a reh zawhin, Paulan zirtirhote a kohtir a, a fuih a, tawng thain a then a. Makedonia rama kal turin a chhuak ta a." 
Acts20:2 Tin, thu tam taka zirtirhote fuih zelin chu mi ram chu a fang chhuak a, Grik ram a thleng ta a." 
Acts20:3 Tin,chutah chuan thla thum a thang hnuin Suria ram lamah lawngin a kal dawn a judaten amah an phiar avangin Makedonia ramah hawn tlang a tum leh ta zawk a." 
Acts20:4 Tin, Purrha fapa Sopata, Beroia khuaa mi te, Thessalonika khuaa mi Aristarka leh Sekunda te, Derbe khua mi Gaia te, Timothea te, Asia rama mi Tukika leh Trophima te a hnenah Asia ram thlengin an kal ve a." 
Acts20:5 Chungho chuan kan hma an hruai a. Troas khuaah chuan min lo nghak reng a. 
Acts20:6 Keini erawh chu chhang dawidim telh loh ni zawng zawng hnuah chuan Philippi khua ata chu lawngin kan chhuak a, ni nga chinah Troas khuaah an hnen kan thleng a; chutah chuan ni sarih kan cham a." 
Acts20:7 Tin, ni sarih ni hmasa berah chuan chhang phel tura kan awm khawm laiin, Paulan atuka kal a tum avangin an hnenah khun takin thu a hril a; zan lai thlengin thu a sawi zel a." 
Acts20:8 Tin, pindan chungnung kan awm khawmnaah chuan khawnvar tam tak a awm a." 
Acts20:9 Tin, a hming Eutuka, tlangval pakhat tukverhah chuan a thu a, a lo muthlu a lo muthlu a. Tin, Paulan thu a sawi rei tak avangin ani chuan a mutchhuak a tuar ta lo a, in chhawng thumna atang chuan a tla ta a, a thiin an char a." 
Acts20:10 Nimahsela Paula a chhuk a, a chungah a bawh a, a pawm a, ""Thlaphang suh u, a hnuk a lo la chat lo e,"" a ti a." 
Acts20:11 Tin, Paula a chho leh a, chhang chu a phel a, chaw a ei a, rei tak, khawvar thleng hialin an hnenah thukhawchang a sawi a, chu mi hnuah chuan a kal ta a." 
Acts20:12 Tin, rawlthar chu damin an hruai a, thlamuan namenin an thlamuang ta lo a." 
Acts20:13 Tin, keini erawh chu lawngah kan lo kal tawh a, Assi khaw pan turin lawng chuan kan lo chhuak hmasa a, chutah chuan Paula chu lo chuantir kan tum a; ani chuan kea lo kal a tum avangin chutiangin aman a ruat reng a ni a." 
Acts20:14 Tin,Asia khuaa mi rawn fin chuan kan chuantir ta a,Mitulini khua kan thleng a." 
Acts20:15 Tin, chuta tang chuan lawngin kan kel leh a, atukah chuan Kia thliarkar zawn kan thleng a; tin, atuk lehah Sami thliarkar kan tlawh a; tin atuk lehah chuan Meliti khua kan thleng leh a." 
Acts20:16 Tin, Paulan Asia rama awm rei a duh loh avangin Ephesi khua chu lawngin pelh a tum sa reng a ni, a theih chuan Jerusalem khuaah Pentikost ni nan a tum a, a kal hmanhmawh a ni." 
Acts20:17 Tin, Meliti khua atang chuan Ephesi khuaah mi a tir a, kohhran upahote a hnenah a kohtir a." 
Acts20:18 Tin, a hnen an lo thlenin ani chuan an hnenah: ""Asia ram ka tlawh tirh ni ata kha in hnena ka awm chhung zawng khan ka awmzia kha in hria e;" 
Acts20:19 thuhnuairawlh ber chung leh, Judaten mi phiar avanga mittui tla leh, thil hrehawm ka chunga tlate tuar chungin, Lalpa rawng ka bawl thin kha;" 
Acts20:20 khati khan a sawt tur thu in hnenah engmah hrilh ka tim lo a, vantlang zingah te, in tinah te ka zirtir thin che u a," 
Acts20:21 Judate leh Grikte hnenah pawh Pathian lama rilru lamlet thu leh, kan Lalpa Isua Krista lam rin tur thu ka hriattir thin kha." 
Acts20:22 Tin hre rawh u, tunah hian rilrua kal lo thei lo va ka inhriat avangin, Jerusalem khuaah ka kal dawn hi, chutah chuan ka chunga thil lo thleng tur chin ka hre lo e;" 
Acts20:23 Thlarau Thianghlimin, 'Phuarna leh hrehawmnain a hmuak a che,' tiin khaw tinah mi hriattir thin, chung chauh chu ka hria a ni." 
Acts20:24 Nimahsela ka tlansiakna kawng ka hmabak hlen tur leh, Pathian khawngaihna Chanchin Tha hriattir tur, Lalpa Isua hnenah kha mi rawngbawl hna ka hmuh kha thawk zo phawt i la, ka nun pawh thlakhlelh tlakah ka ruat lo e." 
Acts20:25 Tin, hre rawh u, nangni zawng zawng, Pathian ram thu tlangaupui zela ka vah ka vah thinnate hian ka hmel in hmu leh tawh lo ang tih ka hria e." 
Acts20:26 Chuvangin mi zawng zawng thisenah ka hul a ni tih vawiinah hian ka hriattir a che u. 
Acts20:27 Pathian rel zawng zawng azain in hnenah hrilh ka tim loh kha. 
Acts20:28 Pathian kohhranho, ama thisena a leite chu chawm turin nangmahni leh in hote zawng zawng chungah chuan fimkhur rawh u, Thlarau Thianghlimin an chunga hotuah a siam che u hi." 
Acts20:29 Ka kal hnuin chinghne kawlhte in zingah an lo lut ang a, pawlho chu an zuah lo ang tih ka hria e." 
Acts20:30 In zinga mi ngei pawh hi, zirtirhote in hnena pakaitir turin thu hran sawi in lo la awm ang." 
Acts20:31 Chuvangin ngaihven rawh u; kum thum meuh, mittui tla chunga, achhun azana mi tin zilh ka ban loh kha hre reng rawh u." 
Acts20:32 Tunah hian Pathian leh a khawngaihna thu-ah ka kawltir a che u, chu chuan a siam lian thei che u a, mi rilru thianghlimte zingah ro chan a neihtir thei bawk a che u." 
Acts20:33 Tuma tangkate, rangkachakte, silhfente ka awh ngai loh kha." 
Acts20:34 He kutte hian keimah leh ka thiante chakkhai a deh chhuah thin kha nangni ngeiin in hria e. 
Acts20:35 Engkim ka tih apiangah ka tihhmuh thin che u kha, chutianga thawk rim chung leh, Lalpa Isua thu hre reng chungin mi chak lote in tanpui tur a ni; amah ngeiin, 'Englo lak aiin pekin lukhawng a nei zawk,' a tih kha,"" a ti a." 
Acts20:36 Tin, chutiang thu chu a sawi zawh chuan a thingthi a,an zain a tawngtaipui a." 
Acts20:37 Tin, an za chuan an tap zawih zawih a, Paula chu pawmin an fawp ngawih ngawih a,a hmel an hmuh leh tawh loh tur thu a sawi chu an lungngaihna ber a ni. Tin, lawng thleng chuan amah an thlah ta a." 
Acts20:38 a hmel an hmuh leh tawh loh tur thu a sawi chu an lungngaihna ber a ni. Tin, lawng thleng chuan amah an thlah ta a." 
Acts21:1 Tin, anni nen chuan kan inthen a, lawngin kan chhuak a, chu mi hnuah chuan ngil takin Koi thliarkar kan thleng a, tin, atukah Rodi thliarkar kan thleng leh a, chuta tangin kan kal zel a, Patara khua kan thleng a;" 
Acts21:2 tin, Phoiniki rama kai tur lawng pakhat kan hmu a, kan chuang a, kan kal ta zel a." 
Acts21:3 Tin, Kupra thliarkar kan hmu a, vei lam chhawnin kan pel a, Suria ram lamah kan kal zel a, Turi khuaah chuan khawmualah kan chhuak ta rih a; chutah chuan lawnga bungrua thiar chhuah tur a ni a." 
Acts21:4 Tin, zirtirhote kan zawng chhuak a, chutah chuan ni sarih kan cham a; tin, anni chuan Thlarau hrilhin,Paula hnenah Jerusalem khua tlawh loh tur an ti a." 
Acts21:5 Nimahsela chung ni zawhah chuan kan chhuak a, kan kal ta a, unaute chuan an zain, an nupui fanaute nen daipawn thlengin min thlah a; tin, tuifinriat kamah chuan kan thingthi a, kan tawngtai a." 
Acts21:6 Tin, ""Dam takin,"" kan inti a, lawngah chuan kan chuang a; anni erawh chu an inah an haw leh ta a." 
Acts21:7 Tin, Turi khua ata lawnga kan kal zawh chuan Ptolemai khua kan thleng a, unaute chibai kan buk a, an hnenah ni khat kan cham a." 
Acts21:8 Tin, atukah chuan kan chhuak a, Kaisari khua kan thleng a; tin, Chanchin Tha hriltu Philipa inah kan lut a, ani chu pasarihte zinga pakhat a ni a, a hnenah kan cham a." 
Acts21:9 Chu mi chuan fanu pali a nei a, nula thianghlim an ni a, Pathian thu an hril thin a." 
Acts21:10 Tin, chutah chuan ni tam tak kan cham a, chu mi lai chuan Judai ram ata a hming Agaba zawlnei pakhat a lo chhuk a." 
Acts21:11 Tin, kan hnenah a lo kal a, Paula kawnghren a la a, a kete, a kutte amahin a inphuar a, tin, "" 'Jerusalem khuaa Judate chuan hetiang hian he kawnghren neitu hi an phuar ang a, Jentailte kutah an pe bawk ang,' Thlarau Thianghlimin a ti e,"" a ti a." 
Acts21:12 Tin, chung thu chu kan hriat veleh keini leh chu mi khuaa mite chuan Paula chu Jerusalem khuaa han kal lo turin kan ngen chiam a." 
Acts21:13 Tin, Paula chuan a chhang a, ""Eng in ti nge ni, in tah in tah a, ka lung in tihchhiat? Lalpa Isua hming avang chuan Jerusalem khuaa phuar chang ka huam lo a, thih pawh ka huam a sin,"" a ti a." 
Acts21:14 Tin, thlem rual a nih loh ahnu chuan, ""Lalpa thu thu ni rawh se,"" kan ti a, kan bang ta a." 
Acts21:15 Tin, chu mi hnuah chuan kan bungrua kan siam a, Jerusalem khuaah kan han kal a." 
Acts21:16 Kaisari khuaa mi zirtirho tute emaw kan hnenah an kal ve a, anni chuan a hming Mnasona, zirtir hmasa pawl, Kupra thliarkara mi pakhat kan thlen in pa tur chu an hruai ve a." 
Acts21:17 Tin, Jerusalem khua kan thlen chuan unauten hlim takin min lo lawm a." 
Acts21:18 A tukah chuan Paula hoin Jakoba hnenah kan lut a; chutah chuan kohhran upate zawng zawng pawh an awm a. 
Acts21:19 Tin, Paulan anmahni chibai a buk zawhin, a rawngbawlna hmanga Pathianin Jentailte zinga thil a tihtir apiang chu akip akawiin a sawi a." 
Acts21:20 Tin, unaute chuan chung thu chu an hriatin Pathian an chawimawi a; tin, Paula hnenah chuan, ""Unaupa, Judate zinga ringtute tamzia i hmu a; an zain Dan chungah thahnem an ngai bawk a;" 
Acts21:21 tin, nangin Jentailte zinga Juda awmte zawng zawng hnenah chuan an fate serh tan loh tur leh dan anga awm loh tur, tiin Mosia thlauhthlakna tur i zirtir thin tih mi kaah i thu hi an hria a." 
Acts21:22 Engtin nge ni ta ang le? I lo thleng tih an hre dawn ngei si a. 
Acts21:23 Chuvangin i hnena kan sawi ang hian ti ang che: Thutiam nei mipa pali kan hnenah an awm; 
Acts21:24 chung mite chu hruai la, an hnenah inthian fai ve la, an lu an meh theih nan an tan sum seng rawh; chutichuan mi zawng zawngin mi kaa i thu an hriat apiang kha, tih tak a ni lo tih an hria ang a, nangmah ngei pawh Dan zawhin fel takin i awm ve zawk tih an hre dawn nia." 
Acts21:25 Jentailte zinga ringtute chungchang thu zawng, milem biakna thil ei kawngah te, sa thisen ei kawngah te, sa rehhlum ei kawngah te, inngaih kawngah te an inthiarfihlim tur a ni, tiin kan rel a, kan ziak tawh kha,"" an ti a." 
Acts21:26 Tin, atukah chuan Paulan mipate chu a hruai a,an hnenah a inthian fai ve a, Pathian biak inah chuan a lut a, an tana sa talh theuh tur a peksak hma loh chuan inthen faina ni an nei rih dawn tih puithiam hnenah a hrilh lawk a." 
Acts21:27 Tin, ni sarih chu a tlin dawn ruaiin Asia rama Judate chuan Paula chu Pathian biak inah chuan an hmu a, mipui zawng zawng an fuihpawrh a, ani chu an man a." 
Acts21:28 an au a, ""Israel mite u, min pui rawh u! He mi hi ram tinah mi zawng zawng hnenah, Juda mi te, Dan te, he in te sawichhetu kha a nih hi; chu lo pawh, Pathian biak inah hian Grik mite pawh a luhpui a, he in thianghlim hi a tibawlhhlawh tawh a ni,"" an ti a." 
Acts21:29 (Chu mi hmain khuaah chuan Ephesi khuaa mi Trophima chu a hnenah an hmu a, Paulan chu mi chu Pathian biak inah a luhpui an ring a ni)." 
Acts21:30 Tin, akhuain an phu ta mur mur a, mite chu an tlan khawm a; Paula an man a, Pathian biak in ata an hnuk chhuak a; kawngte chu an khar ta nghal a." 
Acts21:31 Tin, ani chu tihhlum an tum lai chuan Jerusalem khuaa mi zawng zawng an buai tih thu chu sipai pawl hotu lal ber hnen a han thleng a." 
Acts21:32 Tin, ani chuan sipaite leh sipai za hotute a hruai ta nghal a, an hnenah a tlan chhuk a; tin, anni chuan hotu lal ber leh sipaite chu an hmuh veleh Paula vuak an bang ta a." 
Acts21:33 Tin, hotu lal ber chuan a rawn hnaih a, Paula chu a chelh a,khaidiat pahnih buntir thu a pe a; tu nge a nih a, eng nge a tih a zawt a." 
Acts21:34 Tin, mipui zingah chuan a then thu khatin an au a, a then thu dangin an au a; tin, bengchheng avangin a ziazang a hre thei lo a, kulhbinga hruai luh thu a pe a," 
Acts21:35 Tin, Paulan kailawn a thlen laiin mipuiin an beih nasat avangin sipaiten ani chu an chawi kang zel a;" 
Acts21:36 mi zawng zawngin, ""Tiboral rawh u,"" tia auin an zui huai huai si a." 
Acts21:37 Tin, Paula chu kulhbingah chuan an hruai luh dawn laiin, ani chuan sipai hotu lal ber hnenah chuan, ""I hnenah thu kamkhat ka sawi thei ang em?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Grik tawng i hria elo?" 
Acts21:38 Hmana mite fuihpawrha mihring philhmangho sangli thlalera hruai chhuaktu Aigupta rama mi kha i ni lo em ni? a ti a. 
Acts21:39 Paula erawh chuan, ""Juda mi, Kilikia rama Tarsa khuaa mi ka ni, khaw namena awm ka ni lo; mi khawngaih la, mi zawng zawng hnenah thu mi hrilhtir rawh,"" a ti a.Tin,a remtih veleh Paula chu kailawnah chuan a ding a,mi zawng zawng ngawihna'n a kutin a zap a; tin, an ngawih thuap veleh Hebrai tawngin an hnenah:" 
Acts21:40 Tin,a remtih veleh Paula chu kailawnah chuan a ding a,mi zawng zawng ngawihna'n a kutin a zap a; tin, an ngawih thuap veleh Hebrai tawngin an hnenah:" 
Acts22:1 Unaute u, pate u, tunah in hnenah ka thiamna thu ka hrilh dawn che u hi ngaithla rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Acts22:2 Tin, Hebrai tawngin an hnenah thu a sawi tih an hriat veleh an ngawi lehzual a; tin, ani chuan," 
Acts22:3 Juda mi ka ni, Kilikia rama Tarsa khuaa piang ka ni, nimahsela he khuaah hian Gamaliela ke bulah chuan zira sei lian ka ni, min thlahtute Dan awmze khermei tak chu zir thina awm ka ni, vawiina nangmahni zawng zawng ang tak hian, Pathian tana thahnem bawk thin ka ni." 
Acts22:4 Tin, he Kawnga mite hi tihlum hial khawpin ka tiduhdah thin a, ahmei apain ka phuar a, tan inah ka khungtir thin a." 
Acts22:5 Puithiam Lalber leh upate zawng zawng pawhin chung thu chu mi hriatpui thei e, an hnen ata pawh unaute pek atan lehkha ka hmuh kha; tin, Damaska khuaa awm apiang an hrem atan, phuar chunga Jerusalem khuaa hruai turin ka kal kha." 
Acts22:6 Tin, ka kal a, Damaska khaw kiang kan thlen chuan chawfak hun laiin, thawk lehkhatan van ata eng nasa tak ka velan a lo eng ta phut a;" 
Acts22:7 tin, leiah ka tlu a, ka hnenah, ""Saula, Saula, nangin engati nge mi tihduhdah hi?"" tiin aw ka hria a." 
Acts22:8 Tin, keiin, 'Lalpa, tu nge i nih?' tiin ka chhang a. Tin, ani chuan ka hnenah, 'Nazaret Isua, i tihduhdah hi ka ni,' a ti a." 
Acts22:9 Tin, ka thiante chuan eng chu an hmu na a, mi betu aw erawh chu an hre lo." 
Acts22:10 Tin, keiin, 'Lalpa, eng nge ka tih ang?' ka ti a. Tin, Lalpa chuan ka hnenah, 'Tho la, Damaska khuaah lut rawh, thil zawng zawng i tih tura ruat apiang an hrilh ang che,' a ti a." 
Acts22:11 Tin, chu eng ropui avang chuan khua ka hmu thei ta lo a, ka thianten kutin min kai a, Damaska khuaah ka lut ta a." 
Acts22:12 Tin, mi pakhat, Anania, Dan kawnga Pathian ngaihsak leh chuta Juda awmte zawng zawng hnena hmingtha chu," 
Acts22:13 ka hnenah a lo kal a, ka kiangah a ding a, ka hnenah, 'Ka nau Saul, mit var nei rawh,' mi ti a. Tin, chu mi lai tak chuan amah ka han hmu ta a." 
Acts22:14 Tin, ani chuan, 'Min thlahtute Pathianin a duhzawng hriaah leh Mi Feltaka chu hmu a, a tawngka hriaah pawh a ruat tawh che a." 
Acts22:15 I hmuh leh i hriat thu-ah khan mi zawng zawng hnenah ama thu hretu i ni ang. 
Acts22:16 Tin, engati nge i la awm reng le? Tho la, ama hming lam chungin baptisma chang la, i sualte tlengfai ta che,' mi ti a." 
Acts22:17 Tin, Jerusalem khuaah hian ka hawn leh hnuin Pathian biak ina ka tawngtai laiin engloin mi zel a;" 
Acts22:18 tin, 'Hmanhmawh la, Jerusalem khua ata chhuak rawh; ka chanchin i hrilh tur chu an pawm dawh loh hi,' a mi tih lai ka hmu a." 
Acts22:19 Tin, keiin, 'Lalpa, inkhawmna in tina a ringtu che apiang, tan inah ka khung a, ka vuak thin kha an hre si a;" 
Acts22:20 tin, i thu hretu Stephana thisen an chhuah lai khan kei pawh a kiangah ka ding a, ka lo remti a, a tihlumtute puante ka veng hlawm bawk a ni,'ka ti a." 
Acts22:21 Tin, ani chuan, 'Kal rawh, heta tangin hla taka Jentailte hnenah ka tir zawk ang che,' mi ti ta a,"" a ti a." 
Acts22:22 Tin, chu thu thleng chuan an ngaithla a; tin, aw ring takin, ""Mi hetiang nek hi khawvel ata tiboral rawh u; nung tui a ni lo e,"" an ti ta a." 
Acts22:23 Tin, an au a, an puante an hlip a, an paih a, vaivut an vanvawrh a;" 
Acts22:24 chutichuan sipai hotu lal ber chuan Paula chu kulhbing chhunga hruai luh thu a pe a, a chungah chuti ema an au chhan chu hriatna'n vuak chunga chhal turin a ti a." 
Acts22:25 Tin, savun hruia an phuar belhbawm zawhin, Paulan a kianga ding sipai za hotu hnenah chuan, ""Rom mi reng reng in vaw thei em ni, thiam l oh chantir hnu pawh ni leh nghal si lo?"" a ti a." 
Acts22:26 Tin, sipai za hotu chuan chu chu a hriat veleh, sipai hotu lal ber hnenah chuan a kal a. ""I thil tih tur hi fimkhur teh khai! He mi hi Rom mi a lo ni e,"" a ti a, a hrilh a." 
Acts22:27 Tin, sipai hotu lal ber chu a lo kal a, a hnenah, ""Rom mi i ni maw? Mi hrilh rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Ni e,"" a ti a." 
Acts22:28 Tin, sipai hotu lal ber chuan, ""Chu mi khuaa mi ni turin kei zawngin tangka tam tak ka seng a sin,"" a ti a, a chhang a. Tin, Paula chuan, ""Kei zawng Rom mi renga piang ka ni,"" a ti a." 
Acts22:29 Tichuan nghaisa chunga chhal tumte chuan ani chu an kalsan ta nghal a; sipai hotu lal ber pawhin Rom mi a ni tih a hriat chuan a hlau a, a phuar avangin a hlau bawk a.Tin, atukah Judaten chuan eng vangin nge Paula an hek tih hriat fel tumin, sipai hotu lal ber chuan ani chu a phelh a, puithiam lalte leh roreltu zawng zawngte inkhawm tur thu a pe a, Paula a hruai chhuak a, an hmaah a dintir ta a." 
Acts22:30 Tin, atukah Judaten chuan eng vangin nge Paula an hek tih hriat fel tumin, sipai hotu lal ber chuan ani chu a phelh a, puithiam lalte leh roreltu zawng zawngte inkhawm tur thu a pe a, Paula a hruai chhuak a, an hmaah a dintir ta a." 
Acts23:1 Tin, Paula chuan roreltute chu a en reng a, ""Unaute u, vawiin thlengin Pathian mithmuha tha lama ka hriat apiang tiin ka awm thin e,"" a ti a." 
Acts23:2 Tin, puithiam Lalber Anania chuan Paula kianga dingte hnenah a kaa bensak tur a ti a." 
Acts23:3 Tin, Paula chuan a hnenah, ""Nang lung pal hnawih varpa, Pathianin a beng zawk ang che; nang, Dan anga mi ngaituah turin i thu a, Dan lo anga mi ben tur i ti vei a ni maw?"" a ti a." 
Acts23:4 Tin, a kianga miten, ""Pathian Puithiam Lalber i hau vei maw?"" an ti a." 
Acts23:5 Tin, Paulan, ""Unaute u, Puithiam Lalber a ni tih ka hre lo a ni; 'I chipuite hotu chungah thu tha lo sawi suh,'tih pawh ziak a ni si a,""a ti a." 
Acts23:6 Tin, Paulan a then Saddukaite, a then Pharisaite an ni tih a lo hriatin roreltute zingah chuan a au a, ""Unaute u, Pharisai ka ni, Pharisai fapa pawh ka ni; mitthi thawhleh beiseina thu-ah chhuahchhalin ka awm a nih hi,"" a ti a." 
Acts23:7 Tin, chu chu a sawi zawh chuan Pharisaite leh Saddukaite an lo inhnial a, roreltute chu an inkhing ta a." 
Acts23:8 (Saddukaihoten, ""Mitthi thawhlehna reng a awm lo, vantirhkohte, thlaraute pawh a awm hek lo,"" an ti thin; Pharisaihote erawh chuan chu mi kawng pahnih chu a awm tih an awih si a)." 
Acts23:9 Tichuan nasa takin an buai ta a; Pharisaite lama mi lehkhaziaktute thenkhat an ding a, an hnial a, ""He mi hi engmah a sualna kan hre lo e; thlarau pawhin vantirhkoh pawhin ani hi bia pawh ni se la, eng nge pawi ang?""an ti a." 
Acts23:10 Tin, an inhnial nasat deuh deuh avangin sipai hotu lal ber chuan Paula an pawh sawm a hlau a, sipaite hnenah, zuk kala an zing ata kulhbinga han hruai chho lui turin a ti a." 
Acts23:11 Tin, azanah chuan Lalpa chu Paula kiangah a ding a, ""Thlamuang takin awm rawh, Jerusalem khuaa ka thu i hriattir ang bawk hian Rom khuaah pawh i hriattir tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Acts23:12 Tin, ni a chhuahin Judate an tangrual a, Paula an thah hma loh zawng engmah eia bar lo turin chhia an inchham a." 
Acts23:13 Chu mi thu phiartute chu sawmli aia tam an ni. 
Acts23:14 Tin, anni chu puithiam lalte leh upate hnenah an kal a, ""Paula kan thah hma loh zawng engmah tem lo turin chhia kan chham ta vek a ni." 
Acts23:15 Chuvangin nangnin, roreltute nen a thu fel lehzuala ngaihtuah tum angin, in hnena hruai thla turin sipai hotu lal ber hnenah pehhel deuhin han sawi rawh u; in kiang hnai a thlen hma pawhin, keini amah that turin kan inpeih reng e,"" an ti a." 
Acts23:16 Nimahsela Paula farnua fapain an chan thu chu a lo hria a, kulhbingah chuan a va lut a, Paula chu a va hrilh a." 
Acts23:17 Tin, Paula chuan sipai zahotu pakhat a ko a, ""He tlangval hi hotu lal ber hnenah chuan hruai rawh; a hnenah thu eng emaw sawi tur a nei a ni awm e,"" a ti a." 
Acts23:18 Chutichuan sipai hotu lal ber hnenah chuan a va hruai a, ""Paula, mi tang khan mi ko a, he tlangval hi i hnena rawn hruai turin mi tir a, i hnenah thu eng emaw sawi tur a nei a ni awm e,"" a ti a." 
Acts23:19 Tin, sipai hotu lal ber chuan a kutah a chelh a, a kal hranpui a, arukin, ""Engnge mi hrilh tur i neih chu?"" tiin a zawt a." 
Acts23:20 Tin, ani chuan, ""Paula thu chu fel lehzual deuha i ngaihtuah tur angin naktukah roreltute hnena hruai chhuk turin Judaten dil che an remti tlang a." 
Acts23:21 Nimahsela an thu lo awih suh ang che; an zinga mi sawmli aia tamin an chang reng a, chu mite chuan amah an thah hma loh chu engmah eia bar lo turin chhia an chham a; tunah hian i thu nghakin inpeih sain an awm reng a ni,"" a ti a." 
Acts23:22 Tin, sipai hotu lal ber chuan tlangval chu a kaltir a, ""Heng thu hi mi lo hriattir tawh tih tumah hrilh suh ang che,"" a ti tlat a." 
Acts23:23 Tin, sipai za hotu pahnih a ko a, ""Zan mut reh hunah Kaisari khaw thlenga kal turin sipai zahnih nen, sakawr chung chuang mi sawmsarih nen, fei keng mi zahnih nen siam rawh u,"" a ti a;" 
Acts23:24 tin, Ram Awptu Felika hnenah chuan him taka an thlentir theihna'n Paula an chuantirna turin sate lo siam tur a ti bawk a." 
Acts23:25 Tin, hetiangin lehkha a ziak a:" 
Acts23:26 Klaudia Lusian Felika, Ram Awptu tha ber chibai a buk e." 
Acts23:27 He mi hi Judaten an man a, an thah dawn laiin an hnenah sipaite hruaiin ka kal a, Rom mi a ni tih ka hria a, ka chhan chhuak ta a." 
Acts23:28 Tin, an hekna chhan hriat ka duh a, an roreltute hnenah ka hruai chhuk a;" 
Acts23:29 chutichuan an dan thu engahte emaw hek a ni tih ka hria a, nimahsela an hekna thu-ah thihna leh phuarna khawp meuh turin engmah ka hre si lo." 
Acts23:30 Tin, Judaten amah an chang tih miin mi hriattir veleh i hnenah ani hi ka rawn tir ta nghal a ni, a hektute pawh a chunga thupawi an neih apiang i hmaa sawi turin thu ka pe bawk a,"" tiin." 
Acts23:31 Chutichuan sipaite chuan a thupek ang chuan Paula chu azan azanin an hruai a, Antipatri khua an thlenpui a." 
Acts23:32 Tin, atukah chuan sakawr chung chuang mite chu a hnena kal zel turin an kirsan a, kulhbingah chuan an kal leh ta a;" 
Acts23:33 tin, anni chu Kaisari khua chu an thleng a, Ram Awptu hnenah lehkha chu an pe a, Paula pawh a hmaah an dintir a." 
Acts23:34 Tin, Ram Awptu chuan a chhiar zawhin Paula awmna ram a zawt a. Tin, Kilikia rama mi a ni tih a hriat veleh,""A hektu che pawh chu an lo thlen hunah i thupawi ka ngaihtuah ang,"" a ti a. Tin, Heroda inah ven tur thu a pe a." 
Acts23:35 A hektu che pawh chu an lo thlen hunah i thupawi ka ngaihtuah ang,"" a ti a. Tin, Heroda inah ven tur thu a pe a." 
Acts24:1 Tin, ni nga chinah puithiam Lalber Anania a lo thleng chhuk a, upa tute emaw nen, a hming Tertulla thusawi thiam pakhat nen; tin, Paula chunga thupawi chu Ram awptu hnenah an sawi a." 
Acts24:2 Tin, Paula chu an koh chhuah hnu chuan Tertulla chuan amah a hek tan a: ""Felik tha ber, nangmaha zarah thlamuang em emin kan awm avang leh, i enkawl avanga he chite tan hian sualte khap thatin a awm thin avangin," 
Acts24:3 kumkhuain khawiah pawh lungawi takin kan lawm thin. 
Acts24:4 Amaherawhchu i tan ninawm lutuk nih ka duh lo a, i nunnemnain thu kamkhat erawh chu min ngaihthlaksak turin ka ngen a che." 
Acts24:5 He mi hi mi huatthlala tak, khawvela Judateho zawng zawng chawk buaitu leh Nazaret mite pawla an tupa ber pakhat a nih kan hria a;" 
Acts24:6 Pathian biak in tihbawlhhlawh a tum bawk a; chuvangin kan man a," 
Acts24:7 kan dan anga a chungthu relsak kan tum a ni a; mahse, sipai hotu lal ber Lusia a lo kal a, kan kuta ta min lak luihsak a, amah hektute i hmaa lo kal turin thu min pe ta a ni," 
Acts24:8 nangmah ngeiin chhuahchhalin kan hekna thil zawng zawng hi ama lakah i hre thei ang,"" a ti a." 
Acts24:9 Tin, Judate pawh chuan,""Chung thu chu chutiang chu a ni,"" tiin an tanpui ve a." 
Acts24:10 Tin, Ram Awptu chuan thu sawi tura Paula chu kuta a zah veleh Paula chuan, ""Nang kum tam tak he chite rorelsaktu hi i nih ka hriat avangin lawm takin ka thiamna thu ka sawi dawn hi." 
Acts24:11 Jerusalem khuaah Pathian be turin ka han kal achin chu ni sawm leh ni hnih lo liam a la ni lo ang tih I la hre thei ang; 
Acts24:12 Pathian biak inah pawh, inkhawmna inahte pawh, khuaah pawh tumah ka hnial leh mipui ka fuihpawrh annin mi hmu hek lo;" 
Acts24:13 tunah pawh an mi hekna thu hi i hriatah a bul an chhuichhuak thei hek lo ang.
