Acts24:14 Nimahsela he thu hi i hnenah ka inpuang ang, 'pawl hrang' an tih Kawng dan angin min thlahtute Pathian ka be thin. Dan leh Zawlneite Lehkhabua ziak zawng zawng ringin;" 
Acts24:15 tin, mi felte leh fel lote thawhlehna a awm ang tih Pathian lamah ka beisei a, henghote pawh hian chung chu an awih ve bawk si a;" 
Acts24:16 chu mi avang chuan Pathian hnen lamah leh mihring hnenah pawh rilru sual lo mawlh hi vawn fo ka tum thin. 
Acts24:17 Tin, kum tam tak hnuah hian ka chipuite hnenah thilpek tur leh sa talh tur rawn kengin ka lo kal a;" 
Acts24:18 tin, chung thil ka pek lai chuan mipui tel loin, bengchheng loin, Pathian biak inah thianghlimin mi hmu a." 
Acts24:19 Nimahsela chutah chuan Asia rama mi Juda tute emaw an awm kha, chungte chuan ka chungah thu an neih chuan hetah hian i hmaa awmin mi hek tur a ni." 
Acts24:20 A nih loh leh, he'ng mite ngei hian roreltute hmaa ka din lai khan, ka tihsual eng nge an hmuh sawi rawh se," 
Acts24:21 he thu kamkhat avang hian a nih nghal loh chuan, an zinga dingin, 'Mitthi thawhlehna thu-ah ka awm a nih hi,' ka tih kha,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Acts24:22 Tin, Felika chuan Kawng thu chu a lo hre hle tawh a, ""Sipai hotu lal ber Lusia chu a lo thlen chhuk hunah in thu ka la rem ang,"" tiin, thu chu a dah ta rih a." 
Acts24:23 Tin, Paula chu a duat deuh a, a thiante rawngbawlsak khap lo a, ventir turin sipai za hotu hnenah chuan thu a pe a." 
Acts24:24 Tin, ni eng zat emaw chinan Felika chu a lo kal leh a, a nupui Drusilli, Juda hmeichhia nen, Paula chu a kohtir a, Krista Isua rinna thu chu a ngaithla a." 
Acts24:25 Tin, Paula chuan felna thu te, insum thute, rorelna lo la awm tur thute khun taka a hrilh laiin Felika chuan hlauhawm a ti em a, ""Kal leh ta rih tawh, hun remchang ka neih hunah ka ko ang che,"" a ti a." 
Acts24:26 Paulan tangka a pek a beisei bawk a, chuvangin a ko zing deuh a, a be thin a ni.Nimahsela kum hnih a vei hnuin Porkia Festan Felika chu a thlak ta a; tin, Felika chuan Judate zingah hmingthat a duh a, Paula chu phuar sain a hnutchhiah ta a." 
Acts24:27 Nimahsela kum hnih a vei hnuin Porkia Festan Felika chu a thlak ta a; tin, Felika chuan Judate zingah hmingthat a duh a, Paula chu phuar sain a hnutchhiah ta a." 
Acts25:1 Chutichuan, Festa chuan ram chu a awp ta a; tin, ni thum chinah Kaisari khua atang chuan Jerusalem khuaah a han kal a." 
Acts25:2 Tin, puithiam lalte leh Juda puipate chuan a hnenah Paula chung chang thu chu a chhe lamin an lo hriattir a." 
Acts25:3 Jerusalem khuaa han hruaitir turin khawngaihna an lo ngen chiam bawk a; kalkawnga lo chana thah an tum a. 
Acts25:4 Nimahsela Festa chuan, ""Paula chu Kaisari khuaah an veng reng a ni, kei pawh rei lo tean ka haw dawn e." 
Acts25:5 Chuvangin chu mi chuan sualna a neih chuan in zinga thu nei apiangin mi zui chhuk se la, hek rawh se,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Acts25:6 Tin, an zingah chuan ni riat emaw, ni sawm emaw lo liam chu a cham lo a, Kaisari khuaah a haw thla ta a; tin, atukah chuan rorelna thutphahah a thu a, Paula chu rawn hruai turin thu a pe a." 
Acts25:7 Tin, ani chu a lo thlen chuan Jerusalem khuaa mi Juda lo chhukte chu a velah an ding a, a chungah thupawi tam tak rit tak tak an sawi an sawi a, a bul erawh chu an chhui chhuak thei si lo a;" 
Acts25:8 tin, Paula chuan a thiamna thu a sawi a, ""Judate Dan chungchangah te,Pathian biakin thu-ah te,Kaisara chungahte pawh thil reng reng ka tisuallo ve,""a ti a." 
Acts25:9 Nimahsela Festa chuan Judate zinga hmingthat a duh a, Paula hnenah chuan, ""Jerusalem khuaa han kal a, khitah ka hmaa he'ng thu hi rel i duh em?"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Acts25:10 Paula erawh chuan, ""Kaisara rorelna thutphah hmaa ro mi relsakna turah hian ka din hi; Judate chungah thil engmah ka tisual lo, nang pawhin chu chu i hre chiang hle si a." 
Acts25:11 Mi sual ka nih a, thihna khawp meuh thil ti ka nih chuan thih pawh ka hnial lo e; nimahsela he'ng ho mi hekna thil hi abul engmah a awm loh chuan tumahin an hnenah mi pe thei lo ang. Kaisara hnenah ka thlen ang,"" a ti a." 
Acts25:12 Tin, Festa chuan a rorelpuite a biak rawn zawhin, ""Kaisara hnenah thlen i tum vei a, Kaisara hnenah i kal mawlh ang chu,"" tiin a chhang a." 
Acts25:13 Tin, ni eng zat emaw chinah chuan lal Agrippa leh Berniki chu Kaisari khua an lo thleng a, Festa chibai an buk a." 
Acts25:14 Tin, ni tam tak chutah chuan an cham avangin Festa chuan Paula thupawi chu lal hnenah chuan a sawi a, ""Felika khan mi tang tu emaw a hnutchhiah a;" 
Acts25:15 Jerusalem khuaa ka awm lai khan puithiam lalte leh Juda upaten a chungchang thu mi hrilh a, thiam loh chantir an ngen a." 
Acts25:16 Tin, keiin an hnenah, 'An heka leh a hektute an inhmatawn a,an hekna kawngah a thiamna thu sawi vena remchang a hmuh hma loh chuan mi reng reng hrem tura thlah hi Rom khuaa mi dan a ni lo e,' tiin ka chhang a." 
Acts25:17 Tin, heta an lo thlenin, rei rial loin atukah chuan rorelna thutphahah ka thu a, chu mi chu han hruai turin thu ka pe a." 
Acts25:18 Tin, a hektute an din laiin, ka rin ang rengin a chungah sualna thupawi engmah reng an sawi si lo a;" 
Acts25:19 an sakhaw dante leh Isua, mi pakhat thi tawh, Paula chuan,'A nung leh a ni,' tiin a sawi a, chutih avang chuan a chungah thubuaite an nei a lo ni zawk a." 
Acts25:20 Tin, keiin chung thute chu ngaihtuah ngaihna reng ka hre lo a, Jerusalem khuaa kala khita a chung thu chu relsak a duh leh duh loh ka zawt a." 
Acts25:21 Nimahsela Paula chuan Lalber rela khek a ngen ta zawk a, chuvangin Kaisara hnena ka kaltir theih hma loh chuan veng turin thu ka pe a,"" a ti a." 
Acts25:22 Tin, Agrippa chuan Festa hnenah chuan, ""Kei pawh chu mi thusawi chu ngaihthlak ka lo duh fo reng a ni,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Naktukah a thusawi i ngaithla ang chu,"" a ti a." 
Acts25:23 Chutichuan atukah chuan Agrippa leh Berniki chu ropui takin an lo kal a, thusawina inah an lo lut a, sipaite hotu liante nen, khuaa mi tha deuh deuhte nen; tin, Festa thuin Paula an rawn hruai luhtir a." 
Acts25:24 Tin, Festa chuan, ""Lal Agrippa leh heta kan zinga awm zawng zawngte u, he mi in hmuh hi a ni, a chungchang thua Judate zawng zawngin an zain nung tawh lo tur, tia auva Jerusalem khuaah leh heta mi biakna kha." 
Acts25:25 Nimahsela thihna khawp meuhin engmah a ti lo tih ka hria a; tin, amahin Lalber hnena thlen a tum avangin tirh ka tum a ni;" 
Acts25:26 nimahsela a thu mumal engmah ka lal hnenah ziak tur ka hre si lo a. Chuvangin in hmaah ka rawn hruai chhuah hi, Lal Agripp, nangma hmaa rawn hruai bik deuh ka ni e, chhuahchhal zawha eng emaw tal ziak tur ka hmuh theihna'n.Mi tang, Lalber hnena tirha a chunga an hekna thu hriat teltir loh chu atthlak niin ka hre si a,"" a ti a." 
Acts25:27 Mi tang, Lalber hnena tirha a chunga an hekna thu hriat teltir loh chu atthlak niin ka hre si a,"" a ti a." 
Acts26:1 Tin, Agrippa chuan Paula hnenah chuan, ""I thiamna thu i sawi thei e,""a ti a. Tin, Paula chuan a kut a phar a, a thiamna thu a sawi a;" 
Acts26:2 Lal Agripp, Judaten mi hekna zawng zawnga ka thiamna thu vawiinah hian I hmaa ka sawi dawn avang hian lawmin ka inhria;" 
Acts26:3 hei hi ka lawmna ber a ni, Judate zingah dan leh thubuai zawng zawng kawnga I fin ngawt avangin:chuvangin muang taka mi ngaihthlaksak turin ka ngen a che." 
Acts26:4 Atira ka naupan lai ata ka chite zingah leh Jerusalem khuaa ka awm dan kha Juda zawng zawngin an hria e; 
Acts26:5 a tir ata ka chanchin an hria e, khatia kan sakhaw pawl khermei ber dan pangngaia Pharisaia ka awm kha, an duh chuanin mi sawipui thei a ni." 
Acts26:6 Tin, Pathianin min thlahtute hnena thu a tiam kha beisei kawng thu-ah hetah tunah rorelsaka ka din hi;" 
Acts26:7 chu thutiam chu kan hnam sawm leh hnam hnihin, achhun azanin Pathian rawng thahnemngai taka bawlin hmuh an beisei thin. Aw lalpa, chu mi beisei thu avang chuan Judaten mi hek a nih hi." 
Acts26:8 Pathianin mitthite a kai tho tih hi engati nge awihawm loa in ruat ni? 
Acts26:9 Kei pawhin Nazaret Isua hming kalh lamin thil tam tak ti i la thain ka lo ring thin a. 
Acts26:10 Chu ang chu Jerusalem khuaah ka ti bawk thin a; tin, puithiam lalte hnenah thu ka hmu a, mi thianghlimte zinga mi tam tak tan inahte ka khung bawk thin a; tin, an tihhlum laiin tihhlum remti lamah ka tang bawk thin a." 
Acts26:11 Tin, inkhawmna in tinah ka hrem fo a, Isua thu sawttir ka tum hram thin a; tin, an chungah ka kawlh em em a, ram dang khaw thleng pawhin ka tiduhdah thin a." 
Acts26:12 Chutiang ti turin puithiam lalte thu hmu leh an tirhna lehkha kengin Damaska khuaah ka kal a; 
Acts26:13 tin, e, lalpa, ka kal laiin chawfak hun a ni a, van ata eng eng emaw, ni eng aia eng zawk, keimah leh ka kalpuite velah engin ka hmu a." 
Acts26:14 Tin, kan zain leiah kan tlu a, Hebrai tawngin, 'Saula, Saula, nangin engati nge mi tihduhdah ni? Chhunna tiang khen i tan a na e,' mi tiin aw ka hria a." 
Acts26:15 Tin, keiin, 'Lalpa tu nge i nih?' ka ti a. Tin, Lalpa chuan, 'Isua, I tihduhdah hi ka ni;" 
Acts26:16 nimahsela tho la, ding rawh; he'ng I thil hmuhte leh I hnena ka la inlarna tur thilte nen, chu mi rawngbawlah leh hretua siam tur chein I hnenah ka rawn inlar a nih hi;" 
Acts26:17 mi zawng zawng leh Jentailte kut ata ka chhanhim ang che; an mit tivar turin an hnenah ka tirh che hi," 
Acts26:18 chutichuan thim chu eng lamah an hawisan ang a, Setana thuneihna chu Pathian lamah an hawisan ang, sual ngaihhnathiamna an hmuhna'n leh mi rin avanga thianghlim tawhte zinga ro chan an neihna'n,' a ti a." 
Acts26:19 Chuvangin lal Agripp, vana mi inlara chu ka hnial lo a," 
Acts26:20 a tirin Damaska khuaa mite hnenah, chu mi hnuah chuan Jerusalem khuaa mite hnenah te, Judai ram tina mite hnenah te, Jentailte hnenah te pawh, sim hming pu tlaka thil ti a, sima Pathian lam an hawina turin ka hril zawk thin a ni." 
Acts26:21 Chung avang chuan a ni, Judaten Pathian biak inah mi mana tihhlum mi tum tak ni." 
Acts26:22 Nimahsela Pathian hnen atanga tanpuina ka hmuh avangin vawiin thlengin mi tete leh mi liante hnena thu hriattirin ka la awm reng a, zawlneite leh Mosia'n lo thleng tur an tih thu chauh lo chu thu dang sawi loin;" 
Acts26:23 khatia Krista-in hrehawm a tuar ang a, tin, mitthi zing ata a thawh leh avangin mi zawng zawng hnenah leh Jentailte hnenah pawh eng hmuhtirtu hmasa ber a ni ang, an tih thu kha,"" a ti a." 
Acts26:24 Tin, chutianga a thiamna thu a sawi laiin Festa chuan, aw ring takin, ""Paula, I a a ni; I zir tamnain a tia che a nih hi,"" a ti a." 
Acts26:25 Nimahsela Paula chuan, ""Festa tha ber, ka a lo a sin; thu dik tak leh thu fing tak ka sawi zawk a nih hi." 
Acts26:26 Heng thu hi lal hian a hria alawm, a hnenah pawh hlau loin ka sawi hi; he'ng thil hi engmah a hnenah zep a ni lo tih dik takin ka hria e; he'ng hi in kila tih a ni si lo." 
Acts26:27 Lal Agripp, zawlneite thu I awih em? I awih tih ka hria e,"" a ti a." 
Acts26:28 Tin, Agrippa chuan Paula hnenah, ""Rei lo te chauh thlema Kristiana mi siam I tum a nih hi!"" a ti a." 
Acts26:29 Tin, Paula chuan, ""Rei se la, rei suh se la, nang chauh ka ti lo, vawiina ka thu hretu zawng zawng pawh hi, keimah anga awm atan Pathian hnenah ka dil a ni, kawlte hi erawh chu bun ve loin,"" a ti a." 
Acts26:30 Tin, lal nen, Ram Awptu nen, Berniki nen, an hnena thute nen chuan an tho hlawm a;" 
Acts26:31 tin, an kal hrang a, an inbia a, ""He mi hian thihna leh kawl bunna khawp meuh thil engmah a lo tih loh hi,"" an ti a.Tin, Agrippan Festa hnenah, ""He mi hian Kaisara hnena thlen lo tiam tawh suh se la chuan a chhuak mai tur,"" a ti a." 
Acts26:32 Tin, Agrippan Festa hnenah, ""He mi hian Kaisara hnena thlen lo tiam tawh suh se la chuan a chhuak mai tur,"" a ti a." 
Acts27:1 Tin, Itali rama lawnga kan kal tur thu an tihtluk veleh, Paula leh mi tang dang tute emaw Awgusta pawla mi sipai za hotu a hming Julia an kawltir a." 
Acts27:2 Tin, Adramuttini khaw lawng, Asia ram tuifinriat kama khaw awmte tlawh turah chuan kan chuang a, tuifinriatah kankal ta a; Makedonia rama mi Aristarka, Thessalonika khuaa mi kan hnenah a awm a." 
Acts27:3 Tin, atukah Sidon khua kan tlawh a. Tin, Julia chuan Paula a titha hle a, intiharh turin a thiante hnenah a lentir a," 
Acts27:4 Tin, chuta tangin tuifinriatah kan kal leh a, thliin a ni lo lamah min nem avangin Kupra thliarkar phen thli up lamah kan tlan a." 
Acts27:5 Tin, Kilikia ram leh Pamphulia ram dep tuifinriat kan pelh hnuin, Lukia rama Mura khua kan thleng a." 
Acts27:6 Chutah chuan sipai za hotu chuan Aleksandria khaw lawng Itali ram tlawh tur chu a hmu a; chu miah chuan min chuantir a. 
Acts27:7 Tin, ni rei tak zawi zawiin kan kal a, Knidos khaw zawn harsa takin kan thleng hram hram a, thliin min hnar avangin Salmoni hrula Kret thliarkar phen thli up lamah kan tlan a;" 
Acts27:8 tin, harsa takin vaukam kan hrut a, Litengsawl Mawi an tih hmun chu kan thleng ta a; chu mi kiangah chuan Lasai khua a awm." 
Acts27:9 Tin, ni tam tak a ral tawh avang leh, lawnga kal a hlauhawm tawh avangin, (Chaw Nghei ni chu a lo pel tawh si a), Paula chuan anni chu a zilh a," 
Acts27:10 an hnenah, ""Pute u, lawnga tuna kal hi chhiatna leh boralna nasa tak a thleng dawn tih ka hria e, a sum leh lawng chungah chauh ka ti lo a, keimahni chungah pawh ka ti a ni,"" a ti a." 
Acts27:11 Nimahsela sipai za hotu chuan Paula thusawi ai chuan lawngpu leh lawng neitu thu a awih zawk a. 
Acts27:12 Tin, thlasik tuarna'n litengsawl chu a rem loh avangin a tam zawkin, chuta tanga tuifinriata kal chhuaha Phoiniki khua thlen hrama chuta thlasik tuar an rawtpui a; Phoiniki chu Kret thliarkara litengsawl pakhat a ni, hmar chhak leh chhim chhak chhawng a ni." 
Acts27:13 Tin, chhim thli chu zawi zawia a lo tleh veleh chuan, an duhzawng an hmu emaw an ti a, thirchakai chu an khai chhuak a, Kret thliarkar kam chu an hrut an hrut a." 
Acts27:14 Nimahsela rei lo te achinah khawmual lam atang chuan thli na tak a lo tleh chhuk ta a, chu thli chu Eurakuilo an ti thin a." 
Acts27:15 Tin, lawng chu a rawn nam fuh a, thli lam a hawi theih loh veleh kan thlah ta a, min len min len ta mai a." 
Acts27:16 Tin, a hming Klaudi thliarkar te tak te phen thli up lamah kan tlan a,harsa takin lawngleng kan hum thei hram a;" 
Acts27:17 tin, an kaih chhuah hnuin chhanna hruite an hmang a, lawng hnuai lamah an la vet a, an phuar a; tin, puanzarna engkim an titlu a, chutilochuan litengsawl Surti an tiha len luh an hlau a, chutichuan min len min len ta a." 
Acts27:18 Tin, atukah tuifawnin min vawrh nek avang chuan lawnga bungrua chu tuiah an paih tan ta a." 
Acts27:19 Tin, atuk lehah anmahni kut meuhin lawng bungrua an paih chhuak leh ta a." 
Acts27:20 Tin, ni rei tak, ni pawh, arsi pawh a lang lo a, thlipui namenin min nuai lo a, nun reng kan beisei tawh lo." 
Acts27:21 Tin, chaw ei loa rei tak an awm hnuin, Paula an zingah a ding a, ""Pute u, Kret thliarkarah khan phelh loin, ka thu kha awiha he'ng chhiat leh boralna hi thlen lo tur in ni na a le." 
Acts27:22 Nimahsela tunah pawh hian thlamuang taka awm turin ka fuih a che u; in zingah tumahin nunna in hloh dawn lo e, lawng erawh hi chu a bo dawn a ni." 
Acts27:23 A ta ka ni a, a rawng ka bawl thin Pathian kha, chu mi vantirhkoh pakhat nizan khan ka kiangah a lo ding a, ka hnenah," 
Acts27:24 'Paula, hlau suh, Kaisara hmaah i ding tur a ni; tin, ngai rawh, lawnga i hnena kal zawng zawngte pawh hi Pathianin a pe a che,' mi ti a ni." 
Acts27:25 Chuvangin pute u, thlamuang takin awm rawh u; Pathian ka ring e, mi hrilh ang zelin a awm dawn." 
Acts27:26 Nimahsela thliarkar engah emaw min len chhuak tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Acts27:27 Tin, Adria tuifinriatah thliin lehlam lehlamah min len min len a, zan sawm leh zan li a tlin zan chuan, zan laiah emaw, lawng mite chuan khawii khawmual emaw thleng dawnin an inhria a;" 
Acts27:28 chutichuan tui thuk lam an teh a, hlam sawmhnih niin an hria a; tin, rei lo tean an teh leh a, hlam sawm leh hlam ngain an hria a." 
Acts27:29 Tin, lawng mei lamah thirchakai pali an thlaka, chutilochuan lung chhe hmunah min len chhuak hlauh dah ang e, tih an hlau a; tin, khawvar hlan an nghakhlel hle mai a." 
Acts27:30 Tin, lawng mite chuan lawnghnar lamah thirchakaite thlak tur anga tiderin, lawngleng chu tuifinriatah an thlak a, lawng chu tlansan an tum a," 
Acts27:31 chu mi laiin Paula chuan sipai za hotu leh sipaite hnenah chuan, ""Hengho hi lawnga an awm reng loh chuan in him thei lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Acts27:32 Tichuan sipaite chuan lawngleng hruite chu an zai chat a, an thlah ta a." 
Acts27:33 Tin, khawvar dawn lai chuan Paulan mi zawng zawng chu chaw eiah a tir a, ""Vawiin hi ni sawm leh ni li a ni tawh, engmah ei loin in nghak a, in nghei reng a ni." 
Acts27:34 Chuvangin chaw ei atan ka tir chiam a che u; in damna tur a nih hi; in zingah tumah a samzai pakhat mah a boral lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Acts27:35 Tin, chu thu chu a sawi zawhin chhang a la a, mi zawng zawng hmaah Pathian hnenah lawmthu a sawi ta a; tin, a phel a, a ei tan ta a." 
Acts27:36 Tin, anni pawh thlamuang takin an awm a, chaw an ei ve ta a." 
Acts27:37 Tin, lawnga mi chu kan zain zahnih leh sawmsarih leh paruk kan ni a." 
Acts27:38 Tin, an ei kham chuan buh chu tuifinriatah an paih a,lawng an tizang deuh a." 
Acts27:39 Tin, ni a chhuah chuan khawmual chu khawii lai nge a nih an hre lo a; nimahsela khawii litengsawl emaw tiaupho nei an hmu a, chu mi chungah chuan, an theih chuan, lawng tlan chhuahtir an tum a." 
Acts27:40 Tin, thirchakai thlunnate chu an zai chat a, tuifinriatah an hnutchhiah a; chu mi rualin karherna phuarnate chu an phel a, hma lam puanzar chu thli chhem tur ziain an hnuk chho a, thiaupho chu an pan ta a." 
Acts27:41 Nimahsela tuizangkhauh pahnih intawhna hmunah kan lut hlauh a, lawng chu lei an suttir ta a; tichuan lawn ghnar lam chu a tang ta tlat a, tihchet zawh lohin a awm reng a, a mei lam erawh chu tuifawn a nasat avangin a kehsawm tan ta a." 
Acts27:42 Tin, sipaiten mi tangte chu tihhlum an rawt a, chutilochuan tui hleuh kaite an awm ang a, an tlanbo ang tih an hlau a." 
Acts27:43 Nimahsela sipai za hotu chuan Paula chhanhim a duh a,an thil tum chu a khap a; tui hleuh thiam apiang tuifinriatah zuan thlaka khawmual lo kai hmasa tur leh,mi dang chu, a then thingphek chungahte, a then lawng bungraw dang chungahte kai turin thu a pe a. Chutiang chuan an zain khawmualah him takin an kai ta vek a." 
Acts27:44 mi dang chu, a then thingphek chungahte, a then lawng bungraw dang chungahte kai turin thu a pe a. Chutiang chuan an zain khawmualah him takin an kai ta vek a." 
Acts28:1 Tin, kan kai zawh chuan thliarkar hming chu Meliti a ni tih kan lo hre ta a." 
Acts28:2 Tin, awze miten khawngaih namenin min khawngaih lo a; ruah a lo sur avang leh a vawh avangin mei an chhem a, kan zain min lo lawm a." 
Acts28:3 Tin, Paula chuan thing tel khat a fawm a, meiah a tuah a, a sat avangin rul a lo chhuak a, a kutah a chu a, a bet reng a." 
Acts28:4 Tin, awze mite chuan rannung a kuta inkhai reng chu an hmuhin, ""He mi hi tualthat a ni phawt e, tuifinriat atangin tlan chhuak mah se la Phubalatua chuan a nun a awih tawh lo a nih hi,"" an ti a." 
Acts28:5 Nimahsela ani chuan rannung chu meiah a thing thla a, engmah a ti lo a." 
Acts28:6 Anni erawh chuan a vun emaw thawklehkhata thia a tluk nghal an ring a; tin, rei tak an nghak reng a, engmah a ti lo tih an hriat chuan an rilru an lamlet a, ""Pathian a nih hi,"" an ti ta zawk a." 
Acts28:7 Tin, chu mi hmun kiangah chuan chu mi thliarkara lal ber a hming Publia ram a awm; chu mi chuan min lo lawm a, ni thum lawm takin min thleng a." 
Acts28:8 Tin, Publia pa khawsik leh santen veiin a lo mu reng a; tin, Paula a hnenah a lut a, a tawngtai a, a chungah a kutte a nghat a, a tidam ta a." 
Acts28:9 Chu chu a tih zawh chuan chu mi thliarkara mi dang na nei apiang chu an lo kal a, an dam ta hlawm a;" 
Acts28:10 chu mite chuan nasa takin min chawimawi a; tin, kan kal dawn chuan kan chakkhai apiang lawngah an dah hlawm a." 
Acts28:11 Tin, thla thum chinah, a hming Phir, Aleksandria khaw lawng, thlasika thliarkara awm tawh, chu mi lawngah chuan kan kal ta a." 
Acts28:12 Tin, Surakus khua kan tlawh a, chutah chuan ni thum kan cham a." 
Acts28:13 Chuta tangin kan kal kual a, Region khua kan thleng a; tin, ni khat chinah chhim thli a lo tleh a, atuk lehah Puteoli khua kan thleng leh a;" 
Acts28:14 chutah chuan unaute kan hmu a, an hnena ni sarih chaman min thlem a; chutiang chuan Rom khaw lamah kan kal ta zel a." 
Acts28:15 Tin, unauten kan chanchin an hriat veleh chuta tang chuan Appia Dawr leh Khualbuk Pathum chinah min hmuak turin an lo kal a; Paulan chu mite chu a hmuh chuan Pathian hnenah lawmthu a sawi a, a muang ta a." 
Acts28:16 Tin, Rom khuaa kan luh chuan Paula chu a vengtu sipai hnenah amah chauhva awm an phal a." 
Acts28:17 Tin, ni thum chinah Paula chuan Judate hotu deuh apiang a ko khawm a; tin, an rawn inkhawmin an hnenah, ""Unaute u, mi zawng zawng leh min thlahtute dan chunga engmah ka tih loh pawhin Jerusalem khua atangin Rom mite hnenah mi tantir a ni." 
Acts28:18 Tin, anni chuan mi chhuahchhal zawhin thihna khawp meuh ka chungah engmah a awm loh avangin thlah mi tum a." 
Acts28:19 Nimahsela Judaten chu chu an hnial avngin Kaisara hnena thlen lo thei ka ni ta lo a; nimahsela ka chite hekna neia ti ka ni lo e. 
Acts28:20 Chung kawngah chuan nangmahni hmuhah leh biak atan ka ko che u a ni; Israelte beisei ka tawmpui avanga he khaidiat hi bun ka ni si a,"" a ti a." 
Acts28:21 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""I chanchin Judai ram ata lehkhatein kan hmu hek lo, unaute tumahin heta lo kalin i chungah thupawi engmah an puang hek lo, sawi pawh an sawi hek lo." 
Acts28:22 Amaherawhchu he pawl hi ram tinah sawichhiat an ni si a, nangin engtin nge i ngaih hriat kan duh e,"" an ti a." 
Acts28:23 Tin, ni an tiam a, chu mi niah chuan a thlen inah a hnenah mi tam tak an lo kal a; zing atangin tlai lam thlengin an hnenah chu thu chu a hrilhfiah a, Pathian ram thu a hriattir a, Mosia Dan Lehkha thu leh Zawlneite Lehkhabu thuin Isua lamah anmahni a thlem a thlem a." 
Acts28:24 Tin, a thenin a thusawi chu an ring a, a thenin an ring lo a." 
Acts28:25 Tin, an inngeih ta lo a, Paulan thu kamkhat a sawi zawhin an kal chhuak ta a. A thusawi chu hei hi a ni; ""Thlarau Thianghlimin zawlnei Isaia kaan in thlahtute hnena a sawi kha, a dik ngawt mai," 
Acts28:26 He chite hnenah hian va sawi rawh: Beng zawngin in hre na ang a, a ngaihna erawh in hre tawp lo ang; Hmuh zawng in hmu na ang a, hriat erawh chu in hre tawp lo ang;" 
Acts28:27 He chite thinlung hi a lo chawlawl ta a, an bengte a lo ngawng deuh a, an maimichhing bawk a, 'Chutilochuan kan mitin kan hmu ang a, kan bengin kan hria ang a, kan thinlungin kan hre bawk ang a, kan hawi kir leh ang a, anin min tidam hlauh dah ang e,' an ti a, a tih kha." 
Acts28:28 Chutichuan Pathian chhandamna thu hi Jentailte hnena thawn a ni tih hre rawh u, anni zawngin ngaih pawh an ngaithla ang,"" a ti a." 
Acts28:29 Chu'ng thu a sawi zawh chuan Judate chu nasa taka anmahni leh anmahni inhnialin an tin ta a. 
Acts28:30 Tin, Paula chu kum hnih pumhlum ama in hawhah a awm a, a hnena lut apiang a lawm thin a.Pathian ram thu a hrilh a, Lal Isua Krista thu pawh huai takin a zirtir thin a, tumahin amah an khap si lo a." 
Acts28:31 Pathian ram thu a hrilh a, Lal Isua Krista thu pawh huai takin a zirtir thin a, tumahin amah an khap si lo a." 
Romans1:1 Paula, Isua Krista bawih, tirhkoh ni tura koh, Pathian Chanchin Tha hril tura tihhrana chuan," 
Romans1:2 chu Chanchin Tha, a Fapa kan Lalpa Isua Krista thu chu, Pathianin hman laiin a Lehkha thianghlimah chuan a zawlneite kain a tiam tawh a;" 
Romans1:3 ani chu tisa lam thu-ah chuan Davida thlaha piang a ni a," 
Romans1:4 thianghlimna thlarau lam thu-ah erawh chuan mitthi zing ata a thawhlehna chuan Pathian Fapa a nih nasa takin a hriattir a; 
Romans1:5 a hming avanga rinna chu hnam tin zinga mi awihtir turin, amah avang chuan khawngaihna leh tirhkoh nihna kan chang ta;" 
Romans1:6 chung zingah chuan nangni pawh Isua Krista kohte in ni a. 
Romans1:7 Rom khuaa Pathian duh tak, mi thianghlima awm tura kohte zawng zawng hnenah: Pathian, kan Pa leh Lal Isua Krista hnen ata khawngaihna leh remna in hnenah awm rawh se." 
Romans1:8 Khawvel zawng zawngah in rinna thu a than avangin in zaa chunga ka lawmna thu Isua Krista zarah ka Pathian hnenah ka sawi hmasa rih a ni. 
Romans1:9 Ka tawngtainaahte chuan bang loin in hming ka lam fo a," 
Romans1:10 tunah tal hian in hnena ka lo kalna turin Pathian thu thua zin hun remchang ka hmuh hram hram theihna'n ka dil thin tih, a Fapa Chanchin Thaa ka thlarauva a rawng ka bawl thin Pathian chu a hretu a ni si a." 
Romans1:11 In nghehna tura thlarau lam thilpek eng emaw ka pek theihna tur che uin hmuh ka chak hle si che u a; 
Romans1:12 chu chu in rinna leh ka rinnain kan inthlamuan tawn theihna tur, ka tihna a ni." 
Romans1:13 Tin, unaute u, Jentail dangte hnena ka thawh rim rah ka hmuh tawh ang bawkin, nangni zingah pawh rahte ka hmuh theihna turin in hnenah vawi tam tak lo kal ka tum tawh tih inhriat loh ka duh lo a; nimahsela tun hma zawng khan dalin ka awm fo thin a." 
Romans1:14 Grik mite leh Awze mite hnenah bat ka nei; mi fing leh mi finglote hnenah pawh. 
Romans1:15 Chutichuan nangni Rom khuaa awmte hnenah pawh Chanchin tha ka theihtawpa hril turin ka inpeih reng a ni. 
Romans1:16 Chanchin Tha chu ka zahpui si lo a; tupawh a ring apiangte tan chhandamna tura Pathian thiltihtheihna a ni si a; atirin Juda mi tan a ni a, tin, Grik mi tan pawh a lo ni leh a." 
Romans1:17 Chu miah chuan rin lehzualna'n, rinnain Pathian felzia chu a lo lang a, ""Mi fel chu rinnain a dam ang,"" tia ziak ang khan." 
Romans1:18 Thu tak fel lo taka daltute Pathian ngaihsak lohna leh fel lohna zawng zawng chungah chuan van atangin Pathian thinur a lo lang a ni; 
Romans1:19 Pathianin a hriattir tawh avangin Pathian chanchin hriat tur mi chu an rilruah hriattirin a awm si a. 
Romans1:20 A thil hmuh theih loh (a chatuan thiltihtheihna leh a Pathianzia chu) khawvel siam tirh ata fiah taka hmuhin a awm a, thil siamah chuan a lang a ni; chuvang chuan chhuanlam tur an nei lo;" 
Romans1:21 Pathian hre siin Pathian angin an chawimawi lo a; lawmthu pawh an sawi hek lo; thil lawilo an ngaihtuah ta zawk a, an thinlung a chu a lo thim ta a." 
Romans1:22 Finga inngaiin mi aah an lo chang a," 
Romans1:23 thi thei lo Pathian ropuina chu thi thei mihringte leh sava te, fuliafa te, rannung te lem angah an chantir ta a." 
Romans1:24 Chuvngin an taksa zahthlak taka insiamtawn turin an thinlung chakzawng anga thil bawlhhlawh tih phalin Pathianin a hawisan a ni. 
Romans1:25 Pathian thutak chu dawta chantirin, a Siamtu biak aiin a siama chu biain a rawng an bawl ta zawk si a. A Siamtu chu chatuana fak tlak a ni. Amen." 
Romans1:26 Chu mi avangin Pathianin zahthlak taka hur phalin a hawisan a; an hmeichhiate meuh pawhinan awm dan pianpui chu dan lo anga awm turin an intidanglam si a; 
Romans1:27 mipate pawhin hmeichhe hman dan pangngai bansana hurin an init a, mipa leh mipa tha lo takin an inti a, an sual man hmuh tur chu anmahniah an hmu a." 
Romans1:28 Tin, Pathian hriat an duh loh avangin, thil mawi lote ti tura a duh lohzawng rilru neih phalin Pathianin a hawisan ta;" 
Romans1:29 chutichuan fel lohna zawng zawng te, sualna zawng zawng te, duhamna zawng zawng te, suahsualna zawng zawng tein an lo khat a; itsikna te, tualthahna te, inhauna te, bumna te, nungchang that lohna tein an khat a; sesea thu lak hmang te," 
Romans1:30 mi rel hmang te, Pathian huatzawng te, intivei te, chapo te, mi uang te, thil sual thar tichhuaktu te, nu leh pa thu awih lo te," 
Romans1:31 rilru nei lo te, thutiam bawhchhetu te, hmangaihna pianpui nei lo te, khawngaihna nei lo te an lo ni a;chutianga thil titute chu thi zia reng an ni tih Pathian ruat chu hre rengin, anmahni changa ti pawh ni loin, mi dang ti thinte chungah chuan an lawm bawk thin." 
Romans1:32 chutianga thil titute chu thi zia reng an ni tih Pathian ruat chu hre rengin, anmahni changa ti pawh ni loin, mi dang ti thinte chungah chuan an lawm bawk thin." 
Romans2:1 Chuvangin, aw mihring, mi sawiseltu tupawh ni mah la, chhuanlam reng i nei lo e; mi dang i sawiselna ngeiah chuan nangmah leh nangmah thiam loh inchantir i ni a sin; nang, sawiseltu pawhin chutiang thilte chu i ti ve thin si a." 
Romans2:2 Chutiang thil ti thintute chungah chuan Pathianin a sawiselna chu thu dik tak lam zel a ni tih kan hre si a. 
Romans2:3 Aw mihring, chutiang thil ti thinte sawiseltu, nangin chutiang i ti ve bawk si a; Pathianin a sawiselna chu pumpelh i inring em ni?" 
Romans2:4 A nih loh leh, Pathian thatnain simna turin a hruai thin che tih hre loin,a thatna ngahzia leh, a entheihzia leh, a dawhtheihzia te chu i ngainep em ni?" 
Romans2:5 I luhlul leh i thinlung khauh avangin, thinurna leh Pathian rorelna fel tak lo lanna ni atan chuan, i chungah thinurna i inkhawl khawm chawp a ni." 
Romans2:6 Pathian chuan mi tin an thiltih ang zelin a relsak ang; 
Romans2:7 thil tha ti fan fana ropuina leh chawimawina leh boral theih lohna zawngtute hnenah chuan chatuan nunna a pe ang; 
Romans2:8 amaherawhchu kawhmawh bawla thutak zawm lo a, fel lohna zawm zawktute chungah chuan thinurna leh thinrimna te," 
Romans2:9 hrehawmna leh lungngaihna nasa takte a awm ang, mihring thil tisual apiangte thlarau chungah a awm ang, Juda mi thlarau chungah a awm hmasa ang a, tin, Grik mi thlarau chungah a awm leh ang;" 
Romans2:10 amaherawhchu thil tha titu apianghnenah chuan ropuina te, chawimawina te, thlamuanna te pek a ni ang, juda mi hnenah pek hmasak a ni ang a, tin, Grik mi hnenah a ni leh ang a;" 
Romans2:11 Pathianin mi duhsak bik a nei si lo a. 
Romans2:12 Tupawh Dan nei loa thil tisual chu, Dan lo bawkin a boral ang; tin, tupawh Dan neia thil tisual chu, Dana rorelin a awm ang." 
Romans2:13 Dan hretu maite chu Pathian mithmuhin mi fel an ni lo a; 
Romans2:14 Dan nei lo Jentailten mahni thinlung pianpuia Dan thilte chu an tihin, chung chuan Dan nei lo mah se la, anmahni leh anmahni danah an innei chawp si a," 
Romans2:15 an thinlungah Dan thiltih ziak a n itih an entir a, chu chu an chhia leh tha hriatnain a hriatpui a, an rilrute chu a inhnial a, thiam loh a chantir thul a, thiam a chantir thul a." 
Romans2:16 Pathianin, ka Chanchin Tha sawi anga mihringte thuruk Isua Krista hmanga a ngaihtuah niah chuan Dan anga titute chu mi fela chhiarin an awm zawk ang." 
Romans2:17 Nimahsela nang Juda hming pu i ni si a, Dan chu i rin chhan a, Pathian i chhuan a," 
Romans2:18 a duhzawng i hriat a. Dan thua zirtirin i awm avangin thil tha tak chu tha i ti a," 
Romans2:19 Danah chuan finna leh thutak awm dan i neih avangin nang ngei mitdelte hruaitu, thim zinga awmte entu," 
Romans2:20 mi fing lote tifingtu, nausente zirtirtu niah i inring a;" 
Romans2:21 chutiang i nih ahnuin, nang, mi dangte zirtirtu, nangmah i inzirtir lo maw? Nang, mi ruk ru lo tura hrilhtu, nangin i ru thin maw?" 
Romans2:22 Nang, mi uire lo tura hrilhtu, nangin i uire thin maw? Nang, milem hawtu, nangin milem biak ina thilte i ru thin maw?" 
Romans2:23 Nang, Dan chhuangtu, nangin Dan i bawhchhiat avangin Pathian i tihmingchhe thin a ni maw?" 
Romans2:24 An ziak ang ngei khan Pathian hming chu nangmahni avangin Jentailte zingah tihchhiatin a awm ta a nih hi. 
Romans2:25 Dan zawmtu i nih chuan serhtan chu a sawt tak zet a ni; Dan bawhchhetu i nih erawh chuan i serhtan chu tan loh ang mai a lo ni tawh. 
Romans2:26 Chuvangin serhtan loh miin Dan thu ruatte a vawn chuan a serhtan loh chu tan anga ngaih a ni dawn lo em ni? 
Romans2:27 Tin, mahni pianziaa serhtan lohin Dan chu a zawm kim chuan, nang, lehkha thu leh serhtan Dan nei sia Dan bawhchhetu, a sawisel dawn lo che em ni?" 
Romans2:28 A lang maia Juda mi ni chu Juda mi tak a ni lo a; alanga tisa maia serhtan chu serhtan tak a ni bawk hek lo.Amaherawhchu alang mai ni loa Juda mi ni chu, Juda mi tak a ni; tin, serhtan tak chu, rilru lama tan a ni, lehkha thu maiah ni loin, thlarauvah a ni; chu mi chuan mihring fak a hlawh lo a, Pathian fak a hlawh zawk a ni." 
Romans2:29 Amaherawhchu alang mai ni loa Juda mi ni chu, Juda mi tak a ni; tin, serhtan tak chu, rilru lama tan a ni, lehkha thu maiah ni loin, thlarauvah a ni; chu mi chuan mihring fak a hlawh lo a, Pathian fak a hlawh zawk a ni." 
Romans3:1 A nih leh, Juda mi chuan sawtna eng nge a neih chuan bik? Serhtan pawh eng nge a sawtna?" 
Romans3:2 Kawng tinah a sawt hle; Pathian thute an hnenah kawltirin a awm avang a ni ber a. 
Romans3:3 Mi thenkhatten rinna nei lo mah se la, eng nge maw tichuang le? An rin lohna chuan Pathian rinawmzia engmah loah a siam chuang em ni?" 
Romans3:4 Hnai lo e; Pathian chu mi dik tak ni se la, mi tin erawh chu dawthei ni zawk rawh se; ""Nangin i thusawiin thiam i chan theih a, rorela i awm pawhin i hneh theihna'n,"" tih ziak ang khan." 
Romans3:5 Nimahsela kan fel lohna hian Pathian felna chu a tihlan mawi lehzual chuan eng nge kan sawi ang? Pathianin mi a hrem hian mi fel lo a ni em ni? (Mihring dan angin ka sawi a ni). 
Romans3:6 Hnai lo e; chuti a nih chuan Pathianin engtin nge khawvel ro a rel ang? 
Romans3:7 Nimahsela ka dawt thusawi avanga Pathian thu dikzia amah tiropui khawp hiala a lan lehzual si chuan, engati nge kei pawh mi sual anga thiam loh chantira ka la awm ni?" 
Romans3:8 Engti nge (min hek a, mi thenkhatin sawi loh pui min sawitir angin) ""Thil tha a lo thlen theihna'n thil sual i ti ang u,"" tiin kan sawi zawk loh? Chutiang mite chuan thiam loh an chan chu a fel a ni." 
Romans3:9 A nih leh anni aiin kan tha chuang bik em ni? Hnai lo e; Judate leh Grikte chu sual bawiha awm vekah tun hma lam pawh kan puh tawh kha; 
Romans3:10 Tumah mi fel tak reng an awm lo, pakhat mah an awm hauh lo;" 
Romans3:11 Tumah hre thiam reng an awm lo, tumah Pathian zawng reng an awm lo." 
Romans3:12 A ni lo lamah an peng ta vek a; engmaha tlaktlai loin an lo awm ta vek a, Tumah thil tha ti reng an awm lo, pakhat te mah an awm hauh lo." 
Romans3:13 An hrawk chu thlan inhawng a ni a; an leiin bumna thu an sawi a, an kam chhungah rul tur a awm a." 
Romans3:14 An ka chu anchhe lawhna leh thu khain a khat a. 
Romans3:15 An ke chu thisen chhuah turin a pen chak a; 
Romans3:16 An kawngah chuan boralna leh hrehawmna a awm a; 
Romans3:17 Thlamuanna kawng pawh an hre lo. 
Romans3:18 An mithmuhah Pathian tihna reng a awm lo, tih ziak ang khan." 
Romans3:19 Danin engpawh a sawi apiang chu, Dan thu thua awmte hnenah a sawi a ni tih kan hria a; ka tinreng a chip theihna'n leh khawvela mi zawng zawng Pathian rorelin an awm theihna'n." 
Romans3:20 Chutichuan Dan thiltih avangin mi tumah a mithmuhin thiam changing an awm lo ang; Dan avangin sual hriat famkimna a lo awm a ni si a. 
Romans3:21 Nimahsela tunah Dan leh Zawlneite hriattir angin Dan loa Pathian felna chu tihlanin a awm ta; 
Romans3:22 chu chu Pathian felna, Isua Krista rin avanga a ring apiangte hnena tihlana awm chu a ni; danglamna reng a awm lo a," 
Romans3:23 mi zawng zawngin thil an tisual tawh vek a, Pathian ropuina an chang zo ta lo a ni;" 
Romans3:24 chung ringtute chu, Krista Isuaa tlanna awm avang chuan, a khawngaihnain a thlawna thiam chantirin an awm a;" 
Romans3:25 Pathian dawhtheihnaa hman lai sualte haiderin a awm avang khan, Pathianin ama felzia entirna'n Krista Isua chu, a thisena, rinna avanga, sual thuphachawinaah a ruat a;" 
Romans3:26 tun laia a felzia entirna'n a ni, amah ngei chu mi fel a nih theihna tur leh, Isua ring apiang thiam chantirtu a nih theihna turin." 
Romans3:27 Inchhuanna chu khawiah nge a awm ni le? Pawn lama khar hnanin a awm ta. Eng danin nge ni le? Thiltihna danin em ni? Ni lo e, rinna danin a ni zawk," 
Romans3:28 Chutichuan Dan thiltih ni loin, rinnain miin thiam changing kan ruat a ni." 
Romans3:29 Pathian chu Judate Pathian chauh em ni? Jentailte Pathian pawh a ni ve lo em ni? Ni ve e. 
Romans3:30 Serhtante chu an rin avanga thiam chantirtu tur leh, serhtan lohte chu an rin azara thiam chantirtu tur chu Pathian pakhat chauh a nih si chuan, Jentailte Pathian pawh a ni ve ang chu.A nih leh, rin avangin Dan chu engmah loah kan siam em ni? Hnai lo e, Dan chu kan tinghet zawk a ni." 
Romans3:31 A nih leh, rin avangin Dan chu engmah loah kan siam em ni? Hnai lo e, Dan chu kan tinghet zawk a ni." 
Romans4:1 A nih leh, Abrahama, tisa dana min thlahtu chuan eng nge a hmuh kan tih ang?" 
Romans4:2 Abrahama'n thiltih avanga thiam a chan si chuan chhuan tur a nei a ni; Pathian lamah erawh chuan a nei lo e: 
Romans4:3 Pathian Lehkhain eng nge a sawi ni? Abrahama chuan Pathian a ring a, tin, chu rinna chu a felnaa ruat a ni,"" tiin a sawi a ni." 
Romans4:4 Tin, hnathawktu hlawh chu khawngaihnaa ruat a ni lo a,bata ruat a ni zawk e." 
Romans4:5 Amaherawhchu hna thawk lo a, Pathian ngaihsak lo, thiam chantirtu ring zawka rinna chu, ama felnaa ruat a ni." 
Romans4:6 Mi, a thiltih ngaihtuah loa Pathianin fela a ruata chu mal a sawmsak thu Davida pawhin," 
Romans4:7 An bawhchhiatnate ngaihdama awm leh, an sualte khuha awm chu an eng a thawl e," 
Romans4:8 Lalpa'n khawlohna neia a ruat loh chu a eng a thawl e,"" tia a sawi ang khan." 
Romans4:9 A nih leh, chu mi engthawlna chu serhtanho chungah chauh nge a awm, serhtan loh ho chungah pawh? ""Abrahama rinna chu a felnaa ruat a ni,"" kan ti si a." 
Romans4:10 Chu chu eng tia ruat nge ni le? A serh tan hnuah nge, a serh tan hmain? A serh tan hnuin a ni lo a, a serh tan hmain a ni zawk." 
Romans4:11 Chutichuan, serh tan loa a awm laia rinnaa felna a hmu tih hriatna, serhtan chhinchhiahna chu a hmu a; chu felna chu an tana a ruat a nihna turin serhtan lohte zinga ringtu zawng zawng pa a nih theihna'n;" 
Romans4:12 serhtanho pa pawh an nih theih bawkna'n - serhtan mai pa a ni lo a, kan pa Abrahama serh tan loa a awm laia rinna a neih anga nei fawmte pa a ni zawk." 
Romans4:13 Dan avangin Abrahama leh a thlahte hnenah chuan khawvel roluahtu tur a ni ang tih thu zawng tiam a ni si lo a, rinnaa felna avangin a ni zawk e." 
Romans4:14 Dana mite chu roluahtute an nih si chuan rinna engah mah a tlaktlai lo a, thutiam pawh chu engmah a ni ta lo a;" 
Romans4:15 Dan chuan thinurna a siam si thin a; Dan awm lohnaah erawh chuan bawhchhiatna pawh a awm hek lo. 
Romans4:16 Chuvangin, khawngaihnain a nih theihna'n rinna avangin a nih hi, thlahte zawng zawng chuan thutiam chu matheilova an hmuhna turin, Dan nei mite chauhin an hmu lo ang a, Abrahama neih ang rinna neite pawhin an hmu bawk ang." 
Romans4:17 Mitthite tinungtu leh, thil awm lote awm anga sawitu, a rin Pathian mithmuhah chuan Abrahama chu kan zaa pa a ni. (""Chi tam takte paah ka siam a che,"" tih ziak ang khan)." 
Romans4:18 Beiseina awm a awm loh pawhin ani chuan beisei takin a ring a, chi tam takte pa a lo nih theihna'n; ""Khiti zat khian i thlahte an la awm ang,"" tia hrilh ang khan." 
Romans4:19 Tin,rinna nghet lo chuang loin,a taksa thi tawh anga awm chu a ngaihtuah a, (amah chu kum za lai mi a ni si a) Sari chin pawh a ngaihtuah bawk a," 
Romans4:20 nimahsela rinna tlachhamin Pathian thutiam chu a ringhlel lo a, Pathian a chawimawi a," 
Romans4:21 a thutiam chu a hlawhtlintir thei tih a awih hle bawk a, a rinna chu a lo nghet ta zawk a." 
Romans4:22 Chuvangin a rinna chu a felnaa ruat a lo ni tawh. 
Romans4:23 Chutichuan a rinna chu a felnaa ruat a ni tih hi amah avang chauha ziak a ni lo a," 
Romans4:24 keimahni avang pawhin a ni. Isua kan Lalpa mitthi zing ata kaithotu chu ringtu kan ni a, kan rinna chu felnaa ruat a ni dawn.Chu Isua chu kan sual avangin mantirin a awm a, thiam kan channa turin kaihthawhin a awm bawk a." 
Romans4:25 Chu Isua chu kan sual avangin mantirin a awm a, thiam kan channa turin kaihthawhin a awm bawk a." 
Romans5:1 Chuvangin rinna avanga thiam changa awmin, kan Lalpa Isua Krista avangin Pathian nen inremin i awm ang u;" 
Romans5:2 amah avang vek chuan he khawngaihna kan din nghehnaah hian rinnain kan lut ta a; Pathian ropuina beiseiin lawmin i awm bawk ang u. 
Romans5:3 Tin, chuti chauh chu ni loin, kan hrehawmnaah pawh lawmin i awm ang u, hrehawmna chuan chhelna a siam a," 
Romans5:4 chhelna chuan hriatfiahna a siam a, hriatfiahna chuan beiseina a siam tih kan hre si a;" 
Romans5:5 tin, Thlarau Thianghlim kan hnena min pek khan Pathian hmangaihna chu kan thinlunga a leih tawh avangin beiseina chuan a timualpho lo a." 
Romans5:6 Kan la chak loh lai khan, a hun tein Krista chu mi sualte ai chuan a lo thi ta si." 
Romans5:7 Mi fel aia thih miin a duh awm lo hle si a, mi tha ai erawh chuan mi tu emaw tal chuan thih a ngam mial mahna." 
Romans5:8 Nimahsela Pathian chuan a mi hmangaihna chu fak tlakin a lantir a, mi sualte kan la nih laia Krista kan aia a thih avng khan." 
Romans5:9 Chutichuan a thisena thiam chantira kan awm tawh hnu hian, amah avangin Pathian thinurna lak ata chu chhandamin kan awm ngei ang." 
Romans5:10 Hmelma kan nih lai maha a Fapa thihna avanga Pathian nena lo inrem tawh kan nih si chuan, inrema kan awm tawh hnu hian a nunna avangin chhandamin kan awm ngei ang." 
Romans5:11 Chuti chauh pawh a ni lo a, inremna tuna min hmuhtirtu kan Lalpa Isua Krista avang chuan Pathianah kan lawm bawk a ni." 
Romans5:12 Chutichuan mi pakhat avangin sual khawvelah a lut a, sual avangin thihna a lut bawk a, chutiang bawkin mi zawng zawngin thil an lo tihsual avangin thihnain mi zawng zawng a fan chhuak ta a." 
Romans5:13 Dan awm hmain khawvelah sual a awm tawh si a; dan a awm si loh chuan sual chu suala ngaih a ni lo; 
Romans5:14 nimahsela Adama awm achin Mosia awm thlengin, Adama bawhchhiatna anga thil tisual lote chungah pawh thihna chuan ro a rel thin. Adama chu lo la kal tura nen tehkhinna a ni." 
Romans5:15 Nimahsela thilthlawnpek chu sualna nen a inang lo bawk. Mi pakhat sual avang mah khan mi tam tak chu an thih si chuan, Pathian khawngaihna leh mi pakhat Isua Krista khawngaihna avanga thilpek chu mi tam tak chungah vurin a awm ngei ang." 
Romans5:16 Tin, thilpek chu mi pakhat sual avanga thil lo awm nen a inang hek lo; thiam loh chantirna rorelna chu mi pakhat avangin a lo awm a, thiam chantirna thilthlawnpek erawh chu, sual tam tak avangin a lo awm ta zawk si a." 
Romans5:17 Mi pakhat sual avnga thihnain, chu mi pakhat avang maha ro a rel si chuan khawngaihna nasa tk leh felna thilpek hmutute chuan, mi pakhat (Isua Krista) avang khan nunnaah chuan ro an rel ngei ang." 
Romans5:18 Chutichuan sual pakhat avangin thiam loh chantirna rorelna chu mi zawng zawng chungah a lo awm a; chutiang bawkin thil fel pakhat tih avangin nunna hmuhna'n thiam chantirna thilthlawnpek chu mi zawng zawng chungah a lo awm. 
Romans5:19 Mi pakhat tihmawh avang khan mi tam tak chu mi sual an lo ni ta a; chutiang bawkin mi pakhat a tihawih avang khan mi tam tak chu mi fel an lo ni ang. 
Romans5:20 Tin, sual a lan lehzual theihna'n Dan a lo awm leh nghal a. Nimahsela sual a punna apiangah khawngaihna chu a pung lehzual thin;sual chuan thihnain ro a rel ang takin, khawngaihna chuan felnain, chatuan nun channa khawp hialin kan Lalpa Isua Krista zara, ro a rel theihna'n." 
Romans5:21 sual chuan thihnain ro a rel ang takin, khawngaihna chuan felnain, chatuan nun channa khawp hialin kan Lalpa Isua Krista zara, ro a rel theihna'n." 
Romans6:1 Engnge kan sawi tak ang le? Khawngaihna chu a pun lehzual theihna'n sualin kan awm reng dawn em ni? 
Romans6:2 Hnai lo e. Keini sual kawnga thi tawh sualin engtin nge kan la nun theih cheu vang? 
Romans6:3 Keini zingah Krista Isuaa baptisma chang apiangte chu a thihnaah baptisin kn awm tih in hrelo emaw ni. 
Romans6:4 Chuvangin a thihnaah baptisma kanchanin, a hnena phum vein kan awm; Pa ropuinain mitthi zing ata Krista a kaihthawh ang khan, keini pawh nunna tharin kan awm theihna'n." 
Romans6:5 A thihna anpuiin amah nen kan inzawm tawh si chuan a thawhlehna anpui pawhin kan inzawm bawk ang. 
Romans6:6 Heng hi hria i la: kan mihring hlui chu a hnenah khenbehin a awm ve ta, sual pu taksa chu tihborala a awm theihna'n, tun achinah sual bawiha kan awm lohna turin." 
Romans6:7 Tupawh thi tawh chu sual lakah a chhuak tawh si a. 
Romans6:8 Tin, Krista hnena kan thih ve tawh chuan a hnenah kan nung ve bawk ang tih kan ring a ni;" 
Romans6:9 Krista chu mitthi zing ata kaihthawhin a awm a, a thi leh dawn tawh lo tih kan hre si a; thihna chuan ama chungah thu a nei tawh lo." 
Romans6:10 A thihna chu sual lam kawngah chatuan atan vawi khat chauh a thi a ni, a nunna erawh chu Pathian lam kawngah a nung a ni." 
Romans6:11 Chutiang bawkin nangni pawh sual lam kawngah thi tawhah inruat u la, Pathian lam kawngah erawh chuan Krista Isuaah nungah inruat rawh u." 
Romans6:12 Chuvangin in taksa duhzawng in zawmna turin, intaksa thi theiah chuan sualnain ro rel suh se." 
Romans6:13 In taksa pengte pawh fel lohna hriamhrei atan sualna hnenah pe phal hek suh u; amaherawhchu mitthi zing ata nung leh angin Pathian hnenah inpe ula, in taksa pengte pawh chu felna hriamhrei atan Pathian hnenah pe phal zawk rawh u." 
Romans6:14 Sualnain in chungah thu a nei dawn tawh si lo, dan rorela awm in ni lo a, khawngaihna rorela awm in ni zawk si a." 
Romans6:15 Engtin nge ni ang le? Dan rorela awm kan nih loh a, khawngaihna rorela awm kan nih zawk avang hian kan sual tur em ni ang?Hnai lo e." 
Romans6:16 Tu hnenah pawh an thu awih tura bawiha in luh chuan (thihna khawpa sual bawih emaw, felna khawpa thu awih bawih emaw), a thu in awiha bawih chu in ni tih in hre lo em ni?" 
Romans6:17 Amaherawhchu sual bawihte ni mah u la, zirtir dan a hnena in inpekna chu rilru tak zetin in lo awih a;" 
Romans6:18 tin, sual lak ata chhuahin in awm a, felna bawihte in lo ni ta a; chuvangin Pathian hnenah lawmthu awm rawh se;" 
Romans6:19 (in tisa chak lohzia avangin mihring danin thu ka sawi a ni e) in taksa pengte chu bawlhhlawhna hnenah leh, bawhchhiatna turin bawhchhiatna hnenah bawiha in pe phal ang khan, tunah in taksa pengte chu thianghlimna turin felna hnenah bawihah pe phal rawh u." 
Romans6:20 Sual bawihte in nih lai khan felna lakah in fihlim a ni. 
Romans6:21 Tuna in thil zahpui takahte hian, khang lai khan rah eng nge in lo hmuh thin le? Khang thil tawpna kha thihna a ni thin a sin." 
Romans6:22 Tunah erawh chuan sual lakah tihfihlima awma Pathian bawihte in lo nihin, thianghlimna hmu khawpin in rah in nei a sin, chu mi tawpna - chatuana nunna nen,Sual man chu thihna a ni si a; Pathian thilthlawnpek erawh chu, kan Lalpa Krista Isua zarah chuan, chatuana nunna a ni." 
Romans6:23 Sual man chu thihna a ni si a; Pathian thilthlawnpek erawh chu, kan Lalpa Krista Isua zarah chuan, chatuana nunna a ni." 
Romans7:1 A nih leh, unaute u, dan chuanin mi a dam chhung zawng a chungah ro a rel thin tih in hre lo em ni? (dan hre mite hnenah ka sawi a nih hi)." 
Romans7:2 Hmeichhe pasal nei chu a pasal dam chhung zawng danin a pasalah phuar belhbawmin a awm thin; nimahsela a pasal chu a thih chuan, pasal kawngah dan ata chu thlahin a awm thin." 
Romans7:3 Chutichuan a pasal dam chhunga mi dang a neih chuan, ""Uirenu"" an ti ang; a pasal a thih erawh chuan chu dan ata chu thlahin a awm a, chutichun mi dang nei mah se la uire a ni lo." 
Romans7:4 Chutichuan ka unaute u, mi dang (Pathian lama kan rah theihna turin mitthi zing ata kaihthawha ngei kha) in neih theihna'n, Krista taksa avangin Dan kawngah tihthihin in lo awm ta a." 
Romans7:5 Tisaa kan awm lai khan, Dan avanga duhzawng sual lo chhuakte chuan kan taksa pengahte, thihna khawpa rah turin a thawk thin." 
Romans7:6 Tunah erawh chuan min chelhtu lakah thi tawhin, Dan ata thlahin kan awm ta, lehkha ziak hlui ang mai ni lo a, thlarau thara rawng kan bawl theihna'n." 
Romans7:7 Engnge kan sawi tak ang le? Dan chu sual em ni? Hnai lo e. Nimahsela Dan avanga hriat ni suh se la chu sual ka hre lo tur; Dan chuan, ""Awt suh,"" ti suh se la chu awh hi ka hre lo tur a ni." 
Romans7:8 Nimahsela sualnain, thupek avang chuan remchan lai hmuin, awhna tinreng ka chungah a awmtir a. Dan lo chuan sualna chu thi a ni." 
Romans7:9 Tin, hmanah khan kei dan loin ka nung a; nimahsela thupek chu a lo awm veleh sual a lo harh a, kei chu ka thi ta a." 
Romans7:10 Tin, nunna tura thupek chu thihna tur a lo ni tih ka lo hre ta a;" 
Romans7:11 sualnain thupek avang chuan remchan lai hmuin mi bum a, thupek chu hmangin mi tihlum ta a ni." 
Romans7:12 Chutichuan Dan chu a thianghlim a ni, thupek pawh chu a thianghlim a, a fel a, a tha a ni." 
Romans7:13 A nih leh, thil tha chu ka tan thihna a lo ni em ni? Hnai lo e. Sualna chu ka tan thihna a lo ni ta zawk a ni, chutichuan sualna chu sualna a ni tih a lan theihna'n thil tha chu hmangin mi tihlum a ni; sualna chu (thupek avang khan) sual nasa tak a lo nih theihna turin." 
Romans7:14 Dan chu thlarau lam thil a ni tih kan hre si a; kei erawh chu tisa lama mi, sual bawiha hralh tawh ka ni." 
Romans7:15 Thil ka tih hi a ngaihna ka hre si lo; ka thiltih thin hi, ka thiltih duhzawng a ni si lo, ka thil huatzawng tak chu ka ti zawk thin a ni." 
Romans7:16 Ka tih duh lohzawng chu ka tih si chuan, Dan chu a tha tia awih ka ni ang a sin." 
Romans7:17 Chutichuan ka thiltih hi keima tih a ni tawh lo a, sual keimaha awm tih chu a ni zawk." 
Romans7:18 Keimahah (chu chu ka tisaah tihna a ni) thil tha reng a awm lo tih ka hria; thil tha tih duhna chu keimahah a awm na a, thil tha tihna erawh chu a awm si lo." 
Romans7:19 Thatna tih ka duh hi ka ti lo a; sualna tih ka duh loh hi ka ti zawk si thin a. 
Romans7:20 Ka duh lohzawng chu ka tih si chuan a titu chu kei ka ni tawh lo a, sual keimaha awm chu a ni zawk e." 
Romans7:21 Chutichuan he dan hi ka lo hre ta: thil tha tih ka duh laiin sualna ka hnenah a lo awm thin a ni. 
Romans7:22 Ka rilru tak takin Pathian dan chungah ka lawm si thin a; 
Romans7:23 nimahsela ka taksa pengahte hian dan danglam a awm tih ka hria, chu chuan ka rilru dan a do a, ka taksa pengtea sualna dan awm hnenah chuan salah mi hruai thin a." 
Romans7:24 Mi rethei ka va ni tehlul em! He thihna taksa lakah hian tuin nge mi chhan chhuak ang?Isua Krista kan Lalpa avangin Pathian hnenah lawmthu ka sawi a ni. Chutichuan keimah tak chuan ka rilru chuanin Pathian dan rawng ka bawl thin, ka tisa erawh chuan sualna dan rawng ka bawl thin." 
Romans7:25 Isua Krista kan Lalpa avangin Pathian hnenah lawmthu ka sawi a ni. Chutichuan keimah tak chuan ka rilru chuanin Pathian dan rawng ka bawl thin, ka tisa erawh chuan sualna dan rawng ka bawl thin." 
Romans8:1 Chutichuan tunah zawng Krista Isuaa awmte tan chuan thiam loh chantirna reng a awm tawh lo. 
Romans8:2 Krista Isuaa Nunna Thlarau dan chuan sualna leh thihna dan ata chu mi tichhuak tawh si a. 
Romans8:3 Tisa avanga Dan chu a chak loh a, a tih theih rual loh chu Pathianin ama fapa ngei, tisa sual ang puin, sual thawina'n rawn tirin, tisaa sualna awm chu thiam loh a chantir ta a ni;" 
Romans8:4 tisa dan zawh loa Thlarau dan zawh zawktu keimahniah hian Dan thu ruat chu hlena a awm theihna turin. 
Romans8:5 Tisa dana awmte chuan tisa lam thilte an duh thin; Thlarau dana awmte erawh chuan Thlarau lam thilte an duh thin. 
Romans8:6 Tisa lamthilte duh chu thihna a ni si a, Thlarau lam thil duh erawh chu nunna leh thlamuanna a ni;" 
Romans8:7 tisa duhzawng chu Pathian dona a nih avangin. Chu chu Pathian danin a awm si lo a, awm pawh a awm thei bawk hek lo a ni." 
Romans8:8 Chutichuan tisaa awmte chuan Pathian an tilawm thei lo. 
Romans8:9 Nimahsela Pathian Thlarau nangmahnia a awm tak zet chuan tisaa awm in ni lo a, Thlarauva awm in ni zawk e. Amaherawhchu tupawh Krista Thlarau nei lo chu amaha mi a ni lo." 
Romans8:10 Krista chu nangmahnia a awm si chuan sualna avangin taksa a thi a ni; thlarau erawh chu felna avangin nunna a ni. 
Romans8:11 Nimahsela mitthi zing ata Isua titho lehtua Thlarau chu nangmahnia a awm chuan, mitthi zing ata Krista Isua titho lehtu khan, nangmahnia awm Thlarau zarah chuan in taksa thi theite chu a tinung bawk ang." 
Romans8:12 Chuvangin unaute u, bat kan nei; tisa dana awm turin tisa lakah erawh chuan a ni lo." 
Romans8:13 Tisa dana in awm chuan in thi ngei tur a ni; amaherawhchu taksa thiltihte Thlarauva in tihhlum thin chuan in nung ang. 
Romans8:14 Pathian Thlarau hruaia awm apiangte chu Pathian fate an ni si a. 
Romans8:15 Hlauva awm leh turin bawih nihna thlarau inhmu a ni si lo a; fa nihna thlarau inhmu a ni zawk e, chu thlarau avang chuan ""Abba!(Ka pa!)"" tiin kan au thin hi." 
Romans8:16 Thlarau ngei chuan keimahni thlarau nen Pathian fate kan ni tih min hriattir thin; 
Romans8:17 tin, fate kan nih chuan roluahtute kan ni a; Pathian roluahtu, Krista luahpuitute kan ni; a hnena chawimawiin kan awm ve theihna turin amah kan tuarpui tak zet chuan." 
Romans8:18 Tun laia tuarnate hi nakina kan chunga ropuina tihlan tur nen chuan tehkhin thamah ka ruat si lo. 
Romans8:19 Thil siam zawng zawngte chuan beisei em emin, Pathian fate lo lanna chu an nghakhlel hle si." 
Romans8:20 Thil siam zawng zawngte chu thil lawilo thu thua awmtirin an awm tawh (an duha awm an ni lo a, a awmtirtu avang a ni zawk e); beiseina neiin," 
Romans8:21 thil siam zawng zawngte ngei pawh chu chhiatna bawih ata tihchhuahin an awm ang a, Pathian fate zalenna ropuiah chuan an lut dawn si a." 
Romans8:22 Thil siam zawng zawngte chu tun thlengin rum leh nauvei na tuarin an awmhlawm tih kan hre si a. 
Romans8:23 Chu chang a ni lo, keini ngei pawh, Thlarau hmahruai neitute hian, fa kan nihna (kan taksa tlanna chu) nghakin, keini meuh pawh kan rilruin kan rum bawk si." 
Romans8:24 Beiseinain a ni, chhandamin kan awm ni; nimahsela hmuh theih reng beiseina hi beiseina a ni lo e. Miin a hmuh theih reng chu engati nge a la beisei thin?" 
Romans8:25 Kan hmuh loh chu kan beisei erawh chuan kan nghak fan fan thin a ni. 
Romans8:26 Chutiang bawkin Thlarau chuan kan chak lohnate a pui thin a; engtia tawngtai tur nge tih kan hre si lo a; nimahsela Thlarau chuan rum sawi hleih theih loin min tawngtaisak thin. 
Romans8:27 Tin, Pathian duhzawng ang zelin mi thianghlimte chu a tawngtaisak thin avangin rilrute Entu chuan Thlarau duhzawng chu a hre thin a ni." 
Romans8:28 Tin, Pathian hmangaihtu, amaha ruat anga a kohvate tan chuan, an thatna turin engkimin a thawhsak hlawm thin tih kan hria;" 
Romans8:29 a hriat lawkate chu ama Fapa ang taka awm turin a ruat lawk si a, a Fapa chu unau tam takte zinga fa tir a lo nih theihna'n." 
Romans8:30 Tin, a ruat lawkate chu a ko bawk a; tin, a kohvate chu thiam a chantir bawk a, tin, thiam a chantirate chu a chawimawi bawk a." 
Romans8:31 Chung thuah chuan eng nge kan sawi ang le? Pathian kan lama a tan chuan tuin nge min do thei ang? 
Romans8:32 Ama Fapa ngei pawh zuah lo a, kan zaa aia petu chuan thil zawng zawng pawh athlawnin min pe tel lo va ngem ni?" 
Romans8:33 Pathian mi thlante chu tuin nge hek ang? Thiam chantirtu kha Pathian a ni si a. 
Romans8:34 Tuin nge thiam loh chantir ang? Thia kha Krista Isua chu a ni si a; a ni, tho leh ta zawk a, Pathian ding lama awma min sawisaktu bawka kha a ni." 
Romans8:35 Krista hmangaihna ata chu tuin nge min then ang? Hrehawmnain emaw, lungngaihnain emaw, tihduhdahnain emaw, tamin emaw, saruaknain emaw, hlauhawmnain emaw, khandaihin emaw min then ang em ni?" 
Romans8:36 Nangmah avangin nilengin thahin kan awm thin; beram talh turte anga ngaih kan ni,"" tih ziak ang khan." 
Romans8:37 Then suh e, chung zawng zawngah chuan min hmangaihtu avang chuan, ropui taka ngamtu kan ni." 
Romans8:38 Thihna te, nunna te, vantirhkoh te, lalna te, thil awm sa te, thil lo la awm tur te,thiltihtheihna te, sanna te, thukna te, thil siam dang reng rengte pawhin, kan Lalpa Krista Isuaa awm Pathian hmangaihna ata chu mi then thei lo ang tih dik takin ka hre si a." 
Romans8:39 thiltihtheihna te, sanna te, thukna te, thil siam dang reng rengte pawhin, kan Lalpa Krista Isuaa awm Pathian hmangaihna ata chu mi then thei lo ang tih dik takin ka hre si a." 
Romans9:1 Kristaah chuan thu tak tak ka sawi a ni, ka daw lo e, Thlarau Thianghlim zarah chuan ka chhia leh tha hriatna pawh" 
Romans9:2 ka thinlungah hian hrehawmna nasa tak leh lungngaihna reh thei lo ka pai a sin; 
Romans9:3 ka unaute, tisa lama ka chipuite aiah hian, kei hi Krista hnen ata tihhran khawp laiin anchhe dawngin awm hial i la ka ti si a;" 
Romans9:4 Israel mi an ni si a; fa nihna te, ropuina te, thuthlung zawng zawng te, Dan pekna te, Pathian rawngbawlna te, thutiam zawng zawng te an ta a ni a;" 
Romans9:5 pute chu an ta a ni bawk a, tisa lam thu-ah Krista chu anmahni zing ata lo chhuak a ni bawk a; ani chu thil zawng zawng chunga awm, chatuana fak tlak Pathian a ni. Amen." 
Romans9:6 Nimahsela Pathian thu chu engmah lo anga awm ta a ni lo e. Israela thlahte chu Israel mi an ni vek lo e; 
Romans9:7 Abrahama thlahte an nih avangin an zain a fate an ni vek hek lo; Isaaka-ah hian i thlahte an ti ang,"" tih a ni zawk." 
Romans9:8 Chu chu, tisa fate chu Pathian fate an ni lo a, thutiam fate chu Abrahama thlaha ruat an ni zawk tihna a ni." 
Romans9:9 Thutiam chu hei hi a ni: Tun ang hun hian ka lo kal ang a, Sari chuan fapa a hring ang,"" tih hi." 
Romans9:10 Chu chang a ni lo e, Rebeki pawhin mi pakhat (kan pu Isaaka) laka phir a pai lai khan -" 
Romans9:11 naute chu an la pian hmaa, chhia leh tha an la tih hmain, thiltih vang ni loin, a kotu duh vang zawkin, thlan lam thu-ah Pathian thu ruat chu a ngheh theihna'n" 
Romans9:12 - a hnenah chuan, ""A upa zawkin a naupang zawk rawng a bawl ang,"" Pathianin a tih kha," 
Romans9:13 Jakoba ka hmangaih a, Esauva erawh chu ka hua,"" tih ziak ang khan." 
Romans9:14 Engnge kan sawi tak ang le? Pathianah chuan fel lohna a awm em ni? Hnai lo e. 
Romans9:15 Ani chuan, ""Ka khawngaih apiang chu ka khawngaih ang a, zah ka ngaihna chung apiangah chuan zah ka ngai ang,"" tiin Mosia hnena a sawi si kha." 
Romans9:16 Chuvangin a duhtu avng a ni lo a, a tlantu avang a ni hek lo, a khawngaihtu Pathian avang a ni zawk e." 
Romans9:17 Pathian Lehkha Thuin Pharaoa hnenah chuan, ""He mi avang ngawt hian ka tungding chia, nangmahah chuan ka thiltihtheihna ka entir theihna tur leh, khawvel zawng zawnga ka hming a than theihna'n,"" a ti si a." 
Romans9:18 Chutichuan Pathianin a duh apiang a khawngaih thin a, a duh apiang pawh a tiluhlul thin a ni." 
Romans9:19 Nang chuan ka hnenah, ""Engati nge a la dem cheu ni? A duhzawng tuin nge dodal ni?"" i ti dawn a ni awm e." 
Romans9:20 A ni, nimahsela aw mihring, Pathian hnial veitu chu tu nge maw i nih le? Thil siam chuan a siamtu hnenah, ""Engati nge hetianga mi siam?"" a ti ang em ni?" 
Romans9:21 Bellei tlang khat bel pakhat hlu tak, bel pakhat hlu lo taka siam turin belvawtu chuan bellei chungah thu a nei lo em ni?" 
Romans9:22 Khawngaihna bel, ropui tura a lo buatsaih lawkate chungah chuan a khawngaihna ngahzia a entir theihna'n," 
Romans9:23 thinurna bel boral tlakte chungah chuan, Pathianin a thinur leh a thiltihtheihna lantir duh mah se la, a dawh hram hram chuan eng nge pawi ang?" 
Romans9:24 (Chu khawngaihna belte chu Judate zing ata chauh ni loin, Jentailte zing ata pawh kohte kan ni)." 
Romans9:25 Hosea lehkhabuah chuan, ""Ka mite ni ngai lo chu, 'Ka mite,' ka ti ang; Tin, hmangaih ngai lohvi chu, 'Hmangaihi,' ka ti ang." 
Romans9:26 Tin, heti hi a lo ni ang a, an hnenah, 'Ka mite in ni lo e,' a tihna hmunah ngei chuan Pathian nung fate vuahin an awm ang,"" tia ziak ang bawk khan." 
Romans9:27 Isaia pawhin Israel mite thu aupuiin, ""Israel mite chu tuifinriata tiau zatin tam mah se la, a hrem bak chauh chu chhandamin an awm ang." 
Romans9:28 Lalpa chuan rang taka tizo diamin lei chungah a hrem tur thu a hlen dawn si a,"" a tih kha." 
Romans9:29 Isaia vekin, ""Mipuite Lalpa chuan chi thlahtu min lo zuahsak suh se la chu, Sodom khua angin kan lo awm tawh ang a, Gomorra khua anga siamin kan lo awm tawh bawk ang,"" tia a lo sawi lawk ang bawk khan." 
Romans9:30 Engnge kan sawi tak ang le? Jentail, felna um lote chuan felna an lo phak tawh a ni, - rinna avanga felna chu." 
Romans9:31 Israel, felna dan umte erawh chuan felna dan chu an phak zo ta lo." 
Romans9:32 Eng vang nge ni? Rinnain an um lo a, thiltiha hmuh theih angin an um avang a ni. Tlukna lungah chuan an tlu si a;""Ngai teh, Zionah chuan tlukna lung leh dalna lungpui ka dah a, Tupawh amah ring apiang chu a mualpho lo ang,"" tih ziak ang khan." 
Romans9:33 Ngai teh, Zionah chuan tlukna lung leh dalna lungpui ka dah a, Tupawh amah ring apiang chu a mualpho lo ang,"" tih ziak ang khan." 
Romans10:1 Unaute u, ka thinlung duhzawng leh anni tana Pathian hnena ka tawngtaina chhan ber hi chhandama an lo awm theihna tur a ni." 
Romans10:2 Pathian lamah thahnem an ngai tih ka hriatpui a ni, hre famkim ang erawh chuan an ngai lo." 
Romans10:3 Pathian felna hre loin, anmahni felna tihngheh tumin, Pathian felnaah an intulut si lo." 
Romans10:4 Krista chu a ring apiangte tan felna an hmuh theihna turin Dan tibangtu a ni si a. 
Romans10:5 Mosia chuan, ""Dana felna zawm chu, chu felna avang chuan a nung ang,"" tiin a ziak a." 
Romans10:6 Rinnaa felna erawh chuan heti hian a sawi: In rilruin, 'Tunge vanah lawn ang?' emaw (chu chu chung lam ata Krista hruai chhuk tur tihna a ni);" 
Romans10:7 'Tunge leilawtah chhuk ang?' emaw (chu chu mitthi zing ata Krista hruai chhoh leh tur tihna a ni) ti suh u,"" tiin." 
Romans10:8 A nih leh,eng nge a sawi? ""Thu chuanin a hnaih a che,i ka leh i thinlungah pawh a awm,"" tiin a sawi a ni; chu chu rinna thu kan hrilh thin hi a ni;" 
Romans10:9 I kain Isua chu Lalpa a ni tih i tan a, Mitthi zing ata Pathianin a kai tho tih i thinlunga i rin chuan chhandamin i awm ang,"" tih hi." 
Romans10:10 Miten thinlungin an ring a, felna an hmu thin a; kain an tan a, chhandamna an hmu bawk thin a ni." 
Romans10:11 Pathian Lehkha Thuin,""Tupawh amah ring apiang an mualpho lo ang,""a ti a ni." 
Romans10:12 Juda leh Grik mite chu engah mah an danglam chuang si lo a, Lalpa pakhat an zaa chunga Lalpa a ni a, a lamtu apiangte chungah chuan thatna a ngah si thin a." 
Romans10:13 Tupawh Lalpa hming lam apiangte chu chhandamin an awm ang,"" tih a ni a." 
Romans10:14 A nih leh, an rin loha chu engtin nge an lam ang? A thu an hriat loha chu engtin nge an rin ang? Thu hriltu awm loin engtin nge an hriat ang?" 
Romans10:15 Tirh an nih loh chuan engtin nge thu an hril ang? Thil tha chanchin lawmawm thlentute ke chu a va mawi em! tih ziak ang khan. 
Romans10:16 Nimahsela Chanchin Tha chu an za chuan an awih vek lo. Isaian, ""Lalpa, kan thusawi tuin nge ring?"" a ti si a." 
Romans10:17 Chutichuan rinna chu hriatna avangin a lo awm thin a, tin, hriatna chu Krista thu avangin a lo awm." 
Romans10:18 A nih leh, an bengin an hre lo em ni? Hria e le, ""An thawm chu ram tinah a thang a, an thu chu kawlkil thlengin a thang chhuak ta.""" 
Romans10:19 A nih leh, Israel miten an hre lo em ni? ""Chia sawi tham lohte chu hmangin ka thiktir ang che u a; chi fing lote chu hmangin ka tithinur ang che u,"" tiin, Mosia'n a sawi hmasa ber." 
Romans10:20 Tin, Isaian huai takin, ""Mi zawng lote hmuhin ka awm a, mi lam lote hnenah hriattirin ka awm,"" a ti a.Amaherawhchu, Israel mite thu-ah chuan, ""Mi tihmawh leh hnialhratte tan nilengin ka bante ka phar thin kha,"" a ti a." 
Romans10:21 Amaherawhchu, Israel mite thu-ah chuan, ""Mi tihmawh leh hnialhratte tan nilengin ka bante ka phar thin kha,"" a ti a." 
Romans11:1 A nih leh, Pathianin a mite chu a paih thla em ni? Hnai lo e. Kei pawh Israel mi, Abrahama thlah, Benjamina hnam ka ni si a." 
Romans11:2 Pathianin a mi hriat lawkte chu a paih thla lo e. Pathian Lehkha Thuin Elija thu a sawi hi in hre lo em ni? Ani chuan Israel mite chung thu Pathian hnenah a thlen a," 
Romans11:3 Lalpa, i zawlneite an tihlum a; i maichamte an tichim a; keimah chauh ka la awm a, kei pawh mi tihhlum an tum a ni"" a tih hi." 
Romans11:4 Nimahsela Pathianin engtin nge a chhan? Baala hmaa thingthi ngai lo mi sangsarih keimah atan ka la zuah reng a ni,"" tiin a chhang a." 
Romans11:5 Chutiang bawkin tun lai pawh hian khawngaiha thlan ang zia ziain paih thlak bak chu an la awm. 
Romans11:6 Khawngaihna avang a nih chuan thiltih avang a ni tawh lo ang; chuti a nih loh chuan khawngaihna hi khawngaihna a ni tawh lo ang. 
Romans11:7 Engtin nge ni ta ang le?Israel mite chuan an zawn chu an hmu lo a, Thlante erawh chuan an hmu a, a dang zawng zawngte chu an chawlawl zo tawh a." 
Romans11:8 Pathianin vawiin thlengin an hnenah mutthlukna thlarau a pe a, hmuh theih lohna mitte, hriat theih lohna bengte nen,"" tih ziak ang khan." 
Romans11:9 Tin, Davida chuan, ""An dawhkan chu an tan thang leh fal leh,Tlukna leh thungrulhna lo ni rawh se;" 
Romans11:10 An hmuh theih lohna'n an mitte lo thim rawh se, nangin an hnungzang kuntir fo ang che,""a ti a." 
Romans11:11 Anih leh, an petek chu an tluk hlenna tur em ni? Hnai lo e. An tluk avangin Jentailte hnenah chuan chhandamna a lo thleng ta zawk a ni, Israel mite thiktirna'n." 
Romans11:12 Tichuan an tlukna mah khawvel tihhausakna a nih a, an kiamna mah Jentailte hausakna a nih bawk chuan an famkimna chu an hausakna a va ni lehzual dawn em!" 
Romans11:13 Chutichuan nangni Jentailte hnenah ka sawi a ni. Kei, Jentailte tirhkoh ka nih avangin ka chipuite ka thiktir theih hramna tur leh," 
Romans11:14 an zinga thenkhatte ka chhandam theihna turin ka rawngbawlna hi ka chawimawi a ni. 
Romans11:15 Anmahni paih thlakna mah khawvel thian lehna a nih chuan anmahni lawmlehna tur chu thihna ata nun lehna lo chu eng nge ni ang? 
Romans11:16 Tin, chhang hlawm sawh thlak hmasak chu a thianghlim chuan a hlawm pum chu chutiang bawk a ni; tin, a zung chu a thianghlim chuan a zarte chu chutiang bawk a ni." 
Romans11:17 Tin, a zar thenkhatte chu tihtliaha a awmin, nang, oliv suak ni a, anmahni zinga zawmin i awm a, oliv thinga thatna zung tawm ve tawh i nih chuan," 
Romans11:18 zar dangte lakah chuan inchhuang suh. Inchhuang mah la, nang a zung chawmtu i ni lo a, a zung chu a chawmtu che a ni zawk e." 
Romans11:19 Tin, nangin, ""Zawma ka awm theihna'n zarte tihtliahin an awm tawh alawm,"" i ti ang le." 
Romans11:20 A ni, an rin lohna avangin tihtliahin an awm a, nang i rinna avangin i ding a ni. Chapo suh la, hlau zawk rawh;" 
Romans11:21 Pathianin zar takte chu a zuah si loh chuan nang pawh a zuah bik lo ang che. 
Romans11:22 Chutichuan Pathian thatzia leh a tihbaizia chu ngaihtuah rawh; a tlute tan chuan a tihbai a ni; nang atan erawh chuan a tha a ni, a thatnaa i awm reng chuan; chutilochuan nang pawh sah thlakin i awm ve ang." 
Romans11:23 Tin, anni pawh chu ring loa an awm reng loh chuan zawmin an awm ang; Pathianin anmahni a zawm leh thei si a." 
Romans11:24 Nang oliv suak reng ata sah chum mah, piandan lo anga oliv thing thaah zawma i awm chuan chung a zar taktakte chu, anmahni oliv thing pangngaiah chuan zawm an va ni dawn nasa em!" 
Romans11:25 Unaute u, he thuruk hi in hriat loh ka duh si lo, chutilochuan in intifing ang; Jentailte famkimna a lo thlen hma chuan Israel mi thenkhatte chungah chawlawlna a lo thleng rih a ni, tih hi;" 
Romans11:26 chutichuan, Israel mi zawng zawng chhandamin an awm ang; ""Zion atangin Chhandamtu chu a lo chhuak ang a, Jakoba hnen ata Pathian ngaihsak lohna a tibo ang,""" 
Romans11:27 Chu chu an hnena ka thuthlun tur chu a ni, an sualte ka lak bo hunah chuan,"" tih ziak ang khan." 
Romans11:28 Chanchin Tha lam ngaihtuah chuan nangmahni avangin hmelma an ni a; Thlan thu lam ngaihtuah erawh chuan thlahtute avang khan duh takte an ni. 
Romans11:29 Pathianin a thilthlawnpekah leh a kohnaah chuan a rilru a lamlet ngai si lo a. 
Romans11:30 Hmanah chuan Pathian thu in awih lo a, nimahsela tunah chuan an awih loh avangin khawngaihna in hmu si a," 
Romans11:31 chutiang bawkin, tunah chuan Pathianin a khawngaih che u avang hian, khawngaihna an hmuh ve theihna turin anni pawh chuan an awih ta lo a nih hi." 
Romans11:32 Pathianin a khawngaih vek theihna'n mi zawng zawng awih lohnaah a khung ta vek si a. 
Romans11:33 Pathian finna leh hriatna ngahzia chu a va thuk em! A rorelnate chu hriat theih rual leh, a kawngte chu chhui theih rual a va ni lo em!" 
Romans11:34 Lalpa rilru chu tuin nge hria? Tunge a remruatsaktuah pawh tang tawh? 
Romans11:35 A rulh leh tur pawhin a hnenah tuin nge thil pe hmasa?Amah atang leh, amah avang leh amah atan thil zawng zawng a lo awm a ni si a; ama hnenah chuan chatuanin ropuina chu awm rawh se. Amen." 
Romans11:36 Amah atang leh, amah avang leh amah atan thil zawng zawng a lo awm a ni si a; ama hnenah chuan chatuanin ropuina chu awm rawh se. Amen." 
Romans12:1 Chutichuan unaute u, Pathian khawngaihna avang hian, inthawina nung leh thianghlim leh Pathian lawm tlak ni turin in taksa chu inhlanah ka ngen a che u; chu chu in rawngbawlna awm reng a ni." 
Romans12:2 He khawvel dan ang hian awm suh u la; Pathian duhzawng, a tha leh lawm tlak leh, that famkim chu in hriatfiah theihna'n, in rilru athara awmin lo danglam zawk tawh rawh u." 
Romans12:3 Pathianin mi pek khawngaihna avang hian in zingah tumah in inngaihhlut tawk aliama inngaihlu loin, Pathianin mi tin hnena rinna tawk a pek ang zelin fel taka ngaihtuah zawk turin ka ti theuh a che u." 
Romans12:4 Taksa pumkhatah peng tam tak kan nei a, peng zawng zawng thiltih erawh chu a inang lo a," 
Romans12:5 chutiang bawkin keini tam tak ni mah i la, Kristaah chuan taksa pumkhat kan ni a: a mal malin inpeng tawn theuh kan ni." 
Romans12:6 Khawngaihna min pek angzia zelin thilthlawnpek hrang hrang kan nei theuh a, thu hrilh tur a nih chuan kan rin tawk ang zelin I hril ang u;" 
Romans12:7 rawng bawl tur a nih chuan rawng I bawl tlat ang u; zirtirtu pawhin zirtir tlat rawh se; 
Romans12:8 zilhtu pawhin zilh tlat rawh se; thil petu chuan ui loin pe rawh se; roreltuin taima takin rel rawh se; mi khawngaihtuin lawm takin khawngaih rawh se. 
Romans12:9 Hmangaihna chu vervekna tel loin ni rawh se. Sual lam chu hua u la, tha lam chu pawm tlat rawh u." 
Romans12:10 Unaute hmangaih kawngah chuan hmangaih takin inlainat tawn theuh rawh u; chawimawi kawngah chuan induhsak tawn theuh u la; 
Romans12:11 taihmak kawngah chuan thatchhe suh u la; thlarau kawngah chuan thahnemngai ula; Lalpa rawng bawl u la; 
Romans12:12 beiseina kawngah chuan lawm u la; hrehawm tuarna kawngah chuan chhel u la tawngtaina kawngah chuan tawngtai fan fan u la; 
Romans12:13 mi thianghlimte tlakchhamnaah chhawmdawl u la; mikhualte lawmin awm fo u la. 
Romans12:14 A tiduhdahtu che u chu malsawmsak u la; malsawm u la, anchhia chu lawh suh u." 
Romans12:15 Lawmte chu lawmpui u la, tapte chu tahpui rawh u." 
Romans12:16 Ngaihtuah hmunkhatin awm tawn theuh rawh u. Inngaihtuah sang lutuk suh u la, mi tete pawl zawk rawh u. Intifing suh u." 
Romans12:17 Tu sual pawh sualin thungrul suh u. Mi zawng zawng ngaiha thil mawi ngaihtuah lawk rawh u. 
Romans12:18 A theih phawt chuan nangmahni lam tal, mi zawng zawng nen inremin awm rawh u." 
Romans12:19 Duh takte u, in phuba la suh u la, Pathian thinurna kian zawk rawh u, ""Phuba reng reng keima lak tur a ni, keima'n ka thungrul ang,' Lalpain a ti,"" tih ziak a ni si." 
Romans12:20 Chuvangin i hmelma a riltam chuan ei tur pe rawh, a tuihal chuan in tur pe rawh: chutiang i tih chuan a lu chungah meiling i chhek khawm a ni ang.Sual ngam chein awm suh la, thatnain sual chu ngam zawk rawh." 
Romans12:21 Sual ngam chein awm suh la, thatnain sual chu ngam zawk rawh." 
Romans13:1 Mi tin an chunga roreltute thu thuin awm rawh se. Pathian thu loin tumah roreltu an awm si lo; roreltua awmte hi Pathian ruat an ni. 
Romans13:2 Chuvangin tupawh roreltu hnial chu Pathian ruat dodal an ni a; a dodaltute chuan anmahni chungah rorelna an hmu ang. 
Romans13:3 Roreltute chu thil tha titu tan chuan hlauhawm an ni lo a; thil tha lo titu tan erawh chuan hlauhawm an ni. A nih leh, roreltu hlau loa awm i duh em? Thil tha ti la, a fak i hlawh ang chu;" 
Romans13:4 ani chu i thatna tura Pathian rawngbawltu a ni si a. Nimahsela thil sual i tih chuan hlau rawh, khandaih chu a keng mai mai si lo a; ani chu Pathian rawngbawltu, thil tisualtu chunga thinura phuba latu a ni si." 
Romans13:5 Chuvangin thinur hlauh vang chauh ni loin, i chhia leh tha hriatna avang pawhin roreltu thu thuin i awm tur reng a ni." 
Romans13:6 He mi avang hian chhiah pawh in chawi thin alawm; chutiang thil ngei ti fan fan turin Pathian rawngbawltute an ni si a. 
Romans13:7 Mi zawng zawng hnenah pek tur apiang pe rawh u; leiman pekna tura hnenah chuan leiman pe u la; chhiah chawina tura hnenah chuan chhiah chawi u la; tih tura chu tih u la; pawisak tura chu pawisa rawh u. 
Romans13:8 Inhmangaih tawnna ngawt lo chu tuma engmah ba suh u; mahni mihringpui hmangaihtu chuan dan chu a zawh famkim tawh si a. 
Romans13:9 Heng, ""Uire suh, Tual that suh, Ru suh, Awt suh,"" tih leh thupek dang la awm reng rengte hi, ""Nangmah i inhmangaih angin i vengte i hmangaih tur a ni,"" tih hian a khai khawm vek si a." 
Romans13:10 Hmangaihnain vengte a tikhawlo ngai lo a; chuvangin hmangaihna hi dan zawh famkimna a ni. 
Romans13:11 Tun lai thil awmzia in hriat avang leh muhil thawhharh a hun tawh tak zet tih in hriat avangin chu chu ka sawi a ni; tunah chuan kan rin tirh lai ai khan kan chhandamna chu a hnai ta zawk si a. 
Romans13:12 Zan hi a ral lek lek tawh a, khua a var dawn ta e; chuvangin thima thiltih chu paih i la, eng thuamin i inthuam ang u." 
Romans13:13 Chhuna awm angin mawi takin i awm ang u, zu in buai leh zu ruia awm loin, hur leh inngaih hmanga awm loin, insual leh initsika awm loin.Lal Isua Krista chuan inthuam zawk u lang, in tisa chakna puitlin turin engmah insiam suh u." 
Romans13:14 Lal Isua Krista chuan inthuam zawk u lang, in tisa chakna puitlin turin engmah insiam suh u." 
Romans14:1 Tin, rinnaa chak lo mi chu a rinhlelhnate sawisel loin lawm rawh u." 
Romans14:2 Mi pakhatin thil engkim ei theiin a inring a, mi chak lo erawh chuan thlai chauh a ei thin." 
Romans14:3 Engkim ei mi chuan a ei lo mi hmusit suh se; ei lo mi pawhin a ei mi chu sawisel suh se; Pathianin ani chu a lawm tawh alawm. 
Romans14:4 Mi dang chhiahhlawh sawiseltu chu tu nge maw i nih le? A din leh a tluk chu ama hotu tan a ni. Nimahsela ani zawng dintirin a awm ang, Lalpa chuan a dintir thei si a." 
Romans14:5 Mi pakhatin ni khat hi ni dang ai hian a ngaihlu bik thin a, mi dangin ni zawng zawng hi inang theuhin a ngai thin a ni. Mi tin mahni rilruah inhre chiang rawh se." 
Romans14:6 Ni serhtu chuan Lalpa chawimawina'n a serh thin a ni. Tin, engkim eitu chuan Pathian hnenah lawmthu a sawi avangin Lalpa chawimawina'n a ei thin; a ei lotu pawh chuan Pathian hnenah lawmthu a sawi a, Lalpa chawimawina'n a ei lo thin a ni." 
Romans14:7 Tumah mahni tana nung kan ni lo a, tumah mahni tana thi kan ni hek lo." 
Romans14:8 Kan nun chuan Lalpa tan kan nung a; kan thih pawhin Lalpa tan kan thi a ni si; chuvangin kan nun pawhin, kan thih pawhin, Lalpa ta kan ni." 
Romans14:9 Krista thihna leh a lo nun lehna chhan chu mi nung leh mitthi Lalpa a nih theihna hi a ni si. 
Romans14:10 Nimahsela, nangin engati nge i unau i sawisel ni? A nih loh leh, nangin engati nge i unau i hmuhsit ni? Pathian rorelna thutphah hmaah kan vaiin kan la ding dawn si a;" 
Romans14:11 Lalpa chuan, 'Mi tinreng ka hmaah an kun ang a, lei tinreng pawh Pathian hnenah a inpuang ang, tiin chhia ka chham a ni,' a ti a,"" tih ziak a ni si a." 
Romans14:12 Chutichuan kan zain Pathian hnenah mahni chanchin kan sawi theuh tur a ni. 
Romans14:13 Chuvangin I insawisel tawh suh ang u, tupawhin mahni unau dalna emaw tlukna emaw siam loh tum zawk rawh u." 
Romans14:14 Amah ngawtah chuan thiang lo engmah reng a awm lo tih Lalpa Isuaah chuan ka hre em em mai, englo thiang loa ngaitu tan erawh chuan amah atan chuan a thiang lo a ni." 
Romans14:15 I englo ei vangin I unau rilru a nat chuan hmangaih dan ang I zawh tawh lo a ni. A thih ai Kristan a thihsaka chu I englo eiin tiboral suh. 
Romans14:16 Chutichuan in tana thatna chu sual lama sawiin awm suh se; 
Romans14:17 Pathian ram chu ei leh in lam thu a ni si lo a, felna te, remna te, Thlarau Thianghlima lawmna te a ni zawk e." 
Romans14:18 Tupawh chung thu-ah chuan Krista rawngbawl chu Pathian lawmzawng leh mihring fakin a awm thin a ni. 
Romans14:19 Chutichuan inremna tur leh intihsawt tawnna tur thilte chu i um ang u. 
Romans14:20 I englo ei vangin Pathian hnathawh tichhe suh. Thil zawng zawng a thianghlim ngei mai, nimahsela a englo eiin mi a tihtluk chuan a eitu tan sualna a ni." 
Romans14:21 I unau tlukna tur a nih chuan sa ei loh te, uain in loh te, thil engpawh tih loh a tha a ni." 
Romans14:22 Rinna i neih chu Pathian hmaah nangmah chauha hriatin nei mai rawh. Mahni tha tih kawnga thiam loh inchantir lo chu a eng a thawl e.Amaherawhchu ringhleltuin a ei chuan rinnain a ei loh avangin thiam loh a chang a ni; engpawh rinna loa tih chu sual a ni si a. 
Romans14:23 Amaherawhchu ringhleltuin a ei chuan rinnain a ei loh avangin thiam loh a chang a ni; engpawh rinna loa tih chu sual a ni si a. 
Romans15:1 Chutichuan keini mi chakte hian mahni lawmna zawng loin, mi chak lote chak lohnate chu kan tuarpui zawk tur a ni." 
Romans15:2 Mahni vengte tihsawtna'n an thatna turin tihlawm i tum theuh ang u; 
Romans15:3 Krista pawh chuan mahni lawmna a zawng si lo; Nangmah hautute hauna chu keima chungah a tla ta a,"" tih ziak ang khan a ni zawk." 
Romans15:4 Pathian Lehkha Thua chhelna leh thlamuanna hmua beiseina kan neih theihna turin, hman laia ziak apiangte chu keimahni min zirtirna turin ziak a ni si a." 
Romans15:5 Chutichuan kan Lalpa Isua Krista Pathian leh a Pa chu, thinlung hmunkhat leh thuruala kan chawimawi theihna turin," 
Romans15:6 chhelna leh thlamuanna Pathian chuan Krista Isua sawi angin rilru hmunkhat pu tawnin awmtir che u rawh se. 
Romans15:7 Chuvangin Krista chuan Pathian tihropuina'n a lawm che u ang bawk khan inlawm tawn rawh u. 
Romans15:8 Hei hi ka sawi chu a ni; thlahtute hnena thutiamte kha tinghet tur leh, a khawngaihna avanga Jentailten Pathian an chawimawi theihna turin, Pathian thu a dik tih hriattirna'n Krista chu serh tante rawngbawltuah a lo awm a." 
Romans15:9 Chuvangin Jentailte zingah chuan, ka fak ang chia, i hming chawimawina turin hla ka sa ang,"" tih ziak ang khan." 
Romans15:10 Tin, ""Nangni Jentail zawng zawngte u, a mite nen lawm rawh u,"" a ti leh a." 
Romans15:11 Tin, ""Nangni Jentail zawng zawngte u, Lalpa chu fak rawh u; mi zawng zawng pawhin Amah fak rawh se,"" a ti leh a." 
Romans15:12 Tin, Isaian, ""Jesaia zungzam chu a awm ang a, Jentailte lala awm turin a lo chhuak tur chu a awm bawk ang; Ani chu Jentailte chuan an beisei chhan ang,"" a ti leh bawk a." 
Romans15:13 Thlarau Thianghlim thiltihtheihna zarah beiseina in ngah theihna turin, beiseina Pathian chuan in rin avangin, lawmna leh remna tinrengin tikhat che u rawh se." 
Romans15:14 Tin, ka unaute u, nangmahni chung thu chu, nangmahni chung thu chu, nangmahni ngei thatnain in khat a, finna tinreng in ngah a, in inzilh tawn thei bawk tih keimah tak pawhin dik takin ka hria." 
Romans15:15 Nimahsela Jentailte zinga Krista Isua rawngbawltua ka awm theihna turin Pathianin mi pek khawngaihna avang hian hriatpui tur che uin khawimaw kar karah huai deuhin ka ziak a ni. 
Romans15:16 Ka Jentail hlante chu Thlarau Thianghlim tihthianghlim an ni a, lawm tlak an nih theihna turin, Pathian Chanchin Tha kawngah Puithiam hna ka thawk a ni." 
Romans15:17 Chutichuan Pathian lam kawngah Krista Isuaah chuan chhuan tur ka nei a ni. 
Romans15:18 Kristan Jentailte awihtir turin thusawi leh thiltihin, chhinchhiahnate leh thilmakte thiltihtheihnaa, Thlarau Thianghlim thiltihtheihnaah chuan, keimah mi hmanga a thiltihte lo chu engmah ka sawi ngam si lo a." 
Romans15:19 Jerusalem khua leh a vel ram atangin Illurikon ram thlengin, Krista Chanchin Tha chu ram tinah ka hril kim tawh; keimah mi hmanga a thiltih chu chuti kau chu a ni." 
Romans15:20 A ni, mi dang lungphum chunga rem chho ka lo nih lohna'n, Chanchin Tha chu Krista hming lam tawhna hmunah hril loin," 
Romans15:21 A chanchin la hrilhna ngai loh mite chuan an hmu ang a, la hre ngai lote chuan an hria ang,"" tih ziak ang khan, hrilh ka tum zawk thin a ni." 
Romans15:22 Chuvang tak pawh chuan a ni, in hnena lo kal ka thulh fo thin ni." 
Romans15:23 Tunah erawh chuan he'ng ram velah hian thawhna hmun reng ka nei ta lo a, kum tam tak chu in hnena lo kal chakin ka awm tawh bawk a." 
Romans15:24 Spain rama ka kal hun apiangin ka kal pahin hmuh che u ka beisei si a, nangmahni pawl kham deuh zet i la, chu lama ka kalnaah chuan nangniho mi zuk thlah ka beisei bawk a." 
Romans15:25 Tunah erawh chuan mi thianghlimho rawngbawl turin Jerusalem khuaah chuan ka kal rih dawn a ni. 
Romans15:26 Makedonia leh Akaia rama mite chuan lungni takin Jerusalem khuaa mi thianghlimte zinga retheite tan sum an thawhlawm tawh si a.
