2Corinthians3:17 Tin, Lalpa chu Thlarau chu a ni a; Lalpa Thlarau awmna apiangah chuan zalenna a awm thin.Chutichuan,keini chu kan zain hmai khuh loin darthlalang anga Lalpa chhun enin, ropuina atanga ropui zelin, chu mi anpui ngeia awm turin tihdanglamin ka awm thin, Lalpa (Thlarau) ata chu kan hmuh ang zelin." 
2Corinthians3:18 Chutichuan,keini chu kan zain hmai khuh loin darthlalang anga Lalpa chhun enin, ropuina atanga ropui zelin, chu mi anpui ngeia awm turin tihdanglamin ka awm thin, Lalpa (Thlarau) ata chu kan hmuh ang zelin." 
2Corinthians4:1 Chu mi avang chuan khawngaihna kan hmuh ang zela he rawngbawlna hi kan neih avangin kan dawl lo a; 
2Corinthians4:2 thil zahthlak inthupte chu kan malmak ta zawk a, ngamthlemna thu kan hmang lo a, Pathian thu mi bumna'n kan hmang hek lo; thutak hriattirPathian mithmuhin mi tin chhia leh tha hriatna mit kan intluntir zawk thin a ni." 
2Corinthians4:3 Nimahsela, kan Chanchin Tha hi khuhin a awm chuan boral mekahte hian a ni, khuha a awm ni;" 
2Corinthians4:4 Krista, Pathian anpui, a ropuizia Chanchin Tha eng chuan anmahni a chhun en theih lohna turin chungahte chuan he khawvel pathian hian ring lote rilru a tidel ta a." 
2Corinthians4:5 Mahni thu kan hril si lo a, Krista Isua chu Lalpa a nih kan hril zawk thin a, keini pawh Isua avanga in bawih kan nih kan hril bawk thin." 
2Corinthians4:6 Isua Krista hmelah chuan Pathian ropuizia hriatna eng chu min pe turin, ""Thim ata eng a eng chhuak ang,"" titu Pathian chuan kan thinlungte hi a chhun eng ta si a." 
2Corinthians4:7 Nimahsela, thiltihtheihna nasatzia chu keimahni hnena mi ni loin, Pathian ta a nih theih zawkna turin chu ro chu hlum belahte kan vawng a ni." 
2Corinthians4:8 Lehlam lehlama neksawrin kan awm a, nimahsela kan thaw a ipik si lo; mangangin kan awm a, nimahsela kan bei a dawng si lo;" 
2Corinthians4:9 tihduhdahin kan awm a, nimahsela kalsanin kan awm si lo; vuak thlukin kan awm a, nimahsela tihboralin kan awm si lo;" 
2Corinthians4:10 kan taksaah hian kumkhuain Isua thihna chu kan pu zel thin a, Isua nunna pawh kan taksaah hian a lan theihna'n." 
2Corinthians4:11 Keini mi nungdama la awmte hi Isua avnga thi tura mantirin kan awm fo a, Isua nunna pawh kan tisa thi theiah hian a lan theihna'n." 
2Corinthians4:12 Chutichuan, keimahniah hian thihnain a thawk thin a, nangniah erawh chuan nunnain a thawkzawk thin a ni." 
2Corinthians4:13 Amaherawhchu, ""Ka ring a, chuvangin thu ka sawi a ni,"" tih ziak ang khan, chu mi rinna rilru ngei puin keini pawhin kan ring ve a, chuvangin thu kan sawi bawk a;" 
2Corinthians4:14 Lalpa Isua kaithotu chuan keini pawh Isua hnenah min kaitho ve dawn a, nangmahni nen min dintir dawn tih kan hre si a." 
2Corinthians4:15 Engkim nangmahni thatna tur a ni si a, khawngaihna chu mi tam zawk zara tihpuna awmin, Pathian ropuina turin lawmthu nasa tak a sawitir theihna'n." 
2Corinthians4:16 Chu mi avangin kan dawl lo a,kan pawn lam mihring hi lo awngrawp telh telh mah se la, kan chhung lam mihring chu ni tin siam thar zelin a awm zawk a ni." 
2Corinthians4:17 Kan hrehawm nep tak, tun mit khap kar chhung chauha awm tur hian ropuina nasa tak chatuan atan min siamsak nasa tulh tulh a ni;thil hmuh theihte hi en loin, thil hmuh theih lohte chu kan en zawk si a; thil hmuh theihte rei lo te atan a ni a, thil hmuh theih lohte erawh chu chatuan atan a ni si a." 
2Corinthians4:18 thil hmuh theihte hi en loin, thil hmuh theih lohte chu kan en zawk si a; thil hmuh theihte rei lo te atan a ni a, thil hmuh theih lohte erawh chu chatuan atan a ni si a." 
2Corinthians5:1 Kan awmna leia in hi thiat mah se la, vanah, in kuta sak loh, chatuana awm tur, Pathian hnen ata in nghet chu kan nei tih kan hre si a." 
2Corinthians5:2 Van ata kan awmna tur sin thuah chk em emin he mi inah hian kan rum tak meuh meuh si thin a; 
2Corinthians5:3 chutianga sinin awm i la saruakin kan lo awm lo ang. 
2Corinthians5:4 Keini he awmnaa awmte hi rit phurin kan rum tak zet si a, sin loa awm kan duh vang a ni lo a, sin thuaha awm kan duh vang a ni zawk, thi thei hi nunna lem zawhin a awm theihna'n." 
2Corinthians5:5 Tin, chu mi ngei atana min buatsaihtu chu Pathian a ni, zakhamna Thlarau min petu kha." 
2Corinthians5:6 Chutichuan, taksaa kan awm chhung hian Lalpa hnenah kan awm lo tih hriain, kumkhuain muang takin kan awm thin;" 
2Corinthians5:7 (hmu theia kal loin, rinnain kan kal zawk si a);" 
2Corinthians5:8 muang takin kan awm, ka ti, taksaa awm loa Lalpa hnena awm kan duh zawk." 
2Corinthians5:9 Chuvangin, awm i la, awm suh i la, ama lawmzawng mi nih kan tum tlat thin a ni." 
2Corinthians5:10 Mi tinin taksaa thil tihte, a chhia a thain, kan tih ang zela kan hmuh theuh theihna turin, Krista rorelna thutphah hmaah chuan tihlanin kan awm vek tur a ni si a." 
2Corinthians5:11 Chutichuan, Lalpa tih nachang hriain mihringte chu kan thlem thin a, Pathian hnenah erawh chuan lantirin kan awm a; nangmahni chhia leh tha hriatnaah pawh lantira kan awm ka beisei." 
2Corinthians5:12 In hnenah kan insawi mawi leh a ni lo a, thinlung lam ni lo a, alang lam mai chhuangtute chu eng emaw chhanna tur in neih theihna turin keimahni lamah chhuan chhan siam che uin kan sawi zawk a ni e." 
2Corinthians5:13 Kan at leh, Pathian tan a ni a; kan fin leh, nangni tan a ni si a." 
2Corinthians5:14 Krista hmangaihna chuan min tir lui a ni; heti hian kan ngaihtuah: Mi zawng zawng thih aiin mi pakhat a thi a, chuvangin mi zawng zawng chu an thi a ni;" 
2Corinthians5:15 tin, a nungte chu anmahni tan an nun tawh loh a, an thih aia thia tholeha tan chuan an nun tawh zawkna turin a ni, mi zawng zawng thih aiin a thih ni." 
2Corinthians5:16 Chu mi avang chuan tun achinah hian keini zawngin tisa lamah chuan tumah kan hre tawh lo ang; tisa lamah Krista chu lo hre tawh mah i la, tunah zawng kan hre leh tawh lo e." 
2Corinthians5:17 Chu mi avang chuan tupawh Kristaa a awm chuan thil siam thar a lo ni a; thil hluite chu a ral ta a; ngai teh u, a lo thar ta." 
2Corinthians5:18 Nimahsela, engkim Pathian hnen ata chhuak a ni a; ani chuan Krista avangin amah nen inremin min siam a, inremna rawngbawl hna min pe a;" 
2Corinthians5:19 khatia, Pathianin Kristaah chuan khawvel hi amah nen inremin a siama an bawhchhiatnate chu bawhchhiatnaa ruatsak loin, inremna thu min kawltir kha." 
2Corinthians5:20 Chutichuan, Krista aia palai kan ni a, Pathianin keimahni min hmangin a ngen chiam che u tih theih a ni; ""Pathian nen lo inrem rawh u,"" tiin Krista aiah kan ngen che u a ni.Amahah chuan Pathian felna kan lo nih theihna turin, sual reng reng hre lo chu Pathianin keimahni avangin sualah a siam a." 
2Corinthians5:21 Amahah chuan Pathian felna kan lo nih theihna turin, sual reng reng hre lo chu Pathianin keimahni avangin sualah a siam a." 
2Corinthians6:1 Tin, Pathian khawngaihna chu sawtpui loa in hmuh lohna turin, amah thawhpuiin ka ngen chiam a che u." 
2Corinthians6:2 Hun lawmawmah ka ngaithla che a, Chhandamna ni-ah ka tanpui che,"" a ti si a. Ngai teh u, tun hi hun lawmawm chu a ni a; ngai teh u, tun hi chhandamna ni chu a ni." 
2Corinthians6:3 Kan rawngbawl hna hi an dem lohna turin eng kawngah mah tluk phahna tur reng reng kan siam lo a; 
2Corinthians6:4 Pathian rawngbawltute angin engkimah mi mit tlungin kan awm zawk thin, nasa taka chhelnaah te, hrehawmnaah te, neksawrnaah te, hnawhchepnaah te," 
2Corinthians6:5 vuaknaah te, lung in tannah te, buainah te, thawhrimnaah te, mutmawhnaah te, chaw ngheinaah te," 
2Corinthians6:6 thianghlimnaah te, hriatnaah te, dawhtheihnaah te, ngilngeihnaah te, Thlarau Thianghlimah te, hmangaihna tak takah te," 
2Corinthians6:7 thutak thuah te, Pathian thiltihtheihnaah te; ding lam leh vei lama felna hriamhreitein," 
2Corinthians6:8 ropuina leh chawimawi lohnain, hming sawichhiat leh hming sawithatin; tihdertu angin, mi dik tak ni siin;" 
2Corinthians6:9 mi hriat tham loh angin, hmingthang tak siin; thi lek lek angin, ngai teh u, kan nung si; thunun angin, tihhlum si lohin;" 
2Corinthians6:10 lungngai angin, nimahsela lawm fo siin; rethei angin, nimahsela mi tam tak tihausa siin; engmah nei lo angin, nimahsela engkim ngah siin." 
2Corinthians6:11 Aw, Korinth-a mite u,kan thinlung pawh phawrh vekin in hnenah thu kan sawi a," 
2Corinthians6:12 kan inhawng a, nangni erawh chu in inhawng ve si lo." 
2Corinthians6:13 Tichuan, in chunga kan tih ang bawk khan nangni pawh kan lakah inhawng ve turin fate ngenin kan ngen a che u." 
2Corinthians6:14 Ring lo mite nen rual lo taka nghawngkawl bat dunin awm suh u; suahsualna leh felnain eng nge intawmna an neih? A nih loh leh thim leh engin eng nge inpawlna an neih? 
2Corinthians6:15 Beliara leh Krista pawhin eng nge inngeihna an neih? A nih loh leh ring lo leh ringtu chuan eng nge chan dun an neih? 
2Corinthians6:16 Milemte leh Pathian biak in pawhin eng nge inremna an neih? Keini zawng Pathian nung biak in kan ni si; Pathianin, ""Anmahniah ka awm ang a, anmahniah ka leng bawk ang; tin, an Pathian ka ni ang a, anni pawh ka mite an ni ang,"" a tih ang khan." 
2Corinthians6:17 Chuvangin, ""An zing ata lo chhuak u la, a hrangin awm rawh u, thil bawlhhlawh reng reng pawh dek suh u,"" Lalpa'n a ti.Chutichuan, ""Ka lawm ang che u a, in tan Pa ka ni ang a, nangni pawh ka tan fanu fapa in ni ang,"" Lalpa Engkimtitheia chuan a ti." 
2Corinthians6:18 Chutichuan, ""Ka lawm ang che u a, in tan Pa ka ni ang a, nangni pawh ka tan fanu fapa in ni ang,"" Lalpa Engkimtitheia chuan a ti." 
2Corinthians7:1 \ Chutichuan, duh takte u, chung thutiam chu kan neih avangin, tisa leh thlarau bawlhhlawhna zawng zawngah i intifai ang u, Pathian tih dek chunga thianghlimna tifamkimin." 
2Corinthians7:2 In thinlungah hmun mi kian rawh u; tu chungah mah kan tisual lo a, tumah kan tikhawlo lo a, tumah kan dinchan khalh lo e." 
2Corinthians7:3 Chu chu thiam loh chantir tur che uin ka ti a ni lo e; thih leh thi tlang a, dam leh dam tlang turin kan thinlungah hian kan vawng che u tih hman lawkah khan ka sawi kha." 
2Corinthians7:4 Nangni lamah chuan ka tawng ngamzia hi a nasa a, ka chhuanzia che u hi a nasa a ni; thlamuannain ka khat a, kan hrehawmna zawng zawngah chuan hlimin ka khat liam a." 
2Corinthians7:5 Makedonia ram kan thlen pawh khan kan tisain muanna reng reng a nei chuang lo a, lehlam lehlamah chuan tihhrehawmin kan awm ta zawk a; pawn lamah insualnate a awm a, chhung lamah hlauhnate a awm a." 
2Corinthians7:6 Nimahsela inngaitlawmte thlamuantu Pathian chuan, Tita lo kalna chuan min thlamuan ta a;" 
2Corinthians7:7 a lo kalna chauh chuan a ni lo a, in lunglenzia te, in tahzia te, ka chunga in thahnemngaihzia te min hrilhin, nangmahnia a thlamuanna pawh chuan min thlamuan ta a ni; chutichuan ka lawm lehzual ta a." 
2Corinthians7:8 Ka lehkha thawn khan tilungngai che u mah i la ka inchhir ta lo; a tirah erawh kha chuan ka inchhir a ni, kha lehkha thawn khan a tilungngai che u tih ka hriat avangin; nimahsela rei lo te chauh a nih kha." 
2Corinthians7:9 Tunah chuan ka lawm a ni, tihlungngaiha in awm avang a ni lo a, simna tura in lungngaih avang a ni zawk e. Keimahni avanga engmah in chan lohna turin Pathian duhzawng anga tihlungngaihin in awm si a." 
2Corinthians7:10 Pathian duhzawnga lungngaihna chuan chhandamna tura simna a thlen a, chu chu inchhirawm lo tak a ni. Khawvel lungngaihna erawh chuan thihna a thlen zawk a ni." 
2Corinthians7:11 Ngai teh mah u, Pathian duhzawnga tihlungngaiha in awmna chuan thil lak urhsunna te, pawi khawih ve lo in ni tih lantir duhna te, sual huatna leh sual hlauhna te, min ngaihna leh thahnemngaihna te, sual titu thunun zel tura inpeihna te a neihtir tak che u hi." 
2Corinthians7:12 Chutichuan, in hnenah ziak mah i la, a sual titu avang khan ka ziak ta lo a, a sual tuartu avang khan ka ziak hek lo, kan chunga in thahnemngaihzia Pathian mithmuha inhnena hriattira a awm theihna turin ka ziak zawk a ni." 
2Corinthians7:13 Chuvangin, thlamuanin kan awm ta reng a; keimahni thlamuanna chauh loah pawh, Tita lawmna avangin kan lawm nasa lehzual a, nangni zawng zawngin a rilru in tihharhsak tak avangin." 
2Corinthians7:14 A hnenah eng kawngah pawh nangmahni chhuang che u mah i la, ka mualpho si lo a; mualpho ahnekin engkim in hnena thu taktaka kan sawi thin ang khan, Tita hmaa kan chhuan chu thu taktak a lo ni ta ngei a." 
2Corinthians7:15 Tin, in zaa a thu in awihzia te, hlau leh khur chunga amah in lawmzia te chu hre rengin, a thinlung chu nangmahni lamah a cheng nasa lehzual ta a ni.Kawng tinrengah in chunga ka muan avangin ka lawm a ni." 
2Corinthians7:16 Kawng tinrengah in chunga ka muan avangin ka lawm a ni. 
2Corinthians8:1 Tin, unaute u, Makedonia rama kohhranho pawlte zinga Pathian khawngaihna pek chu kan hriattir dawn a che u;" 
2Corinthians8:2 khatia hrehawma fiahna nasa tak chunga an hlimna liam leh nasa taka an retheihna chu a liam a, an thilphalna nasa taka a chan takzia kha." 
2Corinthians8:3 Khawngaihna, mi thianghlimte rawngbawla tel ve chu," 
2Corinthians8:4 nasa taka min dil chiamin, an theih tawkin, a ni, an theih tawk aia liam pawh, anmahni duh thu ngeiin an pe tih ka hriatpui a sin." 
2Corinthians8:5 Chu pawh chu kan rin loh ang takin an ti a, Pathian duhzawngin anmahni ngei Lalpa hnenah leh keini hnenah an inpe hmasa te te a ni;" 
2Corinthians8:6 Chutichuan, hmana a lo tih tan tawh avang khan he khawngaihna pawh hi nangmahnia ti zo nghal turin Tita chu kan ngen ta hial a." 
2Corinthians8:7 Chutichuan, engkim - rinna te, thusawi thiamna te, hriatna te, thahnemngaihna zawng zawng te, min hmangaihnate - in ngah ang hian chu khawngaihna pawh chu in ngah theihna'n taihmak chhuah rawh u." 
2Corinthians8:8 Thu pe lamin ka sawi lo a, mi dang thahnemngaihnain in hmangaihna takzia pawh chu fiah turin ka sawi zawk a ni." 
2Corinthians8:9 Kan Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna chu, a retheihna avanga in lo hausak theihna turin hausa mah se la nangmahni avang ngeiin a lo retheih tak kha in hre si a." 
2Corinthians8:10 Tichuan, chu miah chuan ka ngaih dan ang a ni ka sawi ni, chu chu in tan a tha si a, kum khat a ni tawh, a tan hmasatute in ni a, in ti tan chauh pawh ni loin, duh pawh in duh tan ta bawk a." 
2Corinthians8:11 Chutichuan duh turin inpeihna a awm ang khan, in neih ang zela hlenna pawh a awm theihna turin, tunah zawng ti hlen tawh rawh u." 
2Corinthians8:12 Inpeihna chu a awm phawt chuan, mi a neih loh pui ni loin, a neih angzia zela a pek chu lawm tlak a ni si a." 
2Corinthians8:13 Mi dang an rim loh a, nangni in rimna turin ka ti a ni lo a," 
2Corinthians8:14 inchawhrualna'n, in neih liam chu tun lai hian an tlakchham phuhrukna a lo nih a, an neih liam pawh in tlakchham phuhrukna a lo la nih ve thung theihna turin ka ti zawk a ni; chutichuan chawhrualna a lo awm thei ang:" 
2Corinthians8:15 A chhar tam chuan achuangin a nei lo a, a chhar tlem chuan a tlachham hek lo,"" tih ziak ang kha." 
2Corinthians8:16 Tin, in chunga ka thahnemngaihna ang Tita thinlunga pe thintu Pathian hnenah chuan lawmthu awm rawh se." 
2Corinthians8:17 Ani chuan kan ngenna chu a pawm ngei a; nimahsela kan ngen avang chauh ni loin, amah ngei chu thahnemngai tak a ni a, ama duh thlan ngeiin in hnena kal turin a chhuak dawn a ni." 
2Corinthians8:18 Tin, a hnenah unaupa kan tir ve dawn a, ani chu Chanchin Tha kawnga an fak thu kohhranho pawl zawng zawngah a thang chhuak a;" 
2Corinthians8:19 chuti chauh pawh a ni lo a, Lalpa ropuina tur leh kan inpeihzia entir tura a rawng kan bawl he khawngaihna thu-ah hian kan hnena khaw fang ve tura kohhranho pawlte ruat ve reng a ni bawk a." 
2Corinthians8:20 A rawng kan bawl he thilpek kawngah hian tuma'n min dem lohna turin kan fimkhur a; 
2Corinthians8:21 Lalpa ngaih chauhvah ni loin mihring ngaih pawha thil mawi kan ngaihtuah lawk thin a ni. 
2Corinthians8:22 Tin, an hnenah kan unaupa kan kaltir ve dawn a, ani chu kawng tam takah thahnemngai tak a ni tih vawi tam tak kan fiah tawh a, tunah phei chuan a rin em em che u avangin thahnem a ngai nasa lehzual ta a ni." 
2Corinthians8:23 Tita hi chu ka thian leh nangmahni lama ka hnathawhpui a ni a; tin, kan unaute hi chu kohhranho pawlte tirhkoh, Krista ropuina chu an ni.Chu mi avang chuan in hmangaih tih hriatna leh, kan chhuanna che u hriatna chu kohhranho pawlte hmaah chuan an hnenah tilang rawh u." 
2Corinthians8:24 Chu mi avang chuan in hmangaih tih hriatna leh, kan chhuanna che u hriatna chu kohhranho pawlte hmaah chuan an hnenah tilang rawh u." 
2Corinthians9:1 Mi thianghlimte rawngbawl thu zawng in hnena ka ziak a ngai lo e; 
2Corinthians9:2 in inpeihzia chu ka hre si a, chu mi kawng thu-ah chuan, ""Kum khat a ni tawh, Akaia ram chu inbuatsaihin an awm ta,"" tiin Makedonia rama mite hnenah ka chhuang thin che u a; chutichuan in thahnemngaihna chuan an zinga mi tam tak a chawk harh ta a." 
2Corinthians9:3 Nimahsela, chu mi kawng thu-ah chuan ka chhuanna che u chu engmah lo a lo nih lohna turin unaute hi ka kaltir dawn a, ka sawi ang taka inbuatsaihin inlo awm theihna'n;" 
2Corinthians9:4 chutilochuan Makedonia rama mi tuten emaw mi lo zui hlauhin, inbuatsaih loa an rawn hmuh che u chuan, keini (nangni kan ti lo) he kan rinna che u kawngah hian kan mualpho dah ang e." 
2Corinthians9:5 Chuvangin, unaute hi in hnena lo kal hmasa a, tlang taka thilpek in tiam lawk kha lo siam lawk tura ngen tulin ka ring a ni, chu mi ngei chu lak luih ang lo a, tlang taka pek ang zawkin peih saa a lo awmna'n." 
2Corinthians9:6 Amaherawhchu chutiang kawngah chuan theh tlem chuan a at tlem bawk ang a, theh tam chuan a at tam bawk ang." 
2Corinthians9:7 Mi tinin ui chunga pe loin, pek loh theih loh anga ngaia pe hek loin, an thinlunga an tum ang zelin pe theuh rawh se; Pathian chuan hlim taka petu a ni a hmangaih ni." 
2Corinthians9:8 Tin, Pathianin khawngaihna tinreng in chungah a vur thei a ni; chutichuan nangnin engkimah a tawk zet nei foin, hnathawh tha tinreng atan in ngah thei ang;" 
2Corinthians9:9 A sem darh a; retheite hnenah a pe a; a felna chu kumkhuain a awm reng,"" tih ziak ang kha." 
2Corinthians9:10 Tin, thilphalna tinreng, keimahni avanga Pathian hnena lawmthu sawina siamtu chu nei tura engkima tihhausaka awmin," 
2Corinthians9:11 thehtu hnena chi petu leh ei atan chhang petu chuan in theh tur chi chu a pe che uin a tihpunsak ang che u a, in felna rahte chu a tihhlawksak bawk ang che u." 
2Corinthians9:12 He chhawmdawlna rawngbawlna hian mi thianghlimte tlakchhamnate chu a phuhruksak chauh pawh a ni si lo a, Pathian hnena lawmthu sawina tam taka changing a luang liam bawk a ni;" 
2Corinthians9:13 he rawngbawlna hian a fiahna che u avangin, Krista Chanchin Tha lama in thurin in zawmzia avang leh, anmahni tan leh mi zawng zawng tan thawhlawmnaa in thilphalzia avang hian Pathian an tiropui thin a sin;" 
2Corinthians9:14 anmahni ngei pawhin in chunga Pathian khawngaihna nasa em em avangin, in tan tawngtaisak chungin an ngai hle che u a ni.A thilpek sawi hleih theih loh avangin Pathian hnenah lawmthu awm rawh se." 
2Corinthians9:15 A thilpek sawi hleih theih loh avangin Pathian hnenah lawmthu awm rawh se. 
2Corinthians10:1 Tin, kei Paula, in zinga in mithmuha thuhnuairawlh taka awm a,in hnena awm loh veleha nangmahni lam zuam si thina ngei hian, Krista zaidamna leh nunnemnain kan ngen a che u;" 
2Corinthians10:2 a ni, in hnena ka awm hunah thenkhat, tisa anga awma min ruatte chunga huai taka awm ka tum ngamna ang hian ka zuam lohna tur che uin ka ngen a che u." 
2Corinthians10:3 Tisaah awm mah i la, tisa indo angin kan indo lo a," 
2Corinthians10:4 (keini inralthuamnate chu tisaa mi a ni si lo a, kulhpui nghet takte thiatna tura Pathian zarah thil ti thei tak a ni zawk)," 
2Corinthians10:5 hnialnate leh thil sang tinreng Pathian hriatna dal tura sang taka siamte chu thiatin, ngaihtuahna tinreng Krista thu awihna salah kan hruai a;" 
2Corinthians10:6 in thu awihzia a famkim hunah chuan thu awih lohna zawng zawng phuba la turin kan inpeih bawk a. 
2Corinthians10:7 In mithmuha thil awmte chu a ni, in en thin ni. Tupawhin Krista ta nia a inrin chuan hei hi mahniin ngaihtuah leh rawh se, amah chu Krista ta a ni ang bawkin keini pawh kan nih ve hi." 
2Corinthians10:8 Kan thuneihna (nangmahni thiatna'n ni lo a, nangmahni siam that zawkna'na Lalpa'n min pek hi) chhuang nasa lehzual mah i la ka mualpho dawn si lo a;" 
2Corinthians10:9 ka lehkha thawnte chuan tihhlauh che u tum anga ka lan lohna'n chu chu ka ti a ni. 
2Corinthians10:10 A lehkha thawnte chu a ritin a khauh a, a taksa lam erawh chu a awm nem a, a tawng pawh a sitawm a ni,"" an ti si a." 
2Corinthians10:11 Chutiang mi chuan hei hi ngaihtuah rawh se, in hnena kan awm loh laia lehkha thawna thua kan awm angin in hnena kan awm hunah pawh thiltihah kan awm bawk ang." 
2Corinthians10:12 Thenkhat mahni insawimawite zingah chuan kan inchhiar tel ngam lo a, anmahni nen kan intehkhin ngam hek lo; amaherawhchu anni zawng mahni leh mahni intehin, mahni leh mahni intehkhinin rilru nei loin an awm." 
2Corinthians10:13 Keini erawh zawng kan tehna tawk aliamah chuan kan uang lo ang a, Pathianin bial min chantir a, chu tehna ang zel chuan kan uang zawk ang, nangmahni pawh bial hial tura tehna chu." 
2Corinthians10:14 Bial phak loh pui bial che u angin kan huam zau lutuk si lo; Krista Chanchin Tha hrilin in khaw thleng pawhin kan lo kal kha: 
2Corinthians10:15 kan tehna tawk liama mi, mi dang thawh rimte chu kan chhuang lo a; in rin a than angzia zelin, kan bial chin ang zelah, in zingah nasa taka tihlenin kan awm ang tih beiseina kan nei zawk a," 
2Corinthians10:16 buatsaih sa kawng thu-ah chuan mi dang bial chhuang loin, in piah lam ram thleng pawha Chanchin Tha kan hrilh theihna'n." 
2Corinthians10:17 Nimahsela, ""A chhuang apiangin Lalpa chu chhuang rawh se,""Mahni insawi mawi chuan fak a hlawh si lo a, Lalpa'n a sawi mawi chuan fak a hlawh zawk a ni." 
2Corinthians10:18 Mahni insawi mawi chuan fak a hlawh si lo a, Lalpa'n a sawi mawi chuan fak a hlawh zawk a ni." 
2Corinthians11:1 Ka at deuhnaah hian nangnin mi dawhtheih ka va duh em! A ni, dawh pawh mi dawhthei ngei chhap e." 
2Corinthians11:2 Pathian thiknain a sin ka thik che u ni; Krista hnenah chuan nula thianghlim angin ka pek theihna tur che uin, pasal pakhat ka hualsak si che u a." 
2Corinthians11:3 Nimahsela, rul chuan a ngamthlemnain Evi a bum ang khan Krista lama takna leh thianghlimna ata chu eng emaw tiin in rilru chu an tikhawlo dah ang e, tih ka hlauthawng a ni." 
2Corinthians11:4 Kan hrilh che u a ni lo, Isua dang hrila in hnena lo kal apiang in lo ngai thei a, thlarau in chan ngai loh chu in chang a, Chanchin Tha dang in pawm ngai loh chu in pawm duh zel mai maw!" 
2Corinthians11:5 Chung tirhkoh lian berte chu eng kawngah mah tluk loh ka inring lo a sin. 
2Corinthians11:6 Thusawiah zawng tawng hmang thiam mah su i la, hriatnaah chuan chutiang ka ni lo; a ni, engkimah, mi zawng zawng zingah, nangmahni lama kan lantir kha." 
2Corinthians11:7 A nih loh leh, Pathian Chanchin Tha athlawn ngawta ka hrilh a, chawi sana in awm theihna tura ka intihhniam khan thil ka tisual a lo ni maw?" 
2Corinthians11:8 In zinga ka thawh lai khan Kohhran dangten min chhawmdawl a, nangni pui turin anni chu ka tihek a." 
2Corinthians11:9 Tin, in hnena ka awm a, ka tlakchham lai khan tumah ka tihautak lo a; unaute chu Makedonia ram ata an lo kalin ka tlakchhamna chu mi rawn phuhruksak si a; engkimah nangmahni tihautak loin ka insiam kha, khatiang khan ka insiam zel ang." 
2Corinthians11:10 Krista thutak keimaha a awm ang hian, Akaia ram lama he ka chhuanna hi tuma'n mi tihrehsak lo ang." 
2Corinthians11:11 Eng vangin nge? Ka hmangaih loh che u avang em ni? Pathianin a hria. 
2Corinthians11:12 Nimahsela, remchanna hmu duhte lak ata remchanna chu ka sah chah theihna turin ka tih thin hi ka ti zel ang; an chhuannaah chuan keimahni awm ang hian an lo awm theihna'n." 
2Corinthians11:13 Mi chutiangte chu Krista tirhkoha insiam chawpa, tirhkoh derte, hnathawktu mi bum hmangte an ni si a." 
2Corinthians11:14 Chu chu a mak lo e; Setana meuh pawh eng tirhkohvah a insiam chawp si thin a. 
2Corinthians11:15 Chuvangin,a rawngbawltute pawh chu felna rawngbawltuah insiam chawp mah se la thil mak a ni lo e; chungho tawpna chu an thiltih ang zelin a ni ang." 
2Corinthians11:16 Ka sawi leh ang, tuma'n mi aah mi ruat suh se; nimahsela mi ruat vek chuan, kei pawhin tlem tala ka chhuan ve theihna'n mi a angin mi dawh rawh u." 
2Corinthians11:17 Ka sawi hi Lalpa thu angin ka sawi lo a, ka chhuan rinna hian a ang takin ka sawi zawk a ni." 
2Corinthians11:18 Mi tam takin tisa anga an chhuan avangin kei pawhin ka chhuang ve the ang. 
2Corinthians11:19 Nangni zawng le mi fing in nih avangin mi ate chu lungawi takin in dawh si thin a. 
2Corinthians11:20 Miin bawihah siam che u se la, ei zo duak che u se la, salah man che u se la, mahni inchawimawi se la, in hmaiah beng che u se la in dawh si thin a." 
2Corinthians11:21 Kan lo chak ta lo angin insitin ka sawi a ni. Nimahsela, tupawhin eng kawngah pawh an ngam apiang (a takin han sawi ta i la) kei pawhin ka ngam." 
2Corinthians11:22 Hebrai mite an ni maw? Kei pawh ka ni. Israel mite an ni maw? Kei pawh ka ni. Abrahama thlahte an ni maw? Kei pawh ka ni. 
2Corinthians11:23 Krista rawngbawltute an ni maw? (Mi a angin han sawi ta i la), ka ni zawk mah; thawh rimnaahte nasa lehzualin, tan ina tannaahte nasa lehzualin, vuaknaahte hleihluak takin, thihnaahte vawi tam tak." 
2Corinthians11:24 Judate lakah vuakna vawi khata vawi sawmli tling lo vawi nga ka tawk a; 
2Corinthians11:25 vawi thum tianga vuakin ka awm a, vawi khat lunga denin ka awm a, vawi thum lawng chhiatna ka tawk a, zan khat leh ni khat tuifinriatah ka awm a;" 
2Corinthians11:26 khaw fannaahte vawi tam tak, luite laka hlauhawmahte, suamhmangte laka hlauhawmahte, ka chipuite laka hlauhawmahte, Jentailte laka hlauhawmahte, khawpuia hlauhawmahte, thlalera hlauhawmahte, tuifinriata hlauhawmahte, unau derte zinga hlauhawmahte;" 
2Corinthians11:27 thawhhahna leh thawhrimnaah te, mutmawhnaahte vawi tam tak; riltam leh tuihalnaah te, chaw ngheinaahte, vawi tam tak khawsik leh saruaka awmnaah te." 
2Corinthians11:28 Heng pawn lam thil ka sawi bakah hian Kohhranho zawng zawng ka ngaihtuahna, ni tin mi delh rengtu hi a awm bawk a." 
2Corinthians11:29 Mi chak lote ka tuarpui lo ngai em ni? Mi an tlukin ka vei lo ngai em ni? 
2Corinthians11:30 Chhuang tur ka nih vek chuan ka chak lohna lam thilte a ni ka chhuan ang. 
2Corinthians11:31 Lalpa Isua Pathian leh Pa, kumkhuaa engthawla awma chuan dawt ka sawi lohzia a hria e." 
2Corinthians11:32 Damaska khuaah khan lal Areta hnuaia roreltu chuan mi man turin Damaska mite khawpui chu a ventir a;tin, tukverhah kulh hrulah chuan bawkin mi thlak a, tichuan a kut ata ka relhru hlen ta a." 
2Corinthians11:33 tin, tukverhah kulh hrulah chuan bawkin mi thlak a, tichuan a kut ata ka relhru hlen ta a." 
2Corinthians12:1 Ka chhuang reng reng tur a ni. That zawng a tha lo a, nimahsela Lalpa hnen ata inlarna leh hriattirna thu ka sawi kai teh zel ang." 
2Corinthians12:2 Kristaa mi pakhat ka hria, chu mi ngei chu kum sawm leh kum li a ni ta (taksain emaw a awm ka hre lo, taksa loin emaw a awm ka hre hek lo; Pathianin a hria) van thumna meuhvah khian lak chhohin a awm a." 
2Corinthians12:3 Tin, chu mi ngei chu (taksain emaw a awm, taksa loin emaw ka hre lo; Pathianin a hria)," 
2Corinthians12:4 Paradis-a lak chhoha a awm leh thu sawi hleih theih loh, mihring sawi thian lohte chu a hria tih ka hria." 
2Corinthians12:5 Mi chutiang chu ka chhuang ang; nimahsela ka chak lohna lo chu mahni ka inchhuang lo ang. 
2Corinthians12:6 Chhuang duh mah i la mi a ka ni lo vng, thu taktak ka sawi dawn si a; nimahsela ka insum ang, chutilochuan tupawhin mi hmuh ang leh ka laka thu an hriat ang aiin mi ngai ropui zawk dah ang e." 
2Corinthians12:7 Tin, hriattirnate chu a nasat em em avanga ka inngaihhlut lutuk lohna'n tisaah hling mi pe a ni, Setana tirhkoh kut thak hnawihna'na mi hmangtu tur chu; chutilochuan ka inngaihlu lutuk dah ang e." 
2Corinthians12:8 Chu mi chungchang thu-ah chuan mi kiansan theihna'n Lalpa chu vawi thum ka dil a. 
2Corinthians12:9 Tin, ani chuan ka hnenah, ""Ka khawngaihna i tan a tawk e; ka thiltihtheihna hi chak lohnaah a sin tihfamkimin a awm ni,"" a ti ta a. Chutichuan Krista thiltihtheihna chu ka chunga a awm theihna'n lawm em emin ka chak lohnate hi ka chhuang tawh zawk ang." 
2Corinthians12:10 Chuvangin, Krista avangin chak lohnaahte, chhiatnaahte, neksawrnaahte, tihduhdahnaahte, hnawhchepnaahte ka lawm thin a ni; ka chak loh apiangin a ni ka chak thin ni." 
2Corinthians12:11 Ka lo a ta a nih hi: nangnin a lo thei loah mi siam a ni; kei chu nangmahni mi chawimawi tur ka ni a sin, engmah ni mah suh i la, eng kawngah pawh tirhkoh lian berte chu ka tluk lo si lo." 
2Corinthians12:12 Tirhkoh nih chhinchhiahnate chu chhelna tinreng neiin, chhinchhiahnate, thilmakte, thiltihtheihnatein in zinga tih a nih tak tak kha." 
2Corinthians12:13 Eng kawngah nge ni, kohhran pawl dangte aia hnuai zawka siama in awmna chu? Keimah ngei hian ka tihhautak loh che u kawngah khan a nih nghal loh chuan. Chu mi dik lohnaah chuan mi ngaidam rawh u." 
2Corinthians12:14 Ngai teh u, hei hi in hnena lo kal turin ka inpeih a vawi thumna tur a ni; tin, ka tihautak lo ang che u, in ta chu zawng ka ni si lo a, nangmahni a ni, ka zawn zawk che u ni; faten nu leh pate tan an khawl khawmsak tur a ni lo a, nu leh paten fate tan an khawl khawmsak zawk tur a ni si a." 
2Corinthians12:15 Tin, kei zawngin in thlarau tan lawm em emin ka hmangral ang a, inhmangral vekin ka awm bawk ang. Achuang aliama ka hmangaih che u avang khan, keiin hmangaihna tlem zawk ka dawn phah a ni maw?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Amaherawhchu, kei chuan ka tihautak lo che u ni ta se la; nimahsela mi vervek reng reng lo niin, ngamthlemin ka man che u a lo ni." 
2Corinthians12:17 In hnena ka tirhte zingah khan tu emaw tal hmangin ka hlawk phah che u em ni? 
2Corinthians12:18 Tita chu ka fuih a, ama rualin unaupa chu ka tir a ni. Tita chuan hlawk phahna reng reng a nei che u em ni? Rilru hmunkhat pua leng dun kan ni lo em ni? Hniak hnung inzui chiah kan ni lo'm ni?" 
2Corinthians12:19 In hnena kan thiamthu sawiah min lo ngai reng a ni awm a. Kristaah chuan Pathian mithmuhah a ni, thu kan sawi ni. Nimahsela duh takte u, engkim hi nangmahni siam thatna tur a ni." 
2Corinthians12:20 Ka lo kal hunah eng emaw tiin ka duh anga ka rawn hmuh loh che u a, kei pawh in duh angin mi hmu lo dah ang, tih leh, eng emaw tiin inhauna te, initsikna te, thinurna te, inkhinna te, inrelna te, sesea thu lak te, inngaihhlut lutukna te, buaina te a lo awm dah ang,tih leh, ka lo kal hunin ka Pathianin in zingah mi timualpho leh pekin, tun hma lama thil tisualtute zinga thil bawlhhlawh tih te, inngaih te, hur te chinga sim si lo mi tam takte chu ka tah dah ang e tih ka hlau a sin." 
2Corinthians12:21 tih leh, ka lo kal hunin ka Pathianin in zingah mi timualpho leh pekin, tun hma lama thil tisualtute zinga thil bawlhhlawh tih te, inngaih te, hur te chinga sim si lo mi tam takte chu ka tah dah ang e tih ka hlau a sin." 
2Corinthians13:1 Hei hi in hnena ka lo kal a vawi thumna tur a ni. Hretute pahnih emaw pathum emaw kaah chuan thu tinreng tihnghehin a awm ang. 
2Corinthians13:2 Ka sawi lawk tawh a, tin, Krista keimaha thusawi thintu chu fiahna in zawn avangin, vawi hnihnaa in hnena ka awm laia ka sawi ang khan, tunah in hnena awm loin tun hma lama thil tisualtute hnenah leh mi dang zawng zawng hnenah ka sawi lawk leh dawn," 
2Corinthians13:3 'Ka lo kal leh chuan ka zuah lo ang,' tih hi; ani chu nangmahni lamah a chak lo lo a, in zingah thil ti thei tak a ni zawk a ni." 
2Corinthians13:4 Ani chu chak lohna avangin khenbehin a awm a ni a, nimahsela Pathian thiltihtheihna avangin a nung ta reng a ni. Keini pawh amahah chuan kan chak lo a ni, nimahsela nangmahni lama Pathian thiltihtheihna avangin a hnenah kan nung ve ang." 
2Corinthians13:5 Rinnaah chuan in awm emaw, nangmahni ngei inchhin thin u la; nangmahni ngei in fiah thin rawh u. A nih loh leh, nangmahniah Isua Krista chu a awm tih nangmahni ngeiin in hre fiah lo em ni? Duh loh in nih nghal loh chuan." 
2Corinthians13:6 Keini erawh chu duh lohin kan awm lo tih in la hriain ka ring. 
2Corinthians13:7 Tin, thil reng reng in tihsual lohna turin Pathian hnenah kan dil thin a; chu chu keini hi duhawma kan lan theihna tur a ni lo a, nangnin a mawi apiang in tih theihna'n a ni zawk, keini chu duh loh angin awm mah i la." 
2Corinthians13:8 Thutak tan tur lo chuan thutak do turin engmah kan ti thei lo a ni. 
2Corinthians13:9 Keini kan chak loh lai pawha nangni in chak hian kan lawm thin a sin; hei hi kan dil bawk thin, nangmahni that famkimna tur hi." 
2Corinthians13:10 Chuvang chuan tichhe tur ni lo a, siam tha tur zawka Lalpa'n thuneihna mi pek ang zel khan, in hnena ka awm huna na taka ka zilh lohna'n che u, in hnena ka awm loh lai hian he'ng thu hi ka ziak a ni." 
2Corinthians13:11 A tawp berah chuan unaute u, lawm takin awm rawh u.Tihthat famkimin awm u la; thlamuang takin awm u la, rilru hmunkhat pu u la, lungrual takin awm rawh u; tichuan hmangaihna leh remna Pathian chu in hnenah a awm dawn zuk nia." 
2Corinthians13:12 Fawh thianghlimin chibai inbuk rawh u. 
2Corinthians13:13 Mi thianghlim zawng zawngte hian chibai an buk a che u.Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna te, Pathian hmangaihna te, Thlarau Thianghlim pawlna te chu in zaa hnenah awm rawh se." 
2Corinthians13:14 Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna te, Pathian hmangaihna te, Thlarau Thianghlim pawlna te chu in zaa hnenah awm rawh se." 
Galatians1:1 Paula, tirhkoh (mihringte tirh chhuah ni loin, mihring zarah ni hek loin, Isua Krista leh mitthi zing ata a kai thotu, Pa Pathian zarah a ni zawk) leh," 
Galatians1:2 ka hnena unau awm zawng zawngte chuan Galatia rama kohhranhote hnenah," 
Galatians1:3 Pa Pathian leh kan Lalpa Isua Krista hnen ata khawngaihna leh remna in hnenah awm rawh se: 
Galatians1:4 ani chuan kan Pathian leh kan Pa remtihzawngin tun lai khawvel sual tak lakah hian min chhan chhuah theihna'n kan sualte aiah amah a inpe ta; 
Galatians1:5 Pathian hnenah chuan ropuina chatuanin awm rawh se. Amen. 
Galatians1:6 Krista khawngaihna zara a kotu che u kha chuti thuta Chanchin Tha hrang lama in pakaisan hi mak ka ti a ni; 
Galatians1:7 chu chu Chanchin Tha a ni ve si lo; nangmahni tibuaiin, Krista Chanchin Tha tihdanglam duh tute emaw an awm mai a ni a." 
Galatians1:8 Nimahsela, keimahniin emaw, van atanga lo chhuk vantirhkoh pawhin emaw, Chanchin Tha kan hrilh che u lo kha chu Chanchin Tha dang reng lo hrilh che u se la, anchhe dawngin awm rawh se." 
Galatians1:9 Hmana kan sawi ang khan tunah ka sawi leh dawn a ni, ""Chanchin Tha in pawma lo kha chu, Chanchin Tha dang tupawhin hrilh che u se la, anchhe dawngin awm rawh se,""" 
Galatians1:10 Mihring tihlawm nge ka tum, Pathian tihlawm? Mi zinga tlaktlum tum ka ni em ni? Ni i la, Krista bawih ka ni lo ang." 
Galatians1:11 Chutichuan, unaute u, ka Chanchin Tha hrilh kha mihring lam thu a ni lo tih ka hriattir a che u." 
Galatians1:12 Mihring hnen ata hmu ka ni hek lo, mi mi zirtir ka ni hek lo, Isua Krista inlarna avanga hmu ka ni zawk si a." 
Galatians1:13 Judate sakhaw biak danah chuan hman laia ka awm dan chu in hre tawh si a, khatia Pathian Kohhranho nasa taka tiduhdahin ka tihbuai thin kha;" 
Galatians1:14 tin, mi thlahtute thurochhiah chunga thahnem ka ngaih nasat bik avangin Judate sakhaw biak dan kawngah chuan ka chite zinga ka rualpui tam takte ka lehpel ta a." 
Galatians1:15 Tin, ka nu pum chhung atanga mi tihrangtu leh a khawngaihna avanga mi kotu Pathian chuan," 
Galatians1:16 Jentailte zinga a Chanchin Tha ka hrilh theihna'n a Fapa chu ka hnena a inlartir lai khan, tumah rawn loin," 
Galatians1:17 tirhkoh ka nih hmaa tirhkoh lo ni tawhte hnenah Jerusalem khuaa han kal hek loin, Arabia ramah ka kal bo ta nghal zawk a; tin, Damaska khuaah ka kir leh ta a." 
Galatians1:18 Tin, kum thum a vei hnuin Kipha kan turin Jerusalem khuaah kan han kal a, a hnenah ni sawm leh ni nga ka cham a," 
Galatians1:19 Tirhkoh dangte erawh chu Lalpa unau Jakoba chauh lo chu tumah ka hmu lo a. 
Galatians1:20 (Ngai teh mah u! In hnena thu ka ziakte hi Pathian mithmuhah pawh ka daw lo e). 
Galatians1:21 Chu mi hnuah chuan Suria leh Kilikia ramahte ka lo kal a. 
Galatians1:22 Nimahsela,Judai ram kohhranho Kristaa awmte hmelhriat ka la ni lo ta fo a." 
Galatians1:23 Hmana min tiduhdahtu khan hmana rinna thu a tihkhawloh thin kha tunah a hril ta zawk a ni,"" tih mi sawi chauh an hria a.Tin, keimah avangin Pathian an chawimawi ta a." 
Galatians1:24 Tin, keimah avangin Pathian an chawimawi ta a." 
Galatians2:1 Tin, kum sawm leh kum li a vei hnuin Tita pawh chu hruai vein Barnaba rualin Jerusalem khuaah ka han kal leh a." 
Galatians2:2 Tin, hriattirna avangin ka han kal a, Jentailte zinga Chanchin Tha ka tlangaupui thin hi anmahni ka han hrilh a; nimahsela mi lian deuhte chu ahrangin ka hrilh a, chutilochuan athlawnin ka tlan hlauh dah ang e, a nih loh leh, tlan thlawn ka lo ni dah ang e." 
Galatians2:3 Nimahsela, Tita ka hnena awm pawh chu Grik mi ni mah se la, serh tan luihsakin a awm ta lo a;" 
Galatians2:4 chu chu unau der, aruka an hruai luhte avang a ni; chungte chu bawiha min siam theihna'n Krista Isuaah chuan zalenna kan neih hi enthla turin a rukin an lut a." 
Galatians2:5 Nimahsela, Chanchin Tha thutak chu in hnena a awm reng theihna'n darkar khat te pawh intulutin an thu kan zawm lo a." 
Galatians2:6 Tin, mi lian deuha an ruatate lakah chuan (eng ang mi pawh ni se la, ka tan engmah a lem chuang lo; Pathianin tumah a thlei bik lo va;) mi lian deuha an ruatate chuan engmah mi belhchhah chuang si lo a;" 
Galatians2:7 chutih ahnekin serhtante Chanchin Tha Petera hnena kawltira a awm angin, serhtan lohte Chanchin Tha ka hnena kawltirin a awm tih an hria a." 
Galatians2:8 (Serhtante tirhkoh ni turin Petera tana thawhsaktu ngei chuan Jentailte tirhkoh ni turin ka tan pawh mi thawhsak si a); 
Galatians2:9 khawngaihna mi peka chu an hriat pawhin Jakoba te, Kipha te, Johana te, bana an ruatate chuan keini Jentailte hnena kal tur leh anni zawng serhtante hnena kal turin kei leh Barnaba chu inpawlna kut ding lamte min pe ta zawk mah a." 
Galatians2:10 Retheite kan hriat reng chauh an duh, chu tak chu tih ka tum tlat reng thina a ni." 
Galatians2:11 Tin, Kipha chu Antiokei khuaa a lo kal laiin demawm taka a awm avangin a hmaichhan ngeiah ka dodal a." 
Galatians2:12 Mi tute emaw Jakoba hnen ata an lo kal hma chuan ani chuan Jentailte hnenah chaw a ei thin a: nimahsela an lo thlen veleh serhtan mite chu a hlauh avangin tel leh ta loin a intihrang ta si a. 
Galatians2:13 Juda dangte pawh an vervek ve ta hlawm a, chutichuan Barnaba meuh pawh an vervekna hruai boin a awm ta hial a." 
Galatians2:14 Nimahsela, Chanchin Tha thutak angin an awm fel lo tih ka hriatin, Kipha hnenah an zaa hmaah, ""Nang Juda mi i ni a, Juda anga awm loin Jentail angin i awm si a. Engtizia nge Jentailte chu Judate anga awm luihtir kher i tum?"" ka ti a." 
Galatians2:15 Keini zawng Jentail mi sualte ni loin Juda mi renga piang kan ni a - 
Galatians2:16 nimahsela Dan thiltihte avangin mi thiam changing a awm lo a, Isua Krista rin avang chauhin thiam changing a awm zawk tih kan hre si a - keini pawhin Dan thiltih avang ni loin, Krista rinna avanga thiam changa kan awm theihna'n Krista Isua chu kan ring a ni; dan thiltihte avangin mihring reng reng thiam changing an awm dawn si lo." 
Galatians2:17 Kristaah thiam changa awm kan tum chung khan keini ngei pawh mi sual kan lo nih hlauh si chuan Krista chu sual rawngbawltu a lo ni em ni? Hnai lo e. 
Galatians2:18 Ka thil thiatte kha ka sak leh si chuan bawhchhetu ka nih ka inhriattir mai a ni ang. 
Galatians2:19 Pathian lam kawnga ka lo nun theihna'n kei zawng Dan avangin Dan lam kawngah ka thi tawh si a. 
Galatians2:20 Krista hnenah khenbehin ka awm ta; nimahsela ka nung a ni; keimah erawh chu ka ni tawh lo. Krista chu keimahah a nung zawk a ni; tin, tunah tisaa ka nung hi rinnaa nung ka ni - Pathian Fapa, mi hmangaiha ka aia inpetu rinnaah chuan.Pathian khawngaihna chu ka bawh bo lo e, Dan avanga felna a awm si chuan Krista chu athlawnin a thi a ni ang." 
Galatians2:21 Pathian khawngaihna chu ka bawh bo lo e, Dan avanga felna a awm si chuan Krista chu athlawnin a thi a ni ang." 
Galatians3:1 Aw Galatia rama mi a te u, tuin nge dawi che u? in mithmuh ngeiah Isua Krista chu khenbehin chiang taka lantir a nih tehlul nen." 
Galatians3:2 Hei chauh hi in hnen ata lo hriat ka duh. Dan thiltihte avangin nge Thlarau chu inhmuh, in ngaihthlaka in rin avangin?" 
Galatians3:3 Heti emin in a maw? Thlarauva tan tawh siin tisain in zo dawn em ni? 
Galatians3:4 Thil chuti zozai chu sawtpui loin in tuar em ni? Sawtpui lo ni tak tak ta ang se la. 
Galatians3:5 Tin, in hnena Thlarau petu che u leh in zinga thilmak titu chuan Dan thiltihte avangin nge a tih, in ngaihthlaka in rin avangin?" 
Galatians3:6 Abrahama'n Pathian a ring a, tin,chu rinna chu a felnaa ruat a ni ang khan." 
Galatians3:7 Chutichuan, hre rawh u, rinnaa awmte, chung nge chu Abrahama fate an ni." 
Galatians3:8 Tin, Pathian Lehkha Thu chuan, Pathianin rinna avangin Jentailte thiam a chantir dawn tih hre lawkin, ""Nangmahah chuan hnam tin malsawmsakin an awm ang,"" tiin Abrahama hnenah Chanchin Tha chu a hrilh lawk kha." 
Galatians3:9 Chutichuan, rinnaa awmte chu Abrahama rinawma nen chuan malsawmsakin an awm ve thin a ni." 
Galatians3:10 Dan thiltiha awm apiangte chu anchhe hnuaiah an awm si a; Dan lehkhabua thu ziak zawng zawng anga ti tura awm reng lo apiang chu anchhe dawngin an awm thin,"" tiin ziak a ni si a." 
Galatians3:11 Tin, Pathian mithmuhin tumah reng Dan avanga thiam chang an awm lo tih a lang reng a ni. ""Mi felte chu rinnain an nung ang,"" tih a ni si a;" 
Galatians3:12 tin, Dan chu rinnaa mi a ni lo, ""Chung anga titu chu chungah chuan a nung ang,"" tih a ni zawk e." 
Galatians3:13 Krista chu kan aia anchhe dawng lo niin, Dan anchhe lak ata min tlan chhuak ta; (""Thinga khaikan apiang chu anchhe dawng an ni,"" tih ziak a ni si a);" 
Galatians3:14 chutichuan Abrahama chunga malsawmna chu Krista Isuaah chuan Jentailte chungah a lo awm thei ang a, tichuan rinna avangin Thlarau tiam chu kan hmu thei ang." 
Galatians3:15 Unaute u, mihring angin ka sawi hi, mihring thuthlung pawh ni mah se la, tihngheh tawh hnuin an phelh ngai lo a,belh pawh an belhchhah ngai hek lo." 
Galatians3:16 Tin, Abrahama hnenah a ni, thu chu tiamin a awm ni, a chi thlah hnenah pawh. Mi tam tak chung thu sawi angin, ""Chi thlahte hnenah pawh,"" a ti lo a;mi pakhat chung thu sawi angin, ""I chi thlah hnenah pawh,"" a ti a ni zawk e, chu chu Krista chu a ni." 
Galatians3:17 Tin, heti hian ka ti a ni: Thuthlung, Pathian lo tihngheh tawh chu, Dan kum zali leh kum sawmthum hnua lo awm tawh khan, thutiam chu engmah loa siamin a tibo lo e." 
Galatians3:18 Roluah tur chu Dan avang a nih chuan thutiam avang a ni tawh si lo ang; nimahsela Pathianin thutiam avangin a ni, Abrahama hnenah a pek ni." 
Galatians3:19 A nih loh leh, engtiziaa Dan chu awm nge ni le? Bawhchhiatna hi sual a nih tilang fiah tura thutiam belhchhahna a ni a, Thutiamin Chi Thlah a tih lo kal hmaa hman tur, vantirhkohte hmanga palai kuta pek a ni." 
Galatians3:20 Tin, palai reng reng mi pakhat lakah palai a ni ngai lo e, Pathian erawh chu pakhat a ni." 
Galatians3:21 A nih loh leh, Dan chuan Pathian thutiamte chu a dodal em ni le? Hnai lo e, Dan mi tinung thei reng pekin a awm tawh si chuan, felna chu Dan avangin a awm ngei tur a ni." 
Galatians3:22 Nimahsela, Isua Krista rin avanga thiltiam chu a ringtute hnena pek a nih theihna'n Pathian Lehkha thu chuan sual hnuaiah engkim a kharkhip ta vek a." 
Galatians3:23 Nimahsela, rinna a lo thlen hma khan, rinna la lang tur atan kharkhipa, Dan hnuaia ven kan nih kha." 
Galatians3:24 Chutichuan, rinna avanga thiam kan chan theihna turin Dan chu Krista hnen lama min kaihruaitu a lo ni a." 
Galatians3:25 Nimahsela, tunah rinna a lo thlen hnu hian, kaihruaitu hnuaiah kan awm tawh lo e." 
Galatians3:26 Krista Isua rin avangin Pathian fate in ni vek si a; 
Galatians3:27 in zinga Kristaa baptisma chang apiangte kha Krista chuan in inthuam tawh si a. 
Galatians3:28 Chutah chuan Juda mi a awm theih loh a, Grik mi pawh a awm theih hek loh, chutah chuan bawih a awm theih lo a, bawih lo pawh a awm theih hek loh, chutah chuan mipa leh hmeichhia pawh a awm theih loh; Krista Isuaah chuan in zain pumkhat in ni si a.Tin, Krista ta in nih chuanin Abrahama thlah, thutiam anga roluahtu turte in ni." 
Galatians3:29 Tin, Krista ta in nih chuanin Abrahama thlah, thutiam anga roluahtu turte in ni." 
Galatians4:1 Nimahsela, heti hian ka ti a ni: Roluahtu tur chu engkim chungah hotu ni mah se la, naupang a la nih chhung zawng bawih nen engah mah a danglam chuang lo e;" 
Galatians4:2 a pa ruat hun chu a lo thlen hma loh chuan vengtu leh enkawltute hnuaiah a awm zawk a ni. 
Galatians4:3 Chutiangin keini pawh naupang kan nih lai khan, khawvel zirtirna dik lo hnuaiah bawihah kan awm;" 
Galatians4:4 nimahsela a hun bi a lo kim khan fa nihna kan hmuh theihna'n Dan hnuaia awmte chu tlan turin Pathianin a Fapa," 
Galatians4:5 hmeichhe hrin, Dan hnuaia lo piangin a tir chhuak ta a." 
Galatians4:6 Tin, fa in nih avangin Pathianin a Fapa Thlarau chu, ""Abba!(Ka pa!)"" tia auin kan thinlungah a rawn tir a." 
Galatians4:7 Chutichuan, bawih i ni tawh lo a, fa i ni zawk e: tin, fa i nih chuan Pathian zara roluahtu tur i ni." 
Galatians4:8 Nimahsela, khang Pathian inhriat loh lai khan, an pianzia reng pawha Pathian ni hlei lote bawih in ni a." 
Galatians4:9 Tuna Pathian in lo hriat hnu hi zawngin-ni lo, Pathian mi hriat in lo nih hnu hian tih tur a ni zawk e, - khawvel zirtirna dik lo engmah ni hlei lo, a bawiha awm leh in chakate lamah chuan engtiziaa hawi kir lehnge in nih?" 
Galatians4:10 Ni te, thla te, hun te, kum te in serh thin." 
Galatians4:11 In tan tha ka seng thlawn dah law maw tih ka hlauhsak a che u. 
Galatians4:12 Unaute u, ka ngen a che u, keimah angin awm rawh u, kei pawh nangmahni angin ka awm si a. Ka pawi engmah in khawih lo." 
Galatians4:13 Chanchin Tha in hnena ka hril hmasak tum kha ka tisa chak lohna avang a ni tih in hre si a. 
Galatians4:14 Tin, ka tisaa in tan thlemna awm chu in hmusit lo a, in ten hek lo; Pathian vantirhkoh angin, Krista Isua ang maiin mi lawm tak zawk kha." 
Galatians4:15 Vannei in intihna kha khawiah nge ni ta le? Tih theih phei chu ni se la nangnin in mitte kher chhuakin mi pe tawh ang tih ka hriatsak che u a sin. 
Galatians4:16 Chutichuan, thu dik tak ka hrilh che u avangin in hmelma ka lo ni ta em ni?" 
Galatians4:17 Tha lamah ni hauh si loin thahnemngai takin an zawng chhuak thin che u a; a ni, anmahni in zawn theihna'n pawn lama khar hnan che u an duh a ni." 
Galatians4:18 Thu tha lamah erawh chuan eng lai pawhin thahnemngai taka zawna awm fo hi a tha a ni, in hnena ka awm lai chauh ni loin." 
Galatians4:19 Ka naute u, Krista chu nangmahniah siam puitlina a awm hma loh chuan nau veiin ka vei leh che u hi." 
Galatians4:20 A ni, tun lai hian in hnena awma ka aw tihdanglam ka chak theihzia mai chu; in chungthu-ah ka mangang si a." 
Galatians4:21 Dan hnuaia awm duhte u, mi hrilh rawh u,Dan thu chu in ngaithla thin lo'm ni?" 
Galatians4:22 Heti hian ziak a ni si a: Abrahama'n fapa pahnih a nei a, pakhat chu bawihnu lakah, pakhat chu bawih lonu lakah." 
Galatians4:23 Nimahsela, bawihnu laka mi chu tisa dan angin a piang a, bawih lonu laka mi erawh chu thutiam avangin a piang a ni,"" tih hi." 
Galatians4:24 Chung thu chu tehkhinna a ni; chung hmeichhiate chu thuthlung pahnih an ni; pakhat chu Sinai Tlanga mi, bawih ni tura fa hringtu chu; chu chu Hagari a ni." 
Galatians4:25 Tin, Hagari hi Arabia rama Sinai Tlang chu a ni a, Jerusalem tun laia awm nen hian ang khat an ni, a fate nen bawihah an awm si a." 
Galatians4:26 Chung lam Jerusalem erawh chu bawih a ni lo a, chu ngei chu keini nu a ni." 
Galatians4:27 Nang, ching, fa hring ngai lo, hlim rawh, nang, nau vei ngai lo, au chhuak rawh; pasal nei mi ai chuan, khawhar nu chuan fate a nei tam zawk si,"" tih ziak a nih kha." 
Galatians4:28 Tichuan, unaute u, keini hi, Isaaka ang khan, thutiam fate kan ni." 
Galatians4:29 Nimahsela, chu mi lai chuan tisa dana lo piang chuan Thlarau dana lo piang chu a tiduhdah ang khan, tunah pawh chutiang bawk a ni." 
Galatians4:30 Nimahsela, Pathian Lehkha Thuin engtin nge a sawi? ""Bawihnu chu, a fapa nen hnawt chhuak rawh; bawihnu fapa chuan bawih lonu fapa chu ro a luahpui dawn si lo,"" a ti a.Chutichuan, unaute u, bawihnu laka fate kan ni lo a, bawih lonu laka fate kan ni zawk." 
Galatians4:31 Chutichuan, unaute u, bawihnu laka fate kan ni lo a, bawih lonu laka fate kan ni zawk." 
Galatians5:1 Bawih ni lo turin Krista chuan min chhuahtir kha, chutichuan ding nghet u la, bawih nghawngkawlah chuan tang leh tawh suh u." 
Galatians5:2 Ngai teh u, kei Paulan in hnena ka sawi hi, serh in tantir chuan Krista chu in tan engmah sawtna a ni lo ang." 
Galatians5:3 A ni, Dan thu zawng zawng zawm tura batu an ni tih serh tantir apiang hnenah ka hriattir leh a nih hi." 
Galatians5:4 Nangni Dana thiam chan tumte u, Krista nen in inthen ta: khawngaihna chu in tluksan ta." 
Galatians5:5 Keini zawngin Thlarau zarah rinnain felna beiseina kannghak si a. 
Galatians5:6 Krista Isuaah chuan serh tan engmah a sawt lo, serh tanloh pawh engmah a sawt hek lo; rinna, hmangaihnaa thawh erawh chu a sawt a ni." 
Galatians5:7 Tha takin in tlan thin kha le; thutak chu in zawm lohna'n tuin nge dal ta che u? 
Galatians5:8 He thlemna hi a kotu che u hnen ata a ni lo e. 
Galatians5:9 Dawidim tlem tein chhang hlawm chu apumin a fan chhuak thin. 
Galatians5:10 Rilru danglam in pu lo ang tih Lalpaah chuan ka ring tlat a; tibuaitu che u chu atua pawh ni se la, a chunga rorelna chu a la tuar ang." 
Galatians5:11 Unaute u, kei hian serh tan thu hril ni i la tihduhdah ka ni cheu dawn em ni? Chuti ni se Kraws thu kan hril hian buaina a siam lo tur." 
Galatians5:12 Tibuaitute che u chu intan fithla law law se la ka duh a ni. 
Galatians5:13 Nangni unaute u, bawih ni lo turin koh in ni si a; nimahsela in bawih nih lohna chu tisa tana remchangah hmang suh u la, hmangaihnain rawng inbawlsak tawn theuh zawk rawh u." 
Galatians5:14 Nangmah i inhmangaih angin i vengte i hmangaih tur a ni,"" tih thu kamkhatah hian Dan thu zawng zawng chu a famkim tawh a ni si." 
Galatians5:15 Nimahsela, in inseh a, in inei tawn si chuan in intihboral tawn lohna'n fimkhur rawh u." 
Galatians5:16 Chutichuan, hei hi ka ti a ni: Thlarau vah awm rawh u, tichuan tisa chakna chu in zawm dawn lo nia." 
Galatians5:17 Tisa hian Thlarau dona lam a chak thin, Thlarau pawhin tisa dona lam a chak bawk si thin; thil tih in tumte chu in tih theih lohna'n chungte chu an inkalh si." 
Galatians5:18 Nimahsela, Thlarau hruaia in awm chuan Dan hnuaiah chuan in awm lo e." 
Galatians5:19 Tin, tisa thiltihte chu a lang fiah a ni; chung chu he'ng hi a ni: inngaihna te, bawlhhlawhna te, hurna te," 
Galatians5:20 milem biakna te, dawithiamna te, huatna te, inhauna te, thikna te, thinurna te, inkhinna te, awm hranna te, rin hranna te," 
Galatians5:21 itsikna te, zu ruihna te, zu hmun hlimna te, chutiangte chu: chung kawngah chuan tun hmaa, ""Chutiang thil tih hmangte chuan Pathian ram an chang lo ang,"" tia ka hrilh lawk che u ang khan ka hrilh lawk che u hi." 
Galatians5:22 Thlarau rah erawh chu hmangaihna te, hlimna te, remna te, dawhtheihna te, ngilneihna te, thatna te, rinawmna te," 
Galatians5:23 thuhnuairawlhna te, insumtheihna te a ni zawk e; chutiang kalhzawngin Dan thupek reng a awm lo e." 
Galatians5:24 Tin, Krista Isua mite chuan tisa chu, a sual ngaihtuahna leh a chaknate chawpin an khengbet ta." 
Galatians5:25 Thlaraua nung kan nih chuan Thlarauvah vek i awm leh bawk ang u.Incho tawna initsik tawnin i inngaihlu suh ang u. 
Galatians5:26 Incho tawna initsik tawnin i inngaihlu suh ang u. 
Galatians6:1 Unaute u, mi, sual engpawh a tih lai phawkin awm se la, nangni thlarau mite u, ""Thlemna ka tawk ve dah ang e,"" tia inveng tha chungin chutiang mi chu thuhnuairawlh takin tungding leh rawh u." 
Galatians6:2 In ritphurhte chu inchhawk tawn rawh u, chutichuan Krista dan thu chu in zawm a ni ang." 
Galatians6:3 Mi, engmah ni si loin, mi lian deuha a inruat chuan a inbum chawp mai a ni si." 
Galatians6:4 Mi tinin mahni thiltih fiah theuh zawk rawh se, chu mi hunah chuan mi dang chung ni loin, mahni chung chauhvah chhuan tur a nei ang." 
Galatians6:5 Mi tinin mahni phur an phur theuh dawn si a. 
Galatians6:6 Tin, thu zirtir dawngtu chuan thil tha zawng zawng zirtirtu hnenah pe ve rawh se." 
Galatians6:7 Bumin awm suh u; Pathian chu hmuhsit zia a ni lo e; miin a theh apiang, chu mi vek chu a seng bawk dawn si a;" 
Galatians6:8 Mahni tisa lama thehtu chuan tisaa mi chhiatna a seng ang a; Thlarau lama thehtu erawh chuan Thlarauva mi chatuana nunna a seng dawn a ni. 
Galatians6:9 Tichuan thil tha tih i ning suh ang u; kan inthlahdah loh zawngin a hun takah chuan kan seng dawn si a. 
Galatians6:10 Chutichuan remchang hun kan neihzia ang zelin mi zawng zawng chungah thil tha i ti ang u, rinna chhungte zinga mi chungah i ti deuh ber ang u." 
Galatians6:11 Keima kut ngeiin in hnenah lehkha hraw pui puia ka ziak hi en rawh u. 
Galatians6:12 Tisaa hmel intihmawi duh apiangten serhtana awm turin an tir lui thin che u a ni; engmah dang vang a ni lo a, Krista kraws avanga tihduhdah an tuar lohna'n chauh a ni." 
Galatians6:13 Serhtante meuh pawh chuan Dan thu an zawm chuang si lo a, in taksaah chhuan tur an neih theihna'n serh tantir che u an duh mai a ni." 
Galatians6:14 Kei erawh chuan kan Lalpa Isua Krista kraws lo chu ka chhuan loh turzia mai chu, chu mi zarah chuan khawvel hi ka tan khenbehin a awm ta, kei pawh khawvel tan khenbehin ka awm a ni." 
Galatians6:15 Siam thar lehna lo chu serh tan hi engmah a ni lo a, serh tan loh pawh engmah a ni hek lo." 
Galatians6:16 Tin, chu mi dan anga awm apiangte chungah chuan remna leh khawngaihna awm rawh se, Pathian Israelte chungah pawh." 
Galatians6:17 Tun achinah hian tumahin mi tibuai tawh suh se; ka taksaah hian Isua chhinchhiahnate ka pu si a.Unaute u, Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna in thlarau hnenah awm rawh se. Amen." 
Galatians6:18 Unaute u, Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna in thlarau hnenah awm rawh se. Amen." 
Ephesians1:1 Paula, Pathian duhzawnga Krista Isua tirhkoh chuan, Mi thianghlim Ephesi khuaa awm Krista Isuaa mi rinawmte hnenah chuan:" 
Ephesians1:2 Pathian kan Pa leh Lalpa Isua Krista hnen ata khawngaihna leh remna in hnenah awm rawh se. 
Ephesians1:3 Kan Lalpa Isua Krista Pathian leh Pa chu fakin awm rawh se. Ani chuan van hmunahte khian Kristaah chuan thlarau lam malsawmsakna tinrengin mal min sawm a; 
Ephesians1:4 hmangaihnaa thianghlim leh sawiselboin ama hmaah kan awm theihna turin leilung pianhmain Kristaa min thlan ang kha; 
Ephesians1:5 a khawngaihna ropuizia fak turin ama lungduha lawmzawng angin Isua Krista zarah ama tan faa siam tura min lo ruat lawk tawh avangin. 
Ephesians1:6 Chu khawngaihna chu Duhtakaah chuan athlawnin min pe a; 
Ephesians1:7 a thisen avangin amahah chuan kan tlanna kan nei a ni - a khawngaihna ngahzia ang zela kan bawhchhiatnate ngaihdamna chu. 
Ephesians1:8 Chu khawngaihna chuan aman fing tak leh remhre takin min vur a ni," 
Ephesians1:9 A duhzawng thuruk kan hnena min hriattirin; 
Ephesians1:10 hun bi kim khawsak hunah a lawmzawng (engkim - vana thil awmte, lei chunga thil awmte pawh - Kristaa fawk khawm tur chu) amahin tih a tum ang kha; Amah ngeiah chuan a ni." 
Ephesians1:11 Ama duhzawnga remruat ang zela thil engkim titu tum anga ruat lawk ni tawhin, amahah bawk chuan a ro tura siam kan ni," 
Ephesians1:12 keini Krista lo beisei hmasa tawhte hi a ropui fakna kan lo nihna turin. 
Ephesians1:13 Amahah chuan nangni pawh thutak thu (in chhandamna Chanchin Tha chu) in ngaihthlak a, rin pawh in rin hnuin, amahah chuan Thlarau Thianghlim tiam chuan chhinchhiahin in awm kha." 
Ephesians1:14 Chu chu Pathian ropuizia fakna'n ama ta ngei tlan chhuahna turin kan roluahna tura zakhamna a ni. 
Ephesians1:15 Chuvangin, kei pawhin Lalpa Isuaa rinna in zinga awm, mi thianghlimte zawng zawng chunga in lantir bawk thin chu ka lo hriatin," 
Ephesians1:16 kan Lalpa Isua Krista Pathian, ropuina Pa chuan amah hriatna kawngah finna leh hriat chiantirna thlarau a pek theihna tur che uin" 
Ephesians1:17 ka tawngtainaahte chuan in hming lamin in chunga lawmthu hrilh ka bang lo; 
Ephesians1:18 chutichuan in thinlung mitte tihvara lo awmin, ama kohna beiseina te, mi thianghlimhovah chuan a ro luah tur ropui ngahzia te," 
Ephesians1:19 mitthi zing ata a kaihthawh lai leh, lalna te, thuneihna te, thiltihtheihna te, rorelna zawng zawng te," 
Ephesians1:20 he mi khawvelah chauh ni loa khawvel lo la thleng tur pawha hming sak tinrengte chung daihah van hmunahte a ding lama a thuttir laia 
Ephesians1:21 Kristaa a thawh, a thahrui chakna thawhzia ang zel khan keini ringtute lama a thiltihtheihna len nasatzia te hi, eng ang nge a nih in hre thei ang." 
Ephesians1:22 Tin, thil engkim a ke hnuaiah a dah a, amah chu engkim zawng zawng chungah lu atan kohhranho hnenah chuan a pe a,kohhranho chu a taksa a ni, engkim engkima tikhattu famkimna chu." 
Ephesians1:23 kohhranho chu a taksa a ni, engkim engkima tikhattu famkimna chu." 
Ephesians2:1 Nangni pawh in bawhchhiat leh in sual te avanga thi in nih lai khan a tinung che u a ni; 
Ephesians2:2 chungahte chuan hmanah khanhe khawvel dan anga in awm kha, boruaka thuneihna lal, tuna awih lo fate chhunga thawk mektu thlarau dan ang hian." 
Ephesians2:3 Chung awih lo fate zingah chuankeini pawh hmanah chuan tisa leh rilru duhzawng tiin, kan tisa chaknate angin kan awm vek a, mi dangte ang bawkin thinurna faa piang reng kan nih kha;" 
Ephesians2:4 nimahsela Pathian chuan khawngaihna a ngahin a mi hmangaihna nasa tak avang khan," 
Ephesians2:5 kan bawhchhiatnate avanga thi kan nih lai meuh pawhin Krista rualin min tinung ve a, (khawngaihnaa chhandam in ni ta e)," 
Ephesians2:6 Krista Isuaah chuan ama rual veka min kai thoin, van hmunahte ama hnenah min thuttir ta a:" 
Ephesians2:7 chutichuan hun lo la thleng turahte chuan Krista Isuaah hian kan chungah ngilneiin a khawngaihna ngah nasatzia chu a entir thei ang. 
Ephesians2:8 Rinna avanga khawngaihnaa chhandam in ni; nangmahni thawh chhuah a ni lo a, Pathian thilpek a ni;" 
Ephesians2:9 thiltih avang a ni lo e, chutilochuan miin an chhuang dah ang e." 
Ephesians2:10 Thil tha ti atan Krista Isuaah chuan siama awmin ama kut chhuak kan ni si a; chu thil tha tih chu kan awmna turin Pathianin a buatsaih lawk a ni. 
Ephesians2:11 Chuvangin, hmana nangni tisaa Jentail, tisaa kuta siam ""Serhtan"" an tihten ""Serhtanloh"" an tihate u," 
Ephesians2:12 khatih lai khanin, Krista loin, Israelho khua leh tui nen inmihranin, khawvelah hian beiseina reng nei lo leh Pathian loa awmin, tiamna thuthlung lakahte mikhuala in awm kha hre reng rawh u." 
Ephesians2:13 Tunah erawh chuan Krista Isuaah, nangni hmana hla taka awmte kha Krista thisen chuan tihhnaihin in lo awm ta a." 
Ephesians2:14 Amah chu kan inremna a ni si a; ani chuan intaina (thiltih turahte thupek dan awm chu) a tisaa tiboin, pawl hnihte chu pumkhatah a siam a, an kar pindanna bang chu a tichim a;" 
Ephesians2:15 chutichuan amahah chuan pahnihte chu mihring thar pumkhatah siamin inremna a siam thei ang a," 
Ephesians2:16 kraws zarah, taksa pumkhatah, pahnihte chu Pathian nen a inremtir thei bawk ang, chu mi kraws chuan intaina chu a tihhlum avangin." 
Ephesians2:17 Tin, a lo kalin, nangni hla taka awm thinte hnenah remna Chanchin Tha a hrilh che u a, hnai taka awm thinte hnenah pawh remna chanchin Tha a hrilh bawk a." 
Ephesians2:18 Ama zaran Thlarau hmunkhata Pa hnena luh theihna kan nei ve ve a ni. 
Ephesians2:19 Chutichuan, tunah mikhual leh mi chm mai in ni tawh lo a, mi thianghlimte nen chuan tualkhat leh Pathian chhungte in ni ta zawk a ni;" 
Ephesians2:20 Krista Isua nge chu a kila lung pawimawh ber niin, tirhkohte leh zawlneite lungphum chunga sak in ni a;" 
Ephesians2:21 amahah chuan lung rem hrang theuhte, rem taka chuktuahin, Lalpaah chuan biak in thianghlimah a chang zel thin a;nangni pawh amahah chuan Thlarau a, Pathian awmna tura rem khawm in ni." 
Ephesians2:22 nangni pawh amahah chuan Thlarau a, Pathian awmna tura rem khawm in ni." 
Ephesians3:1 Chuvang chuan kei Paula, nangni Jentailte avanga Krista Isua mi tang hian -" 
Ephesians3:2 nangni tan Pathian khawngaih enkawlna hna mi pek kha in lo hre tawh chawk ang a; 
Ephesians3:3 khatia, thuruk chu hriattirnaa hriattira ka awm kha, hmana tawi tea ka ziak ang thu kha;" 
Ephesians3:4 kha mi avang khan, in chhiarin Krista thuruk ka hriatzia hi in hre thei ang." 
Ephesians3:5 Chu chu tun laia a tirhkoh thianghlimte leh a zawlnei thianghlimte hnenah Thlarau hriattirin a awm ta ang hian, tun hma lam khan mihring fate hnenah hriattirin a awm ngai lo;" 
Ephesians3:6 chu chu hei hi a ni, Chanchin Tha avang hian Krista Isuaah chuan Jentailte hi roluahpui te, taksa pengpui te, thutiam dawnpui te an nih hi." 
Ephesians3:7 A thiltihtheihna thawhzia anga athlawna pek Pathian khawngaihna chu mi pek angzia zelin chu Chanchin Tha rawngbawltua siam ka ni. 
Ephesians3:8 Jentailte hnena Krista hausakna chhui chhuah rual lohte chanchin hril tur leh," 
Ephesians3:9 thuruk chatuan atanga Pathian engkim siamtuah inthupa awm enkawlna chu eng nge ni tih mi zawng zawng entir turin kei mi thianghlim zawng zawnga te ber aia te zawk hnenah hian chu khawngaihna chu pek a ni. 
Ephesians3:10 Chutichuan, kan Lalpa Krista Isuaah tih a tum, a chatuana remruat ang zelin," 
Ephesians3:11 tun laia van hmunahte khian lalna leh thuneihnate hnenah chuan Pathian finna tinreng kohhranho avangin hriattirin a awm thei ang; 
Ephesians3:12 chu Krista Isua kan rin avang chuan amah vekah chuan nelna leh ngam taka luh theihna kan nei. 
Ephesians3:13 Chutichuan, nangmahni vanga, ka hrehawm tuarnate avang hian beidawng lo turin ka ngen a che u, chungte chu in ropuina a ni." 
Ephesians3:14 Chuvang chuan Krista chu rinna avnga in thinlung a chen theihna'n, a ropuina ngahzia ang zelin," 
Ephesians3:15 a Thlarau zarah mihring chhungnung lamah chuan thiltihtheihna tihchakin a awmtir theihna tur che uin," 
Ephesians3:16 Pa, lei leh vana chhungkaw tinreng hming chawi chhana hmaah chuan ka thingthi thin a;" 
Ephesians3:17 chutichuan Pathian famkimna tinreng tluka tihkhaha in awm theihna'n, nangni hmangaihnaa zung kai leh nghahchhan neia awmin," 
Ephesians3:18 mi thianghlim zawng zawng nen chuan a zauzia te, a seizia te, a sanzia te, a thukzia te hriat chian theihna leh," 
Ephesians3:19 Krista hmangaihna hriat phak loh hriat theihna in nei thei ang. 
Ephesians3:20 Tichuan, keimahnia thawk thin thiltihtheihna ang zelin, kan dil leh kan ngaihtuah zawng zawng aia nasa zawk ti theitu hnenah ngei chuan,chatuanin chhuan zawng zawng thlengin, kohhranhovah leh Krista Isuaah chuan ropuina awm rawh se. Amen." 
Ephesians3:21 chatuanin chhuan zawng zawng thlengin, kohhranhovah leh Krista Isuaah chuan ropuina awm rawh se. Amen." 
Ephesians4:1 Chutichuan, inngaihtlawmna leh thuhnuairawlhna zawng zawng nei a," 
Ephesians4:2 hmangaihnaa indawh tawn chunga dawhtheihna neia remna phuarnaah chuan Thlarau inpumkhatna chu vawng tura bei a," 
Ephesians4:3 a kohna che u phua awm turin, kei, Lalpaa mi tang hian ka ngen a che u." 
Ephesians4:4 A koh chhan che u beiseina hmunkhata koh in ni ang bawk khan taksa pakhat leh Thlarau pakhat chauh a awm a; 
Ephesians4:5 Lalpa pakhat, rinna hmunkhat, baptisma hmunkhat," 
Ephesians4:6 engkim Pathian leh Pa pakhat chauh a awm a; ani chu engkim chungah a awm a, engkim fang chhuakin a awm a, engkim chhungah a awm bawk a ni." 
Ephesians4:7 Nimahsela, athlawna Krista thilpek tehna ang zelin khawngaihna chu kan hnenah theuh pek a ni." 
Ephesians4:8 Chuvangin, ""Chung lama a han chhoh lai khan mante chu salah a hruai a, mihringte hnenah pawh thilpekte a pe a,"" a tih chu." 
Ephesians4:9 Tichuan, ""A han chho,"" tih hi, lei hmun hnuai berahte a lo chhuk hmasak zet loh chuan engtin nge ni ang le?" 
Ephesians4:10 Lo chhuka chu engkim a tihkhah theihna'na van zawng zawng chung daiha han chhova vek bawk kha a ni. 
Ephesians4:11 Tin, rinna leh Pathian Fapa hriatna kawngah chuan thu khat vua a, puitling a," 
Ephesians4:12 Krista famkimna lenzia tluka kan zaa kan lo awm hma loh zawng, rawngbawl hna thawk tura mi thianghlimte tihfamkimna'n Krista taksa siam tha turin thenkhatte chu tirhkoh atan te," 
Ephesians4:13 thenkhatte chu zawlnei atan te, thenkhatte chu Chanchin Tha hriltu atan te, thenkhatte chu kohhran chawmtu leh zirtirtu atan te a pe a;" 
Ephesians4:14 chutichuan dik lohna ngamthlemna angin, fing verveka mihring bum chawpin, zirtirna thli tinrenga lehlam lehlama vawrh leh len len naupang kan ni tawh lo ang a," 
Ephesians4:15 hmangaiha thu dik tak sawiin, engkimah amahah kan thang lian thei zawk ang: amah chu Lu a ni, Krista chu." 
Ephesians4:16 Amah azarah taksa pumhlum chuan inzawmna tinreng thawh avanga rem taka inchuktuah leh inzawm khawmin, peng tin thawhzia ang theuhin hmangaihnaa insiam tha turin taksa chu a lo tipung thin a ni." 
Ephesians4:17 Chutichuan, hei hi ka sawiin Lalpaah chuan ka hriattir che u a ni: Jentailte chu rilru lawi lo pua an awm angin awm tawh suh u la," 
Ephesians4:18 hriat lohna anmahniah a awm, chu mi hriat lohna avang chuan Pathian nunna lakah thena lo awmin, an hriatnaah chuan an lo thim a ni, an thinlung a chawlawl vangin." 
Ephesians4:19 Chungte chuan inhriat chhuah theihna reng reng an neih tawh loh avangin, thil bawlhhlawh tinreng duham taka ti turin hurnaah an inpumpek ta a." 
Ephesians4:20 Nangni erawh chuan chutiangin Krista chu in zir lo e; 
Ephesians4:21 a aw ngaithlaa amahah zirtira awm in nih tawh phawt chuan, Isuaa thutak awm ang hi:" 
Ephesians4:22 In hman lai awm dan kawnga mihring hlui, bumna chakna anga chhe deuh deuh kha hlip thla u la," 
Ephesians4:23 in rilru thlarauvah chuan atharin lo awm u la; 
Ephesians4:24 mihring thar, thutak felna leh thianghlimnaa Pathian anga siam khan inthuam bawk u la,"" tih thu hi." 
Ephesians4:25 Chutichuan, dawt sawi banin, mahni thenawm hnenah thu dik tak sawi theuh rawh u; inpeng tawn theuh kan ni si a." 
Ephesians4:26 Thinrim u la, sual erawh chu sual suh u; in thinur chu niin tlakpui suh se;" 
Ephesians4:27 Diabola chu hmun kian hek suh u. 
Ephesians4:28 Ruk hmang chuan ru tawh suh se la; tlachham hnenah chuan pek tur a neih theihna turin a kuta thil tha thawkin rim zawk rawh se. 
Ephesians4:29 Thu tha lo reng in kaan chhuak suh se, a tulzia ang zela siam tha turin thu tha apiang chhuak zawk rawh se, a ngaithlatute tan khawngaihna a lo nih theihna'n." 
Ephesians4:30 Tin, Pathian Thlarau Thianghlim chu tilungngai suh u, tlanna ni atan chuan amahah chhinchhiaha in awm kha." 
Ephesians4:31 Khakna te, thinurna te, tauhna te, anna te, sawichhiatna te zawng zawng chu bansanin awm rawh se, sualna zawng zawng nen.Tin, inkhawngaih tawna lainatna neiin awm u la, Pathianin Kristaa a ngaidam che u ang bawkin inngaidam tawn rawh u." 
Ephesians4:32 Tin, inkhawngaih tawna lainatna neiin awm u la, Pathianin Kristaa a ngaidam che u ang bawkin inngaidam tawn rawh u." 
Ephesians5:1 Chutichuan, a fa duh takte angin Pathian awm dan latute ni rawh u." 
Ephesians5:2 Tin, Kristan a hmangaih che u a, rimtui atan Pathian hnena thilhlanah leh inthawinaa kan aia a inpek ang bawk khan hmangaihnaah awm rawh u." 
Ephesians5:3 Nimahsela, mi thianghlimte tiha mawi awm rengin, inngaih leh bawlhhlawh zawng zawng, duhamna nen in zingah lam pawh lamin awm suh se;" 
Ephesians5:4 zahmawh te, thu lawi lo sawi te, fiamthu te pawh, chung chu a mawi lo a ni; chung tih ai chuan lawmthu hrilh zawk rawh u." 
Ephesians5:5 Inngaih hmang leh mi bawlhhlawh leh mi duham reng reng chuan (mi duham chu milem betu a ni a) Krista leh Pathian ramah chuan chan reng an nei lo a ni tih in hre hle si a. 
Ephesians5:6 Tuma'n thu lawi lo maiin bum che u suh se; chung thil avang chuan Pathian thinur chu awih lo fate chungah a thleng si thin a. 
Ephesians5:7 Chuvangin, anmahni tawmpui suh ang che u." 
Ephesians5:8 Hmanah khan thim in ni a, tunah erawh chuan Lalpaah chuan eng in lo nih tak hi;" 
Ephesians5:9 Lalpa lawmzawng eng nge ni tih fiahin, eng fate angin awm rawh u," 
Ephesians5:10 eng rah chu thatna leh, felna leh, thutak zawng zawngah a lang si a." 
Ephesians5:11 Tin, thim thiltih rah nei ngai loahte chuan telna reng nei suh u la, tel ahnekin a thiam lohzia hriattir zawk rawh u;" 
Ephesians5:12 a ruka an thil tih thinte chu a sawi pawh a zahthlak si a. 
Ephesians5:13 Amaherawhchu thil engkim a thiam lohzia hriattira awm hi eng tihlan a ni thin: tihlana awm apiang chu eng a ni si a. 
Ephesians5:14 Chuvangin, ""Nang muhil! meng la, mitthi zing ata tho rawh, tichuan Krista chuan a chhun eng ang che,"" a tih kha." 
Ephesians5:15 Chutichuan, mi fing lote anga awm loin mi fingte anga awm zawkin, in awm danah fimkhur rawh u;" 
Ephesians5:16 nite hi a that loh avangin remchannate lei zel rawh u. 
Ephesians5:17 Chu mi avang chuan a duh suh u la, Lalpa duhzawng eng nge ni tih lo hre zawk rawh u." 
Ephesians5:18 Tin, uaiin ruiin awm suh u, chu miah chuan insum lohna a awm si a; Thlarauva khatin awm zawk rawh u." 
Ephesians5:19 Fakna hlate, Pathian hlate, thlarau lam hlatea inbe tawnin, Lalpa chu in thinlungah hla saksakin, tingtang kaihsak rawh u." 
Ephesians5:20 Kan Lalpa Isua Krista hmingin, Pathian, Pa ngei hnenah chuan engkim chungah lawmthu hril fo rawh u." 
Ephesians5:21 Krista tih dekin intulut tawn theuh rawh u. 
Ephesians5:22 Nupuite u, Lalpa hnena in intulut ang hian mahni pasalte hnenah intulut rawh u." 
Ephesians5:23 Krista chu amah ngei taksa chhandamtu nia kohhranho lu a ni ang bawk hian, pasal chu nupui lu a ni si a." 
Ephesians5:24 Chutichuan, kohhranho Krista hnena an intulut ang bawk hian nupuite chu engkimah an pasalte hnenah intulut rawh se." 
Ephesians5:25 Pasalte u, in nupuite hmangaih rawh u, Kristan kohhranho a hmangaih a, an aia mahni a inpe ang khan," 
Ephesians5:26 anni chu tuia sila thu chuan tifaiin a tihthianghlim theihna'n; 
Ephesians5:27 chutichuan kohhranho chu bawlhhlawh kai lo leh zur lo leh, chutiang thil reng pu loin, thianghlim leh hmelhem loa awm zawkin, amah leh amah kohhranho ropui takah a inpe chawp thei ang." 
Ephesians5:28 Chutiang bawkin pasalte pawhin mahni taksate angin mahni nupuite chu an hmangaih tur a ni. Mahni nupui hmangaihtu chu mahni inhmangaih a ni. 
Ephesians5:29 Tuma'n mahni tisa an haw ngai si lo a, an chawmin an duat zawk thin a ni. Kristan kohhranho a chawmin a duat ang hian;" 
Ephesians5:30 a taksa pengte kan ni si a. 
Ephesians5:31 Chu mi avang chuan mipain a nu leh pa kalsanin a nupui a vuan ang a, tin, an pahnih chuan tisa pumkhat an lo ni tawh ang." 
Ephesians5:32 Hei hi thu ril thuk tak a ni; Krista leh a kohhran thu kei chuan a sawina niin ka hria.Engpawh ni se, tupawhin mahni a inhmangaih angin mahni nupui hmangaih theuh se la, nupui pawhin a pasal hlau thiam rawh se." 
Ephesians5:33 Engpawh ni se, tupawhin mahni a inhmangaih angin mahni nupui hmangaih theuh se la, nupui pawhin a pasal hlau thiam rawh se." 
Ephesians6:1 Naupangte u, Lalpaah chuan in nu leh in pate thu zawm rawh u; chu chu thil dik a ni si a." 
Ephesians6:2 I nu leh i pa chawimawi rawh,"" (chu chu thupek tiam nei hmasa ber a ni)." 
Ephesians6:3 Chutichuan, i tan a tha ang a, leiah hian i dam rei bawk ang.""" 
Ephesians6:4 Tin, nangni pate u, in fate tithinur suh u la, Lalpa thununnah leh zilhnaah chuan enkawl zawk rawh u." 
Ephesians6:5 Bawihte u, Krista thu zawm angin tih dek leh khura thinlung sakhat vuanin," 
Ephesians6:6 mihring tilawmtute mai anga mit rawng bawl loin, Krista bawih anga thinlunga Pathian duhzawng ti zawkin," 
Ephesians6:7 mihring rawng bawl ang mai ni loin, Lalpa rawng bawl ang zawka duh tak chunga rawng bawlin," 
Ephesians6:8 bawih ni se la, bawih ni suh se la, mi tinin thil tha an tih theuh apiang chu Lalpa hnen ata a ngai vek an hmu leh ang tih hriain, tisaa in hotute thu zawm rawh u." 
Ephesians6:9 Tin, nangni hotute u, chutiang bawkin, anmahni leh nangmahni Hotu chu vanah a awm tih leh, ani chuan mi duhsak bik a nei lo tih hriain, vau loin an chungah ti ve rawh u." 
Ephesians6:10 A tawp berah chuan Lalpaah leh a chakna thahruiah chuan thiltihtheihna neiin lo awm rawh u. 
Ephesians6:11 Diabola ngamthlemnate chu in do zawhna'n Pathian ralthuam famkimin inthuam rawh u. 
Ephesians6:12 Kan buante hi tisa leh thisen an ni si lo, lalnate leh, thuneihnate leh, he thim chunga khawvel roreltute leh, van hmunahte thlarau sualho awmte an ni zawk e." 
Ephesians6:13 Chuvangin, ni tha loah chuan in do zawhna tur leh, in tih zawh vek hnu pawha in din theihna turin, Pathian ralthuam famkim chu la rawh u." 
Ephesians6:14 Chutichuan, in kawng chu thutaka hrengin, felna awmphaw chu hain," 
Ephesians6:15 remna Chanchin Tha inbuatsaihna chu in keah bunin ding rawh u; 
Ephesians6:16 chung lo pawh chu rinna phaw la u la, chu mi chuan mi sual thal alh thei zawng zawng chu in timit thei ang." 
Ephesians6:17 Tin, chhandamna lukhum leh Thlarau ngunhnam (Pathian Thu chu) la u la," 
Ephesians6:18 tawngtaina leh dilna tinrengin eng hun pawha Thlarauva tawngtaiin, chu mi kawngah chuan mi thianghlim zawng zawng tan thahnemngai tak leh dil tlatin ngaihven rawh u;" 
Ephesians6:19 Chanchin Tha thuruk huai taka puang tura ka ka ka ana thu sawitira ka awm theihna'n ka tan pawh mi dilsak rawh u," 
Ephesians6:20 chu mi kawngah chuan ka sawi tur ang chu huai taka ka sawi theihna turin, Chu mi Chanchin Tha palai khaidiat bun ka ni." 
Ephesians6:21 Nimahsela, nangni pawhin engtin nge ka awm, ka chanchin in hriat theihna'n, Tukika, Lalpaa unau duh tak leh rawngbawltu rinawm tak hian engkim a hriattir ang che u;" 
Ephesians6:22 he mi avng tak hian amah chu in hnenah ka rawn tir a ni, ka chanchin in hriat theihna tur leh, ani hian in thinlung a tihthlamuan theihna turin." 
Ephesians6:23 Pa, Pathian leh Lalpa Isua Krista hnen ata remna leh rinna tel hmangaihna unaute hnenah khan awm rawh se.Kan Lalpa Isua Krista chuai loa hmangaihtute zawng zawng hnenah khawngaihna awm rawh se." 
Ephesians6:24 Kan Lalpa Isua Krista chuai loa hmangaihtute zawng zawng hnenah khawngaihna awm rawh se. 
Philippians1:1 Paula leh Timothea, Krista Isua bawihte chuan Krista Isuaa mi thianghlim Philippi khuaa awm zawng zawngte hnenah, kohhran hotute leh rawngbawltute hnenah nen:" 
Philippians1:2 Pathian kan Pa leh Lalpa Isua Krista hnen ata khawngaihna leh remna in hnenah awm rawh se. 
Philippians1:3 Ni hmasa ber atang khan tun thlengin Chanchin Tha puan darhnaa in tel ve thin avangin 
Philippians1:4 ka hriat chhuah apiang che uin ka Pathian hnenah lawm thu ka hril thin," 
Philippians1:5 nangmahni zawng zawng ka tawngtaisakna che u apiangah hlim taka dil foin. 
Philippians1:6 Nangmahnia thil tha ti tantu khan Isua Krista ni thlengin a tifamkim zel dawn, chu ngei chu ka ring tlat si a." 
Philippians1:7 Nangmahni zawng zawng lamah chutiang rilru put chu kei atan chuan a awm reng a ni, ka thinlungah ka vawn che u avangin; ka kawlbunnaahte Chanchin Tha thiamna thu ka sawinaah leh ka tihnghehnaahte pawh, in zain khawngaihna chu mi tawmpuitute in ni si a." 
Philippians1:8 Krista Isua lainatna chuan in zavaiin ka ngaihzia mai che u chu Pathian mi hriatpuitu a ni a sin le. 
Philippians1:9 Tin, in hmangaihnain hriat famkimna leh bengvarna tinreng a ngah lehzual nan ka tawngtai thin;" 
Philippians1:10 chutichuan Pathian ropuina leh fakna tura Isua Krista zara felna rah awm chuan lo khatin," 
Philippians1:11 Krista ni atan chuan ataktak leh sawiselbo in nih theihna turin thil tha bikte chu tha in ti thei ang. 
Philippians1:12 Tin, unaute u, ka chunga thil lo thlengte kha Chanchin Tha tihdarhna tur a lo ni ta hlauh zawk tih in hriat ka duh a ni;" 
Philippians1:13 chutichuan ka kawlbunnate hi Praitorian sipai pawl zawng zawng zingah leh mi dang zawng zawng hnenah chuan Krista avang a ni tih a lang chhuak ta: 
Philippians1:14 Lalpaa unau tam zawkte pawh chuan ka kawlbunte avanga lo ring tlatin, hlau loin Pathian thu hrilh kawngah an huai nasa lehzual a ni." 
Philippians1:15 Thenkhat chuan itsikna leh elrelna avangin Krista thu chu an hril thin a, a then erawh chuan rilru tha tak puin an hril thung a;" 
Philippians1:16 chungte chuan Chanchin Tha tan turin Pathianin hna min pe a ni tih hriain hmangaihna avanga hril an ni. 
Philippians1:17 Mi thenkhat zawngin an ti tak tak lo, elrelna avang chauhin kawl ka bun chungchangah hian buaina mi belhchhahsak tura ti an ni." 
Philippians1:18 Engnge a pawina? Aderin emaw, atakin emaw Krista Thu hrilh a ni ta reng reng a, chu chuan mi tilawm tho ve. A ni, ka lawm zel ang." 
Philippians1:19 Chu chu in mi tawngtaisakna avang leh Isua Krista Thlarau mi pek avangin ka chhandamna a lo ni dawn tih ka hre si a," 
Philippians1:20 engah mah tihmualphoin ka awm dawn lo a,huai taka ka awm pangngai ang foin, tunah pawh nunna avangin emaw, thihna avangin emaw, ka taksaah Krista chawimawiin a awm zawk dawn tih ka beiseina leh ka chakna ang zel hian." 
Philippians1:21 Kei ka tan zawng nun hi Krista a ni si a, thih pawh hlawkna a ni." 
Philippians1:22 Nimahsela, tisaa nun hi ka chan ni se la - chu chu ka hnathawh rah ni ang se la, chutichuan a eng nge ka thlan zawk dawn zawng ka hre lo." 
Philippians1:23 A lai laklawhah hian a ngaihna hre loin ka awm mai a ni, kal chhuaha Krista hnena awm chakna ka neih avangin, chu chu a tha zawk em em si a." 
Philippians1:24 Nimahsela, nangmahni avangin tisaa awm reng hi a tul zawk a ni." 
Philippians1:25 Tin, chu chu ka rin tlat avangin ka awm reng dawn tih ka hria, a ni, rinnaah chuan in lo than lenna turin in zaa hnenah ka awm reng dawn tih ka hria." 
Philippians1:26 chutichuan inhnena ka awm leh dawn avangin in mi chhuanna chu Krista Isuaa a nasat lehzual theihna turin. 
Philippians1:27 Engpawh ni se la, in awm dan chu Krista Chanchin Tha nen inmawi phawt rawh se," 
Philippians1:28 chutichuan nangmahni rawn kan che u mah i la, in hnenah awm lo mah i la, thlarau hmunkhata ding nghetin, rilru hmunkhata Chanchin Tha rinna thu tana bei tlangin, dotute eng kawngah mah hlau loin in awm tih, in chanchin ka hre thei ang,chu chu anmahni tan boral tur an nih hriattirna fiah tak a ni, nangni tan erawh chu chhandam tur in nih hriattirna fiah tak a ni zawk e, chu pawh chu Pathian laka mi a ni." 
Philippians1:29 Krista avanga amah in rin chauh ni loin, amah avanga in tuar pawh phal a ni si a;indona keimaha in hmuh thin, tunah pawh keimahah a awm tih in hriat, chu mi ngei chu in neih ve tak hi." 
Philippians1:30 indona keimaha in hmuh thin, tunah pawh keimahah a awm tih in hriat, chu mi ngei chu in neih ve tak hi." 
Philippians2:1 Chutichuan, Kristaah tanpuina reng reng te, hmangaih thlamuanna reng reng te, Thlarau pawlna reng reng te, lainatna leh khawngaihna reng reng te a awm chuan," 
Philippians2:2 rilru hmunkhata awmin, hmangaihna hmunkhat neiin, inthuruala rilru hmunkhata awmin, ka lawmna tifamkim rawh u." 
Philippians2:3 Elrel leh inngaihhlut avanga engmah ti loin, mi tinin inngaitlawm takin mahni aiin mi dang tha zawkah ruat theuh rawh se;" 
Philippians2:4 mahni ta ta mai en loin, mi dang ta pawh en theuh zawk rawh u." 
Philippians2:5 He rilru, Krista Isua pawha awm bawk kha, nangmahniah awm rawh se;" 
Philippians2:6 ani zawngin Pathian anga awma Pathian tluka awm chu thil thlakhlelh hleih theihah a ruat lo a," 
Philippians2:7 mihringte anga lo piangin, bawih angah a insiam a, amah leh amah a intitlawm ta zawk a." 
Philippians2:8 Tin, mihring anga lo awmin, a inngaitlawm a, thi khawp hiala thu zawmin a lo awm ta a, kraws-a thihna ngei chu." 
Philippians2:9 Chu mi avang chuan Isua hmingin mi tin - vana mite, leia mite, lei hnuaia mite nen -" 
Philippians2:10 an thingthitna'n leh Pa Pathian tihropuina turin, ""Isua Krista chu Lal a ni,"" tiin lei tinrengin a puanna'n," 
Philippians2:11 Pathianin ani chu nasa takin a chawimawi ve ta thung a, hming zawng zawnga hming chungnung ber chu a pe ta a." 
Philippians2:12 Chutichuan, ka duh takte u, thu in zawm fo ang khan ka awm chauha thawk loin, tuna ka awm loh hlan hian thawk zawk mahin, hlau leh khur chungin nangmahni chhandamna thawk chhuak rawh u;" 
Philippians2:13 ama lawmzawng atana tih tum tur leh bei tura nangmahnia thawktu chu Pathian a ni si a.
