Philippians2:14 Chhuan bengtla lo leh tihmawhte zinga sual nei lo leh nuntlang, Pathian fa sawiselbote in nih theihna turin phunnawina leh inhnialnate awm loin engkim ti rawh u," 
Philippians2:15 chungho zingah chuan nunna thu hlanin khawvelah hian tiengtu angin in lang thin," 
Philippians2:16 chutichuan a thlawna tlan ka nih loh a, a thlawna thawk rim ka nih hek loh avangin Krista niah chuan chhuan tur ka nei thei ang." 
Philippians2:17 A ni, in rinna inthawina leh rawngbawlna chungah chuan leih buakin awm dawn mah i la ka lawm a ni, in zain ka lawmpui bawk a che u." 
Philippians2:18 Chutiang bawkin nangni pawh lawm u langin, mi lawmpui ve rawh u." 
Philippians2:19 Nimahsela, in chanchin ka hriat a, ka thlamuan ve theihna turin, rei lo te chinah Timothea hi in hnena rawn tirh Lalpa Isuaah chuan ka beisei a ni." 
Philippians2:20 Hetiang rilru pu, in awmzia tih tak zeta ngaihtuahsaktu tur che u tumah ka nei si lo." 
Philippians2:21 An zain Isua Krista tan zawng loin, mahni tan an zawng si thin." 
Philippians2:22 Nimahsela, ani hi chu fiaha a awm tawhzia in hria, fain a pa rawng a bawl angin, Chanchin Tha tihdarh kawngah rawng mi bawlpui thin kha." 
Philippians2:23 Chutichuan,ka chanchin tur ka hriat veleh ani hi rawn tir nghal i la ka ti a ni." 
Philippians2:24 Nimahsela, keimah ngei pawh rei lo te china lo kal Lalpaah chuan ka inring tlat a ni." 
Philippians2:25 Nimahsela, Epaphrodita, ka unaupa, ka hnathawhpui, ka sipaipui leh in tirhkoh, ka thil tlakchhama mi chhawmdawltu hi in hnena rawn tirh tulin ka hria." 
Philippians2:26 Ani chuan in zain a ngai em em si che u a, a na tih in lo hriat avangin nasa takin a lungngai bawk a." 
Philippians2:27 Thi chhawnga na zawng a ni ngei tak a; nimahsela Pathianin ani chu a khawngaih a; tin, ani chang ni loin, lngngaih chunga lungngaih lehzualna ka neih lohna'n kei mi khawngaih a ni fawm bawk e." 
Philippians2:28 Chutichuan, ani hi in hmuh leh huna in lawm theihna tur leh kei ka lungngaih a thathnem theihna turin ka rawn tir hmanhmawh deuh a ni." 
Philippians2:29 Chutichuan,ani hi hlim takin Lalpaah chuan lo lawm u langin, hetiang mi hi ngaihlu rawh u;in mi chhawmdawlna tlin bak chu chhunzawmna'n thih dawn loa beiin, Krista hnathawhna avangin thi chhawngin a lo awm ta si a." 
Philippians2:30 in mi chhawmdawlna tlin bak chu chhunzawmna'n thih dawn loa beiin, Krista hnathawhna avangin thi chhawngin a lo awm ta si a." 
Philippians3:1 A tawp berah chuan ka unaute u, Lalpaah lawm rawh u. Thu pangngaite in hnena ziak nawn leh hi keia tan zawng ninawm a ni lo e, nangni tan a sawt bawk si a." 
Philippians3:2 Ui lakahte chuan fimkhur rawh u, thil tha lo titute lakah chuan fimkhur rawh u. Innghaisaho lakah chuan fimkhur rawh u." 
Philippians3:3 Keini Pathian Thlarau zara Pathian bia leh, Krista Isua chhuang leh, tisa chunga rinna reng nghat lotute hi Serhtanho kan ni zawk si a." 
Philippians3:4 Duh phei i la, kei pawh tisa chunga rinna nghat thei ka ni a sin. Mi dang reng rengin tisa chunga rinna nghahchhan neia an inruat chuan kei ka inruat lehzual a ni;" 
Philippians3:5 Ni riat nia serh tan, Israela thlaha mi, Benjamina chia mi, Hebraite laka Hebraia piang ka ni a; Dan lamah chuan Pharisai ka ni a;" 
Philippians3:6 thahnemngaih lamah chuan kohhranho tiduhdahtu ka ni a; Dan thua felna lamah chuan sawiselbo ka ni. 
Philippians3:7 Nimahsela, ka tana hlawkna tur apiangte chu chung chu Krista avangin channaah ka ruat ta a ni." 
Philippians3:8 A ni tak meuh mai, ka Lalpa Krista Isua hriatna ropui bikzia avangin thil engkim pawh channaah ka ruat a ni; amah avangin thil zawng zawng ka chan ta vek a, chung chu hnawmhneah lek ka ngai a, Krista ka hmuh theihna tur leh," 
Philippians3:9 mahni felna (Dana felna chu) nei loin, Krista rin avanga felna (rin avanga Pathian laka felna chu) nei zawkin, amaha awm ka lo nih theihna turin;" 
Philippians3:10 a thihna anpuia thiin, amah nen, a thawhlehna thiltihtheihna nen, a tuarnate tawmpuina nen ka hriat theihna'n;" 
Philippians3:11 mitthi zing ata thawhlehna chu ka chang thei hram mahna, tiin." 
Philippians3:12 Hmu thawh reng inti ka ni lo a, famkim tawh reng inti pawh ka ni hek lo; ""Krista mi man chhan chu ka man thei dah law maw,"" tiin a umin ka um zawk a ni." 
Philippians3:13 Unaute u, manah ka inngai lo. Amaherawhchu he thil pakhat hi ka ti thin - hnung lama thil awmte chu theihnghilha, hma lama thil awmte chu banin," 
Philippians3:14 Krista Isuaa Pathian chung lam koh chhan lawman hmu turin, tiam chin lam chu ka pan talh talh a ni." 
Philippians3:15 Chutichuan, puitling apiang chutiang rilru puin i awm ang u; tin, eng kawngah pawh rilru danglam pu in lo nih chuan, chu pawh chu Pathianin a la hriattir ang che u." 
Philippians3:16 Engpawh ni se la, kan thlen chin atang khan hma i sawn zel ang u." 
Philippians3:17 Unaute u, ka awm dan zirtute lo ni hlawm rawh u, tin, entawn tur keini min nei a, chu mi ang zela awmte chu en tha rawh u." 
Philippians3:18 Mi tam tak an kal a, chu mite chu Krista kraws hmelma an ni tih an chanchin ka hrilh fo che u kha, tunah pawh tap chungin ka hrilh che u hi;" 
Philippians3:19 chungho tawpna chu boralna a ni, an pathian chu an pum a ni, an ropuina pawh chu an mualphona a ni, khawvel thil an duh thin a ni." 
Philippians3:20 Keini zawng van khua leh tui kan ni si a, van atanga min chhandamtu Lal Isua Krista lo kal tur chu nghakhlel takin ka thlir a ni.Ani chuan a thawhin, engkim pawh ama thu thuin a awmtir thei, chu mi thawhzia ang zelin kan tlawm lai taksa hi, ama taksa ropui anga awm turin a siam tha leh ang." 
Philippians3:21 Ani chuan a thawhin, engkim pawh ama thu thuin a awmtir thei, chu mi thawhzia ang zelin kan tlawm lai taksa hi, ama taksa ropui anga awm turin a siam tha leh ang." 
Philippians4:1 Chuvangin, ka unau duh tak leh ngaih tak ka lawmna leh ka lallukhumteu, chutiang chuan Lalpaah ding nghet rawh u, ka duh takte u.""" 
Philippians4:2 Lalpaah chuan rilru hmun khat pu turin Euodii ka ngen a, Suntuki pawh ka ngen bawk a ni." 
Philippians4:3 A ni, nang pawh ka nghawngkawl bahpui taktak, ka sawm bawk a che; khang hmeichhiate kha tanpui rawh. Chanchin Thaah chuan mi beihpui si thin a, Klemena nen, ka thawhpui dang Nunna Bua hming chuangte nen khan." 
Philippians4:4 Lalpaah chuan lawm fo rawh u: ka ti leh pek thin ang, lawm rawh u." 
Philippians4:5 In dawhtheihzia mi zawng zawng hriat ni rawh se. Lalpa chu a hnai e. 
Philippians4:6 Engah mah mangang suh u; engkimah tawngtai leh dilin, lawmthu hril tel zelin, in duhnate chu Pathian hnenah hriattirin awm zawk rawh se." 
Philippians4:7 Tichuan, Pathian thlamuanna, rilru reng renga hriat sen loh khan, in thinlung leh in ngaihtuahnate chu Krista Isuaah chuan a vensak ang che u." 
Philippians4:8 A tawp berah chuan unaute u, a dik apiang te, a zahawm apiang te, a fel apiang te, a thianghlim apiang te, a duhawm apiang te, a thangmawi apiangte - thatna reng a awm a, fakna reng a awm phawt chuan - chung chu ngaihtuah rawh u." 
Philippians4:9 In thil zir te, in thil pawm te, in thil hriat te, keimaha in thil hmuh te pawh kha, khang ang kha ti thin ang che u; tichuan Thlamuanna Pathian chuan a awmpui ang che u." 
Philippians4:10 Nimahsela, in mi ngaihtuahsakna chu tun hnua in rawn tihthar leh tak avang hian Lalpaah chuan ka lawm hle a ni; chutiang kawng chu ngaihtuah kha zawng in ngaihtuah the meuh a, remchang erawh chu in hmu lo mai a ni." 
Philippians4:11 Ka tlakchham thu sawi zawng ka ni lo e; kei zawng eng ang pawhin awm mah i la, lungawi zel ka ching tawh si a." 
Philippians4:12 Tlawm taka awm dan ka thiam a, hausaa awm dan pawh ka thiam bawk a; thil tinrengah leh thil zawng zawngah tlai leh riltama awm dan, hausa leh tlachhama awm dan thuruk chu ka hre chhuak tawh." 
Philippians4:13 Mi tichaktuah chuan engkim ka ti thei a ni. 
Philippians4:14 Nimahsela, ka mangannaahte hian mi lo manganpui hi in titha e." 
Philippians4:15 Tin, nangni Philippi-a mite u, Chanchin Tha thlen tirh laia Makedonia ram atanga ka kal chhuah lai khan, nangni chauh lo chuan kohhran pawl pakhat mahin thilpek leh dawn kawngah chuan mi tanpui lo tih nangni ngeiin in hre bawk a;" 
Philippians4:16 Thessalonika khuaa ka awm lai pawh khan, ka tlakchhamna phuhruk turin, vawi khat chang ni loin, vawi hnih lai in rawn thawn kha." 
Philippians4:17 Thilpek chu zawng ka ni lo a; rah, nangmahni lama pung tur chu zawng ka ni zawk e." 
Philippians4:18 Nimahsela, engkim ka nei a, ka ngah a ni; Epaphrodita kuta in thil mi thawnte chu ka lo hmu a, ka phuisui ta. Chung chu englo rimtui rim, inthawina chhan tlak, Pathian lawmzawng a ni." 
Philippians4:19 Tin, ka Pathian chuan Krista Isuaa a ropuina ngahzia ang zelin in tlakchhamna tinreng pawh a phuhruksak ang che u." 
Philippians4:20 Tin, kan Pathian leh kan Pa hnenah chuan chatuanin ropuina chu awm rawh se. Amen." 
Philippians4:21 Krista Isuaa mi thianghlim tinreng chibai mi buksak ang che u. Ka hnena unau awmte hian chibai an buk a che u. 
Philippians4:22 Mi thianghlim zawng zawngten chibai an buk che u a, Kaisara chhungte zinga mi hian an buk deuh ber a che u.Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna chu in thlarau hnenah awm rawh se." 
Philippians4:23 Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna chu in thlarau hnenah awm rawh se. 
Colossians1:1 Paula, Pathian duhzawnga Krista Isua tirhkoh leh Timothea kan unau chuan," 
Colossians1:2 Kolossa khuaa Kristaa mi thianghlimte leh unau rinawmte hnenah chuan Pathian kan Pa hnen ata khawngaihna leh remna in hnenah awm rawh se. 
Colossians1:3 Vanah in tan beiseina an dahsak che u avangin," 
Colossians1:4 Krista Isua in rinzia leh mi thianghlim zawng zawngte chunga hmangaihna inneihzia kan lo hriat achin in tana tawngtai foin, Pathian kan Lal Isua Krista Pa hnenah chuan lawmthu kan hril thin a." 
Colossians1:5 Chu mi beiseina chanchin chu, hmanah Chanchin Tha thutak thu-ah khanin hre tawh." 
Colossians1:6 Chu mi Chanchin Tha chu khawvel zawng zawngah rahin a pung zel ang bawk hian in hnena a thlen kha. Chutiang bawkin Epaphra, kan bawihpui duh tak laka in zir angin tihtak zeta Pathian khawngaihna chu in ngaihthlaka inhriat ni achinah khan, nangmahniah pawh rahin a pung zel thin a ni." 
Colossians1:7 Epaphra hi kan ai awhin Krista rawngbawltu rinawm tak a ni a," 
Colossians1:8 ani hian thlarauva in hmangaihna chu min hrilh bawk a. 
Colossians1:9 chu mi avang chuan thlarau lam finna leh hriat theihna zawng zawng kawngah ama duhzawng hriat famkimnaah chuan in lo khah theihna'n, kan hriat ni achin chu keini pawhin tawngtai leh dilsak che u kan bang lo;" 
Colossians1:10 chutichuan hnathawh tinrenga lo rahin, Pathian hriat famkimna kawnga lo sawt deuh deuhin," 
Colossians1:11 hlim taka chhelna leh dawhtheihna tinreng nei tura a ropuina chakzia ang zela chakna tinrenga lo chakin," 
Colossians1:12 Pa, enga mi thianghlimhote ro chu tawm ve tlaka min rawn siamtu hnenah chuan lawmthu hrilin, kawng tinrenga amah tilungawi turin Lalpa zui tlakin in awm thei ang." 
Colossians1:13 Ani chuan thim thuneihna laka min chhan chhuakin, a Fapa hmangaih taka ramah chuan min kaitir ta a;" 
Colossians1:14 amahah chuan kan tlanna kan hmu a ni - kan sualte ngaihdamna chu. 
Colossians1:15 Ani chu hmuh theih loh Pathian anpui, thil siam zawng zawnga piang hmasa ber chu a ni a;" 
Colossians1:16 amahah chuan engkim siam a ni a, vana awmte, leia awmte nen, hmuh theihte, hmuh theih lohte nen, lalthutphahte pawh, rorelnate pawh, lalnate pawh, thuneihnate pawh; engkim ama siam a ni, ama ta tur bawka siam a ni;" 
Colossians1:17 tin, ani hi chu engkim awm hmain a awm reng a ni, amahah chuan engkim a ding ho bawk a ni." 
Colossians1:18 Ani chu taksa (chu chu kohhranho) lu a ni a; engkimah chungnung ber a lo nih theihna'n, a bulpui, mitthi zing ata piang hmasa bera chu a ni." 
Colossians1:19 Famkimna tinreng chu amaha awm reng leh a kraws thisen chuan remna lo siamin, amahah chuan engkim amah nen a inremtir hi Pa lungnihzawng tak a ni si a;" 
Colossians1:20 amah ngeiah chuan leia thil awmte pawh, vana thil awmte pawh amah nen a inremtir hi." 
Colossians1:21 Tin nangni hmana in thiltih sualnaah khan ama lakah thenin in lo awm a, in rilruah chuan a hmelma in lo nih bawk kha," 
Colossians1:22 nimahsela tunah zawng, a hmaah chuan thianghlim tak leh, hmelhem lo leh, sawiselbova a dintirna tur che uin, a thihnain a tisa taksaah chuan amah nen a inremtir tawh che u a ni;" 
Colossians1:23 nghahchhan neia nghet taka awma, Chanchin Tha in hriata beiseina atanga sawn bo thin lo a, rinnaah hian in awm reng phawt chuan: chu Chanchin Tha chu van hnuaia thil siam zawng zawngte zinga tlangaupui a nih kha; kei Paula hi chu mi rawngbawltua siam ka ni." 
Colossians1:24 Tuna ka tuarsakna che uah hian ka lawm a, Krista hrehawm tuar bak chu a taksa avangin ka tisaah hian ka chhunzawm zel a ni; a taksa chu kohhranho hi an ni." 
Colossians1:25 Pathian thu hril kim tura enkawlna hna Pathianin in tan mi pek ang zelin chungho rawngbawltua siam ka ni. 
Colossians1:26 Mi zawng zawng laka a lo thup kumkhua thin, ama mite hnena a puan tak thuruk kha, tunah erawh chuan a mi thianghlimte hnenah lantirin a awm ta." 
Colossians1:27 Chung mite hnenah chuan hnam tin tana a thuruk ropui leh hlu tak chu Pathianin hriattir a duh reng a ni; chu thuruk chu, Krista nangmahnia awm ropuina beisei chhan chu a ni;" 
Colossians1:28 mi tin Kristaah chuan thafamkima kan dintir theihna turin, mi tin zilhin, mi tin finna tinrenga zirtirin a chanchin kan hrilh thin hi;chu mi ti tur chuan Krista chakna nasa tak keimaha thawk thin chu hmangin ka bei a, rim takin ka thawk a ni." 
Colossians1:29 chu mi ti tur chuan Krista chakna nasa tak keimaha thawk thin chu hmangin ka bei a, rim takin ka thawk a ni." 
Colossians2:1 Nangmahni leh Laodikei khuaa awmte leh, tisaa ka hmel hmu lo apiangte tan eng tikauva nasain nge ka beihsak talh talh che u hi in hriat ka duh si a;" 
Colossians2:2 chutichuan Pathian tuhruk (finna leh hriatna ro zawng zawng thuhrukna Krista chu) an hriat theihna'n," 
Colossians2:3 hriata rin tlatna lukhawng zawng zawng chu dawng tura hmangaihnaa insuihkhawmin, an thinlungte chu thlamuangin a awm thei ang." 
Colossians2:4 Tuma'n tawng kam thiamin an bum lohna'n che u, chung chu ka ti a ni," 
Colossians2:5 Tisain in hnenah awm mah suh i la, lawm taka awmin, in felzia leh Krista in rin nghehzia enin, thlarauvah chuan in hnenah ka awm si a." 
Colossians2:6 Chuvangin, Krista Isua, Lalpa chu in lawm ang khan, amaha zung kai leh rem chhoh deuh deuha awmin," 
Colossians2:7 an zirtir che u ang khan in rinnaah chuan nghet taka awmin, lawmthu sawi lo ngahin, amahan chuan awm rawh u." 
Colossians2:8 Fimkhur rawh u, chutilochuan tupawhin Krista thu ang ni loin, mihring thu rochhiah leh khawvel A Aw B ang zawkin an thu fing leh bumna mai maiin ral lakin an la dah ang che u." 
Colossians2:9 Amahah chuan Pathian famkimna tinreng chu taksa neiin a awm reng si a. 
Colossians2:10 Amahah chuan in famkim ta bawk a; ani chu lalna leh thuneihna zawng zawng lu a ni. 
Colossians2:11 Krista serhtannaah chuan tisa taksa hlip vekin amah vekah chuan kuta serhtan ni loa serh tan in nih kha; 
Colossians2:12 baptismaah chuan a hnena phum in lo ni ve tawh si a, chu mi vekah chuan mitthi zing ata amah kai thotu Pathian hnathawh rin avanga a hnena kaihthawh in nih ve kha." 
Colossians2:13 Tin, nangni in bawhchhiatnate leh in tisaa serh tan lohna avangin thi in lo ni a, nangmahni ngei chu amah nen a tinung che u a nih kha; kan bawhchhiatna zawng zawngte min ngaidam a," 
Colossians2:14 batna lehkha thupeka ziak, kan chunga awm, min dodal thina chu a thai bo tawh si a: chu ngei chu kraws-a khengbetin a la kiang ta a," 
Colossians2:15 tin, lalna leh thuneihnate chu hlip thlain, chu kraws-ah chuan chungte chu hnehin, alangin hriattirna'n a hmang ta a." 
Colossians2:16 Chutichuan, ei thu-ah emaw, in thu-ah emaw, kut ni thu-ah emaw thla thar thu-ah emaw, chawlhni thu-ah emaw, tuma'n sawisel che u suh se;" 
Colossians2:17 chung chu thil lo thleng turte hlim a ni, a tak eawh chu Krista ta a ni." 
Colossians2:18 Inlarna danglam bik hmua insawi a, khawvel rilru tak pu si a, engmah ni si loa intiveiho, taksa hi ngaihnep tur, vantirhkohte pawh biak tur tite chuan thiam loh chantir che u suh se. Chung hote chuan Lu, Krista chu an vuan tawh lo a ni." 
Colossians2:19 Lu atang chuan taksa pum pui bung hrang hrang inzawm khawm chu a chawm a ni a, Pathian duhzawng ang zelin a thang lian thin a ni." 
Colossians2:20 Khawvela zirtirna dik lote chu Kristaah in thihsan tawh si chuan, eng tizia nge khawvel mite ang leka, ""Tawk suh, tem suh, dek suh,""" 
Colossians2:21 tih an mihring thil intuk chawp leh phuah chawp mai mai hnenah in intukluh leh tak mai: 
Colossians2:22 chungte chu ei zawha ral mai thil a ni.Heng vantirhkoh biak tur tih te, taksa ngaihnep tih te, taksa tihhrehawm tih te hi tha fu awm chuan a lang a, mahse tisa chakna hneh turin a tangkai si lo." 
Colossians2:23 Heng vantirhkoh biak tur tih te, taksa ngaihnep tih te, taksa tihhrehawm tih te hi tha fu awm chuan a lang a, mahse tisa chakna hneh turin a tangkai si lo." 
Colossians3:1 Chutichuan, Krista hnenah kaihthawhin in awm ve tawh chuan chung lam, Pathian ding lama thu Krista awmnaa thil awmte chu zawng rawh u." 
Colossians3:2 Chung lama thil awmahte chuan in rilru nghat tlat rawh u, leia thil awmahte chuan nghat loin." 
Colossians3:3 In thi tawh a, in nunna chu Pathianah chuan Krista hnenah thuhrukin a awm si a." 
Colossians3:4 Krista kan nunna chu a lo inlar hunah chuan nangni pawh ama hnenah ropui zingah in inlar ve ang. 
Colossians3:5 Chutichuan, in taksa peng leia awmte hi tihlum rawh u, inngaihna te, bawlhhlawhnate, hurna te, chakna sual te, duhamna te hi (duhamna chu milem biakna a ni si a);" 
Colossians3:6 chung thil avang chuan a ni, Pathian thinur chu awih lo fate chunga a thlen thin ni;" 
Colossians3:7 nangni pawh hmanah chung thilahte chuan in nun lai khan, chungahte chuan in awm thin kha." 
Colossians3:8 Tunah erawh chuan nangni pawhin he'ng zawng zawng, tauhna te, thinurna te, huatna te, sawichhiatna te, in kaa chhuak tawng zahmawh te hi tibo rawh u." 
Colossians3:9 Dawt inhrilh tawn suh u; mihring hlui chu a thiltihte chawpin in hlip tawh a," 
Colossians3:10 mihring thar chuan in inthuam tawh si a, chu mihring thar chu hriat famkimna nei turin, a siamtu anpui anga siam tharin a awm mek a ni;" 
Colossians3:11 chu miah chuan Grik mi leh Juda mi, serhtan leh tan loh, awze mite, Skuthia mi te, bawih te, bawih lo te pawh a awm theih lo; Krista chu engkim ni zawkin, engkimah a awm bawk a ni." 
Colossians3:12 Chutichuan, Pathian mi thlan, mi thianghlim leh duh takte angin lainatna thinlung te, ngilneihna te, inngaihtlawmna te, thuhnuairawlhna te, dawhtheihna te chuan inthuam rawh u," 
Colossians3:13 tupawhin tu chungah pawh thupawi nei ang u la indawh tawnin inngaidam tawn u la; Lalpa chuan a ngaidam che u ang tak khan ngaidam ve rawh u. 
Colossians3:14 Tin, chung zawng zawng chungah chuan hmangaihna inbel rawh u, chu chu phuar famkimna a ni." 
Colossians3:15 Tin, Krista thlamuanna chuan in thinlungah ro rel rawh se, chutiang ni turin taksa pumkhata koh in ni reng a sin; lawm nachang hre bawk rawh u." 
Colossians3:16 Krista thu chu finna tinrengin nangmahniah awm teuh rawh se; fakna hla te, Pathian hla te, thlarau lam hla tea inzirtirin inzilh taWn u la, thinlunah neiin Pathian chu hla saksak rawh u." 
Colossians3:17 Tin, in tih apiang chu thusawiah emaw, thil tihah emaw ama zarah Pa Pathian hnena lawmthu hril chungin Lalpa Isua hmingin ti vek rawh u." 
Colossians3:18 Nupuite u, Lalpaa a awm tawk ang zelin in pasalte hnenah intulut rawh u." 
Colossians3:19 Pasalte u, in nupuite hmangih u la, an lakah in suh u." 
Colossians3:20 Naupangte u, engkimah in nu leh in pate thu zawm rawh u, chu chu Lalpaah chuan a lawmam si a." 
Colossians3:21 Pate u, in fate tinuar suh u, chutilochuan an bei a dawng dah ang e." 
Colossians3:22 Bawihte u, tisaa in hotute thu hi engkimah zawm rawh u, mihring tilawmtute mai anga mit rawng bawl loin, thinlung sakhat vuaa Lalpa tih dek chungin zawm zawk rawh u." 
Colossians3:23 A rulhna roluah tur chu Lalpa hnen ata in hmu dawn tih hriain, in tih apiang chu mihring tan anga ti loin, Lalpa tan anga ti zawkin, chak takin ti rawh u;" 
Colossians3:24 Lalpa Krista rawng in bawl a nih hi.Thil dik lo titu chuan a thil dik lo tih man chu a hmu leh ang; mi thlei bikna reng a awm si lo a. 
Colossians3:25 Thil dik lo titu chuan a thil dik lo tih man chu a hmu leh ang; mi thlei bikna reng a awm si lo a. 
Colossians4:1 Hotute u, nangni pawhin vanah Hotu in nei tih hriain, in bawihte chungah a fel leh a mawi tawk chu ti rawh u." 
Colossians4:2 Tawngtai fan fan u la, chu miah chuan lawmthu hril chungin ngaihven rawh u." 
Colossians4:3 Mi phuarna chhan Krista thuruk chu hril turin Pathianin thu atan kawng min tihkuaksak theihna'n keini pawh min tawngtaisak rawh u," 
Colossians4:4 ka sawi tur ang taka ka puan theihna turin. 
Colossians4:5 Remchanna lei zelin, pawn lama mite lakah chuan fing takin awm rawh u." 
Colossians4:6 Mi tin engtia chhan theuh tur nge ni tih in hriat theihna'n in tawngka chhuak chu, chia al, khawngaihna tel ni fo rawh se." 
Colossians4:7 Lalpaa unau duh tak, rawngbawltu rinawm, kan bawihpui Tukika hian ka chanchin zawng zawng a hriattir ang che u." 
Colossians4:8 He mi avang ngei hian ani chu in hnenah ka rawn tir a ni, ka chanchin in hriat theihna tur leh in thinlung a tihthlamuan theihna turin;" 
Colossians4:9 Onesima, unau rinawm leh duh tak, nangmahni zinga mi nen hian. Anni chuan he'ng lama thil awmzia zawng zawng hi an hriattir ang che u." 
Colossians4:10 Aristarka, ka tanpuipa hian chibai a buk a che u; Marka, Barnaba tupa pawhin chibai a buk a che u, (ama chungchang thu-ah thupekte in hmuh kha; in hnena a lo kal chuan lo lawm rawh u);" 
Colossians4:10 Aristarka, ka tanpuipa hian chibai a buk a che u; Marka, Barnaba tupa pawhin chibai a buk a che u, (ama chungchang thu-ah thupekte in hmuh kha; in hnena a lo kal chuan lo lawm rawh u);" 
Colossians4:11 Isua, Justa an tiha hian chibai a buk bawk a che u. Chung chu serhtan mi an ni a; chung chauh chu Pathian ram thu lamah chuan ka thawhpui, mi thlamuantute an ni." 
Colossians4:12 Epaphra, nangmahni zinga mi, Krista Isua bawihpa hian chibai a buk a che u, ani chuan Pathian duhzawng apianga puitling leh rin tlatna neia in din theihna turin a tawngtainaahte chuan nangmahni tan a bei fo thin a ni." 
Colossians4:13 Nangmahni tan te, Loadikei khuaa awmho tan te, Heirapoli khuaa awmho tan te thahnem a ngai em em tih ka hriatpui a sin." 
Colossians4:14 Luka, daktawr duh tak leh Dema hian chibai an buk a che u." 
Colossians4:15 Loadikei khuaa unau awmte kha chibai mi buksak ang che u; Numpha leh a ina kohhranho chu chibai mi buksak bawk ang che u. 
Colossians4:16 Tin, he lehkha thawn hi in zinga in chhiar hnuin Loadikei kohhranho zingah pawh chhiartir ve rawh u; nangni pawhin Loadikei khuaa mi kha lo chhiar ve bawk ang che u." 
Colossians4:17 Tin, Arkippa hnenah khan, ""Rawngbawlna Lalpaa i hmuh kha hlen turin fimkhur rawh,"" ti ang che u.Kei Paulan, keima kut ngeia chibai ka bukna che u a nih hi. Ka kawlbunte hi hre reng rawh u. Khawngaihna in hnenah awm rawh se." 
Colossians4:18 Kei Paulan, keima kut ngeia chibai ka bukna che u a nih hi. Ka kawlbunte hi hre reng rawh u. Khawngaihna in hnenah awm rawh se." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Paula leh Silvana leh Timothea chuan Pa Pathian leh Lalpa Isua Kristaa Thessalonika khuaa mi kohhranhote hnenah: Khawngaihna leh remna in hnenah awm rawh se. 
1Thessalonians1:2 Kan Pathian leh Pa hmaah chuan rin avanga in thiltihzia te, hmangaih avanga in thawh rimzia te, kan Lalpa Isua Krista beisei avanga in chhelzia te kha theihnghilh loa hre rengin," 
1Thessalonians1:3 kan tawngtainaahte chuan in hming lamin, nangmahni zawng zawng avangin Pathian hnenah lawmthu kan hril fo thin a ni." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Unau, Pathian duh takte u, a thlanzia che u kha kanhria a," 
1Thessalonians1:5 khatia kan Chanchin Tha chu thu chauha in hnena thleng lo a, thiltihtheihna leh Thlarau Thianghlim leh nasa taka rin tlatna nen a lo thlen zawk kha; nangmahni hma sialin in chungah eng ang mi nge kan lo nih tak kha in hre si a." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Tin, thu chu hrehawm tuar chungin, Thlarau Thianghlima lawmin, in lo pawm a, keimahni leh Lalpa zirtute in lo ni a." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Chutichuan, Makedonia leh Akaia rama ringtu zawng zawngte tan entawn in lo nih kha." 
1Thessalonians1:8 Lalpa thu chu nangmahni atangin a thang chhuak ta si a, Makedonia leh Akaia ramah chang ni loin, hmun tinah pawh Pathian lama in rinzia chu a thang ta a; chutichuan keinin engmah sawi reng a ngai ta lo." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Kan tlawh tum che u a min lawmzia te, Pathian nung leh dik tak rawng bawl tur leh a fapa (mitthi zing ata a kaihthawh thinur lo thleng tur laka min chhan chhuaktu Isua kha) van ata lo nghak turin,milem hawisana Pathian lam in hawi tak thute an lo sawi huai huai a ni." 
1Thessalonians1:10 milem hawisana Pathian lam in hawi tak thute an lo sawi huai huai a ni. 
1Thessalonians2:1 Unaute u, kan rawn tlawh che u kha a lo thlawn lo tih nangmahni ngeiin in hre si a;" 
1Thessalonians2:2 thlawn ahnekin, chu mi hma chuan in hriat tawh angin, Philippi khuaah chuan hrehawm tuar leh zahthlak taka siama kan awm hnu khan buai em em chung pawhin Pathian Chanchin Tha in hnena sawi turin kan Pathianah chuan kan lo huai tak zawk kha." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Kan thu hril hi dawta chhuak a ni si lo a, bawlhhlawha chhuak a ni hek lo a;" 
1Thessalonians2:4 Chanchin Tha kawltira awm turin Pathian tha tih mi kan nih ang ngeiin, mihring tilawm tur ang ni loin; kan thinlung fiahtu Pathian tilawm zawkin thu kan sawi zawk thin a ni." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Englai mahin fak derna thu emaw, duham khuhna emaw kan hman an hre ngai si lo tih in hriat kha (Pathian min hriatpuitu a ni);" 
1Thessalonians2:6 Krista tirhkoh ka nih avangin mi tan hautak zet ni thei mah i la, mihring lakah, nangni lakah pawh, mi dangte lakah pawh, chawimawina kan zawn an hre ngai hek lo." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Nu, nau pawmin ama fate a duat angin in zingah nunnem takin kan awm zawk kha." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Chutiang bawkin kan duhzawng tak in lo nih tak avang khan, kan duh ngawih ngawih che u a, Pathian Chanchin Tha chauh ni loin, keimahni nun pawh pek hial che u kan peih kha." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Unaute u, kan thawh hahzia leh kan thawh rimzia kha in hre reng e; in zingah tumah kan tihhautak lohna tur che uin achhun azana thawkin, Pathian Chanchin Tha kan hrilh thin che u kha." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Nangni ringtute chunga thianghlim tak leh fel tak leh demawm lo taka kan awmzia kha min hriatpuitute in ni, Pathian nen." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Ama ram leh ropuinaa ko luttu che u Pathian mi ni tlaka in awm theihna turin, pain ama fate chunga a tih angin, fuih leh thlamuan leh hriattir che uin," 
1Thessalonians2:12 in chung theuha kan tihzia kha in hre si a. 
1Thessalonians2:13 He mi avang hian bang loin Pathian hnenah lawmthu kan hril bawk thin, Pathian thu kan hnen ata in hriat, in pawm lai khan, mihring thu pawmin in pawm lo a, Pathian thu pawmin in pawm zawk avang kha; chu chu Pathian thu a ni reng a, nangni a ringtute chhunga thawk bawk thina chu a ni." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Nangni, unaute u, Judai rama Pathian kohhran pawl Krista Isuaa awmte zirtu in lo nih kha, anni chuan Judate lakah an tuar angin, nangni pawhin nangmahni rama mite lakah in tuar ve bawk si a." 
1Thessalonians2:15 Chung Judate chuan Lalpa Isua leh zawlneite pawh an that a, keini pawh min hnawt chhuak a, Pathian an tilawm lo a, mi zawng zawng an kalh thin;" 
1Thessalonians2:16 chhandam an nih theihna tura Jentailte hnena thu hrilh min khap si thin; an sual tawp khawk a thleng ta a, thinurna chu an chungah a lo tla ta nge nge a ni." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Nimahsela, unaute u, rei lo te atan nangmahni nen thinlung lama inthen lo a, hmel lam chauha inthena kan awm rih avangin, chak tak chunga in hmel hmu turin kan bei nasa lehzual thin a ni;" 
1Thessalonians2:18 in hnena lo kal kan tum tlat si a, kei Paula ngei pawh hian vawi hnih lai lo kal ka tum nghe nghe tawh a, nimahsela Setanan min dal thin a ni." 
1Thessalonians2:19 kan beiseina emaw, kan hlimna emaw, kan lallukhum chhuan emaw eng nge ni le? A lo kal hunah kan Lalpa Isua hmaah chuan nangmahni ngei in ni dawn lo'm ni?Nangmahniho hi kan chuan leh kan hlimna in ni a sin." 
1Thessalonians2:20 Nangmahniho hi kan chuan leh kan hlimna in ni a sin. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Chutichuan, kan tuar zawh tak loh chinah chuan Atheni khuaah keimahni chauh hnutchhiahin awm i la tha kan ti a," 
1Thessalonians3:2 Timothea, kan unaupa, Krista Chanchin Tha lama Pathian rawngbawltu hi, tinghet tur che u leh in rinna kawnga thlamuan tur che uin, kan rawn tir a ni," 
1Thessalonians3:3 he'ng hrehawm tuarnate avang hian tumah an nghin lohna turin, hengte hi tuar turin ruat kan ni tih nangmahni ngeiin inhre si a." 
1Thessalonians3:4 In hnena kan awm lai khan hrehawm tuar tur kan ni tih kan hrilh lawk ngei che u kha; chutiang ngei chuan a thleng tawh a, chu chu in hriat kha." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Chu mi avang chuan kan tuar zawh tak loh hnuin, thlemtu chuan a thlem thlu hlauh ang che u a, kan thawh rimna chu athlawn dah ang e, tiin in rinzia ka lo hriat theihna turin mi ka rawn tir a ni." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Nimahsela, Timothea chu in hnen atangin tunah kan hnen a lo thlen hian, hmuh che u kan chak ang bawkin min hmuh chak em emin khawngaih takin min hre reng fo tih thu leh in rinna leh in hmangaihna chanchin lawmawm tak min rawn hawn a;" 
1Thessalonians3:7 chu mi avang chuan unaute u, kan manganna leh hrehawmna zawng zawngah, in rinna avangin in chungah thlamuang takin kan awm ta." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Tunah chuan kan nung ta, Lalpaa in din ngheh phawt hi chuan." 
1Thessalonians3:9 In hmel kan hmuh theihna tur leh, in rina lama in tlakchhamna kan phuhruksak theihna tur che uin" 
1Thessalonians3:10 a chhun a zana nasa taka tawngtaiin kan Pathian hmaah in chunga kan hlimna zawng zawng avang hian nangmahni lam thu-ah Pathian hnenah eng lawmthu nge kan hrilh ve thung theih ang le aw? 
1Thessalonians3:11 Tichuan, kan Pathian, kan pa ngei chuan kan Lalpa Isua pawhin in hnen lamah min hruai rawh se." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Tin, nangmahni lama hmangaihna kan ngah angin, nangmahni lamah inhmangaih tawnna leh mi zawng zawng lamah hmangaihna chu Lalpa chuan tihpunsakin tihngahsak che u rawh se:chutichuan kan Lalpa Isua, a mi thianghlim zawng zawngte nena a lo kal hunah, kan Pathian leh kan Pa hmaah in thinlungte thianghlimna kawngah sawiselboin a tinghet thei ang che u." 
1Thessalonians3:13 chutichuan kan Lalpa Isua, a mi thianghlim zawng zawngte nena a lo kal hunah, kan Pathian leh kan Pa hmaah in thinlungte thianghlimna kawngah sawiselboin a tinghet thei ang che u." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Chutichuan, unaute u, a tawp berah chuan in awm dan tur leh Pathian in tihlawm dan tur (tuna in awm dan ang hi), kan hnen ata in lak ang khan in ngah lehzualna turin Lalpa Isuaah chuan kan ngenin kan fuih che u a ni." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Lalpa Isua zarah chuan eng thute nge kan pe che u kha in hre si a. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Pathian duhzawng, in thianghlimna tur chu hei hi a ni, inngaih bansan u la;" 
1Thessalonians4:4 Pathian hre lo Jentailhote anga hur kawng chak loin," 
1Thessalonians4:5 thianghlim leh chawimawiin mahni bel vawng thiam theuh u la; 
1Thessalonians4:6 chu mi kawngah chuan tuma'n bawhchhiain a unau chungah thil tha lo ti suh sela; Lalpa chu chung ang thil titu zawng zawng phuba latu a nih avangin - keini pawhin kan hrilh lawkin kan hriattir tawh che u ang khan. 
1Thessalonians4:7 Pathianin bawlhhlawh turin min ko si lo a, thianghlimah min ko zawk a ni." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Chuvangin, a pawisa lotu chuan mihring pawisa lo a ni lo a, Pathian, a Thlarau Thianghlim pe thintu che u chu a pawisa lo a ni zawk." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Amaherawhchu, unaute hmangaih kawng thu chu ziaksak in ngai lo e, inhmangaih tawn turin nangmahni ngei Pathian zirtirin in awm si a." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Makedonia ram puma unau zawng zawngte chungah pawh chutiang chuan in ti a, nasa lehzuala ti zel turin kan ngen a che u." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Kan hrilh ang ngei che u khan phili ruai loin mahni hna theuh nei tlatin mahni kut ngei hmangin hna thawk rawh u; 
1Thessalonians4:12 tichuan miten an ngaisang ang che u a, engmah tlakchham in nei lo ang." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Nimahsela, unaute u, mi dang beiseina reng nei lote anga in lungngaih lohna'n, muhilte chanchin in hriat loh kan duh lo e." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Isua a thi a, a tho leh ta tih kan rin si chuan Isuaa muhil tawhte chu Pathianin ama rualin a rawn hruai ve bawk ang." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Hei hi Lalpa thuin in hnenah kan sawi a ni. Keini Lalpa lo kal thlenga nunga lo la awm rengate hian muhil tawhte chu kan lehkhalh tawp lo ang, tih hi." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Lalpa ngei chu au thawm nen, vantirhkoh chungnung ber aw nen, Pathian tawtawrawt ri nen, van atangin a lo chhuk dawn si a; tin, Kristaa thi tawhte chu an tho hmasa ang a;" 
1Thessalonians4:17 chu mi hnuah chuan keini nunga lo la awm rengate hi boruakah Lalpa hmuak turin anmahni rualin chhum zingahte khian lak chhohin kan awm ang; chutichuan kumkhuain Lalpa hnenah kan awm tawh ang.Chuvangin, he'ng thu hian inthlamuan tawn rawh u." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Chuvangin, he'ng thu hian inthlamuan tawn rawh u." 
1Thessalonians5:1 Amaherawhchu, unaute u, a hun leh a ni kawng thute reng ziaksak che u in ngai lo e." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Lalpa Ni chu zanah rukru angin a lo thleng dawn tih nangmahni ngeiin chiang takin in hre si a. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Muanna leh himna,"" tia an sawi lai takin hmeichhe nau vei angin chawp leh chilha boralna an chungah a thleng ang a, an pumpelh tawp lo ang." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Nimahsela, unaute u, nangni zawng chu mi Ni chuan rukru ang a nanna tur che uin thimah in awm lo e;" 
1Thessalonians5:5 eng fate leh ni fate in ni vek si a; zana mi kan ni lo a, thima mi kan ni hek lo." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Chuvangin, mi dangte angin i muhil suh ang u khai, i mengin i ngaihven zawk ang u." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Muhilte chu zanah a ni, an muthilh thin ni; zu ruite pawh chu zanah a ni, an ruih thin ni." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Nimahsela, keini zawng chhuna mi kan nih avang hian rinna leh hmangaihna awmphaw chu hain, chhandam beiseina chu lukhuma hmangin i ngaihven zawk ang u." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Pathianin thinurna tuar tur ni loin, kan Lalpa Isua Krista zara chhandamna hmu tur zawkin min ruat a ni si a;" 
1Thessalonians5:10 kan men pawhin kan muthilh pawhin amah nena kan nun tlan theihna'n ani chu kan thih aiin a thi a ni. 
1Thessalonians5:11 Chuvangin, infuih tawnin, intisawt tawn theuh rawh u, in tih reng thin ang hian." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Nimahsela, unaute u, in zinga thawkrim leh, Lalpaa in hotua awm leh, zilhtute che u chu hre tur leh, an hnathawh vanga hmangaiha ngaihlu em em turin kan ngen che u a ni." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Inremin awm rawh u. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Tin, unau te u, kan ngen a che u, dan ang loa awmte chu zilh u la, rilru tete chu fuih u la, chak lote chu tanpui u la, mi zawng zawng lakah dawhthei takin awm rawh u." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Tuma'n tu sual pawh suala thungrul lo turin fimkhur rawh u; in thil intihsak tawnna lamah leh, mi zawng zawng chunga in tihsakna lamah pawh, a tha apiang um fo zawk rawh u." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Lawm fo u la; 
1Thessalonians5:17 Bang loin tawngtai u la; 
1Thessalonians5:18 engkimah lawmthu hril fo rawh u; chu chu nangmahni lam thuah Krista Isuaah chuan Pathian duhzawng a ni si a. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Thlarau chu timit suh u la; 
1Thessalonians5:20 Thu hrilte hmusit suh u; 
1Thessalonians5:21 Engkim fiah zawk u la: a tha apiang pawm tlat u la; 
1Thessalonians5:22 Sual tinreng lakah inthiarfihlim rawh u. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Tin, remna Pathian ngei chuan in pumin tithianghlim che u rawh se; tin, in thlarau leh, in rilru leh, in taksa chu kan Lalpa Isua Krista lo kal hunah chuan sawiselboin apuma humhimin awm rawh se." 
1Thessalonians5:24 A kotu che u chu a rinawm a, tih pawh a ti bawk ang." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Unaute u, min tawngtaisak rawh u." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Unau zawng zawngte chu fawh thianghlimin chibai mi buksak rawh u. 
1Thessalonians5:27 He lehkha hi unau zawng zawng hnenah chuan chhiar turin Lalpa hmingin ka ngen a che u.Kan Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna chu in hnenah awm rawh se. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Kan Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna chu in hnenah awm rawh se. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Paula leh Silvana leh Timothea chuan, Pathian kan Pa leh Lalpa Isua Kristaa Thessalonika khuaa mi kohhranhote hnenah:" 
2Thessalonians1:2 Pa, Pathian leh Lalpa Isua Krista hnen ata khawngaihna leh remna in hnenah awm rawh se." 
2Thessalonians1:3 Unaute u, nangmahni chung thu-ah hian Pathian hnenah lawmthu hril fo tur reng kan ni; chu chu a awm reng a ni, in rinna chu nasa taka thang lianin, in zaa in inhmangaih tawn theuhna chu a pung lehzual si a;" 
2Thessalonians1:4 chutichuan mi tihduhdahna che u zawng zawngah leh hrehawm in tuarnaahte chuan in chhelzia leh in rinzia avangin Pathian kohhran pawlte zingah chuan keini'n kan chhuang thin che u a ni; 
2Thessalonians1:5 chung chu Pathian rama mi ni tlaka ruat in ni thei dawn tih, Pathian rorel fel tak chhinchhiahna fiah tak a ni, chu mi ram avanga tuar in nih hi;" 
2Thessalonians1:6 Lalpa Isua Pathian hre lo mi leh kan Lalpa Isua Chanchin Tha awih lo mite chunga phuba lain 
2Thessalonians1:7 a vantirhkoh chak takte nen, meialh zinga van atanga inlar hunah a tihrehawmtute che u chu hrehawmna thungrulh leh" 
2Thessalonians1:8 nangni hrehawm tuartute hi keimahni nena chawlhnaa rulh thung chu Pathian tan thil fel tak a ni si a. 
2Thessalonians1:9 Chu mi ni-ah chuan a mi thianghlimahte chuan chawimawia awm tur leh," 
2Thessalonians1:10 ringtu zawng zawngahte chuan (kan thu hriattir che u kha in ring si a) mak tih tura a lo kal hunah chuan chung Pathian hre lo mi leh kan Lalpa Isua Chanchin Tha awih lo mite chuan hrem an tuar ang, Lalpa hnen ata leh a chakna ropuina atanga chatuana boralna chu." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Chutianga chawimawi leh mak tih a nih theihna'n kan Pathianin a kohna che u-ah chuan koh tlak nia a ruat theihna tur che u leh, that duhna tinreng leh rinna hnathawh tinrenga a thiltihtheihnaa a hlawhtlintir theihna turin kan tawngtaisak fo thin che u a nih hi;chutichuan kan Pathian leh Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna ang zelin kan Lalpa Isua hming chu nangmahniah chawimawiin a awm thei ang a, nangni pawh amahah chawimawiin in awm thei ang." 
2Thessalonians1:12 chutichuan kan Pathian leh Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna ang zelin kan Lalpa Isua hming chu nangmahniah chawimawiin a awm thei ang a, nangni pawh amahah chawimawiin in awm thei ang." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Nimahsela, unaute u, kan Lalpa Isua Krista lo kalna leh a hnena kan han inkhawmna tur thu-ah chuan," 
2Thessalonians2:2 Lalpa Ni chu a thleng reng tawh,"" tihna thlarau avangin emaw, thu avangin emaw, kan hnen atanga lehkha thawn ang avang in emaw, in rilru nghin thuai lohna tur leh in buai hek lohna turin kan ngen a che u." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Tuma'n engmahin tihder che u suh se; tluksanna chu a lo thlen hmasak zeta Dan Bawhchhepa, boral fapa chu a lo lan loh chuan chu mi Ni chu a thleng dawn si lo a." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Ani chuan Pathiana an vuah apiang leh, sakhua zawng zawng doin, an chunga awm tumin a inchawimawi ang: chutichuan Pathian biak ina thuin Pathian ang hialin a intar chhuak ang." 
2Thessalonians2:5 In hnena ka lo awm lai khan chung thu chu ka hrilh thin che u tih in hre reng lo em ni? 
2Thessalonians2:6 Ama hun te chauha a lo lan theihna turin engin nge khap tunah in hria e. 
2Thessalonians2:7 Dan bawhchhiatna thuruk chuan tunah pawh a thawk mek a ni si a; nimahsela lak boa a awm hma loh chuan tunah hian a khaptu a awm. 
2Thessalonians2:8 Chu mi lak bo hunah chuan Dan Bawhchhepa chu a lo lang tawh ang, Lalpa Isua'n ani chu a kaa thawin a tihlum ang a, a lo kala inlarnain a tiboral ang." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Chu Dan Bawhchhepa chu Setana chakna nen a lo kal ang a,thiltihtheihna tinreng te, chhinchhiahna tinreng te, dawt thilmak tinreng te nen a lo thawk ang," 
2Thessalonians2:10 boral mekte tan fel lohna bumna tinreng nen a ni ang; chhandama an awm theihna turin thutak hmangaihna chu an pawm loh avang a ni. 
2Thessalonians2:11 Chuvang chuan dawt thu chu an awihna turin Pathianin sual hnathawhna an hnenah a thlentir ang," 
2Thessalonians2:12 thutak awih loa fel lohnaa lawm zawkte chuan thiam loh an chan vek theihna'n. 
2Thessalonians2:13 Unau, Lalpa duhtakte u, Thlarau tihthianghlim leh thutak awiha chhandama awm turin atir ata Pathianin a thlan che u avangin in chung thu-ah hian Pathian hnenah lawmthu hril fo tur reng kan ni." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Chutiang atan chuan ani chuan kan Chanchin Tha hianin a koh che u kha, kan Lalpa Isua Krista ropuina nei turin." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Chutichuan, unaute u, ding nghet u la, thurochhiahte chu thusawiin emaw kan lehkha thawnin emaw kan zirtir che u kha pawm tlat rawh u." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Tichuan, kan Lalpa Isua Krista ngei leh Pathian kan Pa, min hmangaihtu leh khawngaihna avanga chatuana thlamuanna leh beiseina tha min petu chuan,in thinlungte chu tithlamuangin, thil tihthat leh thusawi that tinrengah tinghet rawh se." 
2Thessalonians2:17 in thinlungte chu tithlamuangin, thil tihthat leh thusawi that tinrengah tinghet rawh se." 
2Thessalonians3:1 A tawp berah chuan unaute u, Lalpa thu hi nangmahni zinga a awm ang khan, pungin chawimawia a awm theihna tur leh, mi luhlul leh mi sualte laka kan him theihna turin min tawngtaisak rawh u;" 
2Thessalonians3:2 mi zawng zawng chuan rinna an nei vek si lo a. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Amaherawhchu, Lalpa chu a rinawm e, ani chuan a tinghetin mi sual lakah chuan a hum ang che u." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Thu kan pek apiang che u kha in zawm thin a, in la zawm leh zel pawh Lalpa-ah chuan kan ring che u a ni." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Tin, Lalpa chuan in thinlungte chu Pathian hmangaihnaah leh Krista chhelnaah chuan hruai lut rawh se." 
2Thessalonians3:6 Tin, unaute u, kan hnen ata thurochhiah an hmuh anga awm lo a, dan lo anga awm unau tinrengte lakah chuan inthiarfihlim turin kan Lalpa Isua Krista hmingin thu kan pe a che u." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Nangmahni ngeiin min zir dan tur in hre si a; in zingah dan lo angin kan chet ngai loh kha; 
2Thessalonians3:8 tu kut ata mah athlawnin in chhang kan ei ngai hek lo, in zingah tumah kan tihhautak lohna tur che uin achhun azana hah tak leh rim taka thawk chungin kan ei zawk a ni;" 
2Thessalonians3:9 kan theih loh avang a ni lo a, nangnin min zirna turin in mi entawn atan kan insiam zawk a ni." 
2Thessalonians3:10 In hnena kan awm lai pawh khan he thu hi kan pek che u kha, ""Tupawhin hna a thawh duh loh chuan ei pawh ei suh se,"" tih hi." 
2Thessalonians3:11 In zinga thenkhat dan lo anga awm thinte chanchin kan hre si a, chung chuan hna reng an thawk lo a, an tei mai mai zawk thin a ni." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Tichuan, chung angte chu, ngawi renga thawk tur leh, anmahni chhang ei turin Lalpa Isua Kristaah chuan thu pein kan fuih a ni." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Unaute u, nangni erawh chuan thil tha tih ning suh u." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Tin, tupawhin he lehkha thawna kan thu hi a zawm loh chuan chu mi chu in pawl hauh lohna'n chhinchhiah rawh u, a zah theihna turin." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Nimahsela, hmelma angah zawng ruat suh u la, unau angin zilh zawk rawh u." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Tin, remna Lalpa ngei chuan kumkhuain kawng tinrengah remna pe che u rawh se. Lalpa chu in zaa hnenah awm rawh se." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Kei Paulan, keima kut ngeia chibai ka bukna che u a nih hi; hei hi ka lehkha thawn tinrenga chhinchhiahna a ni, hetianga ka ziak hi.Kan Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna in zaa hnenah awm rawh se." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Kan Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna in zaa hnenah awm rawh se. 
1Timothy1:1 Paula, Pathian min Chhandamtu leh Krista Isua kan Beiseina ruat anga Krista Isua tirhkoh chuan:" 
1Timothy1:2 Rinnaa ka fa tak tak Timothea hnenah: Pathian kan Pa leh, Krista Isua kan Lalpa hnen ata, khawngaihna te, zahngaihna te, remna te lo awm rawh se." 
1Timothy1:3 Makedonia ram ka pan dawn laia ka ngen che ang khan tunah pawh Ephesi khuaa awm reng turin ka ngen a che. Chuta mi thenkhat chuan zirtirna dik lo an thehdarh a, ti tawh lo turin hrih rawh." 
1Timothy1:4 Thawnthu mai mai leh thlahtute hming chhui sen loh chhui bansan rawh se; chung chuan rinnaa Pathian lama intihsawtna thlen loin inhnialna mai mai a thlen zawk si a. 
1Timothy1:5 Thinlung thianghlim leh chhia leh tha hriatna thiang leh rinna dik tak atanga lo chhuak hmangaihna neih theihna'n chu chu ti ka ni. 
1Timothy1:6 Mi thenkhatte an kal kawi avangin chu chu an pensan a, thu lawi lo sawina lamah an kal ta a;" 
1Timothy1:7 an thusawi awmzia leh paukhauh taka an thu hrilh chanchin chu hre si loin, Dan zirtirtute nih an duh thin a ni." 
1Timothy1:8 Dan chu a tha a ni tih kan hre si, miin a hman that phawt chuan." 
1Timothy1:9 Heng hi hria se la: Dan hi mi fel tak tana siam a ni lo a, dan pawisa lo ho leh dan bawhchheho tan te, Pathian ngaihsak loho leh mi sualho tan te, mi thianghlim loho leh Pathian zah loho tan te, pate thattuho leh nute thattu ho tan te, mihring thattu ho tan te," 
1Timothy1:10 inngaihhmangho tan te, mawngkawhurho tan te, mihring ruk hmangho tan te, dawtheiho tan te, chhechham derho tan te" 
1Timothy1:11 fak tlak Pathian Chanchin Tha ropui zirtirna dik ka hnena kawltir ang ni lo a, thil dang reng awm apiangte tan pawh chuan siam a ni zawk e." 
1Timothy1:12 Mi tichaktu Krista Isua kan Lalpa hnenah chuan lawmthu ka sawi a ni, hmanah sawichhetu leh tiduhdahtu leh sawisatu ni mah i la, rinawma mi ngaiha, a a rawngbawltua mi ruat tak avang hian;" 
1Timothy1:13 nimahsela ring lo chunga hre loa ti ka nih avangin a ni, zahngaihna ka lo hmuh ni;" 
1Timothy1:14 tin, kan Lalpa khawngaihna chu rinna leh Krista Isua hmangaihnain nasa takin a liam ta." 
1Timothy1:15 Krista Isua mi sualte chhandam turin khawvelah hian a lo kal,"" tih hi a rinawmin a pawm tlak em em a ni; an zinga mi sual ber ka nih hi." 
1Timothy1:16 Nimahsela he mi avang hian a ni, zahngaihna ka hmuh ni, Isua Krista chuan mi sual ber keimahah hian a dawhtheihzia zawng zawng a lantir theihna'n; tun achina chatuana nunna hmu tura amah la ring turte kawhhmuhna turin." 
1Timothy1:17 Lalber chatuana awm, chhe thei lo, hmuh theih loh, Pathian taka chauh chu chatuana chawimawi leh ropuiin awm rawh se. Amen." 
1Timothy1:18 Ka fa Timothe, hmana i chanchin an hrilh lawk thute ang khan, chu zilhna thu chu ka kawltir a che, chung chuan indona tha chu i do theihna'n;" 
1Timothy1:19 rinna leh chhia leh tha hriatna thiang tak pawm tlatin; mi thenkhatten chung chu paih thlain rinna kawngah chuan lawng keh angin an keh chhe ta.Chung zingah chuan Humenaia leh Alexsandra an tel a; Pathian sawichhiat loh an zir theihna'n anni chu Setana ka pe a ni. 
1Timothy1:20 Chung zingah chuan Humenaia leh Alexsandra an tel a; Pathian sawichhiat loh an zir theihna'n anni chu Setana ka pe a ni. 
1Timothy2:1 \ Chutichuan, atir berin, thil dil tawngtaina te, tawngtaina hrim hrim te, tawngtaisakna te, lawmthu sawina te mi zawng zawng tan siamsak turin ka fuih a che;" 
1Timothy2:2 lalte leh thuneitute zawng zawng tan pawh; Pathian ngaihsak leh zahawm taka inrema thlamuanga kan khawsak theihna'n. 
1Timothy2:3 Chu chu min chhandamtu Pathian ngaihin a thain, a lawm tlak a ni;" 
1Timothy2:4 ani chuan mi zawng zawng chhandama awmah leh thutak hriaah a duh a ni. 
1Timothy2:5 Pathian pakhat chauh a awm a, Pathian leh mihring inkara Palai pakhat chauh a awm bawk a, amah chu mihring a ni, Krista Isua," 
1Timothy2:6 mi zawng zawng tlanna'na inpea chu: chu chu a hun tak zela hriattirin a awm tur a ni; 
1Timothy2:7 chu mi ti turin tlangaupuituah leh tirhkoha ruat ka ni; (thu taktak ka sawi a, ka daw lo e;) rinna leh thutaka Jentailte zirtirtua ruat ka ni." 
1Timothy2:8 Chutichuan, mipahoin hmun tinah kut thianghlim pharin, thinrim lo leh inhnial loin tawngtai se la ka duh a ni." 
1Timothy2:9 Chutiang bawkin hmeichheho pawh inthlahdah lo leh inbel lutuk loin, thuam inchawih tawkin inchei se la, sam phiarin emaw, rangkachakin emaw, tuikeplungin emaw, puan man tam tak taktein emaw inchei loin;" 
1Timothy2:10 amaherawhchu (hmeichhia, Pathian ngaihsak intite chu inphu tawkin) thil tihthatin inchei se la ka duh." 
1Timothy2:11 Hmeichhiain thu awih tlatin ngawi rengin zir rawh se. 
1Timothy2:12 Amaherawhchu, hmeichhiain zirtir zawng ka phal lo, mipa chunga thu neih ka phal hek lo, ngawi rengin awm zawk rawh se." 
1Timothy2:13 Adama chu siam hmasak a ni a, chu mi hnuah Evi chu siam a ni a." 
1Timothy2:14 Tin, Adama chu bumin a awm lo a, hmeichhia erawh chu bumin a awm a, bawhchhiatnaah a tlu ta a.Nimahsela, rinna leh hmangaihna leh thianghlimna neiin, rilru fel tak nena an awm fo chuan fa hrin avangin chhandamin an awm ang." 
1Timothy2:15 Nimahsela, rinna leh hmangaihna leh thianghlimna neiin, rilru fel tak nena an awm fo chuan fa hrin avangin chhandamin an awm ang." 
1Timothy3:1 Tupawh Kohhran hotua tan duh chuan hnathawh tha a duh a ni,"" tih hi a dik a ni." 
1Timothy3:2 Chutichuan, Kohhran hotu chu sawiselbo, nupui pakhat nei, insum thei, rilru dik tak, mi fel, mi lawm dan thiam, zirtir thiam," 
1Timothy3:3 uain ruih hmang lo, mi velh hmang lo, mi nunnem ni zawk tur, kawhmawhbawl lo, tangka sum ngaina lo," 
1Timothy3:4 zahawm taka fate kilkawia mahni inchhung khawsak rel fel thiam mi ni tur a ni; 
1Timothy3:5 miin ama in chhung khawsak mah a rel fel thiam si loh chuan Pathian Kohhranho engtin nge a enkawl theih ang? 
1Timothy3:6 Ring thar mi ni tur a ni lo, chutilochuan chapoin a awm ang a, diabola thiam loh channa chu a chang ve dah ang e." 
1Timothy3:7 Chung lo pawh chu pawn lama mite fakin a awm bawk tur a ni, chutilochuan sawichhiata awmin diabola thangah a awk dah ang e." 
1Timothy3:8 Chutiang bawkin Kohhranho rawngbawltute chu mi zahawm an ni tur a ni; kamtam te, uain heh te, hlepna bawlhhlawha duham mi te an ni tur a ni lo;" 
1Timothy3:9 chhia leh tha hriatna thiangin rinna thuruk chu pawm mi an ni zawk tur a ni. 
1Timothy3:10 Tin, chungte pawh chu fiahin awm hmasa rawh se, chu mi hnuah sawiselbo an lo nih chuan Kohhranho rawngbawl lam hna thawk rawh se." 
1Timothy3:11 Chutiang bawkin hmeichhiate pawh mi zahawm an ni tur a ni, hektute ni loin, insum thei leh engkima rinawm an ni tur a ni." 
1Timothy3:12 Kohhranho rawngbawltute chu an fate leh anmahni in chhung khawsak rel felin nupui pakhat nei ni rawh se. 
1Timothy3:13 Kohhranho rawngbawl lam hna thawk tha tawhte chuan dinna tha tak leh Krista Isuaa rinna kawngah chuan huaina nasa tak an insiam si thin a. 
1Timothy3:14 Rei lo te chinah i hnenah lo kal beiseinain he'ng thu hi i hnenah ka ziak a ni; 
1Timothy3:15 nimahsela ka la awm rei tak dahin Pathian chhungte zinga mi engtia awm tur nge an nih i hriat theihna'n ka ziak a ni; Pathian chhungte chu Pathian nung Kohhranho, thutak ban leh innghahna chu an ni.Tin, Pathian ngaihsakna thuruk chu hnial rual lohin a ropui a ni: ""Tisaa lo lang a, Thlaraua thiam chang a, Vantirhkohte hmuha Jentailte zinga tlangaupui a, Khawvelah hian mite rin a, Ropuinaa hruai chhoh taka chu.""" 
1Timothy3:16 Tin, Pathian ngaihsakna thuruk chu hnial rual lohin a ropui a ni: ""Tisaa lo lang a, Thlaraua thiam chang a, Vantirhkohte hmuha Jentailte zinga tlangaupui a, Khawvelah hian mite rin a, Ropuinaa hruai chhoh taka chu.""" 
1Timothy4:1 Nimahsela, nakin hunah chuan mi thenkhatte chu, mi dawtheite vervekna avangin hruaibona thlaraute leh ramhuaite zirtirna thu ngaihsakin rinna chu an la bansan ang tih Thlarau chuan chiang takin a sawi a." 
1Timothy4:2 Chung mi dawtheite chu anmahni chhia leh tha hriatna ngeia thir linga deh ang an ni a," 
1Timothy4:3 inneih an khap thin a, englo ei turte (thutak hriaa ringtuten lawmthu sawia pawm tura Pathianin a siamte chu) ei loh tur an ti thin." 
1Timothy4:4 Pathian thilsiam tinreng hi a tha si a, lawmthu hrila pawm a nih tawh phawt chuan engmah duh loh tur a ni lo;" 
1Timothy4:5 Pathian thu leh tawngtainain tihthianghlim a ni tawh si a. 
1Timothy4:6 Chungte chu unaute i hriattir chuan Krista Isua rawngbawltu tha tak, rinna leh zirtirna tha tun thlenga i la zawm thua chawm i ni ang." 
1Timothy4:7 Amaherawhchu, Pathian zah lohna leh pitarte thawnthu mai mai duh suh. Tin, Pathian ngaihsak turin insawizawi rah:" 
1Timothy4:8 taksa insawizawi na hi sawt zawng a sawt ve bawk a; Pathian ngaihsakna erawh hi chuanin nunna tuna awm sa leh la awm leh tur pek tiamna a neih avangin kawng tinrengah a sawt a ni. 
1Timothy4:9 He thu hi a rinawmin a pawm tlak em em a ni. 
1Timothy4:10 Chutichuan, Pathian nung chu kan rin avangin kan thawk rim a, kan bei hram hram a ni si a; ani chu mi zawng zawng Chhandamtu a ni a, a ringtute Chhandamtu a ni deuh ber mai." 
1Timothy4:11 Chung thu chu pe la, zirtir rawh." 
1Timothy4:12 I naupanna tumahin ngainep suh se; thusawi kawngah te, chetze kawngah te, hmangaih kawngah te, rinna kawngah te, thianghlimna kawngah te ringtute tihhmuhtu ni zawk ang che." 
1Timothy4:13 Ka lo kal hma loh zawng chhiar te, thu hrilh te, zirtir te bei uar rawh." 
1Timothy4:14 Nangmaha awm thilpek, hrilh lawk anga upahote kut nghata Pathianin a neihtir che kha thlahthlam suh." 
1Timothy4:15 Mi zawng zawng hnena i sawtna a lan theihna'n chung thilahte chuan taima la, chu'ngah chuan inhmang zo rawh.Nangmah leh i zirtirnaah chuan fimkhur la; chung thil tiin awm reng rawh; chutiang tiin nangmah leh i thu ngaithlatute chu i chhandam dawn zuk nia." 
1Timothy4:16 Nangmah leh i zirtirnaah chuan fimkhur la; chung thil tiin awm reng rawh; chutiang tiin nangmah leh i thu ngaithlatute chu i chhandam dawn zuk nia. 
1Timothy5:1 Putar deuhte hau suh la, pa angin thlem zawk rawh; rawlthar deuhte chu unau angin;" 
1Timothy5:2 pitar deuhte chu nu angin; nula deuhte chu thianghlim takin farnu angin. 
1Timothy5:3 Hmeithai, hmeithai tak takte chu chawimawi rawh." 
1Timothy5:4 Nimahsela, hmeithai tupawhin fate emaw, tute emaw nei se la, chungte chuan anmahni in chhung lamah Pathian ngaihsaka awm leh anmahni hringtute chungah that ve thung zir zet rawh se; chu chu Pathian lawmzawng a ni si a." 
1Timothy5:5 Hmeithai taktak mahni chauha awm chuan Pathian chungah beiseina a nei tlat a, a chhun a zanin dil leh tawngtaiin a awm fo thin a." 
1Timothy5:6 Amaherawhchu,hmeithai mahni nawmna ngawta inpe chu a dam lai pawhin a thi a ni." 
1Timothy5:7 Sawiselbova an awm theihna'n chung thu pawh chu pe rawh. 
1Timothy5:8 Tupawh mahni chhungkhat lainate ngaihsak lo a, mahni chenpui chhungte ngei pawh ngaihsak lo chuan rinna an phatsan a ni, ring lo mi aiin an sual zawk." 
1Timothy5:9 Hmeithai chu kum sawmruk achin hnuai lama mi ni lo a, mi pakhat nupui ni tawha thil tha tih kawnga mi faka a awm chuan hmeithaia ziak theih a ni -" 
1Timothy5:10 fate lo chawmtlei tawha mikhualte lo thleng tawha mi thianghlimte ke lo sil tawha mi mangangte lo chhawmdawl tawha thil tha tinreng taima taka a lo tih tawh phawt chuan. 
1Timothy5:11 Hmeithai la nula deuhte erawh chu ziak duh su; An chakna avanga Krista lamah an lo ngheh lohin pasal neih an duh leh mai thin. 
1Timothy5:12 An thu tiam an bawhchhia a, an thiam lo a ni." 
1Timothy5:13 Tin, chu lo pawh chu in tinah an leng lawr a, thatchhiat pawh an ching thin a; thatchhiat chang pawh ni loin, thu sawi loh tur sawiin kamtam leh mite thiltih relsak an ching bawk thin a ni." 
1Timothy5:14 Chutichuan, hmeithai la nula deuhte chuan pasal nei se la, fate nei se la, in chhung khawsak rel se la, sawiselna tur remchang reng hmelma chu hmuhtir suh sela ka duh a ni." 
1Timothy5:15 Tunah pawh mi thenkhat chuan Setana lam panin an pensan ta si a. 
1Timothy5:16 Ringtu hmeichhiain hmeithai awmpui nei se la, anni chu amah chuan chhawmdawl mai rawh se, kohhranho chu tihbuaiin awm suh se, hmeithai, belh tur nei lote chu an chhawmdawl theihna'n." 
1Timothy5:17 Kohhran upa rorel thate chu a leh hniha chawimawi tlaka ngaih ni rawh se, thu hril leh zirtirnaa thawk rimte chu chawimawi tlaka ngaih lehzual ni rawh se." 
1Timothy5:18 Pathian Lehkha Thu chuan, ""Sebawngpain buh a chil laiin a hmui phuar suh ang che,"" a ti a. ""Hnathawktu chu a hlawh hmu tlak a ni,"" a ti bawk a." 
1Timothy5:19 Kohhran upa an hekna chu hretu pahnih emaw pathum emaw kaa mi lo chu pawm suh. 
1Timothy5:20 Thil tisualtute chu mi zawng zawng hmaah zilhhau rawh, mi dangte pawhin an hlauh ve theihna'n." 
1Timothy5:21 Heng thu hi thleithlak bik nei loin, thlei bik neia engmah ti loin, Pathian leh Krista Isua leh vantirhkoh thlante mithmuhin zawm turin thahnemngai takin ka hriattir a che." 
1Timothy5:22 Tuma chungah kut nghat thut suh la, mi dang sualnaahte chuan tel hek suh; intithianghlim reng rawh." 
1Timothy5:23 Tui chauh in mi ni tawh suh la, i pum avang leh i dam loh fo avangin uain tlem te hmang thin ang che." 
1Timothy5:24 Mi thenkhat sual chu a langsar a, an tuar nghal bawk thin, thenkhat erawh chu a lang lawk lem lo a.Chutiang bawkin thil tha tih lang nghal a awm a, lang nghal rih lo mah se thup hlen theih a ni lo." 
1Timothy5:25 Chutiang bawkin thil tha tih lang nghal a awm a, lang nghal rih lo mah se thup hlen theih a ni lo." 
1Timothy6:1 Pathian hming leh a zirtirna thu sawichhiata a awm lohna'n, bawih nghawngkawl bat apiangte chuan anmahni pute engkimah chawimawi tlakah ngai rawh se." 
1Timothy6:2 Tin, ringtu pu neite chuan unau an nih avangin ngainep suh se, amaherawhchu sawtna hmutute chu ringtu leh duh takte an nih avangin an rawng bawlsak lehzual rawh se.Chung thu chu zirtir la, fuih rawh." 
1Timothy6:3 Mi tupawhin zirtirna dang a zirtir a, thutak (Kan Lalpa Isua Krista thu chu) leh Pathian ngihsak lam zirtirna a awih loh chuan" 
1Timothy6:4 ani chu a chapo a, engmah a hre lo a, hriat ahnekin inhnial leh thu kalh kawngah chuan a a ta zawk a ni. Chung atang chuan awhna te, insualna te, sawichhiatna te, tha lo lama rinna te," 
1Timothy6:5 hnialhratna te a chhuak thin a; chutiang hnialhrat mite chu rilru chhe nei leh thutak nei lo mi, Pathian ngaihsak hi hlawkna emaw titu an ni." 
1Timothy6:6 Pathian ngaihsakna hi lungawina tel zawngin hlawkna nasa tak a ni reng a ni. 
1Timothy6:7 Khawvelah hian engmah kan luhpui si lo a, engmah kan chhuahpui thei bawk hek lo." 
1Timothy6:8 Nimahsela, ei tur leh silh tur neiin chungh chuan kan lungawi ang." 
1Timothy6:9 Amaherawhchu, hausak tumte chu thlemnaah te, thangah te, atthlak leh tikhawlo thei duhna tam takah te an tlu lut thin, chung duhnate chuan chhiatna leh boralnaah chuan mite a tipil thin." 
1Timothy6:10 Tangka sum ngainat hi sual tinreng bul a ni si a; chu chu thenkhatten an awt a, rinna chu an kal bosan a, anmahni leh anmahni lungngaihna tam takin an inchhun tlang ta chuk a." 
1Timothy6:11 Nimahsela, nang, Pathian mi, chung thilte chu tlansan la, felna te, Pathian ngaihsakna te, rinna te, hmangihna te, dawhtheihna te, thuhnuairawlhna te um zel rawh." 
1Timothy6:12 Rinna intihsiakna tha chu bei la, chatuan nunna chu vuan rawh; chu mi chang turin koh i ni a; hretu tam takte mithmuhah tanna tha chu i tan tawh kha." 
1Timothy6:13 Pathian, thil engkim tinungtu leh Krista Isua, Pontia Pilata hmaa tanna tha tantu mithmuhah chuan thu ka pe a che;" 
1Timothy6:14 kan Lal Isua Krista rawn inlar leh hma loh chuan thupek kha thianghlim tak leh sawiselbova pawm turin. 
1Timothy6:15 Chu inlarna chu a hun takah chuan fak tlak Thuneitu tak chauh, lalberte Lalber, lalte Lal chuan a entir ang;" 
1Timothy6:16 amah chauh chuan thih theih lohna a nei a, hnaih theih rual loh engah chuan a awm a, amah chu tumahin an hmu ngai lo a, hmuh pawh an hmu thei hek lo; ama hnenah chuan chatuana chawimawina leh thiltihtheihna awm rawh se. Amen." 
1Timothy6:17 He mi khawvela hausate hi chapo lo tur leh sum rinawm loah hian an beiseina nghat lo a, thil zawng zawng lawmna tura tam taka min petu Pathian chungah chuan nghat zawk turin zilh rawh;" 
1Timothy6:18 thil tha ti turin, thil tha tih ngah turin, thil phala thawhlawm peih turin," 
1Timothy6:19 nunna, nunna taktak chu an vawn theihna'n, hun lo thleng tur atan chuan lungphum tha tak an tana khawl khawm turin fuih rawh." 
1Timothy6:20 Aw Timothe, i hnena kawltira awm chu vawng tha rawh. Pathian zah lo lam thu sawi mai mai leh, dik lo taka ""Finna"" an vuah hnialna hi hawisan rawh.Chu chu thenkhatten nei emaw intiin rinna kawng chu an kal kawisan ta a. Khawngaihna i hnenah awm rawh se." 
1Timothy6:21 Chu chu thenkhatten nei emaw intiin rinna kawng chu an kal kawisan ta a. Khawngaihna i hnenah awm rawh se. 
2Timothy1:1 Paula, Krista Isuaa nunna awm tiamna thu chu hrilh kawnga Pathian duhzawnga Krista Isua tirhkoh chuan," 
2Timothy1:2 Ka fa duh tak Timothea hnenah: Pathian kan Pa leh Krista Isua kan Lalpa hnen ata khawngaihna te, zahngaihna te, remna te lo awm rawh se." 
2Timothy1:3 Lawmin ka khah theihna'n hmuh che ka duh em em a, i mittui hre rengin a chhun a zanin bang loin ka tawngtainaahte chuan ka hriatpui thin che avangin Pathian hnenah lawmthu ka hril a ni," 
2Timothy1:4 mi thlahtute chena chhia leh tha hriatna thiang tak neia a rawng ka bawl thina hnenah chuan; 
2Timothy1:5 rinna taktak nangmaha awm chu ka hre reng si a, chu rinna chu atirin i pi Loisii-ah chuan a awm a, i nu Euniki-ah chuan a awm bawk a, nangmahah pawh a awm tih dik takin ka hria." 
2Timothy1:6 Chuvangin, ka kut nghah avnga Pathian thilpek nangmaha awm kha chhem alh turin ka hriatpui che a ni." 
2Timothy1:7 Pathianin hlauhna thlarau min pe lo a, thiltihtheihna leh hmangaihna leh rilru fel tak neihna thlarau min pe zawk si a." 
2Timothy1:8 Chutichuan, kan Lalpa thu hriattirna chu zahpui suh la, kei, ama mi tang pawh hi mi zahpui hek suh ang che. Chanchin Tha avanga hrehawm hi Pathian thiltihtheihna angzia ziain mi tuarpui zawk ang che." 
2Timothy1:9 Ani chuan kan thiltih angte ni loin, ama ruat leh khawngaihna ang zawkin min chhandam a, kohna thianghlimin min ko bawk a; chu khawngaihna chu leilung pian hmain Krista Isuaah chuan min pek a ni tawh," 
2Timothy1:10 nimahsela min chhandamtu Krista Isua inlarna avang hiantunah tihlanin a awm ta. Ani chuan thihna chu a tiboralin Chanchin Thain nunna leh boral theih lohna a tilang ta; 
2Timothy1:11 chu mi Chanchin Tha thu chu hriattir turin tlangaupuituah leh tirhkohvah leh zirtirtuah ruat ka ni. 
2Timothy1:12 Chuvang chuan a ni, he'ng thil pawh hi ka tuar ni; nimahsela ka zak lo e; ka rina chu ka hria, a hnena ka kawltir chu, chu mi ni atan chuan a vawng tha thei tih dik takin ka hre bawk a." 
2Timothy1:13 Krista Isuaa awm rinna leh hmangaihna neiin, thu dik dan ka kaa i hriatte kha nei tlat rawh." 
2Timothy1:14 Thil tha i hnena kawltira awm kha, kan chhunga Thlarau Thianghlim awm hianin vawng tha rawh." 
2Timothy1:15 Asia rama awm zawng zawngten mi hawisan tih kha i hria a; an zingah chuan Phugella leh Hermogena an tel a ni. 
2Timothy1:16 Lalpa chuan Onesiphora chhungte hnenah zahngaihna pe rawh se, ani chuan mi tiharh fo a, ka khaidiat bun pawh mi zahpui si lo a;" 
2Timothy1:17 Rom khuaa a lo kal lai khan ngun takin mi zawng chhuak ta zawk a ni.(Chu mi niah chuan Lalpa hnenah zahngaihna hmu turin Lalpa chuan ani chu ruat rawh se). Ephesi khuaa rawng a bawl nasatzia kha i hre hle bawk a ni. 
2Timothy1:18 (Chu mi niah chuan Lalpa hnenah zahngaihna hmu turin Lalpa chuan ani chu ruat rawh se). Ephesi khuaa rawng a bawl nasatzia kha i hre hle bawk a ni. 
2Timothy2:1 Chutichuan, nang ka fa, Krista Isuaa khawngaihna awmah hian thiltihtheihna neiin awm ang che." 
2Timothy2:2 Tin, hretu tam takte zinga ka kaa thu i hriatte kha, chung chu mi rinawm, mi dangte zirtir chhawng thei tur angte hnenah chuan kawltir rawh." 
2Timothy2:3 Krista Isua sipai tha tak angin hrehawm mi tuarpui rawh. 
2Timothy2:4 Sipaia awm tura thlangtu chu a tihlawm theihna'n, sipai tumah indo laiin tun damchhung khawsaknate hian a intihnawk ngai lo a." 
2Timothy2:5 Tin, intihsiaknaahte pawh chuan miin bei mah se la, dan angin a beih loh chuan khumtirin a awm ngai lo a." 
2Timothy2:6 Lo neitu thawk rim chu a rah chang hmasatu a ni tur a ni. 
2Timothy2:7 Ka thusawi hi ngaihtuah rawh; Lalpa chuan kawng engkimah hriat theihna a pe dawn si chia. 
2Timothy2:8 Isua Krista, Davida thlaha mi, ka Chanchin Tha sawi anga mitthi zing ata tho leha kha hre reng rawh;" 
2Timothy2:9 chu Chanchin Tha avang chuan thil tisualtu angin phuar khawp hialin hrehawmte ka tuar thin a ni; nimahsela Pathian thu chu phuarin a awm si lo. 
2Timothy2:10 Chuvangin, Krista Isuaa awm chhandamna chu chatuana ropuina nen an hmuh ve theihna turin, Thlante avang chuan engkim ka tuar thin." 
2Timothy2:11 He thu hi a rinawm a ni: A thihnaah kan thih tawh si chuan, a nunnah kan nung bawk ang;" 
2Timothy2:12 Kan tuar chuan a rorelnaah ro kan rel ang; Amah kan phatsan chuan Ani pawhin min phatsan ang; 
2Timothy2:13 Keini rinawm loin awm mah i la, Ani chu rinawmin a awm reng a ni; Amah leh amah a inphat thei si lo a,"" tih hi." 
2Timothy2:14 Chung thu chu hriatpui la, thu mai mai chunga an inhnial lohna'n Lalpa mithmuhah thahnemngai takin hriattir rawh, chu chu engmah a sawt lo a, a ngaithlatute tan boralna a ni zawk thin." 
2Timothy2:15 Hnathawktu, thutak thu fel taka hmang chu zak tur a ni lo angin, Pathian ngaiha thaa inentir turin thahnem ngai rawh." 
2Timothy2:16 Amaherawhchu, Pathian zah lo lam thu sawi mai mai chu hawisan thin ang che; chutiang mite chu Pathianngaihsak lohna lamah an nasa lehzual ang a," 
2Timothy2:17 an thu pawh chuan pan chhe ei angin a ei zel ang; an zingah chuan Humenaia leh Phileta an tel a ni; 
2Timothy2:18 chung mite chuan, ""Thawhlehna chu tunah pawh a ni tawh daih,"" tiin thutak kawng chu an kal kawisan a, mi thenkhatte rinna an tibo thin a." 
2Timothy2:19 Nimahsela, Pathian lungphum nghet chu a la ding reng a, he chhinchhiahna hi a nei a: ""Lalpa chuan ama tate chu a hria,"" tih leh, ""Lalpa hming lam apiang chuan sual kalsan rawh se,"" tih hi." 
2Timothy2:20 Nimahsela, in ropuiah hian bungbel, rangkachak leh tangkaruaa siam mi chauh a awm lo a, thing leh belleia siam mite pawh a awm thin a; thenkhatte ngaihhlut tur a awm bawk a, thenkhatte chu ngaihhlut loh tur a awm bawk a." 
2Timothy2:21 Chuvangin, chung thil laka mi a inthiarfihlim chuan bungbel thianghlim, Lalpa hman tlak, hnathawh tha tinrenga inpeih sa, ngaihhlut tur mi a ni ang." 
2Timothy2:22 Nimahsela, tleirawl chaknate chu tlansan la, thinlung thianghlima Lalpa lam apiangte zingah chuan felna te, rinna te, hmangaihna te, remna te um ve rawh." 
2Timothy2:23 Amaherawhchu, indonate a hring thin tih hriain, inhnialna atthlak leh fing lovahte chuan tel duh suh." 
2Timothy2:24 Lalpa bawih chuan do tur a ni si lo a, mi zawng zawng chungah zaidamin, zirtir thiamin, sual chungah dawhtheiin," 
2Timothy2:25 do tura insiamte chu thuhnuairawlh takin a zirtir zawk tur a ni; chutichuan Pathianin thutak chu an hriat famkimna'n a simtir hlauhin,Pathian duhzawng ti atan Lalpa bawihin a manin, Diabola thang ata an chhuak thei mahna." 
2Timothy2:26 Pathian duhzawng ti atan Lalpa bawihin a manin, Diabola thang ata an chhuak thei mahna." 
2Timothy3:1 Tin, hei hi hre rawh, ni hnuhnungahte chuan hun khirh takte a lo awm ang." 
2Timothy3:2 Mi, mahni inhmangaihtu te, tangka ngainatu te, intivei te, chapo te, Pathian sawichhetu te, nu leh pa thu awih lo te, lawm nachang hre lo te, thianghlim lo te," 
2Timothy3:3 hmangaihna pianpui nei lo te, huaikawmbawl te, hektu te, insum thei lo te, mi kawlhsen te, tha duh hauh lo te," 
2Timothy3:4 vervek te, thuhnudawn lo te, inngaihlu te, Pathian hmangaih aia mahni lawmna mai hmangaih zawktu te an ni dawn si;" 
2Timothy3:5 Pathian ngaihsak anna an nei ang a, nimahsela a thiltihtheihna chu an awih lo ang; chung ang chu hawisan rawh." 
2Timothy3:6 Chung ang zinga mite chu inahte luta sual rit phur hmeichhe a deuhte sala man thintute kha an ni si, chutiang hmeichhiate chu chkna tinrenga hruai bo," 
2Timothy3:7 Zir fo sia thutak hre phak ngai lo an ni. 
2Timothy3:8 Tin, Jannia leh Jambrian Mosia an dodal ang khan, chung mite pawh chuan thutak hi an dodal thin; rilru chhe tawh, rinna kawngah chuan Pathian duh lohzawng mi an ni." 
2Timothy3:9 Nimahsela, chung aliam chu an ti lo ang, an atzia mi zawng zawng hnenah a lo lang dawn si a, Jannia leh Jambria atzia a lo lang ang khan." 
2Timothy3:10 Nang erawh chuan ka zirtirna te, ka awm dan te, ka thil tum te, ka rinna te, ka dawhtheihna te, ka hmangaihna te, ka chhelna te," 
2Timothy3:11 mi mi tihduhdahna te, ka tuarna te i hre hle mai; Antiokei khuaah te, Ikonion khuaah te, Lustra khuaah te ka chunga thil thleng leh tihduhdah ka tuarnate kha; chung zawng zawngah chuan Lalpa chuan mi chhandam ta si a." 
2Timothy3:12 A ni, tupawh Krista Isuaa Pathian ngaihsaka awm tum apiang chuan tihduhdahnate an tuar bawk ang." 
2Timothy3:13 Mi sual leh tihdertute erawh chu mi bum leh buma awmin an sual zual deuh deuh ang. 
2Timothy3:14 Nimahsela, nang zawng, tu hnena zir nge i nih leh, Krista Isuaa rinna awm avang chuan chhandamna hmu khawpa tifing thei che Lehkha Thianghlimte chu i naupan tet ata hre tawh i ni tih hriain," 
2Timothy3:15 i thil zir leh i thil hriat chianahte chuan awm reng rawh. 
2Timothy3:16 Pathian Lehkha Thu zawng zawng hi Pathian thawk khuma pek a ni a, zirtir kawngah te, thiam loh chantir kawngah te, zilh kawngah te, felna zirtir kawngah te a sawt bawk a ni;Pathian mi chu hna tha tinreng thawk tura kim taka inthuamin a famkim theihna'n." 
2Timothy3:17 Pathian mi chu hna tha tinreng thawk tura kim taka inthuamin a famkim theihna'n. 
2Timothy4:1 Pathian mithmuh leh mi nung leh mitthi ngaihtuahtu tur Krista Isua mithmuhah chuan a inlarna leh a ram chhalin, thahnemngai takin ka hriattir a che:" 
2Timothy4:2 Thu chu hril rawh; a hunah te, a hun loah te pawh bei zel rawh; dawh thei taka zirtir chungin an thiam loh hriattir la, zilh la, fuih rawh." 
2Timothy4:3 Zirtirna dik an ngaih peih loh hun a la thleng dawn si; an bengte a zat avangin anmahni duhzawng angin zirtirtute an hnenah an khawm zawk ang a," 
2Timothy4:4 an bengte chu thutak lamah an chhungawng ang a, thawnthu lam panin an peng tawh ang." 
2Timothy4:5 Nang erawh chu engkimah fimkhur la, hrehawm tuar la, Chanchin Tha hriltu lam hna thawk la, i rawngbawlna kha hlen rawh." 
2Timothy4:6 Kei zawng tunah pawh hlanin ka awm mek a ni si a,ka chhuah hun a thleng tawh e." 
2Timothy4:7 Intihsiakna tha chu ka bei zo tawh a, ka tlansiakna kawng ka hlen tawh a, rinna chu ka vawng reng tawh a ni;" 
2Timothy4:8 tunah chuan felna lallukhum chu ka tan dahin a awm tawh a, chu chu Lalpa ngaihtuahtu fel tak chuan chu mi ni-ah chuan mi pe ang; ka hnenah chauh ni loin, a inlarna ngai apiangte hnenah pawh." 
2Timothy4:9 Rang takin ka hnenah lo kal hram rawh; 
2Timothy4:10 Dema chuan tun lai khawvel hi a ngainat avangin mi kalsan a, Thessalonika khuaah a kal ta si a; Kreskea chu Galatia ramah a kal ta a, Tita chu Dalmatia ramah a kal ta bawk a." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka chauh ka hnenah a awm ta a. Marka kha sawm la, han hruai ve rawh, ani chu rawngbawl lamah ka tan a tangkai si a." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka chauh ka hnenah a awm ta a. Marka kha sawm la, han hruai ve rawh, ani chu rawngbawl lamah ka tan a tangkai si a." 
2Timothy4:12 Tukika zawng Ephesi khuaah ka tir ta. 
2Timothy4:13 I lo kal hunah Troas khuaah Karpa hnena kawrfual ka hnutchhiah kha, lehkhabute nen khan rawn keng la, savun lehkha mawlh kha rawn keng ang che." 
2Timothy4:14 Aleksandra, dar chhun thiam kha, ka chungah a sual em em thin a ni, Lalpa chuan a thiltih ang zelin a thungrul ang;" 
2Timothy4:15 a lakah khan nang pawh fimkhur rawh, kan thu a dodal nasa em si a." 
2Timothy4:16 Ka thiamna thu ka sawi hmasak tum chuan tumah rengin mi tanpui lo a, mi thlahthlam ta vek zawk a ni; a mawh chu phurin awm hlawm suh se." 
2Timothy4:17 Chanchin Tha keimah avanga hrilh kimin a awm theihna'n leh Jentailte zawng zawng chuan an hriat theihna'n, Lalpa chuan mi tan a, mi tichak ta zawk a ni; tin, sakeibaknei kaa mi kha chhan chhuahin ka lo awm ta a ni." 
2Timothy4:18 Lalpa chuan sualna zawng zawng lakah mi chhan chhuak ang a, a van ramah chuan him takin mi thlen ang; amah chu chatuana ropuiin awm rawh se. Amen." 
2Timothy4:19 Priski leh Akuila, Onesiphora chhungte nen khan, chibai mi buksak ang che," 
2Timothy4:20 Erasta chu Korinth khuaah chuan a awm ta reng a, Trophima erawh chu Mileti khuaah dam loin ka kalsan ta a." 
2Timothy4:21 Thlasik hmain lo kal hram hram ang che. 
2Timothy4:22 Eubula te, Pudea te, Lina te, Klaudii te unau zawng zawngte nen chibai an buk a che.Lalpa chu i thlarau hnenah awm rawh se. Khawngaihna in hnenah awm rawh se." 
2Timothy4:23 Lalpa chu i thlarau hnenah awm rawh se. Khawngaihna in hnenah awm rawh se. 
Titus1:1 Paula, Pathian bawih, chatuana nunna beiseia Pathian thlante rinna kawngah leh Pathian ngaihsak lam thutak hriatna kawnga Isua Krista tirhkoh bawk chuan:" 
Titus1:2 Chu chatuana nunna chu Pathian, dawt sawi thei loa chuan khawvel awm hmain a tiam a;" 
Titus1:3 nimahsela ama hun takahte chuan a thu chu thuchahah chuan a tilang ta, chu thuchah chu Pathian kan Chhandamtu thupek ang zela kawltir ka ni." 
Titus1:4 Tita, kan rin thuhmun vanga ka fa taktak hnenah: Pa, Pathian leh Krista Isua min Chhandamtu hnen ata khawngaihna leh remna awm rawh se." 
Titus1:5 He mi avang hian Kret thliarkarah khan ka hnutchhiah che a ni, thil tihfel bakte chu i tihfel zelna tur leh, thu ka pek che ang khan khaw tinah upate i ruatna turin;" 
Titus1:6 tupawh sawiselbo, nupui pakhat nei, fate Pathian thu ring, nawmsak bawl lutuk kawnga sawisel hlawh lo, dan ang loa awm lo nei ang nih tawh phawt chuan." 
Titus1:7 Kohhran hotu chu Pathian sum enkawltu a nih avangin sawiselbo ni tur a ni; mi tihmawh, thin ram, uain ruih hmang, mi velh hmang, hlepna bawlhhlawha duham mi ni tur a ni lo a;" 
Titus1:8 mi lawm dan thiam, tha lam duh, rilru dik tak, mi fel, mi thianghlim, insum thei mi ni zawk tur a ni a;" 
Titus1:9 zirtirna dik tak kawngah chuan mi a fuih theihna tur leh, hnialtute chu thiam loh a chantir theihna turin zirtirna ang zel thu rinawm chu pawm tlat mi ni bawk tur a ni." 
Titus1:10 Dan ang loa awm, thu sawi mai maite leh tihdertute mi tam tak an awm si a, serhtanho zinga mi an ni deuh ber;" 
Titus1:11 chungho ka chu huhsak tur a ni, hlepna bawlhhlawh duh vanga thu zirtir loh tur zirtirin, mite a chhung chhungin an chawk khawlo si thin a." 
Titus1:12 Anmahni zinga mi, anmahni zawlnei zawlnei pakhat ngeiin, ""Kret thliarkara mite chu dawthei te, sakawlh sual te, thatchhe chaw hehte an ni fo mai,"" tiin a sawi kha." 
Titus1:13 Chu thu hriattir chu a dik a ni. 
Titus1:14 Chuvang chuan Judaho thawnthute leh thutak hawisan thinte thupekte chu ngaihsak loin, rinnaah chuan an dik theihna turin na takin zilhhau rawh." 
Titus1:15 Mi thianghlimte tan chuan engkim a thianghlim thin; nimahsela mi bawlhhlawh leh ring lote tan chuan engmah thianghlim reng a awm thin lo, an rilru leh an chhia leh tha hriatna reng pawh a bawlhhlawh tawh a.Pathian hria an inti a, tenawm te, thu awih lo te, thil tha tinreng tih kawnga Pathian duh lohzawngte an ni, (an thiltihin an phatsan si)." 
Titus1:16 Pathian hria an inti a, tenawm te, thu awih lo te, thil tha tinreng tih kawnga Pathian duh lohzawngte an ni, (an thiltihin an phatsan si)." 
Titus2:1 Nang erawh chuan zirtirna dik tak nena inhmeh thu sawi rawh. 
Titus2:2 Putarte chu insum thei, zahawm, rilru fel tak, rinna leh hmangaihna leh chhelnaah dik tak ni turin fuih rawh." 
Titus2:3 Pitarte pawhin Pathian Thu chu sawichhiata a awm lohna'n, an awm dan renga Pathian zah mite niin, hektute leh uain heh mite ni lo a, tha lam zirtirtute ni turin fuih bawk rawh." 
Titus2:4 la nula deuhte chu an pasalte hmangaih tur te, an fate hmangaih tur te," 
Titus2:5 rilru fel taka awm tur te, thianghlim taka awm tur te, mahni ina thawktua awm tur te, ngilneia awm tur te, anmahni pasalte thu thua awm tur tea an thunun theihna turin." 
Titus2:6 Chutiang bawkin tlangvalte chu rilru fel tak pu turin fuih rawh. 
Titus2:7 Lehlama tangte zinga miin kan chunga thu tha lo reng sawi tur an neih loh avanga an zah theihna'n, engkimah thil tha tih kawngah tihhmuhtuah intilang la," 
Titus2:8 i zirtirnaah chuan i takzia te, i zahawmziate i thu sawi dikzia sawisel rual loh te chu tilang rawh." 
Titus2:9 Bawihte chuan hnial loin, kutkem hmang loin, rinawmna tha zawng zawng tilang zawkin, an pute thu thua awm tur leh," 
Titus2:10 Pathian min Chhandamtu zirtirna thu engkima an cheimawi theihna'n, engkima an lawmzawnga awm turin fuih rawh." 
Titus2:11 Mi zawng zawng hnenah chhandamna rawn thlenin Pathian khawngaihna a lo lang ta si a; 
Titus2:12 Pathian ngaihsak lohna leh khawvel chaknate bansanin, tun lai khawvelah hian insum leh fel tak leh Pathian ngaihsakin kan awm tur a ni tih min zirtir a," 
Titus2:13 beiseina lawmawm kan Pathian ropui tak Chhandamtu Isua Krista ropuina inlarna chu nghakin. 
Titus2:14 Ani chuan bawhchhiatna zawng zawng lak ata min tlan theihna tur leh, chi thlan bik, thil tha tiha thahnemngai, ama tana a tihthianghlim theihna turin kan aiin a inpek kha.Thunei takin chung thu chu hrilh la, fuih la, zilh rawh. Tuma'n hmusit che suh se." 
Titus2:15 Thunei takin chung thu chu hrilh la, fuih la, zilh rawh. Tuma'n hmusit che suh se." 
Titus3:1 Lalte leh thuneitute laka intulut tur te, thu awih tur te, thil tha tinreng tiha inpeih tur te," 
Titus3:2 tumah sawichhe lo tur te, kawhmawh bawl lo tur te, mi zawng zawng laka thuhnuairawlhna tinreng tilanga nunnem turtein anmahni hriat chhuahtir leh rawh." 
Titus3:3 Keini pawh hmanah khan a tak te, thu awih lo te, buma awm te, chakna leh lawmna tinreng rawngbawl te, sual leh itsik hmanga awm te, tenawm te, inhaw tawn te kan ni si a." 
Titus3:4 Nimahsela, Pathian min Chhandamtu ngilneihzia leh mihring chunga a hmangaihzia chu a lo lan lai khan," 
Titus3:5 Thil fel taka tih, keimahni ngeia tihte chu, chu mi avang ni loin, siamtharna silna leh Thlarau Thianghlim siamthat lehna chuanin a khawngaihna ang zel zawkin min chhandam ta." 
Titus3:6 Chu Thlarau Thianghlim chu Isua Krista min Chhandamtu zarah chuan nasa taka kan chunga a leih kha. 
Titus3:7 Chutichuan, a khawngaihnaa thiam chantira lo awmin, chatuana nun beiseina ang zela roluahtu tura siamin kan awm thei ang." 
Titus3:8 Pathian ring tawhte chuan thil tha ti zel turin ngaihtuah rawh se,""tih thu hi a rinawm a ni, chung thu chanchin chu huai taka i hrilh tlat ka duh a ni. Chung thu chu mihringte tan a thain a sawt a ni;" 
Titus3:9 nimahsela zawhna atthlak te, Dan thua insualna te chu hawisan zel rawh; chung chu thil sawt lo leh engmah lo a ni si a." 
Titus3:10 Rin hran nei mi chu vawi hnih khat zilh hnu chuan zilh duh tawh suh; 
Titus3:11 chutiang mi chu a kal pengin a sual a ni tih in hria e, amah leh amah thiam loh inchantir a ni si a." 
Titus3:12 Artema emaw, Tukika emaw i hnena ka rawn tirh hunah chuan Nikopoli khuaah ka hnenah lo kal hram hram ang che; chutah chuan thlasika awm ka tum si a." 
Titus3:13 Zina, dan hretu leh, Appollova chuan engmah an tlakchham lohna'n an zinnaah chuan thahnemngi takin puibawm ang che." 
Titus3:14 Kan mite chu tlakchham an neih ngai lohna'n hna tangkai thawka inhmang reng turin fuih la, an awm mai mai tur a ni lo.Ka hnena awm zawng zawngte hian chibai an buk a che. Rinnaa min hmangaihtute kha chibai min buksak ang che. In zaa hnenah khawngaihna awm rawh se." 
Titus3:15 Ka hnena awm zawng zawngte hian chibai an buk a che. Rinnaa min hmangaihtute kha chibai min buksak ang che. In zaa hnenah khawngaihna awm rawh se. 
Philemon1:1 Paula, Krista Isua mi tang leh kan unaupa Timothea chuan: Kan duh tak leh kan thawh rimpui Philemona hnenah te," 
Philemon1:2 kan farnu Aphi hnenah te, kan sipaipui Arkippa hnenah te, i ina kohhran inkhawmho hnenah te pawh:" 
Philemon1:3 Pathian, kan Pa leh Lalpa Isua Krista hnen ata khawngihna leh remna in hnenah awm rawh se." 
Philemon1:4 Lalpa Isua lamah leh mi thianghlim zawng zawng lama hmangaihna leh rinna i neih chu lo hre thinin," 
Philemon1:5 ka tawngtainaahte chuan i hming lam foin, ka Pathian hnenah lawmthu ka hril thin;" 
Philemon1:6 i rinna thawhlawm chu, nangmahnia awm thil tha tinreng hriat famkimna kawngah chuan Krista lama a lo sawt theihna turin." 
Philemon1:7 Unaupa, nangma zara mi thianghlimte thinlung a lo harh tak avangin i hmangaihnaah chuan ka hlimin ka thlamuang em em thin a sin." 
Philemon1:8 Chuvangin, a awm tawk chu ti turin thu pek che Kristaah ngam em em mah i la," 
Philemon1:9 hmangaihna avangin (Paula putar meuh ka ni a, tunah Krista Isua mi tang ka lo ni ta na a) a ngenin ka ngen zawk a che;" 
Philemon1:10 ka fa Onesima, kawl bun chunga ka hrin atan hian i hnenah ka ngensak e."
