Philemon1:11 Ani chu hmanah khan i tan a tangkai lo a, tunah erawh chuan kei leh nang atan a tangkai ta e;" 
Philemon1:12 amah tak, ka thinlung ngei hi,i hnenah ka rawn tir kir leh ta a ni;" 
Philemon1:13 ani chu Chanchin Thaa kawl ka bunnaah hian nangma aia rawng mi bawlsak theihna turin ka hnenah awmtir reng ka duh hle a ni; 
Philemon1:14 Nimahsela, i khawngaihna chu khawngaih luihtir ang ni loin, i thu thu ang a nih theih zawkna turin, i thu loin engmah tih ka duh lo." 
Philemon1:15 Rei lo te a then che hi kumkhuaa amah chu i neih hlenna ai a ni mahna," 
Philemon1:16 nimahsela bawih ang ni tawh lo a, bawih aia tha unau duh tak ang zawk hian; kei ka tan duh tak a ni bik a, nang atan lek phei chuan tisaah leh Lalpaah chuan a va ni dawn lehzual em!" 
Philemon1:17 Chutichuan, thiana mi ngaih chuan keimah angin amah hi lo lawm ang che." 
Philemon1:18 Tin, i chungah thil engpawh tisualin emaw, i engilo emaw a bat chuan keima batah ruat ang che;" 
Philemon1:19 kei Paulan keima kut ngeia ka ziak a nih hi, keima'n ka rulhsak ang; ka lakah nangmah ngei pawh i inbat bawkzia chu hrilh che zawng ka ni lo e." 
Philemon1:20 A ni, unaupa, nangmah avangin Lalpaah chuan lawmna mi neihtir la; Kristaah chuan ka thinlung tiharh ang che." 
Philemon1:21 Ka sawi aia nasa zawk mahin i ti ang tih ka hriat avangin, i awih ringin i hnenah ka ziak a nih hi." 
Philemon1:22 Engpawh ni se la, chu chang ti loin, thlenna tur mi lo buatsaihsak bawk ang che; in tawngtainate avangin in hnenah pek ka ni dawn tih ka inring si a." 
Philemon1:23 Epaphra, Krista Isuaa ka tanpuipa hian chibai a buk a che;" 
Philemon1:24 ka hnathawhpui Marka te, Aristarka te, Dema te, Luka te pawhin chutiang bawkin an buk a che.Kan Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna i thlarau hnenah awm rawh se. Amen." 
Philemon1:24 ka hnathawhpui Marka te, Aristarka te, Dema te, Luka te pawhin chutiang bawkin an buk a che.Kan Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna i thlarau hnenah awm rawh se. Amen." 
Philemon1:25 Kan Lalpa Isua Krista khawngaihna i thlarau hnenah awm rawh se. Amen. 
Hebrews1:1 Pathian, hmasanga thlahtute hnena bung tam tak leh kawng tinrenga Zawlneitea thu lo sawitu khan," 
Hebrews1:2 he'ng ni tawpah hian keimahni hnenah a Fapaah chuan thu a sawi ta. Chu mi chu engkim rochungtuah a ruat a, chu mi pawh chuan khawvelte chu a siam a;" 
Hebrews1:3 ani chu a ropuina eng leh, atak anpui ngei leh, ama thiltihtheihna thua engkim tungdingtu niin, sualte a tlenfai hnuin chung lama Ropuibera dinglamah khian a than thu a;" 
Hebrews1:4 vantirhkohte aia hming tha zawk a rochun ang ngeiin an aia ropui zawk a lo ni tawh si a. 
Hebrews1:5 Vantirhkohte zingah tu hnenah nge he'ng thu hi a sawi ngai le? Nang zawng ka Fapa i ni e, Vawiin hian ka hring che a ni,"" tih leh, ""A tan Pa ka ni ang a, Ani chu ka tan Fapa a ni ang,"" tih hi." 
Hebrews1:6 Tin, A Fa tira chu khawvela a tirh dawn lai khan heti hian a ti bawk; ""Pathian vantirhkohte zawng zawng pawhin Amah chibai buk rawh se,""" 
Hebrews1:7 Tin, vantirhkohte chungchang thu-ah chuan hei hi a sawi a ni: ""Ani chuan a vantirhkohte chu Thli-ah a chantir thin a, A rawngbawltute pawh Meialhah a chantir thin,"" tih hi." 
Hebrews1:8 Fapa chungchang thu-ah erawh chuan hei hi a sawi a ni, ""Aw Pathian, i lalthutphah chu Chatuanin a awm tur a ni; Dikna lal tiang pawh chu I ram lal tiang chu a ni;" 
Hebrews1:9 Felna chu i ngaina a, Bawhchhiatna chu i huat kha; Chuvangin, Pathian, i Pathian chuan, I thiante ai chuan Hlimna hriak a thih nasat tak che hi,"" tih leh," 
Hebrews1:10 Nang, Lalpa, atirin Leilung nghahchhan i phum tawh a, Vante pawh i kut chhuak a ni;" 
Hebrews1:11 Chungte chu a la boral ang a, Nang erawh chu awm hlen tur i ni; Tin, chung zawng zawngte chu Silhfen angin a la hlui ang a," 
Hebrews1:12 Puan angin i zial bawk ang a - Silhfen ang maiin, Tichuan a lo danglam tawh ang; Nang erawh chu i pangngai fo a, I kumte pawh a ral lo ang,"" tiin." 
Hebrews1:13 Nimahsela, vantirhkohte zingah tu chungchang thu-ah nge hei hi a sawi ngai ni? ""I hmelmate i kephah nghahchhana Ka siam hma loh zawng Ka ding lamah thu rawh,"" Tih hi.Anni zawng zawng chu rawngbawlna thlaraute, chhandamna rochungtu turte tan rawngbawl tura tirh chhuah an ni lo em ni?" 
Hebrews1:14 Anni zawng zawng chu rawngbawlna thlaraute, chhandamna rochungtu turte tan rawngbawl tura tirh chhuah an ni lo em ni?" 
Hebrews2:1 Chuvangin, benga kan hriatte kha thahnemngai takin kan pawisa lehzual tur a ni, chutilochuan kan tawlh bo hlauh dah ang e." 
Hebrews2:2 Vantirhkohte hmanga thu sawi mah kha a lo ngheh a, bawhchhiatna leh thu awih lohna tinrengte chuan thungrulhna fel tak a hmuh zel si chuan," 
Hebrews2:3 heti kauva chhandamna ropui hi thlahthlam i la, engtin nge kan tlan chhuah theih tehlul ang? Chu mi chhandamna thu chu atira Lalpa hmanga sawi a ni tawh a, a hretute chuan min tihnghehsak a;" 
Hebrews2:4 Pathian pawhin chhinchhiahnate leh thilmakte leh thiltihtheihna tinrengte nen, ama duh ang zela Thlarau Thianghlim thil semte nen chuan anni chu a hriatpui a." 
Hebrews2:5 Khawvel lo la awm tur a chanchin kan sawia chu vantirhkohte hnuaiah zawng a dah lo. 
Hebrews2:6 Nimahsela,mi tu emaw chuan khawiah emaw he'ng thu hi sawiin a hriattir ta zawk; ""Mihring hi eng nge maw a nih a, i hriat reng thin ni? Mihring fapa pawh hi eng nge maw a nih a, i kan thin ni?" 
Hebrews2:7 Ani chu vantirhkohte aia hnuaiin i siam rih a; Ropuina leh chawimawina i khumtir a, I kut chhuak chungahte chuan hotuah i siam bawk a;" 
Hebrews2:8 A ke hnuaiahte engkim i dah a,"" tiin. Chutichuan, engkim a hnuaia a dah avangin a hnuaia dah loh engmah a nei lo. Amaherawhchu tunah zawng engkim a hnuaiah awmin kan la hmu rih lo e." 
Hebrews2:9 Nimahsela, Isua, vantirhkohte aia hnuaia siam riha chu, thihna tuar avanga ropuina leh chawimawina khumtira awmin kan hmu ta zawk a ni. Pathian khawngaihna zarah thihna chu mi tin a temsakna turin." 
Hebrews2:10 A tan engkim awma a zara engkim awm bawka tan chuan fa tam tak ropuinaa a hruai luh zawngin, an chhandamna siamtu kha tuarnate avanga tihfamkim chu a sawm reng si a." 
Hebrews2:11 Tithianghlimtu leh tihthianghlimate chu an zain Mi Pakhata chhuak an ni si a; chuvangin ani chuan anmahniho chu Unaute tih a zak lo e. 
Hebrews2:12 Ka unaute hnenah i hming ka hril ang a; Awm khawm zingahte chuan Hla sain ka fak ang che,"" tiin." 
Hebrews2:13 Tin,""Amahah ka rinna ka nghat ang,"" a ti leh a. Tin, ""En teh u, kei leh Pathian mi pek naupangte hi,"" a ti leh pek a." 
Hebrews2:14 Tichuan, naupangte hi tisa leh thisen changte an nih hlawm avangin, amah ngei pawhin chung bawk chu a chang ve ta a; thihnain thihna thuneitu (chu chu Diabola a ni) a tihboral theihna tur leh," 
Hebrews2:15 thih hlauh vanga dam chhunga bawiha awm zawng zawngte chu a chhan chhuah theihna turin. 
Hebrews2:16 A tanpui thinte chu vantirhkohte an ni hauh si lo a, Abrahama thlahte an ni, a tanpui zawk thin chu." 
Hebrews2:17 Chutichuan, mite tan sual thupha chawina siamsak turin, Pathian lam thilahte chuan Puithiam Lalber mi lainat thei leh rinawm tak a nih theih nan, engkima a unaute anga lo awm chu a tan a tul reng a ni.Amah ngei chuan thlemna tawkin a lo tuar tawh avangin thlemna tawkte chu a tanpui thei a ni." 
Hebrews2:18 Amah ngei chuan thlemna tawkin a lo tuar tawh avangin thlemna tawkte chu a tanpui thei a ni. 
Hebrews3:1 Chutichuan, unau thianghlim, van kohna chang vete u, kan thurina Tirhkoh leh Puithiam Lalber, Isua chu, ngaihtuah rawh u;" 
Hebrews3:2 Pathian chhungte zawng zawng zingah Mosia a rinawm ang bawk khan, ani chu ruattu lakah chuan a rinawm a ni." 
Hebrews3:3 Chhungkaw puipa chu a chhungte aiin an chawimawi zawk ang ngeiin, ani chu Mosia aiin ropui lehzualna hmu tlaka ruat a ni tawh si a." 
Hebrews3:4 Chhung tin hian puipa tu emaw tal an nei theuh si a; engkim puipa erawh chu Pathian a ni. 
Hebrews3:5 Tin, chu mi hnua thu la sawi turte hriattirna'n Mosia chu Pathian chhungte zawng zawng zinga rawngbawltuah zawng a rinawm ngei a;" 
Hebrews3:6 Krista erawh chu Pathian chhungte chunga Fapaah a rinawm a ni. A chhungte chu keimahni kan ni, atawp thlengin kan huaina leh kan beisei chhuanna hi nghet taka kan vawn tlat phawt chuan." 
Hebrews3:7 Chutichuan, Thlarau Thianghlim sawi ang bawkin: ""Vawiin hian a aw in hriat chuan," 
Hebrews3:8 Thlalera thlemna nia An tihvui lai ang khan, In thinlung tikhauh suh u;" 
Hebrews3:9 chutah chuan in thlahtute chuan Mi fiahin mi thlem a, Kum sawmli chhunga Ka thiltihte chu an hmu a;" 
Hebrews3:10 Chutichuan, chu mi chhuanho chungah ka lungni lo a, 'An thinlungin an ngai sual fo thin a. Ka kawngte pawh an hre lo,' ka ti a," 
Hebrews3:11 Ka thinura ka chhechham ang khan Ka chawlhnaah chuan an lut lo ang,""tiin." 
Hebrews3:12 Unaute u, fimkhur rawh u, chutilochuan Pathian nung chu bansan turin in zingah tu chhungah pawh rin lohna thinlung sual a lo awm dah ang e." 
Hebrews3:13 Vawiin an tih chhung hian ni tinin infuih tawn zawk rawh u, chutilochuan in zinga mi tupawh hi sual bumnaa tihkhauhin in awm dah ang e." 
Hebrews3:14 Krista changtute kan lo ni ta si a, kan rin chhan tantirhna kha a tawp thlengin nghet taka kan vawn tlat phawt chuan," 
Hebrews3:15 Vawiin hian a aw in hriat chuan An tihvui lai ang khan In thinlung tikhauh suh u,"" an tih chhung zawng hian." 
Hebrews3:16 A nih leh tute nge ni, hre reng sia tivui kha? Aigupta ram atanga Mosia hruaia chhuak zawng zawng kha an ni lo em ni?" 
Hebrews3:17 Tin, tute chungah nge ni, kum sawmli chhunga a lungnih loh kha? Tisualtu, an ruang thlalera tlu tate chungah khan a ni lo em ni?" 
Hebrews3:18 Tin, thu awih lote hnenah chauh lo chuan tu hnenah nge a chawlhnaa lut lo tura chhechhama a tiam ni?Chutichuan, rin lohna avangin an lut thei ta lo tih kan hria a ni." 
Hebrews3:19 Chutichuan, rin lohna avangin an lut thei ta lo tih kan hria a ni." 
Hebrews4:1 Chuvangin, i hlau vang u, chutilochuan a chawlhnaa luhna thutiama la awm reng siin, in zingah tupawh tling lo angin inlo awm mial dah ang e." 
Hebrews4:2 An hnena hrilh a nih ang bawk khan Chanchin Tha kan hnenah hrilh a ni ngei si a; nimahsela an thu ngaihthlak chuan anmahni a tisawt si lo, ngaithlatu taktakte nen rinna zawmin an awm loh avangin." 
Hebrews4:3 Keini ring tawhte hi chu chawlhnaah chuan kan lut mek a nih hi. Ka thinura ka chhechham ang khan Ka chawlhnaah chuan an lut lo ang,"" a tih ang khan; leilung pian tirh ata hnate chu thawh zawh a ni tawh na a." 
Hebrews4:4 Khawii hmunah emaw ni sarih ni thu hetiangin a sawi a sin, ""Tin, ni sarih ni-ah chuan Pathian chuan a hnathawh zawng zawng a chawlhsan ta a,"" tiin." 
Hebrews4:5 Tin, he hmunah hian, ""Ka chawlhnaah chuan an lut lo ang,"" a ti leh a." 
Hebrews4:6 Chutichuan, thenkhat chu mi chawlhnaah chuan an la luh tur thu a la awm avang leh, hmana Chanchin Tha hrilh dawngtute chu awih loh vanga an luh tak loh avangin," 
Hebrews4:7 rei tak hnu khan Davidaah chuan, ""Vawiin hian,"" tiin ni eng emaw a ruat nawn leh a ni, ""Vawiin hian a aw in hriat chuan In thinlung tikhauh suh u,"" tia a hmaa ka sawi ang khan." 
Hebrews4:8 Josua chuan anniho chu a chawlhtir tawh si zawngin, chu mi hnuah chuan ni dang thu chu a sawi lo ang." 
Hebrews4:9 Chutichuan, Pathian mite tan chuan Chawlhnia chawlhna a la awm ta fo a." 
Hebrews4:10 Tupawh Pathian chawlhnaa luta chawl ve tawh chuan Pathian tih ang khan a hnathawhte chu a chawlhsan ve thin. 
Hebrews4:11 Chutichuan, tumah chu mi awih loh entirna anga awma an tluk lohna'n chu chawlhnaa lut tur chuan thahnem i ngai ang u." 
Hebrews4:12 Pathian thu hi a nung a, thil a ti thei a, khandaih hriam tawn eng ang ai pawhin a hriam a, nunna leh thlarau, ruhtuah leh thling phel hrang khawp hialin a chhun thei a,thinlunga ngaihtuah leh tumte hi a hre nghal thei a ni." 
Hebrews4:13 Thil siam ama mithmuha lang lo reng reng a awm lo; kan chanchin kan thlenna tura mithmuhah chuan engkim saruak leh inhawng sain a awm zawk a ni. 
Hebrews4:14 Tichuan, vanahte kal tlang tawh Puithiam Lalber ropui tak, Isua, Pathian Fapa chu kan neih avangin kan thurin hi i pawm tlat ang u." 
Hebrews4:15 Puithiam Lalber,kan chak lohnate min hriatpui thei lo nei kan ni si lo; keimahni anga kawng tinrenga thlemna tawk tawh, sual erawh chu sual lo, nei kan ni zawk e.Chutichuan, zahngaihna kan hmuh theihna tur leh, puih kan ngaih huna tanpuina khawngaihna kan hmuh theihna turin, khawngaihna lalthutphah chu huai takin i hnaih ang u." 
Hebrews4:16 Chutichuan, zahngaihna kan hmuh theihna tur leh, puih kan ngaih huna tanpuina khawngaihna kan hmuh theihna turin, khawngaihna lalthutphah chu huai takin i hnaih ang u." 
Hebrews5:1 Puithiam Lalber apiang, sualte avanga thilpek leh inthawinate an hlan kawp theihna tura mihring zinga mi lak hrana lo awmin, Pathian lam thilahte chuan mihringte tan ruat an ni si thin:" 
Hebrews5:2 chungte chuan engmah hre lote leh kawng bote chungah zai an dawh thei thin a ni, anmahni ngei pawh chak lohna hual velin an awm ve bawk avangin." 
Hebrews5:3 Tin, chu mi avang chuan mite tan an hlansak angin anmahni tan ngei pawh sualte avangin hlan ve lo thei an ni lo." 
Hebrews5:4 Tin, tuma'n chu mi chawimawina chu mahniin an inbel ngai lo, Arona anga Pathian koh an nih si loh chuan." 
Hebrews5:5 Chutiang bawkin Krista pawh chu Puithiam Lalbera siam turin mahni a intiropui lo e, ""Nang zawng ka Fapa i ni e, Vawiin hian ka hring a che,"" tia a hnena sawitu khan a tiropui ta zawk a ni;" 
Hebrews5:6 Nang zawng, Melkisedeka awm dan anga Chatuana Puithiam i ni e,"" tia hmun danga a sawi ang bawk khan." 
Hebrews5:7 Ani chuan a tisa put lai niahte khan, thihna laka amah chhandam theitu hnenah chuan nasa taka au leh mittui tla chungin tawngtainate leh dilnate a hlan a, a tih dek thin avangin ngaihthlakin a awm bawk a;" 
Hebrews5:8 Fapa meuh pawh ni mah se la a thil tuarahte chuan thu awih a zir ta a ni; 
Hebrews5:9 tichuan tihthatfamkima lo awmin, a thu awih zawng zawngte tan chatuana chhandamna bulpui a lo ni ta;" 
Hebrews5:10 Melkisedeka awm dan anga Puithiam Lalberah Pathianin a vuah a. 
Hebrews5:11 Chu mi chanchinah chuan thu tam tak sawi tur kan nei a, hrilhfiah pawh a harsa, in beng a lo chhet tak avangin." 
Hebrews5:12 A hun ngaihtuah zawngin zirtirtu ni tawh hial awm in ni na a, Pathian thu bul ber A Aw B te chu zirtir in ngai leh ta a, chaw rum ni loa hnute la ngai mi ang in lo nih tak hi." 
Hebrews5:13 Hnute ring apiang chuan felna thu-ah hian hriatna an nei si lo, nausen an nih avangin.Chaw rum erawh chu puitlingte tan a ni, chungte chuan an hman fo avangin, chhia leh tha fiah turin an hriat theihnate chu an sawizawi tawh." 
Hebrews5:14 Chaw rum erawh chu puitlingte tan a ni, chungte chuan an hman fo avangin, chhia leh tha fiah turin an hriat theihnate chu an sawizawi tawh." 
Hebrews6:1 Chutichuan, Krista thu bul hril tawh loin puitlin lam i pan ang u;" 
Hebrews6:2 thiltih thi simna te, Pathian lama rinna te, baptismate leh, kut nghah leh, mitthi thawh lehna leh, chatuana rorelna kawng lam zirtirna te lungphum chu phum leh tawh loin." 
Hebrews6:3 Pathianin rem a tih chuan chu chu kan ti ngei ang. 
Hebrews6:4 Tin, vawi khat rilru tihvara, van thilpek tema, Thlarau Thianghlim chantira," 
Hebrews6:5 Pathian thu tha leh hun lo la awm tura thiltihtheihna tem tawh zeta 
Hebrews6:6 tluksante kawng thu zawng - chu mite chu an simna turin siam thar leh rual a ni lo, Pathian Fapa chu anmahni tan khengbet nawn leha timualpho an nih avangin." 
Hebrews6:7 Lei, a chunga ruahtui tla thin lo dawng tawh a, thawhsakate tana thlai ei tlak chhuahtu chu Pathianin mal a sawm thin." 
Hebrews6:8 Amaherawhchu, hnimhlingnei leh buarte a chhuah chuan makin a lo awm a, anchhe dawng thaw a lo ni thin a, a tawpah chuan hal a tawk thin." 
Hebrews6:9 Nimahsela, duh takte u, chutiang thu sawi mah i la, nangni zawngin chutiang thil aia thil tha zawk, chhandamnaa tel thilte chu in tih kan ring a che u." 
Hebrews6:10 In hnathawh leh a hming chunga hmangaihna in lantir, mi thianghlimte rawng in lo bawl, tun thleng pawha in la bawl cheu chu theihnghilh turin Pathian chu mi fel lo a ni si lo a." 
Hebrews6:11 Nimahsela, tawp thlenga beiseina famkim hmu turin in taihmak pangngai ang khan taihmak chhuah theuh fo u la kan ti em em mai;" 
Hebrews6:12 chutichuan in inthlahdah lo ang a, rinna leh nghah peihna vanga thutiamte rochung tawhte zirho in ni zawk ang." 
Hebrews6:13 Pathianin Abrahama hnena thu a rawn tiam lai khan,amah aia ropui zawk chhala chhia a chham theih loh avangin amah leh amah inchhalin," 
Hebrews6:14 Mathei loin mal ka sawmsak ngei ngei ang chia, tih pawh ka tihpunsak ngei ngei ang che,"" tiin chhia a chham ta a." 
Hebrews6:15 Chutichuan, chhel taka a tuar chhuah hnuin thil tiam chu a hmu ta ngei a." 
Hebrews6:16 Mihringte hian an aia ropui zawk chhalin chhia an chham thin a ni; an inhnialna tinrengah pawh tihnghehna turin chhechham hi tihtawpna a ni thin. 
Hebrews6:17 Pathian chuan a thutiam dawngtu turte hnenah a thu a thlak mai mai dawn lo tih chiang taka tihlan a duh a, chhechhamin a tinghet a." 
Hebrews6:18 Pathian daw rual a nih lohna thil danglam thei lo pahnih avangin, keini inchhanhimna'n kan hmaa beiseina dah chu chelh tura tlante hian, fuihna nasa tak kan neih theihna turin." 
Hebrews6:19 Chu beiseina chu nunna thirchakaiah kannei a, rinawm leh nghet tak a ni, puanzar chhunga mi-ah pawh chuan a lut a;chutah chuan Isua, Melkisedeka awm dan anga chatuana Puithiam Lalber lo ni tawhin, kan tan hmahruaituah a lo lut ta a." 
Hebrews6:20 chutah chuan Isua, Melkisedeka awm dan anga chatuana Puithiam Lalber lo ni tawhin, kan tan hmahruaituah a lo lut ta a." 
Hebrews7:1 Chu Melkisedeka, Salem lal, Pathian Chungnungbera Puithiam, Abrahama lalho that haw, lo hmuaka malsawmtu," 
Hebrews7:2 Abrahama'n engkimah sawma pakhat a pek ve bawka kha, puithiamah a awm reng fo si a. A hming awmzia hrilhfiahin a hmasa berah Felna Lal a ni a, a dawt lehah Salem Lal a ni bawk (chu chu Remna Lal tihna a ni)," 
Hebrews7:3 ani chu pa nei loin, nu nei loin, chi thlahtute chanchin nei loin, awm tan ni nei loin, nun tawp pawh nei hek loin Pathian Fapa anga siam a ni zawk." 
Hebrews7:4 Tichuan, chi thlahtu Abrahama'n a ral lak tha apiang zinga mi sawma pakhat a peka chu, chu mihring ropuizia chu ngaihtuah teh u." 
Hebrews7:5 Levia thlahte zinga puithiam hna chang apiangte chuan Dan thu angin mite lakah sawma pakhat lak tur thu an hmu ngei a ni, chu chu an unaute lakah a ni, chungho chu Abrahama thalbea chhuak ni mah se la;" 
Hebrews7:6 amaherawhchu an zinga a thlahtute chhui tel ve loha khan Abrahama lakah sawma pakhat a la a, thutiamte vawngtu chu mal a sawm ta bawk a." 
Hebrews7:7 Nimahsela, hnial rual lohin a te zawk chu ropui zawka malsawmsakin a awm thin." 
Hebrews7:8 Tin, hetah hian mihring thi thinte hian sawma pakhat an hmu thin a, chutah erawh chuan 'a nung reng' tia a thu an hriattira chuan a hmu a ni." 
Hebrews7:9 Tin, Levia, sawma pakhat la thintu mah hian, Abrahama kutah khan sawma pakhat a pe tawh, tih theih a ni;" 
Hebrews7:10 Melkisedekan a lo hmuah lai khan a pa thalbeah a la awm si a. 
Hebrews7:11 Tichuan, Leviaho puithiam nihna avanga famkimna hmuh theih a nih chuan (chu mi hnuaiah chuan miten Dan thu an lo hmu si a), Arona awm dan anga ruat loin, Melkisedeka awm dan anga puithiam dang lo awm hi eng nge a la ngaihna?" 
Hebrews7:12 Puithiam nihna chu a lo danglam tak avangin Dan thu chu tihdanglam ve a lo ngai reng a ni. 
Hebrews7:13 Heng a thu an sawia hi hnam hrang mi a ni si a, chu mi hnam zinga mi chu tumah maichamah chuan an che ngai lo." 
Hebrews7:14 Kan Lalpa chu Juda hnam zinga lo chhuak a ni tih a lang fiah si a, chu mi hnam thu-ah chuan Mosia'n puithiamho kawng thu engmah a sawi lo." 
Hebrews7:15 Tin, Melkisedeka anga puithiam dang, tisa thupek Dan thu anga siam mi ni lo," 
Hebrews7:16 nun tawp nei lo thiltihtheihna anga siam zawk mi a lo awm dawn chuan kan thu sawi kha nasa takin a fiah lehzual ang; 
Hebrews7:17 Nang zawng, Melkisedeka awm dan anga, Chatuana Puithiam i ni e,"" tih hriattir a ni si a." 
Hebrews7:18 A chak loh leh a sawt lohna avangin thupek awm hmasa chu paihin," 
Hebrews7:19 (Dan thu chuan engmah a tifamkim si lo,) beiseina tha zawk, Pathian kan hnaihna thin hi hruai luhin a lo awm ta hlauh zawk a ni." 
Hebrews7:20 Tin, chhechham loh a nih loh avangin" 
Hebrews7:21 (anni zawng chhechham loa puithiama siam an ni si a; ani erawh chu, ""'Nang zawng chatuana Puithiam i ni e,' tiin, Lalpa'n chhia a chham a, a lamlet tawh loing,"" tia a hnena sawitu kut khan chhechhama Puithiama siam a ni zawk)," 
Hebrews7:22 chuti bawka nasa chuan Isua chu thuthlung tha zawk tihnghehpuitu a lo ni ta. 
Hebrews7:23 Tin, anni zawng thih avnga awm hlen an thulh thin avngin puithiama siam an tam ngei a; 24ani erawh chu chatuana a awm reng avangin a Puithiam nihna chu thlak theih rual lohin a nei ta zawk a ni." 
Hebrews7:24 ani erawh chu chatuana a awm renga vangin a Puithiam nihna chu thlak theih rual lohin a nei ta zawk a ni. 
Hebrews7:25 Chutichuan, amaha Pathian hnena lo kalte chu a tawpkhawk thlengin a chhandam thei bawk a ni, anmahni tawngtaisak turin chatuana a nun reng avangin." 
Hebrews7:26 Chutiang Puithiam Lalber mi thianghlim, depde lo, bawlhhlawh kai lo, mi sualte laka awm hrang, vante aia chungnung zawka siam tawh neih chu kan tan a awm reng si a." 
Hebrews7:27 Ani chuan chung Puithiam Lalberte hlan ang chuan ni tin, mahni sual avanga inthawina hlan hmasak zeta, chu mi hnua mite sual avanga hlan a ngai lo e; chu chu vawikhatah a lo titlingtla ta nghal si a, mahni a inhlan chawp lai khan.Dan thu chuan mihring chak lohna neite chu puithiam lalberah a ruat thin a; chhechham thu, Dan thu hnua lo awm erawh chuan Fapa, chatuan atan tihfamkim tawha chu a ruat zawk a ni." 
Hebrews7:28 Dan thu chuan mihring chak lohna neite chu puithiam lalberah a ruat thin a; chhechham thu, Dan thu hnua lo awm erawh chuan Fapa, chatuan atan tihfamkim tawha chu a ruat zawk a ni." 
Hebrews8:1 Tichuan, kan thusawite zingah hian a pawimawh ber chu hei hi a ni: Chutiang Puithiam Lalber, vanahte khian Ropuibera lalthutphah ding lama han thua" 
Hebrews8:2 Hmun Thianghlim leh biak buk taktak mihring sak ni lo, Lalpa sak zawka rawngbawltu chu kan nei tih hi." 
Hebrews8:3 Puithiam Lalber apiangte chu thilpek leh inthawinate hlan turin ruat an ni si a; chutichuan he Puithiam Lalber pawh hian eng emaw tal hlan tur neih a ngai a ni. 
Hebrews8:4 Leiah hian lo awm se la chuan puithiam reng a ni lo ang, Dan thu ang zela thilpek hlantute lo awm sa an awm avangin." 
Hebrews8:5 Chungte chuan van thilte chu a lem leh a hlim rawng an bawl thin a, Mosia'n biak buk a sak dawn laia Pathian hrilha a awm ang khan; ""Tlanga entawn tur chu an entir che ang khan engkimsiam turin fimkhur rawh,""a tih kha." 
Hebrews8:6 Tunah erawh chuan thuthlung tha lehzual palai a nih angzia zelin rawngbawl hna tha zawk a lo chang ta, chu thuthlung chu thutiam tha zawk chungahte siam a ni." 
Hebrews8:7 Thuthlung hmasa chu sawisel bo ni se, thlun nawn a ngai lo tur." 
Hebrews8:8 Anmahni demin he'ng hi a sawi si a. Ngai teh, ni te a lo thleng dawn e, Lalpa'n a ti, Chung niahte chuan Israela chhungte leh, Juda chhungte hnenah chuan thuthlung thar ka siam ang:" 
Hebrews8:9 An thlahtute Aigupta ram atanga hruai chhuak tura An kuta ka chelh nia An hnena ka thlun ang kha ni loin; Ka thuthlungah chuan an awm reng si lo a, Tichuan anni chu ka ngaihsak ta lo a ni, Lalpa'n a ti." 
Hebrews8:10 Chung ni hnuah chuan Israela chhungte hnena Thu ka thlun tur chu he'ng hi a ni, Lalpa'n a ti; An rilruah ka thupekte ka dah ang a, An thinlungah ka ziak bawk ang a, Tin, anni tan Pathian ka ni ang a, Keia tan anni chu ka mite an ni bawk ang;" 
Hebrews8:11 Tin, mi tinin 'Lalpa chu hre rawh' tiin, Mahni tualkhatpui leh, Mahni unau an zirtir dawn tawh lo a; A te ber atangin a lian ber thlengin, An zain mi hre theuh tawh dawn a ni." 
Hebrews8:12 An bawhchhiatnaahte zah ka ngai ang a, An sualte pawh ka hre reng dawn tawh si lo,"" tiin.""Thuthlung thar,"" tiin a sawi avang khan a hmasa chu a tihlui ta a ni. Tichuan lo hluia lo upa tawh chu a ral dawn dawn a ni." 
Hebrews8:13 Thuthlung thar,"" tiin a sawi avang khan a hmasa chu a tihlui ta a ni. Tichuan lo hluia lo upa tawh chu a ral dawn dawn a ni." 
Hebrews9:1 Tin, thuthlung hmasa pawh khan Pathian rawngbawl dante leh a hmun thianghlim, he khawvela hmun thianghlim chu a nei a." 
Hebrews9:2 Biak buk an siam a, a tawntirh chu khawnvar dahna te, dawhkan te, chhangdah te awmna a ni; chu chu Hmun Thianghlim an ti a ni." 
Hebrews9:3 Tin, puanzar pahnihna piahah chuan biak buk, hmun Thianghlim Ber an tih chu a awm a;" 
Hebrews9:4 chu miah chuan rangkachak rimtui halna bawm leh thuthlunna bawm rangkachaktia luan chu a awm a, chu mi thuthlunna bawm chhungah chuan Manna awmna rangkachak bel te, Arona tiang lo chawr te, thuthlunna lung phekte a awm a;" 
Hebrews9:5 a chung lamah zahngaihna thutphah hliahin, ropuina Cherubte an awm bawk a; chung thute chu tunah zawng akip akawiin kan sawi thei lo ang." 
Hebrews9:6 Tin, chung thilte chu chutianga siam a lo ni a, Puithiamhoin Pathian rawng bawlin biak buk tawntirhah chuan an lut fo thin a;" 
Hebrews9:7 a dawttuah erawh chuan Puithiam Lalber chauh kum tin vawi khat, thisen keng lo loin a lut thin; chu chu mahni tan leh mite sual atan a hlan thin." 
Hebrews9:8 Thlarau Thianghlimin hei hi a hriattir a: Hmun Thianghlim luhna kawng chu a la lang rih lo e, biak buk tawntirh chu a la din chhung chuan tih hi;" 
Hebrews9:9 chu chu tun lai tehkhinna hi a ni; chu mi ang zelin thilpek leh inthawinate pawh an hlan thin, chungte chuan chhia leh tha hriatna kawngah chuan a betu chu a tifamkim thei lo;" 
Hebrews9:10 chung chu (ei tur te, in tur te, sil tur hrang hrangte nen) tisa lam dante chauh siamthat hun hma atan ruat chu a ni." 
Hebrews9:11 Nimahsela, Krista chu thil tha, lo awm turahte Puithiam Lalbera lo kalin, biak buk, kuta sak loh, (chu chu he'ng thil siam zinga mi a ni lo tihna a ni,) ropui leh famkim zawk kal tlangin," 
Hebrews9:12 kan tan chatuana tlanna hmu tawhin kelte leh bawng note thisen vang ni loin, ama thisen vang zawkin Hmun Thianghlimah chuan vawi khatah a lo lut tlingtla ta nghal a." 
Hebrews9:13 Kel leh bawngpate thisen leh bawngla vap, mi bawlhhlawh chung theh mahin tisa thiang khawpa a tihthianghlim si chuan," 
Hebrews9:14 Krista, chatuana Thlarau zara hmelhem loa Pathian hnena inhlana thisen chuan Pathian Nung rawng bawl turin in chhia leh tha hriatna chu thiltih thite lakah chuan a va tithianghlim nasa dawn em!" 
Hebrews9:15 Tin, he mi avang hian, ani chu thuthlung thar palai a ni, thuthlung hmasa hnuaia bawhchhiatnate lak ata tlanna'n mi a lo thih tak avangin kohvate chuan chatuana roluah tur thutiam chu an chang thei ang." 
Hebrews9:16 Thurochhiah awmna apiangah a chhiahtu thihna awm ve lo thei a ni si lo. 
Hebrews9:17 Mi an thih hnuin thurochhiahin thu a nei si thin, a chhiahtu la dam chhung erawh chuan thu reng a nei lo." 
Hebrews9:18 Chutichuan, thuthlung hmasa pawh kha thisen loin an tinghet lo." 
Hebrews9:19 Dan thu ang zelin thupek apiang chu Mosia'n mi zawng zawng a hrilh hnuin, ""Hei hi Pathianin in hnena a pek tlat thuthlung thisen a nih hi,"" tiin" 
Hebrews9:20 bawng note leh kelte thisen chu, tui nen, sapsen nen, husop nen a la a, lehkhabu ngei leh mi zawng zawng pawh chu a theh a ni." 
Hebrews9:21 Chu lo pawh chu, biak buk leh rawngbawlna hmanrua zawng zawng chu chutiang bawkin thisen chuain a theh ta bawk a." 
Hebrews9:22 Tin, Dan thu zawngin engkim thaw mai hi thisena tihthianghlimin a awm thin a, thisen chhuah lohin ngaihdamna reng a awm lo." 
Hebrews9:23 Chutichuan, vana thil awm angte chu chung chuan tihthianghlimin a awm tur reng a ni, van thil taktakte erawh chu chung aia inthawina tha zawktein tihthianghlimin a awm tur a ni." 
Hebrews9:24 Krista chu kuta sak hmun thianghlim, atak anpuiah chuan a lut si lo a; tunah Pathian hmaah kan aia ding turin vanah ngei a lut ta zawk a;" 
Hebrews9:25 nimahsela Puithiam Lalber chu kum tinin mahni thisen lo, thisen keng chunga Hmun Thianghlima a lut thin angin,ani chu mahni inhlan fo turin a lut hek lo;" 
Hebrews9:26 chuti ni suh se la, leilung pian tirh achin vawi tam tak a tuar tawh tur a ni; nimahsela tun lai hun tawpah hian inthawina'na inhmang chawpin sual tihbo nan vawi khatah a lo lang ta nahgl a ni." 
Hebrews9:27 Tin, mihring tan vawi khat thih ruat a ni chu mi hnuah chuan rorelna a awm ang;chutiang bawkin Krista pawh mi tam tak sualte kalpui tura vawi khat hlana awm tawhin, chhandamna hmu tura amah lo nghaktute hnenah chuan sual tel loin vawi hnihnaah a lo lang leh ang." 
Hebrews9:28 chutiang bawkin Krista pawh mi tam tak sualte kalpui tura vawi khat hlana awm tawhin, chhandamna hmu tura amah lo nghaktute hnenah chuan sual tel loin vawi hnihnaah a lo lang leh ang." 
Hebrews10:1 Dan thu chuan thil tha, lo awm turte anpui tak nei loin, a thla chauh a neih avangin, kum tina inthawina pangngai a hlan fote chuanin a lo hnaite chu engtikah mah an tifamkim thei dawn si lo." 
Hebrews10:2 Chuti ni suh se la, a betute chu vawi khata tihthianghlim nghala lawmin, sual inhriatnate an neih loh avangin hlan an bang tawh daih dawn lo'm ni?" 
Hebrews10:3 Nimahsela, chung inthawinaah chuan kum tinin sualte hriat lehna a lo awm fo zawk thin." 
Hebrews10:4 Bawngpate leh kelte thisen chuan sualte tibo thei rual a ni si lo. 
Hebrews10:5 Chutichuan, khawvela a luh laiin ""Inthawina leh thil hlan i duh lo a, Ka tan taksa mi buatsaihsak zawk a:" 
Hebrews10:6 Halrala pumpeknaahte leh, Sual tana inthawinaahte chuan Lawmna reng i nei lo." 
Hebrews10:7 Chu veleh chuan keiin, 'Aw Pathian, ngai teh, (Lehkhabu zialah chuan ka thu ziak a ni a) I duhzawng ti turin ka lo kal e,' ka ti a,"" a ti a." 
Hebrews10:8 A chhakah hian, ""Inthawina te, thil hlan te, halrala pumpekna te, sual tana inthawina te i duh lo a, chungah chuan lawmna i nei hek lo,"" a ti a, (chungte chu Dan thu anga hlan a ni a,)" 
Hebrews10:9 chu veleh chuan, ""Ngai teh, i duhzawng ti turin ka lo kal e,"" a lo ti ta a. A pahnihna hi a tundin theihna turin a hmasa chu a la bo ta a ni." 
Hebrews10:10 Chu mi duhzawng chuan Isua Krista taksa vawi khata hlan nghal vang khan tihthianghlimin kan awm ta. 
Hebrews10:11 Tin, Puithiam tinrengin kawla ni chhuak chhiara rawngbawlin, sualte engtik maha tibo thei lo inthawina pangngai hlan foin an ding thin;" 
Hebrews10:12 ani erawh hi chu chatuan atan sualte tana inthawina pakhat chauh a hlan hnuin, Pathian ding lamah a han thu ta zawk a;" 
Hebrews10:13 chuta chin chu a hmelmate a kephah nghahchhana siam an nih hma loh zawng a nghak reng a. 
Hebrews10:14 Thil hlan pakhat chauhin tihthianghlim tawhte chu chatuan atan a tifamkim tawh si a. 
Hebrews10:15 Tin, Thlarau Thianghlim pawh chuan min hriattir bawk a: ""Chung ni hnuah chuan" 
Hebrews10:16 An hnena thu ka thlun tur chu he'ng hi a ni, Lalpa'n a ti; An thinlungh ka thupekte ka dah ang a, An rilruah ka ziak bawk ang,"" tia a sawi hnu khan," 
Hebrews10:17 An sualte leh an bwhchhiatnate Ka hre reng tawh lo ang,"" a ti si a." 
Hebrews10:18 Tichuan chutiangte ngaihdamna apiangah chuan sual tan thil hlan a awm tawh lo a ni. 
Hebrews10:19 Chutichuan, unaute u, kawng min ruatsak," 
Hebrews10:20 kawng thar leh nungah chuan, puanzar chu (chu chu a taksa tihna a ni) kal tlangin, Isua thisen avang chuan Hmun Thianghlimah khan luh kan huam avang leh," 
Hebrews10:21 Pathian chhungte chunga Puithiam ropui tak kan neih avngin 
Hebrews10:22 kan thinlunga chhia leh tha hriatna tha lo chu theh faisaka awma kan taksa pawh tui fima buala awmin, rinna famkim neia thinlung tak zet puin i hnaih ang u." 
Hebrews10:23 Kan beisei thurin hi a nghin lohna turin i pawm tlat ang u, thutiamtu chu a rinawm si a;" 
Hebrews10:24 tin, hmangaih leh thil tha tiha inchawk tho turin inngaihtuah tawn ang u;" 
Hebrews10:25 thenkhat tih dan anga kan inkhawmte bansan loin, infuih tawn zawk ang u; ni chu lo hnai telh telha in hriatin infuih tawn nasa lehzual sauh rawh u." 
Hebrews10:26 Thutak hriatna famkim chu kan chan hnua thil kan tihsual luih si chuan sualte tana inthawina a awm tawh hauh lo ang a," 
Hebrews10:27 rorelna hlauhawm tak lo thleng tur leh dotute kang ral tur thinurna mei kan hmabak a ni mai. 
Hebrews10:28 Mosia Dan thu pawisa lo mi chu hretu pahnih pathum emaw thuin, lainatna tel loin an thi thin." 
Hebrews10:29 Pathian Fapa rap beta, thuthlung thisen amah tihthianghlimna chu thil narana ruat a, khawngaihna Thlarau tivuitu chu, chu mi ai chuan eng tia hremna nasa zawk nge tuar tlaka ruat tur nia inngaih?" 
Hebrews10:30 Phuba reng reng keima lak tur a ni, keima'n ka thungrul ang,"" tih leh, ""Lalpa chuan a mite a ngaihtuah ang,"" ti lehtu chu kan hre si a." 
Hebrews10:31 Pathian nung kuta tluk chu thil rapthlak tak a ni. 
Hebrews10:32 Nimahsela, hmana tihena in awm hnua tuarna buai nasa tak in tuar lai nite kha hre leh rawh u;" 
Hebrews10:33 kawng khatah chuan hmuhsit leh hrehawmte pawh tuarin ennawma siamin in awm a, kawng khatah chuan chutianga hmana awmte chu tuarpuitute in lo ni a." 
Hebrews10:34 Kawl bunte chu in lainat a, sum tha zawk, awmhlen bawk tur chu mahniin in nei tih hriain in sum laksakte pawh lawm takin in lo tuar ta bawk si a." 
Hebrews10:35 Chutichuan, in rinna lawmman chu paih bo suh u, lawmman ropui tak a nei dawn si a." 
Hebrews10:36 Pathian duhzawng in tih hnuin thiltiam chu in hmuh theihna'n chhelna in ngai a sin. 
Hebrews10:37 Rei lo te achinah Lo kal tura chu a lo kal dawn si a, Rei a ril tawh lo ang." 
Hebrews10:38 Nimahsela ka mi fel chu a nung ang: A hnungtawlh erawh chuan, Ka rilruin amahah chuan lawmna reng a nei lo ang.Nimahsela, keini zawng boral tura hnungtawlh pawla mi kan ni lo a; nunna humhim tura rinna nei pawla mi kan ni zawk." 
Hebrews10:39 Nimahsela, keini zawng boral tura hnungtawlh pawla mi kan ni lo a; nunna humhim tura rinna nei pawla mi kan ni zawk." 
Hebrews11:1 Tin,rinna hi thil beiseite awm ngeia hriatna,thil hmuh lohte hriatfiahna a ni." 
Hebrews11:2 Chu miah chuan upahote khan fak an hlawh si a. 
Hebrews11:3 Rinnain a ni khawvelte hi Pathian thua siam a ni tih kan hriat ni, chutichuan thil hmuh theihte hi thil lang theitea siam a ni lo." 
Hebrews11:4 Rinnain Abela chuan Kaina ai chuan inthawina tha zawk Pathian hnenah a hlan a,chu mi avang chuan mi fel a ni tih hriattirna a hlawh a, Pathianin a thilpekte kawngah chuan thu a hriattir a; tin, chu mi rinna avang chuan ani chuan thi tawh hnuin thu a la sawi ta fo a ni." 
Hebrews11:5 Rinnain Enoka kha thihna hre lo tura lak boin a awm a; tin, Pathianin a lak bo avangin hmuh theih a ni ta lo a; lak bova a awm hmain Pathian lawmzawng mi a ni tih an hriattir tawh reng a." 
Hebrews11:6 Nimahsela, rinna loin ama lawmzawng mi nih rual a ni lo; Pathian hnena lo kal chuanin, ani chu a awm tih leh zawngtute hnena lawmman pek hmang a ni tih rin tur a ni." 
Hebrews11:7 Rinnain Nova chu thil lo la lang lote kawng thu-ah Pathian hrilha lo awmin, Pathian tih dekin, a chhungte chhandamna'n lawng a tu a; chu chuanin khawvel chu thiam loh a chantir ta a, rinna avanga felna awm chu rochungtu a lo ni bawk a." 
Hebrews11:8 Rinnain Abrahama chu koha a awm lai khan a rochun tur hmuna lut turin kal chhuah thu a pawm ta a;tin,a kalna tur lam pawh hre loin a kal chhuak ta a." 
Hebrews11:9 Rinnain ram tiamah khan mi rama cham ang maiin a lo cham ta reng a, thutiam hmuhkhat a rochunpui tur Isaaka leh Jakobate nen chuan puan inahte an awm a;" 
Hebrews11:10 khua lungphumte nei mi, Pathian relbawl leh siam chu a nghk reng si a." 
Hebrews11:11 Rinnain Sari ngei pawhin, a tiamtu chu rinawma a ruat avangin, tar hnu tawhin chi pai theihna a hmu a," 
Hebrews11:12 Chutichuan, mipa pakhat lakah (ani chu mitthi ang a ni si a) vana arsite anga tam, tuifinriat kama tiau vaivut chhiar sen loh anga tam an lo chhuak ta a." 
Hebrews11:13 Chung zawng zawngte chu rinna neiin an thi ta a, thiltiamte chu chang loin; nimahsela chung chu hla tak atanga hmuin chibai an lo buk tawh a, leiah hian mikhual leh khualzin mai an ni tih an inhriattir tawh bawk a." 
Hebrews11:14 Chutiang thu sawite chuan anmahni ram tur an zawng tih an tilang si a. 
Hebrews11:15 Tin, an chhuahna ram chu lungkham se la chuan hawnna remchang an hmu tawh ngei tur a ni." 
Hebrews11:16 Nimahsela, tunah zawng ram tha lehzual chak an lo ni a, chu chu vana mi a ni; chutichuan Pathianin an Pathian tiha awm chu a zak lo e; an tan khua lam a lo buatsaihsak tawh si." 
Hebrews11:17 Rinnain Abrahama chu fiaha a awm khan Isaaka chu a hlan a; 
Hebrews11:18 Isaaka-ah hian i thlahte chhui an ni ang tih Pathian thutiam dawngtu chuan a fapa mal neih chhun chu a hlan a ni; 
Hebrews11:19 mitthi pawh Pathian chuan a kai tho thei ang tih a ring a, thi hnu nung leh ang maiin a hmu kir leh ta reng a ni." 
Hebrews11:20 Rinnain Isaaka chuan thil lo la thleng turte thu-ah pawh Jakoba leh Esauva mal a sawmsak a. 
Hebrews11:21 Rinnain Jakoba chuan a thih dawn lai khan Josefa fate chu mal a sawm ve ve a; a tiang hmawr rinchhanin Pathian a be bawk a. 
Hebrews11:22 Rinnain Josefa chuan a thih a lo hnaih khan Israela thlahte chhuah tur thu a sawi a; a ruhte kawng thu-ah thu a pe bawk a. 
Hebrews11:23 Rinnain Mosia a pian lai khan, nausen hmel tha tak a ni an tih avangin, thla thum chhung a nu leh a pa thurukin a awm a; lal thupek pawh an hlau lo." 
Hebrews11:24 Rinnain Mosia chuan a lo puitlin hnu khan Pharaoa fanua fapaa vuah a duh lo a; 
Hebrews11:25 rei lo te atan sual nawmna hlimpui ai chuan Pathian mite nena tihduhdah tuar a thlang ta zawk a; 
Hebrews11:26 Krista an hmuhsitna chu Aigupta ram rote ai chuan sum ropui zawkah a ruat a; lawmman pek tur chu a thlir thin avangin. 
Hebrews11:27 Rinnain lal thinurna chu hlau loin Aigupta ram a kalsan a, hmuh theih loa chu a hmuh avngin a tuar tan tan a ni." 
Hebrews11:28 Rinnain Kalhlen Kut leh thisen theh kha a siam a, fa tir tiboraltu chuan anmahni a tawh lohna turin." 
Hebrews11:29 Rinnain khawmuala kal angin Tuifinriat Senah khan an kal kai a; Aiguptahoin chu chu tih an tum ve a, lem zawhin an awm ta a." 
Hebrews11:30 Rinnain Jeriko khaw kulh kha ni sarih an hual hnuin a chim ta a. 
Hebrews11:31 Rinnain Rahabi nawhchizuar kha awih loho zingah chuan a boral ve ta lo, enthlatute chu tlang taka a lawm avangin." 
Hebrews11:32 Tin, eng nge ka la sawi cheu vang? Gideona thu te, Baraka thu te, Samsona thu te, Jephthaa thu te leh Davida thu te, Samuela thu te, zawlneiho thu te hril i la, hunin mi daih dawn si lo a;" 
Hebrews11:33 chungte chuan rinnain ramte an la a, thil fel an ti a, thutiamte an chang a, sakeibaknei khate an tihchihsak a," 
Hebrews11:34 mei thiltihtheihna an timit a, khandaih hriam lam an pumpelh a, chak lohna ata chak taka siamin an awm a, indonaah chuan mi hrat khawkheng an lo ni a, hnam dang indo pawlte an tlanchhiattir a." 
Hebrews11:35 Hmeichhiaten an mitthite tho leh an hmu a, mi dngte pawh saisakin an awm a, thawhlehna tha lehzual an chan theihna turin chhan chhuah an duh lo a;" 
Hebrews11:36 mi dangte pawhintihnawmnah leh vuakte an tuar a, a ni, chu lo pawh chu, kawlbun leh tan ina khungte an tawk bawk a;" 
Hebrews11:37 lunga denin an awm a, thingzainaa zai bunin an awm a, thlemna an tawk a, khandaiha sahhlumin an awm a; beram vun leh kel vun sinin an vakvai a; rethei takin, hrehawm takin, tihduhdahin an awm a;" 
Hebrews11:38 (chungho tan chuan khawvel hi awmna tlak a ni lo) thlalerah te, tlangah te, pukah te, khuarkhurumah te an vak an vak thin a." 
Hebrews11:39 Tin, chung zawng zawngte chuan rinna avnga fak lo hlawh tawhin, thiltiam chu an chang lo a,keini tel loa anni chu tihfamkima an awmlohna'n Pathianin keimahni kawng thu-ah thil eng emaw tha lehzual a buatsaih tawh avangin." 
Hebrews11:40 keini tel loa anni chu tihfamkima an awmlohna'n Pathianin keimahni kawng thu-ah thil eng emaw tha lehzual a buatsaih tawh avangin. 
Hebrews12:1 Chutichuan, chhumpui nasa tak ang thlirtuten min hual vel avng hian, min tihnawk apiang leh sual keimahnia bet tlat chu i dah ve ang u, tin, Isua, kan rinna siamtu leh tifamkimtu lam chu enin, kan hmaa intlansiakna tur awmah chuan chhel takin i tlan zel ang u." 
Hebrews12:2 Ani chuan a hmaa hlimna awm avang chuan mualphona chu ngainepin kraws chu a tuar a, Pathian lalthutphah ding lamah khian a han thu ta a." 
Hebrews12:3 In thlarau lamah in inthlahdah a, in lo hah lohna'n, anmahni chung tha lo turin mi sualte chutianga hnialkalhna tuartu chu ngaihtuah teh u khai." 
Hebrews12:4 Sual doin thisen chhuak khawpin in la tang lo va: 
Hebrews12:5 fuihna thu, fate zilh anga zilna che u kha, in lo theihnghilh ta e. ""Ka fa, Lalpa thununna chu ngainep suh la, A zilhhauva i awmin inthlahdah hek suh;" 
Hebrews12:6 Lalpa chuan a hmangaih chu a thunun thin a, Fa a lawm apiang chu a vaw thin a sin ni,"" tih hi." 
Hebrews12:7 In tuar hi nangmahni thununna'n a ni; fate chunga tih angin Pathianin in chungah a ti a nih hi; pa thunun loh fa tu nge awm ngai le? 
Hebrews12:8 Fa zawng zawng hlawh thin thununna chu hlawh loa in awm erawh chuan fa tak ni loin, sawn in ni a ni ang a sin." 
Hebrews12:9 Chu lo pawh chu min thunun turin kan tisa pate kan neih kha, chungte chu kan zah si a; chu mi aia nasa zawkin, an nunna turin thlaraute Pa thu thuin kan awm dawn lo'm ni?" 
Hebrews12:10 Anni chuan ni rei lo te, tha an tih ang zelin min thunun ngei tak a, ani erawh chuan a thianghlimna chu kan chan ve theihna'n, kan thatna turin min thunun zawk a ni." 
Hebrews12:11 Tin, thununna reng reng hi tuar lai chuan lawmawmin a lang lo a, lungchhiatthlakin a lang zawk thin, tuar hnuah erawh chuan chu mia sawizawia awmte tan chuan rah thlamuanawm tak felna chu a chhuahsak thin." 
Hebrews12:12 Chutichuan, kut uai thlate chu char rawh u, khup zawite nen;" 
Hebrews12:13 tin, kebai chu tihpelhsawlh loh a, tihdamin a awm zawkna'n, in kete tan kawng ngilte siam rawh u." 
Hebrews12:14 Mi zawng zawng nena inremna leh thianghlimna um rawh u, chu mi thianghlimna loin tuma'n Lalpa an hmu lo ang:" 
Hebrews12:15 Fimkhur rawh u, Pathian khawngaihna ata in bo dah ang e, khakna zung eng emaw lo chawra tibuai che uin,chu chuan mi tam tak chu tihbawlhhlawhin an awm ang a," 
Hebrews12:16 inngaih hmang emaw, Esauva anga Pathian zah lo mi emaw an lo awm dah ang e. Ani chuan a fa tir nihna chu chaw vawi khat eiah a hralh a." 
Hebrews12:17 Chu mi hnuah chuan malsawmna chu rochun a duh pawhin, mittui tla chungin thahnemngai takin zawng mah se la, rilru lamletna remchang a hmuh loh avangin paihin a awm ta tih in hre si a." 
Hebrews12:18 Nangni zawng tlang khawih theih, meia kang te, chhum dum te, thim te, thlipui te," 
Hebrews12:19 tawtawrawt rikna te, thusawi thawm awmna te kha thleng in ni si lo a; (chu thawm hretute chuan thu dang reng an hnena sawi tawh lo turin an ngen a," 
Hebrews12:20 Sa lam pawhin tlang chu khawih se la, lunga den hlumin a awm tur a ni,"" tih thupek kha an tuar thei ta si lo a;" 
Hebrews12:21 an thil hmuh pawh chu a hlauhawm em em a, chutichuan Mosia'n, ""Ka hlauin ka khur nasa em em a,"" a tih hial kha)" 
Hebrews12:22 Zion tlang te, Pathian nung khua, van Jerusalem te, chhiar sen lohho vantirhkoh inkhawmpui te," 
Hebrews12:23 fa tir vana hming chuang kohhranho hnen te, Pathian, mi zawng zawng ngaihtuahtu hnen te, mi fel tihthatfamkimho thlarau hnen te," 
Hebrews12:24 Isua, thuthlung thar palai hnen te, thisen theh, Abela thisen aia thu tha zawk sawitu hnen te thleng in ni zawk." 
Hebrews12:25 Thusawitu chu in lo duh lo dah ang e, fimkhur rawh u. Leia anmahni zilh lawktu kha an duh loh maha hremna an pumpelh si loh chuan, keini, van atanga min zilh lawktu hawisantute hian kan pumpelh lo lehzual ang." 
Hebrews12:26 Chu mi lai chuan a aw khan lei hi a tinghing a; nimahsela tunah hian, ""Vawi khat chu lei chang ni loin, van pawh ka la tinghing leh ng,"" tiin a tiam ta zawk a." 
Hebrews12:27 Tin, ""Vawi khat chu ka la tinghing leh ang,"" tih hian, thil nghing lote chu a awm reng theihna turin, thil lo nghingte chu thil siamte ang maiin sawn boin a awm dawn tih a hriattir a ni." 
Hebrews12:28 Chutichuan, ram tihnghin rual loh kan chan avang hian khawngaihna i nei ang u, chu mi zarah chuan zah leh tih dek chungin Pathian lawmzawng rawng kan bawl thei dawn zuk nia;Kan Pathian hi mi kanralhmang mei a ni si a." 
Hebrews12:29 Kan Pathian hi mi kanralhmang mei a ni si a. 
Hebrews13:1 Unau inhmangaihna hi awm zel rawh se. 
Hebrews13:2 Mikhualte chungah hmangaih chhuah theihnghilh suh u; chutiang tiin thenkhatten hre loin vantirhkohte an lo thleng si a. 
Hebrews13:3 Phuara awmte chu phuar ni ve angin hre reng u la; hrehawm tuarte chu taksaa awm ve bawk in nih avangin hre reng rawh u. 
Hebrews13:4 Mi zawng zawng zingah inneih hi chawimawiin awm se la, khum pawh tihbawlhhlawh loin awm rawh se; inngaite leh uirete chu Pathian in a ngaihtuah dawn si a." 
Hebrews13:5 In rilru putzia chu tangka ngainatna tel lo ni rawh se; in thil neih chhun chungahte chuan lungawi rawh u; amah ngeiin, ""Engtikah mah ka thlahthlam tawp lo ang chia, kal pawh ka kalsan tawp lo ang che,"" a ti si a." 
Hebrews13:6 Chutichuan, huai takin, ""Lalpa chu mi tanpuitu a ni, Ka hlau lo ang; Mihringin eng nge mi tih theih ang?"" kan ti thin a ni." 
Hebrews13:7 In hotu, Pathian thu lo hrilhtute che u chu hre reng u la, an awm dana thil chhuak chu ngaihtuahin an rin dan zir rawh u." 
Hebrews13:8 Isua Krista chu niminah nen, vawiinah nen, kumkhua pawhin a pangngaiin a awm fo ang." 
Hebrews13:9 Zirtirna tinreng leh zirtirna mak tak len boin awm suh u; thinlung hi khawngaihnaa tihngheha a awm chu a tha si a, ei turtea tihngheha awm loin; chutiang kawng lungkhamte chuan chungah chuan sawtna an hmu chuang lo." 
Hebrews13:10 Keini zawngin maicham kan nei a, chu mi-ah chuan biak buk rawngbawltute chuan an ei tur a ni lo." 
Hebrews13:11 Ran, a thisen Puithiam Lalberin Hmun Thianghlima sual tana hlana a luhpui thina ruangte chu daipawnah an hal thin si a." 
Hebrews13:12 Chutichuan, Isua pawhin, ama thisen ngeia mite chu a tihthianghlim theihna turin kulh kawngkhar pawn lamah chuan a lo tuar ta a." 
Hebrews13:13 Chutichuan, amah an hmuhsitna chu phurin daipawnah a hnen lamah i kal chhuak ang u." 
Hebrews13:14 Hetah hian khaw hmun nghet kan nei si lo a, khaw lo la awm tur chu kan zawng zawk a ni." 
Hebrews13:15 Tichuan, ama zarah chuan faka inthawina hi Pathian hnenah i hlan fo vng u, chu chu a hming tanna hmuite rah chu a ni." 
Hebrews13:16 Nimahsela, thil tihthat leh thilphal hi theihnghilh suh u; chutianga inthawina chungah chuan Pathian a lungni em em si a." 
Hebrews13:17 In hotute thu awih u la, an thu thuin awm rawh u; chanchin sawi tur an nih avangin, lungngai chunga sawi lo a, hlim chunga an sawi theihna turin in thlarau an vensak thin che u a ni; lungngai chunga sawi chu in tana pawi tur a ni si a." 
Hebrews13:18 Min tawngtaisak rawh u; engkimah fel taka awm tumin, chhia leh tha hriatna thiang tak kan nei tih dik takin kan inhre si a." 
Hebrews13:19 Min tawngtaisak rawh u; engkimah fel taka awm tumin, chhia leh tha hriatna thiang tak kan nei tih dik takin kan inhre si a." 
Hebrews13:20 Tin, remna Pathian, beram Vengtu ropui tak,kan Lalpa Isua chatuana thuthlunna thisenzara mitthi zing ata hruai chhuak lehtu khan," 
Hebrews13:21 a mithmuha a lawmzawng ang apiang Isua Krista zarah keimahniah thawkin, a duhzawng ti turin thil tha tinreng kawngah tifamkim che u rawh se; Isua Krista hnenah chuan ropuina chatuanin awm rawh se. Amen." 
Hebrews13:22 Nimahsela, unaute u, ka ngen a che u, fuihna thu hi ngaithei hram hram rawh u: in hnenah thu tlem te ka ziak si a." 
Hebrews13:23 Kan unaupa Timothea kha an chhuahtir ta tih lo hre ve rawh u; a lo kal hma deuh chuan amah nen kan rawn hmu ang che u. 
Hebrews13:24 In hotute zawng zawng leh mi thianghlimte zawng zawng kha chibai mi buksak ang che u. Itali rama mite hian chibai an buk a che u.In zaa hnenah khawngaihna awm rawh se. Amen. 
Hebrews13:25 In zaa hnenah khawngaihna awm rawh se. Amen. 
James1:1 Jakoba, Pathian leh Lalpa Isua Krista bawihin, Hnam Sawm leh Hnam Hnih darhte chu chibai a buk e." 
James1:2 Ka unaute u, in rinna fiahna chuan chhelna a siam tih hriain," 
James1:3 thlemna tinreng in tawh hunin lawman hlirah ngai rawh u. 
James1:4 Tin, engmah tlachham loa in famkim a, in puma in him theihna'n chhelna chuan thawk famkim rawh se." 
James1:5 In zingah tupawhin finna a tlakchham chuan mi zawng zawng hnena hau lo leh ui loa pe thintu Pathian chu dil rawh se, chutichuan a hnenah pek a ni ang." 
James1:6 Nimahsela, ringhlel hauh loin rinna neiin dil rawh se, ringhleltu chu tuifinriat fawn thli chhem len leh vawrh ang a ni si a." 
James1:7 Chutiang mi, rilru bulbal nei lo," 
James1:8 a thil tih zawng zawng nghet lo mi chuan Lalpa hnenah engmah hmuh inring suh se. 
James1:9 Unau daikilkara mi chu chawimawia a awm avangin lawm rawh se; 
James1:10 hausa erawh chu tihtlawma a awm avangin lawm rawh se; hlobet par angin a la ral mai dawn si a. 
James1:11 Ni a lo chhuah a, thli lum tak a lo tlehin hlobet a tivuai a; tin, a par chu a rem a, a awm dan mawizia chu a boral thin; chutiang bawkin mi hausa chu a kalnaah chuan a lo vuai dawn si a." 
James1:12 Thlemna tuar hram hramtu chu a eng a thawl e; fiaha a awm hnuin nunna lallukhum, Lalpa'n amah hmangaihtute hnena a tiam chu a hmu dawn si a." 
James1:13 Tuma'n thlemna an tawh laiin, ""Pathian thlem ka ni,"" ti suh se; Pathian chu sual thlem rual a ni lo, amah pawhin tumah a thlem ngai lo." 
James1:14 Mi tin mahni chaknaa hruai bo leh hipa an awm chuan thlemna an tawk a ni zawk e. 
James1:15 Tin, chakna chuan no a pai a, sual a hring thin a; tin, sual chuan a lo puitlinin thihna a hring thin." 
James1:16 Ka unau duh takte u, bumin awm suh u." 
James1:17 Thilpek tha leh thilpek famkim zawng zawng chu chung lam atangin engte Pa hnen ata, a lo chhuk thin a ni, amahah chuan danglamna leh herna hlim reng reng a awm thei lo." 
James1:18 A thil siamte hmahruaitu ang kan lo nih theihna'n ama duhzawngin thutak lakah chuan min hring a ni. 
James1:19 Unau duh takte u, chung chu in hria e; nimahsela mi tinin ngaihthlak chuh sela, thusawi chuh lo se la, thin tinel rawh se:" 
James1:20 mihring thinurnain Pathian felna chu a siam si lo. 
James1:21 Chuvangin, bawlhhlawh zawng zawng leh sual khat liam chu dah bo u la, thu tuh, in thlarau chhandam thei chu thuhnuairawlh takin pawm rawh u." 
James1:22 Nimahsela, thu ngaithlatute mai ni loin zawmtute lo ni zawk rawh u, chutilochu mahni inbum in lo ni dah ang e." 
James1:23 Tupawh thu ngaithlatu nia zawmtu ni si lo chu mi, darthlalanga a pianpui hmai ngun taka inen ang chu a ni," 
James1:24 a kal bo a, mi eng ang nge a nih a intheihnghilh nghal si thin." 
James1:25 Amaherawhchu, tupawh dan famkim, zalenna dan hi bih a, chutianga awm reng a, ngaithla a, theihnghilh leh mai thintu ni lo a, zawma hna thawk fo thintu ni zawk chu, chu mi chu a thil tihah malsawmin a awm ang." 
James1:26 Tupawh sakhaw ngaihsak nia inringa a lei veng tha si lo a, mahni thinlung inbum zawk chu, chu mi sakhaw biak dan chu engmah a ni lo e.Kan Pathian leh Pa mithmuha sakhaw biak dan thianghlim leh sual tel lo chu hei hi a ni, fahrah leh hmeithaite an hrehawm laia kan leh khawvel bawlhhlawh kai loa insiam thin hi." 
James1:27 Kan Pathian leh Pa mithmuha sakhaw biak dan thianghlim leh sual tel lo chu hei hi a ni, fahrah leh hmeithaite an hrehawm laia kan leh khawvel bawlhhlawh kai loa insiam thin hi." 
James2:1 Ka unaute u, kan Lalpa Isua Krista, Ropuina Lalpa chu ring chungin, mi thlei bik nei suh u." 
James2:2 In inkhawmna inah mi rangkachak zungbun bun, puan mawi tak sin lo lut se la, tin, mi rethei puan chhe tak sin lo lut bawk se la;" 
James2:3 tin, puan mawi tak sin chu in ngaihsak a, a hnenah chuan, ""Nang he hmun thaah hian thu rawh,"" in tih a, tin, mi rethei hnenah chuan, ""Nang chu sawtah sawn ding la, a nih loh leh ka ke nghahchhan hrulah hian thu rawh,"" in tih chuan," 
James2:4 in rilruah thlei bik neiin ngaihtuahna sual pua sawiseltute in lo ni dawn lo'm ni? 
James2:5 Ka unau duh takte u, ngai teh u, Pathianin he khawvel thila retheite hi rinnaa hausa tur leh, amah hmangaihtute hnena a tiam ram chu luahtu turahte a ruat lo em ni?" 
James2:6 Nangni zawngin mi rethei chu in timualpho ta zawk a ni. Mi hausate chu a tiduhdahtu che u leh rorelna ina hnuk lut thintu che u chu an ni lo'm ni? 
James2:7 Hming zahawm tak in put hi sawichhetute chu an ni lo'm ni? 
James2:8 Nimahsela Pathian Lehkha Thu, ""Nangmah i inhmangaih angin i vengte i hmangaih tur a ni,"" tih lal dan hi in zawm chuan in ti tha e;" 
James2:9 amaherawhchu, mi thlei bik in neih chuan in tisual a ni, Danin bawhchhetu-ah a chantir si che u a." 
James2:10 Tupawhin Dan zawm kim mah se la, kawng khata a tihsual si chuan a zaah chuan thiam loh changin a awm tawh a ni." 
James2:11 Uire suh,"" titu chuan, ""Tual that suh,"" a ti bawk si a. Chutichuan uire lo mah la, tual i thah si chuan Dan bawhchhetu i ni reng reng tawh a ni." 
James2:12 Chuvangin,zalenna dana rorelsak turate angin thu sawi u la, thil ti bawk rawh u." 
James2:13 Mi chunga khawngaihna nei lo chu khawngaihna tel loin rorelsakin a awm ang; khawngaihna hi rorelna aiin a chungnung zawk a ni. 
James2:14 Ka unau te u, miin, ""Rinna ka nei,"" ti mah se la, thiltih a neih si loh chuan eng nge sawt ang? Chutiang rinna chuan amah a chhandam thei ang em ni?" 
James2:15 Unaupa emaw, unaunu emaw, saruaka awmin an ni tin chaw tlachham se la," 
James2:16 tin, in zinga tuin emaw an hnenah, ""Thlamuang takin kal u la, lum tak leh puar takin awm rawh u,"" ti u la, taksa tana thil chakkhai chu in pek si loh chuan eng nge sawt ang?" 
James2:17 Chutiang bawkin rinna chu thiltih nei loin amah chauhin a awm chuan thi a ni. 
James2:18 A ni, mi tuin emaw, ""Nangin rinna i nei a, keiin thiltih ka nei a ni; i rinna chu i thiltih tel loin mi entir rawh, tin, keiin ka thiltihin ka rinna ka entir ang che." 
James2:19 Pathian chu pakhat a ni tih i ring a ni maw? I ti tha e; ramhuaite pawhin an ring a, an khur thin a sin,"" a ti ang." 
James2:20 Aw mi lawilopa, thiltih tel loa rinna mai chu engmah a ni lo tih i hre duh em le?" 
James2:21 Min thlahtu Abrahama chuan a fapa Isaaka maicham chunga a hlan lai khan thiltih avangin thiam a chang a ni lo'm ni? 
James2:22 Rinna chuan a thiltih nen a thawk dun a, tin, thiltih avangin a rinna chu a famkim ta tih i hria e." 
James2:23 Pathian Lehkha Thu, ""Abrahama chuan Pathian a ring a, chu rinna chu a felnaah ruat a ni,"" tih thu kha a lo hlawhthling a, tichuan Pathian Thianah vuahin a awm ta a." 
James2:24 Rinna avang ngawt ni loin, thiltih avang zawkin miin thiam a chang thin tih in hre ta." 
James2:25 Chutiang bawkin Rahabi nawhchizuar pawh khan tirhkohte kha a lo lawm a, kawng danga a hawntir lai khan thiltih avangin thiam a chang a ni lo'm ni?Thlarau tel loin taksa chu thi a ni, chutiang bawkin thiltihte tel loin rinna pawh chu thi a ni." 
James2:26 Thlarau tel loin taksa chu thi a ni, chutiang bawkin thiltihte tel loin rinna pawh chu thi a ni." 
James3:1 Ka unaute u, in zinga mi tam tak hi zirtirtuahte lo awm suh u, zirtirtuin rorelna nasa lehzual kan tawk ang tih kan hre si a." 
James3:2 Kan zain thil tam tak kan tisual fo thin. A thusawia tisual ngai lo mi chu, mi puitling a ni a, a taksa pum pawh veng thei mi a ni." 
James3:3 Ngai teh u, kan thu an awih theihna'n sakawr kaahte thirbarh kan barh chuan an taksa pum pawh kan kaiher thin." 
James3:4 Ngai teh u, lawngte pawh hi a lian hle a, thli na tak chhem Lenin a awm thin na a, nimahsela a tihertu chuan a kaltir duhna lam apiangah tihherna te tak tein a tiher thin." 
James3:5 Chutiang bawkin lei pawh hi taksa peng te tak te a ni a,nasa takin a uang thin. Ngai teh u, mei te tak tein thing a va tikang nasa em!" 
James3:6 Tin, lei hi mei a ni; kan taksa pengte zinga khawlohna hlawm chu lei hi a ni; chu chuan taksa apumin a tibawlhhlawh a, pianpui tawlailir chu a tikang a, amah chu hremhmun tihkan a ni." 
James3:7 Sa chi tinreng te, sava chi tinreng te, rannung chi tinreng te, tuifinriata mi chi tinreng te hi khawi ngam theih an ni si a, mihringte khawi ngamin an awm bawk a:" 
James3:8 amaherawhchu lei hi tumahin an khawi ngam thei lo a ni; thihna hlova khat, sual awmhle hle thei lo a ni." 
James3:9 Chu chuan Lalpa leh Pa kan fak thin a; chu vek chuan Pathian anga siam mihringte chu anchhia kan lawh bawk thin a ni. 
James3:10 Ka hmun khat atangin fakna leh anchhe lawhna a chhuak thin. Ka unaute u, chung thil chu chutiang ni tur a ni lo e." 
James3:11 Tuikhur hian hna hmun khatah tui tui leh tui tui lo a tichhuak thin em ni? 
James3:12 Ka unaute u, theipui kungah oliv thei a rah thei em ni? A nih loh leh grep hruiah theipui a rah thei em ni? Chutiang bawkin chi khur hian tui al lo a tichhuak thei hek lo." 
James3:13 In zingah tu nge finga thu hre thei awm? Thuhnuairawlh tak leh fing takin a thiltihte awm dan thatin entir rawh se. 
James3:14 Nimahsela in thinlungah itsikna nasa tak leh inelna in neih chuan, thu dik uan khum suh u la, thu dik dodalin dawt sawi hek suh u." 
James3:15 Chu finna chu chung lam atanga lo chhuk chu a ni lo a, khawvel leh taksa chakna leh ramhuaia mi a ni zawk e." 
James3:16 Initsikna leh inelna awmnaah chuan buaina leh thiltihsualna tinreng a awm thin. 
James3:17 Chung lam atanga finna lo chhuak erawh chu atirin a thianghlim phawt a, chu mi hnuah chuan inrem a duh a, a nunnem a, a tihnuam a, khawngaihna leh rah thain a khat a, thlei bik a nei lo a, a vervek lo a ni.Felna rah chu remna siamtute tan remnain tuh a ni." 
James3:18 Felna rah chu remna siamtute tan remnain tuh a ni. 
James4:1 In zinga indona leh inhnialnate hi khawi atanga lo chhuak nge ni? In taksa pengahte indona siam thintu, in duhzawng atangte chuan lo chhuak a ni lo em ni?" 
James4:2 In chak a, in nei si lo va: tual in that a, in awt a, in nei thei si lo va: in inhnial a, in indo a; in dil loh avangin in nei lo a;" 
James4:3 in dil a, in dil dik loh avangin in hmu lo, in nawmsakna'n hman in tum si a." 
James4:4 Nangni uirenute u, khawvel thian nihna hi Pathian hmelma nihna a ni tih in hre lo em ni? Chutichuan tupawh khawvel thian nih duh apiang chuan Pathian hmelmaah a insiam thin a ni." 
James4:5 A nih loh leh, ""Thlarau keimahnia a chentir chuan thik khawp hialin min duh a ni,"" tih hi, Pathian Lehkha Thuin engmah loin sawiin in ring em ni?" 
James4:6 Nimahsela, khawngaihna tam lehzual a pe thin; chuvangin Pathian Lehkha Thuin, ""Pathianin mi chapote a dodal a, inngaitlawm te erawh chu khawngihna a pe thin,"" a ti a ni." 
James4:7 Chutichuan, Pathian thu thuin awm rawh u; amaherawhchu Diabola dodal rawh u, tichuan a tlan bosan ang che u." 
James4:8 Pathian hnaih rawh u, tichuan anin a hnaih ang che u. Mi sualte u, in kutte silfai rawh u; rilru bulbal nei lote u, in thinlung tithianghlim rawh u." 
James4:9 Hrehawm u la, lungngai u la, tap rawh u; in nuih lungngaihah chang se la, in hlim nguiah chang rawh se." 
James4:10 Lalpa mithmuhin inngaitlawm rawh u, tichuan a chawimawi ang che u." 
James4:11 Unaute u, insawichhe tawn suh u. Tupawhin a unau a sawichhiatin emaw, a uanu a sawiselin emaw, Dan a sawichhiain Dan a sawisel a ni; nimahsela, Dan i sawisel chuan Dan zawmtu i ni lo a, roreltu i ni zawk e." 
James4:12 Dan petu leh roreltu pakhat chauh a awm, chhandam theia tiboral theia chu; nang thenawmte sawiseltu chu tu nge maw i nih le?" 
James4:13 Tunah ngai teh u khai, nangni, ""Vawiinah emaw, naktukah emaw, chu mi khawpuiah chuan ka kal ang a, chutah chuan kum khat kan va thang ang a, kan sum dawng ang a, hlawkna kan hmu ang,"" titute u." 
James4:14 Naktukah chuan eng nge lo awm dawn in hre si lo. In nunna chu eng nge ni? Chhum rei lo te lo lang a, ral leh ta mai thin ang hi in ni si a." 
James4:15 Chutichuan, ""Lalpa'n rem a tih chuan kan dam ang a, chu mi kha mi kan ti ang,"" in ti tur hi a ni." 
James4:16 Nimahsela, in uannate hi in chhuang zawk si a, chutiang chhuanna zawng zawng chu sual a ni.Chutichuan, tupawh thil tha tih tur hriaa ti si lo chu a tan sual a ni." 
James4:17 Chutichuan, tupawh thil tha tih tur hriaa ti si lo chu a tan sual a ni." 
James5:1 Mi hausate u, ngai teh u khai! In chunga hrehawm lo thleng dawn mek avang chuan tap u la, chiau vak vak rawh u." 
James5:2 In rote a chhe ta a, in puante sulrulin a ei zo ta." 
James5:3 In rangkachak leh in tangkate a tuiek zo ta a; a tuiek chu in thiam lohzia hriattirna a ni ang a, in tisa chu mei kan angin a ei ang. Ni hnuhnungah chuan ro in khawl khawm a nih hi." 
James5:4 Ngai teh u, in loa buh ata inhlawhfate hlawh, tihdera in pek loh kha; a au a, a attute mangang au thawm pawh chu Mipuite Lalpa bengah a lo lut ta a." 
James5:5 Khawvelah hian nuamsa takin in awm a, in inkhawhral mai mai a; inthah niin in thinlung in titlai a." 
James5:6 Mi fel chu thiam loh in chantir a,in that ta a; ani chuan a dodal lo a che u." 
James5:7 Chutichuan, unaute u, Lalpa lo kal hma loh zawng chhel takin awm rawh u. Ngai teh u, lo neitu chuan ruah tui tla hmasa leh hnuhnung chu a hmuh hma loh chuan chhel takin lei rah hlu tak chu a nghak thin." 
James5:8 Nangni pawh chhel takin awm rawh u; in thinlung tinghet rawh u; Lalpa lo kalna chu a hnai tawh si a. 
James5:9 Unaute u, thiam loh changa in awm lohna'n, inphun suh u; ngai teh u, Roreltu chu kawngka bulah a ding reng a ni." 
James5:10 Unaute u, Lalpa hming thusawitu zawlneite chu, tuar dan leh chhel dan kawngah chuan entawn atan hmang rawh u." 
James5:11 Ngai teh u, tuartute chu engthawl kan ti a; Joba chhelzia chu in hria a, Lalpa'n a tawpa a tihzia pawh kha in hmu bawk a, Lalpa chu khawngaihnain a khahzia leh zah a ngaih theihzia pawh kha." 
James5:12 Nimahsela, ka unaute u, engpawh ti mah u la chhia chham suh u; van chhalin emaw, lei chhalin emaw, thil dang reng reng chhalin emaw chhia chham suh u; ""Ni"" in tih chu ""Ni"" ni se la, ""Ni lo"" in tih chu ""Ni lo"" ni rawh se; chutilochuan thiam loh changin in awm ang." 
James5:13 In zingah thil tha lo tuar an awm em? Tawngtai rawh se. Hlim an awm em? Fakna hla sa rawh se. 
James5:14 In zingah damlo an awm em? Kohhran upa kohtir se la, anin Lalpa hminga hriak hnawihin a chungah tawngtai rawh se;" 
James5:15 tin, rinnaa tawngtaina chuan damlo chu a chhandam ang a, Lalpa chuan ani chu a kai tho ang; tin, thil a lo tihsual tawh chuan ngaihdamsak a ni ang." 
James5:16 Chutichuan, tihdama in awm theihna'n in sualte thupha chawi tawn u la, intawngtaisak tawn thin rawh u. Mi fel tawngtaina chuan thil nasa tak a ti thin." 
James5:17 Elija chu keimahni nungchang ang pu mihring bawk a ni a, ani chuan ruah sur lohna'n thahnemngai takin a tawngtai a; tin, kum thum leh thla ruk chhung zawng lei chungah ruah a sur ta lo a." 
James5:18 Tin, a tawngtai leh a, vanin ruah a surtir a, leiin a rahte a rawn chhuahtir ta a." 
James5:19 Ka unaute u, in zinga mi tupawh thutak atang chuan bo se la, tin, tuin emaw hawi kirtir se la,mi sual a kawng bona ata hawi kirtirtu chuan thihna ata a thlarau a chhandam ang a, sual tam tak a khuhsak bawk ang tih inhre rawh se." 
James5:20 mi sual a kawng bona ata hawi kirtirtu chuan thihna ata a thlarau a chhandam ang a, sual tam tak a khuhsak bawk ang tih inhre rawh se." 
1Peter1:1 Petera, Isua Krista tirhkoh chuan, Ponto ram te, Galatia ram te, Kappadokia ram te, Asia ram te, Bithunia ram tea Darhho awm," 
1Peter1:2 awih tur leh Isua Krista thisen theh dawng tura Thlarau tihhran a, Pa Pathian hriat lawk anga thlante hnenah chuan: In chungah khawngaihna leh remna tihpunin awm rawh se." 
1Peter1:3 Kan Lalpa Isua Krista Pathian leh Pa chu fakin awm rawh se. Ani chuan a khawngaihna nasa tak ang zelin, mitthi zing ata Isua Krista thawhlehna avangin beiseina nung hmu turin min hring leh a," 
1Peter1:4 rochan chhe thei lo, bawlhhlawh kai lo, chuai thei lo, vana in tana khek chu hmuhna turin;" 
1Peter1:5 chhandamna, hun hnuhnunga lang tura peih sa chu hmu turin, rinna avangin Pathian thiltihtheihnaa ven chu in ni." 
1Peter1:6 Chu miah chuan nasa takin in hlim a ni, tunah (a tul chuan) thlemna tinreng avangin lungngai rih mah u la;" 
1Peter1:7 in rinna fiahna, rangkachak meia fiah hnu pawha boral thin aia hlu zawk chu, Isua Krista inlar hunah chuan fakna leh chawimawina leh ropuina tur a lo nih theihna'n." 
1Peter1:8 Amah chu hmu ngai lo pawhin in hmangaih a, amah chu tunah hmu lo mah u la in ring a, lawm sawi hleih theih loh leh ropui takin in hlim em em thin;" 
1Peter1:9 in rin chhan - in thlarau chhandamna chu - hmuin. 
1Peter1:10 In chunga khawngaihna lo thleng tur thu hril lawktu zawlneiten, Krista Thlarau anmahnia awm chuan Krista tuarna turte leh chu mi hnua ropuina awm turte chu a hriat lawktir laite khan," 
1Peter1:11 eng hun nge ni, eng ang hun nge ni a hriattir thin tih chhui chhuah tumin, chu chhandamna chanchin chu an zawng a, ngun takin an chhui thin." 
1Peter1:12 Chung thu chuan mahni rawng inbawl loin, nangmahni rawng an bawl zawk tih an hnenah hriattir a ni tawh, chung thu chu van atanga tirh chhuah Thlarau Thianghlim tanpuiin Chanchin Tha hrilhtu che u khan tunah an hrilh che u a; chung thil chu vantirhkohten bih an duh thin a ni." 
1Peter1:13 Chuvangin, in rilru puan vengin ngaihven u la, Isua Krista inlar hunah chuan khawngaihna a rawn kensak tur che u chu beidawng loin beisei zel rawh u;" 
1Peter1:14 fa tihawihte angin, in hriat loh laia in hman lai chaknate anga awm loin;" 
1Peter1:15 a kotu che u a thianghlim angin nangni pawh in chetzia zawng zawngah lo thianghlim zawk rawh u; 
1Peter1:16 Nangni in thianghlim tur a ni, kei ka thianghlim si a,"" tih ziak a nih kha." 
1Peter1:17 Tin, thlei bik nei loa mi tin hnathawh ang theuha ngaihtuah thintu chu Pa anga in lam chuan heta in cham chhung zawng tih dekin awm rawh u;" 
1Peter1:18 in thlahtute pek chhawn, in awm dan engkhaw ni lawilo lak ata chu, thil chhe thei, tangka leh rangkachaka tlan in ni lo a," 
1Peter1:19 beram no hmelhem lo leh bawlhhlawh kai lo thisen anga Krista thisen hlu chuan tlan in ni zawk tih in hre si a; 
1Peter1:20 ani chu leilung pian hmain ruat lawkin a awm ngei mai, nimahsela hun hnuhnungahte hian nangmahni avangin inlarin a awm a;" 
1Peter1:21 amah avangin mitthi zing ata a kai thotu leh a ropuina petu Pathian ringtute in ni a, in rinna leh in beiseina chu Pathianah a awm theihna'n." 
1Peter1:22 Unaute hmangaih tak tak turin thutak zawma in thlarau in tihthianghlim tawh avangin thinlunga thahnem ngai takin inhmangaih tawn rawh u," 
1Peter1:23 chi chhe thei lakah ni loin, Pathian thu nung reng leh awm rengah chuan chi chhe thei lo laka piang thar in ni zawk si a." 
1Peter1:24 Mi zawng zawng hlobet ang an ni a, an ropuina zawng zawng pawh hlobet par ang a ni. Hlobet chu a vuai a,Lalpa thu erawh chu chatuanin a awm reng a ni,"" tih a ni si a. Chu chu a ni Chanchin Tha thu an hrilh che u kha." 
1Peter1:25 Lalpa thu erawh chu chatuanin a awm reng a ni,"" tih a ni si a. Chu chu a ni Chanchin Tha thu an hrilh che u kha." 
1Peter2:1 Chutichuan, sualna zawng zawng te, ngamthlemna zawng zawng te, vervekna te, itsikna te, sawichiatna zawng zawng te bansan u la," 
1Peter2:2 nausen piang tharte angin thlarau lam hnute, engmah pawlh loh chu chak rawh u, chu miah chuan chhandamna tling khawpa in than len theihna'n;" 
1Peter2:3 Lalpa chu mi khawngaih thei tak a ni tih in hriat tawh phawt chuan. 
1Peter2:4 Amah chu lung nung, mihringte duh loh ngei, Pathian ngaihah erawh chuan thlan leh hlu tak a ni, ama hnenah chuan lo kalin," 
1Peter2:5 nangni pawh lung nungte angin thlarau lam ina rem chhohin in awm, Isua Krista zara Pathian lawmzawng thlarau lam inthawina hlan turin puithiam thianghlimho in lo nihna'n." 
1Peter2:6 Chuvangin, Pathian Lehkha Thuah chuan, ""Ngai teh u, Zionah chuan a kila lung pawimawh ber, thlan, hlu tak ka rem a ni; Amah ringtu chu a mualpho lo ang,"" tih a chuang a ni." 
1Peter2:7 Chutichuan,nangni a awihte tan chuan hlu tak a ni,a awih lote tan erawh chuan, ""In satuten lung an duh loh kha,chu ngei chu a kila lung tangkai ber a lo ni ta," 
1Peter2:8 Tlukna lung leh dalna lungpui nen. An awih lo a, thu-ah chuan an tlu si thin a; chutianga ti turin ruat an ni reng bawk a." 
1Peter2:9 Nimahsela, thim ata chhuaka, a eng mak taka lut tura kotu che u thatna chu in entir theihna'n nangni zawng chi thlan, lal puithiamho, hnam thianghlim, Pathian mite ngei in ni si a;" 
1Peter2:10 hman lai khan mi reng in ni lo a, tunah erwh chuan Pathian mi in ni ta a; hman lai khan zahngaihna in hmu lo a,tunah erawh chuan zahngaihna in hmu ta a." 
1Peter2:11 Duh takte u, mikhual leh khualzin in nih avangin, thlarau do thintu tisa chaknate bansan turin ka ngen a che u;" 
1Peter2:12 Jentailte zinga in chetzia chu mawi tak ni rawh se,chutichuan thil tisualtute anga an sawichhiat che u kawngah chuan in thil tihthat an hmuhte avangin fanin an awm hunah chuan Pathian an chawimawi thei ang." 
1Peter2:13 Lalpa avang chuan mihring ruat apiangte hnenah intulut rawh u, chungnunga awm lalber hnenah emaw," 
1Peter2:14 thiltisualtute chunga phuba la tur leh, thil tithatute fak tura ama tirh chhawn Ram Awptu hnenah pawh." 
1Peter2:15 Hei hi Pathian duhzawng a ni si, mi ate thusawi fing lo chu thil tha tia in tihdan hi;" 
1Peter2:16 zalen in ni a, nimahsela in zalenna chu sual khuhna'n hmang loin, Pathian bawiha awmna'n hmang zawk rawh u." 
1Peter2:17 Mi zawng zawng chawimawi rawh u. Unauhote chu hmangaih rawh u. Pathian tih dek rawh u. Lalber chu chawimawi rawh u. 
1Peter2:18 Chhiahhlawhte u, ti dek hlirin in hotute thu thuin awm rawh u; mi tha leh mi nunnemte lakah chauh ni loin, mi nunrawngte lakah pawh." 
1Peter2:19 Miin Pathian hriatna avangin tuar loh tur tuarin lungngaihna a tuar hram hram chuan chu chu Pathian lawmzawng a ni si. 
1Peter2:20 In sual a, kut thlak in tuarin chhel takin tuar mah u la, fakna eng nge in hlawh thin? Amaherawhchu thil in tihthat a, in tuarin chhel taka in tuar chuan chu chu Pathian lawmzawng a ni." 
1Peter2:21 Krista pawh khan a tuarsak che u avangin hetiang ti turin koh in ni a sin; a hniaka in zuina turin entawn tur a hnutchhiah che u kha. 
1Peter2:22 Ani chuan thil reng a tisual lo a, a kaah ngamthlemna a awm hek lo;" 
1Peter2:23 mi hauha a awm laiin a hau ve thung lo a, a tuar laiin a vau lo a; fel taka ngaihtuah thintua hnenah chuan a inpe zawk a." 
1Peter2:24 Sual lamahte thi tawhin felna lamah kannun theihna'n amah ngeiin thingah khan a taksain kan sualte a phur a; amah vuakna vualte chuan tihdamin in awm ta a.Beram bo anga in bo kha, tunah erawh chuan in thlarau vengtu leh Hotu hnenah chuan in kir leh tak hi." 
1Peter2:25 Beram bo anga in bo kha, tunah erawh chuan in thlarau vengtu leh Hotu hnenah chuan in kir leh tak hi." 
1Peter3:1 Chutiang bawkin nangni nupuite u, mahni pasalte thu thuin awm rawh u; chutichuan an zinga tupawhin thu chu awih lo mah se la, thu loin an nupuite chetziaa hnehin an awm thei ang," 
1Peter3:2 tih dek chunga in chetze thianghlim enin. 
1Peter3:3 In incheina chu pawn lam incheina - sam phiar te, rangkachak thi awrh te, silhfena inthuam te chu - ni loin," 
1Peter3:4 thinlunga mihring thuruk chu, rilru thuhnuairawlh leh nunnem, silhfen chhe thei loa inthuam ni zawk rawh se, chu chu Pathian mithmuhin a hlu em em a ni." 
1Peter3:5 Chutiangin hmasanga hmeichhe thianghlim Pathian ringtute pawh kha mahni pasalte thu thua awmin an inchei si thin a; 
1Peter3:6 Sari'n Abrahama chu Lalpa tiin a thu a awih ang khan. Engmah hlau loa thil tha in tih tlat chuan Sari fate in ni ang. 
1Peter3:7 Chutiang bawkin nangni pasalte u, in nupuite nen in khawsak danah bel keh awlzawk an nih hrethiam u la, khawngaih thilpek nunna chanpuitu che u an nih hriain chawimawi rawh u, tichuan in tawngtainate dal a ni dawn lo nia." 
1Peter3:8 A tawp berah chuan in zain rilru hmunkhatin awm u la, inlainat tawn u la, unau angin inhmangaih u la, khawngaihna nei u la, thuhnuairawlhin awm rawh u:" 
1Peter3:9 sual, sualin thungrul suh u la, hauna haunain thungrul hek suh u la, malsawm hlauh zawk rawh u. He mi avangin koh in ni si, malsawmna chang tur hian." 
1Peter3:10 Nunna hmangaih duh leh ni thate hmuh duh chuan sual lakah a lei veng tha se la, a hmui pawh ngamthlemna thu sawi lo turin veng tha rawh se." 
1Peter3:11 Sual hawisanin thil tha ti rawh se; remna zawngin um zel rawh se. 
1Peter3:12 Lalpa mit chu mi felte chungah a fu a, a beng pawh an tawngtaina lamah a chhi si thin a, amaherawhchu, Lalpa hmel chu thil tisualtute chungah a awm thin,"" tih a ni si a." 
1Peter3:13 Thil tha lama thahnem in ngaih chuan in pawi khawihtu tur tu nge awm ang? 
1Peter3:14 Nimahsela, felna avanga lo tuar ta ang in nih chuan in eng a thawl ang. An hlauhawmna chu hlau suh u la, mangang hek suh u;" 
1Peter3:15 amaherawhchu in thinlungah Krista chu Lalah ruat rawh u; nangmahnia awm in beisei chhan zawt apiang che u chhang turin inpeih sa fo ang che u, nimahsela thuhnuairawlh tak leh tih dek chungin;" 
1Peter3:16 chhia leh tha hriatna thiang tak nei u la, chutichuan an sawichhiatna che u kawngah chuan Kristaa in awm dan tha tak sawihnawmtute chu tihmualphoin an awm thei ang." 
1Peter3:17 Thil sual tih vanga tuar ai chuan Pathian remtihzawng a nih chuan thil tha tih vanga tuar hi a tha zawk si a. 
1Peter3:18 Pathian hnena min hruai theihna'n Krista chuan sualte avangin vawi khat a tuar bawk si a, mi fel chuan mi fel lo aiin a tuar a, tisaah chuan tihthihin a awm a, thlarauvah erawh chuan tihnunin a awm ta a;" 
1Peter3:19 chu chuan tan ina thlarau awmte hnenah chuan thu a zuk tlangaupui a," 
1Peter3:20 chu chuan hmana Nova dam laia lawng siam chhung zawnga Pathian dawhtheihnain a nghah lai khan an awih lo a; chu lawngah chuan mi tlem te (chu chu mi pariat tihna a ni) tuia chhandamin an awm ta: 
1Peter3:21 chu mi anpui (baptisma) chuan Isua Krista thawhlehna avangin tunah a chhandam che u a ni, (tisa bawlhhlawh tihfai mai ni loin, chhia leh tha hriatna thianga Pathian lamna hi a ni zawk e);Isua Krista chu vanah kalin Pathian ding lamah a awm a; vantirhkohho te, thuneihna te, thiltihtheihna te ama thu thua awmtirin an awm a." 
1Peter3:22 Isua Krista chu vanah kalin Pathian ding lamah a awm a; vantirhkohho te, thuneihna te, thiltihtheihna te ama thu thua awmtirin an awm a." 
1Peter4:1 Chutichuan, Kristan tisaa a tuar avangin nangni pawh chutiang rilruknain inthuam ve rawh u; tisaa tuar tawh chuan sual a bansan tawh si a;" 
1Peter4:2 chutichuan tun hnuah tisaa in la awm chhung zawngin mihring chakna lamahte awm tawh loin, Pathian duhzawng lamah in awm tawh ang." 
1Peter4:3 Jentailte duhzawng tihna'n leh hurnaah te, taksa chaknaah te, uain hehnaah te, zu hmun hlimnaah te, zu inhonaah te, milem biakna tenawm takah te awm nan tun hma kha a tawk tawh ang;" 
1Peter4:4 chungah chuan anmahni nawmsak bawl luattuk anga inbawl ve tak loh hi mak an ti a, an sawichhe thin che u a ni;" 
1Peter4:5 anni chuan mi nung leh mitthite ngaihtuah tura inpeih sa hnenah chuan an chanchin in la sawi ang. 
1Peter4:6 He mi avang hian a ni, mitthite hnenah pawh chuan Chanchin Tha hrilh a nih ni, tisaa awm mihringte anga ngaihtuahin an awm a, thlarau erawha Pathian anga an nun theihna'n." 
1Peter4:7 Nimahsela, thil zawng zawng tawpna chu a hnai tawh a, chuvangin in tawngtai theihna'n rilru fel tak puin fimkhur rawh u." 
1Peter4:8 Eng dang zawng aiin inhmangaih tawn uar rawh u; hmangaihnain sual tam tak a khuh si thin a. 
1Peter4:9 Phunnawi loin inmikhual tawn u la; 
1Peter4:10 mi tinin thilpek in hmuh ang zelin Pathian khawngaihna tinreng enkawltu thate angin, chung chuan rawng inbawl tawn theuh rawh u." 
1Peter4:11 Mi tupawhin thu a sawi chuan Pathian thute angin sawi rawh se; mi tupawhin rawng a bawl chuan Pathianin chakna a pek ang zelin bawl rawh se; chutichuan Isua Krista avangin Pathian chu thil engkimah chawimawiin a awm thei ang, ropuina leh rorelna chu chatuana ama ta a ni si a. Amen." 
1Peter4:12 Duh takte u, in zinga fiahna nasa tak lo awm, nangmahni fiahna tura in chunga lo thleng hi, thilmak in chunga lo thleng angin mak ti suh u." 
1Peter4:13 Krista tuarnaahte tuarpuitute in nihzia ang zelin lawm zawk rawh u; chutichuan a ropuina a lo lan hunah chuan nangni pawh hlim takin in lawm thei ang. 
1Peter4:14 Krista hming avanga hau in nih chuan in eng a thawl e; Thlarau ropui tak, Pathian Thlarau chu in chungh a awm si a." 
1Peter4:15 Nimahsela, in zingah tuma'n tualthattu a nih avangin emaw, rukru a nih avangin emaw, thil tisualtu a nih avangin emaw, mi dangte thiltih relsaktu a nih avangin emaw tuar suh se." 
1Peter4:16 Amaherawhchu, Kristian a nih avangin tuar se la zak suh se." 
1Peter4:17 Rorelna chu Pathian chhungteah hian tan a hun tawh si a; tin, keimahni maha a tan hmasak chuan Pathian Chanchin Tha thu zawm lote tawpna chu engtin tak ni ang maw?" 
1Peter4:18 Tin, mi fel mah chhandam hram hram a nih chuan Pathian ngaihsak lo leh mi sual chu eng ang tak maw?Chuvangin, Pathian remtihzawng anga tuarte chuan thil tha tiin an thlaraute chu Siamtu rinawm tak hnenah kawltir rawh se." 
1Peter4:19 Chuvangin, Pathian remtihzawng anga tuarte chuan thil tha tiin an thlaraute chu Siamtu rinawm tak hnenah kawltir rawh se." 
1Peter5:1 Chutichuan, in zinga kohhran upate chu, kei, in upatpui, Krista tuarnate hretu, ropuina lo lang tur chang vetu tur hian ka fuih a che u;" 
1Peter5:2 In zinga Pathian pawlho awm chu enkawl rawh u; tih tur a nih vang ni loin, Pathian thu anga chak chung zawkin, hlepna bawlhhlawh duh vang ni hek loin, rilrua duh tak zawkin," 
1Peter5:3 in chante chungah intilal hek loin, pawlho entawnan insiam zawkin ho rawh u." 
1Peter5:4 Tin, Beram Vengtu Lalber chu a lo lan hunin, ropuina lallukhum vuai thei lo chu in hmu ang." 
1Peter5:5 Chutiang bawkin nangni tleirawl deuhte u, upa hnenahte intulut rawh u. A ni, in zain rawng inbawl tawn theuh turin thuhnuairawlhnain inthuam rawh u; Pathianin chapote a dodal a, inngaitlawmte erawh chu khawngaihna a pe si thin." 
1Peter5:6 Chuvangin, a hun teah chuan a chawimawi theihna tur che uin Pathian kut chak tak hnuaiah chuan intihnuai u la," 
1Peter5:7 anin a ngaihsak thin che u avangin in manganna zawng zawng ama chungah nghat vek rawh u. 
1Peter5:8 Ngaihven u la, fimkhur rawh u; in khingpui Diabola chu sakeibaknei rum thin angin a ei theih tur zawngin a phi ruai thin;" 
1Peter5:9 in unau khawvela awmhote chungah chuan chutiang tuarna chu a thleng ve a ni tih hriain, ring nghet taka awmin amah chu do rawh u." 
1Peter5:10 Tin, khawngaihna zawng zawng Pathian, a chatuan ropuina chang tura Kristaa kotu ngei che u chuan rei lo te in tuar hnuan a siam tha famkimin, a tinghetin, a tichak ang che u." 
1Peter5:11 Ama hnenah chuan rorelna chu chatuanin awm rawh se. Amen. 
1Peter5:12 Ka unaupa rinawm taka ka ruat Silvana kutah hian nangmahni fuih leh, chu chu Pathian khawngaihna taktak a ni tih hriattirin tawi tein inhnenah ka ziak a ni; chungah chuan ding nghet rawh u." 
1Peter5:13 Babulon khuaa awm nangmahni anga thlan nu hian chibai a buk a che u; chutiang bawkin ka fapa Marka pawhin chibai a buk a che u.Hmangaihna fawha fawpin chibai inbuk rawh u. In zinga Kristaa awm apiangte hnenah chuan remna awm rawh se. 
1Peter5:13 Babulon khuaa awm nangmahni anga thlan nu hian chibai a buk a che u; chutiang bawkin ka fapa Marka pawhin chibai a buk a che u.Hmangaihna fawha fawpin chibai inbuk rawh u. In zinga Kristaa awm apiangte hnenah chuan remna awm rawh se. 
1Peter5:14 Hmangaihna fawha fawpin chibai inbuk rawh u. In zinga Kristaa awm apiangte hnenah chuan remna awm rawh se. 
2Peter1:1 Simon Petera, Isua Krista bawih leh tirhkoh chuan Isua Krista kan Pathian leh chhandamtu felna avanga rinna hlu tak kan chan ang chang vete hnenah:" 
2Peter1:2 Pathian leh kan Lalpa Isua hriatnaah chuan in chungah khawngaihna leh remna tihpunin awm rawh se. 
2Peter1:3 Ama ropuina leh thatna zara min kotu, a chanchin hriat avangin a Pathian thiltihtheihnain nunna leh Pathian ngaihsakna lam kawngah chuan thil zawng zawng min pe si a." 
2Peter1:4 Chung zarah chuan a thutiam hlu tak leh ropui nasa takte chu min pe a ni; chutichuan chakna avanga khawvela chhiatna lo awm hi tlan chhuahsan tawhin, chung thutiam hlu tak leh ropui nasa takte avang chuan Pathian nungchang in tawmpui ve thei ang." 
2Peter1:5 A ni, chu mi avang tak chuan taihmak reng reng chhuahin, in rinnaah chuan thatna telh u la, in thatnaah chuan hriatna telh u la," 
2Peter1:6 in hriatnaah chuan insumna telh u la, in insumnaah chuan chhelna telh u la, in chhelnaah chuan Pathian ngaihsakna telh u la," 
2Peter1:7 In Pathian ngaihsaknaah chuan unaute hmangaihna telh u la, in unaute hmangaihnaah chuan hmangaihna telh rawh u." 
2Peter1:8 Chung chu in ta a nih a, a pun zel si chuan kan Lalpa Isua Krista hriatna kawngah hian thatchhe lo leh rah lo loin a siam thin che u a ni." 
2Peter1:9 Tupawh chung thil nei lo chu mitdel a ni a, hnai tea mi chauh a hmu thei a, a hman lai sualte tlenfaisakna chu a theihnghilh ta si a."
